1.1: Mu hutandiha, Hatonda gatonda egulu nʼehyalo.
1.2: Ehyalo hyali hiŋumamo hiitu hyosihyosi, ni hiri aŋo hiityo hiityo era ehiirema ni hiri hiisi ŋaatu hu maaji. NgʼOmwoyo wa Hatonda geereeranga hu maaji.
1.3: Ngʼaŋo Hatonda alagira ati, “Ŋabeŋo enjase,” era nga yibaŋo.
1.4: Nga Hatonda abona enjase ni yiri ndaŋi era nga gaabula enjase hu hiirema.
1.5: Nga Hatonda alanga enjase ati, “Muusi” ngʼehiirema ahiranga ati, “Wiire.” Ngʼegulo lyola era nga buhya, olwo njʼolwali oludaalo oludaayi.
1.6: Nga nindi Hatonda alagira ati, “Ŋabeŋo ebbanga ŋagati wʼamaaji ohwawula amaaji hu gahye.”
1.7: Nga Hatonda ataaŋo ebbanga ohwawula amaaji agaŋamugulu mu bbanga nʼagaŋaasi. Era hiityo pohyali.
1.8: Nga Hatonda alanga ebbanga ati, “Egulu.” Ngʼegulo lyola era nga buhya, olwo njʼolwali oludaalo olwohubiri.
1.9: Ngʼaŋo Hatonda alagira ati, “Amaaji hu hyalo gehumbaanie mu hifo hirala, ŋabeŋo owoomu.” Era hiityo pohyali.
1.10: Nga Hatonda alanga owoomu ati, “Hyalo,” ngʼamaaji agalanga ati, “Nyanja.” Hatonda gabona ehi aholire ni hiri hiraŋi.
1.11: Nga Hatonda alagira ati, “Ebiitu ebya hiisi hiha bimeruhe hu hyalo: ebimera ebirimo owumo nʼemisaala ejaama ebibala ni mulimo nʼowumo.” Era hiityo pohyali,
1.12: ehyalo himeruhaho ebimera ebya hiisi hiha: emisaala ejaama ebibala ni mulimo nʼowumo. Hatonda gahibona ni hiri hiraŋi.
1.13: Ngʼegulo lyola era nga buhya, olwo njʼolwali oludaalo olwohudatu.
1.14: Nga Hatonda alagira ati, “Leha ŋabeŋo ebyaduha mu bbanga ohwawulanga omuusi nʼowiire, biragenga endaalo nʼebiro nʼemyaha
1.15: era byaduhenga ohuŋa ehyalo enjase.” Era hiityo pohyali.
1.16: Nga Hatonda ahola ebyaduha ebibbala bibiri, ehyaduha ehihira obubbala ohwaduhanga mu muusi, nʼehyaduha ehitono ohwaduhanga owiire. Era ngʼatonda nʼemunyeenye.
1.17: Ngʼaŋo Hatonda abita mu bbanga biŋenga ehyalo enjase,
1.18: biŋugenga mu muusi nʼowiire era byawulengaŋo ŋagati wʼenjase nʼehiirema. Hatonda gabona ehi aholire ni hiri hiraŋi.
1.19: Ngʼegulo lyola era nga buhya, olwo njʼolwali oludaalo olwohune.
1.20: Ngʼaŋo Hatonda alagira ati, “Amaaji gabemo ebitonde eduuli era ŋabeŋo nʼenyuni jiguluhe mu bbanga.”
1.21: Era Hatonda gatonda ebitonde ebibba ebya hiisi hiha, hiisi biramu era ebigenda mu maaji ebya hiisi hiha ko nʼenyuni eja hiisi hiha. Hatonda gabona ehi aholire ni hiri hiraŋi.
1.22: Nga Hatonda abiŋa ekabi abiroma ati, “Musaale mwale era mweyongere obungi, mwijule enyanja era nʼenyuni jeyongere obungi hu hyalo.”
1.23: Ngʼegulo lyola era nga buhya, olwo njʼolwali oludaalo olwohutaanu.
1.24: Ngʼaŋo Hatonda alagira ati, “Leha ehyalo hisaale hiisi hiitu ehiri nʼobulamu: ebisolo ebyomu mago, ebitonde ebyeŋalula hwiroba ko nʼesolo ejomwisugu mu biha byajo.” Era hiityo pohyali.
1.25: Nga Hatonda atonda ebyayo ebya hiisi hiha nʼesolo ejomwisugu eja hiisi hiha nʼebitonde ebyeŋalula hwiroba. Hatonda gabona ehi aholire ni hiri hiraŋi.
1.26: Ngʼaŋo Hatonda aloma ati, “Hutonde omuutu mu hifaananyi hyefe, abe hyefe. Era baŋuge enyeeni mu nyanja nʼenyuni nʼebisolo ebyomu mago nʼehyalo hyosihyosi nʼebitonde byosibyosi ebigenda hwiroba.”
1.27: Nga Hatonda awumba omuutu mu hifaananyi hihye ehyene, mu hifaananyi hya Hatonda gamuwumba, omusinde nʼomuhasi polu gabawumba.
1.28: Ngʼaŋo Hatonda abaŋa ekabi, abaloma ati, “Musaale mwale mweyongere obungi, mwijule ehyalo, muhiŋuge. Muŋuge enyeeni mu nyanja, hiisi nyuni era muŋuge hiisi hitonde ehigenda hu hyalo.”
1.29: Nga Hatonda aloma abaatu abo ati, “Mbaŋaaye hiisi wumo era hiisi musaala ogwama ebibala nʼowumo waagwo. Byosibyosi bija huba bibyo byahulya.
1.30: Era hiisi hisolo hu hyalo, hiisi nyuni era hiisi hiitu ehiramu ehigenda hu hyalo, kiŋaaye enyaasi ohuba mere.” Era hiityo pohyali.
1.31: Nga Hatonda abona hiisi ehi gahola ni hiri hiraŋi bugali. Ngʼegulo lyola era nga buhya, olwo njʼolwali oludaalo olwomukaaga.

2.1: Mu ngeri eyo, ngʼohutonda hwegulu nʼehyalo nʼebiitu byosibyosi, huŋwa.
2.2: Oludaalo olwomusanvu ko lwole, Hatonda gaali ahenire emirimo jije josijosi era nga aŋuumula hu ludaalo olwomusanvu.
2.3: Nga Hatonda aŋa oludaalo olwomusanvu ekabi, alufuula lwawufu hu jahye olwohuba njʼolu gaŋuumuliraho nʼahenire ohuhola omulimo ogwohutonda. Adamu ni Kaawa
2.4: Bino njʼebyaliŋo mu hutonda hwegulu nʼehyalo: Musengwa Hatonda ni gatonda egulu nʼehyalo,
2.5: ŋaali ŋaŋuma misaala oba ebimera byosibyosi. Hyali hiityo olwohuba Musengwa Hatonda gaali ahiiri hutonyesa efula hu hyalo era ŋaali ŋaŋuma muutu owʼohulima.
2.6: Aye mu hiseera ehyo olume lwadoosanga eroba hiisi ŋaatu.
2.7: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa Hatonda awumba omuutu mwiroba ngʼahena amufuuŋamo omuuya ogwʼobulamu mu suulu, ngʼomuutu afuuha mulamu.
2.8: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa Hatonda ategeha endimiro ebuŋwalyuba mu hifo ehi balanga baati Edeni, ngʼaŋamba omuutu oyu gawumba amuta omwo.
2.9: Era Musengwa Hatonda amesa emisaala ejisangaasa ohubona era emiraŋi ohulya. Ŋagati wʼendimiro eyo, mwalimo omusaala oguleeta obulamu nʼomusaala oguleetera omuutu ohumanya ehiraŋi nʼehibi.
2.10: Ŋahaani mu Edeni omwo mwasimuhamo olwabi olwajuhiiriranga endimiro eyo. Era olwabi olwo lweyabulamo esaga ene.
2.11: Olusaga olusooka balulanga baati Pisoni. Olwo lubita lwetoloola mu hyalo hyʼe Kavira hyosihyosi omuli ezaabbu.
2.12: Era ezaabbu eyomu hyalo ehyo ndaŋi bugali, mulimo nʼebyahawoowo ebi balanga baati bbedula ko nʼamabaale agʼebbeeyi aga balanga baati sokamu.
2.13: Olusaga olwohubiri ni balulanga baati Gihoni, lwetoloola mu hyalo hyʼe Kuusi hyosihyosi.
2.14: Olusaga olwohudatu balulanga baati Tigiriisi, lubita hutulo wʼebuŋwalyuba wa Busuuli. Olusaga olwohune balulanga baati Yufuleeti.
2.15: Musengwa Hatonda ni gaŋamba omuutu gamuta mu ndimiro Edeni, gamutamo ayirabirirenga.
2.16: Nga Musengwa Hatonda aloma omuutu ati, “Oli wʼedembe ohulya hu bibala byʼomusaala gwosigwosi hu misaala ejomu ndimiro
2.17: aye sooli nʼohulya hu bibala byʼomusaala oguleetera omuutu ohumanya ehiraŋi nʼehibi olwohuba mu butuufu olu olibiryaho oja hufa.”
2.18: Nga Musengwa Hatonda aloma ati, “Sihiraŋi omuutu ohuba yeŋene. Nja humuholerayo omuyeedi amusaanira.”
2.19: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa Hatonda atonda hiisi solo nʼenyuni ohuŋwa mwiroba. Ni gahena, ngʼabiŋirira omuutu abigulihe amasiina era hiisi ehi gabiranga, eryo njʼesiina lyahyo.
2.20: Ngʼomuutu aguliha ebyayo nʼenyuni era nʼesolo ejomwisugu amasiina. Aye Adamu sigasunamo muyeedi amusaanira.
2.21: Olwʼehyo, Musengwa Hatonda gamuleetera ero eryʼamaani, gaŋenyuha. Ni gaali nʼaŋenyuha nga Hatonda amwomolamo olubafu ngʼahena asembaŋo nʼenyama.
2.22: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa Hatonda aŋamba olubafu olugatusa mu musinde aluholamo omuhasi, ahena amumuŋirira.
2.23: Adamu ni gabona hu muhasi, galoma ati, “Ono njʼegumba eriŋooye mu magumba gange era mubiri oguŋooye mu mubiri gwange. Baja humulanganga baati ‘muhasi,’ olwohuba bamutuhiise mu musinde.”
2.24: Olwʼehyo omusinde analehenga semwana ni nyina, nga geŋimba nʼomuhasi wuwe nga bombi bafuuha mubiri mulala.
2.25: Omusinde nʼomuhasi wuwe baali majula aye ni baŋumaho soni.

3.1: Musengwa Hatonda gatonda esolo josijosi aye omusota gwali mugesigesi ohuhira josijosi. Ngʼaŋo lulala guloma omuhasi guuti, “Kaho Hatonda galoma ati, ‘Simulyanga hu bibala byʼomusaala gwosigwosi hu misaala jomu ndimiro’?”
3.2: Ngʼomuhasi agugobolamo ati, “Huli badembe ohulya hu bibala byʼemisaala jomu ndimiro
3.3: ohutusaho Hatonda galoma ati, ‘Simulyanga hu bibala byʼomusaala oguli ŋagati wʼendimiro era nʼohuguŋambaho simuguŋambangaho, ni muli hihola muja hufa.’ ”
3.4: Ngʼomusota gumuloma guuti, “Mu butuufu simuja hufa.
3.5: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Hatonda amanyire ati olu muligulyaho, emoni jenywe jija hulimbuha era mwesi mube hya Hatonda, ohumanya ehiraŋi nʼehibi.”
3.6: Omuhasi ni gabona ehibala hyʼomusaala ni hiboneha bulaŋi era ni hisaanira ohulya nga gegomba ohuhirya olwohuba hyali hireeta amagesi, kale nga anoga alya. Ngʼaŋaho ni wamwe yeesi owaali ŋalala ni naye.
3.7: Ngʼaŋo emoni jaawe bombi jiiguha nga betegeera baati baali majula. Olwʼehyo banabanabania amahoola gʼemitiini, nga betaaho.
3.8: Egulo ni lyola, ngʼAdamu nʼomuhasi wuwe baŋulira Musengwa Hatonda nʼagenda mu ndimiro. Ni baŋulira, behweha hu Musengwa Hatonda ŋagati mu misaala ejomu ndimiro.
3.9: Nga Musengwa Hatonda alanga Adamu amubuusa ati, “Oli ŋeena?”
3.10: NgʼAdamu amugobolamo ati, “Ni puliiye nʼogenda mu ndimiro, obuti bupambire nga nehweha olwohuba mbaye majula.”
3.11: Ngʼamubuusa ati, “Omanyire otye oti oli majula? Oliiye hu bibala byʼomusaala ogu nahugaana ohulyaho?”
3.12: NgʼAdamu amugobolamo ati, “Omuhasi oyu waapa ohubanga ni neese njʼowupaaye ehibala, nga ndya.”
3.13: Nga Musengwa Hatonda abuusa omuhasi ati, “Oholire hiina ehyo?” Ngʼomuhasi aloma ati, “Omusota njʼogukooŋire, nga ndya.”
3.14: Nga Musengwa Hatonda aloma omusota ati, “Olwohuba ohooŋire omuhasi, osunire ehiraamo ohuhiraho ebyayo ko nʼesolo josijosi ejomwisugu! Onagenderenga hida era onalyenga fuuhe endaalo josijosi ejʼobulamu buwo.
3.15: Era nja hutaaŋo obulabe ŋagati wuwo nʼomuhasi, naŋagati wʼolulyo lulwo nʼolwomuhasi. Omwana wuwe aja hutetenula omutwe gugwo era weesi oja hubbonja ehibbonje hihye.”
3.16: Ngʼaloma omuhasi ati, “Nja huhwongeraho obulumi nʼosaala era oja husaaliranga mu bulumi. Onaŋembenga hu wamwo era aja huhuŋuganga.”
3.17: Ngʼaloma Adamu ati, “Olwohuba oŋulirihiise omuhasi wuwo, walya hu hibala hyʼomusaala ehi nahugaana, hu lulwo eroba lisunire ehiŋwabo. Onahalabanenga ko wasuna ehyohulya endaalo josijosi ejʼobulamu buwo.
3.18: Eroba linamerenga amaŋwa amahosa nʼamanani era onalyenga bimera byomwisugu.
3.19: Onahahaluhanenga era watuyaana ko wasuna ehyohulya ohwola olu olyagama mwiroba, olwohuba omwo pomu waŋwa. Era olwohuba oli loba, mwiroba muweene omwo pomu olyagama.”
3.20: Ebyo ni baŋwa, ngʼAdamu aguliha omuhasi wuwe esiina ati Kaawa, olwohuba gaali aja hufuuha nyina wʼabaatu bosibosi.
3.21: Nga Musengwa Hatonda aholera Adamu nʼomuhasi wuwe ebyambalo mu byanjo, ngʼabambasa.
3.22: Nga Musengwa Hatonda aloma ati, “Ŋaahani omuutu afuuhire hyefe, amanyire ehiraŋi nʼehibi. Hutamuleha hunoga alye hu musaala oguleeta obulamu ohuwangala emirembe nʼemirembe.”
3.23: Nga Musengwa Hatonda amubbinga ohuŋwa mu ndimiro Edeni, amuŋindiha aje alime eroba omu gamuwumba.
3.24: Oluvanyuma lwʼohubbinga omuutu mu ndimiro Edeni, Hatonda gaata ebuŋwalyuba wʼendimiro abakerubbi nʼepiima emasamasa ni yetala, ohuhuuma omuutu ohutalya hu musaala oguleeta obulamu.

4.1: Ehiseera hyola, ngʼAdamu aŋenyuha nʼomuhasi wuwe Kaawa, ngʼasuna ehida asaala Kayini. Nga Kaawa aloma ati, “ Musengwa yebale ohuupa omwana omuseere.”
4.2: Oluvanyuma ngʼasaala omwana owundi nga bamuguliha baati Abbiri. Ni bahula, Abbiri ngʼaba mwayi wʼetaama, Kayini ngʼaba mulimi.
4.3: Ehiseera hyola, nga Kayini aŋira birala hu birime bibye ohuŋonga eyiri Musengwa .
4.4: NgʼAbbiri aŋamba ndala hu taama jije eyaali endaayi mu husaaliwa, ayisala atusaamo ebitundu byayo ebyali ni bisinga ohuba ebisava abiŋongayo. Nga Musengwa asiima ebi Abbiri gaŋonga,
4.5: aye ngʼatala ebya Kayini. Ehyo nga hiruŋia Kayini bugali weene era gasusuŋala nomu moni.
4.6: Nga Musengwa abuusa Kayini ati, “Lwahiina oluŋire era wasusuŋala nomu moni?
4.7: Nja huhusiima singa ohola ebiraŋi. Aye nʼotahola ebiraŋi, ehibi hibundaaye ŋa lwigi hyenda hihuŋuge aye oli nʼohuhiŋangula.”
4.8: Ngʼaŋo Kayini aloma mugandawe Abbiri ati, “Hutiine mu ndimiro.” Ni baali ni bali eyo mu ndimiro, nga Kayini agwa hu mugandawe Abbiri, amwita.
4.9: Nga Musengwa abuusa Kayini ati, “Mugandawo Abbiri ali ŋe?” Nga Kayini amugobolamo ati, “Simanyire, ndiise omuhuumi wa muganda yange?”
4.10: Nga Musengwa aloma Kayini ati, “Oholire hiina ehyo? Amafugi ga mugandawo gaali hundiririra ohuŋwa mwiroba.
4.11: Ŋaahani oliho ehiŋwabo era kubbingire nomu loba erinyooye amafugi ga mugandawo.
4.12: Onahalabanenga aye eroba sirinahwamirenga mere. Oja hubererera nʼolerenga hu hyalo nʼoŋuma aŋa weŋogoma.”
4.13: Ngʼaŋo Kayini aloma Musengwa ati, “O-o, ehibonerezo ehi wupaaye hibbala bugali era sisobola nahuhigumira.
4.14: Wumbingire ohuŋwa hwiroba lino era wumbingire nʼohuŋwa aŋa oli. Ŋaahani nja hulerenga hu hyalo ni kaya aŋa neŋogoma era singa ŋabaŋo oyu ndigwamo, alinjita.”
4.15: Nga Musengwa aloma Kayini ati, “Bbe sihija huba hiityo era yesiyesi alihwita, aja husuna ehyegalulo emirundi musanvu.” Nga Musengwa ata eraama hu Kayini hiisi amubona atamwita.
4.16: Nga Kayini ahena aŋwa mu moni ja Musengwa , atiina mu hyalo hyʼe Noodi ebuŋwalyuba wʼEdeni.
4.17: Ngʼehiseera hyola, Kayini aŋenyuha nʼomuhasi wuwe era omuhasi wuwe ngʼagwamo ehida asaala omwana musinde bamuguliha baati Enoka. Mu hiseera ehyo Kayini gaali alihutongola ehibuga era ngʼahitaho esiina lyʼomusaani ati Enoka.
4.18: Ngʼaŋo Enoka asaala Yiradi nga Yiradi asaala Mekuyayeri nga Mekuyayeri asaala Mesusayeeri nga Mesusayeeri asaala Lameeka.
4.19: Nga Lameeka aleeta abahasi babiri, omudaayi gaali njʼAda, owohubiri gaali nje Ziira.
4.20: NgʼAda asaala Yabbaali semwana wʼabo abamenya mu weema era abaayi bʼebyayo.
4.21: Mugandawe gaali nje Yubbali, oyo nje semwana wʼabo abahubbi bʼebidongo nʼemirere.
4.22: Nga Ziira yeesi asaala omwana omusinde oyu balanganga baati Tubbali Kayini. Oyo gaali mubboti wa hiisi hiitu ohuŋwa mu byoma. Mboojo ya Tubbalu Kayini gaali nje Naama.
4.23: Olwola, nga Lameeka aloma abahasi babe ati, “Ada ni Ziira enywe abahasi ba Lameeka mupulirise, muŋulire ebibono byange. Ese, neeta omuutu olwohuba gaafumita, neeta omuvubuka olwʼehisago ehi gaataho.
4.24: Obanga owiita Kayini balimwegalula emirundi musanvu, balyegalula emirundi sanvu namusanvu olwa Lameeka.”
4.25: NgʼAdamu nindi aŋenyuha nʼomuhasi wuwe, asaala omwana museere nga bamuguliha baati Seezi, mula nʼaloma ati, “Hatonda gapaaye omwana owundi mu hifo hyʼAbbiri oyu Kayini geeta.”
4.26: Seezi ni gahula nga yeesi asaala omwana museere bamuguliha baati Enosi. Ebiseera ebyo mbebi baatu batandihiramo ohujumirya Musengwa .

5.1: Luno njʼolwanji lwʼamasiina gʼabaatu abomu lulyo lwʼAdamu. Hatonda ni gawumba omuutu, gamuwumba mu hifaananyi hihye.
5.2: Gawumba omusinde nʼomuhasi, ngʼahena abaŋa ekabi. Ngʼabalanga ati baatu.
5.3: Adamu ni gahena emyaha cikumi mwasatu, gasaala omwana museere owaali nʼamufaanana, mu hifaananyi hihye ehyene era ngʼamuguliha esiina ati Seezi.
5.4: Oluvanyuma lwʼohusaala Seezi, Adamu gahena emyaha lunaana, ngʼasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
5.5: Ŋosiŋosi Adamu gahena emyaha lwenda nʼadatu, ngʼafa.
5.6: Seezi ni gahena emyaha cikumi nʼetaanu, ngʼasaala Enosi.
5.7: Oluvanyuma lwa Seezi ohusaala Enosi, gahena emyaha lunaana namusanvu ngʼasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
5.8: Ŋosiŋosi, Seezi gahena emyaha lwenda ehumi nʼebiri, ngʼafa.
5.9: Enosi ni gahena emyaha cenda, gasaala Kenani.
5.10: Oluvanyuma lwʼEnosi ohusaala Kenani, gahena emyaha lunaana ehumi nʼetaanu, gasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
5.11: Ŋosiŋosi Enosi gahena emyaha lwenda nʼetaanu, ngʼafa.
5.12: Kenani ni gahena emyaha sanvu, gasaala Mahalalyeri.
5.13: Oluvanyuma lwa Kenani ohusaala Mahalalyeri, gahena emyaha lunaana mu ana, gasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
5.14: Ŋosiŋosi Kenani gahena emyaha lwenda nʼehumi, ngʼafa.
5.15: Mahalalyeri ni gahena emyaha kaaga nʼetaanu, gasaala Yaledi.
5.16: Oluvanyuma lwa Mahalalyeri ohusaala Yaledi, gahena emyaha lunaana mwasatu, gasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
5.17: Ŋosiŋosi Mahalalyeri gahena emyaha lunaana mu cenda nʼetaanu, ngʼafa.
5.18: Yaledi ni gahena emyaha cikumi nakaaga nʼebiri, gasaala Enoka.
5.19: Oluvanyuma lwa Yaledi ohusaala Enoka, gahena emyaha lunaana, ngʼasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
5.20: Ŋosiŋosi Yaledi gahena emyaha lwenda kaaga nʼebiri, ngʼafa.
5.21: Enoka ni gahena emyaha kaaga nʼetaanu, gasaala Mesuseela.
5.22: Oluvanyuma lwʼEnoka ohusaala Mesuseela, ngʼaba nʼekolagana endaŋi ni Hatonda ohuhena emyaha bidatu era gahena gasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
5.23: Ŋosiŋosi, Enoka gahena emyaha bidatu kaaga nʼetaanu.
5.24: Mu bulamu wuwe, Enoka gaali nʼekolagana endaŋi ni Hatonda era lwali lulala nga Hatonda amutusa mu hyalo muno nʼahiiri mulamu.
5.25: Mesuseela ni gahena emyaha cikumi mukinaana namusanvu, gasaala Lameeka.
5.26: Oluvanyuma lwa Mesuseela ohusaala Lameeka, gahena emyaha lusanvu kinaana nʼebiri ngʼasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
5.27: Ŋosiŋosi, Mesuseela gahena emyaha lwenda kaaga namwenda, ngʼafa.
5.28: Lameeka ni gahena emyaha cikumi kinaana nʼebiri, gasaala omwana omuseere.
5.29: Omwana oyo gamuguliha esiina ati nje Nuwa, nʼaloma ati, “Omwana ono alituleetera ehiŋuumulo ohuŋwa mu huhalabana nʼohutegana ohwaja Musengwa ni gaholimira eroba.”
5.30: Oluvanyuma lwʼohusaaliwa hwa Nuwa, Lameeka gahena emyaha bitaanu cenda nʼetaanu ngʼasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
5.31: Ŋosiŋosi, Lameeka gahena emyaha lusanvu sanvu namusanvu, ngʼafa.
5.32: Oluvanyuma lwa Nuwa ohuhena emyaha bitaanu, gasaala Seemu ni Kaamu ko ni Yafeesi.

6.1: Abaatu ni batandiiha ohweyongera obungi hu hyalo, basaala abaana bahaana.
6.2: Ngʼabaana ba Hatonda babona abahaana bʼabaatu ni baali baŋoono, nga babaŋira ohuba bahasi baawe ngʼolu basiimanga mu myoyo jaawe abeene.
6.3: Nga Musengwa aloma ati, “Sinja huleha muutu huwangaala emirembe nʼemirembe olwohuba mubiri bubiri. Ŋaahani aja huhenanga emyaha cikumi mwabiri joŋene.”
6.4: Mu hiseera ehyo era nʼebyalondaho, ŋaaliŋo Abanefuuli hu hyalo era babasaala olu baana ba Hatonda baŋenyuhanga nʼabahaana bʼabaatu. Ahale hale, Abanefuuli abo baali baatu abʼamaani era ni bamanyiheene.
6.5: Nga Musengwa abona ebibi byʼomuutu ni biri bingi hu hyalo era hiisi hufumitiriza hwʼebiŋeego bibye habuhyabuhya ni huli hu huhola bibi hyoŋene.
6.6: Era ehyo hyanakuŋasa Musengwa , gehebulisa lwahiina gawumba omuutu.
6.7: Nga Musengwa aloma ati, “Nja husihiirisa omuutu oyu samwene newumbira mutuse hu hyalo. Era omuutu nʼesolo nʼebyeŋalula hwiroba nʼenyuni, nja hubisihiirisa olwohuba nehebulisa lwahiina nabitonda.”
6.8: Aye wayire ebyo byali biityo, Nuwa niye gaali muhoda eyiri Musengwa . Ebiŋamba hu Nuwa
6.9: Bino njʼebiŋamba hu Nuwa: Nuwa mu mulembe gugwe gaali muutu mugwalaafu ni ŋaŋuma hyahumweŋambya. Era gaali nʼekolagana endaŋi ni Hatonda.
6.10: Nuwa gaali nʼabasaani badatu: Seemu ni Kaamu ko ni Yafeesi.
6.11: Abaatu hu hyalo baali mu gwa huhola bibi mu moni ja Hatonda era ni bejuuye buhambwe bwoŋene.
6.12: Hatonda gabona ehyalo ni hyejuuye bibi olwohuba hiisi muutu hu hyalo gaali hu gwahuhola bibi.
6.13: Nga Hatonda aloma Nuwa ati, “Ekomerero ya hiisi muutu yoolire olwohuba ehyalo hyejuuye ebikolwa byawe ebibi. Ŋaahani nja husihiirisa ehyalo nʼabaatu bosibosi.
6.14: Olwʼehyo, baaja meeri mu musaala ogu balanga baati gofeeri. Emeeri eyo yija huba ya kalina era oyiŋaheho kolansi mugati nohu mugulu.
6.15: Baaja meeri eyʼefuuti bina nʼataanu obuleeŋi, obugalamu efuuti sanvu nʼetaanu, obuleeŋi ŋamugulu efuuti ane nʼetaanu.
6.16: Lehaho amadegeyi agʼeyiici ehumi namunaana, ohene oteho nʼomulyango mu mbafu. Emeeri eyo yija huba lya kalina edatu.
6.17: Nja huleeta amataba hu hyalo ohusihiirisa hiisi hiitu ehiramu. Era hiisi hiitu hija hufa.
6.18: Aye ndihola endagaano yange ni neewe. Ewe nʼomuhasi wuwo nʼabasaani babo ko nʼabahasi baawe, muja hwingira mu meeri.
6.19: Era oja hwingisa hiisi hitonde mu meeri ohuba ni neewe ko biŋone. Oja hwingisa bibiri bibiri, ehisinde nʼehihasi.
6.20: Oja huŋamba hiisi hiha hyʼenyuni nʼehyesolo era hiisi hitonde ehigenda hwiroba, ehihasi nʼehisinde mwingire ni nabyo mu meeri bitasihiiriha.
6.21: Oja huhumbaania hiisi hiha hyʼemere, obunge mu meeri. Ewe nʼamago gago ko nʼebitonde muja hulyangaho.”
6.22: Era Nuwa gahola ebyo byosibyosi ngʼolu Hatonda gamulagira.

7.1: Ehiseera hyola nga Musengwa aloma Nuwa ati, “Ewe nʼamago gago mwesimwesi, mwingire mu meeri olwohuba oli mugwalaafu mu moni jange mu mulembe guno.
7.2: Ŋamba hiisi hiha hyʼehisolo ehirongoofu musanvu musanvu ehihasi nʼehisinde era ohene oŋambe bibiri bibiri hu bitali birongoofu ehihasi nʼehisinde,
7.3: oŋambe hiisi hiha hyʼenyuni musanvu musanvu, ehihasi nʼehisinde byahasaala mu hyalo oluvanyuma lwʼamataba.
7.4: Hiri hiityo olwohuba oluvanyuma lwʼendaalo musanvu ohuŋwa olwa leero, nja hutonyesa efula hu hyalo yigwe omuusi nʼowiire ohuhena endaalo amahumi ane. Era nja husihiirisa hiisi hiitu ehiŋeera ehi natonda.”
7.5: Era Nuwa gahola hiisi hiitu ngʼolu Musengwa gamulagira.
7.6: Mu hiseera ehi mataba gaali hu hyalo, Nuwa gaali nʼemyaha lukaaga.
7.7: Era Nuwa nʼomuhasi wuwe nʼabasaani babe ko nʼabahasi baawe bengira emeeri ohuŋona amataba.
7.8: Ebisolo ebirongoofu nʼebitali birongoofu ko nʼenyuni nʼebitonde byosibyosi ebigendera hwiroba
7.9: bibiri bibiri ehisinde nʼehihasi, byengira ni Nuwa mu meeri ngʼolu Hatonda gamulagira.
7.10: Era oluvanyuma lwʼendaalo omusanvu ejo, amataba gaaja hu hyalo.
7.11: Nuwa ni gaali nʼaŋesa emyaha lukaaga, mu mwesi ogwohubiri ngʼehumi namusanvu, esulo josijosi ohuŋwa mwiroba jiiguha nʼegulu lyosi nga liŋomoha.
7.12: Era efula yajofumuha hu hyalo endaalo amahumi ane mu muusi nʼowiire.
7.13: Hu ludaalo olwo olu efula yatandihiraho ohujofumuha, Nuwa nʼomuhasi wuwe nʼabasaani babe badatu, Seemu ni Kaamu ni Yafeesi ko nʼabahasi baawe, bengira emeeri.
7.14: Bengira meeri nahiisi hiha hyʼesolo ejomwisugu ko nʼebyayo, hiisi hitonde ehigenda hwiroba, hiisi hiha hyʼenyuni, josijosi ejiri nʼamabaŋa.
7.15: Hiisi bitonde byatiina bibiri bibiri eyiri Nuwa nga byengira emeeri.
7.16: Ebisolo ebyengira emeeri byali ehisinde nʼehihasi ebya hiisi hiha ngʼolu Hatonda gamulagira. Nga Musengwa ahena amwigalira mugati.
7.17: Ohuhenera erala endaalo amahumi ane, amataba geyongera hu hyalo era amaaji geyongera ohuniina gadunda emeeri ohuŋwa hwiroba.
7.18: Amaaji geeyongera bugali hu hyalo, emeeri niyo ni yiseeyeeya huseeyeeya hu mugulu wʼamaaji.
7.19: Era amaaji geeyongeranga hweyongera bugali weene hu hyalo goola ohumiraho esozi endeeŋi josijosi ŋaasi wʼeryuba.
7.20: Ni geeyongera obungi, gamiraho esozi endeeŋi nʼohuhiraho efuuti amahumi abiri.
7.21: Hiisi hitonde hu hyalo hyafa: enyuni nʼebyayo nʼesolo ejomwisugu ko nʼabaatu bosibosi.
7.22: Hiisi hiitu hu hyalo ehiri nʼomuuya ogwʼobulamu hyafa.
7.23: Mu ngeri eyo, Musengwa gasihiirisa hiisi hiitu ehiramu ehyali hu hyalo: abaatu nʼesolo nʼenyuni. Era owaŋonaho gaali nje Nuwa yeŋene ko ni naabo aba gaali ni nabo mu meeri.
7.24: Amataba gaahena hu hyalo endaalo cikumi nʼataanu.

8.1: Hatonda sigerabira Nuwa nʼebisolo byosibyosi ebi gaali ni nabyo mu meeri. Olwʼehyo, gaŋindiha embeŋo yafuuŋa hu hyalo ngʼamaaji gahendera.
8.2: Mu hiseera ehyo, esulo hu hyalo jegalira ndijitusa maaji nʼegulu lyosi lyaleheraŋo ohujofumuha.
8.3: Amaaji geyongera ohuhendeera hu hyalo mu ndaalo cikumi mwataanu.
8.4: Mu ndaalo ejo, mu mwesi ogwomusanvu hu ludaalo olwʼehumi namusanvu, emeeri yihala hu lusozi Ararati.
8.5: Amaaji hu hyalo geeyongera ohuhenderera erala era nga lulala omwesi ogwʼehumi esozi jaali jitandihire ohubonehahuho.
8.6: Ngʼoluvanyuma lwʼendaalo amahumi ane, Nuwa gegulaŋo edinisa lyʼemeeri.
8.7: Ngʼaŋamba nahinywamalwa amutusa ewulafu. Ni gatula, ngʼaguluha atiina era pogaagama ni getoloola hiisi ŋaatu ohwola olu maaji gomeera hu hyalo.
8.8: Ngʼaŋo aŋindiha eŋuusi litiine libone obanga amaaji gomeeye hu hyalo.
8.9: Aye siryabona ŋa hugwa olwohuba ehyalo hyali hihiiri maaji mereere. Olwʼehyo, lyagamayo nga Nuwa atusa omuhono aliŋamba alingisa mu meeri.
8.10: Ni ŋabitaŋo endaalo musanvu, nga nindi aliŋindiha ohuŋwa mu meeri litiine libone oba amaaji gomeeye.
8.11: Eŋuusi lyagamayo ehyʼegulo nʼahahoola ahabisi ahʼomusaala omuzayiti mu hanwa! Ngʼaŋo Nuwa ategeera ati amaaji gomeeye hu hyalo.
8.12: Nga nindi abisyaŋo endaalo musanvu aŋindiha eŋuusi, aye ni lyatiina, siryagobola.
8.13: Hu ludaalo oludaayi olwʼomwesi omudaayi, Nuwa ni gaali nʼaŋesa emyaha lukaaga namulala, amaaji gaali gomeeye hu hyalo. Hu ludaalo olwo, gawihulaho ehitundu hya hasolya hʼemeeri ngʼalengeesa ebulafu ngʼabona amaaji ni gomeeye.
8.14: Mu mwesi ogwohubiri ngʼabiri namusanvu, ehyalo hyali hyomeeye erala.
8.16: “Ŋaahani ewe nʼomuhasi wuwo nʼabasaani babo ko nʼabahasi baawe, mutule mu meeri.
8.17: Tusa hiisi hitonde ehibaaye ni hiri ni neewe mu meeri: enyuni nʼebisolo era hiisi hitonde ehigendera hwiroba, bisaale byale biŋere hu hyalo.”
8.18: Nga Nuwa nʼomuhasi wuwe nʼabasaani babe ko nʼabahasi baawe batula mu meeri.
8.19: Ebisolo byosibyosi ko nʼebitonde ebindi ebigendera hwiroba byosibyosi nʼenyuni josijosi, hiisi hitonde ehiri hu hyalo ehya hiisi hiha hyatula mu meeri.
8.20: Ngʼaŋo Nuwa atongolera Musengwa ehituuti ohuŋeeraho eŋongo ngʼaŋamba hiisi hiha hyʼehisolo nʼenyuni enongoofu, abiŋonga ebyohye biguhuliha hu hituuti ohwo.
8.21: Nga Musengwa aŋunyira olusyololo aloma mu mwoyo gugwe ati, “Sinja huŋwaba hyalo nindi olwʼomuutu wayire hiisi ehi aŋeega hibi ohuŋwa mu buŋere buwe. Era sinja husihiirisa ebitonde nʼamataba ngʼolu nabisihiirisa.
8.22: “Ehyalo ni hihiriŋo, ohuhoma nʼohuhungula ebirime, ebiseera byʼefula ko nʼebyendobooli, omuusi nʼowiire, sibija huhoma.”

9.1: Nga Hatonda aŋa Nuwa nʼabasaani babe ekabi aloma ati, “Musaale mwale era mweyongere mwijule ehyalo.
9.2: Esolo josijosi nʼenyuni nʼenyeeni mu nyanja ko nʼebitonde ebindi byosibyosi ebigendera hwiroba, binabatyenga. Era byosibyosi mbibaŋaaye ohuba ŋaasi wenywe, mu biŋuge.
9.3: Mbaŋaaye hiisi hiitu ehiramu ehigenda ohuba mere yenywe. Ngʼolu nabaŋa ebimera, mbaŋa hiisi hiitu.
9.4: “Aye simulyanga enyama ehiirimo amafugi olwohuba obulamu buli mu mafugi.
9.5: Era nja huvunaananga omuutu owiita owahye. Era nja huvunaana esolo eyiita omuutu nʼomuutu owiita owahye.
9.6: “Hatonda gawumba omuutu mu hifaananyi hihye. Olwʼehyo, hiisi owiita owahye, yeesi baja humwitanga.
9.8: Ngʼaŋo Hatonda aloma Nuwa nʼabasaani babe ati,
9.9: “Kola endagaano yange ni nenywe nʼolulyo lwenywe,
9.10: nga muweene omwo pomuli hiisi hitonde: enyuni nʼebyayo nʼesolo ejomwisugu, ejo josijosi eji obaaye nʼoli ni najo mu meeri, ebitonde byosibyosi hu hyalo.
9.11: Kola endagaano yange ni nenywe. Sinja husihiirisa hyalo nʼamataba nindi oba ohusihiirisa ebiitu hu hyalo.”
9.12: Nga Hatonda aloma Nuwa ati, “Hano njʼahaja ohuba ahabonero ahʼendagaano ŋagati wange ni neewe ko nʼebitonde byosibyosi, endagaano eyʼemirembe nʼemirembe:
9.13: taaye olufudu lwange hu bireri era luja huba habonero ahʼendagaano yange eyi ndageene ni neewe nʼehyalo hyosihyosi.
9.14: Olu naleetenga ebireri hwigulu byawiiha ehyalo, olufudu lwaboneha hu bireri,
9.15: nja huhebuliranga endagaano yange eyi kolire ni nenywe nʼebitonde byosibyosi ebya hiisi hiha. Sinja husihiirisa hyalo nʼamataba nindi.
9.16: Hiisi olu lufudu lunajenga hu bireri, nja hulubonanga nga kebulira endagaano yange eyʼemirembe nʼemirembe eyiri ŋagati wange nʼebitonde byosibyosi ebya hiisi hiha hu hyalo.”
9.17: Nga Hatonda aloma Nuwa ati, “Aho njʼahabonero hʼendagaano ŋagati wange nʼebitonde byosibyosi hu hyalo.” Abasaani ba Nuwa
9.18: Abasaani ba Nuwa abaaŋwa mu meeri baali Seemu ni Kaamu ko ni Yafeesi. Era Kaamu njʼowaali semwana ya Kanani.
9.19: Abo bondatu njʼabaali abasaani ba Nuwa era mu bo pomwaŋwa abaatu abeejula ehyalo.
9.20: Nuwa gaali mulimi era njʼowatandiha ohulima emizabbibbu.
9.21: Lulala, ganywa hu mwenge ogwomu mizabbibbu, gameera ngʼaŋenyuha mu weema nʼali wereere.
9.22: Kaamu semwana ya Kanani, gabona semwana nʼali wereere ngʼatiina alomeraho abaganda babe bombi abaali ewulafu wʼeweema.
9.23: Aye Seemu ni Yafeesi baŋamba olugoye balwanjulusa balulerejesa ni baluŋambiiye hu mabega gaawe batiina hinyuma nyuma baludanya hu saawe. Era bamuwiiha ni batamuhejireho hubona wereere wuwe.
9.24: Omwenge ni gwaŋwa hu Nuwa, gategeera ehi omusaani oyo omuŋere amuholire
9.25: galoma ati, “Ehiraamo hibe hu Kanani! Era eyiri abaganda babe, anaabenga mwidu asinga ohuba owa ŋaasi.”
9.26: Era galoma ati, “Gebasiwe Musengwa Hatonda wa Seemu! Era Kanani afuuhe mwidu wa Seemu.
9.27: Hatonda agalamye omuŋuluko gwa Yafeesi. Yafeesi amenye mu weema ja Seemu. Era Kanani afuuhe mwidu wuwe.”
9.28: Oluvanyuma lwa mataba, Nuwa gahena emyaha bisatu mwataanu.
9.29: Ŋosiŋosi, Nuwa gahena emyaha lwenda nʼataanu, ngʼafa.

10.1: Bino njʼebiŋamba hu Seemu ni Kaamu ko ni Yafeesi abasaani ba Nuwa, boosi basaala abaana oluvanyuma lwʼamataba. Abasaani ba Yafeesi
10.2: Abasaani ba Yafeesi baali nje Gomeri ni Magogi ni Madayi ni Yovaani ni Tubbali ni Meseki ko ni Tirasi.
10.3: Abasaani ba Gomeri baali njʼAsukenaazi ni Lifaasi ko ni Togaluma.
10.4: Abasaani ba Yovaani baali njʼElisa ni Talusiisi ni Kitimu ko ni Dodanimu.
10.5: Mu basaani abo njʼomwaŋwa abaatu abamenyanga mu matwale hu bizinga, hiisi baatu nʼolulimi lwawe mu biha nomu mawanga gaawe. Abasaani ba Kaamu
10.6: Abasaani ba Kaamu, baali nje Kuusi ni Mizulayimu ni Puuti ko ni Kanani.
10.7: Abasaani ba Kuusi, baali nje Seebba ni Kavira ni Sabbuta ni Laama ko ni Sabbuteka. Abasaani ba Laama, baali nje Seebba ko ni Dedani.
10.8: Kuusi gasaala Nimuloodi era Nimuloodi oyo njʼowasooka ohuba omusooli owʼamaani hu hyalo huno.
10.9: Era gaali muŋiimi hu lwʼamaani ga Musengwa . Cʼehifa hiromwa hiiti, “Hya Nimuloodi omuŋiimi owʼamaani olwʼamaani ga Musengwa .”
10.10: Mu husooka, owahabaha buwe waali mu hyalo hyʼe Sinali ni buŋiriramo ebibuga Bbabberi nʼEreeki nʼAkudi ko ni Kalune.
10.11: Ohuŋwa mu hyalo hyʼe Sinali, gatiina e Busuuli ngʼatongola Nineeve ni Lekobbosi Yira ni Kala
10.12: ko ni Leseni ŋagati wa Nineeve ni Kala ehibuga ehibbala.
10.13: Mizulayimu gaali semwana ya Ludimu nʼAnamimu ni Lekabbimu ni Nafutukimu
10.14: ni Pasulusimu ni Kafutooli ni Kasulukimu, omu Bafirisuuti baasibuha.
10.15: Kanani gaali semwana ya Sidoni omudaayi wuwe, ni Keesi
10.18: nʼAbaluvada nʼAbazemali nʼAbahamasi. Oluvanyuma, ebiha ebyʼAbakanani nga bisasaana.
10.19: Era esalo eyʼAbakanani yaŋwa e Sidoni ohutiina e Gerali nga yoola e Gaaza nindi nga yitiina e Sodoma ni Gomora nʼAduma ni Zebboyiimu paka e Laasa.
10.20: Abo njʼabasaani ba Kaamu mu biha byawe nomu lulimi lwawe nomu matwale gaawe era nʼegwanga lyawe. Abasaani ba Seemu
10.21: Era ni Seemu yeesi gasaala abaana. Muhulu ya Seemu gaali nje Yafeesi. Seemu gaali nje sehulu yʼabasaani bʼEbberi bosibosi.
10.22: Abasaani ba Seemu baali nje Elamu nʼAsuuli nʼAlupakusaadi ni Luudi ko nʼAlaamu.
10.23: Abasaani bʼAlaamu baali nje Wuuzi ni Kuuli ni Geseri ko ni Miseki.
10.24: Ngʼaŋo Alupakusaadi asaala Seera nga Seera asaala Ebberi.
10.25: NgʼEbberi asaala abaseere babiri. Mulala hu bo gaali nje Peleegi olwohuba mu ndaalo jije, abaatu basasaana. Mugandawe gaali nje Yokutaani.
10.26: Nga Yokutaani asaala Alumodaadi ni Serefu ni Hazalumaveesi ni Yera
10.27: ni Kadolaamu ni Wuzali ni Dikila
10.29: nʼOfiri ni Kavira ko ni Yobbabbu. Abo bosibosi baali basaani ba Yokutaani.
10.30: Etwale omu bamenyanga lyaŋwanga e Mesa lyatiina e Sefari mu hyalo ehyʼesozi, ebuŋwalyuba.
10.31: Abo njʼabasaani ba Seemu mu biha byawe nomu lulimi lwawe nomu matwale gaawe era nʼegwanga lyawe.
10.32: Ebyo njʼebiha byʼabasaani ba Nuwa, hiisi muutu ngʼolu lulyo lulwe lwali mu mawanga gaawe. Era mu bo pomwaŋwa amawanga agasasaana ehyalo hyosihyosi oluvanyuma lwʼamataba.

11.1: Halehale, abaatu bosibosi hu hyalo balomanga olulimi lulala.
11.2: Ehiseera hyola nga basenguha ni bendula aŋohumenya, baŋwa ebuŋwalyuba boola mu hyalo ehiduleere e Sinali nga bamenya eyo.
11.3: Lulala behobana baati, “Bahyange, huhubbe amatafaali hugoohye bulaŋi weene.” Era mu hiseera ehyo, baali batambisa amatafaali mu hifo hyʼamabaale, ni kolansi mu hifo hyʼomujehe.
11.4: Nga baloma baati, “Muhole hutongole ehibuga ehiri nʼomunaala ogwola mwigulu hweholere esiina. Ehyo hija hutuyeeda ohutasalanihira mu hyalo.”
11.5: Aye nga Musengwa geeha ohuŋwa mwigulu ohubona ebibuga nʼomunaala ebi baali ni batongola.
11.6: Ngʼaloma ati, “Abaatu bano bali bulala era bʼolulimi lulala. Ngʼolu batandihire ohuhola ehyo, ŋaŋuma ehibategehire ohuhola ehija ohubahaya.
11.7: Muuje hwihe eyi bali hutabujule olulimi lwawe hiisi muutu atategeera ebi wahye aloma.”
11.8: Olwʼehyo, Musengwa gatiina ngʼabasalaania hu hyalo hyosihyosi nga baleheraŋo ohutongola ehibuga.
11.9: Cʼehifa ehifo ehyo bahiranga baati Bbabberi, olwohuba eyo peyi Musengwa gatabujula olulimi lwʼabaatu hu hyalo. Ngʼahena abasalaania mu hyalo hyosihyosi. Ohuŋwa hu Seemu ohwola hu Yibbulaamu
11.10: Bino njʼebiŋamba hu Seemu: Emyaha ebiri oluvanyuma lwʼamataba, Seemu ni gaali nʼaŋesa emyaha cikumi, gasaala Alupakusaadi.
11.11: Oluvanyuma lwʼohusaala Alupakusaadi, Seemu gahena emyaha bitaanu, ngʼasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
11.12: Alupakusaadi ni gahena emyaha adatu nʼetaanu, gasaala Seera.
11.13: Oluvanyuma lwʼAlupakusaadi ohusaala Seera, gahena emyaha bine nʼadatu, ngʼasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
11.14: Nga Seera ahena emyaha adatu, ngʼasaala Ebberi.
11.15: Oluvanyuma lwʼohusaala Ebberi, Seera gahena emyaha bine nʼadatu ngʼasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
11.16: Ebberi ni gahena emyaha adatu neene gasaala Peleegi.
11.17: Oluvanyuma lwʼohusaala Peleegi, ngʼEbberi ahena emyaha bine nʼadatu ngʼasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
11.18: Peleegi ni gahena emyaha adatu, gasaala Reewu.
11.19: Oluvanyuma lwʼohusaala Reewu, Peleegi gahena emyaha bibiri namwenda ngʼasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
11.20: Reewu ni gahena emyaha adatu nʼebiri gasaala Serugi.
11.21: Oluvanyuma lwʼohusaala Serugi, Reewu gahena emyaha bibiri namusanvu ngʼasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
11.22: Serugi ni gahena emyaha adatu gasaala Naholi.
11.23: Oluvanyuma lwʼohusaala Naholi, Serugi gahena emyaha bibiri ngʼasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
11.24: Naholi ni gahena emyaha abiri namwenda, gasaala Teera.
11.25: Oluvanyuma lwʼohusaala Teera, Naholi gahena emyaha cikumi nʼehumi namwenda ngʼasaala abaana abandi abaseere nʼabahaana.
11.26: Oluvanyuma lwa Teera ohuhena emyaha sanvu, gasaala Yibbulaamu ni Naholi ko ni Harani.
11.27: Bino njʼebiŋamba hu Teera: Teera gasaala Yibbulaamu ni Naholi ko ni Harani. Nga Harani asaala Luuti.
11.28: Saawe Teera ni gaali nʼahiiri mulamu, nga Harani afiira e Wuuli ehyalo hyʼAbakaludaaya omu bamusaalira.
11.29: Ngʼaŋo Yibbulaamu ni Naholi baleeta abahasi. Omuhasi wa Yibbulaamu gaali nje Salaayi, omuhasi wa Naholi gaali nje Mirika omuhaana wa Harani. Harani gaali nʼabahaana babiri: Mirika ko ni Yisika.
11.31: Nga Teera aŋamba Yibbulaamu omusaani wuwe ni Salaayi omulya wuwe ko nʼomwijuhulu wuwe Luuti omwana wa Harani baŋwa e Wuuli ehyalo hyʼAbakaludaaya batiina mu hyalo hyʼe Kanani. Ne ni boola e Harani, nga bamenya eyo.
11.32: Teera gahena emyaha bibiri nʼetaanu ngʼafiira eyo e Harani.

12.1: Lulala Musengwa galoma Yibbulaamu ati, “Ŋwa mu gwanga liryo nomu hiha hihyo ko nomu hidaala hya lataawo otiine mu hyalo ehi nahahulage.
12.2: “Nja huhufuula egwanga eryʼamaani era nja huhuŋa ekabi, nja huhufuula omuutu owʼeŋono era abandi baja husuna ekabi olwʼewe.
12.3: Nja huŋa ekabi abo abahuŋa ekabi era nja huŋwaba oyo ahuŋwaba era abaatu bosibosi hu hyalo baja husuna ekabi ni babita mu ewe.”
12.4: Olwʼehyo Yibbulaamu gaŋwa e Harani gaŋamba engira gatiina ngʼolu Musengwa gamuloma. Era Luuti yeesi gatiina ni naye. Yibbulaamu gaali ali nʼemyaha sanvu nʼetaanu aŋa gaŋwera e Harani.
12.5: Nga Yibbulaamu aŋamba engira atiina ni Salaayi omuhasi wuwe nʼebiitu byawe byosibyosi ebi baali ni nabyo. Batiina ni Luuti omusaani wa mugandawe nʼabeedu babe aba gasuna nʼali e Harani. Baŋamba engira batiina mu gwanga lyʼe Kanani era nga boola.
12.6: Yibbulaamu nʼabaatu aba gaali ni nabo bagenda mu gwanga eryo nga boola mu hifo ehi balanga baati Sekemu, aŋaali omutumba omubba ogwa Moole. Mu hiseera ehyo, Abakanani baali bamenya mu gwanga eryo.
12.7: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa abonehera Yibbulaamu amuloma ati, “Nja huŋa olusaaye lulwo ehyalo hino.” Nga Yibbulaamu atongolera Musengwa owamubonehera ehituuti ehyohuŋeeraho eŋongo mu hifo ehyo.
12.8: Yibbulaamu gaŋwa aŋo gatiina mu hyalo ehyʼesozi ehiri ebuŋwalyuba wʼe Bbeseeri ngʼahomeha eyo eweema yiye. Bbeseeri hyali hu lubega lwʼebugwalyuba, Ayi ni hiri hu lubega lwʼebuŋwalyuba. Ngʼatongolera Musengwa ehituuti ehyʼohumuŋeeraho eŋongo mu hifo ehyo, ngʼamujumiryanga.
12.9: Ehiseera hyola nga Yibbulaamu geyongera ohugenda nʼatiina mu twale lyʼe Negevu. Yibbulaamu atiina e Misiri
12.10: Enjala yagwa mu hyalo hyʼe Kanani nga Yibbulaamu nʼomuhasi wuwe behirira batiina e Misiri ohubaaho eyo olwohuba enjala yaali mbitiirifu.
12.11: Ni baali huupi ohwola e Misiri, Yibbulaamu galoma Salaayi omuhasi wuwe ati, “Wange ese manyire ti oli muhasi muŋoono.
12.12: Era abaatu bʼe Misiri ni baja huhubona, baaja humanya baati oli muhasi wange. Ehyo, hiija hupweramo ohunjita, bahwegoboseho.
12.13: Olwʼehyo olomanga oti oli mboojo yange, hamunga bambisya bulaŋi naŋonia obulamu wange olwʼewe ohuloma otyo.”
12.14: Yibbulaamu ni goola e Misiri, Abamisiri babona Salaayi nʼali muhasi omuŋoono bugali.
12.15: Abahungu ba Falaawo ni baheja hu Salaayi, batiina nga bamupaaha eyiri Falaawo ngʼolu ali muhasi muŋoono. Era bamuŋira mu lubiri lwa Falaawo.
12.16: Falaawo gabisya Yibbulaamu bulaŋi hulwa Salaayi. Ngʼaŋa Yibbulaamu etaama nʼeŋombe nʼengamiya esinde nʼekasi ni nasugirya ko nʼabeedu abahasi nʼabasinde.
12.17: Ne Musengwa galeetera Falaawo nʼamago gage ohulwala olwa Salaayi muha Yibbulaamu.
12.18: Olwʼehyo, Falaawo galanga Yibbulaamu gamuloma ati, “Hiina hino ehyo ehi waakola? Lwahiina siwandomera oti Salaayi muhasi wuwo?
12.19: Lwahiina waloma oti Salaayi mboojoyo? Olwʼohuloma otyo, cʼehyagira namuŋira ni nenda abe muhasi wange. Kale omuhasi wuwo njʼoyo, mutiine.”
12.20: Ngʼaŋo Falaawo alagira abahungu babe babbinge Yibbulaamu nʼomuhasi wuwe nʼebiitu bibye byosibyosi ebi gaali ni nabyo, aŋwe mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri.

13.1: Ngʼaŋo Yibbulaamu aŋwa e Misiri aniinaniina nʼomuhasi wuwe nʼebiitu bibye byosibyosi ebi gaali ni nabyo, atiina mu lulafu lwʼe Negevu. Era Luuti gatiina ni naye.
13.2: Yibbulaamu gaali nʼobuŋinda bungi owʼebyayo nʼefeeza ko nʼezaabbu.
13.3: Ni gaŋwa e Negevu gatiinanga nʼasega ŋano ni naŋala ohwola olu goola e Bbeseeri, ehifo ehiri ŋagati wa Bbeseeri ni Ayi aŋa gaali nʼahomehire eweema yiye oludaayi.
13.4: Mu hifo ehyo pomu Yibbulaamu gaali nʼatongoye ehituuti ehyohuŋeeraho eŋongo era aŋo paŋa gajumirihisyanga Musengwa .
13.5: Ŋaahani Luuti yeesi gaali nʼetaama nʼembusi nʼeŋombe ko nʼabeedu.
13.6: Kale olwʼobungi wʼebyayo ebi Yibbulaamu ni Luuti baali ni nabyo, baŋuma ŋa hwayira aŋahena. Olwʼehyo baali sibasobola humenya ŋalala.
13.7: Era nga ŋabaŋo obuyoga ŋagati wʼabaayi ba Yibbulaamu nʼaba Luuti. Mu hiseera ehyo, Abakanani nʼAbapereezi boosi baali bamenya mu gwanga eryo.
13.8: Nga Yibbulaamu aloma Luuti ati, “Sihiraŋi ohuba nʼobuyoga ŋagati weefe oba ŋagati wʼabaayi bange nʼababo olwohuba huli balebe.
13.9: Ehyalo hibbala, osobola ohusalaŋo ŋeena aŋa wenda ohumenya. Olwʼehyo, hwawuhane era ewe onatiina hu lubega lwʼomuhono omugooda, ese nja hutiina hu mulungi. Onatiina hu mulungi, ese nja huŋamba engira tiine hu mugooda.”
13.10: Nga Luuti agangamusa emoni alengera eroba egimu mu hifo ehiduleere ohuupi nʼolwabi Yoludaani ni mulimo amaaji agahena hyomu Edeni endimiro ya Musengwa , hyomu hyalo hyʼe Misiri nʼolengereeye olwʼe Zowaali. Luuti gaasiima ehifo ehyo. Mu hiseera ehyo, Musengwa gaali ahiiri husihiirisa Sodoma ni Gomora.
13.11: Nga Luuti gesaliraŋo ohuŋira eroba egimu mu hifo ehiduleere ohuupi nʼolwabi Yoludaani. Era Luuti gaŋamba engira gafuluha ngʼatiina ebuŋwalyuba. Kale nga bawuhana baatyo.
13.12: Yibbulaamu niye gamenya mu hyalo hyʼe Kanani ne Luuti gatiina gamenya ŋaapi nʼehibuga mu hifo ehiduleere ehyʼe Sodoma.
13.13: Aye abaatu bʼe Sodoma baali babbengi era ni bahola ebibi ebya hiisi ngeri mu moni ja Musengwa . Hatonda asuubisa Yibbulaamu
13.14: Luuti nʼahenire ohusenguha, Musengwa galoma Yibbulaamu ati, “Gangamusa emoni oheje mu maniino nomu mehiriro, ohene oheje ebuŋwalyuba nʼebugwalyuba.
13.15: Ewe nʼabejuhulu babo, nja hubaŋa ehyalo ehyo, hibe hyenywe emirembe nʼemirembe.
13.16: Abejuhulu babo nja hubafuula bangi ni batabaliha hyʼomujehe. Era singa omuutu asobola ohubala omujehe, aja husobola nʼohubala abejuhulu babo.
13.17: Tiina ogende nʼolambuula obugalamu nʼobuleeŋi wʼehyalo ehi ndi huhuŋa.”
13.18: Ngʼaŋo Yibbulaamu adunda eweema jije afulusa amago atiina amenya e Kebbulooni aŋaapi nʼemitumba jʼe Mamule. Ngʼatongolera Musengwa ehituuti ehyohuŋeeraho eŋongo mu hifo ehyo.

14.1: Mu hiseera ehyo, Amulafeeri habaha wʼe Sinali ni Ariyooki habaha wʼErasaali ni Kedolawomeeri habaha wʼElamu ni Tidali habaha wʼe Goyiimu,
14.2: basoola ni Bbeera habaha wʼe Sodoma ni Bbiruusa habaha wʼe Gomora ni Sinaabbu habaha wʼAduma ni Semebbeeri habaha wʼe Zebboyiimu ko ni habaha wʼe Bbeera (oba Zowaali).
14.3: Abahabaha abataanu bosibosi beŋimba, basoosa bala abane mu hiiho eri balanga baati Sidimu oba erungu lyʼEnyanja Eŋumamo Ehiramu.
14.4: Baali bahenire emyaha ehumi nʼebiri ni bali ŋaasi wa habaha Kedolawomeeri. Nga mu mwaha ogwʼehumi nedatu bamujeemera.
14.5: Mu mwaha ogwʼehumi nʼene, Kedolawomeeri nʼabahabaha bala abadatu, batiina basoosa abahabaha abataanu nga baŋangula Abareefa mu Asuterosi Kalumayimu nʼAbazuuzi e Kaamu nʼAbbeemi e Saave Kiriyasayimu
14.6: ko nʼAbakooli e Seyiri mu hyalo ehyʼesozi. Nga bababbinga baboosa Elupalaani huupi nʼolulafu.
14.7: Ni bahena, bagamayo Eni Misapaati (oba e Kadesi), nga baŋangula abaatu bomu twale lyʼAbameleki lyosiryosi era bahubba nʼAbamooli abaali ni bamenya e Kazazoni Tamali.
14.8: Oluvanyuma lwa bahabaha bala abane ohuŋangula, balumba abahabaha bala abataanu. Nga habaha wʼe Sodoma ni habaha wʼe Gomora ni habaha wʼAduma ni habaha wʼe Zebboyiimu ni habaha wʼe Bbeera oba Zowaali, batiina mu hiiho hyʼe Sidimu ohusoosa
14.9: Kedolawomeeri habaha wʼElamu ni Tidali habaha wʼe Goyiimu nʼAmulafeeri habaha wʼe Sinali ko ni Ariyooki habaha wʼErasaali. Baali abahabaha bane ni basoosa abahabaha bataanu.
14.10: Ehiiho hyʼe Sidimu hyali hyejuuye amaloŋo ga kolaasi era abahabaha bʼe Sodoma ni Gomora ni badulumanga nga bagwamo, abandi nga badulumira mu hyalo ehyʼesozi.
14.11: Ngʼabahabaha abane abo, banyaga ebiitu byosibyosi mu Sodoma ni Gomora nʼebyohulya byosibyosi nga bahena betiinira.
14.12: Era baŋiriramo ni Luuti omusaani wa muganda ya Yibbulaamu nʼebiitu bibye olwohuba gaali amenyire e Sodoma.
14.13: Mulala hu bakabonawo, gatiina ngʼalomera Yibbulaamu Omubbebbulaniya ati Luuti yeesi gaali alutiiniyemo. Yibbulaamu gaali amenyire huupi nʼemitumba ja Mamule Omwamooli, muganda yʼEsukoli ni Aneri. Abadatu abo bosibosi baali bameeri ba Yibbulaamu.
14.14: Yibbulaamu ni gaŋulira ati baŋiriyeemo ni Luuti omwana wa mugandawe, ngʼayungula eŋe eryʼabaatu bidatu ehumi namunaana aba basaalira mu mago gage era ni bali batendehe. Balonda hu bahabaha abo abane nga babagaana mu hifo ehi balanga baati Daani.
14.15: Nga mu wiire, Yibbulaamu agabaniamo abasooli babe ohubalumba, nga babahubba bababbinga ohwola e Kobba, ehyʼengulu nʼolengereeye e Damasiko.
14.16: Ngʼagobosa Luuti nʼebiitu bibye byosibyosi nʼabahasi ko nʼabaatu abandi.
14.17: Oluvanyuma lwa Yibbulaamu ohuŋangula Kedolawomeeri nʼabahabaha abandi, habaha owʼe Sodoma gatiina ohwagaanana ni naye mu hiiho eri balanga baati Saave. Ehiiho ehyo aŋandi bahiranganga baati lwiho lwa habaha.
14.18: Ngʼaŋo Melukezedeki habaha wʼe Saalemu abaŋirira emere nʼomwenge ogwomu mizabbibbu. Melukezedeki gaali musengi wa Hatonda Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali.
14.19: Nga Melukezedeki aloma ati, “Hatonda Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali, owatonda egulu nʼehyalo, aŋe Yibbulaamu ekabi.
14.20: Era aŋeewe eŋono Hatonda Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali, ahuŋambiyeho waŋangula abalabe babo.” Ngʼaŋo Yibbulaamu aŋamba hirala ehyʼehumi ehyʼebyo ebi ganyaga, aŋa Melukezedeki.
14.21: Ngʼaŋo habaha wʼe Sodoma aloma Yibbulaamu ati, “Kusunga wuupe abaatu aba ogobohiise aye osigase ebiitu.”
14.22: Ne Yibbulaamu ngʼaloma habaha wʼe Sodoma ati, “Kolire endagaano ni Musengwa Hatonda Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali, owatonda egulu nʼehyalo,
14.23: ti sinja huŋira hiitu hihyo hyosihyosi wayire ahahoba hʼengayito oba olubuuzi olwohuba ohanda waloma oti, ‘Yibbulaamu gagagaŋalira mu biitu byange.’
14.24: Ŋaŋuma ehi nja ohuŋira ohutusaho ebi basooli bange baliiye. Aye Aneri ni Esukoli ni Mamule, bali nʼohuŋiraho omugabo olwohuba batiinire ni neese mu lutalo luno.”

15.1: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Musengwa aloma Yibbulaamu mu hwolesewa ati, “Yibbulaamu otatya, ndiise engabo yiyo era nja huhuŋa omuhemba ogwʼamaani.”
15.2: Aye nga Yibbulaamu amugobolamo ati, “O Musengwa Omwene Buŋangi, ehyo sihija hunjeeda olwohuba mbula mwana, Eliyezeeri ohuŋwa e Damasiko nje aja husikira ebyange.”
15.3: Nga Yibbulaamu ameedaho ati, “Musengwa, ohiiri huupa hu mwana, Elyeza omwidu wange nje aja ohuba omusika wange.”
15.4: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Yibbulaamu ati, “Omwidu wuwo oyo, sinje aja ohuba omusika wuwo aye omwana omuseere ohuŋwa mu tumbu jijo, nje aja ohuba omusika wuwo.”
15.5: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa amutusa ebulafu wʼeweema amuloma ati, “Heja ŋamugulu obale emunyeenye ejo hanye osobola. Nʼabejuhulu babo boosi baatyo pobaliba obungi.”
15.6: Nga Yibbulaamu afugiirira ebi Musengwa gamuloma era ngʼamubala ohuba mugwalaafu.
15.7: Nga Hatonda nindi amuloma ati, “Ndiise Musengwa owahutusa e Wuuli mu hyalo hyʼAbakaludaaya ohuhuŋa ehyalo hino.”
15.8: Aye nga Yibbulaamu amuloma ati, “O Musengwa Omwene Buŋangi, nja humanyira hu hi ti nja huŋira ehyalo hino?”
15.9: Nga Musengwa amuloma ati, “Ndetere eŋombe esodi nʼembusi omulusi ko nʼemiigu, josijosi ni jiri jʼemyaha edatu ohene oleete eŋuusi nʼenjiiwa eperepere.”
15.10: Nga Yibbulaamu amuŋirira ebiitu ebyo byosibyosi. Ni gahena ohubibaaga ngʼabyaŋulamo ŋabiri ŋabiri. Ni gahena, ngʼatiina nʼapanga ebitundu bya hiisi hyayo ebi gaaŋulamo ni birengereene aye eŋuusi nʼenjiiwa gabireha nʼataŋuuyemo ŋabiri.
15.11: Ngʼesega jiŋwa eyi jaŋwera ni jenda ohulya enyama aye Yibbulaamu ngʼajiŋema.
15.12: Esaawa ni yaali ni yenda ohugwa mu maaji ngʼero eryʼamaani liŋamba Yibbulaamu. Era ehiirema ehitiisa nga hiba aŋa gaali.
15.13: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Yibbulaamu ati, “Nenda ohimanye oti abejuhulu babo baja huba babuli mu gwanga eritali lyawe, baliba beedu era baligada ohuhena emyaha bine.
15.14: Aye nja hugadya abo abalibahosa owiidu. Oluvanyuma abejuhulu babo abo, baliŋwayo nʼebiitu ebyene ebingi.
15.15: Aye ewe oja hufa nʼoŋangaaye era otiine e magombe eyiri abasehulu babo, miyaaya.
15.16: Era ni bahenireyo emyaha bine, baligobola ŋano olwohuba ebibi byʼAbamooli bihiiri huŋera ohwola aŋa nja hubabonerehesa, mbatuse mu hyalo muno omu bamenyire.”
15.17: Esaawa ni yagwa mu maaji era ehiirema hyaŋamba, ehiitu ni hirimo amanda agaduha omuliro nga hibita ŋagati wʼenyama jʼebyayo nʼeŋuusi ko nʼenjiiwa yira.
15.18: Era hu ludaalo olwo Musengwa gahola endagaano ni Yibbulaamu ati, “Olulyo lulwo nduŋaaye ehyalo hino, ohuŋwa hu lwabi lwʼe Misiri ohwola hu lwabi Yufuleeti,

16.1: Mu hiseera ehyo, Salaayi muha Yibbulaamu gaali ahiiri husaalaho mwana. Aye gaali ali nʼomwidu, omuhaana Mumisiri oyu balanganga baati Agali.
16.2: Nga Salaayi aloma Yibbulaamu ati, “Wange, ngʼolu Musengwa ahiiri huupa hu mwana, ŋenyuha nʼomwidu wange hamunga gaasaalira hu omwana.” Nga Yibbulaamu afugiirira ehi Salaayi gamuloma.
16.3: Mu hiseera ehyo, baali bahenire emyaha ehumi ni bali mu gwanga lyʼe Kanani. Nga Salaayi aŋamba Agali omuhaana Mumisiri amuŋa wamwe Yibbulaamu ohufuuha muhasi wuwe.
16.4: Nga Yibbulaamu aŋenyuha nʼAgali era ngʼaba hida. Agali ni gabona nʼali hida, gatandiha ohunyooma musengwawe Salaayi.
16.5: Nga Salaayi aloma Yibbulaamu ati, “Ndiiwe ogira ni banyooma. Nahuŋa omwidu wange ohuba muhasi wuwo. Ŋaahani gambisyamo emoni olwohuba mbo ali hida. Aye Musengwa omwene asale omusango ŋagati wange ni neewe.”
16.6: Nga Yibbulaamu amugobolamo ati, “Omwidu wuwo ali ŋaasi wuwo, kale hola ehi onende. Ngʼaŋo Salaayi atandiha ohubisya Agali bubi, ehyaŋwamo ngʼamudulumaho.”
16.7: Malayika wa Musengwa nga gagaana Agali hu sobere mu lulafu. Esobere eyo yaali hu ngira eyitiina e Suuri.
16.8: Nga malayika amubuusa ati, “Agali omwidu wa Salaayi, oŋwa ŋeena era oja ŋeena?” NgʼAgali amugobolamo ati, “Ndi huduluma hu Salaayi musengwa yange.”
16.9: Nga malayika wa Musengwa amuloma ati, “Yagama eyiri musengwawo, omugondere.”
16.10: Nga malayika wa Musengwa ameedaho ati, “Nja huhuŋa abejuhulu abeene abangi ni batabaliha.”
16.11: Nga malayika wa Musengwa amuloma ati, “Oli hida era oja husaala omwana museere. Olimuguliha esiina oti Yisimayiri, olwohuba Musengwa amanyire ngʼolu oli hubonaabona.
16.12: Omwana oyo aja huba wahibbuuli hya nasugirya eyomwisugu, aja huŋiriŋanianga hiisi muutu era hiisi muutu aja humuŋiriŋanianga, aja huba wabulabe eyiri abaganda babe bosibosi.”
16.13: Ngʼaŋo Agali aŋa Musengwa owaloma ni naye esiina ati, “Ndiiwe Hatonda owumbona.” Ehyo gahiroma olwohuba galoma ati, “Mbwene oyo owumbona.”
16.14: Cʼehyaŋwaho balanga esobere eyo eyiri ŋagati wa Kadesi ni Bberedi baati Bberirakalooyi era esobere eyo ehiriŋo nʼolwa leero luno.
16.15: Ehiseera ni hyola ngʼAgali asaalira Yibbulaamu omwana museere era nga Yibbulaamu amuguliha esiina ati nje Yisimayiri.
16.16: Yibbulaamu gaali nʼemyaha cinaana namukaaga aŋa Agali gasaalira Yisimayiri.

17.1: Yibbulaamu ni gaali nʼaŋesa emyaha cenda namwenda, nga Musengwa amubonehera amuloma ati, “Ndiise Hatonda Omwene Buŋangi wosiwosi, nenda bungonderenga era oholenga ebiruŋamu.
17.2: Nja hunywania endagaano yange ni neewe era nja huhuŋa abejuhulu abeene abangi.”
17.3: Ngʼaŋo Yibbulaamu ahubba amafuha ajumirya Hatonda. Nga Hatonda amuloma ati,
17.4: “Yino njʼendagaano yange ni neewe, oja huba sehulu wʼamawanga.
17.5: Sibahihulanga baati Yibbulaamu aye ŋaahani ndiiwe Yibbulayimu olwohuba kufuuye sehulu wʼamawanga.
17.6: Nja huhwasa kene kufuule sehulu wʼamawanga mangi. Era bangi abomu mawanga ago baliba bahabaha.
17.7: Nja huhola endagaano yange eyʼemirembe nʼemirembe ni neewe nʼabejuhulu babo, ohuba Hatonda wuwo era Hatonda waawe.
17.8: Nja huhuŋa ehyalo hino ehyʼe Kanani ehi omenyiremo hyʼomulugendwa hatyane. Nja huhihuŋa, ewe nʼabejuhulu babo ohuba obutaka emirembe nʼemirembe era nja huba Hatonda waawe.”
17.9: Ngʼaŋo Hatonda aloma Yibbulayimu ati, “Buvunanyiziwa wuwo ohuhuuma endagaano yange, ewe nʼabejuhulu babo emirembe nʼemirembe.
17.10: Endagaano yange ni neewe ko nʼabejuhulu babo eyi bali nʼohuhuuma nje yino: Hiisi musinde mu nywe ali nʼohuhomola.
17.11: Munahomolenga era haja huba habonero hʼendagaano ŋagati wange ni neewe.
17.12: Mu hiisi mulembe, omwana nʼanasaaliwenga aja huhenanga endaalo munaana nga bamuhomola. Hino hija huŋambirangamo ababasaalira mu mago gago nʼabamugula hugula ohuŋwa hu banamawanga.
17.13: Hiisi musinde ali nʼohuhomola, oba gasaaliwa mu mago gago oba wamugula bugule. Aho haja huba habonero ahohu mugulu hu mibiri jenywe, ahanalagenga haati endagaano yange ni nenywe yʼemirembe nʼemirembe.
17.14: Omuutu yesiyesi agaana ohuhomola, sibanamubalenga ohuba mulala hu baatu bange olwohuba anaabenga abbwagire endagaano yange.”
17.15: Nga Hatonda aloma Yibbulayimu ati, “Nʼomuhasi wuwo ŋahani sibahimulanga baati Salaayi aye ŋahani nje Saala.
17.16: Nja humuŋa ekabi, mu butuufu nja huhuŋa omwana omuseere ohubita mu ye. Nja humuŋa ekabi, aja huba nyina wʼamawanga era abahabaha baliŋwa mu ye.”
17.17: Nga Yibbulayimu ahubba amafuha ajumirya Hatonda. Aye mu mwoyo gugwe gejeha galoma ati, “Mu butuufu, hu myaha ecikumi eji ndi ni najo, sobola ohusaala omwana? Mbona ti Saala yeesi gohiise emyaha cenda, ahisaala?”
17.18: Nga Yibbulayimu aloma Hatonda ati, “Kusunga ekabi ejo ojiŋe Yisimayiri!”
17.19: Nga Hatonda amugobolamo ati, “Bbe, sihija huba hiityo Saala omuhasi wuwo nje alihusaalira omwana era olimuguliha esiina oti Yisaka. Nja huhola endagaano yange ni naye ko nʼabejuhulu babe eyʼemirembe nʼemirembe.
17.20: Ne puliiye ebi olomire hu Yisimayiri era ngʼolu wusungire, nja humuŋa ekabi era nja humuŋa nʼolusaaye, gaale. Aja huba semwana wʼabaŋugi ehumi nʼababiri era nja humufuula egwanga ebbala.
17.21: Aye nja huhola endagaano yange ni Yisaka oyu Saala alihusaalira omwaha oguuja mu biseera hya bino.”
17.22: Hatonda ni gahena ohuloma ni Yibbulayimu, ngʼaŋwaŋo.
17.23: Nga hu ludaalo olwene olwo Yibbulayimu aŋamba omusaani Yisimayiri ko nʼabasinde bosibosi aba basaalira mu mago gage, ni naabo aba gagula obugule, abahomola ngʼolu Hatonda gamuloma.
17.24: Yibbulayimu gahomola nʼali hu myaha cenda namwenda,
17.25: ne omusaani Yisimayiri gaali hu myaha ehumi nedatu.
17.27: Era abasinde bosibosi ababasaalira mu mago ga Yibbulayimu ko ni naabo aba gagula obugule, babahomola hu ludaalo olwo ni naye.

18.1: Lulala, Musengwa gabonehera Yibbulayimu ŋaapi nʼemitumba jʼe Mamule ko ni gaali ni gehaaye ŋa mulyango ogwingira mu weema yiye mu saawa ejomu muusi.
18.2: Mu hiseera ehyo, Yibbulayimu ni gagangamusa emoni gabona abasinde badatu ni bemire ŋaapi aŋo ni naye. Ni gababona, nga mangumangu genyoha atiina aŋa baali, ahubba amafuha ohulaga ati abaŋa eŋono.
18.3: Ngʼaŋo amuloma ati, “Musengwa, kusunga wupambire ehisa, otabita hubita ŋa wʼomwidu wuwo.
18.4: Leha baleete amaaji, musaabeho amagulu, muhene muŋuumulireho mu musaala guno.
18.5: Mbaŋeho nʼehyohulya, mwahagobolamo amaani ko mweyongereyo mu lugendo lwenywe. Mbasunga muganye ngʼolu mwolire ŋa wʼomwidu wenywe.” Ngʼaŋo bamuloma baati, “Ŋaŋuma bubi, hola otyo ngʼolu oteesa.”
18.6: Ngʼaŋo Yibbulayimu aŋitaŋitaho atiina gengira mu weema eyaali Saala omuhasi wuwe, amuloma ati, “Wange husunire abageni, tegehaŋo mangumangu ebideeja bidatu ebyʼobusyanu obulaŋi, obanyiiyireŋo ehyohulya.”
18.7: Nga Yibbulayimu ganguŋaho atiina mu hidooli, aleeta eŋombe ehitobbwatobbwa ayiŋa omwidu ohuyisala, ayinyiiye mangumangu.
18.8: Ni yanya, nga Yibbulayimu aŋamba omuzigo nʼamabere nʼenyama abiŋira abiiŋula abageni. Ngʼahena atiina gemeerera hu tulo mu musaala aŋaapi naŋa bageni baali ni baliira, abaŋeerese.
18.9: Ni bahena ohulya, nga bamubuusa baati, “Saala omuhasi wuwo ali ŋe?” Ngʼabagobolamo ati, “Aliŋo, ali mu weema.”
18.10: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Yibbulayimu ati, “Mu butuufu ehiseera hya hino omwaha oguuja aŋa nja hugobolera, Saala omuhasi wuwo aliba asaaye omwana omuseere.” Saala gaali ŋa mulyango gwʼeweema eyi bageni baali ni bahubbire omugongo nʼaŋulira ebyo byosibyosi.
18.11: Yibbulayimu ni Saala baali basahuluŋire ehibitiriiye era Saala gaali gabisya emyaha ejʼohusaala.
18.12: Olwʼehyo nga Saala ajeha nʼaloma ati, “Obanga ese nesahuluŋiiye era ni musengwa yange yeesi gesahuluŋiiye, kinyumirwa ebiitu hyʼebyo?”
18.13: Nga Musengwa aloma Yibbulayimu ati, “Lwahiina Saala ajehire nʼaloma ati, ‘Mu butuufu sobola ohusuna omwana ate nesahuluŋiiye?’
18.14: Ŋaliŋo ehihaya Musengwa ? Nja hugobola mu hiseera hya hino omwaha oguuja, Saala aliba asaaye omwana museere.”
18.15: Olwʼobuti nga Saala aloma nʼadulinga ati, “Sinjehe bbe.” Aye nga Musengwa amuloma nʼamuhamiirisa ati, “Otegaana, ojehire.” Yibbulayimu asabira Sodoma
18.16: Ngʼaŋo abasinde abo benyoha batiina aŋa baali ni basobola ohulengera ehibuga hyʼe Sodoma. Era Yibbulayimu gabaŋereheraho.
18.17: Nga Musengwa aloma ati, “Sinja huhweha Yibbulayimu ehi nenda ohuhola
18.18: olwohuba nja humufuula egwanga ebbala eryʼamaani era amawanga gosigosi hu hyalo gaja husuna ekabi ohubitira mu niye.
18.19: Mutobooye ohutangirira olulyo lulwe ohuŋamba engira ya Musengwa bahole ebiruŋamu ni batehubbira, noherese ehi namusuubisa.”
18.20: Nga Musengwa aloma ati, “Ohulira hwʼabaatu hu biŋamba hu Sodoma ni Gomora hubitiirifu era nʼebibi byawe birumya,
18.21: nja hutiina mbone oba ebi bahola biŋeraŋerana nʼohulira ohupulira. Ebikolwa byawe binaba ni biri biraŋi, sinja hubasihiirisa.”
18.22: Abasinde abo, baaŋwaŋo batiina e Sodoma aye Yibbulayimu gasigala nʼahyemire mu moni ja Musengwa .
18.23: Nga Yibbulayimu gesendaho aŋali Musengwa amuloma ati, “Oja husihiirisa abagwalaafu nʼababbengi ŋalala?
18.24: Ne singa ebaayo abagwalaafu amahumi ataanu mu hibuga hyʼe Sodoma, oja huhisihiirisa?
18.25: Kusunga otasihiirihisa abagwalaafu ŋalala nʼababbengi, ni ŋaŋumaŋo njabulo ŋagati wʼabagwalaafu nʼababbengi. Ewe Omulamuzi wʼehyalo hyosihyosi, oja hwehubbira?”
18.26: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Yibbulayimu ati, “Singa ebaayo abagwalaafu ataanu mu hibuga Sodoma, sinja huhisihiirisa hu lwawe.”
18.27: Nga Yibbulayimu aloma ati, “Onaasoniŋe ohuloma ni Musengwa wayire nga ndi muutu wuutu.
18.28: Ne singa abagwalaafu baba amahumi ane nʼabataanu, onasihiirihise ehibuga hyosihyosi? Oja husihiirisa ehibuga olwohuba huŋumiraho bataanu?” Nga Musengwa amuloma ati, “Singa mubamo amahumi ane nʼabataanu, sinja husihiirisa hibuga ehyo.”
18.29: Nga nindi Yibbulayimu amuloma ati, “Ne singa ebaayo abagwalaafu amahumi ane goŋene?” Nga Musengwa amuloma ati, “Sinja husihiirisa hibuga olwʼamahumi ane ago.”
18.30: Ngʼaŋo Yibbulayimu amuloma ati, “Musengwa, kusunga otanduŋira aye handomeho: ne singa ebaayo adatu abagwalaafu, onabasihiirise?” Nga niye amugobolamo ati, “Bbe, sinja hubasihiirisa singa nagaanayo amahumi adatu.”
18.31: Nga Yibbulayimu aloma Musengwa ati, “Onaasoniŋe ohweyongera ohuloma ni neewe, ne singa ebaayo amahumi abiri boŋene?” Nga Musengwa amugobolamo ati, “Sinja husihiirisa hibuga ehyo olwʼabagwalaafu amahumi abiri.”
18.32: Ngʼaŋo Yibbulayimu amuloma ati, “Musengwa, kusunga otanduŋira aye fugiirire ndomeho omulundi ogusembayo guno gwoŋene. Ne singa ebaayo ehumi boŋene?” Nga Musengwa amugobolamo ati, “Sinja husihiirisa hibuga ehyo olwʼabaatu ehumi abagwalaafu.”
18.33: Musengwa ni gahena ohuloma ni Yibbulayimu, gaŋamba engira getiinira nga Yibbulayimu yeesi gagamayo.

19.1: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, ngʼabamalayika babiri batiina e Sodoma ehyʼegulo. Luuti gaali geehaye ŋa mulyango ogwingira mu hibuga Sodoma. Ni gababona, genyoha ohubasangaalira, geyala hwiroba ohulaga ati abaŋa eŋono.
19.2: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Basengwa, ese omwidu wenywe mbasunga hutiine ewange musaabeho era muŋenyuhe eyo ko olwejo mu mugamba mutiine eyi muja.” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Bbe, sihunatiine yiwuwo, hunaŋenyuhe hu hyeya hyʼehibuga.”
19.3: Aye Luuti gabomeraho bahanda batiina ni naye baŋenyuha e wuwe. Ngʼabanyiira ahena abeŋula emigaati ejibatatayemo ehisimbulusa.
19.4: Aye ni bahiiri huŋenyuha, ehiŋindi hyʼabasinde bomu hibuga Sodoma baŋwerehereramo, bosibosi abaŋere nʼabahulu nga baja beswanigirisa enyumba ya Luuti.
19.5: Nga bamubuusa baati, “Abasinde aba oŋenyuhise ŋano bali ŋe? Batuse ebulafu, hubaŋenyuheho.”
19.6: Nga Luuti atula ebulafu alome ni nabo. Ni gatula, nga gegalaŋo omulyango
19.7: ahena abaloma ati, “Bahyange, mbegayiriiye mutahola ehibi hyehyo.
19.8: Ŋano ndiŋo nʼabahaana bange babiri abahiiri huŋenyuhangaho nʼomusinde. Leha mbaleete, mubahole ehi munende. Aye mulehe abasinde abo mutabahola hiitu hyosihyosi, olwohuba bageni bange era ndi nʼohubalabirira.”
19.9: Aye nibo nga baloma Luuti baati, “Tuŋwereŋo.” Nga bacuuha batandiiha ohuloma abeene nʼabeene baati, “Omusinde ono mubuli ŋagati weefe, ŋahani njʼowenda atulomere ehyohuhola.” Nga bacuuhira Luuti bamuloma baati “Ewe, hunahubisye bubi nʼohuhiraho abasinde abo.” Nga bamuŋamba bamusindiha era, nga batiina hu lwigi ohulubbwaga.
19.10: Aye abageni bala begulaŋo, bahwesa Luuti bamwingisa mu nyumba bahena begalaŋo nʼolwigi.
19.11: Ngʼabahena baŋofuŋasa abasinde abo abaali ŋa mulyango, abahulu nʼabaŋere, nga batandiiha ohumamaata aye ni batabona nʼomulyango aŋa guli.
19.12: Ngʼabageni baloma Luuti baati, “Ŋaliŋo abaatu babo abandi: abahaana nʼabasaani babo, abahwe babo oba omuutu wuwo yesiyesi mu hibuga muno?
19.13: Ehyo huhiroma olwohuba hwenda husihiirisa ehibuga hino, ohulira hweyongeeye bugali mu moni ja Musengwa era atutumire ohuhisihiirisa.”
19.14: Ngʼaŋo Luuti atula atiina aloma nʼabasinde abaali ni benda ohuŋira abahaana babe ati, “Bahyange mwanguŋeho, muŋwe mu hibuga hino, olwohuba Musengwa genda huhisihiirisa.” Aye abasinde abo baŋeega baati Luuti gaali amooca.
19.15: Ni wahya mu mawiiwi, ngʼabamalayika baloma Luuti baati, “Yinyoha mangumangu, oŋambe omuhasi wuwo nʼabaana babo abahaana bombi, muŋwe mu hibuga hino mutasihiiriha.”
19.16: Aye Luuti ni gaali nʼagayaala, ngʼabamalayika bamuŋamba hu muhono, baŋamba nohu gwʼomuhasi wuwe nohu bahaana babe bombi, babatusa ebulafu wʼehibuga, olwohuba Musengwa gabaŋambira ehisa.
19.17: Ni baŋwa mu hibuga baati pa, nga mulala hu bamalayika abaloma ati, “Ale ŋaahani muŋiteŋiiteho! Mutaheja yigongo era mutemeerera ŋaatu ŋosiŋosi mu hifo ehiduleere! Mudulumire hu lusozi mwahaŋona.”
19.18: Aye Luuti ngʼabaloma ati, “Bbe, basengwa mbasunga,
19.19: ngʼolu mundagire ehisa ehyʼamaani mwaponia ohusihiiriha, olusozi lundi ŋaleeŋi. Pangire ohufa olwagaane.
19.20: Leha ndulumire aŋaapi mu habuga aho. Aŋo naŋonie obulamu wange.”
19.21: Nga malayika amugobolamo ati, “Kale kufugiiriiye tiina, sinja husihiirisa ehibuga ehi olomaho ehyo.
19.22: Ale yanguŋaho odulume otiine eyo, olwohuba sinja huhola hiitu hyosihyosi ohutusaho ni woolire.” Cʼehigima balanga ehibuga ehyo baati Zowaali.
19.23: Ehiseera ehi Luuti goolera mu habuga Zowaali, esaawa yaali etulire.
19.24: Nga Musengwa aŋeeresa omuliro ohuŋwa mwigulu hu Sodoma ni Gomora.
19.25: Gasihiirisa ebibuga ebyo nʼomulirano gwosigwosi mu hifo ehiduleere, abo bosibosi abaali mu bibuga ko ni hiisi hiitu hyosihyosi.
19.26: Aye omuhasi wa Luutu gaheja enyuma ngʼafuuha etuumo ya cumbi.
19.27: Nga mu mugamba pwipwipwi, Yibbulayimu atiina mu hifo aŋa gaali ni gemereeye mu moni ja Musengwa .
19.28: Ngʼalengera e Sodoma ni Gomora mu hifo ehiduleere, ngʼabona eriisi eryʼamaani ni liduunya.
19.29: Hatonda ni gasihiirisa ebibuga ebyo mu hifo ehiduleere, gahebulira Yibbulayimu ngʼaŋonia Luuti ohusihiiriha ohwahenaŋo ebibuga omu gaali ni gehala. Luuti nʼabahaana babe
19.30: Ngʼaŋo Luuti aŋamba abahaana babe batiina ohumenya mu sozi olwohuba gatya ohumenya mu Zowaali. Ngʼaŋo Luuti nʼabahaana babe bombi, bamenya mu pungulu.
19.31: Lulala, omuhaana omuhulu galoma omuŋere ati, “Wange, seefe asahuluŋire era eŋuma musinde hu hyalo huno oja ohutufumbirwa.
19.32: Olwʼehyo, humunywese omwenge ameere, huŋenyuhe ni naye hwahasaala hu baana, amago geefe gaheyongera mu moni.”
19.33: Nga banywesa saawe omwenge owiire owo, ngʼomuhaana omuhulu atiina aŋenyuha ni naye. Olwʼobumeesi, Luuti sigategeera nʼaŋenyuha nʼomuhaana wuwe era sigategeera omuhaana nʼaŋwaŋo.
19.34: Oludaalo olwagobolaho, omuhaana omuhulu galoma omuŋere ati, “Owiire obuhyehise olwa leero, penyuhire ni Bbaabba. Nindi humunywese omwenge owiire wuno, weesi oŋenyuhe ni naye, amago geefe gaheyongera.”
19.35: Ngʼowiire owo woosi banywesa saawe omwenge, ngʼomuhaana omuŋere yeesi aŋenyuha ni naye. Olwʼobumeesi, Luuti sigategeera nʼaŋenyuha nʼomuhaana wuwe era sigategeera omuhaana oyo nʼaŋwaŋo.
19.36: Ehyaŋwamo, ngʼabahaana ba Luuti abo bombi, baba bida bya saawe.
19.37: Ngʼomuhaana omuhulu asaala omwana omuseere, nga bamuguliha esiina ati Mowaabbu. Era oyo nje sehulu wʼAbamowaabbu hatyane.
19.38: Omuhaana omuŋere yeesi ngʼasaala omwana museere, ngʼamuguliha esiina ati Bbeeni Ami, oyo nje sehulu wʼAbamooni hatyane.

20.1: Ehiseera hyola nga Yibbulayimu aŋwa e Mamule atiina mu twale lyʼe Negevu mu hifo ehiri ŋagati wa Kadesi ni Suuri, ngʼamenya eyo. Oluvanyuma gatiina e Gerali gamenyahoyo.
20.2: Yibbulayimu ni gaali eyo, galomeranga abaatu ati, “Saala mboojo yange.” Abbimereki habaha wʼe Gerali ni gaŋulira ati Saala mboojo ya Yibbulayimu, gatumisa bamuŋirire Saala abe muhasi wuwe.
20.3: Aye Hatonda gaaloma Abbimereki owiire mu hirooto ati, “Luhwageene olwʼohuŋira omuhasi wabeene.”
20.4: Cooka Abbimereki gaali ahiiri huŋenyuhaho ni Saala, kale ngʼaloma Musengwa ati, “Musengwa, wenda hunjita wayire nga puma musango?
20.5: Yibbulayimu omwene njʼowaloma ati Saala mboojo era Saala yeesi galoma cʼehyene. Ehyo nahihola mu mwoyo omulaŋi, ni mbula ehi manyire.”
20.6: Ngʼaŋo Hatonda amuloma mu hirooto ati, “Hituufu manyire ti oŋuma musango. Cʼehyagira ndikuleha huŋenyuha ni naye ohwonoona mu moni jange.
20.7: Olwʼehyo, olwohuba Yibbulayimu naabbi, mwagamihisye omuhasi wuwe ahusabire kulehe obe mulamu. Aye onagaana ohumumwagamihisya, oli nʼohuhitegeera oti ewe nʼamago gago mwesimwesi, muja hufa.”
20.8: Ni wahya mu mugamba, ngʼAbbimereki alanga abahungu babe bosibosi, ngʼabalomera ebyo byosibyosi ebyali ni bibayeŋo mu hirooto. Ebyo ni byabagwa mu hutwi, obuti owʼamaani wabaŋamba.
20.9: Ngʼaŋo Abbimereki alanga Yibbulayimu amuloma ati, “Hiina hino ehi watuhola? Nahuhola hi ohutuleetera endibo jino, ese nʼowahabaha wange? Bukolire ehi wahali nʼotakola.”
20.10: NgʼAbbimereki abuusa Yibbulayimu ati, “Waali nʼehigendererwa hi ohukola otyo?”
20.11: Nga Yibbulayimu amugobolamo ati, “Naŋeega ti, ‘Mu butuufu abaatu mu gwanga lino sibatya Hatonda, olwʼehyo baja hunjita olwʼohwenda ohuŋira omuhasi wange.’
20.12: Ne mu butuufu oweene Saala mboojo yange. Seefe gaali mulala ohutusaho abanyineefe njʼababuhana, ni hwahula ngʼafuuha muhasi wange.
20.13: Hatonda ni gandoma ohuŋwa mu gwanga lyange, nʼaloma Saala ti ‘Ohulaga ti wunyenda, hiisi eyi hunatiinenga balomenga oti ndi mboojoyo.’ ”
20.14: Ngʼaŋo Abbimereki aŋamba etaama nʼeŋombe nʼabeedu abahasi ko nʼabasinde abaŋa Yibbulayimu, ngʼamugobohesa ni Saala omuhasi wuwe.
20.15: NgʼAbbimereki aloma Yibbulayimu ati, “Oli wʼedembe ohumenya aŋaatu ŋosiŋosi mu gwanga lyange.”
20.16: Ngʼaloma Saala ati, “Nja huŋa mboojoyo ebitundu byʼefeeza lukumi, hirage abaatu babo hiiti ŋaŋuma hibi hyosihyosi ehi oholire.”
20.17: Ngʼaŋo Yibbulayimu alomba Hatonda era nga Hatonda aŋonia Abbimereki nʼomuhasi wuwe nʼabeedu babe abahasi basobole ohusaala abaana.
20.18: Ehyo hyaliŋo olwohuba Musengwa gaali asidihire abahasi abomu mago gʼAbbimereki ohutasaala olwohuba gaali aŋirire Saala muha Yibbulayimu.

21.1: Ehiseera hyola, nga Musengwa aŋambira Saala ehisa ngʼolu gamuloma era ngʼamuŋa ehi gamusuubisa.
21.2: Nga Saala aba hida asaalira Yibbulayimu omwana omuseere mu hiseera ehyene nʼehyene ehi Hatonda gamulagaania. Mu hiseera ehyo Yibbulayimu gaali asahuluŋire.
21.3: Nga Yibbulayimu aguliha omwana oyu Saala gamusaalira ati Yisaka.
21.4: Yisaka ni gahena endaalo munaana nga Yibbulayimu amuhomola ngʼolu Hatonda gamulagira.
21.5: Yibbulayimu gaali aŋesa emyaha cikumi aŋa basaalira omwana wuwe Yisaka.
21.6: Nga Saala aloma ati, “Hatonda gapaaye enjeho era hiisi anaŋulirenga ati ŋahani sundya omwana, yeesi aja hujehanga.”
21.7: Era ngʼameedaho ati, “Mu biseera ebyegongo eyo, njʼani owahalomire Yibbulayimu ati Saala alyokesa hu mwana? Aye mu busahulu wuwe musaaliiye omwana museere.” Babbinga Agali ni Yisimayiri
21.8: Nga Yisaka ahula aŋwa hwibeere era Yibbulayimu ganyiiya embaga hasiigu hu ludaalo olu baatusa Yisaka hu beere.
21.9: Aye Saala ngʼabona ati omwana oyu Agali Omumisiri gasaalira Yibbulayimu, gaali ajeeja Yisaka.
21.10: Nga Saala aloma Yibbulayimu ati, “Bbinga omuhasi oyo omwidu era atiine nʼomwana wuwe olwohuba omwana oyo abula mugabo mu byʼobusika nʼomwana wange Yisaka.”
21.11: Ehiitu ehyo hyaluma Yibbulayimu bugali olwohuba hyali hiŋamba hu mwana wuwe Yisimayiri.
21.12: Aye Hatonda galoma Yibbulayimu ati, “Ebiŋamba hu muhasi omwidu nʼomwana wuwe bitahulumya mutwe. Ŋuliirisa ehi Saala ahuloma olwohuba abejuhulu aba nahusuubisa baaja huŋwa mu nje Yisaka.
21.13: Era nja huŋa omwana wʼomuhasi omwidu yeesi ekabi afuuhe egwanga olwohuba mwana wuwo.”
21.14: Ni wahya, nga Yibbulayimu genyoha mu mugamba pwipwipwi aŋamba emere nʼamaaji mu saŋu eyʼehyanjo abiŋa Agali. Nga Yibbulayimu atwiha Agali ebiitu ebyo ahena amuseebula. Ngʼaŋo Agali asimbuha nʼomwana atiina agenda atyo atyo mu lulafu lwʼe Bberuseebba.
21.15: Amaaji ni gaŋwa mu saŋu eyʼehyanjo, ngʼAgali ata aŋo omwana ŋaasi wʼogusiiku.
21.16: Ngʼaŋo atiina gehala ŋaatu ni gesambireho ahanaaŋiro. Ngʼaloma mu mwoyo gugwe ati, “Sinenda hubona omwana wange nʼafa.” Agali ni gaali ni geehaye eyo gatandiha ohulira.
21.17: Oluvanyuma, Hatonda gaŋulira Yisimayiri nʼalira, nga malayika wa Hatonda nʼali mwigulu alanga Agali ati, “Agali, olirira hi? Otatya, Hatonda aŋuliiye ohulira hwʼomwana wuwo.
21.18: Tiina omuŋambe hu muhono omwinyose ohene omuŋoyerese olwohuba nja humufuula egwanga bbala.”
21.19: Ngʼaŋo Hatonda gegula emoni jʼAgali abona esobere ni yirimo amaaji. Ngʼatiina adaŋa amaaji gejusa esaŋu yʼehyanjo eyi gaali ni nayo, ngʼaŋaho Yisimayiri ohunywa.
21.20: Nga Hatonda aba ŋalala ni Yisimayiri, ngʼahula, abanga mu lulafu era gafuuha omuŋiimi haŋunye.
21.21: Olulafu olu gamenyangamo baali balulanga baati Parani era nʼali eyo nga nyina amusunirayo omuhasi ohuŋwa e Misiri. Yibbulayimu ahola endagaano nʼAbbimereki
21.22: Lulala, habaha Abbimereki ko ni Fikoli omuhulu wʼeŋe lirye bahyala ewa Yibbulayimu. Nga habaha amuloma ati, “Mbona Hatonda ali ŋalala ni neewe mu byosibyosi ebi ohola.
21.23: Kusunga olayire mu moni ja Hatonda oti oja huba wʼamazima eyi ndi nʼeyiri abaana oba abejuhulu bange. Ese mbaye wa hisa eyi oli. Kale kusunga weesi obe wahisa eyi ndi ko nʼabaatu bomu gwanga lyange omu oli ngʼomubuli.”
21.24: Nga Yibbulayimu amugobolamo ati, “Kusuubisa ohuhola tyo.”
21.25: Ngʼaŋo Yibbulayimu gemulugunya eyiri Abbimereki olwʼesobere eyi abeedu babe bamutusaho.
21.26: NgʼAbbimereki amugobolamo ati, “Simanyire owahutusaho esobere eyo. Siwundomerangaho oti abeedu bange bayihuŋiraho, ko kiŋulira lwa leero luno.”
21.27: Nga Yibbulayimu atiina aŋamba etaama nʼesaame abiŋa Abbimereki, nga bombi bahola endagaano.
21.28: Ngʼaŋo Yibbulayimu atiina mu higo aŋamba etaama enduusi musanvu, ajabula ajita eruuyi.
21.29: NgʼAbbimereki abuusa Yibbulayimu ati, “Otegeesa hi ohuŋamba etaama enduusi omusanvu wajita ŋa joŋene?”
21.30: Nga Yibbulayimu amugobolamo ati, “Kusunga oŋire etaama jino ohebulirirengaho oti ndiise owayaba esobere yino.”
21.31: Ngʼehifo ehyo bahiranga baati Bberuseebba olwohuba abo bombi baholeraŋo endagaano.
21.32: Oluvanyuma lwʼohuhola endagaano mu hifo ehi balanga baati Bberuseebba, ngʼAbbimereki ni Fikoli omuhulu wʼeŋe lirye, baŋamba engira bagamayo mu twale lyʼAbafirisuuti.
21.33: Nga Yibbulayimu ahoma omunyulira e Bberuseebba, ngʼajumirihisyangamo Musengwa Hatonda owʼEmirembe nʼEmirembe.
21.34: Nga Yibbulayimu amenya mu twale lyʼAbafirisuuti ohuhena ehiseera hireeŋi.

22.1: Oluvanyuma Hatonda gagesesya Yibbulayimu. Gamuloma ati, “Yibbulayimu!” Ngʼamugobolamo ati, “Wanji Musengwa.”
22.2: Nga Hatonda amuloma ati, “Ŋamba Yisaka omwana wuwo, omulala wogobbo oyu wenda, otiine mu hyalo hyʼe Moliya, omuŋeyo ngʼeŋongo era omohye aguhulihe mulamba hu lusozi olu nja huhulaga.”
22.3: Ni wahya mu mugamba pwipwipwi, nga Yibbulayimu ahumbaania ekwi ejʼohwohyera eŋongo ajita hu nasugirya yiye. Ngʼaŋamba olugendo, niye nʼabeedu babe babiri ko ni Yisaka omwana wuwe batiina mu hifo eyi Hatonda gamuloma.
22.4: Hu ludaalo olwohudatu mu lugendo lulwe nga Yibbulayimu alengera ehifo ehyo.
22.5: Nga Yibbulayimu aloma abeedu babe ati, “Musigale ŋano ni nasugirya, ese nʼomuseere hwesendeho mu moni. Huja hujumirya Hatonda, oluvanyuma hunagobole.”
22.6: Nga Yibbulayimu aŋamba ekwi ejʼohwohyera eŋongo ajitwiha Yisaka omwana wuwe. Nga niye aŋamba omuliro nʼengeso mu ngalo, batiina bombi.
22.7: Nga Yisaka alanga semwana ati, “Bbaabba!” Nga Yibbulayimu amugobolamo ati, “Hiina mwana wange?” Nga Yisaka amuloma ati, “Omuliro nʼekwi biriŋo ne etaama eyʼohuŋayo ngʼeŋongo eyi bohya yaguhuuliha, eriŋe?”
22.8: Nga Yibbulayimu amugobolamo ati, “Mwana wange, Hatonda aja hugabirira etaama eyʼohwohya ngʼeŋongo.” Nga bombi beyongera nʼolugendo.
22.9: Ni boola mu hifo aŋa Hatonda gamuloma, nga Yibbulayimu atongola ehituuti ehyohuŋeeraho eŋongo, nga ganjaho ekwi. Ni gahena, ngʼasidiha Yisaka omwana wuwe, amugalamisa hu mugulu wʼekwi ejo hu hituuti.
22.10: Nga Yibbulayimu asoŋolayo epiima ohusala omwana wuwe.
22.11: Aye malayika wa Musengwa nʼali mwigulu gamulanga ati, “Yibbulayimu! Yibbulayimu!” Nga Yibbulayimu amugobolamo ati, “Wanji Musengwa.”
22.12: Nga malayika amuloma ati, “Oteeta mwana. Otamuhola hiitu hyosihyosi. Ŋaahani manyire ti oŋa Hatonda eŋono olwohuba siweganie huŋayo mwana wuwo omulala wogobbo.”
22.13: Yibbulayimu ni gagangamusa emoni, gaali aheja abona etaama emiigu, ameega ni gaŋegeeme mu mboŋa. Nga Yibbulayimu atiina aŋamba emiigu eyo ayiŋayo ngʼeŋongo enjohye, mu hifo hyʼomwana wuwe.
22.14: Ngʼaŋo Yibbulayimu alanga ehifo ehyo esiina lyahyo ati, “ Musengwa aja hutugabirira.” Era nʼohwola olwa leero baloma baati, “Hu lusozi lwa Musengwa , baja hutuŋa.”
22.15: Nga malayika wa Musengwa aloma Yibbulayimu omulundi ogwohubiri,
22.16: ati, “Ese Musengwa nerayirira ese omwene ti olwohuba ndibunjima mwana wuwo omulala wogobbo,
22.17: mu butuufu nja huhuŋa ekabi era nja hufuula abejuhulu babo ohuba bangi hyʼemunyeenye mu bbanga, bangi hyʼomujehe hwigobo lyʼenyanja. Abejuhulu babo baliŋira ebibuga bya balabe baawe.
22.18: Era abaatu mu mawanga gosigosi hu hyalo baja husuna ekabi ohubitira mu bejuhulu babo olwohuba wungondeeye.”
22.19: Ngʼaŋo Yibbulayimu aŋamba engira gagamayo eyiri abeedu babe bagamayo e Bberuseebba. Nga Yibbulayimu amenya e Bberuseebba. Abasaani ba Naholi
22.20: Oluvanyuma lwʼahaseera ŋaaliŋo abalomera Yibbulayimu baati, “Mirika muha mugandawo Naholi yeesi amusaaliiye abaana baseere:
22.21: Wuuzi njʼomudaayi waawe, Bbuuzi njʼowohubiri, Kemweli semwana yʼAlaamu njʼowohudatu
22.22: Kesedi njʼowohune, Kaazo wahutaanu ni Perudaasi ni Yidulaafu ni Bbesweri.”
22.23: Bbesweri gasaala Labbeka. Mirika gasaalira Naholi muganda ya Yibbulayimu abaana munaana.
22.24: Naholi gaali nʼomuhasi owundi hutulo, oyu balanganga baati Lewuma. Era yeesi gasaala abaana abandi: Tebba ni Gahamu ni Takasi ni Maaka.

23.1: Saala gahena emyaha cikumi abiri namusanvu
23.2: ngʼafiira mu hibuga Kiriyaasi Arubba (esiina erindi baati Kebbulooni), mu hyalo hyʼe Kanani. Era ni gafa, nga Yibbulayimu gengira mu weema omu mulambo gwali, ngʼalira.
23.3: Ngʼaŋo Yibbulayimu genyoha aŋwa aŋaali omulambo gwʼomuhasi wuwe, atiina aloma abatangirisi bʼAbahiiti ati,
23.4: “Ese ŋano ndi mubuli era sindi wʼegwanga lyenywe. Mbasunga munguse ehifo ohusiihangamo abaatu bange, siihemo omuhasi wange.”
23.6: “Muhulu, efe huhuŋira ohuba omuutu owʼeŋono. Kale oli wʼedembe ohusiiha omuutu wuwo mu pungulu yosiyosi eyi onasiime, ŋaŋuma anagaane.”
23.7: Ngʼaŋo Yibbulayimu genyoha ahotama mu moni jaawe ohulaga ati abaŋa eŋono,
23.8: ngʼabaloma ati, “Ale ngʼolu muloma muuti ndi wʼedembe, mbasunga mundomereho nʼEfulooni omusaani wa Zokali,
23.9: ganguse epungulu eyiri e Makupeera aŋa hisugu hihye hihoma. Mumulome ganguse hu bbeeyi eyi genda, siihemo omuutu wange.”
23.10: Ŋahani Efulooni yeesi gaali gehaaye nʼAbahiiti bahye mu hifo omu bahumbaaniranga ohuupi nʼomulyango gwʼehikomera hyʼehibuga. Ngʼaŋo agobola mu Yibbulayimu ati,
23.11: “Bbe, musengwa yange sinahihuguse aye kuŋa ehisugu ehyo nʼepungulu yawaho hu wereere. Era kuŋa mu moni jʼabahyange bano, siihamo omuutu wuwo.”
23.12: Nga nindi Yibbulayimu ahotama mu moni jʼAbahiiti abaali aŋo.
23.13: Ngʼaloma Efulooni, abaatu bosibosi abaaliŋo ni baŋulira ati, “Ese mbaye ndoma ti, hanye oganyire ohuupa eroba eryo, ganya ndi huguleho bugule, kusasulemo ebbeesa. Kusunga ofugiirire.”
23.15: “Musengwa yange, ehisugu hijaamo esekeri jʼefeeza ebihumi bine. Aye ebbeesa ejo njʼehiina ŋagati wange ni neewe? Olwʼehyo, hiŋire osiihemo omuutu wuwo.”
23.16: Nga Yibbulayimu afugiirira ebbeeyi eyo era ngʼapimira Efulooni esekeri jʼefeeza ebihumi bine Abahiiti ni babona. Ehyo gahihola nʼatambisa ehipimo ehi basubuuzi batambisanga mu hiseera ehyo.
23.17: Eyo njʼengeri eyi hisugu hyʼEfulooni e Makupeera aŋaapi nʼe Mamule ko nʼepungulu yawaho ko nʼemisaala josijosi ejaali mu lwaha ohwetoloola
23.18: byafuuha bya Yibbulayimu mu moni jʼAbahiiti bosibosi abaali ni bahumbeene ohuupi nʼomulyango gwʼehikomera hyʼehibuga.
23.19: Oluvanyuma lwʼohugula ehisugu ehyo, Yibbulayimu gasiiha omuhasi wuwe Saala mu pungulu eyomu Makupeera aŋaapi nʼe Mamule (ko nje Kebbulooni), mu gwanga lyʼAbakanani.
23.20: Ngʼehisugu nʼepungulu ebyali ebyʼAbahiiti oludaayi, bifuuha bya Yibbulayimu ohuba ehifo hihye ehyʼohusiihangamo abafu.

24.1: Ŋaahani ehiseera hyola Yibbulayimu gaaba nʼasahuluŋire era nabitiriiye mu myaha. Musengwa gaali amuŋaaye ekabi mu hiisi hiitu ehi gaholanga.
24.2: Lwali lulala, nga Yibbulayimu aloma omuhulu wʼabeedu babe era nga njʼowalabiriranga ebiitu byosibyosi mu mago gage ati, “Yigerera ŋano oŋambe ŋaasi wʼehisambi hyange.
24.3: Nenda olayire mu moni ja Musengwa Hatonda owatonda egulu nʼehyalo oti sooja hufunira musaani yange omuhaana Mukanani
24.4: aye oti oja hutiina mu gwanga lyange era mu balebe bange, eyo osunire musaani yange Yisaka omuhasi.”
24.5: Ngʼomwidu amubuusa ati, “Ne singa omuhasi oyu ndisuna safugiirira ohuuja ni neese ohufumbirwa omwana wa musengwa yange, kolanga tye? Ndiŋamba omwana wuwo namuŋira mu hyalo ehyo eyi waŋwa ko waaja eno?”
24.6: Nga Yibbulayimu amugobolamo ati, “Kadi naŋatotono! Soŋiranga mwana wange eyo.”
24.7: Ngʼameedaho ati, “ Musengwa Hatonda owatonda egulu, omwene huutusa mu mago ga Bbaabba, mu gwanga lyange era gaasuubisa nʼalayira nʼohulayira ati, ‘Mazima nja huŋa abejuhulu babo eroba lino.’ Hatonda oyo aja hutuma malayika wuwe ahutangirire osunire omwana wange omuhasi ohuŋwa eyo.
24.8: Omuhasi nʼaliba nʼatenda huuja ni neewe, oliba oŋumaaho omusango. Ohutusaho sooŋiranga mwana wange eyo.”
24.9: Ngʼaŋo omwidu aŋamba ŋaasi wʼehisambi hya Yibbulayimu musengwawe, amulayirira ati aja huhola atyo.
24.10: Ngʼaŋo omwidu oyo aŋambaho hu ngamiya ja musengwawe ehumi, ajitwiha ebirabo ebyʼebbeeyi ebi musengwawe gamuŋwa ohuŋira, ngʼaŋamba olugendo ohutiina mu hibuga omu Naholi gamenyanga ehyali mu hyalo ehi balanganga baati Mesopotamya.
24.11: Ni goola eyo, nga abundaasa engamiya ohuupi nʼesobere ebulafu wʼehibuga omu Naholi gamenyanga. Aŋa goleraŋo, jaali saawa jʼegulo eji bahasi baajirangamo amaaji.
24.12: Ngʼaŋo omwidu oyo asaba ati, “O Musengwa , ewe Hatonda wa musengwa yange Yibbulayimu, pe ekabi olwa leero, ohulaga ngʼolu oli nʼehisa eyiri musengwa yange, oŋambire musengwa yange Yibbulayimu ehisa.
24.13: Nemereeye ŋano hu sobere yino ohu bahaana abomu hibuga hino bali huuja ohudaŋa amaaji.
24.14: Kusunga ti omuhaana oyu nalome ti, ‘Peeho amaaji nyweho,’ ngʼaloma ati, ‘Ngagano era nanywese nʼengamiya jijo.’ Leha abe njʼoyo oyu wendesa Yisaka omwidu wuwo. Ehyo hiija hundaga hiiti oŋambiiye musengwa yange ehisa.”
24.15: Gaali ahiiri hugwisa saala eyo, nga Labbeka goola nʼesongo yiye hwibega. Labbeka gaali muhaana wa Bbesweri omusaani wa Mirika omuhasi wa Naholi muganda ya Yibbulayimu.
24.16: Omuhaana oyo gaali muŋoono bugali, najoŋire era nʼataŋenyuhangaho nʼomusinde. Ngʼomuhaana oyo geeha mu sobere adaŋa amaaji gejusa esongo yiye ngʼatula.
24.17: Ni gaali ni gahatula ohuŋwa mu sobere, ngʼomwidu ola aŋaalaŋaala atiina eyi ali amuloma ati, “Kusunga wupeho amaaji nyweho.”
24.18: Ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo Labbeka getwihula esongo aloma omwidu oyo ati, “Ngagano, muhulu nywaho.”
24.19: Oluvanyuma lwʼohumuŋa amaaji, gamuloma ati, “Nʼengamiya jijo joosi najidaŋire amaaji janywa jeguta.”
24.20: Ngʼaŋo ajuha amaaji agaali ni gasigaaye mu songo mu hiitu omu byayo byanyweranga, ngʼaŋiitaŋitaho adaŋa agandi aleeta ajuhamo ohwola olu engamiya josijosi janywa jeguta.
24.21: Labbeka gaholanga ebyo nʼeno omwidu ola amutayeeho emoni maŋoleeye ni gebuusa mu mwoyo obanga dala Musengwa gaali ali humugobolangamo esaala yiye eyi gasaba nʼamusunga amuŋe ekabi mu lugendo lulwe.
24.22: Engamiya ni jahena ohunywa amaaji, omwidu gaŋamba epeta eyʼomuŋendo eyi babbota mu zaabbu, nʼekeeke embala ebiri eji babbota mu zaabbu ngʼabyambasa Labbeka.
24.23: Ngʼaŋo amubuusa ati, “Oli muhaana wʼani? Lataawo aŋanga ohuba nʼehifo omu ese nʼabahyange aba ndi ni nabo huŋanga ohuŋenyuha?”
24.24: Ngʼamuloma ati, “Ndi muhaana wa Bbesweri omusaani wa Mirika, oyu gasaala ni Naholi.”
24.25: Ngʼameedaho ati, “Engo huliyo nʼenyaasi lyʼebyayo lingi ko nʼehifo ehyʼohuŋenyuhamo.”
24.26: Ngʼomwidu oyo ahubba amafuha ajumirya Musengwa
24.27: ati, “ Musengwa Hatonda wa Yibbulayimu musengwa yange, gebasiwe olwohuba otiinire nʼomulaga ngʼolu oli nʼehisa era omwesigwa eyi ali. Era keesi Musengwa ganduŋamisye ganjosa mu mago ga balebe ba musengwa yange.”
24.28: Labbeka ni gaŋwaŋo gaduluma gatiina mu nyumba ya nyina galomera hiisi muutu ebibono ebyo ebiŋamba hu mwidu ola.
24.29: Ŋaahani Labbeka gaali ni mboojo ni bamulanga baati Labbaani.
24.30: Era Labbaani ni gabona Labbeka ni gambaaye epeta hu suulu ko nʼekeeke hu ngalo era gaŋulira ebibono ebyo ebi mugeni gamuloma, gatula mbiro gaduluma gatiina hu sobere. Ni goola, nga gagaana omuutu oyo ni gemeereye aŋo nʼengamiya jije.
24.31: Nga Labbaani aloma omwidu wa Yibbulayimu oyo ati, “Ewe oyu Musengwa aŋaaye ekabi, nja hutiine engo. Lwahiina wemeereye ŋano ebulafu? Kutegeheeye enyumba nʼehifo omu ngamiya jijo jinaabe.”
