24.32: Ngʼomwidu oyo atiina ni Labbaani nga gengira mu nyumba eyi bamutegehera. Nga Labbaani asitula ebiitu ebyali hu ngamiya era nga bajiŋirira enyaasi. Nga baŋirira omwidu nʼaba gaali ni nabo amaaji agʼohusaaba.
24.33: Ni bahena nga babeŋula aye ngʼomwidu ola aloma ati, “Sinalye ni kiiri hubalomera ehindetire.” Nga Labbaani amuloma ati, “Ale tulomere.”
24.34: Ngʼomwidu atandiha ohubiroosa ati, “Ese ndi mwidu wa Yibbulayimu.
24.35: Musengwa aŋaaye musengwa yange ekabi nyingi bugali era afuuhire muŋinda. Amuŋaaye embusi nʼeŋombe nʼengamiya ni nasugirya nʼefeeza nʼezaabbu ko nʼabeedu abahasi nʼabasinde.
24.36: Era ni Saala omuhasi wa musengwa yange, gamusaalira omwana museere mu busahulu wuwe. Era omwana oyo, bamuŋa obusika owa hiisi hiitu.
24.37: Era musengwa yange gandayisa ati, ‘Sofuniranga musaani yange omuhaana Mukanani, aba menyiremo hatyane.
24.38: Aye tiina eyiri abalebe ba Bbaabba era mu hiha hyange eyo osunire musaani yange Yisaka omuhasi.’ ”
24.39: “Ngʼaŋo mbuusa musengwa yange ti, ‘Ne singa omuhaana oyo saafugiirira ohuuja ohufumbirwa musaani ya musengwa yange, kola tye?’ ”
24.40: Nga gangobolamo ati, “ Musengwa oyu peeresa, aja hutuma malayika wuwe ahutangirire mu lugendo lulwo osunire musaani yange omuhasi ohuŋwa mu hiha hyange era mu balebe ba Bbaabba.
24.41: Nʼoja hutiina mu hiha hyange, omuhaana oyo gagaana, soolibaho musango.
24.42: “Olwaleero ni noolire hu sobere, sabire ti, ‘O Musengwa Hatonda wa Yibbulayimu musengwa yange, kusunga oŋe olugendo lwange luno ekabi.
24.43: Neemire ŋano hu sobere yino, omuhaana anaaje ohudaŋa amaaji, namuloma ti, “Peeho, amaaji nyweho,”
24.44: gandoma ati, “Ngagano nywa era nʼengamiya jijo joosi najidaŋire,” leha abe njʼoyo oyu Musengwa atoboleeye omusaani ya musengwa yange.’
24.45: “Ni mbaye ni kiiri huhena saala eyo mu mwoyo gwange, nga Labbeka gaaja nʼesongo yiye hwibega. Gehire mu sobere ngʼadaŋa amaaji. Nga muloma ti, ‘Peeho amaaji nyweho.’
24.46: “Aŋo ni naaŋo atwihuuye esongo yiye nga gandoma ati, ‘Ngagano nywa era naaŋe nʼengamiya jijo joosi.’
24.47: “Nga mubuusa ti, ‘Oli muhaana wʼani?’ Nga gangobolamo ati, ‘Ndi muhaana wa Bbesweri, omusaani wa Naholi era maama nje Mirika.’ Nga pamba ekeeke mwambasa hu muhono, ngʼamuta nʼepeta hu suulu.
24.48: Ni kenire, nga kubba amafuha njumirya Musengwa . Nga pa Musengwa Hatonda wa Yibbulayimu musengwa yange, eŋono, owutangiriiye mu lugendo lwange hu mwijuhulu wa Naholi muganda ya musengwa yange.
24.49: Ebyo njʼebibayeŋo, musengwa yange mumuholire muutye? Mbasunga mumulage ehyere era mube balwatu eyi ali. Munamuŋe omuhaana oba bbe? Ohungobolamo hwenywe hunanjeede ohumanya ehyohuhola.”
24.50: Nga Labbaani ni Bbesweri bamugobolamo baati, “ Musengwa ali mu hiitu hino. Olwʼehyo, ŋaŋuma ehi huloma.
24.51: Labbeka njʼono ŋano, muŋire abe muhasi wʼomusaani wa musengwawo ngʼolu Musengwa ahutangiriye.”
24.52: Omwidu wa Yibbulayimu ni gaŋulira ebibono ebyo, ngʼahubba amafuha ajumirya Musengwa .
24.53: Ngʼaŋo omwidu atusayo ebyamajolobera ebi bahasi bambala ebi baabbota mu feeza nʼezaabbu ko nʼengoye abiŋambya Labbeka era ngʼaŋa ni mboojo ni nyina ebirabo ebyʼomuŋendo bugali.
24.54: Ni bahena, nga ko babeeŋula balya, banywa era nga baŋenyuhayo. Ni wahya, benyoha mu mugamba, ngʼomwidu aloma abeene mago ati, “Bahyange, hubaweneho muuseebule hahwagame eyiri musengwa yange.”
24.55: Aye nyina ni mboojo ya Labbeka nga bamuloma baati, “Leha omuhaana asigale ŋano ni neefe ohuhena endaalo ngʼehumi ko mutiine.”
24.56: Aye ola ngʼabaloma ati, “Mbasunga mutandwisa, ngʼolu Musengwa aŋaaye olugendo lwange ekabi, muuseebule tiine eyiri musengwa yange.”
24.57: Nga bamuloma baati, “Hahulange omuhaana omwene humubuuse, hubone ehi aloma.”
24.58: Ngʼaŋo balanga Labbeka bamubuusa baati, “Onatiine nʼomusinde ono?” Ngʼabagobolamo ati, “Natiine ni naye.”
24.59: Ngʼababoojo baseebula Labbeka era nga bamuŋa nʼomuhasi owamulerire atiine ni naye. Ngʼomwidu wa Yibbulayimu ko nʼabasinde aba gaali ni nabo bagamayo ni Labbeka.
24.60: Ne ko Labbeka asimbuhe, bamusabira ekabi baati, “Mboojo yeefe, Hatonda ahuŋe ekabi osalagane ekasi nʼesinde, abejuhulu babo basikire ebibuga byʼabalabe baawe.”
24.61: Ngʼaŋo Labbeka nʼabeedu babe betegehera olugendo, ni bahena nga baniina engamiya batiina nʼomwidu oyo.
24.62: Mu hiseera ehyo, Yisaka gaali aŋooye e Bberirakalooyi nʼamenya e Negevu.
24.63: Lulala, gatiina mu ndimiro ehyʼegulo. Ni gaali eyo, gaali aheja alengera engamiya ni jiija.
24.64: Labbeka ni gagangamusa emoni, ngʼalengera Yisaka. Ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo aŋwa hu ngamiya.
24.65: Ngʼabuusa omwidu wa Yibbulayimu ati, “Omusinde oyo ali mu ndimiro ali huuja eyi huli, njʼani?” Ngʼomwidu amugobolamo ati, “Nje musengwa yange.” Labbeka ni gaŋulira ehyo, ngʼabugula olugoye gewihirira mu moni.
24.66: Ngʼaŋo omwidu alomera Yisaka byosibyosi ebi gaali nʼaholire.
24.67: Nga Yisaka aŋamba Labbeka amuŋira mu weema omu Saala nyina gamenyanga. Nga Labbeka afuuha muhasi wuwe era nga Yisaka amwenda bugali. Era ehyo hyamutusaho obutahi obu galimo olwʼohufa hwa nyina.

25.1: Oluvanyuma lwʼohufa hwa Saala, Yibbulayimu gasuna omuhasi owundi oyu baali ni balanga baati Ketula.
25.2: Ketula gamusaalira Zimulaani ni Yokusani ni Medani ni Midiyaani ni Yisibbaki ko ni Suuwa.
25.3: Yokusani gasaala Seebba ni Dedani. Abʼolulyo lwa Dedani baali njʼAbasulimu nʼAbaletusimu nʼAbalewumimu.
25.4: Abasaani ba Midiyaani baali nje: Efa nʼEferi ni Kanoki nʼAbbida ko nʼEluda. Abo bosibosi baali baana ba Ketula.
25.5: Yibbulayimu gaŋamba byosibyosi ebi gaali ni nabyo ngʼabiŋa Yisaka.
25.6: Aye ni gaali nʼahiiriŋo mulamu, abaana aba bahasi abandi gabaŋa ebirabo ngʼahena abaseebula batiina ebuŋwalyuba, baleha Yisaka omusaani wuwe.
25.7: Ŋosiŋosi, Yibbulayimu gahena emyaha cikumi sanvu nʼetaanu,
25.8: nga ko afa nʼaŋangaliiye erala bulaŋi era nʼaliiyeho. Nga bamuŋira bamusiiha.
25.9: Nga Yisaka ni Yisimayiri, abasaani babe bamusiiha mu pungulu e Makupeera ŋaapi nʼe Mamule, ehifo ehigagula hu Efulooni omusaani wa Zokali Omuhiiti.
25.10: Ehifo ehyo njʼehi Yibbulayimu gagula hu Bahiiti. Ŋaweene aŋo paŋa gaali nʼasiihire Saala omuhasi wuwe.
25.11: Oluvanyuma lwʼohufa hwa Yibbulayimu, Hatonda gaŋa Yisaka ekabi. Nga Yisaka amenyanga ohuupi nʼesobere eyi balanganga baati Bberirakalooyi. Olulyo lwa Yisimayiri
25.12: Bino njʼebiŋamba hu Yisimayiri omwana wa Yibbulayimu oyu Agali Omumisiri, omwidu wa Saala gamusaalira
25.13: era amasiina gʼabaana ba Yisimayiri ngʼolu basaaliwa ngagano: omudaayi gaali nje Nebbayoosi, owohubiri gaali nje Kedali, ngʼotaaho Adubbeeri. Nga hulondaho Mibbusamu
25.14: ni Misuma ni Duma ni Maasa
25.15: Hadadi ni Tema ni Yeturi ni Nafisi ko ni Kedema.
25.16: Ago njʼamasiina gʼabaana ba Yisimayiri era ameene ago njʼamasiina gʼabatangirisi baawe ehumi nʼababiri ngʼolu bamenyanga.
25.17: Yisimayiri gahena emyaha cikumi adatu namusanvu, ngʼafa bamuŋira bamugalamirisa aŋali abasehulu babe.
25.18: Abejuhulu babe baamenya ohuŋwa e Kavira ohwola e Suuri ohuupi nʼesalo ni Misiri, nʼolengereeye e Busuuli. Era baali nʼepalaana nʼabaliranwa babe bosibosi. Yakobbo nʼEsawu
25.19: Bino njʼebiŋamba hu Yisaka omusaani wa Yibbulayimu: Yibbulayimu gasaala Yisaka
25.20: era Yisaka gaali ali nʼemyaha ane aŋa gahwera Labbeka omuhaana wa Bbesweri era mboojo ya Labbaani. Bbesweri gaali wʼegwanga lyʼAbalaamu mu hyalo hyʼe Mesopotamya.
25.21: Ŋaahani Labbeka omuhasi wa Yisaka gaali mugumba. Olwʼehyo Yisaka nga gegayirira Musengwa amuŋe olusaaye. Nga Musengwa aŋulira ohusaba huhwe era nga Labbeka aba hida.
25.22: Abaana nga basoolanga mu hida wuwe. Nga nyinaawe aloma ati, “Lwahiina hino hiriŋo?” Olwʼehyo, ngʼatiina ohwebuusaho hu Musengwa .
25.23: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa amuloma ati, “Abaana babiri bali mu hida wuwo era baliŋwamo amawanga abiri. Era abaatu abo ababiri baja hwawuhana. Mulala hu bo aja huhira owahye amaani. Era omuhulu aja huba muŋeeresa womuŋere.”
25.24: Ehiseera hyʼohusaala ni hyola, Labbeka gasaala balongo, bombi ni bali baseere.
25.25: Muhwana gaali nʼomubiri mulando era omubiri gugwe gwosigwosi ni guhwene amooya oti hani bbulangiti eyʼamooya. Olwʼehyo, nga bamutaho esiina baati Esawu.
25.26: Oluvanyuma nga Mulongo yeesi atula nʼanywanywahise ehibbonje hyʼEsawu. Olwʼehyo, nga bamutaho esiina baati Yakobbo. Labbeka gasaala abalongo abo Yisaka nʼaŋesa emyaha kaaga.
25.27: Abaseere abo ni bahula, Esawu ngʼafuuha muŋiimi haŋunye era nʼasinga hugendera mwisugu. Aye Yakobbo gaali muutu muŋoleeri era ni getolooleranga ŋango.
25.28: Yisaka nga genda nyo Esawu olwohuba ganyumirwanga bugali ohulya enyama yʼesolo eji gaŋiimanga. Aye Labbeka gendanga nje Yakobbo.
25.29: Lulala, Yakobbo gaali ali hunyiiya ehifulugo, ngʼEsawu gagama engo nʼaŋwa ohuŋiima nʼadembire era enjala nʼemuluma.
25.30: NgʼEsawu aloma Yakobbo ati, “Ndi bubi, enjala yenda hunjita. Peeho ebyohulya bibyo ebyo ebirulire ndyeho.” Cʼehyagima bamulanga baati Edomu.
25.31: Nga Yakobbo amuloma ati, “Sooka wusuubise oti onapemo omugabo gugwo ogu oli nʼohusuna ngʼomwana omudaayi.”
25.32: NgʼEsawu amugobolamo ati, “Enjala yenda hunjita, omugabo gwange ngʼomwana omudaayi gungasa hi?”
25.33: Aye Yakobbo ngʼamuloma ati, “Sooka wundayirire oti onapemo omugabo gugwo.” Ehyaŋwamo ngʼEsawu amulayirira amugusa omugabo gugwe.
25.34: Ngʼaŋo Yakobbo aŋa Esawu ehifulugo. NgʼEsawu alya era ngʼanywa ahena genyoha aŋwaŋo. Atyo Esawu poganyooma era gatunda obusika wuwe.

26.1: Ehiseera hyola nga nindi ŋagwaŋo enjala mu hyalo hyʼe Kanani ngʼolu yaluma mu ndaalo ja Yibbulayimu. Olwʼenjala, Yisaka gatiina e Gerali ewa Abbimereki habaha wʼAbafirisuuti.
26.2: Nga Musengwa abonehera Yisaka amuloma ati, “Otatiina yi Misiri, nenda omenye mu hyalo omu nja ohuhuloma ohumenya.
26.3: Nenda omenyeho mu hyalo hino, nja huba ni neewe era nja huhuŋa ekabi. Ewe nʼabejuhulu babo nja hubaŋa amawanga gano gosigosi era ehyo hija huhahasa ehi nʼaloma Yibbulayimu lataawo.
26.4: Nja hwasa abejuhulu babo babe bangi hyʼemunyeenye ŋamugulu mu bbanga era nja hubaŋa e twale lino lyosiryosi. Era abaatu mu mawanga gosigosi hu hyalo baja husuna ekabi ohubitira mu bejuhulu babo
26.5: olwohuba Yibbulayimu gagondera ebiragiro nʼamagambi gange.”
26.7: Abaatu abomu hitehere ehyo ni bamubuusa ebiŋamba hu muhasi wuwe, gabagobolamo ati, “Oyo mboojo yange.” Ehyo gahiroma olwohuba gaali atya ohuloma ati, “Oyo muhasi wange.” Naŋeega ati, “Abaatu bomu hitundu hino baja hunjita olwa Labbeka olwohuba muhasi muŋoono.”
26.8: Aye ni ŋabitaŋo ehiseera, Abbimereki habaha wʼAbafirisuuti gaali mu dinisa lirye gaabona Yisaka nʼagudusa Labbeka mu ngeri eyiraga yiiti gaali muhasi wuwe.
26.9: Ngʼaŋo Abbimereki alanga Yisaka amuloma ati, “Mu butuufu oweene, Labbeka muhasi wuwo! Lwahiina waloma oti mboojoyo?” Nga Yisaka amugobolamo ati, “Naloma tyo olwohuba naŋeega ti baaja hunjita hu lulwe bamuŋire.”
26.10: NgʼAbbimereki amuloma ati, “Hiina hino ehi otuholire? Singa mulala hu baatu bange gaŋenyuha nʼomuhasi wuwo, hyahatuleeteeye endibo.”
26.11: Ngʼaŋo Abbimereki aŋa abaatu bosibosi ehiragiro ati, “Omuutu yesiyesi, ajooga Yisaka oba omuhasi wuwe, aja hufa.”
26.12: Nga mu mwaha ogwo Yisaka alima mu hyalo ehyo emere, nga geeta ebiryo cikumi hu cikumi olwohuba Musengwa gamuŋa ekabi.
26.13: Yisaka gasuna obuŋinda era gatiina ni geeyongera ohusuna obuŋinda ohwola olu gaali muŋinda bugali weene.
26.14: Gasuna embusi nʼetaama nʼeŋombe ko nʼabeedu eduuli era ehyo hyagongeesa Abafirisuuti.
26.15: Ehyo hyaleetera Abafirisuuti ohusiiha esobere eji beedu ba Yibbulayimu semwana bayaba, bajijusa eroba.
26.16: NgʼAbbimereki aloma Yisaka ati, “Tuŋwere mu gwanga lyefe, ofuuhire wa hifuba ohutuhira.”
26.17: Ngʼaŋo Yisaka aŋwaŋo atiina mu hiiho hyʼe Gerali geemeha eyo eweema jije, amenya omwo.
26.18: Nga Yisaka gegula bunyaha esobere eji bayaba Yibbulayimu semwana nʼahiiriŋo mulamu, atusamo eroba olwohuba Abafirisuuti baali baajiigala oluvanyuma lwa Yibbulayimu ohufa. Era gajiranga amasiina gaajo amahalehale aga semwana gajitaho.
26.19: Abeedu ba Yisaka nga bayaba esobere mu hiiho babona ni hirimo amaaji amalaŋi.
26.20: Ne abaayi abomu Gerali baduhana nʼabaayi ba Yisaka baati, “Esobere eyo yeefe, siyenywe.” Olwʼehyo, Yisaka galanga esobere eyo ati Eseki olwohuba bayihaabira.
26.21: Ngʼaŋo bayaba esobere eyindi era yoosi bayihaabira, ngʼayiranga ati Situna.
26.22: Ngʼatiina mu hifo ehindi ayaba esobere eyindi aye yino ŋaaŋuma owayihaabira. Olwʼehyo, gayiranga ati Lekobbosi era ngʼaloma ati, “Ŋaahani Musengwa atugalamisye era huuja huhulahulana mu hyalo hino.”
26.23: Ohuŋwa aŋo, gaŋamba engira gaatiina e Bberuseebba.
26.24: Nga mu wiire, Musengwa amubonehera amuloma ati, “Ndiise Hatonda wa lataawo Yibbulayimu. Otatya olwohuba ndi ni neewe era nja huhuŋa ekabi. Nja hwasa abejuhulu babo babe bangi olwa Yibbulayimu omuŋeeresa wange.”
26.25: Nga Yisaka atongola ehituuti ehyohuŋeeraho eŋongo, nga ajumiryanga Musengwa . Nga geemeha eweema mu hifo ehyo era ŋaweene aŋo abeedu babe bayabaŋo esobere eyindi.
26.26: Mu hiseera ehyo, Abbimereki ni meriiwe Akuzasi owamuŋanga amagesi ko ni Fikoli omuduumisi wʼeŋe lirye baŋwa e Gerali bahyalira Yisaka.
26.27: Nga Yisaka ababuusa ati, “Enywe mwambinga ewenywe, hiina ehi baleetire?”
26.28: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Hiri ŋalafu ti Musengwa ali ni neewe. Cʼehyagima hwaloma huuti, ‘Hiraŋi ohuŋandiiha endagaano ŋagati weefe ni neewe.’ Leha huhole endagaano ni neewe
26.29: huuti sooja hutuhola habi hosihosi ngʼolu hwesi hwahubisyanga bulaŋi ohwola olu hwabuhana miyaaya. Era ŋaahani Musengwa ahuŋaaye ekabi.”
26.30: Ngʼaŋo Yisaka abanyiiyira embaga, balya era banywa.
26.31: Ni wahya mu mugamba, nga bahola endagaano ŋagati waawe. Ngʼaŋo Yisaka abaseebula bagamayo miyaaya.
26.32: Oludaalo olwo, ngʼabeedu ba Yisaka batiina bamuŋayira ebiŋamba hu sobere eyi baali ni bayabire. Nga bamuloma baati, “Hwolire hu maaji.”
26.33: Ngʼesobere eyo Yisaka ayitaho esiina ati Sibba era ehibuga ehiri ohuupi nʼesobere eyo njʼehigira bahiranga baati, Bberuseebba. Abahasi bʼEsawu abanamawanga
26.34: Esawu ni gaali hu myaha ane, gahwa Yudeesi omuhaana wʼomusinde Omuhiiti oyu baali ni balanga baati Bbeeri. Ngʼahwa ni Bbasimaasi omuhaana wʼEloni yeesi Omuhiiti.
26.35: Abahaana abo bombi bafuuha higosi eyiri muhwe yaawe Yisaka ko ni masaala yaawe Labbeka.

27.1: Olwola, Yisaka nʼahayiriŋire era nʼohubona nʼatasobola hubona, gatumisa Esawu omusaani wuwe omuhulu, ngʼamuloma ati, “Mwana wange.” NgʼEsawu amugobolamo ati, “Wanji, Bbaabba.”
27.2: Nga Yisaka amuloma ati, “Ese sahuluŋire era natere ohufa.
27.3: Ŋamba ahasaale otiine mwisugu wupiimire esolo.
27.4: Ohene otegeheŋo emere eyahawoowo eyipomera, oyindetere ndye, kene kusabire ekabi ni tafa.”
27.5: Mu hiseera ehyo, Labbeka gaali aŋaatu nʼaŋulira Yisaka nʼaloma nʼomusaani Esawu. Esawu ni gatiina ohuŋiima,
27.6: nga Labbeka aloma Yakobbo omwana wuwe ati, “Ewe! Pwahuŋulira lataawo nʼaloma mugandawo Esawu ati,
27.7: ‘Tiina wupiimire esolo, otegeheŋo emere eyahawoowo, eyipomera ndye, kene kusabire ekabi mu moni ja Musengwa .’
27.8: Olwʼehyo, mwana wange, ŋuliirisa bulaŋi weene ohole ehi kuloma.
27.9: Tiina wundeetere embusi ebiri eperepere era ejiboneha obulaŋi, piyiire lataawo emere emuŋomera.
27.10: Ni yinaanye, ngʼoyiŋirira lataawo alye, gahahusabira ekabi nʼatafa.”
27.11: Ne Yakobbo ngʼaloma nyina Labbeka ati, “Ohimanyire bulaŋi oti Esawu aliho amooya hu mubiri aye ese pumaaho.
27.12: Ne singa Bbaabba ganjabaabaho, gafaania ati ndi humudulinga, nereetere hiŋwabo mu hifo hyʼekabi.”
27.13: Nga nyina amuloma ati, “Mwana wase, leha ehiŋwabo hibe hu ese. Hola ehi kuloma, tiina wundeetere ŋano embusi.”
27.14: Nga Yakobbo atiina mu lugo atusaamo embusi ebiri ajiŋirira nyina. Nga nyina anyiiya enyama enyene enoli.
27.15: Nga Labbeka aŋamba ebyambalo ebiraŋi ebyʼEsawu omwana wuwe omuhulu, ebyali mu nyumba, gambasa Yakobbo omwana wuwe omuŋere.
27.16: Ngʼaŋamba ebyanjo ebi babaaga hu mbusi jira amuwiiha hu mihono nomu gosi.
27.17: Ngʼaŋo aŋambya omwana wuwe oyo Yakobbo emere eyahawoowo eyi gaali nʼayiiyire.
27.18: Nga Yakobbo ayiŋirira semwana, amulanga ati, “Bbaabba.” Ngʼamugobolamo ati, “Oloma otye, mwana wange. Ewe, ndiiwe ani?”
27.19: Nga Yakobbo aloma semwana ati, “Ndiise Esawu omwana wuwo omudaayi. Kolire ngʼolu wundomire, yinyoha wihale, olye wahasabira ekabi.”
27.20: Nga Yisaka abuusa omusaani ati, “Nga soolweyo, mwana wange?” Nga niye amugobolamo ati, “ Musengwa Hatonda wuwo gatangiriiye.”
27.21: Ngʼaŋo Yisaka aloma Yakobbo ati, “Yigerera ŋano, kwabaabeho mwana wange, nahafaania mu butuufu, obanga ndiiwe Esawu mwana wange, oba bbe.”
27.22: Nga Yakobbo gigerera eyiri Yisaka semwana. Ni gamwabaabaho, ngʼaloma ati, “Ejanjaasi lya Yakobbo aye engalo jʼEsawu.”
27.23: Yisaka sigafaania ati nje Yakobbo, olwohuba emihono jije jaaliho amooya hyʼeja mugandawe Esawu, ehyaŋwamo ngʼamusabira ekabi.
27.24: Ngʼamuloma ati, “Mu butuufu ndiiwe omwana wange Esawu?” Ngʼola amugobolamo ati, “Bbaabba, ndiise.”
27.25: Nga Yisaka amuloma ati, “Ale mwana wange, peerese enyama eyi oŋiimire ndye, kene kusabire ekabi.” Nga Yakobbo amuŋa alya, ngʼamuŋa nʼomwenge ogwʼemizabbibbu anywa.
27.26: Nga Yisaka semwana amuloma ati, “Yigerera wungwe mu hifuba, mwana wange.”
27.27: Nga gigerera amugwa mu hifuba. Yisaka ni gaŋunyira olusu lwʼebyambalo byʼEsawu, gamusabira ekabi ati, “O, ahaloosa hʼomwana wange hali hyʼahaloosa hʼendimiro eyi Musengwa aŋaaye ekabi.”
27.28: Hatonda ahuŋe hu olume oluŋwa mwigulu, ahuŋe nʼobuŋinda wohu hyalo, ebyohulya nʼohunywa.
27.29: Amawanga hu hyalo gahuŋeeresenga era nʼabaatu bahubbenga amafuha mu moni jijo, obe mwami eyiri abaganda babo. Era abasaani ba maawo bahuhubbire amafuha. Oyo ahuŋwaba himulonde omwene era ni nʼoyo ahuŋa ekabi abe wʼekabi.
27.30: Yisaka ko ni gaali ni gahaheneresa ohumusabira ekabi, Yakobbo nʼahiiri aŋo mu moni ja semwana, nga mugandawe Esawu goleraho nʼaŋwa mu huŋiima.
27.31: Era yeesi ngʼanyiiya enyama eyahawoowo, ayiŋirira semwana. Ngʼamuloma ati, “Bbaabba yinyoha, olye wahaapa ekabi.”
27.32: Ngʼaŋo semwana amubuusa ati, “Ndiiwe ani?” Ngʼamugobolamo ati, “Ndiise Esawu omwana wuwo omudaayi.”
27.33: Yisaka gateetema bugali ngʼamuloma ati, “Njʼani atiinire gaŋiima esolo, gahena gandetera enyama? Pwahulya era nahamusabira ekabi ko ohene woole era aja hujisuna.”
27.34: Esawu ni gaŋulira ebibono bya semwana, gatemuha gaalira nʼamaani nʼenaku nyingi, ngʼaloma semwana ati, “Keesi Bbaabba sabireho ekabi.”
27.35: Aye nga Yisaka amuloma ati, “Mugandawo gajire gandulinga era ahuŋirireho ekabi jijo.”
27.36: NgʼEsawu aloma ati, “Sihyeŋunjisa olwohuba esiina lirye nje Yakobbo? Gandulingire emirundi ebiri: gaapiraho obusika wange era nindi aŋirire nʼekabi jange!” NgʼEsawu ahena abuusa semwana ati, “Ŋaŋumaŋo kabi ejindi josijosi?”
27.37: Nga Yisaka agobola mu Esawu ati, “Musabiiye ekabi ohuba musengwawo era abalebe babe baja huba baŋeeresa babe. Muŋaaye obuŋinda wohu hyalo nʼebyohulya nʼohunywa byosibyosi. Olwʼehyo, mwana wange, nahuholere hi?”
27.38: NgʼEsawu abuusa semwana ati, “Bbaabba, oliŋo nʼekabi jengeri ndala yoŋene? Keesi Bbaabba sabireho ekabi.” Ngʼaŋo Esawu atemuha alira.
27.39: Nga semwana Yisaka amuloma ati, “Enyumba yiyo yinaabenga ŋaleeŋi nʼobuŋinda wohu hyalo, ŋaleeŋi nʼolume oluŋwa mwigulu ŋamugulu.
27.40: Oja huliiranga mu huŋiriŋana era oja huba muŋeeresa wa mugandawo. Aye nʼolisalaŋo ohuba wʼedembe, olimwetasulyaho ko atasobola huhuŋuga.” Yakobbo adulumira ewa Labbaani
27.41: NgʼEsawu acaawa Yakobbo olwohuba semwana gamusabira ekabi ejaali ejohuba ejije. Ngʼaloma mu mwoyo gugwe ati, “Bbaabba njʼono ali huupi hufa. Kasita hulihena ebyʼohulira nga niita muganda yange Yakobbo.”
27.42: Ne ni balomera Labbeka ebi Esawu omwana wuwe omudaayi gaali naŋeega, gatumisa Yakobbo omwana wuwe omuŋere, ngʼamuloma ati, “Esawu mugandawo, asala amagesi ohuhwita.
27.43: Olwʼehyo, mwana wange, hola ehi kuloma, duluma otiine e Harani ewa hoojaayo Labbaani, mboojo yange.
27.44: Obeeyo, ohwola olu mugandawo anaheese obusungu.
27.45: Mugandawo nʼanahabe ni gehiise obusungu, ni gerabiiye ehi wamuhola, nja hutuma omuutu ahulome ogobole. Sinenda hubafiirwa mwembi hu ludaalo lulala.”
27.46: Ngʼaŋo Labbeka aloma Yisaka ati, “Ndembire esambo jʼabahaana Bahiiti, abahasi bʼEsawu. Yakobbo yeesi nʼanahaleete mulala hu bahaana Abahiiti mu gwanga lino, ohufa hunahabe husingira ohuba omulamu ni menya ŋalala ni nabo.”

28.1: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Yisaka atumisa Yakobbo, amulombera ekabi ngʼahena amuloma ati, “Soleetanga ŋano muhaana Mukanani ohuba muhasi wuwo.
28.2: Otiinanga e Padani Alaamu, ewa sehulu wuwo Bbesweri semwana ya maawo, osune omuhaana wa hoojaayo Labbaani, mboojo ya maawo.
28.3: Hatonda Omwene Buŋangi wosiwosi ahuŋe ekabi, ahufuule egwanga ebbala eryʼebiha ebyene ebingi.
28.4: Era ahuŋe ewe nʼabejuhulu babo ekabi eji gasuubisa Yibbulayimu, osikire ehyalo omu omenyire ngʼomuwuli. Ehyalo ehi Hatonda gaŋa Yibbulayimu.”
28.5: Yisaka ni gahena ohumulombera ekabi ngʼamuseebula atiine e Padani Alaamu ewa Labbaani, omusaani wa Bbesweri Omwalaamu, mboojo ya Labbeka, nyina ya Yakobbo nʼEsawu. Esawu ahwa omuhasi owundi
28.6: NgʼEsawu afaania ngʼolu Yisaka galombera Yakobbo ekabi era gamusindiha ohutiina e Padani Alaamu, asune eyo omuhasi. Era ngʼolu gamusabira ekabi gahena gamuhamirisa ati, “Soleetanga ŋano muhaana Mukanani ohuba muhasi wuwo.”
28.7: Era gahitegeera ati Yakobbo gagondera semwana ni nyina gatiina e Padani Alaamu,
28.8: ngʼEsawu ko ahifaania ati Yisaka semwana gaali sigenda abahasi Bakanani.
28.9: Ngʼaŋo aŋamba engira atiina ewa Yisimayiri, ngʼahwa Mahalasi ohuba muhasi wuwe. Mahalasi oyo, gaali mboojo ya Nebbayoosi omusaani wa Yisimayiri, omusaani wa Yibbulayimu. Ehyo gahihola, ni gongesa hu bahasi aba gaali ni naabo. Yakobbo alootera e Bbeseeri
28.10: Ŋaahani Yakobbo ni gaŋwa e Bberuseebba gaŋamba olugendo gasimba olwʼe Harani.
28.11: Ni goola aŋaatu, gasalaŋo aŋenyuhe aŋo olwohuba esaawa yaali yiguuye mu maaji, gaŋenyuha aŋo owiire owo. Gaŋamba erala hu mabaale mu hifo ehyo, nga geŋigiha, aŋenyuha.
28.12: Ni gaali nʼaŋenyuha ngʼaloota. Mu hirooto ehyo, gabona amadaala ameene amaleeŋi ni goola mwigulu nʼabamalayika ba Hatonda ni baniinuha era ni baniina.
28.13: Era ŋamugulu wamadaala ago, Musengwa ni gemeereye, ngʼaloma ati, “Ndiise Musengwa Hatonda ya sehulu wuwo Yibbulayimu era Hatonda wa Yisaka. Nja huhuŋa ewe nʼabejuhulu babo eroba eryo aŋoŋenyuhire.
28.14: Abejuhulu babo baja huba hyʼomujehe ni batabaliha era baja husalaaniha ohuŋwa ebuŋwalyuba ohwola ebugwalyuba, ohuŋwa mu maniino ohwola mu mehiriro. Abaatu bosibosi hu hyalo balisuna ekabi ohubitira mu ewe nʼabejuhulu babo.
28.15: Nja huba ŋalala ni neewe era nahuhuumenga hiisi aŋa anaajenga era ndi hugobosa mu gwanga lino. Sindihulehulira ohwola olu ndyoheresa ehi suubisa.”
28.16: Yakobbo ni gasisimuha mwiro, galoma ati, “Mu butuufu, Musengwa ali mu hifo hino aye mbaye sikimanyire.”
28.17: Gatya, ngʼaloma ati, “Ngʼehifo hino hitiisa! Ehifo hino sihiitu hindi ohutusaho nyumba ya Hatonda era ŋano ŋaliŋo omulyango oguja mwigulu.”
28.18: Ni wahya mu mugamba pwipwipwi, Yakobbo gaŋamba ebaale eri gaali ni geŋigihire, galihomeha aŋo hyʼehihondo ohuba ahabonero ahohuhebuliriraho, ngʼahena alijuhaho amafuta agahaloosa.
28.19: Ngʼehifo ehyo ahiguliha esiina ati Bbeseeri, wayire ngʼehibuga ehyo baali bahiranga baati Luuzi.
28.20: Nga Yakobbo geeyama ati, “Hatonda nʼanabenga ŋalala ni neese era gakuuma mu lugendo luno, gaapa ebyohwambala nʼebyohulya,
28.21: ehiseera hyola nagamayo engo ewa Bbaabba miyaaya, Musengwa aja huba Hatonda wange,
28.22: nʼebaale lino eri komire ohuba ehihondo ehyʼohuhebulirirangaho, lija huba nyumba ya Hatonda era hiisi ehi wuupa, keesi nja huhuŋangaho hirala ehyʼehumi.”

29.1: Ngʼaŋo Yakobbo geyongera nʼolugendo, atiina goola mu gwanga eriri ebuŋwalyuba.
29.2: Ngʼabona esobere aŋadulere, ebidooli byʼetaama bidatu ni bigandaaye aŋo olwohuba paŋa janyweranga. Ebaale eri batambisanga ohuwiiha hu sobere lyali bbala.
29.3: Abaayi ni bahahenire ohuhumbaania etaama ngʼolu kola yaawe yaali, nga baŋiringisya ebaale eryo balitusa hu munwa gwʼesobere nga bajinywesa. Oluvanyuma nga baligobosaŋo hu munwa gwʼesobere.
29.4: Nga Yakobbo abuusa abaayi ati, “Balebe bange, muŋwera ŋe?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Huŋwera e Harani.”
29.5: Ngʼababuusa ati, “Mumanyire Labbaani omwijuhulu wa Naholi?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “E e, humumanyire.”
29.6: Nga Yakobbo ababuusa ati, “Aliyo mulaŋi?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Aliyo mulaŋi era Lakeeli omuhaana wuwe njʼoyo owuuja nʼetaama.”
29.7: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Guhiiri muusi ohuhumbaania ebyayo ohuŋenyuha. Mujinywese muhene mujagamyeyo mu hyayo.”
29.8: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Sihuhola huutyo, husooka huhumbaania etaama josijosi ko hwaŋiringisya ebaale hwalitusa hu munwa gwʼesobere nga ko josijosi jinywa omulundi mulala.”
29.9: Ni gaali nʼahiroma ni nabo, nga Lakeeli goola nʼetaama ja Labbaani olwohuba njʼowajeemeranga.
29.10: Yakobbo ni gabona Lakeeli omuhaana wa Labbaani mboojo ya nyina nʼetaama, gatiina ngʼaŋiringisya ebaale alitusa hu munwa gwʼesobere, ngʼanywesa etaama ja hoojaye.
29.11: Nga Yakobbo agwa Lakeeli mu hifuba, ngʼatandiha nʼohulira.
29.12: Gaali alomeeye Lakeeli ati mulebe ya semwana era musaani wa Labbeka. Olwʼehyo, Lakeeli gadduluma embiro gatiina engo galomera semwana.
29.13: Aŋo ni naaŋo, ni balomera Labbaani hu Yakobbo omwana wa mboojo, gaduluma ohuja ohwagaanana ni naye. Ni goola ngʼamugwa mu hifuba, ngʼamufumberera era ngʼahena amuŋira engo. Nga Yakobbo alomera Labbaani byosibyosi ebimufaho.
29.14: Nga Labbaani amuloma ati, “Mu butuufu, oli mafugi era mubiri gwange.” Yakobbo ahwa Leeya ni Lakeeli Oluvanyuma lwa Yakobbo ohumenya ni Labbaani omwesi mulala,
29.15: Labbaani galoma Yakobbo ati, “Olwohuba oli mulebe yange oli nʼohuutambira huwereere? Ndomere, kusasulenga jinga?”
29.16: Labbaani gaali nʼabahaana babiri, omuhulu gaali nje Leeya, omuŋere gaali nje Lakeeli.
29.17: Leeya gaali aheja bulaŋi aye Lakeeli gaali muŋoono era nʼasangaasa.
29.18: Yakobbo gasiima Lakeeli, ngʼaloma hoojaye ati, “Nja huhutambira emyaha musanvu wuupe Lakeeli omuhaana wuwo omuŋere.”
29.19: Nga Labbaani amuloma ati, “Mala gahuŋa ewe ohuhira ohumuŋa omuutu owundi. Ba ŋano ni nange.”
29.20: Olwʼehyo, Yakobbo gatamba emyaha musanvu bamuŋe Lakeeli aye jafaanana hyʼendaalo enyene endiidiri olwʼohwenda ohu gaali nʼamwendamo.
29.21: Emyaha omusanvu ni jaŋwaho, nga Yakobbo aloma Labbaani ati, “Ŋaahani pe omuhasi wange olwohuba endaalo jange ejohutamba jiŋooyeho. Nenda ohuba ni naye.”
29.22: Olwʼehyo, Labbaani gahumbaania abaatu bosibosi abomu hitehere ehyo, ngʼanyiiya embaga.
29.23: Aye egulo ni lyola, gaŋamba Leeya omuhaana wuwe omuhulu gaaba njʼoyu amuŋa era nga Yakobbo aŋenyuha ni naye!
29.24: (Nga Labbaani aŋamba Zilupa omwidu wuwe amuŋa Leeya omuhaana wuwe, ohuba omwidu.)
29.25: Ni wahya mu mugamba, Yakobbo ngʼahifaania ati bamuŋaaye nje Leeya mu hifo hya Lakeeli. Olwʼehyo, Yakobbo gatiina eyiri Labbaani gamuloma ati, “Hino hiina ehi wakolire? Sinahutambira wuupe Lakeeli? Lwahiina wandulingire?”
29.26: Nga Labbaani amugobolamo ati, “Efe ŋano sipohuhola huutyo, ohugaba omuhaana omuŋere ni huhiiri hugaba omudaayi.
29.27: Hena endaalo musanvu ejʼobugole wʼoyo, ko huhuŋe obundi nindi wutambire emyaha omusanvu.”
29.28: Nga Yakobbo ahola atyo. Gahena endaalo musanvu ni Leeya nga Labbaani amuŋa Lakeeli omuhaana wuwe ohuba muhasi wuwe.
29.29: Nga Labbaani aŋamba Bbiluha amuŋa Lakeeli omuhaana wuwe ohuba mwidu wuwe.
29.30: Nga Yakobbo aŋenyuha ni Lakeeli yeesi era nga genda Lakeeli ohuhira Leeya. Era ngʼatambira Labbaani nindi emyaha musanvu ejindi. Abaana ba Yakobbo
29.31: Musengwa ni gabona Leeya nʼali nabunobe, gamuŋa olusaaye aye Lakeeli gaali mugumba.
29.32: Nga Leeya aba hida, asaala omwana museere ngʼamulanga ati Lubbeeni olwohuba galoma ati, “ Musengwa aweene enaku yange. Mu butuufu wamwange ŋaahani aja hunyenda.”
29.33: Nga nindi aba hida asaala omwana museere, ngʼaloma ati, “Olwohuba Musengwa amanyire ati wamwange siganyenda, gapaaye ono yeesi.” Olwʼehyo, ngʼamulanga ati Simyoni.
29.34: Nga nindi asuna ehida, asaala omwana museere, ngʼaloma ati, “Hu luno wamwange aja huholagana ni nange, olwohuba musaaliiye abaana abaseere badatu.” Ngʼamutaho esiina ati Leevi.
29.35: Nga nindi Leeya aba hida asaala omwana museere, ngʼaloma ati, “Omulundi guno nja hujumirya Musengwa .” Olwʼehyo, galanga omwana oyo ati Yuda. Ngʼahoma aŋo ohusaala.

30.1: Lakeeli ni gabona nʼatasaalira Yakobbo abaana, gaŋambira mugandawe esaalwa, ngʼaloma Yakobbo ati, “Pe abaana, oba sicehyo fe pwe hu hyalo!”
30.2: Ngʼehyo hisunguŋasa Yakobbo ngʼamuloma ati, “Ndiise Hatonda owahwima olusaaye?”
30.3: Nga Lakeeli aloma Yakobbo ati, “Kuŋaaye Bbiluha omwidu wange, ohufuuha muhasi wuwo, ŋenyuha ni naye gahasaalira abaana, keesi nahabaaho nʼolulyo.”
30.4: Nga Lakeeli aŋamba Bbiluha omwidu wuwe aŋa Yakobbo ohufuuha muhasi wuwe. Era nga Yakobbo aŋenyuha ni naye.
30.5: Nga Bbiluha aba hida, asaalira Yakobbo omwana museere.
30.6: Nga Lakeeli aloma ati, “Hatonda aŋuliiye ohusaba hwange, gaapa omwana omuseere.” Cʼehyagira gamulanga esiina ati Daani.
30.7: Bbiluha omwidu wa Lakeeli ngʼaba hida nindi, ngʼasaalira Yakobbo omwana omuseere owohubiri.
30.8: Nga Lakeeli aloma ati, “Piriŋeene nʼamaani ni muganda yange era muhirire.” Ngʼomwana oyo amulanga esiina ati Nafutaali.
30.9: Leeya ni gabona nʼahomire aŋo ohusaala, ngʼaŋamba Zilupa omwidu wuwe, amuŋa Yakobbo ohufuuha muhasi wuwe.
30.10: Nga Zilupa omwidu wa Leeya asaalira Yakobbo omwana museere.
30.11: Nga Leeya aloma ati, “Nga ndi nʼekabi!” Ngʼomwana oyo amulanga esiina ati Gaadi.
30.12: Nga Zilupa omwidu wa Leeya asaalira Yakobbo omwana omuseere owohubiri.
30.13: Nga Leeya aloma ati, “Hino hisangaahiise! Era abahasi baaja hundanga wasangaalo.” Ngʼamulanga esiina ati Aseri.
30.14: Lulala mu hiseera hyʼohugesa engaano, Lubbeeni gatiina mu ndimiro yʼengaano, ngʼagwirihirira ehimera ehi balanga baati mandulake, ngʼaŋirira nyina Leeya. Ngʼaŋo Lakeeli aloma Leeya ati, “Peeho mandulake yʼomwana wuwo.”
30.15: Nga Leeya aloma Lakeeli ati, “Ehyohunyagaho wamwange sihihuhena, wenda humeedaho nʼohuutusaho mandulake yʼomwana wange?” Ngʼaŋo Lakeeli amugobolamo ati, “Ale ha huswane. Ewe peeho mandulake yʼomusaani wuwo, kulehere Yakobbo aŋenyuhe ni neewe owiire wolwa leero.”
30.16: Olwʼehyo, Yakobbo ni gagamayo engo ehyʼegulo nʼaŋwa mu ndimiro, Leeya gamuloma ati, “Oli nʼohuŋenyuha ni neese owiire wolwa leero olwohuba kugulire ni mandulake yʼomusaani wange ohuhutusa hu Lakeeli omuhasi wuwo.” Nga Yakobbo aŋenyuha ni naye ehiire ehyo.
30.17: Nga Hatonda aŋulira ohusaba hwa Leeya. Nga Leeya aba hida, asaalira Yakobbo omwana omuseere owohutaanu.
30.18: Nga Leeya aloma ati, “Hatonda gapaaye omuhemba, olwohuba naŋa wamwange omwidu wange.” Ngʼomwana oyo amulanga ati Yisikaali.
30.19: Nga nindi Leeya aba hida, asaalira Yakobbo omwana omuseere owomukaaga.
30.20: Ngʼaŋo Leeya aloma ati, “Hatonda gapaaye ehirabo ehyʼomuŋendo. Hu luno wamwange aja humbisyanga bulaŋi olwohuba musaaliiye abaana mukaaga abaseere.” Ngʼomwana oyo amulanga Zebbulooni.
30.21: Oluvanyuma gasaala omwana omuhaana, ngʼamulanga ati Dina.
30.22: Ngʼaŋo Hatonda ahebulira Lakeeli, aŋulira ohusaba huhwe ngʼamwigula ehida.
30.23: Ngʼaba hida asaala omwana omuseere ngʼaloma ati, “Hatonda gatuhiseeho eduho.”
30.24: Ngʼomwana oyo amulanga ati Yosefu, nʼaloma ati, “ Musengwa ganyongeyeho omwana owundi omuseere.” Ebyayo bya Yakobbo byeyongera obungi
30.25: Oluvanyuma lwa Lakeeli ohusaala Yosefu, nga Yakobbo aloma Labbaani ati, “Kusunga wuseebule, nagame e weefe.
30.26: Mbaye mutambi wuwo era ni kalabana, ne ngʼolu hiseera hyolire, fugiirire tiine nʼabahasi ko nʼabaana bange.”
30.27: Aye Labbaani gamuloma ati, “Kusunga wupambire ehisa osigale, endagu yindomeeye yiiti Musengwa gapaaye ekabi olwʼewe.”
30.28: Ngʼahena amuloma ati, “Wenda kusasule hiina? Loma hyosihyosi ehi wenda nahusasule?”
30.29: Nga Yakobbo amuloma ati, “Omanyire ngʼolu mbayenga ni kuhalabanira era ebyayo bibyo byeyongeye.
30.30: Ebitono ebi waali ni nabyo byeyongeye obungi era Musengwa ahuŋaaye ekabi hiisi aŋambayenga ni naayira ebyayo. Ŋaahani keesi njʼehiseera ohulabirira ebyange.”
30.31: Nga Labbaani amubuusa ati, “Wenda kuŋe hi?” Nga Yakobbo amugobolamo ati, “Mbula ehi kwendaho aye kusunga wuupe ehiitu hirala hyoŋene. Era nʼoja huhihola, nja hweyongera ohwemera nʼohulabirira ebyayo bibyo.
30.32: Fugiirire ngende mu taama nʼembusi jijo josijosi, ni tusamo hiisi erimo ebihosa nʼebimali nʼeyamasosogo. Ebyo njʼebija huba omuhemba gwange.
30.33: Mu moni eyo oja humanya owesigwa wange. Era singa wagaanamo eyitali yamasosogo oba eŋumamo ebihosa nʼebimali, eyo eja huba ya wiibi.”
30.34: Nga Labbaani aloma ati, “Fugiiriye, leha hibe ngʼolu olomire.”
30.35: Nga hu ludaalo olwo, Labbaani aŋamba embusi epaya ejoluwombye nʼejamatonatona nʼekasi josijosi ejamasosogo nʼejamatonatona, hiisi ejaliho ebala ehosa, ko nʼetaama enando josijosi, ngʼajiŋa abasaani babe ne ni jiri ja Yakobbo.
30.36: Nga Labbaani niye nʼabaana baŋamba ebisolo ebyo bagenda olugendo olwʼendaalo edatu ohuŋwa aŋa Yakobbo gaali. Yakobbo niye gasigala ni gemera etaama nʼembusi ja Labbaani.
30.37: Nga Yakobbo aŋamba obusaala bwʼomulibine omubisi, nʼowomusakedi nʼowomwalamoni, nga gobulaho emisitaale emihosa, ne sigaheneraho moola.
30.38: Ngʼaŋamba obusaala owo obu gaŋalagataho mu biitu ebi taama nʼembusi janywerangamo amaaji, jibubone ni jiija ohunywa amaaji.
30.39: Etaama nʼembusi ejo nga jeruhiranga mu moni jʼobusaala owo, nga jisaala enyana ejoluwombye nʼebitonatona.
30.40: Mu hiseera ohyohwiruha, Yakobbo gawulanga ekasi ŋa joŋene ngʼajirengeresa ejoluwombye nʼejebimali. Nga jisaala enyana ejamasosogo nʼejebimali ngʼahena ajabula hu ja Labbaani. Mu ngeri eyo, ebyayo bibye byeyongera obungi.
30.41: Etaama nʼembusi ejʼamaani ni jendanga ohwiruha, Yakobbo gaŋambanga obusaala gabuta mu moni waajo, ohweruhira aŋali obusaala owo.
30.42: Aye etaama nʼembusi eniambiniambi ni jendanga ohwiruha, ngʼabutusaŋo. Etaama eniambiniambi gajiŋanga Labbaani, ne ejʼamaani jatiinanga hu luda lwa Yakobbo.
30.43: Mu ngeri eyo, nga Yakobbo geeyongera bugali ohuhulahulana, ngʼaba nʼebisolo bingi nʼabeedu abahasi nʼabasinde nʼengamiya ko ni nasugirya.

31.1: Ehiseera hyola Yakobbo gaŋulira ati abasaani ba Labbaani baali bemulugunya baati, “Yakobbo aŋirire obuŋinda wa Bbaabba wosiwosi era agagaŋaliiye mu biitu bya Bbaabba.”
31.2: Era Yakobbo gabona Labbaani nʼatamuheja bulaŋi.
31.3: Nga Musengwa aloma Yakobbo ati, “Yagamayo mu hyalo hyʼabasehulu nʼabalebe babo, naabenga ŋalala ni neewe.”
31.4: Ngʼaŋo Yakobbo atuma bamulangira Lakeeli ni Leeya batiine mu hyayo eyi gaali.
31.5: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Mu ndaalo jino, mbona engeri eyi senywe gakeja, sinje eyabulijo aye Hatonda wa Bbaabba ali ni nange.
31.6: Era muhimanyire ngʼolu tambiiye senywe nʼamaani gange gosigosi.
31.7: Wayire senywe gakolakolanisye emirundi nʼemirundi aye Hatonda sigamuganya hukola habi hosihosi.
31.8: Ni gahalomire ati, ‘Ejamasosogo njʼejinaabenga omuhemba gugwo,’ ngʼetaama nʼembusi josijosi jisaala ejamasosogo. Ngʼaŋo acuusa ati, ‘ejamawombwe njʼejinaabenga omuhemba gugwo,’ nga nindi etaama nʼembusi josijosi jitandiha ohusaala ejamawombwe.
31.9: Mu ngeri eyo, Hatonda abatuhiiseho ebyayo, gabiipa.
31.10: “Mu mwesi ogu etaama nʼembusi jitera ohweruhiramo, nasuna ehirooto era mu hirooto omwo, nabona embusi epaya ejerusanga ni jiri jamawombwe nʼejamasosogo neja matonatona.
31.11: Nga Malayika wa Hatonda mu hirooto gandanga ati, ‘Yakobbo,’ ngʼamugobolamo ti, ‘Wanji Musengwa.’
31.12: Nga gandoma ati, ‘Gangamusa emoni jijo obone embusi josijosi epaya ejerusa, jamawombwe nʼejamasosogo, neja matonatona olwohuba mbona byosibyosi ebi Labbaani ahuhola.
31.13: Ndiise Hatonda owahubonehera e Bbeseeri, aŋa wajuha amafuta ngʼehihondo ehyʼohuhebulirirangaho era wahena wahola oweyamo. Nenda oŋwe mu hyalo hino ogoboleyo ewenywe eyi bahusaala.’ ”
31.14: Nga Lakeeli ni Leeya bamugobolamo baati, “Huŋuma mugabo hu buŋinda wa Bbaabba.
31.15: Atuŋira hyabagwira olwohuba gatutunda era nʼebiitu gahena hale ohubirya.
31.16: Mu butuufu obuŋinda wosiwosi obu Hatonda atuhiise hu seefe, weefe nʼabaana beefe. Olwʼehyo, hola ehi Hatonda ahuloma ohuhola.”
31.17: Ngʼaŋo Yakobbo getegeha ohwagamayo ewaawe, ngʼaŋamba abaana nʼabahasi babe abata hu ngamiya,
31.18: ngʼahubba ebyayo bibye byosibyosi ko nʼebiitu byosibyosi ebi gasuna ni gaali nʼahiiri e Padani Alaamu. Ngʼaŋamba engira ohutiina e Kanani eyi Yisaka semwana gaali nʼamenyire.
31.19: Ehiseera ehi basimbuhiramo, Labbaani gaali atiinire ohusala hu taama jije amooya. Kale nga Lakeeli atambisa ekabi eyo ohwiba abagasani ba semwana.
31.20: Mu ngiso, Yakobbo gategeha nga geyiba hu Labbaani Omwalaamu. Sigalomeraho Labbaani ati gaali genda hwagama ewaawe.
31.21: Ngʼaŋo Yakobbo nʼebibye byosibyosi amweyibaho, atiina gambuha olwabi Yufuleeti, ngʼaluŋama atiina e Giliyaadi mu hyalo ehyʼesozi. Labbaani alonda hu Yakobbo
31.22: Oluvanyuma lwʼendaalo edatu, nga balomera Labbaani baati Yakobbo gamudulumaho.
31.23: Nga Labbaani nʼabalebe babe baŋamba engira balonda hu Yakobbo. Hu ludaalo olwomusanvu, nga bamwolaho e Giliyaadi mu hyalo ehyʼesozi.
31.24: Nga Hatonda abonehera Labbaani Omwalaamu mu hirooto owiire amuloma ati, “Wehuume ohutaloma ehiraŋi oba ehibi hu Yakobbo.”
31.25: Yakobbo gaali gemeehire eweema yiye e Giliyaadi mu hyalo ehyʼesozi, Labbaani nʼabalebe babe ni boola nga boosi bemeha aŋo ejaawe.
31.26: Nga Labbaani aloma Yakobbo ati, “Wukolire hi, ohweyiba weyibe ni tamanyire. Ese ndiise owohudulinga, ngʼohena wiibahwiba nʼabahaana bange hyababanyagire mu lutalo?
31.27: Lwahiina waŋwayo mu ngiso? Lwahiina siwandomeraho nahola omukolo nahuseebula bulaŋi nʼebivuga?
31.28: Wagira siseebuleho bahaana nʼabejuhulu bange? Wahola hyabuŋubeebe.
31.29: Ndi nʼobuŋangi ohuhukosa aye mu hirooto owiire, Hatonda wa lataawo gandomire ati, ‘Wehuume ohutaloma ehiraŋi oba ehibi hu Yakobbo.’
31.30: Manyire ti otiina olwohuba oŋemba ohwagama ewenywe. Aye lwahiina mwiba abagasani bange?”
31.31: Nga Yakobbo agobola mu Labbaani ati, “Sinahulomera olwohuba natya, ni peega ti oja hutusaho abahaana babo.
31.32: Aye singa obona omuutu yesiyesi nʼali nʼabagasani babo, saaja husigala nʼali mulamu. Abalebe beefe ni babona, yendula ehyihyo hyosihyosi, onahyagaana hiŋire.” Yakobbo galoma atyo olwohuba gaali samanyire Lakeeli ni geeba abagasani ba semwana.
31.33: Nga Labbaani atiina gendula mu weema ya Yakobbo nomu ya Leeya nomu ja bahasi abeedu bombi aba bahaana babe aye sigagaanamo hiitu hyosihyosi. Ni gaŋwa mu weema ya Leeya, nga atiina gengira mu weema ya Lakeeli ohwendulamo mwosi.
31.34: Lakeeli gaali gebire abagasani ba semwana nʼabataaye mu hisaŋu hyohu ngamiya, ngʼahena ahibundalaho. Labbaani gendula mu weema yosiyosi aye sigabonamo hiitu hyosihyosi.
31.35: Nga Lakeeli aloma semwana ati, “Musengwa yange otanduŋira olwʼohutemeerera nahuŋa efaasi wendula. Hiri hiityo olwohuba ndi mu songa yeefe eyabahasi.” Labbaani gendula aye sigabona bagasani babe.
31.36: Ehyo hyaluŋia Yakobbo. Ngʼabuusa Labbaani ati, “Sobisye hi? Kolire hibi hi ehigimire wapiima oti?
31.37: Osinguuye ebiitu byange byosibyosi, hiina ehi oweene hu biitu byosibyosi ebyomu nyumba? Hireete ŋano mu moni jʼabalebe babo nʼabange, batusalire omusango fembi.
31.38: “Mbaye ni neewe emyaha abiri, etaama nʼembusi jijo sijisumulangaho, nʼohulya sindyangaho emiigu yiyo kadi ndala.
31.39: Sikuleeterangaho hyayo hihyo hyosihyosi ehi solo yalya. Era esolo ni yalyangaho ndala, nasasulanga. Era wakazanga ohusasula ehiitu hyosihyosi ehyagotanga.
31.40: Omumwi gwapwerangaho omuusi gwosigwosi, embeŋo yafuuŋa owiire wuli huno era sinalimbanga hwiro.
31.41: Hibaaye hiityo emyaha ejo abiri josijosi ejimbereeyemo mu mago gago. Kutambiiye emyaha ehumi nʼene ohuŋira bahaana babo bombi, ohwo gataho emyaha mukaaga ohuŋira ebisolo era hiisi hiseera obaayenga ocuusacuusania omuhemba gwange.
31.42: Singa Hatonda wa Bbaabba Yisaka ni sehulu yange Yibbulayimu, abanga nʼatali ni neese, hani nahaŋooye ewuwo nʼemihono myereere. Aye Hatonda gabona ohufabiina hwange era owiire ahulomire ohwehuuma ohutandomaho hiraŋi oba ehibi.”
31.43: Ngʼaŋo Labbaani amugobolamo ati, “Abahaana aba olomaho, bahaana bange era nʼabaana baawe baana bange, etaama nʼembusi, byayo byange. Byosibyosi ebiri ŋano byange. Aye ŋaahani ŋaŋuma ehi panga ohuhola ohweyongera ohuhuuma abahaana bange bano oba abaana baawe?
31.44: Ŋaahani huhole endagaano ŋagati weese ni neewe ohuba bujulizi.”
31.45: Nga Yakobbo aŋamba ebaale ngʼehihondo ehyʼohuhebulirirangaho, alihomeha ohuba ehyʼohuhebulirirangaho.
31.46: Ngʼaloma abalebe babe ati, “Muhumbaanie amabaale.” Nga bahumbaania amabaale bawungiha etuumo, nga baliira aŋo emere.
31.47: Nga Labbaani alanga etuumo eryo ati, “Yegali Sahadusa,” Yakobbo niye galiranga ati, “Galeedi.”
31.48: Nga Labbaani aloma Yakobbo ati, “Etuumo yino bujulizi ŋagati weese ni neewe.” Cʼehyagira ehifo ehyo bahiranga Galeedi.
31.49: Nindi bahiranga baati “Mizupa” olwohuba galoma ati, “ Musengwa abonanga ehitiina mu moni ŋagati wange ni neewe hiisi muutu nʼatiinire eyi aba.
31.50: Nʼobisyanga abahaana bange bubi oba nʼoleetanga abahasi abandi ohugaata hu bahaana bange, wayire ŋaŋuma muutu yesiyesi ohundomera, ohebuliranga oti Hatonda aliŋo era mujulizi ŋagati wange ni neewe.”
31.51: Ngʼaŋo Labbaani ameedaho aloma Yakobbo ati, “Etuumo eyʼamabaale yino eyi komehire, bujulizi ŋagati wange ni neewe.
31.52: Etuumo yino nʼamabaale gano gaja huba obujulizi ti sindiŋwa ewange natuuma etuumo yino ohuhulumba ohuhuholaho ehibi era ti weesi sooliŋwa ewuwo ohukolaho obubi.
31.53: Leha Hatonda wa Yibbulayimu ni Naholi nʼabasaawe, abe njʼomulamuzi ŋagati weefe.” Ngʼaŋo Yakobbo alayira nʼatya Hatonda wa semwana Yisaka.
31.54: Nga Yakobbo aŋaayo eŋongo nʼali eyo mu hyalo ehyʼesozi ngʼahena alanga abalebe babe ohulya emere era baahena baŋenyuha eyo owiire owo.
31.55: Ni wahya mu mugamba, nga Labbaani agwa abahaana nʼabejuhulu babe mu hifuba, abaŋa ekabi abaseebula. Ngʼaŋo abaleeha gagamayo e wuwe.

32.1: Oluvanyuma nga Yakobbo geyongerayo mu lugendo lulwe. Nga ŋabaŋo abamalayika ba Hatonda abaagaanana ni naye.
32.2: Yakobbo ni gababona galoma ati, “Yino kambi ya Hatonda.” Ngʼalanga ehifo ehyo ati Mahanayimu.
32.3: Nga Yakobbo atuma abahwenda ohutangiramo batiine mu hyalo hyʼe Seyiri egwanga lyʼEdomu eyiri Esawu mugandawe.
32.4: Ngʼaloma ati, “Mutiine mulome Esawu musengwa yange muuti, ‘Ese Yakobbo omwidu wuwo mbaye menyire ni Labbaani ohwola hatyane.
32.5: Sunire eŋombe ni nasugirya nʼetaama nʼembusi nʼabeedu abahasi nʼabasinde. Ŋaahani pindiiha obuhwenda buno ni nenda wupambire ehisa.’ ”
32.6: Oluvanyuma lwʼohwosa obuhwenda eyiri Esawu, abahwenda abo bagamayo eyiri Yakobbo bamuloma baati, “Hutiinire eyiri Esawu mugandawo era ali huuja ohwagaanana ni neewe era ali nʼabasinde ebihumi bine.”
32.7: Olwʼobuti obungi, Yakobbo gagabaniamo abaatu aba gaali ni nabo, ŋabiri. Ngʼahola atyo embusi nʼetaama nʼeŋombe nʼengamiya.
32.8: Mula gaŋeega ati, “Singa Esawu alumba ehibinja hirala, ehindi hiŋona.”
32.9: Ngʼaŋo Yakobbo asaba ati, “O Hatonda wa Yibbulayimu sehulu yange, Hatonda wa Yisaka Bbaabba, O Musengwa owandoma oti, ‘Yagamayo mu gwanga lyʼewenywe era eyiri abalebe babo, nja huhuŋa ekabi era nja huba ni neewe.’
32.10: Sisaanira ehyere nʼowesigwa obu bundagire, ese omwidu wuwo. Aŋa nambuhira olwabi Yoludaani ni tiina e Mesopotamya naali nʼomuhoomero gwoŋene aye ŋaahani sunire obuŋinda bungi nʼebibinja bibiri ebyʼabaatu.
32.11: Kwegayiriiye wuponie Esawu muganda yange atanjita, olwohuba tya ti ahanda gaaja gambwaagala gatusihiirisa, abahasi nʼabaana.
32.12: Aye wandoma oti, ‘Mu butuufu nahuŋenga ekabi era naabenga ni neewe era ndihuŋa abejuhulu bangi hyʼomujehe hu nyanja ogutabaliha.’ ”
32.13: Nga Yakobbo aŋenyuha aŋo owiire owo. Ni wahya gaŋamba hu ebyo ebi gaali ni nabyo ngʼatobolamo ehirabo hyʼEsawu mugandawe:
32.14: embusi ekasi bibiri nʼepaya abiri, etaama ekasi bibiri nʼemiigu abiri,
32.15: engamiya adatu nʼenyana jowaaho, eŋombe ebisonga amahumi ane ko nʼebunwa ehumi, nasugirya ekasi abiri ko nʼenyana jowaaho ehumi.
32.16: Ngʼahena abiŋambya abeedu babe, hiisi muutu hidooli hihye, hiisi taama nʼembusi nʼeŋombe nʼengamiya ko nasugirya ŋa joŋene, ngʼaloma abeedu babe ati, “Mutangiriremo mutiine aye muleheŋo ebbanga ŋagati wʼebyayo.”
32.17: Ngʼaloma omuhulu wʼabeedu babe ati, “Esawu muganda yange anahwagaana, gahubuusa ati, ‘Muli beedu bʼani era muja ŋe? Era njʼani omwene byayo ebi mutangirihiise?’
32.18: Munamugobolemo muuti, ‘Bya Yakobbo omwidu wuwo, birabo ebi aŋeerehise Esawu musengwawe. Ne omwene yeesi ali enyuma weefe atulondaho.’ ”
32.19: Ngʼaloma nʼomwidu owohubiri nʼowohudatu ko nʼabandi bosibosi ati, “Mwesimwesi mulome Esawu muutyo, munamwagaana.
32.20: Era muli nʼohumuloma muuti, ‘Yakobbo omwidu wuwo atulondaho egongo, yeesi ali huuja.’ ” Galoma atyo olwohuba gaali aŋeega ati, “Hatangirise ebirabo ebyo, muŋooyeŋooye hamunga gahasangaalira ni anamboneho.”
32.21: Ngʼebirabo ebyo bimutangiriramo aye omwene ngʼaŋenyuha owiire owo mu kambi. Yakobbo aŋiriŋana ni Hatonda
32.22: Ngʼowiire owo Yakobbo genyoha aŋamba abahasi babe bombi nʼabeedu babahasi babe bombi ko nʼabasaani babe ehumi namulala, ngʼabambusa olwabi olu balanga baati Yabboki.
32.23: Oluvanyuma lwʼohubambusa, gambusa ebibye byosibyosi ebi gaali ni nabyo.
32.24: Nga Yakobbo asigala yeŋene, ngʼeŋwayo omusinde owaŋiriŋana ni naye ohwola olu Masaaba yasala.
32.25: Omusinde oyo ni gabona nʼatasobola humuhira amaani, ngʼaŋamba hu higudigudi hya Yakobbo amuŋigula efungufu.
32.26: Ngʼomusinde oyo amuloma ati, “Ndehe, olwohuba Masaaba esalire.” Aye Yakobbo gamuloma ati, “Sinahulehule, ohutusaho nga wupaaye ekabi.”
32.27: Ngʼamubuusa ati, “Esiina liryo ndiiwe ani?” Ngʼamugobolamo ati, “Ndiise Yakobbo.”
32.28: Ngʼomusinde oyo amuloma ati, “Sibahihulanga Yakobbo aye banahulangenga baati Yisirayiri, olwohuba oŋiriŋeene ni Hatonda nʼabaatu era waŋangula.”
32.29: Nga Yakobbo amubuusa ati, “Kusunga wundomere esiina liryo. Ndiiwe ani?” Ngʼomusinde oyo amugobolamo ati, “Lwahiina wumbuusa esiina lyange?” Ngʼaŋo aŋa Yakobbo ekabi.
32.30: Nga Yakobbo alanga ehifo ehyo ati Penweri, olwohuba galoma ati, “Mbwene Hatonda moni hu moni aye nasigala ni kiiri mulamu.”
32.31: Eryuba ni lyali ko ni liŋwayo, Yakobbo gaŋwa e Penweri gatiina nʼaŋegera olwʼefungufu eryali ni liŋiguhire.
32.32: Ehyo cʼehigira Abayisirayiri ni batalya enyama yohu fungufu nʼohwosa olwa leero olwohuba baŋamba Yakobbo hu higudigudi bamuŋigula efungufu.

33.1: Oluvanyuma hu ludaalo olwene olwo, Yakobbo gaali agangamusa emoni ngʼalengera Esawu nʼatiina eyi ali, nʼali nʼabasinde bine. Olwʼehyo, gagabaniamo abaana, hiisi muhasi nʼabaana babe, ehiri ti Leeya nʼababe, Lakeeli nʼowuwe, nʼabeedu babahasi babe hiisi mulala nʼabaana babe.
33.2: Ngʼaŋamba abeedu nʼabaana baawe abatangirisa, ngʼalosaho Leeya nʼabaana babe, ngʼasembyayo Lakeeli ni Yosefu omwana wuwe.
33.3: Nga Yakobbo omwene atangiriramo, ni goola ohuupi ni mugandawe, ngʼahotama mu moni jije emirundi musanvu ohumuŋa eŋono.
33.4: Aye ngʼEsawu aduluma aja amugwa mu hifuba. Nga bombi balira olwʼesangaalo.
33.5: Ngʼaŋo Esawu agangamusa emoni abona abahasi nʼabaana, ngʼamubuusa ati, “Abo mbaba ani?” Nga Yakobbo amugobolamo ati, “Abo njʼabaana aba Hatonda olwʼehisa hihye, gaaŋa omwidu wuwo.”
33.6: Ngʼabeedu babahasi babe nʼabaana batiina bahoma ekumbo mu moni jʼEsawu.
33.7: Nga Leeya nʼabaana babe boosi begeerera mu moni jʼEsawu, nga batiina bahoma ekumbo. Yosefu ni Lakeeli mbabasembayo era boosi baatiina nga bahubba amafuha mu moni jʼEsawu.
33.8: NgʼEsawu amubuusa ati, “Ebyayo ebi mbwene ebyo, bitegeesa hi?” Nga Yakobbo amugobolamo ati, “Bya huhusunga ewe musengwa yange, wupambire ehisa.”
33.9: Aye ngʼEsawu amugobolamo ati, “Mwana weefe, ebi ndi ni nabyo bikena, olwʼehyo ebyo sigasa.”
33.10: Nga Yakobbo amuloma ati, “Bbe, ngʼolu wusangaaliye kusunga wupambire ehisa ofugiirire ehirabo hyange olwohuba ohumbonaho wasangaalira, hibaaye oti hani mbwene nje Hatonda, hiri hyʼohuheja hu Hatonda.
33.11: Kwegayiriiye ganya oŋire ehirabo hyange ehi kuleeteye. Hiisi ehi nahali ni nenda ndi ni nahyo olwohuba Hatonda gandaga ehyere.” Era olwohuba Yakobbo gamwegayirira bugali, Esawu gafugiirira ngʼaŋira ebiitu ebyo.
33.12: Ngʼaŋo Esawu aloma Yakobbo ati, “Huŋambe engira hutiine era leha kutangiriremo.”
33.13: Nga Yakobbo amugobolamo ati, “Musengwa yange omanyire oti abaana bahiiri baŋere sibasobola hwanguŋaho. Era ndi nʼohufayo hu etaama nʼeŋombe ejihyokesa olwohuba onajigesya bugali ni ŋaŋuma huŋuumulaho, jiŋangire ohufa.
33.14: Olwʼehyo, leha musengwa yange otangirire mu mwidu wuwo, ese ni kulondaho nʼabaana ko nʼebyayo polapola ohwola olu nahwoleho ewuwo e Seyiri.”
33.15: Ngʼaŋo Esawu amuloma ati, “Leha kulehere balala hu baatu aba ndi nabo bano bahuyeedeho.” Nga Yakobbo amugobolamo ati, “Bbe otafayo musengwa yange, ese ehisangaahise njʼohubona ti wusangaaliye.”
33.16: Ngʼaŋo Esawu aŋamba engira gagamayo e Seyiri hu ludaalo olwo.
33.17: Aye Yakobbo niye ngʼatiina e Sukosi abbota eyo ehidaala ngʼahena aholera nʼebyayo bibye ebigangu. Cʼehigira ehifo ehyo baliranga baati Sukosi.
33.18: Oluvanyuma lwa Yakobbo ohugenda ohuŋwa e Padani Alaamu, gagenda goola mu hibuga Sekemu ehiri mu hyalo hyʼe Kanani, nga geemeha eweema ŋaapi nʼehibuga ehyo.
33.19: Ngʼagula ehisugu efeeza cikumi hu bʼolulyo lwʼabaana ba Hamoli semwana ya Sekemu. Ŋaweene aŋo paŋa geemeha eweema jije.
33.20: Era mu hifo ehyo gatongolamo ehituuti ehyohuŋeeraho eŋongo ahena ahitaho esiina ati Elu Elohe Yisirayiri.

34.1: Lulala, Dina omuhaana oyu Leeya gasaalira Yakobbo gatiina ohuhyalira balala hu bahaana abohu hyalo abomu hyalo omu baali ni bamenyire.
34.2: Sekemu omusaani wa Hamoli Omuhiivi, omutangirisi wʼehyalo ehyo, ni gamubona gamwegomba. Ngʼamufuhumira aja amuŋagia ohuŋenyuha ni naye.
34.3: Era nga Dina omuhaana wa Yakobbo asikiriza Sekemu amwenda bugali era gatandiha ohumuhobya.
34.4: Nga Sekemu aloma semwana Hamoli ati, “Kusunga wukwere omuhaana ono.”
34.5: Nga Yakobbo aŋulira ati Dina omuhaana wuwe, Sekemu amuŋagisye gaŋenyuha ni naye. Mu hiseera ehyo, abasaani babe baali batiinire ohwemera ebyayo bibye. Olwʼehyo Yakobbo gaŋolera ohwola olu basaani bagobola engo.
34.6: Ngʼaŋo Hamoli semwana ya Sekemu atiina eyiri Yakobbo ateese ni naye hu songa ya Dina ohufumbirwa omusaani.
34.7: Abasaani ba Yakobbo ni baŋwa mu hyayo, bahitegeera baati Sekemu gaali aŋagisye Dina mboojo yaawe gaŋenyuha ni naye. Ehiitu ehyo hyabaŋambya enaku hyahena hyabasunguŋasa bugali, olwohuba Sekemu ni gaŋagia Dina omuhaana wa Yakobbo gaŋenyuha ni naye, gahola hiitu ehyʼembiho ehitaholeha era ehiswasa Yisirayiri. Ehiitu ehyali ni hitasaana huhola.
34.8: Aye nga Hamoli abaloma ati, “Omuseere wange Sekemu asiimire omuhaana wenywe. Olwʼehyo, mbasunga mumumuŋe amufumbirwe.
34.9: Era hwenda abahaana nʼabeseere wenywe ko nʼabahaana nʼabaseere beefe, bafumbirigane.
34.10: Era muli bʼedembe ohumenya ni neefe mu gwanga lyefe. Mumenye mwabeene aŋa mwesimiiye, mwetaaye muhene mwesunire nʼebyobusuni.”
34.11: Ngʼaŋo Sekemu aloma semwana ya Dina nʼababoojo ati, “Mbasunga mukolere ehi hubasungire era nja hubaŋa hyosihyosi ehi munende.
34.12: Muusalire emaali nʼehirabo ehi mwenda mbaŋe era nja hubaŋa hyosihyosi ehi munende kasita munaganye ohuupa omuhaana oyo abe muhasi wange.”
34.13: Ngʼabasaani ba Yakobbo bagobola mu Sekemu ni semwana Hamoli ni babahiina hubahiina olwohuba Sekemu gaali aswahiise Dina mboojo yaawe.
34.14: Era nga babagobolamo baati, “Sihusobola huŋa mboojo yeefe omusinde atali muhomole, olwohuba hituswasa.
34.15: Huuja hufugiirira singa mufuuha mwaba hyefe, mwahomola hiisi musinde.
34.16: Hinaba hiityo, huuja hubaŋa abahaana beefe era hwesi huuja huŋira abahaana benywe. Huuja humenya ŋalala ni nenywe, hufuuhe muutu mulala.
34.17: Aye ni munagaane ohuhomola, hunagamyeyo mboojo yeefe.”
34.19: Sekemu oyu baali ni basinga ohuŋa eŋono mu mago ga semwana, sigegania ohuhola ehi baali ni bamwendaho olwohuba omuhaana wa Yakobbo gaali amuliiye omwoyo.
34.20: Nga Hamoli nʼomusaani wuwe Sekemu benyoheramo baŋamba engira batiina ŋa mulyango gwʼehibuga hyawe balomera abahyawe ababamenyanga ni nabo mu hibuga ehyo baati,
34.21: “Bahyefe, abaatu bano balaŋi, kale habeehale ni neefe mu gwanga lyefe betaaye olwohuba eroba huli nʼebbala. Huja huŋira abahaana baawe era boosi baŋire abeefe.
34.22: Ohutusaho ti abaatu abo baja hufugiirira ohwehala ni neefe ngʼomuutu omulala, singa hufugiirira ohuhomola hya nibo.
34.23: Bahyefe, hunafugiirira ohuhola ehi batulomire, ebyayo ko nʼebiitu ebindi ebyawe byosibyosi biija hufuuha byefe. Olwʼehyo, hufugiirire bamenye ni neefe.”
34.24: Ngʼaŋo abaatu bosibosi abaali ŋa mulyango gwʼehibuga bafugiirira ebi Hamoli nʼomusaani Sekemu baabaloma, nga bahomola hiisi omusinde mu hibuga ehyo.
34.25: Oluvanyuma lwʼendaalo edatu, ni baali ni bali mu bulumi, babiri hu basaani ba Yakobbo, Simyoni ni Leevi ababoojo ba Dina, baŋamba epiima balumba abaatu mu hibuga abaali ni baŋuma ehi baali ni bamanyire, nga beeta abasinde bosibosi.
34.26: Era nga beetiramo ni Hamoli nʼomusaani Sekemu nga baŋamba Dina bamutusa mu nyumba ya Sekemu, nga bagamayo ewaawe.
34.27: Simyoni ni Leevi ni bahena ohwita hiisi musinde, abasaani ba Yakobbo abandi batiina bagaana mirambo, nga banyaga ebiitu mu hibuga ehyo ni besasusa olwa mboojo yaawe oyu Sekemu gaali nʼafuhumiiye gamuŋagia ohuŋenyuha ni naye.
34.28: Baanyaga etaama nʼembusi nʼeŋombe ni nasugirya nʼebiitu ebindi mu hibuga ko nʼebyali mu ndimiro.
34.29: Banyaga ebyʼobuŋinda byosibyosi nʼabahasi nʼabaana bosibosi era baanyaga nʼebiitu byosibyosi ebyali mu mayumba.
34.30: Ngʼaŋo Yakobbo aloma Simyoni ni Leevi ati, “Mundeteeye ebigosi! Ŋaahani fuuhire ehyʼembiho mu moni jʼAbakanani nʼAbapereezi, abaatu abamenya mu gwanga lino. Efe huli batono, nibo banegaata banumba batusihiirisa, ese nʼabomu mago gange bosibosi.”
34.31: Aye nibo nga bamugobolamo baati, “Sihuŋanga hubaleha bulehe atenga Sekemu gabisya mboojo yeefe oti hani malaaya.”

35.1: Ngʼaŋo Hatonda aloma Yakobbo ati, “Tiina e Bbeseeri omenye eyo era otongolere Hatonda ehituuti ehyʼohumuŋeeraho eŋongo, Hatonda oyo owahubonehera ni waali nʼoduluma Esawu mugandawo.”
35.2: Nga Yakobbo aloma abomu mago gage ni naabo bosibosi aba gaali nʼamenya ni nabo ati, “Mweyambule abahatonda aba muli ni nabo, mweyoge mwerongose era mucuuse nʼebyambalo.
35.3: Ni muhena hutiine e Bbeseeri eyi nja hutongolera Hatonda ehituuti ehyohuŋeeraho eŋongo, Hatonda oyo owagobolamo ohusaba hwange olu naali nʼebigosi era abaaye ni nange hiisi eyi tiinire.”
35.4: Ngʼaŋo baŋamba abahatonda aba baali ni nabo bosibosi, nʼekeeke ejaali hu matwi gaawe babiŋambya Yakobbo ngʼabisiiha ŋaasi wʼomusaala ogwali e Sekemu.
35.5: Nga batandiiha olugendo lwawe era etiisa ya Hatonda yaŋamba abaatu bosibosi abomu bibuga ebyohu mulirano. Olwʼehyo, ŋaŋuma muutu yesiyesi owabalumba.
35.6: Yakobbo ko nʼabaatu bosibosi aba gaali ni nabo batiina boola e Luuzi (hatyane ehi balanga Bbeseeri) mu gwanga lyʼe Kanani.
35.7: Mu hifo ehyo, gatongolamo ehituuti ehyohuŋeeraho eŋongo ngʼalanga ehifo ehyo ati Elu Bbeseeri olwohuba eyo peyi Hatonda gamwehwehulira olu gaali nʼaduluma hu Esawu mugandawe.
35.8: Nga Debora omuhasi owalera Labbeka gaaja afa, nga bamusiiha mu mutumba e Bbeseeri. Ngʼehifo ehyo baaja bahiranga baati Aloni Bbakusi.
35.9: Oluvanyuma lwa Yakobbo ohuŋwa e Padani Alaamu, Hatonda gamubonehera era ngʼamuŋa ekabi nindi.
35.10: Nga Hatonda amuloma ati, “Ndiiwe Yakobbo, aye sibaja huhulanganga baati Yakobbo, ndiiwe Yisirayiri. ” Kale nga Hatonda amutaho esiina ati Yisirayiri.
35.11: Nga Hatonda amuloma ati, “Ndiise Hatonda Omwene Buŋangi, mwale mweyongere obungi. Abejuhulu babo baliba bangi bafuuha egwanga era abahabaha baliŋwa mu tumbu jijo.
35.12: Ehyalo ehi naŋa Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka, kihuŋa weesi era oja huhirya nʼabejuhulu babo.”
35.13: Ngʼaŋo Hatonda ahena aŋwa mu hifo ehyo nʼahenire ohuloma ni naye.
35.14: Nga Yakobbo ahomeha ebaale mu hifo ehyo omu Hatonda galoma ni naye ohuba ehyʼohuhebulirirangaho, ngʼahena aliŋongayo nʼalijuhaho omwenge ogwʼemizabbibbu nʼamafuta ogwʼomuzayiti.
35.15: Nga Yakobbo alanga ehifo ehyo omu Hatonda galomeramo ni naye ati Bbeseeri. Ohufa hwa Lakeeli ni Yisaka
35.16: Oluvanyuma Yakobbo nʼabomu mago gage baŋwa e Bbeseeri. Ni baali ni bahiiriŋo nʼahanaŋiro ohwola Efulaasi, ebiseera bya Lakeeli ohusaala nga byola era gatandiha ohulumwa bugali.
35.17: Ni gaali nʼalumwa ebyʼamaani ebyene, ngʼomusaalisa amuloma ati, “Otatya, onasaale omwana omuseere owundi.”
35.18: Aye Lakeeli gaali gamuŋooye nʼali wa hufa. Ni gaali nʼanatere ohuŋeera omuuya ogusembayo, gaguliha omwana oyu gaali nʼasaala esiina ati Bbeeni Oni. Ne semwana niye gamulanga ati Bbenjamini.
35.19: Nga Lakeeli gaaja afa, bamusiiha hu ngira eyitiina Efulaasi (hatyane ehi balanga Bbeserekemu).
35.20: Hu higombe hya Lakeeli, Yakobbo gataho ebaale ngʼahabonero ahohuhebulirirangaho, eririŋo nʼohwola olwa leero luno.
35.21: Nga Yisirayiri geyongera mu moni nʼolugendo lulwe nga geemeha eweema yiye nʼobitireho e Migidala Ederi.
35.22: Yisirayiri ni gaali nʼahimenyire mu matwale ago, nga Lubbeeni atiina aŋenyuha ni Bbiluha omuhasi wa semwana. Nga Yisirayiri gaaja ahiŋulira. Era abasaani ba Yakobbo baali ehumi nʼababiri.
35.23: Abasaani ba Leeya baali nje: Lubbeeni owaali omudaayi wa Yakobbo, Simyoni ni Leevi ni Yuda ni Yisikaali ko ni Zebbulooni.
35.24: Abasaani ba Lakeeli baali nje Yosefu ni Bbenjamini.
35.25: Abasaani ba Bbiluha omwidu wa Lakeeli baali nje Daani ni Nafutaali.
35.26: Abasaani ba Zilupa omwidu wa Leeya baali nje Gaadi ko nʼAseri. Abo njʼabaana ba Yakobbo abagasaala nʼali e Padani Alaamu.
35.27: Nga Yakobbo atiina eyiri Yisaka semwana e Mamule aŋaapi ni Kiriyaasi Arubba hatyane ehi balanga baati Kebbulooni. Eyo peyi Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka bamenyanga.
35.29: Ngʼaŋo aŋeera omuuya ogusembayo aŋuumula, alonda hu baatu babe, nʼasahuluŋire era nʼaliiyeho. Era Esawu ni Yakobbo abasaani babe, baamusiiha.

36.1: Bino njʼebiŋamba hu lusaaye lwʼEsawu (oba Edomu).
36.2: Esawu gaŋira hu bahaana Abakanani: Ada omuhaana wʼEloni Omuhiiti, ngʼaŋira nʼOkolibbama omuhaana wʼAna omwijuhulu wa Zibbyoni Omuhiivi,
36.3: gaŋira ni Bbasimaasi omuhaana wa Yisimayiri. Bbasimaasi gaali mboojo ya Nebbayoosi.
36.4: NgʼAda asaalira Esawu Elifaazi, nga Bbasimaasi amusaalira Ruweeli,
36.5: nga Okolibbama amusaalira Yewusi ni Yalamu ko ni Koora. Abo njʼabasaani bʼEsawu aba bamusaalira e Kanani.
36.6: NgʼEsawu aŋamba abahasi babe nʼabaana abahaana nʼabaseere nʼabaatu bosibosi abaali mu mago gage, nʼebyayo ko nʼebiitu bibye byosibyosi ebi gasuna nʼali e Kanani, ngʼatiina mu hyalo ehindi aŋaleeŋi ni Yakobbo mugandawe.
36.7: Esawu gatiina aŋaleeŋi olwohuba hiisi mulala gaali nʼebyayo bingi ni bataŋanga humenya ŋalala. Aŋa baali ŋaali ŋafunda ni bataŋanga hwayira ŋalala ebyayo byawe.
36.8: Olwʼehyo, Esawu (oba oyu balanga Edomu) gatiina gamenya e Seyiri mu hyalo ehyʼesozi.
36.9: Bino njʼebiŋamba hu lulyo lwʼEsawu sehulu wʼAbedomu e Seyiri mu hyalo ehyʼesozi.
36.10: Amasiina ga basaani bʼEsawu ngagano: Elifaazi omwana wʼAda omuhasi wʼEsawu, Ruweeli omwana wa Bbasimaasi omuhasi wʼEsawu.
36.11: Abasaani bʼElifaazi baali Temani nʼOmali ni Zeefo ni Gatamu ko ni Kenazi.
36.12: Elifaazi omusaani wʼEsawu gaali nʼomuhasi oyu baali ni balanga baati Timuna, gamusaalamo Ameleki. Abo njʼabejuhulu bʼAda omuhasi wʼEsawu.
36.13: Abasaani ba Ruweeli baali nje Nahasi ni Zeera ni Saama ni Miiza. Abo njʼabejuhulu ba Bbasimaasi omuhasi wʼEsawu.
36.14: Abasaani bʼOkolibbama omuhasi wʼEsawu owaali omuhaana wʼAna era omwijuhulu wa Zibbyoni gasaala, baali nje Yewusi ni Yalamu ko ni Koora.
36.15: Abejuhulu bʼEsawu abaali abaami, baali basaani bʼomudaayi wuwe Elifaazi era baali nje: Temani nʼOmali ni Zeefo ni Kenazi,
36.16: ni Koora ni Gatamu nʼAmeleki. Abo njʼabahungu ohuŋwa mu Elifaazi mu Edomu, abo baali bejuhulu bʼAda.
36.17: Abasaani ba Ruweeli omusaani wʼEsawu abaali abahungu baali nje: Nahasi ni Zeera ni Saama ko ni Miiza. Abo njʼabaali abahungu ohuŋwa mu Ruweeli mu hyalo hyʼEdomu. Abo baali bejuhulu ba Bbasimaasi omuhasi wʼEsawu.
36.18: Abasaani bʼOkolibbama omuhasi wʼEsawu baali nje: Yewusi ni Yalamu ko ni Koora. Abo njʼabahungu ohuŋwa mu Okolibbama omuhasi wʼEsawu, owaali omuhaana wʼAna.
36.19: Abo baali njʼabasaani bʼEsawu (oba Edomu) era baali bahungu.
36.20: Abasaani ba Seyiri Omukooli, abaali ni bamenya mu twale eryo, baali nje: Lotani ni Sobbali ni Zibbyoni nʼAna,
36.21: ni Disoni nʼEzeri ni Disani. Abasaani ba Seyiri mu Edomu baali bahungu bʼAbakooli.
36.22: Abasaani ba Lotani baali nje: Kooli ko ni Hemani. Timuna gaali mboojo ya Lotani.
36.23: Abasaani ba Sobbali baali nje: Aluvani ni Manahasi nʼEbbali ni Seefo ko nʼOnamu.
36.24: Abasaani ba Zibbyoni baali nje: Aya ko nʼAna. Ana njʼowabona esulo jʼamaaji agoohya mu lulafu ni gaali ni gemera nasugirya ja semwana Zibbyoni.
36.25: Abasaani bʼAna baali nje: Disoni nʼOkolibbama omuhaana wʼAna.
36.26: Abasaani ba Disoni baali nje: Kamudaani nʼEsubbani ni Yisulani ko ni Kerani.
36.27: Abasaani bʼEzeri baali nje: Bbilihaani ni Zavani ko nʼAkani.
36.28: Abasaani ba Disani baali nje: Wuuzi nʼAlani.
36.29: Abahungu abaaŋuga Abakooli baali nje: Lotani ni Sobbali ni Zibbyoni nʼAna
36.30: ni Disoni nʼEzeri ni Disani. Abo baali bahungu bʼAbakooli mu biha byawe e Seyiri. Abaŋugi bʼEdomu
36.31: Ni ŋaali ni ŋahiiri hubaŋo habaha afuga Yisirayiri, bano njʼabahabaha abafuga ehyalo hyʼEdomu:
36.32: Bbeera omusaani wa Bbewori gafuuha muŋugi wʼEdomu. Ehibuga hihye bahiranganga baati Dinakabba.
36.33: Bbeera ni gafa, nga Yobbabbu omusaani wa Zeera ohuŋwa e Bbozira, agobola mu magulu gage.
36.34: Yobbabbu ni gafa, Kusamu ohuŋwa mu hyalo hyʼAbatemani, gagobola mu magulu gage nga habaha.
36.35: Kusamu ni gafa, Hadadi omusaani wa Bbedadi, owaŋangula Abamidiyaani e Mowaabbu, ngʼagobola mu magulu gage nga habaha. Ehibuga hihye bahiranganga baati Avisi.
36.36: Hadadi ni gafa, nga Samula ohuŋwa e Masuleka agobola mu magulu gage nga habaha.
36.37: Samula ni gafa, nga Sawulo ohuŋwa e Lekobbosi ohulirana olwabi, agobola mu magulu gage nga habaha.
36.38: Sawulo ni gafa, nga Bbaali Hanani omusaani wʼAkubbooli, agobola mu magulu gage nga habaha.
36.39: Bbaali Hanani omusaani wʼAkubbooli ni gafa, Hadali gagobola mu magulu gage nga habaha. Ehibuga hihye bahiranganga baati Paawu, nʼomuhasi wuwe baali bamulanga baati Meketabbeeri era gaali muhaana wa Matuledi, owaali omuhaana wa Mezahaabbu.
36.40: Gano njʼamasiina ga bahungu ohusizira hu biha nʼamatwale gaawe mu Edomu: Timuna nʼAluva ni Yesesi,
36.42: ni Kenazi ni Temani ni Mibbuzali
36.43: ni Magudyeri ko ni Yiramu. Abo njʼabaali abahungu bʼEdomu, mu bitundu ebyʼobutaka waawe. Esawu nje sehulu wʼAbedomu.

37.1: Nga ŋaahani Yakobbo amenya e Kanani, ehyalo omu semwana gamenyanga.
37.2: Bino njʼebiŋamba hu mago ga Yakobbo: Yosefu mulala hu baana ba Yakobbo ni gaali muvubuka owʼemyaha ehumi namusanvu, gemeeranga etaama nʼabaganda babe, abaana ba Bbiluha ni Zilupa abahasi ba semwana. Nga Yosefu atiina alomera semwana ebiŋamba hu sambo embi ejʼabaganda babe abo.
37.3: Ŋaahani Yisirayiri gendanga Yosefu ohuhira abaana babe abandi, olwohuba gamusaala nʼasahuluŋire. Era gamutungira ehyambalo ehyʼamabala amangi.
37.4: Abaganda babe ni babona baati saawe genda Yosefu ohubahira bosibosi, bamucaawa ndibalomanga ni naye bulaŋi.
37.5: Lwali lulala Yosefu galoota ehirooto. Cooka ni galomeraho abaganda babe ehirooto ehyo, beeyongera humucaawira erala.
37.6: Beyongera ohumucaawa olwohuba gabaloma ati, “Leha mbalomereho ehirooto ehi ndootire.
37.7: Ndootire ni huli mu ndimiro ni husidiha ebinywa byʼengaano. Ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo ehinywa ehyange hyenyoha hyemeerera, ngʼebyenywe bitiina bihyeswanigirisa bitandiha ohuhihubbira amafuha.”
37.8: Ngʼaŋo abaganda babe bamuloma baati, “Olwo oŋeega oti oja hufuuha habaha, otuŋuge? Mu butuufu, oŋeega oti oja hutuŋuga?” Era nga beyongera ohumucaawira erala olwʼehirooto hihye nʼolwebigaloma.
37.9: Nga nindi aloota ehirooto ehindi era ngʼahiromeraho abaganda babe ati, “Ndootire ehirooto ehindi era mu hirooto ehyo, eryuba nʼomwesi nʼemunyeenye ehumi nandala byali bikubbira amafuha.”
37.10: Ni gahiromera semwana nʼabaganda babe, nga semwana amuhayula, amuloma ati, “Olotire hirooto hiina ehyo? Ese ni maawo nʼabaganda babo hulihuhubbira amafuha?”
37.11: Ngʼaŋo abaganda babe bamuŋambira esaalwa aye ehiitu ehyo hyasigala mu mwoyo gwa semwana. Abaganda ba Yosefu bamutunda
37.12: Lulala abaganda ba Yosefu batiina ohwaya ebyayo bya saawe ohuupi nʼehibuga Sekemu.
37.13: Nga Yisirayiri aloma Yosefu ati, “Ngʼolu omanyire, abaganda babo baali hwemera ebyayo ohuupi nʼe Sekemu. Olwʼehyo hola kutume eyi bali.” Nga Yosefu amugobolamo ati, “Kale Bbaabba.”
37.14: Ngʼamuloma ati, “Ale tiina obone abaganda babo ngʼolu baali, obone nʼebisolo byosi. Ohene ogobole wundomere ebibaŋambaho.” Ngʼaŋo amutuma ohuŋwa eyi baali ni bamenyire mu hiiho hyʼe Kebbulooni atiina e Sekemu eyi baganda babe baali ni baayira.
37.15: Ni goola eyo, ngʼomuutu amubona nʼali hwewuluga mu sugu ni gendula abaganda babe, ngʼamubuusa ati, “Oheja hi?”
37.16: Nga Yosefu amugobolamo ati, “Keja baganda bange abali hwemerera ebyayo. Wahamanyaho eyi bali?”
37.17: Yosefu ni goola e Sekemu, nga ŋabaŋo omuutu owamubona ni gebuluga mwisugu ngʼamubuusa ati, “Ŋano baŋooyeŋo, ne puliiye ni baloma baati batiina e Dosani.” Nga Yosefu alonda hu baganda babe, abagaana ohuupi nʼe Dosani.
37.18: Aye ni gaali nʼahiiriho ŋale, abaganda babe bamulengera nga behobana ohumwita.
37.20: Muhole humwite, humudanye mu erala hu maloŋo gano, huhene hulome huuti, ‘Esolo ekambwe yamulya,’ ko hubone ngʼolu ebirooto bibye biryolerera.”
37.21: Lubbeeni ni gaŋulira, gagesyaho ohumuŋonia. Ngʼabaloma ati, “Hulehe hutamwita.
37.22: Muteeta muutu, mumudanye mwiroŋo lino eriri ŋano mu lulafu aye mutamuhola habi hosihosi.” Lubbeeni galoma atyo olwʼohwenda ohumuŋonia, amwagamye eyiri semwana.
37.23: Yosefu ni goola aŋa baganda babe baali, bamuŋamba bamwambula ehyambalo hihye ehyʼebbeeyi ehyʼamabala amangi ehi gaali ni gambaaye,
37.24: nga bamuŋira bamudanya mwiroŋo. Eroŋo eryo lyali liŋumamo maaji.
37.25: Ni baali ni balya, nga babona ehibinja hyʼAbayisimayiri ni baŋwa e Giliyaadi nʼengamiya jaawe ni jetwihire ebyahaloosa ebyohuta mu mere nʼebyahawoowo ebi balanga baati bbaamu ni miira, ni batiina e Misiri.
37.26: Nga Yuda aloma abaganda babe ati, “Hiraŋi hi ehi hunasune mu hwita muganda yeefe?
37.27: Muhole humuguse Abayisimayiri abo, efe hutamuhola habi hosihosi olwohuba muganda yeefe era mubiri gwefe.” Nga abaganda babe bafugiirira ehi gabaloma.
37.28: Olwʼehyo, abasubuuzi bala ohuŋwa e Midiyaani ni baali ni babitaŋo, nga baŋalula Yosefu ohuŋwa mwiroŋo, nga bamugusa Abayisimayiri efeeza amahumi abiri. Ngʼabaatu abo abamugula baŋira Yosefu e Misiri.
37.29: Oluvanyuma Lubbeeni ni gaŋwa eyi gaali gatiina hwiroŋo, Yosefu sigaalimo. Enaku yamuleetera ohunabula engoye jije.
37.30: Ngʼaŋo atiina eyiri abaganda babe, abaloma ati, “Omwana mwiriŋo aŋumamo, naholetye ese?”
37.31: Ngʼabaganda babe basala embusi bahena baŋamba olugoye lwa Yosefu, balumitya mu mafugi.
37.32: Nga baŋamba ehyambalo ehyo ehyʼamabala amangi, bahiiŋirira saawe, bamuloma baati, “Hwaweene ehyambalo hino. Gesyaho ohuhifaania hamunga njʼehyomwana wuwo.”
37.33: Nga saawe ahifaania ati nje nihyo. Ngʼaloma ati, “Hino njʼehyambalo hyʼomwana wange, esolo ekambwe yamulya. O-o, hituufu esolo yagusulagusula Yosefu wange.”
37.34: Nga Yakobbo anabujula engoye eji gaali ni gambaaye, gesidiha ehigwali, ngʼalira omwana wuwe ohuhena endaalo nyingi.
37.35: Abasaani nʼabahaana babe bosibosi batiina ohumugumya aye enaku siyamuŋwa hu mwoyo. Ngʼabaloma ati, “Mundehe mu naku yange! Nditiina e magombe ni kiirira omwana wange!” Kale nga atiina mu moni nʼohulira hu lwʼomwana wuwe.
37.36: Abamidiyaani ni baŋira Yosefu e Misiri, bamugusa Potifaali, mulala hu bahungu ba Falaawo era owaali omuhulu wʼabahuumi babe.

38.1: Ŋaahani ehiseera hyola Yuda gaŋwa mu baganda babe geehirira gatiina gamenya nʼomusinde oyu balanganga baati Kira mu hitundu ehi balanganga baati Adulamu.
38.2: Nga Yuda abonayo omuhaana wa Suwa Omukanani era ngʼamuŋira obufumbo.
38.3: Ngʼomuhaana oyo aba hida asaala omwana omuseere, nga bamulanga baati Eri.
38.4: Nga nindi aba hida, asaala omwana museere, ngʼamulanga ati Onani.
38.5: Era nindi ngʼaba hida asaala omwana museere, nga bamulanga baati Seera. Aŋa gasaalira Seera, Yuda gaali amenyire yi Kezibba.
38.6: Omusaani wa Yuda omuhulu oyu balanga baati Eri ni gahula, nga semwana amuhwera omuhasi oyu balanganga baati Tamali.
38.7: Eri omudaayi wa Yuda, gaali muhosi wa bibi mu moni ja Musengwa , olwʼehyo Musengwa gamwita.
38.8: Nga Yuda aloma Onani ati, “Sika omuhasi wa mugandawo wooherese obuvunanyiziwa wuwo owobusika eyiri mujiiwo wahamusaalamo abaana hulwa mugandawo.”
38.9: Aye Onani gamanya ati abaana abo sibaliba babe. Olwʼehyo olu gahaŋenyuhire ni muha mugandawe, ebiseera ni byaholire ohujuha gajuhanga ŋaasi olwohutenda husaalira mugandawe abaana.
38.10: Ehyo ehi gahola hyali hibi mu moni ja Musengwa , nga yeesi amwita.
38.11: Ngʼaŋo Yuda aloma Tamali muha omusaani ati, “Kusunga otiine ewenywe obe eyo nga namwandu, ohwola olu Seera musaani yange alihula ko ahusike.” Hino gahiroma olwohuba gaŋeega ati, “Yeesi aŋanga ohufa hya baganda babe.” Nga Tamali atiina gehala ewaawe, ewa semwana.
38.12: Ni ŋabitaŋo ehiseera ehyene ehireeŋi, Suwa omuhasi wa Yuda, gafa. Endaalo jʼohulira ni jaŋwaho, nga Yuda aŋamba engira atiina e Timuna ewa basinde abaali ni basala amooya hu taama jije. Nga Kira Omwadulamu amuŋereheraho.
38.13: Ni balomera Tamali baati, “Muhwewo ali hutiina e Timuna ohusala amooya hu taama jije,”
38.14: geyambula ebyambalo ebyʼowanamwandu nga gambala ebindi, nga gewihirira olugoye hu mutwe nomu moni batamufaania, nga gehala hu ngira eyitiina e Timuna ŋa mulyango ogwingira mu habuga hʼEnayimu. Hino gahihola olwohuba gabona ati wayire Seera gaali ahenire ohuhula, sibamumuŋa ohumusika.
38.15: Yuda ni gabona Tama, gaŋeega ati malaaya olwohuba gaali gewihiriiye mu moni.
38.16: Ngʼatiina aŋa gaali amuloma ati, “Nja hutiine penyuhe ni neewe.” Galoma atyo olwohuba sigategeera ati njʼomulya wuwe. Nga Tamali amubuusa ati, “Onaape hi ohuŋenyuha ni neewe?”
38.17: Nga Yuda amugobolamo ati, “Nja huhuŋeeresa embusi ohuŋwa mu hidooli hyange.” Ngʼamuloma ati, “Onaape ehiitu ngʼomusingo ohwola olu oliyiŋeeresa?”
38.18: Ngʼamubuusa ati, “Musingo hi ogu wenda kuŋe?” Ngʼamugobolamo ati, “Nenda wuupe epeta yiyo eriho esiina liryo ko nʼesimbo eyo eyi oŋambire mu ngalo.” Ngʼaŋo Yuda amuŋa ebiitu ebyo, ngʼaŋenyuha ni naye ngʼamuŋa ehida.
38.19: Tamali ni gagama engo, geetusaho olugoye olu gaali ni gewihiriiye nga nindi gambala ebyambalo ebyobunamwandu.
38.20: Oluvanyuma Yuda ni gagamayo engo gaŋa meriiwe Kira Omwadulamu embusi ayiŋirire omuhasi ola ahene amugobohese omusingo ogu gaali nʼamuŋaaye. Aye sigagaanaŋo Tamali amugobohese omusingo.
38.21: Nga Kira Omwadulamu abuusa balala hu basinde abʼEnayimu ati, “Malaaya womu masabo ga bahatonda bʼe hitundu hino owihalanga ŋano hu tulo wʼengira, ali ŋe?” Ngʼabasinde abo bamugobolamo baati, “Ŋano sihubangaŋo ni malaaya owomu masabo ga bahatonda.”
38.22: Nga Kira gagamayo eyiri Yuda, amulomera ati, “Ndimubona era nʼabalala hu basinde abomu hitundu ehyo bandomire baati, ‘Ŋano sihubangaŋo ni malaaya owomu masabo ga bahatonda.’ ”
38.23: Ngʼaŋo Yuda aloma meriiwe Kira ati, “Leha aŋire omusingo ogwo, olwohuba huŋanga nʼohuswalira aŋo abaatu ni batujeherera olwa malaaya. Kasita mbaye muŋeerehiise embusi aye somuweene.”
38.24: Ni ŋabitaŋo emyesi ngʼedatu nga balomera Yuda baati, “Wange, Tamali omulya wuwo gaahola obuhwedi era aŋa hulomera ŋano ali hida.” Nga Yuda aloma ati, “Mumutuse mu hibuga, mumwohye mulamu.”
38.25: Ne ni baali ni batusa Tamali ebulafu wʼehibuga baje bamwohye, ngʼatuma omuutu eyiri muhwewe nʼomusingo gula ati, “Ndi hida aye hyʼomwene biitu bino.” Ngʼahena ameedaho ati, “Kusunga obyetegeerese obone obanga ofaania epeta yino eriho esiina ko nʼesimbo yino.”
38.26: Yuda ni gabifaania, ngʼaloma ati, “Tamali mugwalaafu ohusingaho olwohuba sinamuŋa Seera omusaani wange ohumusika.” Era sigaŋenyuha ni naye nindi.
38.27: Ehiseera ehyʼohusaala ni hyola, nga bahifaania baati Tamali gaalimo balongo.
38.28: Ni gaali nʼasaala, nga mulala atusa engalo, ngʼaŋo omusaŋu asaalisa amusidihaho ahagoye ahalando hu ngalo yiye aloma ati, “Ono njʼowehereeye ohutula.”
38.29: Aye ni gagobosayo engalo, mugandawe njʼowatula, ngʼomusaŋu omusaalisa aloma ati, “E e, posalireŋo ohutula otyo!” Nga bamutaho esiina baati Pereezi.
38.30: Oluvanyuma nga mugandawe owaali nʼahagoye ahalando hu ngalo nga kwatula era nga bamulanga esiina baati Zeera.

39.1: Ŋaahani oluvanyuma lwʼohutunda Yosefu, Abamidiyaani abamugula beehirira ni naye bamuŋira e Misiri. Omumisiri oyu baali ni balanga baati Potifaali, mulala hu bahungu era omuhulu wʼabahuumi ba Falaawo, gamugula hu Bayisimayiri abo.
39.2: Musengwa ngʼaba ŋalala ni Yosefu era gaamuŋa ekabi mu biitu byosibyosi ebi gaholanga nʼaŋeeresa musengwawe Omumisiri oyo.
39.3: Era musengwa ya Yosefu ni gabona Musengwa nʼali ŋalala ni naye era ti hiisi ehi ahola, Musengwa ahiŋa ekabi,
39.4: Nga Yosefu aba muhoda eyiri musengwawe oyo era gamufuula muŋeeresa wuwe owenjabulo. Ngʼamuŋa ogwohulabiriranga amago gage era ngʼamwesiga amuŋa ogwʼohuhuuma ebiitu byomu mago gage byosibyosi.
39.5: Ohuŋwa olu Potifaali gaŋambya Yosefu ebyʼamago gage nʼebiitu bibye byosibyosi, Musengwa gaŋa amago gʼOmumisiri oyo ekabi olwa Yosefu. Ekabi ja Musengwa nga jiba hu hiisi hiitu ehi Potifaali gaali ni nahyo, mu nyumba nomu ndimiro.
39.6: Olwʼehyo Potifaali gaŋambya Yosefu ebibye byosibyosi abirabirire. Era byosibyosi ni biri ŋaasi wa Yosefu, Potifaali sigafanga hu hiitu hyosihyosi ohutusaho emere eyi gaalyanga. Ŋaahani Yosefu gaali munegene era nʼaboneha bulaŋi.
39.7: Olwʼehyo, ehiseera hyola omuhasi wa musengwawe gamwegomba era ngʼamuloma ati “Hola oŋenyuheho ni neese.”
39.8: Aye Yosefu ngʼagaana amuloma ati, “Musengwa yange gapambya ebiitu byosibyosi ebi ali ni nabyo era ŋaŋuma ehigeralihirira hu biitu bibye olwohuba ndiŋo ohubirabirira.
39.9: Ŋaŋuma owukira obuŋangi mu mago gano era ŋaŋuma ehi musengwa yange atapambya ohutusaho ewe, olwohuba oli muhasi wuwe. Olwʼehyo, sobola tye ohuhola ehibi hyehyo, nonoona mu moni ja Hatonda?”
39.10: Era wayire nga hiisi ludaalo omuhasi oyo gadebanga Yosefu aŋenyuhe ni naye aye niye gagaana wayire ohwehala ohuŋaya ni naye.
39.11: Lulala Yosefu gengira mu nyumba ohuhola emirimo era ni ŋaŋuma mwidu yesiyesi owaalimo.
39.12: Nga muha Potifaali afahira ehyambalo hya Yosefu amuloma ati, “Nja oŋenyuhe ni nange.” Aye nga Yosefu amulehera ehyambalo hihye aduluma atula ebulafu.
39.13: Ni gabona nʼamuleheeye ehyambalo hihye mu ngalo era nʼadulumire gaŋwa mu nyumba,
39.14: galanga abeedu babe gabaloma ati, “Mubone, Omubbebbulaniya ono baamuleeta ŋano hutugudujuliraho! Abaaye gengiiye muno ohufutaganiraho aye ni kubbire enduulu, ngʼaduluma.
39.15: Ni kubbire enduulu, adulumire ngʼaleha ŋano ehyambalo hihye ngʼatula nomu nyumba.”
39.16: Ngʼaŋo omuhasi oyo abiiha ehyambalo hya Yosefu ohwola olu musengwawe gagobola.
39.17: Ngʼamulomera ati, “Omwidu Omubbebbulaniya oyu watuleetera ŋano, abaye gapamba.
39.18: Aye ni kubbire enduulu, ngʼaduluma aleha ehyambalo hihye era cʼehino.” Badanya Yosefu mu komera
39.19: Musengwa ya Yosefu ni gaŋulira ebibono ebi omuhasi wuwe gamulomera, obusungu wamuŋamba.
39.20: Musengwa ya Yosefu gamuŋamba gamuŋira gamudanya mu komera omu basidihiranga abasibe ba habaha. Aye Yosefu ni gaali eyo mu komera,
39.21: Musengwa gaali ŋalala ni naye era gamuŋambira ehisa, hino hyamuleetera ohuba muhoda eri omuhulu wʼekomera.
39.22: Ngʼomuhulu wʼekomera aŋa Yosefu owanyapala wʼabasibe bosibosi mu komera era ngʼamuŋa nʼogwohulabirira emirimo josijosi eji baholanga mu komera.
39.23: Omuhulu wʼekomera sigafangayo hu hiitu hyosihyosi ehi gaali nʼaŋambisye Yosefu. Musengwa gaali ŋalala ni Yosefu era gamuŋa ekabi mu hiisi hiitu ehigaholanga.

40.1: Oluvanyuma ni ŋaabitaŋo ehiseera, omuhulu wabanyiiyi abanyiiyiranga Falaawo omuŋugi wʼe Misiri nʼowamuŋeeresanga ebyohunywa, basobya hu musengwa yaawe.
40.2: Nga Falaawo aluŋira abaŋeeresa babe abo bombi, omuhulu wabanyiiyi abamunyiiyiranga nʼowamuŋeeresanga ebyohunywa.
40.3: Ngʼababaŋira babata mu komera mu nyumba eyʼomuhulu wʼekomera, mu hifo ehyene ehyo omu basidihira Yosefu.
40.4: Omuhulu wʼabahuumi abaŋa Yosefu ohuba omwidu waawe. Oluvanyuma lwʼababiri abo ohuba mu komera ehiseera ehitali hitono,
40.5: bombi, omuhulu wabanyiiyi abanyiiyiranga Falaawo nʼowamuŋeeresanga ebyohunywa abaali mu komera, basuna ebirooto owiire bulala owo era hiisi hirooto hyali nʼamahulu gaahyo.
40.6: Ni wahya mu mugamba, Yosefu gaatiina eyi baali ngʼababona ni banakuŋaaye.
40.7: Ngʼababuusa ati, “Hiina ehi banakuŋahiise hiityo olwa leero?”
40.8: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Hwembi hulootire ebirooto, ne eŋuma aŋanga ohutuvunulira amahulu gaabyo.” Nga Yosefu abaloma ati, “Hatonda yeŋene njʼasobola ohuvunula amahulu gʼebirooto. Kale mundomere ebirooto byenywe.”
40.9: Ngʼaŋo owaŋeeresanga Falaawo ebyohunywa alomera Yosefu ehirooto hihye ati, “Mbwene omuzabbibbu ni gwetengehire mu moni wange,
40.10: era hu muzabbibbu ogwo ni huliho amasaga adatu. Aŋo ni naaŋo nga gutusa amahoose, nga gwamiraŋo emizabbibbu era nga jirabiraŋo.
40.11: Mbaye pambire ehihopo hya Falaawo mu ngalo. Ngʼaŋo noga emizabbibbu ejo jihamulira mu hihopo ehyo. Ni kenire nga ciŋambya Falaawo.”
40.12: Nga Yosefu amuloma ati, “Gano njʼamahulu gʼehirooto ehyo: amasaga adatu njʼendaalo edatu.
40.13: Ni ŋabitireŋo endaalo edatu, Falaawo aja hulagira bahuboŋolole wagame mu hifo hihyo era wagameyo ohumuŋanga ehihopo, ngʼolu waholanga ahale.
40.14: Aye ohebuliranga wandaga ehyere walomeraho Falaawo ebipambaho, nahaŋwa mu komera muno.
40.15: Hiri hiityo olwohuba baatunda hutunda ohuŋwa mu hyalo hyʼeweefe ehyʼAbabbebbulaniya era eŋuma ehi nahola ohundanya mu komera muno.”
40.16: Omuhulu wabanyiiyi ni gabona Yosefu nʼavunuliiye ola bulaŋi, ngʼamuloma ati, “Keesi mbaye nʼehirooto. Hu mutwe gwange hubayeho ebisero bidatu ni birimo emere.
40.17: Mu hisero ehya ŋamugulu, mubayemo hiisi hiraŋi Falaawo ohulya aye enyuni jiriiyenga emere eyo ebaaye mu hisero hu mutwe gwange.”
40.18: Nga Yosefu amugobolamo ati, “Gano njʼamahulu gʼehirooto ehyo: ebisero ebidatu njʼendaalo edatu.
40.19: Endaalo edatu ni jibitireŋo, Falaawo aja hulagira bahutuse mu komera bahutemeho omutwe. Era baŋanihe omulambo gugwo hu musaala enyuni jigulye.”
40.20: Endaalo endatu ni jabitaŋo, gaali mazaaliwa ga Falaawo era ganyiiyira abahungu babe bosibosi embaga. Ngʼalagira batusa owamuŋeeresanga ebyohunywa ko nʼomuhulu wabanyiiyi mu komera, nga babaŋira mu moni ja bahungu babe.
40.21: Ngʼasoniŋa omuhulu owamuŋeeresanga ebyohunywa amugobohesa obuhulu wuwe era ngʼatandiha ohumuŋeeresanga nindi.
40.22: Aye omuhulu wabanyiiyi nga bamuŋira bamwita ngʼolu Yosefu gaŋa amahulu gʼehirooto hihye.
40.23: Aye omuhulu owaŋeeresanga Falaawo ebyohunywa, nga gerabira Yosefu.

41.1: Ni ŋabitaŋo emyaha ebiri miramba, oluvanyuma lwʼohugobosa omuhulu wʼebinywewa hu mulimo gugwe, nga Falaawo aloota ni gemereeye hu lwabi olu balanga baati Kiyira.
41.2: Ngʼabona eŋombe musanvu ejiboneha obulaŋi era engeeji ni jiŋwera mu lwabi olwo nga jitandiha ohwaya mu ngada.
41.3: Oluvanyuma, eŋombe ejindi musanvu jaŋwera mu lwabi. Jino jaali nyondi era ni jiboneha bubi, joosi jatiina jemeerera hu gobo lyʼolwabi aŋaali eŋombe jira engeeji era ejiboneha obulaŋi.
41.4: Mu hirooto ehyo, gabona eŋombe omusanvu enyondi era ejiboneha obubi ni jirya eŋombe jira omusanvu engeeji era ejiboneha obulaŋi. Ngʼaŋo Falaawo asisimuha mu hirooto.
41.5: Nga nindi aŋenyuha aloota ehirooto ehindi. Hu luno gabona ebigala byʼengaano musanvu, ebigimu era ebiboneha obulaŋi ni bihulira hu hiholo hirala.
41.6: Nga ŋabaŋo ebigala ebindi musanvu ebi gabona cooka nibyo ni biri biŋotohi olwʼembeŋo embalire eyaŋwa mu lulafu yabihubba byaŋotoha.
41.7: Ngʼaŋo ebigala ebyo omusanvu ebiŋotohi, bimira bira omusanvu ebigimu era ebiboneha obulaŋi. Falaawo ni gasisimuha, gafaania ati hyali hirooto.
41.8: Ni wahya mu mugamba, ehyo hyatawanya Falaawo. Olwʼehyo, gatumisa balanga abafumu nʼabaŋi bamagesi bosibosi mu hyalo hyʼe Misiri. Nga Falaawo abalomera ebirooto bibye aye ŋaŋuma owasobola ohumulomera amahulu gʼebirooto ebyo.
41.9: Ngʼaŋo owaŋeeresanga Falaawo ebyohunywa amuloma ati, “Musengwa, olwa leero kebuliiye esobi yange.
41.10: Lulala, Falaawo ganyigira abeedu babe, ngʼasidiha omuhulu wabanyiiyi ni nange mu komera mu nyumba eyʼomuhulu wʼabahuumi babe.
