41.11: Ni hwali mu komera omwo, nga ŋabaŋo ehiire omu ese nʼowahyange oyo hwaloota hiisi mulala ehirooto.
41.12: Ŋaliŋo omuseere Omubbebbulaniya, omwidu owʼomuhulu wʼabahuumi owaali mu komera ni neefe. Ni hwamulomera ebirooto byefe ngʼatulomera hiisi muutu amahulu gʼehirooto hihye.
41.13: Hiisi hiitu nga hiba ngʼolu gahiroma mu huvunula huhwe: ese nga wungobohesa omulimo gwange, ola nga bamuŋira bamwita.”
41.14: Ngʼaŋo Falaawo alagira baje baleete Yosefu. Ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo baja bamutusa mu komera. Ni bahena ohumubega efiiri, gacuusa ebyambalo bibye, nga bamuŋira eyiri Falaawo.
41.15: Ni bamwosa nga Falaawo amuloma ati, “Nalootire ehirooto aye ŋaŋuma asobola ohuvunula amahulu gaahyo. Aye bandomeeye baati mbo ewe osobola ohuvunula amahulu gʼehirooto singa bahihulomera.”
41.16: Nga Yosefu amugobolamo ati, “Ese, sisobola huvunula birooto aye Hatonda aja huhulomera amahulu wiihe omwoyo.”
41.17: Ngʼaŋo Falaawo aloma Yosefu ati, “Mu hirooto hyange, mbaye nemereeye hu gobo lyʼolwabi Kiyira,
41.18: nga mbona eŋombe musanvu engeeji era ejiboneha obulaŋi ni jaaya mu ngada.
41.19: Oluvanyuma nabona eŋombe ejindi musanvu ejiboneha obubi, enyondi era mbaye kiiri hubonangaho mu hyalo hyosihyosi ehyʼe Misiri, eŋombe enyondi hyejo ejinabona mu hirooto.
41.20: Eŋombe ejo enyondi era ejiboneha obubi, nga jirya eŋombe jira omusanvu engeeji era ejiboneha obulaŋi.
41.21: Aye oluvanyuma lwʼenyondi ohulya engeeji, enyondi jasigala ni jihiiri nyondi era ni jiboneha bubi. Ngʼaŋo sisimuha mwiro.
41.22: “Nga nindi penyuha era nga ndoota ehirooto ehindi. Mu hirooto ehyo, nabona amagala gʼengaano musanvu amagimu era agaboneha obulaŋi.
41.23: Naali keja nga mbona obugala obundi musanvu ni buli buŋotohi olwʼembeŋo embalire eyaŋwa ewuŋwalyuba yabihubba.
41.24: Ngʼobugala owo obuŋotohi, bumira amagala gala omusanvu amagimu era agaboneha obulaŋi. Bino byosibyosi mbiromeeye abafumu aye ŋaŋumire asobooye ohundomera amahulu gaabyo.”
41.25: Nga Yosefu aloma Falaawo ati, “Ebirooto ebi Falaawo alootire, biri nʼamahulu njʼameene. Hatonda ahwehuliiye Falaawo ebi ali huupi huhola.
41.26: Eŋombe omusanvu ejiboneha obulaŋi, njʼemyaha omusanvu era amagala omusanvu amagimu, njʼemyaha omusanvu. Ebirooto ebyo biri nʼamahulu njʼameene.
41.27: Nʼeŋombe omusanvu enyondi era ejiboneha obubi, njʼemyaha omusanvu era obugala omusanvu obuŋotohi olwʼembeŋo embalire ohuŋwa ewuŋwalyuba, njʼemyaha omusanvu ejʼenjala.
41.28: “Ehyo hiri ngʼolu ndomire ti Hatonda alagire Falaawo ehi ali huupi huhola.
41.29: Ŋanahabeŋo emyaha emiraŋi musanvu ejʼemere mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri lyosiryosi.
41.30: Aye oluvanyuma lwajo, ŋaja hubaŋo emyaha musanvu ejʼenjala. Era enjala eyo erireetera abaatu ohwibirira ohwama hwʼemere ohwʼamaani ohwasooka. Enjala eriruma ehyalo ohubitirira.
41.31: Ŋaliŋumaŋo ehiriraga hiiti ŋaalihoŋo emyaha eji emere yabereyemo enyingi olwohuba enjala eriba nyingi bugali.
41.32: Ehigendererwa hya Hatonda ohuŋa Falaawo ehirooto mu ngeri ebiri, hiri ti Hatonda asalireŋo ehi aja huhola era aja huhyoheresa mu hiseera ehitali hya ŋale.
41.33: “Olwʼehyo, Falaawo aheje omusinde omulabuhi era owʼamagesi, amuŋe obuŋangi ohudulumya ehyalo hyʼe Misiri.
41.34: Falaawo ateŋo abatangirisi mu hiisi hitundu ohusoloosa hirala ehyohutaanu ehyʼamakungula mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri mu myaha ejo omusanvu ejʼemere embitiirifu.
41.35: Era mu buŋangi wa Falaawo, bahumbaanie emere mu myaha ejo josijosi emiraŋi ejiija mu moni, bahene bayibiihe mu bibuga bateŋo nʼabasirikale ohuyihuuma.
41.36: Emere eyo bayibiihe eyo ni betegehera emyaha omusanvu ejʼenjala eyiija mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri, ohwehuumisa abaatu batafa njala.”
41.37: Ebibono ebi Yosefu galoma byali byʼamagesi eyiri Falaawo nʼabahungu babe bosibosi.
41.38: Ngʼaŋo Falaawo abuusa abahungu babe ati, “Husobola hwagaana ŋeena omusinde hyʼono ali nʼOmwoyo wa Hatonda?”
41.39: Nga Falaawo aloma Yosefu ati, “Hatonda ahulagire amahulu gʼebirooto byange byosibyosi, ŋaŋuma omuutu omulabuhi era owʼamagesi hyʼewe.
41.40: Oja huhulira olubiri lwange era abaatu bʼe Misiri bosibosi bali nʼohugonderanga ebiragiro bibyo. Oja huba wahubiri hu ese.” Yosefu aŋuga Misiri
41.41: Nga Falaawo aloma Yosefu ati, “Kuŋa obuŋangi ohuŋuga ehyalo hyʼe Misiri hyosihyosi.”
41.42: Era nga Falaawo gefihula epeta yiye eyʼobuŋugi hu lwala lulwe, ayifiiha Yosefu. Ngʼahena amwambasa ehimolo ehi baatunga mu lugoye olulaŋi olwa laasi, ngʼaŋamba ahajegere ahʼezaabbu amwambasa mu mamiro.
41.43: Ngʼalagira bamugeehesya mu higaali hihye ehindi ohulaga ti njʼowaali owohubiri hu ye mu buŋangi. Ngʼabasirikale aba bamuŋa ohumuhuuma bamutangirira ni bahabuhira abaatu baati, “Mwawuhe!” Kale nga Falaawo aŋa Yosefu obuŋangi ohuŋuga ehyalo hyʼe Misiri hyosihyosi.
41.44: Nga Falaawo aloma Yosefu ati, “Wayire ndiise Falaawo aŋuga Misiri, kuŋaaye obuŋangi ŋaŋume muutu ahola ehiitu hyosihyosi nʼatahwebuhiiseho.”
41.45: Nga Falaawo aŋa Yosefu esiina ati Zafenasi Paneeya, ngʼahena amuŋa Asenaasi omuhaana wa Potifeera omusengi womu hibuga Oni, ohuba muhasi wuwe. Kale nga Yosefu aŋuga egwanga lyʼe Misiri.
41.46: Yosefu gaali aŋesa emyaha adatu aŋa gatandihira ohuŋeeresa Falaawo habaha wʼe Misiri. Nga Yosefu aŋwa mu lubiri ewa Falaawo, atiina agenda nʼalambula ahenaho Misiri yosiyosi.
41.47: Mu myaha omusanvu emiraŋi ejʼemere, ehyalo hyʼe Misiri hyama emere mu bungi.
41.48: Nga Yosefu ahumbaania emere yosiyosi eyi baatu bomu Misiri bafuna mu myaha omusanvu emiraŋi bayibiiha aŋaatu mu bibuga. Mu hiisi hibuga gatangamo ehifo aŋa ohubiihamo emere ohuŋwa mu bitundu ohweswanigirisa.
41.49: Nga Yosefu abunga ebibbiryo byʼemere ebibba ebyene ebingi byaba oti hani mujehe hu nyanja. Olwohuba emere yaali nyingi bugali, galeeheraŋo nʼohuŋandiiha omuŋendo.
41.50: Mu hiseera ehyo, emyaha jʼenjala ko joole, ngʼAsenaasi omuhaana wa Potifeera omusengi womu hibuga Oni asaalira Yosefu abaana abaseere babiri.
41.51: Nga Yosefu alanga omwana omudaayi esiina ati Manase, aloma ati, “Olwohuba Hatonda ganjerabihiise ohutegana hwange ko nʼamago ga Bbaabba.”
41.52: Ngʼowohubiri amulanga esiina ati Efulayimu nʼaloma ati, “Olwohuba Hatonda gapaaye olusaaye mu hyalo omu mbonaboneeye.”
41.53: Ngʼaŋo emyaha omusanvu ejʼemere ohuba mu bungi mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri, jiŋwaho.
41.54: Ngʼemyaha omusanvu ejʼenjala jitandiha, ngʼolu Yosefu gaaloma. Enjala yaluma ehyalo hyosihyosi aye mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri mwosimwosi mwalimo emere.
41.55: Abaatu bʼe Misiri ni batandiiha ohulumwa enjala, baliririra Falaawo abaŋe emere. Nga Falaawo abaloma ati, “Mutiine eyiri Yosefu, muhole ngʼolu anabalome.”
41.56: Enjala ni yahwana mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri lyosiryosi, nga Yosefu gegulaŋo amasitoowa gosigosi, ngʼagusa Abamisiri emere, olwohuba enjala yaali nyingi mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri lyosiryosi.
41.57: Ngʼabaatu ohuŋwa mu byalo ebindi byosibyosi batiina e Misiri eyiri Yosefu ohugula emere, olwohuba enjala yaali nyingi mu hyalo hyosihyosi.

42.1: Yakobbo ni gategeera e Misiri nʼeriyo engaano, galoma abasaani babe ati, “Lwahiina mwihaaye hwihala ni muhejanaho ni ŋabula ehi muhola?”
42.2: Nga geeyongera abaloma ati, “Pulira ti e Misiri eriyo emere, muserengete mutiineyo mutusahireyo emere hutafiira ŋano njala.”
42.3: Ngʼabaganda ba Yosefu ehumi abahulu, beehirira batiina e Misiri ohugula emere.
42.4: Aye Yakobbo sigafugiirira Bbenjamini muganda ya Yosefu ohutiina nʼabaganda babe, olwohuba gaali atya ati hamunga yeesi ehiitu ehibi hiŋanga ohumwolaho.
42.5: Abasaani ba Yisirayiri baali balala hu mutoolo gwʼabaatu abaatiina ohusaha engaano olwohuba enjala yaali mu gwanga lyʼe Kanani lyosi.
42.6: Yosefu njʼowaali omuŋugi wʼegwanga lyʼe Misiri era njʼowaali nʼagusa abaatu baayo bosibosi emere. Olwʼehyo, abaganda ba Yosefu ni batiina boola e Misiri, nga bagwa mu moni jije bafumaaye olwʼohumuŋa eŋono.
42.7: Aŋo ni naaŋo Yosefu ni gabona abaganda babe, gabafaania aye nga gehosa oti sabamanyire, ngʼabaloma nʼabogoha ati, “Muŋwera ŋeena?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Huŋwera mu hyalo hyʼe Kanani. Hujire ohugula emere.”
42.8: Wayire Yosefu gafaania abaganda babe nibo sibamufaania.
42.9: Ngʼaŋo Yosefu ahebulira ebirooto bibye ebi galootanga hu bo, ngʼabaloma ati, “Enywe mujire huheeta ohumanya obunafu obuli mu gwanga lyefe ko mugobole mutusoose.”
42.10: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Bbe, musengwa yeefe, abeedu babo bajire hugula emere.
42.11: Muhulu, hwesihwesi ngʼolu otubona ŋano huli baana bʼomuutu mulala. Efe abeedu babo huli baatu bʼamazima, sihuli huheeta.”
42.12: Nga Yosefu abagobolamo ati, “Bbe mudulinga, enywe mujire huheeta ebiri mu gwanga lyefe.”
42.13: Aye bamugobolamo baati, “Efe abeedu babo hwali ehumi nʼababiri, abaana bʼomuutu mulala amenya mu gwanga lyʼe Kanani, muŋere yeefe gasigayeyo ni seefe, muganda yeefe owundi njʼowafa.”
42.14: Nga Yosefu abaloma ati, “Soobona, hiri ngʼolu ndomire, enywe muli huheeta.
42.15: Hino cehi nahole ohuhahasa oba ehi muloma hituufu: Falaawo ngʼolu ali omulamu, simuja huŋwa ŋano ohutusaho nga muleetire ŋano muŋere yenywe.
42.16: Mweyangalemo mulala hu nywe atiine aleete muganda yenywe omuŋere, abasigaaye nenda hubata mu komera ohwola olu hunahahahase hanye ebimuloma bituufu. Ni muba ni mutaloma mazima, ngʼolu Falaawo ali mulamu, mu butuufu muba muli baheeti.”
42.17: Ngʼabata bosibosi ŋalala mu komera ohuhena endaalo edatu.
42.18: Ni ŋabitaŋo endaalo ebiri, hu lwalondaho nga Yosefu alagira baleeta abaganda babe abo abaloma ati, “Ese ndi muutu atya Hatonda, olwʼehyo muhole ehi mbaloma ko muŋone.
42.19: Ni muba ni muloma amazima, mulala hu enywe asigale ŋano aye olwʼamago genywe agali hulumwa enjala, abasigayeŋo bagameyo baŋirire abaatu bomu mago genywe abali hulumwa enjala, emere.
42.20: Aye muli nʼohundeeterea ŋano nakoma wenywe ko kahase ebi muloma era ko muŋone.” Nga bahola baatyo.
42.21: Nga baloma abeene nʼabeene baati, “Mu butuufu ehi hwahola muganda yeefe sihyali hiraŋi. Hwabona enaku eyi gaali ni nayo nʼatwegayirira humulehe aye sihwaŋulirisa bibye. Cʼehigima bino bitwolireho.”
42.22: Nga Lubbeeni abagobolamo ati, “Sinabaloma ti omuseere mutamwosaho habi hosihosi aye enywe mwagaana ohuŋulira ebyange? Ŋaahani huli nʼohubiroosa.”
42.23: Sibamanya Yosefu ni gaali nʼaŋulira ebi baloma olwohuba gaali atambisa omutafuta ohuloma ni nabo.
42.24: Nga Yosefu aŋwa aŋa bali atiina aŋaatu akukumusa amasiga, nga gagamayo eyi bali, ngʼaloma ni nabo nindi. Ngʼalagira baŋamba Simyoni bamudanya mu komera, bosibosi ni babona.
42.25: Nga Yosefu alagira bejusa esaŋu jʼabaganda babe emere, baŋamba nʼebbeesa eja hiisi muutu baajita mu saŋu jaawe, nga babawoŋera nʼemere eyʼohulya ni bali mu lugendo.
42.26: Ngʼaŋo abaganda babe batwiha emere yaawe hu nasugirya jaawe basimbuha ohwagamayo engo.
42.27: Owiire ni waberirira nga basalaŋo baŋenyuhe aŋaatu. Mulala hu bo ni gasitula esaŋu yiye ohuŋa nasugirya yiye emere, ngʼabona ebbeesa jije ni jiri hu mugulu wʼesaŋu yiye.
42.28: Ngʼaloma baganda babe ati, “Bangoboheseye ebbeesa jange, njʼeji mu saŋu yange.” Ngʼemyoyo jibahubba mu bifuba ni bateetema huteetema ni bebuusa abeene nʼabeene baati, “Hatonda atuholire hi hino?”
42.29: Ni boola engo e Kanani, nga balomera Yakobbo laata yaawe byosibyosi ebyabolaho baati,
42.30: “Omusinde aŋuga egwanga eyi hwatiina ohugula emere, gaaloma ni neefe nʼebbogo nʼatulobohesamo ohuba baheeti.
42.31: Aye nga humulomera huuti, ‘Efe sihuli baheeti,
42.32: hwali ehumi nʼababiri, abaana abʼomuutu mulala, mulala gafa, muŋere yeefe gaasigalayo ni seefe engo mu gwanga lyʼe Kanani.’
42.33: “Ngʼaŋo omusinde omuŋugi wʼegwanga eryo, atuloma ati, ‘Hino cehi nja hutegereraho ti muli huloma hyʼamazima: mulehe ŋano mulala hu nywe, ko enywe abandi muŋirire abaatu benywe emere olwʼenjala eyiruma.
42.34: Aye mundeeteranga ŋano muganda yenywe omuŋere, ehyo njʼehinditegereraho ti simuli baheeti, ko ndehule muganda yenywe ono. Era muja huba bʼedembe ohwihala mu gwanga lino mwetaaye.’ ”
42.35: Ni begula esaŋu jaawe, hiisi muutu gagaanamo ebbeesa jije! Bo ni saawe ni babona ebbeesa ejo, ngʼobuti bubaŋamba.
42.36: Nga saawe Yakobbo abaloma ati, “Mukenireho abaana bange. Yosefu gaatiina era ni Simyoni yeesi hiŋirire era mwenda ohutusaho ni Bbenjamini yeesi. Hiisi hiitu hiri hutiinira bubi.”
42.37: Nga Lubbeeni aloma semwana ati, “Wiitanga abaana bange bombi, singa sindigobosa Bbenjamini. Njesige keesi nja humugobosa.”
42.38: Aye nga Yakobbo aloma ati, “Omwana wange saaja hutiina eyo ni nenywe, olwohuba mugandawe gaafa, niye njʼasigayeŋo yeŋene. Singa agwira ehigosi hu ngira, ehyo hiija hundeetera ohutiina e magombe nʼobutahi bungi bugali.”

43.1: Enjala yeyongera ohuluma abaatu bugali mu gwanga lyʼe Kanani.
43.2: Ni baali ni bahenire ohulya emere yosiyosi eyi baatusa e Misiri, nga Yakobbo aloma abasaani ati, “Mwagameyo e Misiri mutugulireho emere.”
43.3: Nga Yuda amuloma ati, “Omusinde ola omuŋugi waayo gatulabula ati, ‘Simuja hugobolayo huloma ni nange ohutusaho nga mujire ni muganda yenywe.’
43.4: Nʼonafugiirire Bbenjamini ohutiina ni neefe, hunatiine e Misiri hwabagulirayo emere eyindi.
43.5: Aye nooba nʼotafugiirira hutiina ni naye, sihunatiine olwohuba omusinde ola gatuloma ati, ‘Sinja hugobolayo huloma ni nenywe ohutusaho ni mujire ni muŋere yenywe.’ ”
43.6: Nga Yisirayiri amuloma ati, “Lwahiina mwalomera omusinde oyo muuti muli ni muganda yenywe owundi, ohundeetera obugosi buno?”
43.7: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Omusinde oyo gatubuusa bugali ebituŋambaho, gaabuusa nʼebifa hu mago geefe ati, ‘Senywe ahiiriŋo mulamu? Muli ni muganda yenywe owundi?’ Efe hwagobolangamo hugobolamo ebi gatubuusanga. Hwahamanyiiye hu hi huuti anatulome ati, ‘Muje muleete muganda yenywe oyo’?”
43.8: Nga Yuda aloma semwana Yisirayiri ati, “Fugiirira hutiina e Misiri nʼomwana mangumangu hugule emere, ehyo hija huleetera ewe ni neese ko nʼamago geefe ohuŋona enjala.
43.9: Ese suubisa ohumuhuuma butiiribiri. Era ni tamugobosa ŋano, ogwo guja huba musango gwange.
43.10: Singa ebiseera sibiŋwereeye hu huloma hu hiitu hino, engeri hwali huhulomeeyeho hale, aŋa ndomera ŋano hwahali hugobolayo mulundi ogwohubiri.”
43.11: Ngʼaŋo saawe Yisirayiri abaloma ati, “Hinaba ni hiri hiityo, muhole muuti: muŋambeho birala hu biitu ebihirira erala obulaŋi mu hyalo hyefe hino, mute mu saŋu jenywe muŋirireho omusinde oyo ngʼehirabo. Muŋire ebyahawoowo ebi balanga baati bbaamu ni miira nʼomudugere ko nʼebibala ebi balanga baati alumondi.
43.12: Muŋire ebbeesa ejʼemirundi ebiri olwohuba muli nʼohugobosayo ebbeesa jira ejibabateera mu esaŋu jenywe. Hamunga sihyali higenderere.
43.13: Muŋire ni muganda yenywe yeesi, mwagame eyiri omusinde oyo omuŋugi.
43.14: Sunga Hatonda Omwene Buŋangi, omuŋugi oyo abalehulire muganda yenywe Simyoni ni Bbenjamini, bagobole. Ese nimba wohufiirwa abaana bange, hahibe hiityo, puma hyahuhola.”
43.15: Ngʼabasaani babe abo baŋamba ebirabo ebyo nʼebbeesa ejʼemirundi ebiri nga beehirira batiina e Misiri beyanjula eyiri Yosefu ni bali ni Bbenjamini.
43.16: Yosefu ni gababona ni bali ni Bbenjamini, galoma alabirira amago gage ati, “Ŋira abasinde bano mu nyumba ewange, osale ehyayo otegehe ehiiŋulo olwohuba banaalye ehyomu muusi ni nange.”
43.17: Ngʼolabirira amago gage, ahola ngʼolu Yosefu gamuloma, ngʼaŋira abasinde abo mu nyumba ewa Yosefu.
43.18: Abaganda ba Yosefu batya ni babaŋira mu nyumba ewa Yosefu. Baŋeega baati, “Batuleetire ŋano olwʼebbeesa ejibata mu saŋu jeefe hu ludaayi. Atuleetire eno atuhubbe owiibi ahene alagire batuhadaase bahene batufuule beedu babe era baŋire ni nasugirya jeefe.” Ehiiŋulo mu mago ga Yosefu
43.19: Olwʼehyo, batiina eyiri alabirira amago ga Yosefu, owaali ŋa mulyango gwʼenyumba bamuloma baati,
43.20: “Muhulu, hwaja ŋano omulundi omudaayi ohugula emere.
43.21: Aye ni hwagamayo, hwola aŋaatu aŋa hwaŋenyuha, ni hwaboŋolola esaŋu jeefe, hiisi mulala gagaanamo ebbeesa enyene nʼenyene eji gasasuulira emere, ni jiri hu mugulu wʼemere. Olwʼehyo, hujigobohiise.
43.22: Sihumanyire owajita mu saŋu jeefe. Huleetire nʼebbeesa ejindi ohugula emere.”
43.23: Ngʼalabirira amago ga Yosefu abagobolamo ati, “Eŋuma bubi, mutatya. Hatonda wenywe era Hatonda wa senywe, gabaŋa obuŋinda mu saŋu jenywe. Nasuna ebbeesa jenywe eji mwasasula.” Ni gahena ohuloma, ngʼabatuhisa Simyoni.
43.24: Ngʼaŋo alabirira amago ga Yosefu abengisa mu nyumba ewa Yosefu, ngʼabaŋa amaaji basaaba amagulu, ngʼaŋa ni nasugirya jaawe enyaasi ohulya.
43.25: Nga bategeha ohuŋambya Yosefu ebirabo olwohuba baali babalomire baati gaali aja huliira ŋalala ni naabo ehyomu muusi.
43.26: Yosefu ni gagobola engo, nga bamuŋirira ebirabo nga bahena bahubba amafuha mu moni jije.
43.27: Ngʼababuusa ngʼolu baali, ngʼahena ababuusa ati, “Senywe oyu mwandomeraho, ali atye? Aliyo mulamu?”
43.28: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Omwidu wuwo, seefe aliyo, ahiiriyo mulamu.” Nga bahubba amafuha ohulaga baati bamuŋa eŋono.
43.29: Yosefu ni gabetoloosamo emoni, gabona Bbenjamini muganda yaawe, omwana wa nyina, ngʼababuusa ati, “Oyo nje muganda yenywe ohirira erala obuŋere oyu mwandomeraho?” Ngʼahena amuloma ati, “Mwanawe, Hatonda ahuŋambire ehisa.”
43.30: Yosefu ni gaabona Bbenjamini omwana wa nyina era mutoowe, ganyanguha ohuŋwaŋo ohuheja ehifo aŋʼohulirira. Gatiina mu hisenge hihye ehyʼenjabulo ngʼalirira omwo.
43.31: Ni gahena ohulira, ngʼasaaba mu moni, atula, ni gegumirisa ohutenda abaaliŋo bamanye ngʼaloma alabirira amago gage ati, “Yiiŋula emere.”
43.32: Ngʼabeeŋula Yosefu yeŋene, nʼabaganda babe ŋa boŋene nʼAbamisiri abaliiranga ŋalala ni naye ŋa boŋene. Bahola baatyo olwohuba hyali hya mbiho eyiri Abamisiri ohuliira ŋalala nʼAbabbebbulaniya.
43.33: Beehasa abaganda babe abo ni bamulengereeye ni beema hu myaha jaawe, ohuŋwa hu mudaayi ohwola hu muŋere. Nga bahejanaho ni beeŋunja olwohubeehasa baatyo.
43.34: Nga babeŋula emere ni bayituhisa hu meeza ya Yosefu, cooka eya Bbenjamini yasinga eyabahye bosibosi emirundi etaanu. Balya era banywa ni Yosefu era ni baali basangaafu.

44.1: Ni bahena ohulya, nga Yosefu alagira alabirira amago gage ati, “Yoolera abasinde emere mu saŋu jaawe hiisi muutu nʼomuteeramo eyi asobola ohugega. Era hiisi muutu muteere ebbeesa jije hu mugulu wʼemere mu saŋu yiye.
44.2: Nʼohena oŋambe ehihopo hyange ehi babbota mu feeza ohite hu mugulu wʼesaŋu eyamuto yaawe era taamo nʼebbeesa eji asasuuye.”
44.3: Ni wahya mu mugamba pwipwipwi, ngʼaseebula abasinde abo baniina nasugirya jaawe.
44.4: Ni baali ni bahiiri hwola ŋaleeŋi ohuŋwa mu hibuga, nga Yosefu aloma alabirira ŋa wuwe ati, “Londa hu basinde abo, nʼonaboleho obalome oti, ‘Lwahiina mutusasuuye ehibi mu hiraŋi ehi hubaholire?
44.5: Hino njʼehihopo ehi musengwa yange anyweramo era njʼehi atambisa ohumanya ebiija hubaŋo mu moni. Muholire hibi ohuhiiba.’ ”
44.6: Era ni gabalondaho ngʼabagaana abaloma ehi Yosefu gamuloma.
44.7: Aye nibo nga bamuloma baati, “Muhulu, hiina ehigema waloma ebibono ebyo? Sihusobola huhola ehiitu hyehyo.
44.8: Obanga hwagobohiise ebbeesa eji hwagaana mu saŋu jeefe ni hwola e Kanani, lwahiina hwiba efeeza oba ezaabbu ohuŋwa mu nyumba ya musengwawo?
44.9: Singa ŋabaŋo mulala hu efe abeedu babo, oyu onabone nahibihire, embwa enjibi yegula omugogo. Aye abasigayeŋo hwesihwesi huja hufuuha beedu babo.”
44.10: Ngʼalabirira amago ga Yosefu, amugobolamo ati, “Mutehiise bulaŋi. Oyo oyu nagaane nʼehihopo njʼanafuuhe omwidu wange yeŋene. Abasigaayeyo nibo sibanabeho musango.”
44.11: Ngʼaŋo hiisi mulala hu bo atwihula esaŋu yiye ayita ŋaasi, ngʼahena ayiboŋolola.
44.12: Ngʼalabirira ewa Yosefu, atandihira hu yʼomuhulu yaawe ohwaza paka olu goola hu yomuŋere. Nga bagaana ehihopo mu saŋu ya Bbenjamini.
44.13: Ni hyazuuha hiiti ehihopo ehyo hyali mu saŋu ya Bbenjamini, nga bahanula engoye jaawe olwʼowusiba, nga bahena bagobosa esaŋu jaawe hu nasugirya jaawe bagama mu hibuga.
44.14: Mu hiseera ehyo, Yosefu gaali ahiiri mu nyumba e wuwe, Yuda nʼabaganda babe ni boola mu nyumba, nga bahubba amafuha mu moni jije ni bajooleeye.
44.15: Nga Yosefu ababuusa ati, “Muholire hiina ehyo? Simumanyire muuti omuutu hyʼese asobola ohulagula gamanya ebiitu ebija hubaŋo mu moni?”
44.16: Nga Yuda amugobolamo ati, “Hunaalome hi musengwa yange? Huŋuma hya huloma. Huneŋosyeho huutye ohulaga huuti huŋuma musango? Hatonda ganihire obubi weefe, efe abeedu babo. Ŋahani huli beedu ba musengwa yeefe, efe ŋalala ni nooyo oyu baageene nʼehihopo mu saŋu yiye.”
44.17: Aye Yosefu galoma ati, “Sipanga huhola ehiitu hyehyo, oyu bageene nʼali nʼehihopo njʼaja ohufuuha omwidu wange. Abasigaaye mweyagamire eyiri senywe, miyaaya.” Yuda ahiihirira abaganda babe
44.18: Nga Yuda gegerera aŋa Yosefu gaali amuloma ati, “Kusunga musengwa yange, wunjihirise ohubaaho nʼehindoma eyi oli. Kusunga otanyigira ese omwidu wuwo, olwohuba manyire ti oli nʼobuŋangi hyʼowa Falaawo era ehi olagira njʼehi bahola.
44.19: Muhulu, watubuusa efe abeedu babo oti, ‘Muli ni senywe oba muganda yenywe?’
44.20: Nga huhugobolamo huuti, ‘Huli ni seefe aye asahuluŋire era huliyo ni muganda yeefe oyu seefe gasaala mu wusahulu. Muganda yeefe owundi, gaafa. Ŋahani muganda yeefe oyo njʼomwana yeŋene aliŋo hu nyina era seefe amwenda bugali.’
44.21: Ngʼaŋo otuloma oti, ‘Mumuleetanga ŋano muboneho ko kahase ti ebi muloma bituufu.’
44.22: Nga muhulu, huhugobolamo huuti, ‘Bbaabba sasobola hwihirisa omwana oyo ohumulehaŋo, asobola nʼohufa ogwʼomwana wuwe.’
44.23: Aye ngʼotuloma oti, ‘Ohutusaho ni muleetire ŋano muto yenywe, sinja hubehirisa hugobola ŋano hwemeerera mu moni jange nindi.’
44.24: Era muhulu, ni hwagama engo hwalomera seefe ehi watuloma.
44.25: “Emere ni yatuŋwaho, nga seefe atuloma ati, ‘Mwagame e Misiri mutugulireho emere nindi.’
44.26: Aye hwamugobolamo huuti, ‘Sihuja hutiina e Misiri ohutusaho ni hutiinire ni muganda yeefe Bbenjamini olwohuba omuŋugi waayo gatuloma ati sigenda hutiineyo ni huŋuma muganda yeefe ahira ohuba omuŋere.’
44.27: “Nga Bbaabba atugobolamo ati, ‘Mumanyire muuti nyinenywe gaasaalira abaana abaseere babiri.
44.28: Mulala gangota hu moni era aŋaŋuma hubuusabuusa esolo yamulya. Ohuŋwa hulwo simubonangaho.
44.29: Singa muŋira ono yeesi, ŋabaŋo ehigosi hu ngira, muja hugira tiine e magombe ni ndi nʼenaku eyʼamaani.’ ”
44.30: Yuda geeyongera ohuloma ati “Olwʼehyo, singa nagama engo wereere aŋaŋuma Bbenjamini, ngʼolu bulamu wa Bbaabba buholera bugali hu mwana oyo,
44.31: kasita anabone ni hutagemeyo ni mulebe yeefe oyo, aja hufa. Efe abeedu babo huja huba ndiife ohuleeteeye Bbaabba olumbe ohumwita.
44.32: Ehyo nʼohitaaye aŋo, nahahasa Bbaabba ti nja humuhuuma. Namuloma ati, ‘Singa simugobosa nʼali mulamu, omusango guliba hu ndiise.’
44.33: “Kale kusunga ofugiirire omuseere ono gagame engo nʼabaganda babe, ese kole owiidu mu hifo hihye.
44.34: Olwohuba nagama tye eyiri Bbaabba, omwana oyo nʼaŋumaŋo? Kusunga wunjeede tagama ohubona ehija ohwola hu Bbaabba.”

45.1: Yuda nʼahenire ohweririgana, Yosefu gaali saahisobola hweyongera ohwehweherera eyiri abaganda babe mu moni jʼabaŋeeresa babe. Olwʼehyo, galagira Abaŋeeresa abo baŋweŋo batule ebulafu. Kale ni ŋaali ni ŋaŋumaŋo omuutu owundi yesiyesi ohutusaho abalebe babe, ngʼabaloma ati, “Ese ndiise Yosefu.”
45.2: Ngʼahena alira nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani, nʼAbamisiri abaali ebulafu baaŋulira era batiina balomeraho nʼabomu mago ga Falaawo.
45.3: Nga Yosefu aloma abaganda babe ati, “Ese ndiise Yosefu! Bbaabba ahiiriŋo mulamu?” Aye abaganda babe ni baŋulira ehyo, sibamugobolamo olwʼesisi.
45.4: Ngʼaŋo Yosefu aloma abaganda babe ati, “Mwigerere ŋano.” Ni beegerera aŋa gaali ngʼabaloma ati, “Ndiise Yosefu muganda yenywe, oyu mwagusa abaatu bʼe Misiri.
45.5: Aye ŋaŋume aluŋira owahye era muteralihirira olwohuba mwatunda hyapweramo ohuba ŋano, olwohuba Hatonda gapindiha eno mbeherereyo ponie obulamu wʼabaatu.
45.6: Ŋaahani myaha ebiri enjala nʼeruma aye emyaha etaanu mu moni, ŋaja huŋumaŋo ohuhoma nʼohuhungula.
45.7: Ne Hatonda gapindiha eno ohubehererayo, ko enywe nʼabejuhulu benywe mwahaŋona mu ngeri eyeŋunjisa, mwahasigalaŋo ni muli balamu hu hyalo huno.
45.8: “Sindiinywe omwagira naaja ŋano aye Hatonda. Gafuula omuŋi wʼamagesi omuhulu owa Falaawo, omuhungu wʼamago gage era omuŋugi wʼehyalo hyʼe Misiri hyosihyosi.
45.9: Kale mwagameyo mangu mulomere Bbaabba muuti, ‘Yosefu omwana wuwo aloma ati Hatonda gamufuula muŋugi wʼegwanga lyʼe Misiri lyosiryosi. Olwʼehyo, yanguŋaho wuuje eno mangumangu.
45.10: Oja humenyanga mu twale lyʼe Goseni era oja huba ŋaapi ni neese, ewe nʼabaana ko nʼabejuhulu babo nʼetaama nʼembusi nʼeŋombe ko ni neebyo byosibyosi ebi oli ni nabyo.
45.11: Nja huhulabirira nʼoli eno, olwohuba enjala ehiiruma emyaha etaanu ejomu moni. Ŋano sooja hulumwa enjala.’
45.12: “Enywe mwabeene ko ni muganda yange Bbenjamini, mubona muuti mu butuufu oweene, ndiise ali huloma ni nenywe.
45.13: Mutiine mulomere Bbaabba hu ŋono eri ndi ni nalyo ŋano mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri nʼebiŋamba hu biitu ebindi byosibyosi ebi muweene era muhene mumuleete ŋano mangu.”
45.14: Ngʼaŋo ahena agwa mugandawe Bbenjamini mu hifuba nga bombi bakukumusa amasiga olwʼesangaalo.
45.15: Ni gahena ngʼagwa abaganda babe bosibosi mu bifuba nakukumusa amasiga olwʼesangaalo. Oluvanyuma ngʼabaganda babe batandiiha ohuŋaya ni naye.
45.16: Amaŋuliro ni goola mu lubiri lwa Falaawo ti abaganda ba Yosefu baali bajire, Falaawo nʼabahungu babe bosibosi baali basangaafu.
45.17: Nga Falaawo aloma Yosefu ati, “Loma abaganda babo oti, ‘Mutwihe emigugu hu nasugirya jenywe mwagame e Kanani,
45.18: muleete senywe nʼamago genywe, muuje mube eno. Nja hubaŋa e twale erisingira erala obulaŋi era muja huba nʼemere.’
45.19: Era balome oti, ‘Mutiine nʼebigaali ohuŋwa ŋano e Misiri, ohugegeramo abaana abaŋere nʼabahasi benywe, muleete ni senywe.’
45.20: Era mutafaayo hu biitu byenywe ebi muli ni nabyo eyo olwohuba ebiraŋi byosibyosi ebyomu gwanga lyʼe Misiri, biija huba byenywe.”
45.21: Ngʼabasaani ba Yisirayiri bahola baatyo. Nga Yosefu abaŋa ebigaali, ngʼolu Falaawo galagira era gabaŋa nʼemere eyohulira mu ngira.
45.22: Nga hiisi mulala hu bo amuŋa ebyambalo ebinyaaha aye ngʼaŋa Bbenjamini ebitundu byʼefeeza ebihumi bidatu nʼebyambalo emigigi etaanu.
45.23: Ngʼaŋeeresa semwana nasugirya ehumi ni jetwihire ebiraŋi ebyomu gwanga lyʼe Misiri, ni nasugirya ekasi ehumi ni jetwihire engaano nʼemere nʼebyohulira mu ngira ni batiina.
45.24: Ngʼaŋo aseebula abaganda babe abo ahena abaloma ati, “Mutaduhanira mu ngira.”
45.25: Ngʼabaganda babe batiina baŋwa e Misiri, boola mu hyalo hyʼe Kanani eyiri Yakobbo laata yaawe.
45.26: Nga bamuloma baati, “Yosefu ahiiriyo mulamu era muhulu njʼaŋuga ehyalo hyʼe Misiri.” Aye ehyo hyamuŋoleresa era sigahifugiirira.
45.27: Aye ni bamulomera byosibyosi ebi Yosefu gabaloma, gabona nʼebigaali ebi Yosefu gaŋindiha ohumugega ohumuŋira e Misiri, nga Yakobbo laata yaawe agobolamo amaani.
45.28: Ngʼaŋo Yisirayiri aloma ati, “Ŋaahani fugiirira! Yosefu omwana wange ahiiriyo mulamu. Nja hutiina muboneho ni kiiri hufa.”

46.1: Nga Yisirayiri aŋamba olugendo atiina nʼebiitu bibye byosibyosi ebi gaali ni nabyo era ni goola e Bberuseebba, gaŋayo eŋongo eyiri Hatonda wa Yisaka semwana.
46.2: Nga Hatonda aloma ni Yisirayiri mu hirooto owiire ati, “Yakobbo, Yakobbo.” Nga Yakobbo amugobolamo ati, “Wanji Musengwa.”
46.3: Nga Hatonda amuloma ati, “Ndiise Hatonda, Hatonda wa lataawo, otatya hutiina e Misiri, olwohuba ndihufuulira eyo egwanga ebbala.
46.4: Nja hwehirira ni neewe ohutiina mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri era mu butuufu oweene ndihugobosa ŋano. Era nʼolifa, Yosefu alihugolola.”
46.5: Ngʼaŋo Yakobbo aŋwa e Bberuseebba, ngʼabaana ba Yisirayiri bagega Yakobbo laata yaawe, nʼabaana nʼabahasi baawe, mu bigaali ebi Falaawo gabaŋindihira ohugenderamo.
46.6: Nga baŋira ebisolo byawe ko nʼebiitu byawe ebi baasuna mu gwanga lyʼe Kanani, nga Yakobbo nʼolulyo lulwe lwosirwosi batiina e Misiri.
46.7: Gatiina e Misiri nʼabasaani nʼabahaana ko nʼabejuhulu babe, olulyo lulwe lwosirwosi.
46.8: Amasiina gʼabasaani ba Yisirayiri (Yakobbo nʼabasaani babe) abaatiina e Misiri ngagano: Lubbeeni omusaani wa Yakobbo omudaayi.
46.9: Abasaani ba Lubbeeni baali nje Kanoki ni Paalu ni Kezirooni ni Karumi.
46.10: Abasaani ba Simyoni baali nje Yemweli ni Yamini nʼOkadi ni Yakini ni Zokali ni Sawulo omwana wuwe mu muhasi Omukanani.
46.11: Abasaani ba Leevi baali nje Girisoni ni Kohasi ni Merari.
46.12: Abasaani ba Yuda baali nje Eri nʼOnani ni Seera ni Pereezi ni Zeera. Aye Eri nʼOnani baafiira mu hyalo hyʼe Kanani. Abasaani ba Pereezi baali nje Kezirooni ni Hamuli.
46.13: Abasaani ba Yisikaali baali nje Toola ni Puuva ni Yobbu ni Simurooni.
46.14: Abasaani ba Zebbulooni baali nje Seredi nʼEloni ni Yaleeri.
46.15: Abo njʼabasaani ba Leeya aba gasaalira Yakobbo mu Padani Alaamu ohwongera hu ba Dina omuhaana wuwe gasaala. Abaana babe bosibosi, abaseere nʼabahaana baali adatu nabadatu.
46.16: Abasaani ba Gaadi baali nje Zifooni ni Hagi ni Suuni nʼEzibboni nʼEri nʼArodi nʼAleeri.
46.17: Abasaani bʼAseri baali nje Yimuna ni Yisuva ni Yisuvi ni Bberiya. Mboojo yaawe gaali nje Seera. Abasaani ba Bberiya baali nje Hebberi ni Malukiyeeli.
46.18: Abo njʼabaana aba Zilupa gasaalira Yakobbo. Zilupa njʼoyu Labbaani gaaŋa Leeya omuhaana wuwe ohuba omwidu wuwe. Bosibosi ŋalala, Yakobbo gamusunamo abaatu ehumi namukaaga.
46.19: Abasaani ba Lakeeli muha ya Yakobbo baali nje Yosefu ni Bbenjamini.
46.20: Yosefu gasaala Manase nʼEfulayimu nʼali e Misiri. Asenaasi omuhaana wa Potifeera omusengi wa Oni njʼowaali nyinaawe.
46.21: Abasaani ba Bbenjamini baali nje Bbeera ni Bbekeri nʼAsubbeeli ni Geera ni Naamani nʼEki ni Roosi, Mupiimu ni Hupimu nʼArudi.
46.22: Abo njʼabasaani ba Lakeeli aba gasaalira Yakobbo, ŋalala baali ehumi nabane.
46.23: Omusaani wa Daani gaali nje Husimu.
46.24: Abasaani ba Nafutaali baali nje Yahizeeri ni Guuni ni Yezeri ni Silemu.
46.25: Abo njʼabasaani ba Yakobbo aba Bbiluha gamusaalira. Bbiluha oyo njʼoyu Labbaani gaaŋa Lakeeli omuhaana wuwe, abe mwidu wuwe. Era njʼowamusaalira abaana musanvu ŋosiŋosi.
46.26: Abo bosibosi abaatiina e Misiri ni Yakobbo, abomu lulyo lulwe nʼotuhiiseho abahasi bʼabaana babe, baali abaatu kaaga namukaaga.
46.27: Nʼogataho abasaani ba Yosefu ababiri aba gasaalira e Misiri, ohuŋirira ŋalala, abaatu abomu mago ga Yakobbo abaatiina e Misiri bosibosi baali sanvu.
46.28: Nga Yakobbo atuma Yuda eyiri Yosefu ohumuŋa endagiriro eyitiina e Goseni. Ni boola mu twale lyʼe Goseni,
46.29: nga Yosefu aŋamba ehigaali hihye, atiina mu Goseni ohwagaanana Yisirayiri semwana. Yosefu ni gahubba emoni hu semwana ati bbepa, gatiina gamugwa mu hifuba, ngʼalira ohuhena ehiseera ehyene ehireeŋi olwʼesangaalo.
46.30: Oluvanyuma, nga Yisirayiri aloma Yosefu ati, “Ŋaahani nʼolu fa nefiira olwohuba kuweene nʼemoni jange nabona ti ohiiri mulamu.”
46.31: Ngʼaŋo Yosefu aloma abaganda babe nʼabaatu abandi abaatiina e Misiri ni semwana ati, “Nahatiine eyiri Falaawo mulome ti, ‘Abaganda bange nʼabaatu abandi abaajire ni Bbaabba ababaaye ni bamenya mu hyalo hyʼe Kanani, bajire ohumenya eno ni neese.
46.32: Abaatu abo baayi bʼebyayo era bajire nʼebyayo ko nʼebiitu byawe byosibyosi.’
46.33: Falaawo nʼabalanga gababuusa ati, ‘Muhola mirimo hi?’
46.34: Mumugobolangamo muuti, ‘Efe abeedu babo huli baayi byʼebyayo ohuŋwa mu buŋere weefe hyʼabasehulu beefe ngʼolu baali.’ Ehyo hiija humuleetera ohubaleha mumenye mu twale lyʼe Goseni olwohuba Abamisiri benyinyalya abaayi.”

47.1: Nga Yosefu atiina alomera Falaawo ati, “Bbaabba gajire ohuŋwa e Kanani nʼabaganda bange nʼebyayo byawe ko nʼebiitu byawe byosibyosi era bali e Goseni.”
47.2: Era gatobolamo hu baganda babe bataanu ngʼabaŋira ewa Falaawo.
47.3: Nga Falaawo abuusa abaganda babe abo ati, “Muhola mirimo hi?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Efe abeedu babo huli baayi hya basehulu beefe.”
47.4: Nga bamuloma baati, “Hujire ohubaaho eno olwohuba enjala yʼamaani e Kanani era ebyayo byefe biŋuma nʼenyaasi eryʼohwaya. Huhusunga otufugiirire humenye mu twale lyʼe Goseni.”
47.5: Nga Falaawo aloma Yosefu ati, “Lataawo nʼabaganda babo bajire eyi oli,
47.6: egwanga lyʼe Misiri liri mu mihono jijo, leha lataawo nʼabaganda babo beehale mu twale erihira obulaŋi. Hababe e Goseni. Nʼoba nʼomanyire mulala hu bo ali nʼomuhono ogwohwaya, muŋe alabirirenga ebyayo byange.”
47.7: Ngʼaŋo Yosefu aŋira Yakobbo semwana eyiri Falaawo. Yakobbo nʼahenire ohuheesa Falaawo nʼohumusabira ekabi,
47.8: nga Falaawo amubuusa ati, “Oli nʼemyaha jinga?”
47.9: Nga Yakobbo agobola mu Falaawo ati, “Kenire emyaha cikumi nʼadatu ni senguujuha mu hyalo muno. Emyaha jange mitono era ja bigosi aye sijoola hu myaha ja basehulu bange abaali abagendi.”
47.10: Nga Yakobbo asabira Falaawo ekabi ahena aŋwaŋo atiina.
47.11: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Yosefu aŋamba semwana nʼabaganda babe abaŋa eroba mu twale lyʼe Lameseesi erihirayo obulaŋi mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri bamenyamo ngʼolu Falaawo galagira.
47.12: Nga Yosefu aŋa semwana nʼabaganda babe ko nʼabaatu aba gaali ni nabo emere ohusizira hu bungi wʼabaana baawe. Enjala ebitiirira hu hyalo
47.13: Mu hiseera ehyo, ŋaali ŋaŋumaŋo mere mu hyalo hyosihyosi olwohuba enjala yaali nyingi bugali.
47.14: Nga Yosefu ahumbaania ebbeesa josijosi ejaali mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri nomu Kanani eji batundanga mu ngaano ngʼajiŋira mu lubiri lwa Falaawo.
47.15: Abaatu bʼe Misiri nʼe Kanani ni batambisa ebbeesa jaawe josijosi jabaŋwaho, batiina eyiri Yosefu bamuloma baati, “Muhulu, tuŋe emere. Otatuleha hufa enjala. Ebbeesa jituŋoyeeho.”
47.16: Nga Yosefu abaloma ati, “Ngʼolu bbeesa jibaŋoyeho, ŋahani muleete ebyayo byenywe mbaŋemo emere.”
47.17: Nga bamuŋirira embalaasi nʼetaama nʼeŋombe ni nasugirya jaawe, abaŋamo emere. Ngʼomwaha ogwo gaaja abaŋa emere mu byayo byawe byosibyosi.
47.18: Omwaha ogwo ni gwaŋwaho, nga nindi abaatu batiina eyiri Yosefu omwaha ogwalondaho bamuloma baati, “Sihuŋanga hwehweherera musengwa yeefe, mu butuufu oweene ebbeesa jatuŋwaho nʼebyayo byefe byosibyosi ŋahani bibyo. Ŋahani huŋuma hiitu hyosihyosi ohutusaho emibiri nʼamaloba geefe.
47.19: Huhusunga otatuleha hufa enjala hulehe aŋo amaloba geefe. Tugule era ogule nʼamaloba geefe otuŋemo emere. Efe huja hufuuha beedu ba Falaawo nʼamaloba geefe gafuuhe gage. Tuŋe emere hwahaŋona enjala, amaloba geefe gatasigala aŋo ni muŋumamo muutu.”
47.20: Olwʼenjala ohubitiirira mu gwange lyʼe Misiri, abaatu bagusa Yosefu amaloba gaawe, nga gafuuha ga Falaawo. Hiisi Mumisiri gaali nʼohutunda eroba lirye olwʼenjala, ngʼeroba lifuuha lya Falaawo.
47.21: Nga Yosefu afuula abaatu beedu ohuŋwa hu salo lyʼe gwanga lyʼe Misiri ohwola hu yindi.
47.22: Aye sigagula loba lyʼabasengi olwohuba basunanga omugabo ohuŋwa ewa Falaawo era balinga nʼemere eyibahena. Ehyo nje hyagira ndibatunda byawe.
47.23: Nga Yosefu aloma abaatu ati, “Ale ŋahani ngʼolu mbagulire, muli baatu ba Falaawo nʼeroba lyenywe lyosiryosi lya Falaawo. Owumo mbobuno muje muhome.
47.24: Aye ni mugesa emere, muli nʼohuŋa Falaawo hirala ehyohutaano, efikaho esigale yenywe nʼabaana benywe ko nʼabaatu abamenya ni nenywe.”
47.25: Ngʼabaatu bamugobolamo baati, “Muhulu hufugiirira ohuba beedu ba Falaawo olwohuba obaaye wahyere eyi huli otuŋonisye ohufa enjala.”
47.26: Nga Yosefu ahitaŋo ngʼegambi mu gwanga lya Misiri nʼohwosa hatyane ti hirala ehyohutaano ehyʼamakungula bya Falaawo. Eroba lyʼabasengi lyoŋene njeritafuuha lya Falaawo.
47.27: Nga Abayisirayiri bamenya mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri mu twale lyʼe Goseni. Basuna obuŋinda era hiisi ehi baŋambangaho hyalimo ehyasa era beyongera obungi bugali.
47.28: Nga Yakobbo ahena emyaha ehumi namusanvu mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri. Nga ŋalala ŋosiŋosi aba nʼemyaha cikumi ane namusanvu.
47.29: Ehiseera ni hyali huupi ohwola Yisirayiri ohufa, galanga omusaani wuwe Yosefu ngʼamuloma ati, “Pambire ehisa ote omuhono gugwo ŋaasi wʼehisambi hyange, olayire oti oja hundaga ehyere era obe mwesigwa eyi ndi mutasiiha mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri.
47.30: Aye ni fanga, wungeganga watusa e Misiri, wapira wasiiha ŋalala nʼabaatu bange.” Nga Yosefu amugobolamo ati, “Nja huhola ngʼolu olomire.”
47.31: Nga Yisirayiri amuloma ati, “Layira oti oja huhola ngʼolu oli husuubisa.” Ngʼaŋo Yosefu amulayirira. Nga Yisirayiri gediira hu muhoomero gugwe ajumirya Hatonda.

48.1: Oluvanyuma lwʼendaalo sinyingi, balomera Yosefu baati, “Lataawo mulwaye bugali.” Ngʼaŋo Yosefu atiina nʼabasaani babe bombi Manase nʼEfulayimu ohubona semwana.
48.2: Ni balomera Yakobbo baati, “Omusaani wuwo Yosefu gajire ohuhubona,” Yisirayiri gahahamuha gehala hu hitanda.
48.3: Nga Yakobbo aloma Yosefu ati, “Hatonda Omwene Buŋangi gambonehera e Luuzi mu gwanga lyʼe Kanani, nga gaapa ekabi,
48.4: aloma ati, ‘Nja huhwasa ni ngalamya olusaaye lulwo. Nja hufuula olusaaye lulwo ohuba amawanga mangi era ndibaŋa ehyalo hino ohuba obutaka emirembe nʼemirembe.’
48.5: Ŋaahani abasaani babo bombi Efulayimu ni Manase, aba wasaalira mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri muno, ni kiiri huuja baaja hufuuha bange. Abaana abo Efulayimu ni Manase baaja hufuuha bange ngʼolu Lubbeeni ni Simyoni baali baana bange.
48.6: Abaana abawasaala oluvanyuma, baaja huba babo era baaja husuna emiŋuluho ohuŋwa hu bahyawe abo ababiri.
48.7: Kola hino olwʼehyo ehyola hu maawo Lakeeli. Ni naali ni pwa e Padani, ehyʼenaku nga gafiiraho mu ngira mu hyalo hyʼe Kanani ni ŋahiiriŋo ahanaaŋiro ohwola Efulaasi. Kale nga musiiha eyo hu engira eyitiina e Efulaasi” (nje Bbeserekemu).
48.8: Yisirayiri ni gabona abasaani ba Yosefu, ngʼabuusa ati, “Bano baana bʼani?”
48.9: Nga Yosefu agobolamo mu semwana ati, “Bano njʼabaana aba Hatonda gaapera ŋano.” Nga Yisirayiri amuloma ati, “Baleete ŋano mbasabire ekabi.”
48.10: Emoni ja Yisirayiri jaali sijibona bulaŋi olwʼobusahulu. Nga Yosefu abegeresa ŋaapi ni semwana, Ngʼaŋo Yisirayiri abagwa mu hifuba abafumbeerera.
48.11: Nga Yisirayiri aloma Yosefu ati, “Naali sipeega ti nja huhubonaho nindi. Ne Hatonda gapaaye ekabi naabona nohu lusaaye lulwo lwosi.”
48.12: Nga Yosefu abatusa mu magulu ga sehulu yaawe geyala hwiroba mu moni jije.
48.13: Nga Yosefu abaŋamba bombi, Efulayimu amuluŋamya hu muhono gwa Yisirayiri omugooda. Era ngʼaŋamba Manase mu muhono gugwe omugooda amuluŋamya hu muhono gwa Yisirayiri omulungi.
48.14: Aye Yisirayiri gajanula emihono ni jibitangeene, gaŋamba omuhono gugwe omulungi gaguta hu mutwe gwʼEfulayimu owaali omuŋere aye ngʼaŋamba omuhono gugwe omugooda aguta hu mutwe gwa Manase owaali omudaayi.
48.15: Ngʼasabira Yosefu ekabi ati, “Hatonda wʼabasehulu bange Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka, mu bulamu waawe bagendanga ngʼolu genda, Hatonda owundabiriiye ohuŋwa obuŋere wange wosiwosi ohwola hatyane,
48.16: Malayika oyo owununuuye mu bigosi byosibyosi, aŋe abaseere bano ekabi. Abaatu bakebulirenga era bahebulirenga ni Yisaka Bbaabba ni Yibbulayimu sehulu yange olwʼabaseere bano, basalagane ekasi nʼesinde beyongere era baale hu hyalo.”
48.17: Yosefu ni gabona semwana nʼataaye omuhono gugwe omulungi hu mutwe gwʼEfulayimu, sihyamusangaasa. Olwʼehyo, gaŋamba omuhono gwa semwana omulungi ni genda agutuse hu mutwe gwʼEfulayimu agute hu mutwe gwa Manase.
48.18: Nga Yosefu aloma semwana ati, “Bbe, Bbaabba, Manase njʼomudaayi, ŋamba omuhono gugwo omulungi ogute hu mutwe gugwe.”
48.19: Aye semwana gagaana gaaloma ati, “Manyire, mwana wange, manyire. Yeesi alifuuha gwanga era yeesi aliba muhulu. Ne mugandawe omuŋere alimuhira era abejuhulu babe balifuuha mawanga mangi.”
48.20: Yisirayiri gabasabira ekabi hu ludaalo olwo ati, “Abayisirayiri banasabenga ekabi ni baloma baati, ‘Hatonda ahufuule hyʼEfulayimu ni Manase.’ ” Kale mu hubasabira ekabi, gatangirisa Efulayimu mu hifo hya Manase.
48.21: Nga Yisirayiri aloma Yosefu ati, “Ese ndi huupi hufa aye Hatonda anaabenga ŋalala ni nenywe era alibagobosayo mu hyalo hya basehulu benywe.
48.22: Era ewe ndiiwe oyu paaye eroba eryomu twale lyʼe Sekemu eri nasuna olu nasoosa Abamooli nʼepiima nʼobusaale. Omugabo gugwo guli nʼohuhira ogwabahyo.”

49.1: Ngʼaŋo Yakobbo alanga abasaani babe abaloma ati, “Muhumbaane mbalomere ebiribabaho mu biseera ebiija mu moni.
49.2: “Muhumbaane, muŋulire, enywe abasaani ba Yakobbo. Muŋulire ehi senywe Yisirayiri aloma.
49.3: “Lubbeeni, ndiiwe namudaayi wange, ndiiwe oweeta amaseere gange, eŋono nʼamaani gago gahira aga bosibosi.
49.4: Ewe otabuha hyʼamaaji agabanda, sooja huba wʼeŋono olwohuba waniina hu hitanda hya lataawo, hu buliri wange wawonoona, waŋenyuha nʼomuhasi wange.
49.5: “Simyoni ni Leevi baganda, epiima jaawe bisoosa ebisihiirisa.
49.6: Sinja hubeŋimbaho mu huteesa hwawe, sinja huba mu luhiiho lwawe, olwʼetima lyawe beeta abasinde, era balemasa eŋombe ebunwa ohwenda ohwesangaasa.
49.7: Obusungu waawe buholimirwe, olwohuba bungi, obuhambwe waawe obuleeta olusisimo. Ndi sasaania abejuhulu babo mu Yisirayiri mwosimwosi.
49.8: “Ewe Yuda, abaganda babo baja huhutendanga, banahuhubbirenga amafuha, olwohuba oja huŋangula abalabe babo.
49.9: Mwana wange Yuda oli musira hyʼepologoma, eyigobola ohuŋwa mu huŋiima. Mwana wange Yuda oli musira hyʼepologoma, njʼani ahusagadula?
49.10: Esimbo yʼowaami siyija huŋwa mu ngalo ya Yuda, oba esimbo yʼobuŋugi ohuŋwa mu ngalo yʼabejuhulu babe, ohwola olu omweneeyo aliija ohuyiŋira oyo oyu baatu bosibosi mu hyalo baligondera.
49.11: Emizabbibbu jije jiryama bugali, jiryama goola nʼohujirobbaho nasugirya era alyosa engoye mu mwenge omutwahaali ogwomu mizabbibbu.
49.12: Emoni jije jiritwahaala ohuhiraho omwenge gwʼemizabbibbu, nʼameeno gage galiba mahosa hyʼamabeere.
49.13: “Zebbulooni aja humenya hu gobo lyʼenyanja, eyo hu mwalo eyi amaato gagobera. Esalo yiye eja huba yi Sidoni.
49.14: “Yisikaali ali hya nasugirya eyʼamaani, egalamira ŋagati wʼemigugu ne ni tasobola hwenyoha.
49.15: Cooka nʼabona ehifo ehi ali huŋuumuliramo ni hiri hiraŋi era ni hyesiimisa, agonda bamutwiha emigugu, gaahola owiidu.
49.16: “Ewe Daani oja hulamulanga abaatu babo nʼotehubbira, nga hirala hu biha bya Yisirayiri.
49.17: Daani oja huba wahabi hyʼomusota ogweteegire hu tulo wʼoluguudo, hyʼefulugudu hu tulo wʼoluguudo, ebooja ohugulu hwʼembalaasi yesinduha ngʼoyo ayihayeho agwa hinyumanyuma.”
49.18: Ni gahena ngʼalomba ati, “O Musengwa , kusunga wuuje wunoŋole.”
49.19: Nga Yakobbo atiina mu moni nʼohulaamira abaana babe ati, “Ewe Gaadi, ehibinja hyʼabasigu hirihuwaagala, aye olyesoolaho wahibbinga era baduluma ni bataheja nʼegongo.
49.20: “Ewe Aseri, eroba liryo lija huba gimu bugali, abejuhulu babo balimanga emere eyi bahabaha baliryanga.
49.21: “Ewe Nafutaali wuuja huba hyʼemaadu eyetaaya mwisugu era esaala otwana otuboneha obulaŋi.
49.22: “Yosefu oja huba hyʼomuzabbibbu ogwamera hu tulo wʼolwabi, oguleremala nʼamasaga gagwo ganiina gasingaho nʼehiteepe.
49.23: Abalabe babo bahuwaagala nʼobuhambwe owʼamaani, nga ko balasa obusaale nʼehabyo.
49.24: Aye waguma wanywanywasa ehisoosa hihyo, olwohuba Omwene Buŋangi, Hatonda wa Yakobbo, Oyo Amulabirira era Ogubaale omu Yisirayiri geŋogoma,
49.25: Hatonda wa lataawo, gahuyeeda, Hatonda Omwene Buŋangi ahuŋe ekabi, ekabi eja ŋamugulu mwigulu, ekabi ejiŋwa ŋaasi mwiroba, ahuŋe ekabi osaale ekasi nʼesinde era nʼebyayo bibyo bisaalagane.
49.26: Ekabi eji lataawo ali huhuŋa jihiriraho erala ejo ejiŋwa mu sozi, esozi ejibaŋo emirembe nʼemirembe, era eŋingi ejolubeerera ekabi ejo josijosi jibe hu Yosefu olwohuba ewe onaabenga mulangira mu balebe babo.
49.27: “Ŋaahani ewe Bbenjamini oli hya nahinywamalwa, mu mugamba ahafuula ehyaŋiimire era ehyʼegulo gaheneresa ehi asigahiise.”
49.28: Ebyo byosibyosi njʼebiha bya Yisirayiri ehumi nabibiri era ebyo mbebi saawe galomaho nʼabasabira ekabi, hiisi muutu namuŋa ekabi ejimusaanira. Ohufa hwa Yakobbo
49.29: Ngʼaŋo saawe Yakobbo abaloma nʼabahamiirisa ati, “Ndi huupi hufa aye ni fanga, musiihanga ŋalala nʼabasehulu bange mu pungulu eyiri mu hisugu ehyali ehyʼEfulooni Omuhiiti,
49.30: mu pungulu eyiri e Makupeera ŋaapi ni Mamule mu hyalo hyʼe Kanani. Ehisugu ehyo Yibbulayimu gahigula hu Efulooni Omuhiiti ohusiihangamo abaatu babe.
49.31: Ŋaweene aŋo, paŋa baasiiha Yibbulayimu ni Saala omuhasi wuwe, ŋaweene aŋo paŋa baasiiha Yisaka ni Labbeka omuhasi wuwe era aŋo paŋa nasiiha Leeya.
49.32: Ehisugu omuli epungulu eyo, bahigula hu Bahiiti.”
49.33: Yakobbo ni gahena ohulaabbira abasaani nʼebibono ebyo, ngʼadunda amagulu agata hu hitanda gegolola, nga geesa omuuya ogusembayo, ngʼafa.

50.1: Nga Yosefu agwa hu semwana, alira nʼamufumbereeye olwobulumi nʼohwenda ohu gaali nʼamwendamo.
50.2: Nga Yosefu alagira abeedu babe abasaŋu ohuta obulesi hu mulambo gwa semwana Yisirayiri, gutabola. Ngʼabasaŋu abo bahola ngʼolu babalagira.
50.3: Ohuhola hu mulambo gutabola hyaŋiranga endaalo amahumi ane. Era Abamisiri bahena endaalo sanvu ni bamulira. Baŋira omulambo gwa Yakobbo e Kanani
50.4: Endaalo ejʼohumulira ni jaŋwa, nga Yosefu aloma abahungu abaŋa Falaawo amagesi ati, “Ni muba ni mupambirwa ehisa, mundomere Falaawo muuti,
50.5: ‘Bbaabba gandayisa ati, “Ndi huupi hufa era ni fanga wusiihanga mu pungulu eyi nayaba mu gwanga lyʼe Kanani.” Kale kusunga wufugiirire tiine siihe Bbaabba, oluvanyuma ko ngobole.’ ”
50.6: Nga Falaawo amuloma ati, “Tiina osiihe lataawo ngʼolu gahulayisa.”
50.7: Nga Yosefu atiina ohusiiha semwana. Abahungu ba Falaawo bosibosi bamuŋereheraho: abahulu bʼembuga ko nʼabasaaja bahulu mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri nʼabasaaja bahulu abomu nyumba yiye
50.8: nʼabomu mago ga Yosefu bosibosi nʼabaganda babe ni naabo abaali mu mago ga semwana Yakobbo. Abaana baawe abaŋere nʼetaama nʼeŋombe jaawe, ebyo byoŋene njʼebyasigala e Goseni.
50.9: Ebigaali era nabohu mbalaasi boosi bamuŋereheraho ohuja ohusiiha semwana. Ehibinja ehyamuŋerehera hyali hibbala bugali.
50.10: Ni boola mu hifo hyʼAtadi aŋa baasiritiranga engaano, ŋaapi ni Yoludaani, abaatu bahubba enduulu era balira bugali. Nga Yosefu ahena endaalo musanvu nʼahola omukolo gwʼohulira semwana mu hifo ehyo.
50.11: Abakanani abaali ni bamenya mu hitundu ehyo omwali ehifo hyʼAtadi aŋa baasiritiranga engaano, baloma baati, “Abamisiri balirire bugali olwʼenaku.” Cʼehyagira ehifo ehyo ŋaapi ni Yoludaani bahiranga baati Abbiri Mizirayimu.
50.12: Abasaani ba Yakobbo baahola ngʼolu gabalagira:
50.13: nga baŋira omulambo gwa saawe bagusiiha e Kanani mu pungulu mu hisugu hya Makupeera ŋaapi ni Mamule, ehi Yibbulayimu gagula hu Efulooni Omuhiiti ohusiihangamo abaatu babe.
50.14: Yosefu ni gahena ohusiiha semwana, niye nʼabaganda babe ko nʼabaatu abandi bosibosi abaatiina ni naye ohusiiha semwana, baagamayo e Misiri. Yosefu agumya abalebe babe
50.15: Abaganda ba Yosefu ni baabona saawe nʼafuuye, nga baloma baati, “Ŋaahani ngʼolu Bbaabba gahenire ohufa, Yosefu asobola ohwenda ohutwesasusa olwʼehihwamuhola.”
50.16: Ehyaŋwamo nga batuma omuutu eyiri Yosefu baati, “Lataawo ni gaali nʼahiiri hufa, galoma ati,
50.17: ‘Mulomanga Yosefu muuti: Kusunga osoniŋe abaganda babo ebisirisinye ebi bahuhola.’ Ŋahani huhusunga osoniŋe abeedu ba Hatonda wa lataawo.” Ni balomera Yosefu obuhwenda owo, galira amasiga.
50.18: Ngʼabaganda babe batiina bahubba amafuha mu moni jije, bamuloma baati, “Huli beedu babo.”
50.19: Nga Yosefu abaloma ati, “Mutatya. Sindi Hatonda.
50.20: Mwali mwendire ohukosa aye Hatonda gahicuusamo olwʼohwenda ohwoheresa ehiriŋo hatyane, ohuŋonia abaatu bangi.
50.21: Olwʼehyo, mutatya. Nja hubahuuma, enywe nʼabaana benywe.” Ngʼabahahasa ati eŋuma higosi hyosihyosi ehija huboolaho. Era galoma ni nabo nʼeŋoyo. Ohufa hwa Yosefu
50.22: Yosefu gamenya e Misiri nʼabomu mago ga semwana bosibosi. Gawangaala emyaha cikumi mu kumi.
50.23: Yosefu gabona abaana bʼEfulayimu abʼomulembe ogwohudatu. Gabona nʼabaana ba Makiri omusaani wa Manase, aba boosi gabala ohuba baana babe.
50.24: Ehiseera hyola, nga Yosefu aloma abaganda babe ati, “Ese ndi huupi hufa. Aye mu butuufu Hatonda alibanunula gabatusa mu gwanga lino gabaŋira mu hyalo ehi gasuubisa galayirira Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka ni Yakobbo ati aja hubaŋa.”
50.25: Nga Yosefu alayisa abasaani ba Yisirayiri ati, “Hatonda alibanunula era mugeganga amagumba gange mwagatusa mu gwanga lino.”
50.26: Nga Yosefu afa nʼaŋesa emyaha cikumi mu kumi. Nga bamuhalirira bamuta mu sanduuku e Misiri.

1.1: Yakobbo oyu baali ni balanga erindi baati Yisirayiri ko nʼabasaani babe baatiina e Misiri, hiisi muutu nʼabomu mago gage. Era abasaani abo baali nje
1.2: Lubbeeni ni Simyoni ni Leevi ni Yuda
1.3: ni Yisikaali ni Zebbulooni ni Bbenjamini
1.4: ni Daani ni Nafutaali ni Gaadi ko nʼAseri.
1.5: Abaatu bosibosi abʼolulyo lwa Yakobbo baali sanvu. Mu hiseera ehyo, Yosefu gaali amenyire e Misiri.
1.6: Oluvanyuma, nga Yosefu nʼabalebe babe ko nʼabaatu abandi bosibosi abomu mulembe ogwo, baŋwa ohufa.
1.7: Aye Abayisirayiri basaala era beyongera obungi bugali, nga bejula ehyalo hyʼe Goseni.
1.8: Ngʼaŋo Falaawo omunyaha, owaali nʼatamanyire hyosihyosi ehyali ni hiŋamba hu Yosefu, gehala hu tebe yʼobuŋugi wʼegwanga lyʼe Misiri.
1.9: Nga Falaawo oyo aloma abaatu babe Abamisiri ati, “Bahyange mwetegerese hino ehi njahubalomera, Abayisirayiri beyongeeye obungi bugali era bʼamaani ohutuhira.
1.10: Olwʼehyo, hubasalire amagesi, ni hitali cʼehyo baja hweyongera obungi era singa ŋabaaŋo olutalo baja hweŋimba nʼabalabe beefe batusoosa nga bahena bedulumiraŋo.”
1.11: Olwʼehyo, baabataho abanyapala ohubanyigirisa nʼemirimo emigumu, batongolera Falaawo ebibuga ebi balanganga baati Pisomu ni Lameseesi, ebyohubungangamo ebiitu.
1.12: Aye Abamisiri aŋa bahomya ohunyigirisa Abayisirayiri, paŋa Abayisirayiri bahoma ohweyongera obungi nʼohuhwana mu gwanga eryo. Abamisiri beesinya Abayisirayiri
1.13: era babagudya bugali.
1.14: Abamisiri bahalubya obulamu wʼAbayisirayiri ni babatambisanga emirimo emigumu ejʼohuhubba amatafaali nʼohuholanga mu ndimiro nomu mago. Nga babatambisa byosibyosi ni batabasaasira.
1.15: Nga habaha wʼe Misiri aloma abasaŋu abahasi Ababbebbulaniya abasaalisa, aba baali ni balanga baati Sifura ni Puuwa ati,
1.16: “Ni mubanga ni musaalisa abahasi Ababbebbulaniya, ne mwabona omwana nʼali museere, mumwitanga. Aye nʼabanga muhaana, mumulehanga.”
1.17: Aye abasaŋu abasaalisa abo, baaŋa Hatonda eŋono, sibahola ngʼolu habaha wʼe Misiri gaali nʼabalagiiye, sibeeta baana abaseere.
1.18: Ngʼaŋo habaha wʼe Misiri atumisa bamulangira abasaalisa abo ababuusa ati, “Lwahiina muleha abaana abaseere baaba balamu?”
1.19: Ngʼabasaalisa bagobola mu Falaawo baati, “Abahasi Ababbebbulaniya sibali hya bahasi Abamisiri, olwohuba nibo bali nʼamaani, aŋa abasaalisa baboleraho, baba bahenire hale ohwesaalira.”
1.20: Nga Hatonda aŋa abasaŋu abasaalisa abo ekabi era Abayisirayiri beyongera hweyongera ohwala.
1.21: Era olwohuba abasaŋu abasaalisa baaŋa Hatonda eŋono, gaabaŋa amago.
1.22: Ngʼaŋo Falaawo aŋa abaatu babe bosibosi ehiragiro ati, “Hiisi mwana omuseere Omubbebbulaniya oyu basaala, mumudanyanga mu lwabi Kiyira, ne omwana omuhaana mumulehanga gabaŋo mulamu.”

2.1: Lulala, omusinde owomu hiha hya Leevi gaŋira omuhasi yeesi owomu lulyo lwa Leevi.
2.2: Ngʼomuhasi oyo aba hida, asaala omwana museere. Ni gabona omwana nʼali muŋoono, gamuhweha emyesi edatu.
2.3: Aye ni gabona nʼataŋanga hweyongera ohumuhweha, gaŋamba ehisero ehi baluha mu mafunjo, ngʼahiŋahaho obudobo. Ngʼaŋo ataamo omwana oyo, ahena ahiŋamba ahita mu masati hwigenya wʼolwabi Kiyira.
2.4: Nga mboojo yʼomwana oyo gemeerera ni gesambireho, abone ehinamwoleho.
2.5: Ngʼaŋo omuhaana wa Falaawo geehirira atiina hu lwabi Kiyira ohusaaba, nʼabeedu babe baali bagendera hu hwigenya wʼolwabi ni naye. Ni baali ni bagenda, ngʼabona ehisero mu masati ngʼatuma omwidu wuwe ahinaaŋe ahimuŋirire.
2.6: Ni gahifunuhula, gaali aheja abona omwana. Omwana oyo gaali alihulira. Ngʼehisa himuŋambira omwana oyo. Ngʼaloma ati, “Ono mulala hu baana Ababbebbulaniya.”
2.7: Ngʼaŋo mboojo yʼomwana oyo abuusa omuhaana wa Falaawo ati, “Tiine kulangire omuhasi Omubbebbulaniya ahwokehese omwana oyo?”
2.8: Ngʼamugobolamo ati, “Tiina omuleete.” Omuhaana gatiina gamuleetera omuhasi nyina yʼomwana.
2.9: Ngʼomuhaana wa Falaawo aloma omuhasi oyo ati, “Ŋira omwana ono omunjokehese, nja huhuŋanga omuhemba.” Ngʼomuhasi oyo aŋira omwana, amuhuuma.
2.10: Omwana oyo ni gahula, ngʼamuŋamba amuŋirira omuhaana wa Falaawo, ngʼafuuha musaani wuwe, ngʼamutaho esiina ati Musa olwohuba galoma ati, “Namutusa mu maaji.” Musa adulumira e Midiyaani
2.11: Lulala, oluvanyuma lwa Musa ohuhula, gatiina eyaali abalebe babe Ababbebbulaniya, ngʼabona ngʼolu Bamisiri baali ni babanyigirisa. Ngʼabona Omumisiri nʼahubba Omubbebbulaniya, mulala hu bʼegwanga lirye.
2.12: Musa ni gaheja enjuyi nʼenjuyi, ngʼabona ni ŋaŋuma muutu, gaŋamba Omumisiri gamwita, ngʼahena amwoŋeraho omujehe.
2.13: Ni wahya, Musa ni gaali nʼagenda genda, ngʼabona abasinde Ababbebbulaniya babiri ni basoola, ngʼaloma oyo owaali omusobya ati, “Hiina ehi ohubbira Omubbebbulaniya wahyo?”
2.14: Ngʼomusinde oyo amugobolamo ati, “Njʼani owahufuula omuhulu era omulamuzi weefe? Keesi wenda hunjita ngʼolu weetire Omumisiri?” Musa ni gaŋulira, gatya ngʼaloma mu mwoyo gugwe ati, “Abaatu bamanyire ehi naholire!”
2.15: Falaawo ni gaŋulira ehi Musa gahola, genda ohumwita yeesi. Aye Musa gaduluma ngʼatiina e Midiyaani. Ni goola, gatiina gehala hu sobere.
2.16: Mu hiseera ehyo, omusengi wʼe Midiyaani gaali nʼabahaana musanvu, abatiinanga ohudaŋa amaaji, bejusa ebiitu ebyʼohunywehesamo etaama nʼembusi ja saawe.
2.17: Abaayi bʼetaama nʼembusi batiina nga babbinga abahaana abo. Aye Musa genyoha gabayeeda, ganywesa ebyayo byawe.
2.18: Abahaana abo ni baagamayo eyiri Ruweeli saawe, gabaloma ati, “Nga mugaluhire mangu olwa leero!”
2.19: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Ŋaliŋo Omumisiri atuyeedire gatuŋonia abaayi abatutaganyanga era gaadaŋa amaaji, ganywesa ebyayo byefe.”
2.20: Nga Ruweeli abuusa abahaana babe ati, “Ali ŋeena? Lwahiina mumulehireeyo? Mutiine mumulange, anyweho amaaji.”
2.21: Ngʼaŋo Musa afugiirira ohumenya ni Ruweeli owamuŋa omuhaana wuwe oyu balanganga baati Zipola, ohuba omuhasi wuwe.
2.22: Nga Zipola asaala omwana museere, nga Musa amutaho esiina ati nje Girisomu olwohuba ati, “Mbaye mubuli mu gwanga eritali lyange.”
2.23: Ni ŋabitaŋo emyaha, nga habaha wʼe Misiri afa. Abayisirayiri basigala ni bahibinda olwʼowiidu obu baalimo. Nga balira era ohulira hwawe olwʼowiidu nga hwolera Hatonda.
2.24: Hatonda gaŋulira ohubinda hwawe ngʼahebulira endagaano yiye eyi gahola ni Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka ni Yakobbo.
2.25: Nga Hatonda abona ohugada hwʼAbayisirayiri, gabaŋambira ehisa.

3.1: Lulala, Musa ni geemera ebyayo bya Yesero semwana yʼomuhasi wuwe era omusengi wʼe Midiyaani, gatiina ŋaleeŋi eyo mu lulafu, nga goola e Horebbu hu lusozi lwa Hatonda.
3.2: Nga malayika wa Musengwa amubonehera mu hifaananyi hyʼahadeŋo ahaali ni haaduha omuliro. Musa gabona ahadeŋo ni haaduha omuliro aye ni hataguguliha.
3.3: Nga Musa aloma mu mwoyo gugwe ati, “Hino hyeŋunjisa, leha nigerere mbone ehiitu hino, lwahiina ahadeŋo sihaguhuliha.”
3.4: Musengwa ni gabona Musa ni gegereeye ohubona ehyali ni hitiina mu moni, nga Hatonda nʼali mu hadeŋo amulanga ati, “Musa, Musa!” Nga Musa amugobolamo ati, “Wanji.”
3.5: Nga Hatonda amuloma ati, “Otegeerera eno. Tusamo engayito olwohuba ehifo aŋa wemereeye, hyawufu.”
3.6: Ngʼaŋo ameedaho ati, “Ndiise Hatonda wa lataawo, Hatonda wa Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka era ni Yakobbo.” Musa ni gaŋulira ebibono ebyo, gewiiha mu moni olwohuba gatya nʼohuheja hu Hatonda.
3.7: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Mu butuufu mbwene ohubonaabona hwʼabaatu bange abali e Misiri era puliiye ohulira hwawe ni basunga ohubaŋonia abanyapala abo ababatambisa ngʼabeedu. Era manyire enaku yaawe.
3.8: Olwʼehyo, nihire ohubaŋonia obuŋugi wʼAbamisiri nʼohubatusa mu gwanga eryo, mbaŋire mu hyalo ehituluha amabeere nʼomudugere, hatyane ehirimo Abakanani nʼAbahiiti nʼAbamooli nʼAbapereezi nʼAbahiivi ko nʼAbayebbusi.
3.9: Hituufu, ohulira hwʼAbayisirayiri hwolire eyi ndi era mbwene engeri eyi Bamisiri babatulugunyamo.
3.10: Olwʼehyo, kutuma e Misiri eyiri Falaawo, otuseyo abaatu bange Abayisirayiri.”
3.11: Aye Musa galoma Hatonda ati, “Ndiise ani ohutiina eyiri Falaawo ohutusa Abayisirayiri e Misiri?”
3.12: Nga Hatonda amugobolamo ati, “Nja huba ŋalala ni neewe. Era hano njʼahaja ohuba ahabonero ohuhahasa haati ndiise ahutumire: Nʼohenire ohutusa abaatu abo e Misiri, mulijumirya Hatonda hu lusozi luno.”
3.13: Ngʼaŋo Musa aloma Hatonda ati, “Singa tiina eyiri Abayisirayiri nga mbaloma ati, ‘Hatonda wa basehulu benywe gaatumire eyi muli,’ nga bambuusa baati, ‘Esiina lirye njʼani?’ Ndibaloma tye?”
3.14: Nga Hatonda aloma Musa ati, “Ndiise NDI. Oli nʼohulomera Abayisirayiri oti, ‘NDI gaatumire eyi muli.’ ”
3.15: Galoma Musa ati, “Loma Abayisirayiri oti, ‘ Musengwa Hatonda wʼabasehulu benywe, Hatonda wa Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka ni Yakobbo, gaatumire eyi muli.’ Eryo njʼesiina lyange eri bali nʼohukebuliriraho emirembe nʼemirembe.
3.16: Tiina ohumbaanie abatangirisi bʼAbayisirayiri obalome oti, ‘ Musengwa Hatonda wʼabasehulu benywe, Hatonda wa Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka ni Yakobbo, gamboneheeye nga gandoma niije eyi muli mbalome ti, “Mbwene ebi babaholire e Misiri.
3.17: Era salireeŋo ohubatusa e Misiri mu hyalo ehyohubonaabona, mbaŋire mu hyalo ehituluha amabeere nʼomudugere omuli Abakanani nʼAbahiiti nʼAbamooli nʼAbapereezi nʼAbahiivi nʼAbayebbusi.”
3.18: “ ‘Abatangirisi bʼAbayisirayiri baja huhuŋulirisa. Era ewe nʼabatangirisi abo mutiine eyiri habaha wʼe Misiri mumulome muuti, “ Musengwa Hatonda wʼAbabbebbulaniya gaatubonehera. Olwʼehyo, tufugiirire hutiine mu lugendo olwʼendaalo edatu mu lulafu, huŋeyo eŋongo eyiri Musengwa Hatonda weefe.”
3.19: Aye manyire ti habaha wʼe Misiri saaja hubafugiirira hutiina ne nja humuŋagia.
3.20: Olwʼehyo, nja hutambisa obuŋangi wange ohuhola ebyamaliholiho e Misiri ohuyiboneresa. Oluvanyuma lwʼebyo, aja hubafugiirira ohutiina.
3.21: “ ‘Era nja hufuula abaatu bange bahoda mu moni jʼAbamisiri, konyo ni muba ni muŋwa e Misiri, mutaŋwayo nʼengalo njereere.
3.22: Hiisi muhasi Omuyisirayiri atiine eyiri omuhasi wahye Omumisiri muliranwawe, nʼeyiri omuhasi ali ewʼOmumisiri, amusunge efeeza nʼezaabbu ko nʼengoye mujiŋe abaana benywe abaseere nʼabahaana. Mu ngeri eyo muja huŋira obuŋinda bwʼAbamisiri.’ ”

4.1: Oluvanyuma, nga Musa aloma Hatonda ati, “Aye singa sibafugiirira oba ohuŋuliirisa ehi mbaloma, ni baloma baati ‘ Musengwa sigahubonehera!’ ”
4.2: Nga Musengwa amubuusa ati, “Hiina ehi oŋambire mu ngalo?” Nga Musa amugobolamo ati, “Simbo.”
4.3: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa amuloma ati, “Yidanye ŋaasi.” Nga Musa ayidanya ŋaasi nga yifuuha temu, ayiduluma.
4.4: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Yiŋambe omuhira.” Nga Musa aŋamba etemu eyo, nga yifuuha simbo.
4.5: Nga Musengwa amuloma ati, “Oholanga ahabonero aho basobole ohufugiirira baati Musengwa Hatonda wa basehulu baawe, Hatonda wa Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka ni Yakobbo, gahwehwehulira.”
4.6: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa amuloma ati, “Yingisa omuhono gugwo mu lugoye.” Nga Musa gengisa omuhono gugwe mu lugoye. Ni gagutusamo, gwaliho ebigenge era ni guli muhosa hyʼamabaale gʼefula.
4.7: Nga Hatonda amuloma ati, “Yagamya omuhono gugwo mu lugoye.” Nga Musa agwagamyamo. Ni gagutusamo, gwali gutereeye ni guli hyʼebitundu ebindi ebyʼomubiri gugwe.
4.8: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Ni batahafugiirire olwʼehyamaliholiho ehisooka, baja hufugiirira olwʼehyohubiri.
4.9: Aye banagaana ohufugiirira olwʼebyamaliholiho ebyo byombi, odaŋanga amaaji agomu lwabi Kiyira wahena wagajuha hu woomu. Amaaji ago gaja hufuuha mafugi.”
4.10: Ngʼaŋo Musa aloma Musengwa ati, “O Musengwa , ohuŋwa hale simanyire huloma bulaŋi era sicuuhangaho ohuŋwa olu waloma ni nange omwidu wuwo. Ese simanyire huloma bulaŋi era ndi nʼenguguma.”
4.11: Nga Musengwa amubuusa ati, “Njʼani ahola omuutu gahena gaamutaho omunwa? Njʼani amufuula ataloma oba omusiŋa? Era njʼani amuŋa emoni eji bona oba amuleetera ohuba omuŋofu? Sindiise Musengwa ?
4.12: Olwʼehyo, tiina, nja huhuyeeda ohuloma era nja huhuŋa ehyʼohuloma.”
4.13: Aye Musa gamugobolamo ati, “O Musengwa, kusunga otume omuutu owundi.”
4.14: Ehyo hyaleetera Musengwa ohuluŋira Musa, ngʼamuloma ati, “Obona otye omulebe wuwo oyu balanga baati Alooni Omuleevi? Manyire ti asobola ohuloma bulaŋi. Alihuuja musaŋanaane era hinamusangaase ohuhubona.
4.15: Olwʼehyo, onaalome ni naye, omulomere ehyohuhola. Nja hubayeeda mwembi era nja hubasomesanga ehyʼohuhola.
4.16: Alooni aja huloma nʼabaatu hu lulwo era aja huba oti munwa gugwo eyiri abaatu era weesi oja huba oti Hatonda eyi ali.
4.17: Aye tiina nʼesimbo eyo, oyitambise ohuhola ebyamaliholiho.” Musa agobolayo e Misiri
4.18: Ngʼaŋo Musa agobolayo eyiri Yesero semwana yʼomuhasi wuwe ngʼamuloma ati, “Kusunga naagame e Misiri eyiri abaganda bange, mbone oba bahiiri balamu.” Nga Yesero agobolamo mu Musa ati, “Tiina miyaaya.”
4.19: Musa ni gaali nʼahiiri e Midiyaani, Musengwa gaali amulomire ati, “Yagamayo e Misiri olwohuba abo bosibosi abaali ni benda ohuhwita, bafuuye baŋooyeŋo.”
4.20: Kale Musa gaŋamba omuhasi nʼabasaani babe gabata hu nasugirya nga gagamayo mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri. Era gaŋamba esimbo ya Hatonda ngʼatiina ni nayo.
4.21: Nga Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Ŋaahani olihwagamayo e Misiri, oholanga ebyamaliholiho byosibyosi ebi kuŋaaye obuŋangi ohuholera mu moni ja Falaawo. Aye nja huhahanyasa omwoyo gugwe ohutafugiirira abaatu bange hutiina.
4.22: Olomanga Falaawo oti, ‘ Musengwa aloma ati, Yisirayiri njʼomusaani wange omudaayi.
4.23: Nahuloma ti “Leha musaani yange atiine ganjumirye.” Aye ogaana ohumuleha atiine. Olwʼehyo, nja hwita omusaani wuwo omudaayi.’ ”
4.24: Musa nʼamago gage ni baali mu lugendo ni batiina e Misiri, baŋenyuha aŋaatu nga Musengwa amwagaana era gaali huupi amwite.
4.25: Ngʼaŋo Zipola muha Musa aŋamba ebaale eryogi, ahomola omusaani waawe. Ngʼadanya ehigode ehyo hu magulu ga Musa, amuloma ati, “Mu butuufu oli wamwange owʼamafugi!”
4.26: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aleha Musa. (Mu hiseera ehyo ehi muhasi wuwe galomeramo ati, “wamwange owʼamafugi,” gaali ategeesa ohuhomola.)
4.27: Nga Musengwa aloma Alooni ati, “Tiina mu lulafu wagaanane ni Musa.” Ngʼatiina amwagaana hu lusozi lwa Hatonda era ngʼamugwa mu hifuba.
4.28: Ngʼaŋo Musa alomera Alooni byosibyosi ebi Musengwa gamuloma nʼebyamaliholiho byosibyosi ebi gamulagira ohuhola.
4.29: Nga Musa nʼAlooni batiina bahumbaania abatangirisi bosibosi abʼAbayisirayiri.
4.30: Nga Alooni abalomera byosibyosi ebi Musengwa galoma Musa. Era Musa gahola ebyamaliholiho mu moni jʼabaatu abo,
4.31: ngʼabatangirisi bafugiirira. Era ni baŋulira baati Musengwa gaali afaayo hu bulamu waawe era ati gaali aja hubanunula, bahubba amafuha bamujumirya.

5.1: Lulala, nga Musa nʼAlooni batiina eyiri Falaawo bamuloma baati, “ Musengwa Hatonda wʼAbayisirayiri aloma ati, ‘Leha abaatu bange batiine banyiiye embaga mu lulafu ohuupa eŋono.’ ”
5.2: Nga Falaawo ababuusa ati, “ Musengwa wenywe oyo njʼani oyu ndi nʼohugondera fugiirire Abayisirayiri ohutiina? Simanyire hiitu hyosihyosi ehiŋamba hu Musengwa oyo era sinja huleha Abayisirayiri hutiina.”
5.3: Nga Musa nʼAlooni bamugobolamo baati, “Hatonda wʼAbabbebbulaniya gatubonehera. Huhusunga otufugiirire hutiine mu lugendo olwʼendaalo edatu huŋeyo eŋongo eyiri Musengwa Hatonda weefe mu lulafu, atatuleetaho haŋupuli oba hutuleetera lutalo.”
5.4: Aye habaha wʼe Misiri galoma Musa nʼAlooni ati, “Lwahiina mwenda ohulehesa abaatu emirimo jaawe? Mwagame hu mirimo jenywe.”
5.5: Ngʼaŋo Falaawo abaloma ati, “Enywe muli nʼohuhimanya muuti Abayisirayiri beyongeeye obungi mu gwanga, nindi mwenda balehe emirimo jaawe!”
5.6: Hu ludaalo olwene olwo, Falaawo galagira abanyapala nʼabatangirisi bʼAbayisirayiri ati,
5.7: “Mulehere aŋo ohuŋa abaatu enyaasi eryohuhubbisa amatafaali. Mulehe abeene batiine baleete.
5.8: Aye bali nʼohuhubba obungi wʼamatafaali ngʼolu babayenga ni bahubba. Mutahendesa namba yʼamatafaali. Abaatu abo badoto, cʼehigira baloma mbo baati, ‘Tulehe hutiine huŋeyo eŋongo eyiri Hatonda weefe.’
5.9: Leha abasinde abo bahole emirimo ni ŋaŋuma hubasaasira balehere aŋo ohuŋuliirisa ebyʼobudulingi.”
5.10: Ngʼaŋo abanyapala nʼabatangirisi bʼAbayisirayiri batiina nga baloma abaatu baati, “Falaawo aloma ati, ‘Sibaja hubaŋanga nyaasi.
5.11: Enywe wabeene mutiine mwendule enyaasi eyi munalisaŋaane. Aye enamba yʼamatafaali aga muhubba, sinja hubahendesaho naŋadiidiri.’ ”
5.12: Olwʼehyo, Abayisirayiri batiina hiisi ŋaatu mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri ni baheja enyaasi.
5.13: Abanyapala Abamisiri beyongera ohunyigirisa Abayisirayiri ni babaloma baati, “Mwoherese obungi wʼamatafaali aga babendaho hiisi ludaalo hyahale olu baali ni babaŋa enyaasi.”
5.14: Abanyapala aba Falaawo gataŋo ohulabirira emirimo eji Abayisirayiri baali ni bahola, babahubbanga ni bababuusa baati, “Lwahiina olwejo nʼolwa leero simwoherehiise bungi wʼamatafaali hyʼahale?”
5.15: Ngʼaŋo abatangirisi bʼAbayisirayiri batiina eyiri Falaawo ni bemulugunya baati, “Lwahiina efe abeedu babo, otubisya otyo?
5.16: Sibatuŋa nyaasi aye batuloma ohuhubba enamba yʼamatafaali enyene eyo! Abeedu babo batuhubba. Aye esobi yiŋwera hu baatu babo.”
5.17: Nga Falaawo amugobolamo ati, “Muli bidoto, ŋaŋuma hindi muli bidoto! Cʼehigira musunga muuti mbo babalehe mutiine muŋonge eyiri Musengwa .
5.18: Olwʼehyo, mwagameyo muhole emirimo. Sibaja hubaŋa nyaasi aye muli nʼohuhubba obungi wʼamatafaali ngʼolu mubaaye ni muholanga.”
5.19: Ehyo hyaleetera abatangirisi bʼAbayisirayiri ohumanya baati baali mu higosi, Falaawo ohubaloma ati, “Simuli nʼohuhendesa enamba yʼamatafaali aga muli nʼohuhubba hiisi ludaalo.”
5.20: Ni baŋwa ewa Falaawo, basaŋaana Musa nʼAlooni ni babahuumire.
5.21: Ngʼabatangirisi abo babaloma baati, “ Musengwa abasalire omusango olwohuba mutuleeteeye obusuule mu moni ja Falaawo ko nʼabahungu babe era ehi mutuholire, hiri hyʼohubaŋa epiima ohutwita.” Musa gemulugunya eyiri Musengwa
5.22: Ngʼaŋo Musa agobolayo eyiri Musengwa amuloma ati, “O Musengwa , lwahiina oleeteeye abaatu bano ebigosi? Ehyo njʼehyagima waatuma?
5.23: Ohuŋwa ni natiina ewa Falaawo ohuloma ni naye mu siina liryo, hireeteeye abaatu babo ebigosi. Ne ewe ŋaŋuma ehi oholireŋo ohubanunula!”

6.1: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Ŋaahani oja hubona ehi nja huhola Falaawo. Era olwʼobuŋangi wange, aja huleha abaatu bange batiine. Era olwʼobuŋangi wange, omwene aja hubabbinga mu gwanga lirye.”
6.2: Nga Hatonda aloma Musa ati, “Ndiise Musengwa .
6.3: Ndiise owabonehera Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka ni Yakobbo nga Hatonda Omwene Buŋangi. Aye sinabehwehulira nga Musengwa .
6.4: Era nʼehindi, nanywania endagaano yange ni nabo, nabasuubisa ohubaŋa egwanga lyʼe Kanani eri bamenyamo ngʼabalugendwa.
6.5: Puliiye ohubinda hwʼAbayisirayiri, abʼAbamisiri babafuuye beedu era kebuliiye endagaano yange.
6.6: Olwʼehyo, loma Abayisirayiri oti, ‘Ndiise Musengwa era nja hubanoŋola mu hijoogi hyʼAbamisiri nʼohuba abeedu baawe. Nja hubanunula ohuŋwa mu wiidu wʼAbamisiri era nja hubanunula nʼomuhono gwange ogwʼamaani ni kola ebyamaliholiho ni sala omusango.
6.7: Enywe, nja hubafuula ohuba baatu bange era nja huba Hatonda wenywe. Mulimanya muuti Ndiise Musengwa Hatonda wenywe owabatusa mu hijoogi hyʼAbamisiri.
6.8: Era nja hubaŋira mu hyalo ehi nalayira ohuŋa Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka ko ni Yakobbo. Nja huhibaŋa ngʼomubuluko gwenywe. Ndiise Musengwa .’ ”
6.9: Nga Musa alomera Abayisirayiri ebiitu ebyo ebi Hatonda gamuloma aye sibabifugiirira baati bituufu olwohuba baali baŋoyeemo amaani nʼolwembisya embi eyʼowiidu eyi baali ni bababisyamo.
6.10: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Musa ati,
6.11: “Tiina olome Falaawo owʼe Misiri, alehe Abayisirayiri baŋwe mu gwanga lirye.”
6.12: Aye Musa galoma Musengwa ati, “Obanga Abayisirayiri sibafugiirira ebi wundomera, olwʼehyo ni Falaawo yeesi saaja hufugiirira ebi ndoma. Ese simanyire huloma bulaŋi.”
6.13: Musengwa galagira Musa nʼAlooni ati, “Mulome Abayisirayiri ni habaha wʼe Misiri muuti, ‘mbalagiiye ohutusa Abayisirayiri mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri.’ ” Olulyo lwa Musa ni Alooni
6.14: Gano njʼamasiina gʼemitwe jamago gʼabaana ba Yisirayiri: Abasaani ba Lubbeeni omwana omudaayi owa Yisirayiri, baali nje Kanoki ni Paalu ni Kezirooni ko ni Karumi. Abo njʼabomu hiha hya Lubbeeni.
6.15: Abasaani ba Simyoni baali nje Yemweli ni Yamini nʼOkadi ni Yakini ni Zokali ni Sawulo omwana wʼomuhasi Omukanani. Abo njʼabomu hiha hya Simyoni.
6.16: Abasaani ba Leevi ngʼolu balondehana mu husaaliwa baali nje Girisoni ni Kohasi ni Merari. Leevi gahena emyaha cikumi adatu namusanvu.
6.17: Girisoni gasaala Libbuni ni Simeeyi, abaŋwamo abejuhulu eduuli.
6.18: Kohati gasaala Amulaamu ni Yizuhaari ni Kebbulooni ni Wuziyeeli. Kohasi gahena emyaha cikumi adatu nedatu.
6.19: Merari gasaala Mahuli ni Muusi. Abo njʼabomu hiha hya Leevi ŋalala nʼabejuhulu baawe.
6.20: Amulaamu gaŋira Yokebbedi masengewe, ngʼamusaalamo Alooni ni Musa. Era Amulaamu gahena emyaha cikumi adatu namusanvu.
6.21: Abasaani ba Yizuhaari baali nje Koora ni Nefegi ko ni Zikuri.
6.22: Abasaani ba Wuziyeeli baali nje Misayeeli nʼElizafaani ko ni Sitiri.
6.23: Nga Alooni aŋira Eliseebba omuhaana wʼAminadabbu, mboojo ya Nasoni era gamusaalira Nadabbu ni Abbihu nʼElyazaali ko ni Yisamaari.
6.24: Abasaani ba Koora baali njʼAsiiri nʼElukaana nʼAbbiyasafu. Abo njʼabomu lulyo lwa Koora.
6.25: Elyazaali omusaani wʼAlooni gaŋira omuhaana wa Putiyeeli ngʼamusaalamo Fenekaasi. Abo njʼabomu hiha hya Leevi.
6.26: Alooni ni Musa abeene abo, njʼaba Musengwa galoma ati, “Mutangirire Abayisirayiri nʼebiha byawe ohuŋwa mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri.”
6.27: Abo mbabaloma Falaawo habaha wʼe Misiri ebiŋamba hu Bayisirayiri ohuŋwa e Misiri.
6.28: Ŋaahani Musengwa ni galoma ni Musa mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri,
6.29: gamuloma ati “Ndiise Musengwa . Lomera Falaawo, habaha wʼe Misiri hiisi ehi kuloma.”
6.30: Aye Musa galoma Musengwa ati, “Ese simanyire huloma bulaŋi, olwʼehyo Falaawo njʼoja hupulirisa?”

7.1: Nga Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Nja huhufuula obe hya Hatonda eyiri Falaawo era mulebe wuwo Alooni aja huba hya naabbi wuwo.
7.2: Oli nʼohulomera Alooni hiisi ehi kuloma era yeesi ali nʼohuhiromera Falaawo ohuleha Abayisirayiri baŋwe mu gwanga lirye.
7.3: Aye nja huhahanyasa omwoyo gwa Falaawo, wayire mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri nja huhola obubonero oweŋunjisa,
7.4: saaja huhuŋulirisa. Nja hulaga obuŋangi wange hu baatu bʼe Misiri era nja huhola ebyamaliholiho ni tusaayo Abayisirayiri, abaatu bange mu gwanga eryo.
7.5: Ni nahalage obuŋangi wange hu Bamisiri, baja hutegeera baati ndiise Musengwa nga kena tusaayo Abayisirayiri mu gwanga eryo.”
7.6: Musa nʼAlooni baahola ngʼolu Musengwa gabalagira.
7.7: Ehiseera ehi Musa nʼAlooni balomeramo ni Falaawo, Musa gaali ali nʼemyaha cinaana, Alooni nʼali nʼecinaana nedatu. Esimbo yʼAlooni
7.8: Nga Musengwa aloma Musa nʼAlooni ati,
7.9: “Singa Falaawo abaloma ati, ‘Mukolereho ehyamaliholiho,’ Musa olomanga Alooni oti, ‘Ŋamba esimbo yiyo oyidanye ŋaasi mu moni ja Falaawo,’ yija hufuuha temu.”
7.10: Ngʼaŋo Musa nʼAlooni batiina eyiri Falaawo, nga bahola ngʼolu Musengwa gaali nʼabalagiye. Alooni gadanya esimbo yiye ŋaasi mu moni ja Falaawo ko nʼabahungu babe era nga yifuuha temu.
7.11: Ngʼaŋo Falaawo alanga abafumu nʼabalogo era abafumu Abamisiri boosi bahola ehiitu cʼehyene mu magesi gaawe agekweho.
7.12: Hiisi mulala gadanya ŋaasi aŋo esimbo yiye, nga yifuuha temu. Aye esimbo yʼAlooni yamira ejaawe josijosi.
7.13: Wayire ehyo hyali hiityo, Falaawo gahahanyasa omwoyo gugwe, sigaŋulirisa bya Musa nʼAlooni, ngʼolu Musengwa galoma. Amafugi ngʼehibonerezo e Misiri
7.14: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Omwoyo gwa Falaawo muhahanyafu era ageene ohuleha abaatu ohutiina.
7.15: Tiinayo mu mugamba omwagaane nʼatiina hu lwabi, omuhuumirire hwigenya nʼoŋambire esimbo yiyo eyafuuha etemu.
7.16: Omulome oti, ‘ Musengwa Hatonda wʼAbabbebbulaniya gatumire eyi oli ohuhuloma ti, “Leha abaatu bange batiine banjumirye mu lulafu.” Aye nʼohwosa ŋaahani ogeene ohuŋulira.
7.17: Olwʼehyo, Musengwa aloma ati hino pohu oja humanyira ti ndiise Musengwa . Nja huhubba amaaji gomu lwabi nʼesimbo nga gafuuha mafugi.
7.18: Enyeeni mu lwabi jija hufa era ŋaja hubaŋo ohuŋunya ehibulu, Abamisiri sibaja hunywa amaaji ago.’ ”
7.19: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Loma Alooni oti, ‘Ŋamba esimbo yiyo, ojanuule omuhono gugwo hu maaji agʼe Misiri gosigosi, enjabi josijosi nʼebidiba nʼamaaji gosigosi hiisi ŋaatu, gaja hufuuha mafugi. Amafugi gaja huba hiisi ŋaatu mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri lyosiryosi, mu bibya ebi bahola mu bisaala ko nomwiroba.’ ”
7.20: Ngʼaŋo Musa nʼAlooni bahola ngʼolu Musengwa gaali nʼabalagiye. Nga Alooni aŋamba esimbo mu moni ja Falaawo nʼabahungu babe ngʼajanuula omuhono gugwe hu maaji agomu lwabi Kiyira, ngʼamaaji gosigosi gafuuha mafugi.
7.21: Ngʼenyeeni ejomu lwabi Kiyira jifa, ngʼolwabi luduuha ehibulu era Abamisiri sibasobola hunywa maaji gaamo. Ngʼamafugi gaba hiisi ŋaatu mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri.
7.22: Aye abafumu Abamisiri boosi bahola ebiitu njʼebyene mu magesi gaawe agekweho. Era ngʼomwoyo gwa Falaawo guhahanyala, sigaŋulira bya Musa ni Alooni, ngʼolu Musengwa gaali nʼalomire.
7.23: Ohutusaho gacuuha gaŋamba engira gagamayo mu lubiri lulwe era ebyo sigabifaho naŋadiidiri.
7.24: NgʼAbamisiri bosibosi batiina bayaba esobere hu gobo wʼolwabi basune amaaji gʼohunywa olwohuba baali sibaŋanga hunywa maaji agomu lwabi.
7.25: Ŋabitaŋo endaalo musanvu Musengwa nʼahenire ohufuula amaaji gomu lwabi Kiyira, mafugi.

8.1: Nga Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Tiina eyiri Falaawo omulome oti Musengwa aloma ati, ‘Leha abaatu bange batiine banjumirye.
8.2: Aye singa ogaana ohubalehula ohutiina, nja huboneresa abaatu bʼegwanga liryo lyosiryosi ni mbaleetaho agahere.
8.3: Olwabi Kiyira luja hwijula agahere era gaja hwingira mu lubiri lulwo nomu hisenge hihyo nohu buliri wuwo, nomu manyumba ga bahungu babo nomu jʼabaatu babo nomu bibange nomu ndubi ko nomu tubindi.
8.4: Agahere gaja hubejulaho, ewe nʼabahungu ko nʼabaatu babo.’ ”
8.5: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Loma Alooni oti ‘Ŋamba esimbo yiyo ohubbe hu maaji gomu lwabi nʼemyala ko nʼebidiba era ehyo hija huleeta agahere ohuŋwera eyi gaja huŋwera gamaamire egwanga lyʼe Misiri.’ ”
8.6: Nga Alooni aŋamba esimbo ajanuula omuhono hu maaji mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri, ngʼagahere gaŋwa eyi gaŋwera gamaamira egwanga lyʼe Misiri lyosiryosi.
8.7: Aye abafumu boosi bahola baatyo mu magesi gaawe agomu ngiso, amahere gaali mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri.
8.8: Ngʼaŋo Falaawo atuma balanga Musa ni Alooni, ngʼabaloma ati “Mbasunga musabe Musengwa atutuseho amahere, ese nʼabaatu bange era keesi nja huleha abaatu babe batiine baŋonge eyiri Musengwa .”
8.9: Nga Musa aloma Falaawo ati “Kulehire wamwene ohusalaŋo ehiseera ehyʼohuhusabira ewe nʼabahungu babo nʼabaatu babo, agahere gahulehe nʼabaatu babo ko nomu nyumba jenywe ohutusaho gasigale mu lwabi mwoŋene.”
8.10: Nga Falaawo aloma ati “Leha lube ludaalo lwejo.” Ngʼaŋo Musa amugobolamo ati “Hija huba ngʼolu olomire, ko wahamanya oti ŋaŋuma ali hya Musengwa Hatonda weefe.
8.11: Agahere gaja huhuŋwaho, gaŋwe nohu bahungu babo ko nohu baatu babo, gaja husigala mu lwabi Kiyira mwoŋene.”
8.12: Oluvanyuma lwa Musa nʼAlooni ohuŋwa ewa Falaawo, Musa galomba Musengwa ohutusaŋo agahere aga gaali nʼaleetire hu Falaawo.
8.13: Nga Musengwa ahola ngʼolu Musa gamusunga. Ngʼaŋo amahere agaali mu nyumba nomu lunya nomu ndimiro, gafa.
8.14: Abamisiri bahumbaania etuumo nʼetuumo jʼagahere era ehyalo hyaduuha ehibulu.
8.15: Aye Falaawo ni gabona ni ŋaliŋo ahalembekeresa, gahahanyasa omwoyo gugwe, sigaŋulirisa bya Musa nʼAlooni. Ehyo hyali ngʼolu Musengwa gaali nʼalomire. Obugujwi
8.16: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Loma Alooni oti ‘Ŋamba esimbo yiyo ohubbe hwiroba, lifuuhe bugujwi mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri lyosiryosi.’ ”
8.17: Nga bahola baatyo. Nga Alooni aŋamba esimbo yiye ahubba hwiroba, ngʼefuuhe mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri lyosiryosi lifuuha bugujwi, nga bumaamira abaatu nʼesolo.
8.18: Ngʼabafumu boosi batambisa amagesi gaawe agomu ngiso ohuleeta obugujwi aye byabahaya. Ngʼobugujwi bumaamira hiisi ŋaatu hu baatu nʼesolo.
8.19: Ngʼabafumu baloma Falaawo baati “Hatonda njʼoli huhola bino.” Aye Falaawo gahahanyasa omwoyo gugwe era sigaŋulirisa bya Musa nʼAlooni ngʼolu Musengwa gaali nʼalomire. Esoŋera
8.20: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Olwejo yinyoha mu mugamba pwipwipwi, otiine wagaanane ni Falaawo nʼatiina hu lwabi, omulome oti Musengwa aloma ati, ‘Leha abaatu bange batiine banjumirye.
8.21: Aye nʼotaleehe abaatu bange ohutiina banjumirye, nja huleeta agasoŋera hu ewe nʼabahungu babo ko nʼabaatu babo nomu mayumba genywe. Enyumba jʼAbamisiri ko nʼehyalo hyosihyosi hija hwijula agasoŋera.
8.22: Aye hu ludaalo olwo olu nja huleeteraho agasoŋera, ehitundu hyʼe Goseni omu baatu bange beehala hija huba hyanjabulo, agasoŋera sigaja hubayo ko mumanye muuti ese Musengwa ndi mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri lino.
8.23: Nja hutaŋo enjabulo ŋagati wʼabaatu bange nʼAbamisiri. Era ehyamaliholiho hino hija hubaŋo olwejo.’ ”
8.24: Musengwa gahola atyo, gaŋindiha agasoŋera gamaala mu lubiri lwa Falaawo nomu nyumba jʼabahungu babe. Egwanga lyʼe Misiri lyosiryosi lyejula era hiisi ŋaatu ŋabiiŋa olwʼagasoŋera.
8.25: Ngʼaŋo Falaawo atumisa bamulangira Musa nʼAlooni ngʼabaloma ati “Mutiine muŋeyo eŋongo eyiri Hatonda wenywe aye mu gwanga muweene muno.”
8.26: Aye nga Musa amugobolamo ati “Sihiraŋi ohuhola huutyo, olwohuba eŋongo lyefe eji huŋongera Musengwa Hatonda weefe, jija huba jambiho mu moni jʼAbamisiri. Era singa huŋaayo ebiitu ebyʼembiho mu moni jʼAbamisiri, sibaja hutuhubba amabaale?
8.27: Huli nʼohuŋamba olugendo olwʼendaalo edatu hutiine mu lulafu, huŋonge eyiri Musengwa Hatonda weefe, ngʼolu atulagira.”
8.28: Nga Falaawo amuloma ati “Nja hubaleha mutiine mu lulafu muŋeyo eŋongo eyiri Musengwa Hatonda wenywe, ni muba ni mutatiine ŋaleeŋi. Musabireho.”
8.29: Nga Musa aloma ati “Ni naaŋwe mu moni jijo ti bbepa, nalombe Musengwa era olwejo agasoŋera gaja huŋwa hu Falaawo nʼabahungu ko nʼabaatu babe. Aye Falaawo ateholaholania nindi gagaana abaatu ohutiina ohuŋonga eyiri Musengwa .”
8.30: Nga Musa aŋwa mu moni ja Falaawo ngʼalomba Musengwa .
8.31: Nga Musengwa ahola ngʼolu Musa gamusunga. Nga gasoŋera galeha Falaawo nʼabahungu ko nʼabaatu babe era ŋaŋuma esoŋera wayire ndala eyasigala.
8.32: Aye ebyo ni byaŋwa, Falaawo gahahanyasa omwoyo gugwe, sigafugiirira Abayisirayiri ohutiina.

9.1: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Tiina eyiri Falaawo omulome oti Musengwa Hatonda wʼAbabbebbulaniya aloma ati, ‘Leha abaatu bange batiine banjumirye.
9.3: Musengwa aja huleeta haŋupuli omuhambwe hu byayo bibyo: embalaasi ni nasugirya nʼengamiya nʼeŋombe nʼetaama ko nʼembusi.
9.4: Aye Musengwa aja hutaaŋo enjabulo ŋagati wʼebyayo byʼAbayisirayiri nʼAbamisiri, ŋaja huŋuma hyayo hyʼOmuyisirayiri ehija hufa.’ ”
9.5: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa ataaŋo ehiseera aloma ati, “Ehyo olwejo Musengwa aja huhihola mu gwanga lino.”
9.6: Era ni wahya, nga Musengwa ahihola: ebyayo byosibyosi ebyʼAbamisiri nga bifa. Aye ŋaŋuma hyayo hu byʼAbayisirayiri wayire hirala ehyafa.
9.7: Ngʼaŋo Falaawo aŋindiha abaatu ohubona obanga hituufu ŋaŋuma hyayo hu byʼAbayisirayiri ehifuuye. Era nga babona ti ŋaŋuma wayire hirala ehyʼAbayisirayiri ehyafa. Aye Falaawo gahahanyasa omwoyo gugwe, sigaleha abaatu abo hutiina. Amawute
9.8: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Musa nʼAlooni ati “Mutiine muŋambe amadeeja abiri agʼegohe eryomu mayiga, Musa alyoŋe ŋamugulu Falaawo nʼabona.
9.9: Egohe eryo lija hufuuha efuuhe enukuule era hiisi muutu nʼebyayo bija husuna amawute mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri lyosiryosi.”
9.10: Ngʼaŋo baŋamba egohe eryomu mayiga, nga baja bemeerera mu moni ja Falaawo. Nga Musa aliŋaanya ŋamugulu. Ngʼamawute gahwana hu hiisi muutu nʼebyayo.
9.11: Abafumu sibasobola hwemeerera mu moni ja Musa olwohuba bo nʼAbamisiri bosibosi baali bahwene mawute mereere.
9.12: Aye Musengwa gahahanyasa omwoyo gwa Falaawo, nasaŋulirisa bya Musa nʼAlooni ngʼolu Musengwa gaali nʼalomire. Efula eyʼamabaale
9.13: Nga Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Yinyoha mu mugamba pwipwipwi, otiine eyiri Falaawo omulome oti Musengwa Hatonda wʼAbabbebbulaniya aloma ati, ‘Leha abaatu bange batiine banjumirye.
9.14: Singa sobaleha hutiina, hu mulundi guno nja huhuboneresa bugali, ewe nʼabahungu babo nʼabaatu bʼegwanga liryo, ko otegeere oti mu hyalo hyosihyosi ŋaŋumaŋo ali hyʼese.
9.15: Mu butuufu oweene, mbanga ni nahuŋindihira haŋupuli owʼamaani, hani ewe nʼegwanga liryo mwasihiiriha hale mwesimwesi.
9.16: Aye nahuhusa nahuŋa obuhulu olwʼohwenda ohulaga amaani gange, ko abaatu mu hyalo hyosihyosi, baape eŋono.
9.17: Nʼohwola hatyane ohigeene ohuleha abaatu bange batiine banjumirye.
9.18: Olwʼehyo, olwejo mu hiseera hyʼehino, nja huŋindiha efula embi eyʼamabaale etabangaŋo mu gwanga lyʼe Misiri buhye libeŋo.
9.19: Lagira bengise ebyayo nʼebiitu bibyo byosibyosi ebiri ebulafu, efula eyʼamabaale yiija huhubba ehyalo era hiisi ehiramu ehiri ebulafu, haabe muutu oba ehyayo bija hufa.’ ”
9.20: Abahungu ba Falaawo batya olwʼebibono bya Musengwa , banguŋaho nga batusayo abeedu nʼebyayo byawe.
9.21: Aye abo abatafayo hu ebi Musengwa galoma, baleha abeedu nʼebyayo byawe ebulafu.
9.22: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Musa ati, “Golola omuhono eyiri egulu, efula eyʼamabaale yigwe hu hyalo hyosihyosi ehyʼe Misiri, hu baatu nohu solo ko nohu bimera byosibyosi mu ndimiro.”
