18.13: Sibahulomerangaho ehi nahola Yezebbeeli ni gaali ni geeta abanaabbi ba Musengwa ? Nahweha abanaabbi ba Musengwa cikumi mu pungulu ebiri, amahumi ataanu mu hiisi pungulu era nabaŋanga emere nʼamaaji.
18.14: Lwahiina wundoma tiine ndomere musengwa yange ti oli ŋano!” Aja hunjita!
18.15: Nga Eliya aloma ati, “Mu butuufu ngʼolu Musengwa Omwene Maŋe ali njʼomwene bulamu era oyu peeresa, nja hwebonesa eyiri Ahabbu olwa leero luno.” Eliya nʼabaatu hu lusozi Karumeeli
18.16: Ngʼaŋo Obbadiya atiina alomera Ahabbu era nga Ahabbu atiina ohubona Eliya.
18.17: Ni gabona Eliya, ngʼamubuusa ati, “Ndiiwe oyo agira Abayisirayiri ni bali mu bigosi?”
18.18: Nga Eliya amugobolamo ati, “Sindiise aleteeye Yisirayiri ebigosi aye ndiiwe nʼabolulyo lwa lataawo olwohuba mwaŋwa hu biragiro bya Musengwa , mujumirya Bbaali.
18.19: Ŋaahani tumisa abaatu bosibosi mu Yisirayiri banjagaane hu lusozi Karumeeli. Wuuje nʼabanaabbi ba Bbaali ebihumi ebine nʼataanu nʼabanaabbi ba Asera ebihumi ebine, abalya hu hiiŋulo hirala ni Yezebbeeli.”
18.20: Nga Ahabbu atumisa Abayisirayiri bosibosi era ngʼaŋira nʼabanaabbi bahumbaanira hu lusozi Karumeeli.
18.21: Nga Eliya atiina aŋa baatu baali abaloma ati, “Mulyosaŋe ohutasalaŋo ehyʼohuhola hu bibiri? Hanye muhimanyire muuti Hatonda nje Musengwa , mumujumirye, ne munamanya muuti Bbaali nje Hatonda, mumujumirye.” Ne abaatu sibamusimula.
18.22: Ngʼaŋo Eliya abaloma ati, “Ndiise seeŋene hu banaabbi ba Musengwa asigaayeŋo aye abanaabbi ba Bbaali bali ebihumi bine nʼataanu.
18.23: Kale mutuŋe ebunwa ebiri, abanaabbi ba Bbaali betobosemo ndala, bayisalesalemo ebifi bayite hu kwi ne bataŋambya muliro. Keesi nja hutegeha eyindi njite hu kwi ne sinja huŋambya muliro.
18.24: Enywe mwegalihire hatonda wenywe, ese nja hwegalihira Musengwa . Kale hatonda aja hugobolamo nʼomuliro nje Hatonda.” Abaatu bosibosi nga bagobolamo baati, “Ehi olomire hiraŋi.”
18.25: Ngʼaŋo Eliya aloma abanaabbi ba Bbaali ati, “Enywe musooke olwohuba muli bangi, mwetobosemo ebunwa yʼeŋombe muyibaage era mutemetememo. Musunge hatonda wenywe ne mutaŋambya muliro.”
18.26: Nga baŋira eŋombe eyi babaŋa nga bayibaaga. Nga beriririra Bbaali ohuŋwa mu mugamba ohwola hu saawa mukaaga ejomu muusi baati, “Bbaali, tugoboleemo.” Aye ŋaŋuma ehyenyeenya era eŋuma owabagobolamo. Nga bahina ni betoloola ehituuti ehyʼohuŋeeraho eŋongo ehi baali ni babbotire.
18.27: Mu muusi esaawa mukaaga, nga Eliya atandiha ohubajojoberesa ati, “Mulomere ŋamugulu ohusingaho aŋo olwohuba mu butuufu hatonda. Oba oli aŋo ali nʼebi aŋeegaho oba ŋaliŋo ebi ali huhola oba ali mu lugendo. Ataba nʼali huŋenyuha ni hyetagisa ohumusisimusa.”
18.28: Nga bahayaanira ŋamugulu ngʼolu ekola yaawe yaali, nga besalasala engeso nʼepiima ohwola olu amafugi gatiririha.
18.29: Esaawa mukaaga ejomu muusi jabitaŋo era beyongera ohuhina nʼohuhayaanira ŋamugulu ohwola egulo mu saawa eyʼohuŋeeramo eŋongo. Aye ŋaŋuma ehyafufula oba owabagobolamo era yaŋuma owabafaho. Hatonda asindiha omuliro ohwohya eŋongo
18.30: Ngʼaŋo Eliya aloma abaatu bosibosi ati, “Mwigerere ŋano.” Abaatu bosibosi nga beegerera aŋa gaali. Ngʼatongola bunyaaha ehituuti hya Musengwa ehyo ehi baali ni babbwagabbwagire.
18.31: Nga Eliya abugula amabaale ehumi nabiri, hiisi baale ni lihihirira ehiha ohuŋwa mu lulyo lwa Yakobbo oyu Musengwa galoma ati “Baja huhulanga baati Yisirayiri.”
18.32: Era nga atambisa amabaale ago ohutongolera Musengwa ehituuti ehyʼohumuŋeeraho eŋongo. Ngʼayaba omuhula omubbala ohweswanigirisa ehituuti ni gwolamo esongo oti ebiri ejʼamaaji.
18.33: Nga ganja ekwi hu hituuti, ngʼatematema ebunwa eyo, ngʼata hu kwi. Ngʼaloma ati, “Mwijuse esongo ene amaaji, mugajuhe hu ŋongo nohu kwi.”
18.34: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Nindi muhihole omulundi ogwohubiri.” Nga bahihola. Nga nindi abaloma ati, “Mugobolemo omulundi ogwohudatu.” Era nga bahihola omulundi ogwohudatu.
18.35: Amaaji gahuluhuta ni gaŋwera hu hituuti ehyo goola nʼohwijula omuhula.
18.36: Ehiseera ehyʼohuŋeeramo eŋongo ehyʼegulo ni hyola, nga naabbi Eliya gigerera ŋa hituuti asaba ati, “O Musengwa Hatonda wa Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka ni Yasirayiri, olwa leero luno leha himanyihane ti oli Hatonda mu Yisirayiri era hiiti ndi muŋeeresa wuwo era ti ndiiwe owundagiiye ohuhola ebi kolire bino byosibyosi.
18.37: O Musengwa , ngobolemo, ngobolemo, abaatu bano bahamanya baati ewe Musengwa ndiiwe Hatonda era ti oli hucuusa emyoyo jaawe ohujigobosa eyi oli.”
18.38: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aŋindiha omuliro gwohya eŋongo nʼekwi nʼamabaale nʼeroba era nga gwomeesa nʼamaaji agaali mu muhula.
18.39: Abaatu bosibosi ni bahibona, bagwa ŋaasi mafumaaye nga baloma baati, “ Musengwa nje Hatonda! Musengwa nje Hatonda!”
18.40: Ngʼaŋo Eliya alagira ati, “Muŋambe abanaabbi ba Bbaali. Eŋume oweŋunula wayire mulala!” Nga babaŋamba, nga Eliya aloma babaserengesya mu meeho gʼe Kisoni, babetira eyo.
18.41: Nga Eliya aloma Ahabbu ati, “Tiina olye era onywe, ndi huŋulira ohuŋuuma hwʼefula eyʼamaani.”
18.42: Ngʼaŋo Ahabbu atiina alya era anywa. Aye Eliya niye gatiina ganiina olusozi olu balanga baati Karumeeli, ngʼahotamya omutwe mu magulu gage.
18.43: Ngʼaloma omuŋeeresa wuwe ati, “Tiina olengere hu luuyi lwʼenyanja.” Ngʼomuŋeeresa oyo atiina ohuhebera ohubona ehi bamulomire, nga gagama amuloma ati, “Ŋaŋuma hiitu hyosihyosi ehi mbwene.” Eliya gamugobosayo emirundi musanvu.
18.44: Hu mulundi ogwomusanvu, ngʼomuŋeeresa oyo aloma ati, “Pwahubona ahaleri ahali oti hyaba hyʼomuutu ni haŋwa mu nyanja.” Nga Eliya aloma omuŋeeresa wuwe ati, “Tiina olome Ahabbu oti, ‘Yingira mu higaali hihyo wagame engo, wihirire ŋaasi efula nʼehiiri huhuŋambira ŋano.’ ”
18.45: Mu haseera ahatono, egulu lyamaliŋa, embeŋo yatandiha era efula enyene eyʼamaani nga yiija era nga Ahabbu afuga ehigaali, atiina e Yezireeli.
18.46: Nga Musengwa aŋa Eliya amaani agenjawulo, nga geesidiha omusibiro gugwe mu hihunya, aduluma atangirira mu Ahabbu ohwola e Yezireeli.

19.1: Ahabbu galomera omuhasi wuwe Yezebbeeli byosibyosi ebi Eliya gahola era ngʼolu geeta abanaabbi ba Bbaali bosibosi.
19.2: Olwʼehyo, Yezebbeeli gatumira Eliya obuhwenda ati, “Abahatonda bamboneresanga nʼamaani singa mu mugamba olwejo ehiseera hyʼehino hyola ni kiiri huhwita ngʼolu ewe weetire abanaabbi.”
19.3: Obuti waŋamba Eliya gaduluma ohuŋonia obulamu. Ni goola e Bberuseebba mu Yuda, galeha eyo omuloobera wuwe.
19.4: Cooka niye ngʼatiina ahena oludaalo lulala nʼagenda mu lulafu. Nga goola mu hiŋolu hyʼomusaala, nga gehala asaba ati gahali afa. Gasaba ati, “ Musengwa ebinjolireho bihena! Mala ganjita, leha keesi fuuhe hyʼabasehulu bange abaafa!”
19.5: Ni gahena ohuloma atyo, ngʼalambaala mu musaala ero limuŋira. Ni gaali naŋenyuhire nga malayika amuŋambaho amuloma ati, “Yinyoha olye.”
19.6: Ni genyoha ohuhubbahubba emoni ngʼabona aŋa gaali nʼataaye omutwe ni ŋaliŋo omugaati omuhalabande nʼamaaji. Ngʼalya era ngʼanywa, ngʼahena alambaala nindi.
19.7: Nga Malayika wa Musengwa , amuŋambaho omulundi ogwohubiri amuloma ati, “Yinyoha olye olwohuba olugendo olwʼosigahiise luleeŋi bugali.”
19.8: Ngʼaŋo Eliya genyoha, alya era ngʼanywa. Ebyʼohulya ni byamugobosamo amaani, gagenda endaalo amahumi ane omuusi nʼowiire, ngʼagoola hu olusozi lwa Hatonda olu balanga baati Horebbu. Musengwa abonehera Eliya hu Lusozi Horebbu
19.9: Eliya ni goola hu lusozi Horebbu, gengira mu pungulu, ngʼaŋenyuha omwo ohwosa olu wahya. Nga Musengwa amubonehera amuloma ati, “Eliya, ohola hiina ŋano?”
19.10: Nga Eliya amugobolamo ati, “O Musengwa Hatonda Omwene Maŋe, mbaye kugonderanga mu ngeri yosiyosi. Aye Abayisirayiri babbwagire endagaano eyi wahola ni nabo, babbwagabbwaga ebituuti bibyo ohubaŋeera eŋongo era beetire abanaabbi babo nʼepiima. Ndiise osigaaye era keesi bali hupiima benda bakeneŋo.”
19.11: Nga Musengwa amuloma ati, “Tula, wemeerere hu lusozi mu moni ja Musengwa olwohuba genda hubitaŋo.” Ngʼaŋo omuyaga ogwʼamaani gwasaaga olufa mu lusozi era nga guŋigujula agabaale aye Musengwa sigaali mu hibuyaga oyo. Hibuyaga ni gabunjera nga ŋabaaŋo musisi owateetemya ehyalo aye Musengwa sigaali mu musisi oyo.
19.12: Musisi ni gahoma, ngʼomuliro guuja aye Musengwa sigaali mu muliro. Omuliro ni gwasima, nga ŋabaaŋo omuutu nʼaloma mu hajanjaasi nʼaŋweŋweta huŋweŋweta.
19.13: Eliya ni gahaŋulira, ngʼahwesa olugoye olu gewiihiriranga geewiiha mu weeni, ngʼatula mu pungulu gemeerera ŋa mulyango. Ngʼaŋo aŋulira ejanjaasi omuutu nʼamubuusa ati, “Eliya, ohola hiina ŋano?”
19.14: Nga Eliya amugobolamo ati, “O Musengwa Hatonda Omwene Maŋe, mbaye kugonderanga mu ngeri yosiyosi. Aye Abayisirayiri babbwagire endagaano eyi wahola ni nabo, babbwagabbwaga ebituuti bibyo ohubaŋeera eŋongo era beetire abanaabbi babo nʼepiima. Ndiise osigaaye era keesi bali hupiima benda bakeneŋo.”
19.15: Nga Musengwa amuloma ati, “Yagamayo eyi waŋwereeye, otiine mu lulafu lwʼe Damasiko. Nʼonoole eyo, juha hu Hazayeeli amafuta afuuhe habaha wʼAlaamu.
19.16: Ojuhe nohu Yeeku omusaani wa Nimusi afuuhe habaha wa Yisirayiri era ojuhe nohu Elisa omusaani wa Safati ohuŋwa e Abbiri Mehola afuuhe naabbi ahugobole mu magulu.
19.17: Yeeku aja hwita oyo yesiyesi aja huŋunuha epiima ya Hazayeeli era Elisa aja hwita abaja huŋunuha epiima ya Yeeku.
19.18: Aye nja huhuuma abaatu kasanvu mu Yisirayiri, bosibosi abagaana ohuhubbira Bbaali amafuha oba ohumujumirya.” Elisa afuuha muloobera wa Eliya
19.19: Nga Eliya atiina asaŋaana Elisa omusaani wa Safati. Elisa gaali ali hulimisa, emigigi jʼesaame ehumi nʼebiri era omwene njʼowaali nʼalimisa omugigi ogwʼehumi nʼebiri. Nga Eliya atiina amudanyaho olugoye lulwe.
19.20: Nga Elisa alehaŋo esaame, adulumira hu Eliya amuloma ati, “Kusunga wundehe tiine seebule bbaabba ni maama ko niije tiine ni neewe.” Nga Eliya amuloma ati, “Yagamayo, koni ese kugeene?”
19.21: Nga Elisa gagamayo, ngʼaŋamba emigigi jʼesaame eji gaali nʼalimisa ngʼajisala. Ngʼaŋamba ebijoogi abyaŋulamo anyiiyisa enyama eyo ngʼayigabula abaatu balya. Ngʼaŋamba engira alonda hu Eliya, afuuha muloobera wuwe.

20.1: Nga Habaha Bbeni Hadadi owʼAlaamu ahumbaania eŋe lirye lyosiryosi. Abahabaha amahumi adatu nʼababiri nʼembalaasi nʼebigaali byawe bamuŋereheraho. Nga batiina balumba Samaliya ehibuga ehya Yisirayiri ehibbala nga bahyeswanigirisa.
20.2: Nga Bbeni Hadadi atuma abahwenda mu hibuga eyiri Ahabbu habaha wa Yisirayiri ohumuloma baati, “Hino njʼehi Bbeni Hadadi aloma,
20.3: ‘Pe efeeza nʼezaabbu nʼabahasi nʼabaana babo abasinga obulaŋi.’ ”
20.4: Ngʼaŋo habaha wa Yisirayiri amugobolamo ati, “Ngʼolu habaha musengwa yange oloma, ese nʼebindi ni nabyo byosibyosi, bibyo.”
20.5: Nga nindi abahwenda bagobolayo eyiri Ahabbu bamuloma baati Bbeni Hadadi ahuloma ati, “Nahuloma wuupe efeeza nʼezaabbu nʼabahasi nʼabaana babo.
20.6: Era olwejo hu nyanga oti jiiti, nja huŋeeresa abahungu bange baaze olubiri lulwo nʼamayumba gʼabahungu babo. Baja hubugula hiisi ehi oŋira ohuba ehyʼomuŋendo.”
20.7: Nga habaha wa Yisirayiri alanga abatangirisi bosibosi mu gwanga lirye abaloma ati, “Bahyange mwebonere ngʼolu omusinde oyo ali hweretera ebigosi, ni gaatumihisa muŋe abahasi nʼabaana bange nʼefeeza nʼezaabbu, eŋuma ehi nagaaniraho.”
20.8: Ngʼabatangirisi nʼabaatu bosibosi bamugobolamo baati, “Otaŋulirisa era otafugiirira ebi ahuloma ohuhola.”
20.9: Olwʼehyo ngʼagobola mu bahwenda ba Bbeni Hadadi ati, “Mulome habaha musengwa yange muuti, ‘Omuŋeeresa wuwo aja huhola ebi wamulagira oludaayi byosibyosi aye ebyomulundi ogwohubiri guno, bbe.’ ” Ngʼabahwenda baŋwaŋo baja balomera Bbeni Hadadi ehi Ahabbu gagobolamo.
20.10: Ngʼaŋo Bbeni Hadadi aŋindihira Ahabbu obuhwenda obundi ati, “Abahatonda bamboneresanga nʼamaani singa sindeta abaatu bange ohusihiirisa ehibuga Samaliya ohwola olu hinahaŋweŋo era nasihibemo wayire ahaatu ahaŋera ehyaba hyʼengalo ehi hiisi mulala hu basooli bange aŋanga ohuyoola.”
20.11: “Nga habaha wa Yisirayiri abaloma batiine balome Bbeni Hadadi baati, ‘Omusirikale omutuufu getenda oluvanyuma lwʼohuŋangula olutalo sosi nʼahiiri.’ ”
20.12: Obuhwenda owo ni wagwa Bbeni Hadadi mu hutwi niye nʼabahabaha ni bali mu weema jaawe ni banywa. Ngʼalagira abasooli babe ati, “Mwetegehe ohuwaagala!” Nga betegeha ohuwaagala ehibuga. Ahabbu aŋangula Bbeni Hadadi
20.13: Mu hiseera ehyo nga ŋabaaŋo naabbi owatiina eyiri Ahabbu habaha wa Yisirayiri, ngʼamuloma ati, “ Musengwa aloma ati, ‘Obona eŋe eryʼamaani eryo lyosiryosi? Olwaleero luno, nja huliŋaayo mu mihono jijo ko wahamanya oti ndiise Musengwa .’ ”
20.14: Aye Ahabbu gamubuusa ati, “Njʼabaani abanalirumbe?” Nga naabbi amugobolamo ati, “ Musengwa aloma ati, ‘Abavubuka abahuuma abahungu ba disitulikiti.’ ” Nga nindi Ahabbu abuusa ati, “Njʼabaani abaja husooka ohuwaagala?” Nga naabbi amugobolamo ati, “Ndiiwe oja husooka.”
20.15: Nga Habaha Ahabbu atumisa abahuumi bʼabahungu ba disitulikiti bibiri adatu nababiri. Ngʼahumbaania Abayisirayiri abasirikale bosibosi kasanvu.
20.16: Nga babalumba hu saawa mukaaga ejomu muusi, Bbeni Hadadi nʼabahabaha amahumi adatu nʼababiri aba gaali ni nabo, baali mu weema jaawe ni bameera.
20.17: Abavubuka abahuuma abahungu ba disitulikiti njʼabeherera ohutiina. Ŋaahani Bbeni Hadadi gaali aŋandiihire abambega nga bamuloma baati “Ŋaliŋo abaatu abali mu huuja ni baŋwera e Samaliya.”
20.18: Ngʼabalagira ati, “Oba bajire olwʼemiyaaya, mubaŋambe balamu era nʼolu baba ni bajiriiye husoola, mubaŋambe balamu.”
20.19: Abavubuka abahuuma abahungu ba disitulikiti ŋaasi wa baduumisi bʼamatwale, beheerera ohutula mu hibuga nʼeŋe ni libalondaho,
20.20: era nga hiisi muutu geeta oyu gaali nʼasoola ni naye. Ehyo hyaleetera Abalaamu ohunyalagataŋo embiro, Abayisirayiri ni bababbinga. Era Bbeni Hadadi habaha wʼAlaamu gadulumira hu mbalaasi nʼabasirikale abohu mbalaasi.
20.21: Habaha wa Yisirayiri gabalumba ngʼabanyagaho embalaasi nʼebigaali era geeta Abalaamu bangi bugali.
20.22: Oluvanyuma nga naabbi atiina eyiri habaha wa Yisirayiri, ngʼamuloma ati, “Yagamayo oyungule eŋe liryo era wetegehe bulaŋi weene olwohuba mu mwesi hyoguno mu mwaha oguuja, habaha wʼAlaamu aja huhuwaagala nindi.” Bbeni Hadadi agobolamo ohuwaagala Samaliya
20.23: Ngʼaŋo abahungu ba habaha wʼAlaamu bamuŋa amagesi baati, “Abahatonda bʼAbayisirayiri, bahatonda bohu sozi, cʼehyagira batuŋangula hu lula. Ne singa husoola ni nabo aŋaduleere, mu butuufu huuja hubasinga amaani.
20.24: Kale hola oti, tusa abahabaha bosibosi mu bifo ebi baduumira, otemo abaduumisi bʼamaŋe.
20.25: Ehindi oli nʼohutendeha eŋe eryaga hyʼeriwafiirwa hu lula, aŋaali embalaasi ogoboseŋo embalaasi era nʼaŋaali ehigaali ogoboseŋo ehigaali, ko husoole nʼAbayisirayiri aŋaduleere. Mu butuufu ehyo hija hutuŋa ohubaŋangula.” Nga habaha Bbeni Hadadi afugiirira amagesi aga bamuŋa agatiiniraho.
20.26: Omwesi omulagaane ni gwola, Bbeni Hadadi gahumbaania abasirikale Abalaamu ngʼaniinaniina atiina e Afeki ohusoosa Abayisirayiri.
20.27: Ahabbu gahumbaania eŋe lirye gabaŋa ebyetagisa mu lutalo, nga batiina ohusoosa Abalaamu. Abayisirayiri batiina nga baba mu kambi ebiri ni balengereeye Abalaamu. Abayisirayiri baali hyʼobudooli wubiri owʼembusi aye Abalaamu nibo ni bejuleene ohuhenaho ehyalo.
20.28: Ngʼaŋo omuutu wa Hatonda atiina aloma Ahabbu habaha wa Yisirayiri ati, “ Musengwa aloma ati, ‘Olwohuba Abalaamu baŋeega baati Musengwa , hatonda wohu sozi, sosi hatonda wʼebiiho, nja huŋayo eŋe eryejuleene eryo mu mihono jijo, otegeere oti ndiise Musengwa .’ ”
20.29: Abalaamu nʼAbayisirayiri bahena endaalo musanvu ni bali mu kambi jaawe ejaali ni jirengereene. Nga hulwomusanvu batandiha ohusoola. Abayisirayiri beeta Abalaamu emitwalo ehumi abohu magulu.
20.30: Abaŋona nga beyiba batiina mu hibuga Afeki eyi hiteepe ehigadirira ehibuga hyagwira hu mitwalo ebiri nʼakasanvu abaali ni basigaaye. Bbeni Hadadi geyiba gaduluma gatiina mu hibuga, gehweha eyo mu hisenge.
20.31: Ngʼabahungu babe bamuloma baati, “Huŋulira huuti abahabaha ba Yisirayiri bali nʼehisa. Husunga hutiine eyiri habaha wa Yisirayiri ni hwambaaye ebigwali mu bihunya nʼemigoye mu mamiro ohulaga enaku yeefe, somanya gahahulehaŋo mulamu.”
20.32: Nga beboŋa ebigwali mu bihunya nʼemigoye mu mamiro. Nga batiina eyiri habaha wa Yisirayiri bamuloma baati, “Omuŋeeresa wuwo Bbeni Hadadi aloma ati, ‘Kwegayirira, ndehe otanjita.’ ” Nga Ahabbu ababuusa ati, “Ahiiriŋo mulamu? Eŋuma wubi, oyo muganda yange.”
20.33: Abasinde abo nga baŋira engaluhamo ya habaha wa Yisirayiri ohuba ahabonero ahalaŋi era nga banguŋirisa ohugobolamo baati, “Mu butuufu Bbeni Hadadi mugandawo.” Nga Ahabbu abaloma ati, “Mutiine mumuleete.” Bbeni Hadadi ni gaŋwayo, nga Ahabbu amuŋambaho aniina mu higaali hihye.
20.34: Ngʼaŋo Bbeni Hadadi amuloma ati, “Nja huhugaluhisa ebibuga ebi bbaabba gaali nʼatuhiise hu lataawo era nʼoba ni wenda osobola ohwigulaŋo amaduuka e Damasiko ngʼolu bbaabba gahola mu Samaliya.” Nga Ahabbu aloma ati, “Nja huhuleeha ni neema hu weeyamo wuwo owo.” Ngʼahola endagaano ni naye, amuleha atiina. Naabbi asalira Ahabbu omusango
20.35: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa alagira mulala hu banaabbi alome owahye ati, “Kusunga wusimite ehisoosa hihyo.” Cooka owahye ngʼagaana.
20.36: Nga naabbi amuloma ati, “Ngʼolu ojemeeye Musengwa , onaabe wahaŋwa ŋano ngʼepologoma ehwita.” Era naabbi oyo gaali gahaŋwangaŋo ati ngʼepologoma emwita.
20.37: Nga nindi naabbi gagaana omuutu owundi, amuloma ati, “Kusunga wusimite ehisoosa hihyo.” Ngʼamusimita amukoosa.
20.38: Ngʼaŋo naabbi oyo gewihirira hu mutwe batamufaania, atiina geema hu luguudo ahuumirira habaha.
20.39: Habaha gaali abita, nga naabbi amulanga aloma ati, “Ese omuŋeeresa wuwo naali mu lutalo, nga ŋabaaŋo owajire eyi ndi nʼomusibe oyu baŋambire, nga gandoma ati ‘Huuma omuutu ono. Singa ahugotaho, ndiiwe oja huguhena mu hifo hihye oba oja huliŋa efeeza eŋera etalata enamba.’
20.40: Ni naali hu mirimo ejindi, omusibe oyo nga ganjeyibaho.” Nga habaha wa Yisirayiri amuloma ati, “Ehibonereso ehyo hihusaana era liŋa.”
20.41: Ngʼaŋo naabbi gewihula mangumangu. Nga habaha wa Yisirayiri amufaania ati gaali mulala hu banaabbi.
20.42: Nga naabbi oyo aloma habaha ati, “ Musengwa aloma ati, ‘Ngʼolu walehuuye omuutu oyu naali ni nendire ti afe, oja hufa mu hifo hihye era nʼabaatu babo baja hufa mu hifo hyʼababe.’ ”
20.43: Nga habaha wa Yisirayiri gagama ewuwe e Samaliya nʼabomboŋaaye era naluŋire.

21.1: Ŋaaliŋo omusinde ohuŋwa e Yezireeli oyu balanganga baati Nabbosi. Nabbosi gaali nʼendimiro yʼemizabbibbu ohulirana olubiri lwa habaha Ahabbu e Samaliya.
21.2: Nga Ahabbu aloma Nabbosi ati, “Leha pire endimiro yiyo eyʼemizabbibbu njihomemo eryani olwohuba erireene olubiri lwange. Nja huhuswanisamo endimiro eyʼemizabbibbu ehira yino obulaŋi oba onaba ni wenda nja huhugulaho hu bbeeyi endaŋi.”
21.3: Aye Nabbosi gamugobolamo ati, “Sipanga huhuŋa ndimiro eyi nasikira ohuŋwa hu basehulu bange.”
21.4: Nga Ahabbu gagamayo ewuwe nʼabomboŋaaye era naluŋire olwʼehi Nabbosi owʼe Yezireeli gamugobolamo ati, “Sipanga huhuŋa endimiro eyi nasikira ohuŋwa hu basehulu bange.” Ni goola engo, gatiina mombo galambaala hu buliri era gagaana nʼohuhomba hu hyomutamu.
21.5: Ngʼomuhasi wuwe Yezebbeeli gengira mu hisenge amubuusa ati, “Hiina ehihunakuŋahiise olwaga aŋo woola nʼohutalya emere?”
21.6: Nga Ahabbu amugobolamo ati, “Nendire ohugula endimiro ya Nabbosi owʼe Yezireeli oba ohumuswanisamo aye ageene galoma ati, ‘Sipanga huhuŋa ndimiro yange.’ ”
21.7: Nga omuhasi wuwe Yezebbeeli amuloma ati, “Sindiiwe habaha wa Yisirayiri? Kale ŋwa mu buliri, olye. Ewe ba mugumu ese nja huhuŋa endimiro yʼemizabbibbu eya Nabbosi Omuyezireeli.”
21.8: Ngʼaŋo Yezebbeeli aŋandiiha ebbaluŋa mu siina lya Ahabbu era ngʼataaho ahabonero hahe, ajiŋeeresa abatangirisi nʼabahungu bomu hibuga hyʼe Yezireeli omu Nabbosi amenya.
21.9: Mu bbaluŋa omwo gaŋandiiha ati, “Mulangirire oludaalo olwʼohusiiba mulange abaatu bahumbaane, mwihase Nabbosi mu hifo ehyomu moni.
21.10: Mutegehe abajulizi abʼobudulingi babiri beehale ni bamulengereeye bamulumirise baati gafodogola Hatonda ni habaha. Oluvanyuma mumutuse ebulafu wʼehibuga mumuhubbe amabaale afe.”
21.11: Ngʼaŋo abatangirisi nʼabahungu abaali ni bamenya mu hibuga ni Nabbosi bahola ngʼolu Yezebbeeli gaali nʼabalagiiye mu bbaluŋa.
21.12: Nga balangirira oludaalo olwʼohusiiba era nga behasa Nabbosi mu hifo ehyomu moni.
21.13: Ngʼabajulizi abʼobudulingi beehala ni bamulengereeye nga bamutaho emisango ni bamulumirisa baati, “Nabbosi gafodogola Hatonda ni habaha.” Olwʼehyo, nga bamuŋamba bamuŋira ebulafu wʼehibuga bamuhubba amabaale afa.
21.14: Ngʼabatangirisi bʼe Yezireeli baŋindihira Yezebbeeli obuhwenda ni baloma baati, “Bahubbire Nabbosi amabaale, gafa.”
21.15: Yezebbeeli ni gaŋulira ati bahubbire Nabbosi amabaale gafa ngʼaloma Ahabbu ati, “Yinyoheramo otiine, oŋire endimiro eyʼemizabbibbu eya Nabbosi Omuyezireeli eyi gaali nʼageene ohuhugusa olwohuba ŋaahani mufu!”
21.16: Ahabbu ni gaŋulira ti Nabbosi afuuye, genyoheramo gatiina ohweŋirira endimiro ya Nabbosi eyʼemizabbibbu.
21.17: Nga Musengwa aloma Eliya Omutisuubbi ati,
21.18: “Serengeta otiine wagaane Ahabbu habaha wa Yisirayiri aŋugira e Samaliya. Esaawa yino ali mu ndimiro ya Nabbosi genda ohuyiŋira ebe yiye.
21.19: Omulome oti, ‘ Musengwa aloma ati oluvanyuma lwʼohwita omuutu, oli huŋira nʼebiitu bibye?’ Mulome oti Musengwa aloma ati, ‘Mu hifo ehi mbwa jihombeeyemo amafugi ga Nabbosi, weesi jija huhomberamo agago.’ ”
21.20: Ahabbu ni gabona Eliya gamuloma ati, “Ewe mulabe wange, wunjaganirihiise?” Nga Eliya amugobolamo ati, “Kwaganirihiise olwohuba weŋayeeyo ohuhola ebibi mu moni ja Musengwa .
21.21: Musengwa aloma ati, ‘Nja huhuletaho endibo. Nja husihiirisa olulyo lulwo era nja husala hu Ahabbu hiisi musinde, haabe mwidu oba atali mwidu.
21.22: Amago gago gaja huba hya ga Yerobbowaamu omusaani wa Nebbati era hya ga Bbaasa omusaani wa Ahiya olwohuba wundeteeye ohuluŋa era waleetera Yisirayiri ohubbenga.’
21.23: “Era hu Yezebbeeli, Musengwa aloma ati, ‘Embwa jija huliira omubiri gugwe mu hibuga Yezireeli.’
21.24: “Embwa jija hulya abaatu ba Ahabbu abaja hufiira mu hibuga. Era esega jija hulya abo abaja hufiira mu byalo.”
21.25: Ŋaŋuma muutu yesiyesi oweŋerayo erala ohuhola ebibi mu moni ja Musengwa hya Ahabbu, omuhasi wuwe Yezebbeeli nʼamusendasenda.
21.26: Geebisya mu ngeri embi bugali, gajumirya ebibbote byʼAbamooli, aba Musengwa gabbinga mu hyalo ehi Bayisirayiri baaŋira. Ahabbu genenya
21.27: Eliya ni gahena ohuloma atyo, nga Ahabbu anabula ehyambalo hihye ehyohumugulu ohulaga enaku eyaali nʼemuŋambire, nga gambala ebigwali ngʼasiiba. Gagaana ohulya, gaŋenyuha mu bigwali era gatiina ŋano ni naŋala nʼabomboŋaaye.
21.28: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa aloma Eliya Omutisuubbi ati,
21.29: “Oweene ngʼolu Ahabbu geŋomehire mu moni jange? Olwʼehyo, sinja hwosa hu mago gage hibi nʼahiiri mulamu aye nja hugoosaho omusaani nʼali njʼaŋuga.”

22.1: Emyaha edatu jabitaŋo ni ŋaŋuma lutalo ŋagati wʼAlaamu ni Yisirayiri.
22.2: Aye mu mwaha ogwohudatu Yokosofaati habaha wa Yuda gaserengeta gatiina ohuhyalira habaha wa Yisirayiri.
22.3: Habaha wa Yisirayiri gaali alomire abahungu babe ati, “Ramosi Giliyaadi hyalo hyefe aye lwahiina ŋaŋuma ehi huli huholaŋo ohuhigobosa ohuŋwa hu habaha wʼe Alaamu?”
22.4: Nga Ahabbu abuusa Yokosofaati habaha wa Yuda ati, “Oja hupereheraho ohuwaagala Ramosi Giliyaadi?” Nga Yokosofaati amugobolamo ati, “Ese ni neewe huli muutu mulala, abaatu bange nʼababo njʼabeene era embalaasi jange nʼejijo njʼenyene.”
22.5: Aye Yokosofaati galoma Ahabbu habaha wa Yisirayiri ati, “Hiraŋi ohusooka ohwebuusaho hu Musengwa .”
22.6: Olwʼehyo Ahabbu habaha wa Yisirayiri gatumisa abanaabbi ebihumi bine ngʼababuusa ati, “Tiine numbe Ramosi Giliyaadi oba bbe?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Tiina olumbe, Musengwa aja huhuŋa obuŋangusi.”
22.7: Aye nga Yokosofaati abuusa ati, “Huŋumaaŋo ŋano naabbi wa Musengwa oyu huŋanga ohwebuusaho?”
22.8: Nga habaha wa Yisirayiri amugobolamo ati, “Ŋahiiriŋo naabbi oyu husobola ohwebuusaho hu Musengwa . Aye simwenda olwohuba sigandomaho hiraŋi ohutusaho ebibi byereere. Naabbi oyo nje Mikaaya omusaani wa Yimula.” Nga Yokosofaati amuloma ati, “Habaha otaloma otyo.”
22.9: Ngʼaŋo Ahabbu habaha wa Yisirayiri atuma mulala hu bahungu babe aleete Mikaaya omusaani wa Yimula mangumangu.
22.10: Habaha wa Yisirayiri ni Yokosofaati habaha wa Yuda bambala ebyambalo ebyʼobuŋugi. Nga beehala hu tebe jaawe ejʼobuŋugi mu hifo aŋa basiritiranga engaano ohuupi nʼomulyango ogwengira mu Samaliya. Abanaabbi bosibosi baali balihuŋa obunaabbi waawe mu moni jʼabahabaha abo.
22.11: Zedekiya omusaani wa Kenaana, mulala hu banaabbi abo, gaali abbotire ameega agʼehyoma ngʼalangirira ati, “ Musengwa aloma ati, ‘Oja hugonga Abalaamu nʼameega gano era oja hubasihiirisa.’ ”
22.12: Era abanaabbi abandi bosibosi baali baloma cʼehyene baati, “Lumba Ramosi Giliyaadi era oja huŋangula olwohuba Musengwa aja hubaŋaayo mu mihono ja habaha.”
22.13: Ngʼomuhwenda owatiina ohulanga Mikaaya amuloma ati, “Abanaabbi bala bosibosi balomire biraŋi byereere ni balaga baati habaha aja huŋangula. Olwʼehyo, weesi tiina olome cʼehyene.”
22.14: Aye Mikaaya gamugobolamo ati, “Mu butuufu ngʼolu Musengwa Hatonda ali njʼomwene bulamu, nja huloma ehi Musengwa aja hundoma ohuloma hyoŋene.”
22.15: Mikaaya ni goola, nga Habaha Ahabbu amubuusa ati, “Mikaaya, hulumbe Ramosi Giliyaadi oba bbe?” Nga Mikaaya amugobolamo ati, “Mulumbe, Musengwa aja hubaŋa obuŋangusi.”
22.16: Nga Ahabbu aloma Mikaaya ati, “Nahoose ŋe ohuhuloma ti nʼoba nʼoloma ni nange mu siina lya Musengwa , oli nʼohuloma amazima?”
22.17: Ngʼaŋo Mikaaya amugobolamo ati, “Mbwene eŋe lya Yisirayiri ni lisalanihiiye hu lusozi ni liri hyʼetaama ejiŋumaho mwayi, nga Musengwa aloma ati, ‘Abaatu abo baŋuma mutangirisi, leha bagameyo miyaaya mu mago gaawe.’ ”
22.18: Nga Ahabbu habaha wa Yisirayiri aloma Yokosofaati ati, “Sikulomere ti oyo sigandomaho hiraŋi hyosihyosi ohutusaho ebibi byereere?”
22.19: Nga Mikaaya geyongera aloma ati, “Tega ohutwi, oŋulire ehi Musengwa aloma: Mbwene Musengwa ni gehaaye hu tebe yiye eyʼobuŋugi, abamalayika abomwigulu ni bamweswanigirihiise hu muhono omulungi nʼomugooda.
22.20: Nga Musengwa abuusa ati, ‘Njʼani aja hutiina asendesende Ahabbu habaha wa Yisirayiri alumbe abaatu bʼe Ramosi Giliyaadi bamwitire eyo?’ “Nga ono aloma hino, ngʼola aloma hira.
22.21: Ehyaŋwamo, nga ŋabaaŋo omwoyo ogwatiina gwaloma Musengwa guuti, ‘Ese nja hutiina musendasende.’
22.22: “Ngʼaŋo Musengwa agubuusa ati, ‘Mu ngeri hi?’ “Ngʼomwoyo ogwo gumugobolamo guuti, ‘Nja hutiina ndeetere abanaabbi babe bosibosi ohuloma ebyʼobudulingi.’ “Nga Musengwa aguloma ati, ‘Oja husobola, kale tiina ohihole.’ ”
22.23: Nga Mikaaya aloma Ahabbu ati “Olwʼehyo, Musengwa ataaye omwoyo ogwʼobudulingi mu banaabbi babo bano bosibosi. Musengwa asalireeŋo ati otiine osihiirihe.”
22.24: Ngʼaŋo Zedekiya omusaani wa Kenaana atiina ahubba Mikaaya oluŋi mu moni ahena amuloma ati, “Omwoyo wa Musengwa gapooyeho atye gaaba hu ewe?”
22.25: Nga Mikaaya amugobolamo ati, “Ehyo oja huhifaania olu oliba mu hisenge ni wehwehire.”
22.26: Nga habaha wa Yisirayiri alagira ati, “Muŋambe Mikaaya mumuŋire ewa Amoni gavana wʼehibuga nʼeyiri Yowaasi omusaani wa habaha
22.27: obalome oti, ‘Habaha alagiiye ati omusinde oyo mumudanye mu komera. Era mumuŋe ahamere hadiidiri ko nʼamaaji ohwola olu nahagobole miyaaya.’ ”
22.28: Nga Mikaaya amuloma ati, “Nʼoja hugobola mulamu, Musengwa aliba sinje owundomeeyemo.” Ngʼameedaho ati, “Mwesimwesi mwetegerese ehi ndoma.” Ahabbu afiira e Ramosi Giliyaadi
22.29: Nga habaha wa Yisirayiri ni Yokosofaati habaha wa Yuda balumba ehibuga hyʼe Ramosi Giliyaadi.
22.30: Nga habaha wa Yisirayiri aloma Yokosofaati ati, “Ese sinja hwambala engoye ejʼobuŋugi ni tiina mu lutalo aye ewe yambala.” Olwʼehyo habaha wa Yisirayiri gatiina mu lutalo nʼatambaaye engoye jʼobuŋugi olwʼohutenda bamufaanie.
22.31: Habaha wʼAlaamu gaali alagiiye abaduumisi adatu nababiri abʼebigaali ati, “Mutasoola nʼomuutu owundi yesiyesi ohutusaho habaha wa Yisirayiri yeŋene.”
22.32: Abaduumisi bʼebigaali ni babona Yokosofaati mu byambalo byʼobuŋugi, nga baŋeega baati, “Mu butuufu ono nje habaha wa Yisirayiri.” Nga bamucuuhira bamulumba. Aye Yokosofaati gaanira ŋamugulu
22.33: ne abaduumisi bʼebigaali ni bahifaania baati sinje habaha wa Yisirayiri, balehera aŋo ohumulumba.
22.34: Aye mulala hu basirikale ba Alaamu galasa ahasaale ni ŋaŋuma higendererwa nga hafumita Ahabbu habaha wa Yisirayiri mu hifo aŋaŋuma ehimugadirira. Ahasaale ni hamufumita ngʼaloma omufugi wʼehigaali ati, “Tuse ŋano, bafumitire.”
22.35: Hyaŋunya hu ludaalo olwo lwosirwosi era habaha wa Yisirayiri nga gediira ni gemereeye mu higaali hihye alengerera Abalaamu. Amafugi ohuŋwa mu hifumitire gahuluhutira mu higaali hihye, ngʼehyegulo ehyo, afa.
22.36: Esaawa ni yaali ni yija hugwa mu maaji, batusa ehiragiro mu kambi yʼabasirikale baati, “Hiisi muutu gagameyo mu hibuga hihye. Hiisi muutu gagamayo mu hyalo hyʼewaawe.”
22.37: Habaha gafa nga bamuŋira bamusiiha e Samaliya.
22.38: Era hu hidiba hyʼe Samaliya ehi bamalaaya basaabirangamo, pohu boohesa amafugi gage agaali hu higaali hihye. Ngʼembwa jihomba amafugi ago ohwoheresa ehi Musengwa galoma.
22.39: Ebiitu ebindi ebyomu buŋugi wa Ahabbu nga pumuli byosibyosi ebi gahola nʼohutongola olubiri galudirikinyaho nʼamasyaka genjofu nʼebibuga ebi gatongoleraho ebiteepe ohweswanigirisa, babiŋandiiha mu hitabo hyʼebyafaayo byʼabahabaha ba Yisirayiri.
22.40: Ahabbu gaŋuumula nga bamusiiha mu mbafu jʼabasehulu baawe. Nga Ahaziya omusaani amugobola mu magulu nga habaha. Yokosofaati habaha wa Yuda
22.41: Mu mwaha ogwohune ogwʼobuŋugi wa Ahabbu habaha wa Yisirayiri, Yokosofaati omusaani wa Asa gafuuha habaha wa Yuda.
22.42: Yokosofaati gafuuha habaha wa Yuda nʼali nʼemyaha adatu nʼetaanu era gaŋuga emyaha abiri nʼetaanu mu Yerusaalemu. Nyina gaali nje Azubba omuhaana wa Siluhi.
22.43: Yokosofaati gaali nʼesambo endaŋi hyʼeja semwana Asa era gahola ebiraŋi mu moni ja Musengwa . Cooka sibatusaŋo masabo era abaatu batiina mu moni ni baŋeerayo eŋongo, ni badunyihisayo nʼobubbaani.
22.44: Era ŋaaliŋo emirembe ŋagati wa Yokosofaati ni habaha wa Yisirayiri.
22.45: Ebiitu ebindi ebyomu buŋugi wa Yokosofaati, nʼebiitu ebi gasuna nʼetalo eji gasoola, babiŋandiiha mu hitabo hyʼebyafaayo byʼabahabaha ba Yuda.
22.46: Yokosofaati gatusaŋo abasinde nʼabahasi abamalaaya abaŋeeresanga mu ngolo abaali ni basigaayeŋo mu mulembe gwa Asa semwana.
22.47: Mu hiseera ehyo Edomu siyaali ni habaha aye omuhungu wa habaha wa Yuda njʼowaŋuganga.
22.48: Yokosofaati gaabbota emeeri ejiŋeraho ohutiinanga mu Ofiri ohusubuula ni jireeta ezaabbu aye sijatiina olwohuba jabbwagihira mu Eziyoni Gebberi.
22.49: Mu biseera ebyo Ahaziya omusaani wa Ahabbu galoma Yokosofaati ati, “Leha abaŋeeresa bange basaabalenga nʼababo mu meeri.” Aye Yokosofaati gagaana.
22.50: Yokosofaati gafa bamusiiha mu mbafu jʼabasehulu babe mu hibuga hya Dawudi. Omusaani Yokolaamu gamugobola mu magulu nga habaha. Ahaziya habaha wa Yisirayiri
22.51: Mu mwaha ogwʼehumi namusanvu ogwʼobuŋugi wa Yokosofaati habaha wa Yuda, Ahaziya omusaani wa Ahabbu gafuuha habaha wa Yisirayiri era gaŋuga emyaha ebiri mu Samaliya.
22.52: Ahaziya gahola ebibi mu moni ja Musengwa , galonda esambo ja semwana ni nyina era nʼeja Yerobbowaamu omusaani wa Nebbati owaleetera Yisirayiri ohubbenga.
22.53: Hya semwana, Ahaziya gaŋeeresanga era gajumiryanga Bbaali, ehyo hyaleetera Musengwa Hatonda wa Yisirayiri ohuluŋa.

1.1: Gesiimire oyo ataholera hu magesi gʼabahosi bʼebibi oba ohuŋamba engira yʼabahola ebibi oba ohwihala ŋalala nʼabanyooma Hatonda.
1.2: Aye ehimusangaasa njʼohugonderanga amagambi ga Musengwa era agaŋeegaho omuusi nʼowiire.
1.3: Omuutu oyo ali hyʼomusaala ogu baahoma ohuupi nʼesulo jʼamaaji, ogwama ebibala mu hiseera era amahoose gaagwo sigaŋotoha. Ahulahulana mu hiisi ehi ahola.
1.4: Aye abahosi bʼebibi sibali baatyo, bali hyʼomuhuuji ogu punga efuuŋa gwadumuuha.
1.5: Olwʼehyo abahosi bʼebibi sibaliŋunuha hubasalira musango, era sibaja hweŋimba mu luhumbaano lwʼabagwalaafu.
1.6: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Musengwa alabirira abagwalaafu, ne abahosi bʼebibi baja husihiiriha.

2.1: Lwahiina amawanga gahuluŋira ohwaga aŋo era abaatu bagesyaho ohuhusalira oluhwe oluŋumamo.
2.2: Abahabaha hu hyalo bahwesoomera, nʼabaŋugi bahumbaana ŋalala ohusoosa Musengwa ni nooyo oyu bajuhaho amafuta ni baloma baati,
2.3: “Muhole hukapule enjegere jaawe era hwetuseho nʼepingu jaawe.”
2.4: Oyo owihaaye mwigulu hu tebe eyʼobuŋugi abajeherera, Musengwa atala etegeha jaawe.
2.5: Era abahayula nʼobusungu, gabahanga nʼehiruŋi ati,
2.6: “Natongosa habaha wange hu lusozi lwange Sayuuni olwawufu.”
2.7: Habaha aloma ati, “Nja hulangirira ehiragiro hya Musengwa ehi gandoma ati, ‘Oli mwana wange, olwa leero kusaaye.
2.8: Sunge era nja huhuŋa amawanga gosigosi ohuba obusika wuwo, ehyalo hyosihyosi hibe ŋaasi wʼobuŋangi wuwo.
2.9: Olibaŋuga nʼesimbo eyʼehyoma era olibatetenula hyʼatetenula esongo.’ ”
2.10: Olwʼehyo bahabaha enywe mugobolemo amagesi, enywe abaŋugi bʼehyalo mwege bino.
2.11: Muŋeeresenga Musengwa nʼohutya. Era musaŋalyenga nʼohutetema.
2.12: Hubbira Omusaani amafuha ko obusungu butamuŋamba gabaluŋira era hyabaŋweramo ohusihiiriha. Besiimire abo bosibosi abenda Musengwa abayeede.

3.1: O Musengwa , nga ndi nʼabalabe bangi! Era nga bangi abanjesoomera.
3.2: Bangi bandoma baati, “Hatonda saaja humununula.”
3.3: Aye Musengwa , ndiiwe engabo yange, ndiiwe owuupa obuŋangusi era wangobosamo amaani.
3.4: Ndiririra Musengwa ni nenda obuyeedi, era ganjeeda ohuŋwa hu lusozi olwawufu.
3.5: Penyuha bulaŋi weene era nasisimuha ni buhyeye olwohuba Musengwa gakuuma.
3.6: Sinja hutya abalabe eduuli abanjeswanigirihise enjuyi josijosi.
3.7: O Musengwa , nja wunoŋole, O Hatonda wange! Hubba abalabe bange obabbwagemo ageeno.
3.8: Musengwa , ogima hwaŋangula, leha ekabi jijo jibe hu baatu babo.

4.1: O Hatonda omutukuvu, ngobolemo ni kusunga. Wanjeeda ni naali mu bigosi. Kusunga wupambire ehisa, oŋulire ohusaba hwange.
4.2: Baatu enywe mulyosa ŋeena ohuswasa? Mulyosa ŋeena ohwenda ebinambulamo, nʼohuholera hu byʼobudulingi nʼohujumirya abahatonda obʼobudulingi?
4.3: Aye muhimanye muuti Musengwa getobolera abaatu abahola ebiruŋamu ohuba ababe, Musengwa aja huŋulira ohusaba hwange.
4.4: Ŋanabaŋo ehibaluŋia mwehuumenga ohutabaleetera huhola hibi. Nʼoba hu buliri wuwo, maŋoleeye ŋeeganga hu bibono bino.
4.5: Muŋengayo eŋongo eyisaana era mwesigenga Musengwa .
4.6: Bangi basaba baati, “O Musengwa , tuŋe ekabi era tulage ehyere.”
4.7: Wupaaye esangaalo eryʼamaani ohuhiraho eryabo abali nʼemere embitiirifu ko nʼomwenge epiiraŋo.
4.8: Nja huŋenyuha ni puma ehineralihirisa olwohuba Musengwa wukuuma.

5.1: O Musengwa , tegere ohutwi oŋulire ebi ndoma, ŋulira ohubinda hwange.
5.2: Hatonda era Habaha wange, ŋulira ohweririgana hwange.
5.3: O Musengwa , mu mugamba oŋulira ohusaba hwange, mu mugamba kwanjulira ebi nenda wunjeede, era nahuumirira ohungobolamo.
5.4: Sooli Hatonda asangaalira ehibi, era hiisi ahola ehibi saaba bulala ni neewe.
5.5: Abepaahapaaha sibasobola hwemeerera mu moni jijo, ocaawa bosibosi abahola ebibi.
5.6: Osihiirisa abo abaloma ebyʼobudulingi, era Musengwa ocaawa abo abeeti nʼabadulingi.
5.7: Aye olwʼehisa hihyo ehibitiirifu, nja hwingira mu nyumba yiyo, sobole ohuhujumirya mu Yekaalu yiyo enjawufu.
5.8: O Musengwa , tangirire kolenga ehi wenda, olwohuba ndi nʼabalabe bangi. Ndage engira eyi ndi nʼohuŋamba.
5.9: Ebi balabe bange baloma sibituufu, emyoyo jaawe jijuuye bibi byereere. Ebi baloma biŋunya ehibulu hyʼehigombe, ebi baloma bya budulingi.
5.10: O Hatonda, basalire omusango. Bo abeene babe nja bagwa mu mitego jaawe. Babbinge mu moni jijo olwʼebibi byawe ebingi, olwohuba bahujeemera.
5.11: Aye leha abo bosibosi abadulumira eyi oli ohusuna obuhuumi basaŋalye, leha bembenga olwʼesangaalo. Huuma abo abahwenda bahaba nʼesangaalo.
5.12: O Musengwa , hiri hiityo olwohuba oŋa abahola ebiruŋamu ekabi. Obeswanigirisa nʼehyere hihyo hyʼengabo.

6.1: O Musengwa , otakayula nʼobusungu, oba wapaamo endabusi nʼehiruŋi.
6.2: O Musengwa , pambire ehisa olwohuba gapooye. O Musengwa , ponie olwohuba amagumba ganduma bugali.
6.3: Ndi mweralihirifu bugali mu mwoyo gwange. O Musengwa , olyosa ŋe, olyosa ŋe nʼotanjeeda?
6.4: O Musengwa , nja wununule noŋole olwʼohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu.
6.5: Eŋuma ahuhebulira nʼafuuye. Njʼani ahujumirya nʼali emagombe?
6.6: Ohubinda olwʼobulumi hukenireemo, owiire wosiwosi mbamu hulira era mbandya amasiga hu buliri wange.
6.7: Olwʼohulira obugali emoni jange sijihiibona bulaŋi, emoni jibona biroliroli olwʼamasiga aga balabe bange bandeteeye.
6.8: Mupwereŋo enywe mwesimwesi abahola ebibi olwohuba Musengwa aŋuliiye ohulira hwange.
6.9: Musengwa aŋuliiye ohwerira hwange ni sunga ohusasira era aŋuliiye ohusaba hwange.
6.10: Abalabe bange bosibosi baja huswala era baŋwemo amaani, badulume ni bataheja yinyuma!

7.1: O Musengwa , Hatonda wange, neŋogoma mu ndiiwe. Noŋole era nunule mu baatu bosibosi abakiyaania,
7.2: otabaleha hudweduula hyʼepologoma era nʼohungusulagusula ni ŋaŋuma wahuponia.
7.3: O Musengwa , Hatonda wange, ni mba ni nahola ehibi hyosihyosi era ni mba ni nabbenga hu muutu yesiyesi,
7.4: oba ni nalya mu meeri yange oluhwe, oba ni nahola ehibi hu mulabe wange aŋaŋuma songa yosiyosi,
7.5: ale leha omulabe wange gambinge ahene gapambe, leha gafulyafulye mwiroba, ganjite era gandehe ni fuuye.
7.6: O Musengwa , yinyoha nʼobusungu, osoose abalabe bange abahambwe. O Hatonda, baaho nʼehi ohola, laga ohutehubbira.
7.7: Humbaania abaatu bosibosi bahweswanigirise, obaŋuge ni weema mwigulu.
7.8: Leha Musengwa asalire abaatu omusango. O Musengwa , njejeerese omusango ni weema hu biruŋamu ebi kola, ni weema hu bugwalaafu wange, ewe Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali.
7.9: O Hatonda, omwawufu era ohebera emyoyo nʼebiŋeego, simya ababi nʼebikolwa byawe, ko abahola ebiruŋamu babe bulaŋi.
7.10: Hatonda Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali njʼengabo yange, oyo anoŋola abo abamugondera.
7.11: Hatonda asala emisango nʼatehubbira, habuhyabuhya aluŋira abahola ebibi.
7.12: Aja huŋagala epiima yiye singa sibegaluhaho, era aja hutega omutego gugwe.
7.13: Ategehire ebisoosa bibye ebyʼobusagwa, nʼohulasa obusaale owaduha omuliro.
7.14: Oyo owijuuye ehibi getegehire ohuhola ebibi era hiisi ehi aloma hya budulingi.
7.15: Eroŋo eri weyabiiye njʼerihulya ewe omwene.
7.16: Ebigosi ebi gendesa abahye, bimugobolera omwene ebibi bibye bimugobolera omwene.
7.17: Neyaasenga Musengwa olwohuba sigehubbira era nembenga ohujumirya Musengwa Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali.

8.1: O Musengwa , Musengwa weefe, ngʼoli wʼamaani mu hyalo hyosihyosi! Era eŋono liryo lyaŋamugulu ohuhiraho egulu.
8.2: Wagunjula abaana abaŋere nʼebiwegera ohuhujumirya. Mu ngeri eyo wasimya abalabe babo.
8.3: Ni keja hwigulu eri watonda nʼomwesi nʼemunyeenye ebi wata aŋa biri,
8.4: omuutu njʼani ohuba ti omuŋeegaho era omwana wʼomuutu njʼani ohuba ti omulumirwa?
8.5: Wahola omuutu ŋabuliraho ŋadiidiri ohuba hyʼabamalayika. Era wamwambasa engule eyʼeŋono.
8.6: Ngʼomuŋa nʼobuŋangi hu biitu byosibyosi. Era wamwambasa engule eyʼeŋono. Wamuŋa ohuŋuga ebiitu byosibyosi ebi watonda,
8.7: etaama nʼeŋombe josijosi ko nʼesolo ejomwisugu
8.8: nʼenyuni ejomu bbanga nʼenyeeni ejomu nyanja nʼebitonde ebindi byosibyosi mu nyanja.
8.9: O Musengwa , Musengwa weefe, ngʼoli wʼamaani mu hyalo hyosihyosi!

9.1: O Musengwa , nahujumiryenga nʼomwoyo gwange gwosigwosi era nja hulomeranga abaatu ebiŋamba hu biitu ebyeŋunjisa ebi ohola.
9.2: Nja husangaala era saŋalye olwʼewe, nja hwemba ni kujumirya, ewe Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali.
9.3: Abalabe bange bagobolayo hinyumanyuma, batagala era basihiirihira mu moni jijo.
9.4: Hiri hiityo olwohuba osalire omusango nʼotehubbira nasinga, wihaaye hu tebe yiyo eyʼobuŋugi wasala emisango nʼotehubbira.
9.5: Osaliiye amawanga omusango era wasihiirisa abahosi bʼebibi, wasangula nʼamasiina gaawe gaŋweraŋo erala hu hyalo emirembe nʼemirembe.
9.6: Abalabe beefe baŋwereyeŋo erala emirembe nʼemirembe. Osihiirihise ebibuga byawe era ŋaŋume aja hubahebulira.
9.7: Musengwa aŋuga emirembe nʼemirembe, atayeeŋo etebe yiye eyʼobuŋugi ohusaliraho emisango.
9.8: Aja husalira ehyalo hino emisango nʼatehubbira, aja huŋuga abaatu mu mazima.
9.9: Aba banyigirisa beŋogoma mu Musengwa , ehifo ehyʼohweŋogomamo mu biseera ebigosi.
9.10: Abahumanyire baja huhwesiga. Hiri hiityo olwohuba Musengwa siwibirira abo abahwendula.
9.11: Mwembe ni mujumirya Musengwa , oyo aŋugira mu Sayuuni, mulomere abaatu bosibosi ebi ahola.
9.12: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Hatonda ahebulira abo ababonaabona, sigebirira hulira hwawe era aja huboneresa abo ababagudya.
9.13: Pambire ehisa, O Musengwa ! Bona engeri eyi abalabe bange bakiyaaniamo! Pambire ehisa wuponie ohufa.
9.14: Pambire ehisa nahalangirira etendo liryo eyiri abaatu abomu Sayuuni, sangaale olwohuba wunoŋooye.
9.15: Abahosi bʼebibi baguuye mwiroŋo eri beene baayaba, baguuye mu mutego ogu beene baatega.
9.16: Musengwa bamumanyire olwʼohusala emisango nʼatehubbira aye abahosi bʼebibi babaŋambihisya mu hubbenga hwawe ohwene.
9.17: Abahosi bʼebibi bosibosi baja hufa, abaatu bosibosi abatajumirya Hatonda.
9.18: Aye Hatonda saaja hwibirira abagadi era esuubi lyawe sirija hufiiririra emirembe nʼemirembe.
9.19: O Musengwa , yinyoha otaganya muutu huŋunuha musango. Leha baaje eyi oli obasalire omusango.
9.20: O Musengwa , bateetemye bahahutya. Leha bamanye baati baatu buutu.

10.1: O Musengwa , lwahiina otuli ŋaleeŋi? Lwahiina otwehweha ni huli mu bigosi?
10.2: Omuhosi wʼebibi abona ati njʼahihenaho era abahiyaania abagadi, era abaŋambihisya mu mitego jije eji abatega.
10.3: Ahola ebibi gepaaha olwʼebikolwa bibye ebibi, gapaaha abanyagulula ebyʼabahyawe era atala Musengwa .
10.4: Olwʼohwepaahapaaha hwʼomuhosi wʼebibi oyo, saafayo humanya Musengwa era samuŋa hifo mu bulamu wuwe.
10.5: Abitaamo mu hiisi ehi ahola. Aye samanyire ati ohumusalira omusango humuhuumiriiye, anyooma abalabe babe.
10.6: Omuhosi wʼebibi geromaho omwene ati, “Ŋaŋuma ehija hukaya ohuhola era ŋaŋuma higosi.”
10.7: Omunwa gugwe gujofumula hujofumula ebiŋwabo, nʼobudulingi nʼohutiisatiisa, mwangu ohuloma ebibi hu bahye.
10.8: Geteega mwisugu nʼahuumirira ohwita abaatu abamuŋumaho musango. Era hiisi hiseera gendula abaŋumaho songa.
10.9: Ali hyʼepologoma eyeteega, geteega ohuŋamba abaŋuma punga yiita hiswa ngʼabadyedyesa mu lutuula lulwe.
10.11: Aloma mu mwoyo gugwe ati, “Hatonda saafayo, alimbiriiye era saaja hutubona.”
10.12: O Musengwa , yinyoha! O Hatonda, leha babonaabone. Otebirira abo ababanyigirisa.
10.13: Lwahiina omuhosi wʼebibi anyooma Hatonda? Lwahiina aloma mu mwoyo gugwe ati, “Saaja huvunaana.”
10.14: Aye ewe Hatonda obona ohubonaabona nʼohulira hwange, era hiisi hiseera oliŋo ohunjeeda. Abaŋuma aŋa bali, bahweŋaaye ndiiwe oyeeda abafuubbi.
10.15: Bbwagabbwaga amaani gʼomuhosi wʼebibi mulome genyonyoleho olwʼebibi bibye, omuvunaane olwʼebikolwa bibye ebibi.
10.16: Musengwa nje Habaha owʼemirembe nʼemirembe. Abo abajumirya abahatonda abandi baja husihiiriha baŋwe hu hyalo hihye.
10.17: O Musengwa , oŋulira ohwegomba hwʼabaatu babo ababonaabona, obagobosamo amaani era oŋulira ohulira hwawe.
10.18: Oŋulira ohulira hwʼabo aba banyigirisa ko nʼabafuubbi. Oja hubayeeda bahire omusango, ko abaatu balehere aŋo ohubeŋendeheresa.

11.1: Obanga mu Musengwa pomu neŋogoma, hiija hiitye ohundoma muuti, “Weguluhire hyʼenyuni otiine hu sozi?”
11.2: Hiri hiityo olwohuba abahosi bʼebibi balasa obusaale, beteegire ohulasa abagwalaafu obusaale.
11.3: Hiina ehi omuutu omugwalaafu asobola ohuhola ebiitu binaba ni byonoonohire?
11.4: Musengwa ali mu Yekaalu yiye enjawufu, Musengwa gehaaye hu tebe yiye eyʼobuŋugi mwigulu. Amanyire byosibyosi ebi baatu bahola, emoni jije jibetololamo.
11.5: Musengwa ahebera abahola ebiruŋamu, aye acaawa abo abahosi bʼebibi nʼabenda ohukosa abahyawe.
11.6: Musengwa aja hujofumula omuliro nʼobuganga wa salufa, nʼembeŋo eyohya bugali hu bahosi bʼebibi basihiirihe.
11.7: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Musengwa mwawufu, olwʼehyo genda ebikolwa ebiraŋi. Era hiisi ahola ebiraŋi aja humubona moni hu moni.

12.1: O Musengwa , tunoŋole olwohuba abaatu abesigwa baŋwaŋo, abaatu abʼamazima baŋumaŋo.
12.2: Hiisi muutu ahola gwahudulinga wahye, beŋoomya hu mugulu ni baloma aye mugati mula ni bejuuye budulingi wereere.
12.3: O Musengwa , simya abo abaloma ni beŋoomya era limba hu hiisi munwa gwʼabo abepaahapaaha
12.4: ni bebuuja baati, “Efe hunaloma ŋaŋuma wundi aloma era huja husuna hiisi ehi hwenda, njʼani musengwa yeefe?”
12.5: Nga Musengwa aloma ati, “Nja huuja olwohuba banyigirisa abagadi nʼolwohuhiyaania ohubabahiyaania abo ababinda. Nja hwinyoheramo tiine mbaŋe obuhuumi ngʼolu basunga.”
12.6: Ebi Musengwa asuubisa biŋumaaho hamogo era ebibono bibye biri hyʼefeeza eyi bata hu muliro hyʼezaabbu eyi bahenenulamo obucaafu efunda musanvu.
12.7: O Musengwa , tuhuumenga otuŋonie ababi abʼomulembe guno.
12.8: Abahosi bʼebibi bali hiisi ŋaatu era hiisi muutu abapaaha olwʼebibi ebi bahola.

13.1: O Musengwa , olyosa ŋe ohunjerabira emirembe nʼemirembe? Olyosa ŋeena ohunjehweha?
13.2: Nja hwosa ŋe ohwehaliriha ebigosi? Nahoose ŋe ohuba nʼenaku hu mwoyo gwange omuusi nʼowiire? Omulabe wange aja hwosa ŋe ohutyakirira?
13.3: O Musengwa , Hatonda wange, kwegayirira wuupe ehi kusunga. Ngobosemo amaani, otandeha hufa.
13.4: Abalabe bange baja huloma baati, “Humuŋanguuye.” Era singa bapangula, hija hubaleetera ohusaŋalya.
13.5: Aye kwesiga olwohuba wunyenda bugali, era sangaalira obununuzi wuwo.
13.6: Nja hwembera Musengwa olwohuba mulaŋi eyi ndi.

14.1: Omuŋubeebe aloma mu mwoyo gugwe ati, “Ŋaŋumaaŋo Hatonda.” Bahosi bʼebibi, ebi bahola byambiho. Era ŋaŋuma wayire mulala ahola ehiraŋi.
14.2: Musengwa aba mwigulu galengerera baatu ŋaasi hu hyalo, abone oba ŋaliŋo omuutu yesiyesi ategeera, yesiyesi amwendula.
14.3: Aye bosibosi baaŋaba, bosibosi ŋalala bahola ebibi. Era eŋuma wayire mulala ahola ebiruŋamu.
14.4: Abahosi bʼebibi, sibaja hwega? Bahenireŋo ohulya abaatu bange oti balya mere era sibasunga Musengwa ohubayeeda.
14.5: Aye bulihya lulala jabagaana olwohuba Hatonda ali ŋalala ni naabo abahola ebiruŋamu.
14.6: Enywe abahosi bʼebibi muhayisa etegeha jʼabagadi aye Musengwa ahuuma ababe.
14.7: Era saba ti omuutu aŋwe mu Sayuuni anunule Yisirayiri! Musengwa nʼaligobosa abaatu babe bunyaaha, leha olulyo lwa Yakobbo lusangaale era Yisirayiri asaŋalye!

15.1: O Musengwa , njʼani anaabenga mu Weema yiyo Enjawufu? Njʼani aja humenya hu lusozi lulwo olwawufu?
15.2: Njʼoyo agondera Hatonda era ahola ebiraŋi habuhyabuhya, oyo aloma amazima nʼomwoyo gugwe gwosigwosi.
15.3: Era ataŋayirisa wahye, atahola bahye hibi, era saaloma byakalebule hu bahye.
15.4: Njʼoyo anyooma abaatu aba Hatonda acaawa aye aŋa eŋono abo abatya Musengwa , era njʼoyo owoheresa ehi gayama wayire hiba higumu hiitye.
15.5: Njʼoyo aŋola ndʼateho magoba era njʼoyo atalya nguzi nʼasala emisango. Oyo ahola ebyo byosibyosi, ŋaŋuma ehirimwolaho emirembe nʼemirembe.

16.1: Kusunga wukuume, O Hatonda, olwohuba ndiiwe oyu nesiga.
16.2: Naloma Musengwa ti, “Ndiiwe Musengwa wange, ebiraŋi byosibyosi ebi ndi ni nabyo ewe ndiiwe obiipa.”
16.3: Abagwalaafu babo abali mu hyalo hino, njʼabeŋono abanesiimisa ohuba ni nabo.
16.4: Abo abajumirya abahatonda abandi baja hweyongera ohubonaabona bugali. Sinja hwegaata ni nabo mu huŋonga hwawe era sinja hujumirya bahatonda baawe.
16.5: O Musengwa , ewe ndiiwe owange. Ndiiwe owuupa ebi ndi ni nabyo. Obulamu wange, buli mu mihono jijo era ŋaŋuma ehi tya.
16.6: Eroba eri waapa eraŋi bugali, era mu butuufu oweene, omugabo ogwobusika wange mulaŋi.
16.7: Nja hwebasanga Musengwa owutangirira, era owiire omwoyo gwange gundabula.
16.8: Manyire ti Musengwa ali ni neese habuhyabuhya era olwohuba ali ni neese, sinja hweŋendeherera.
16.9: Cʼehigira omwoyo gwange gusaŋalya, nʼolulimi lwange lusangaafu era mbula ehiitiisa mu bulamu wange.
16.10: Solireha mwoyo gwange ohusigala e magombe era solireha Omwawufu wuwo ohubolerayo.
16.11: Wundaga engira eyipira mu bulamu. Ohuba huupi ni neese, hiipa esangaalo. Ohuba hu muhono gugwo omulungi hiipa esangaalo eryʼemirembe nʼemirembe.

17.1: O Musengwa , ŋulira ohweŋosyaho hwange ohwʼamazima. Ŋulira ohusaba hwange, sihwabudulingi.
17.2: Ndiiwe osobola ohusala omusango nejeerera, olwohuba omanyire abahola ebiraŋi.
17.3: Nʼoluwehebeja omwoyo gwange, era owiire wendulirisa ebigulimo, nʼoluwungezesa, sooja husaŋaanamo hibi. Neeyama ohutaloma ehibi.
17.4: Ngondera ebiragiro bibyo era ehyo hindeetera ohweŋala amagira aga batemu.
17.5: Hiisi obuhya ngendera mu ngira yiyo, amagendere gange gahiiri njʼameene.
17.6: O Hatonda, kulomba era oja hungobolamo, tegere ohutwi era oŋulire ohusaba hwange.
17.7: Laga ohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu. Nunula abo abadulumira eyi oli abo abahwesiga, obaŋonia abalabe baawe.
17.8: Kuume ngʼolu ohuuma emunge yʼemoni yiyo, kwehe mu hisisigo hyʼamabaŋa gago,
17.10: Baŋuma hisa era baba mu hwepaahapaaha.
17.11: Banjenduririhise era baneswanigirihise, bakeeta babone hiisi aŋanja, banjehoyera bakeneŋo.
17.12: Bali hyʼepologoma eyi njala eruma hyʼepologoma eyʼamaani eyiri mu hyehwehere negunjiriiye ehi enalye.
17.13: O Musengwa , yinyoheramo, baŋiriŋanie era obaŋangule tambisa epiima yiyo wununule ohuŋwa mu mihono jʼabahosi bʼebibi.
17.14: O Musengwa , mu maani gago nunule ohuŋwa mu baatu abasuubira omuhemba ni bahiiri mu bulamu wa hatyane. Abo aba wenda sobalumya enjala abaana baawe baba nʼebihena, era babiihiraho nʼabejuhulu baawe.
17.15: Era ese nja huhubona olwohuba ndi mugwalaafu. Ni nja husisimuha ohuŋwa mu hufa, hiija hukena ohuhubona ngʼolu oli.

18.1: O Musengwa , kwenda, ndiiwe amaani gange.
18.2: Musengwa njʼolwanda lwange olungadirira, njʼepungulu yange omunehweha era njʼomununuzi wange. Hatonda wange njʼebaale omu neŋogoma, njʼengabo yange era olwiga olwʼobunoŋosi wange, njʼobuŋonere wange.
18.3: Ndanga Musengwa ohunjeeda, asaana ohuŋeewa eŋono era gaponia abalabe bange.
18.4: Ohufa hwaneswanigirisa, amataba agasihirisa ganetotera ohukenaŋo.
18.6: Mu hubonaabona hwange nalanga Musengwa , naliririra Hatonda wange ohunjeeda. Gaŋulira ejanjaasi lyange nʼali mu Yekaalu yiye, ohwerira hwange hwamwolaho, hwamugwa mu hutwi.
18.7: Ehyalo hyateetema era hyanyeenya nʼesimuho jʼesozi jatengeeta, jatengeeta olwohuba Hatonda gaali aluŋire.
18.8: Eriisi lyaŋwera mu suulu yiye, omuliro ogugugulisa nʼamanda agagegeeye byaŋwera mu munwa wuwe.
18.9: Gegulaŋo egulu nga geeha ŋaasi, ebireri ebimali byali ŋaasi wʼamagulu gage.
18.10: Ganiina hu Kerubbi gagululuha, gaguluhira hu mabaŋa gʼembeŋo.
18.11: Gambala ehiirema, ehireri hyʼefula ehimali hyamweswanigirisa.
18.12: Enjase eyaali nʼemuŋwamo, yasaala amanda, nga muŋwamo ebireri nʼamabaale gʼefula nʼamanda agagegeeye omuliro.
18.13: Musengwa gabbwabbwanuhira mwigulu, ejanjaasi lyʼoyo Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali lyaŋulirihana ni liŋwera ŋagati wʼamabaale gefula, nʼamanda agʼomuliro.
18.14: Galasa obusaale wuwe ngʼabalabe basalaana era ehimyaaso nʼenjase byabaleetera ohuduluma.
18.15: Enjuho jʼenyanja jeeta aŋalafu nʼemisingi jʼehyalo jeeta aŋalafu. O Musengwa , wahayula abalabe babo era wababogohera nʼobusungu.
18.16: Musengwa gajanuula omuhono gugwe ohuŋwa mwigulu ganaaŋa gaatusa mu buliba.
18.17: Gaanunula ohuŋwa mu balabe bange abʼamaani, abo bosibosi abacaawa, baali baakira amaani.
18.18: Bapiriŋania mu biseera ebigosi aye Musengwa gakuuma.
18.19: Gaatusayo gapira mu hifo omu netayayira, gaanunula olwohuba ganyenda.
18.20: Musengwa gaapa omuhemba olwohuba nahola ebiruŋamu, gaapa ekabi olwohuba naŋumaho musango.
18.21: Hiri hiityo olwohuba ngendera mu magira ga Musengwa . Simbaame ohuŋwa hu Hatonda wange.
18.22: Pambire amagambi gage gosigosi, sinjeemera biragiro bibye.
18.23: Pumaho musango mu moni jije era nehuumire ohutahola hibi.
18.24: Musengwa gapaaye omuhemba, ni geema hu buluŋamu wange, olwohuba naali pumaho hibi ehi kolire mu moni jije.
18.25: O Musengwa , oli mwesigwa eyiri abo abesigwa, oli mutukuvu eyiri abagwalaafu.
18.26: Eyiri abo abaŋumaho mbalo, oŋumaaho mbalo aye oŋuma hisa eyiri abahosi bʼebibi.
18.27: Onoŋola abo abawombeefu, aye wiisa ŋaasi abo abehudumbasa.
18.28: O Musengwa , wange, huuma etaala yange ni yaduha, Hatonda wange acuusa ehiirema hyafuuha njase.
18.29: Wuupa amaani ohuwaagala eŋe erinumba. Ndiiwe owuupa amaani ohubaŋangula.
18.30: Amagira ga Hatonda maluŋamu era ehibono hya Musengwa hituufu. Njʼengabo yaabo abamwesiga.
18.31: Hatonda nje Musengwa yeŋene. Era Hatonda weefe yeŋene njʼolwanda.
18.32: Hatonda owuupa amaani, era njʼaluŋamya amagira gange ohuba malaŋi.
18.33: Ahahadasa amagulu gange gaaba hya ga namoli. Era njʼagira nasobola ohugendera hu sozi.
18.34: Gatendeha ohuba omusooli era emihono jange jisobola ohufuda omubaso ogwʼehyoma ehigumu.
18.35: O Musengwa , wukuuma era wunoŋola, obuyeedi wuwo wandeetera ohuba wʼamaani. Ohundabirira huhwo humbesaŋo. Era wukuuma ni puma ehiitya.
18.36: Ogalamya engira omu mbita, amagulu gange sigaterera.
18.37: Nabbinga abalabe bange naboolaho sinaagamayo ohwola olu nabasihiirisa.
18.38: Nabaminiangula ndibasobole hwinyoha, bagwa ŋaasi wʼamagulu gange.
18.39: Waapa amaani ohusoola etalo, waleetera abalabe bange ohukubbira amafuha.
18.40: Waleetera abalabe bange ohunduluma, era nasihiirisa abo abacaawa.
18.41: Baalira ni baana hwana ni benda babayeede, ne ŋaŋuma owʼohubaŋonia. Beegayirira Musengwa aye sigabagobolamo.
18.42: Nabaŋuula nabaheneramo erala bafuuha hyʼefuuhe eyi embeŋo edumuusa, naboŋaania hyʼagoŋaania amadosi mu nguudo.
18.43: Waanunula ohuŋwa mu baatu abakiyaania, wufuula muŋugi wʼamawanga, abaatu aba naali ni tamanyire, bali ŋaasi wange.
18.44: Abanamawanga bakubbira amafuha era ni baŋulira ejanjaasi lyange, bangondera.
18.45: Bosibosi baŋwamo amaani, baŋwa mu byehwehero byawe ni bateetema huteetema.
18.46: Musengwa njʼomwene bulamu! Mujumirye oyo olwanda lwange, langirira obubbala wa Hatonda omunoŋosi wange.
18.47: Njʼagira naŋangula abalabe bange, njʼagira amawanga gaaba ŋaasi wange.
18.48: Njʼowuponia abalabe bange. O Musengwa , wuupa ohuŋangula abalabe bange, wuponia abaatu abahambwe.
18.49: Olwʼehyo nja huhujumirya mu mawanga O Musengwa , nja hwemba enyembo ni kujumirya.
18.50: Hatonda aŋa habaha wuwe obuŋangusi owʼamaani. Alaga ohwenda huhwe ohubitiirifu, eyiri oyo oyu gajuhaho amafuta, eyiri Dawudi nʼabolulyo lulwe emirembe nʼemirembe.

19.1: Egulu liroma hu eŋono lya Hatonda, nʼebiri mu bbanga biraga omulimo gugwe.
19.2: Hiisi mu muusi biroma era hiisi wiire biraga amagesi gage.
19.3: Ŋaŋumaaŋo ndoma oba olulimi aŋa janjaasi lyabyo litaŋulirihana.
19.4: Ejanjaasi lyabyo, lihwana ehyalo hyosihyosi nʼebibono byabyo hiisi muutu gabiŋulira. Mwigulu gemehera eryuba eweema,
19.5: ehiri hyʼohuuja hwʼomugole omusinde, aŋwera mu hisenge hihye, hyʼomuutu asingire embiro.
19.6: Eryuba liŋwera ebuŋwalyuba, nga lyetoloola ohwola olu ligwa mu maaji hu luuyi olundi era ŋaŋuma ehitolaho bubalire waalyo.
19.7: Egambi lya Musengwa lyolana, ligobosamo amaani. Ebiragiro bya Musengwa byesigiha, abatali bagesi, bibafuula bagesi.
19.8: Ohwigirisa hwa Musengwa hutuufu, husangaasa omwoyo. Amagambi ga Musengwa njase, gatuleetera obutangaafu.
19.9: Ohutya Musengwa hyawufu emirembe nʼemirembe. Musengwa asalaaŋo nʼatehubbira era ebi asalaŋo biba biruŋamu.
19.10: Byamuŋendo bugali ohuhira ezaabbu, ezaabbu ehira obulaŋi. Biŋomerera ohusinga omudugere, omudugere ogwomu biyali.
19.11: Birabula omuŋeeresa wuwo, ohubigondera hipeesa omuhemba mubbala.
19.12: Aye njʼani omwene asobola ohumanya esobi jije? O Musengwa , soniŋe ebibi byange ebyomu ngiso.
19.13: Huuma omuŋeeresa wuwo tahola bibi mu hugenderera era bitaŋuga mwoyo gagwe. Ehyo hija hufuula aŋumaaho mbalo, hija hutusaho ehibi.
19.14: Leha ebibono byange nʼebiŋeego byʼomwoyo gwange, bihwesiimise, O Musengwa , olwanda lwange era omununuzi wange.

20.1: Musengwa ahuŋe ebi omusunga nʼoli mu bigosi. Hatonda wa Yakobbo ahuhingirise.
20.2: Ahuŋe obuyeedi nʼali mu hifo ehyawufu, era ahuŋe amaani ohuŋwa mu Sayuuni.
20.3: Ahebulire eŋongo liryo lyosiryosi, era afugiirire ebirabo bibyo ebi bohya ebihwiye byaguhuliha.
20.4: Ahuŋe ehi mwoyo gugwo guŋembaho, era ahuyeede ebi otegeha byosibyosi byolerere.
20.5: Huja husaŋalya nʼoŋanguuye abalabe beefe era huja huginga ebbendera jeefe ni hujumirya Hatonda. Musengwa ahuŋe byosibyosi ebi omusunga.
20.6: Ŋaahani manyire ti Musengwa anoŋola oyu gajuhaho amafuta, ahugobolemo nʼali mwigulu, olwʼamaani gage.
20.7: Abandi besiga amagaali, nʼabandi besiga embalaasi. Aye efe hwesiga Musengwa Hatonda weefe.
20.8: Balyetega bagwa aye efe huliba bʼamaani era hulyemeerera ni huli bagumu.
20.9: O Musengwa , ŋa habaha obuŋangusi. Tugaluheemo ni huhulomba.

21.1: O Musengwa , habaha musangaafu olwohuba omuŋaaye amaani. Asaŋalya olwohuba wamuŋa obuŋangusi.
21.2: Omuŋaaye ebi mwoyo gugwe guŋembaho, era eŋuma ehi wasigasa hu bigasunga.
21.3: Wamwanirisa ohuŋwa mu lutalo era ngʼomuŋa ekabi eja hiisi ngeri, ngʼomufiiha hu mutwe engule eyʼezaabbu enyene nʼenyene.
21.4: Gahusunga obulamu era wabumuŋa, owʼemirembe nʼemirembe.
21.5: Obuŋangusi obu wamuŋa, wamuleetera eŋono eryene ebbala. Omuŋaaye efuma gamanyihana.
21.6: Mu butuufu oweene omuŋaaye ekabi ejʼemirembe nʼemirembe, era ohubaaŋo huhwo humuleetera esangaalo.
21.7: Hiri hiityo olwohuba habaha gesiga Musengwa , era olwʼohwenda ohubitiirifu ohwʼoyo Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali saaja huŋwa hu tebe eyʼobuŋugi atyo atyo.
21.8: Habaha aja huŋamba abalabe babo bosibosi hunyama, omuhono gugwo omulungi ogwʼamaani guja huŋamba hu abo bosibosi abahucaawa.
21.9: Mu hiseera ehi oliboneheramo, oli basihiirisa nʼomuliro ogwʼamaani. Alibasihiirisa nʼobusungu. Musengwa mu busungu wuwo oja hubamira era omuliro gugwo guja hubahenaŋo.
21.10: Oja husihiirisa olulyo lwawe ohuŋwa hu hyalo, habaha alibeeta bosibosi.
21.11: Wayire behobana ohuhuhola ehibi, aye sibalihusobola nʼekwe jaawe,
21.12: hiriba hiityo olwohuba olirasa obusaale wuwo era balicuuha baduluma embiro.
21.13: O Musengwa , oŋeewe eŋono, olwʼamaani gago, huja hwemba era huhujumirye olwʼobuŋangi wuwo.

22.1: Hatonda wange, Hatonda wange, lwahiina wundehireŋo? Lwahiina siwunjeeda era soŋulira hubinda hwange?
22.2: O Hatonda wange, neririgana omuusi, sogobolamo! Owiire kweriririra ni talehera,
22.3: atenga weehala hu tebe eyʼobuŋugi, ngʼOmwawufu ndiiwe oyu Yisirayiri aŋa eŋono.
22.4: Ndiiwe oyu basehulu beefe beesiga, bahwesiganga era wabanunula.
22.5: Bahweriririra era wabanunula, ndiiwe oyu beesiganga era siwabaswasa.
22.6: Aye abaatu baloma mbo ndi oti nyende era puma mahulu. Abaatu bosibosi banduha era banyooma.
22.7: Bosibosi banjerega era banduulira banyeenya nʼemitwe jaawe ni baloma baati,
22.8: “Gesiga Musengwa , olwʼehyo Musengwa amununule, olwohuba amwenda.”
22.9: Aye waatusa mu hida hya maama, wandeetera ohuhwesiga ni naali ni kiiri hwibeere lya maama.
22.10: Ohuŋwa saliiwe, kwesiga era ohuŋwa mu hida hya maama obaaye Hatonda wange.
22.11: Otandanyiririra, olwohuba ebigosi bindi bubi, era ŋaŋuma wʼohunjeeda.
22.12: Abalabe bangi baneswanigirihise hyʼebunwa, banjetolooye hyʼebunwa engwiri ejomu hyalo hyʼe Bbasani.
22.13: Hyʼepologoma ejiŋuluguma, basamya eminwa ni banjetotera ohundya.
22.14: Amaani gapooye era ndi hyʼamaaji agajijuhire, nʼamagumba gange galojohire. Omwoyo gwange gusaanuhire.
22.15: Amaani gange gahomire, ndi hyʼolujo nʼolulimi lwange lwerapire, ŋamugulu mu munwa. Wundehire ohutiina mu fuuhe emagombe.
22.16: Agabwa gajeswanigirihise, ehibbubbu hyʼabahosi bʼebibi banjetolooye basimitire simitire ebyaba byʼengalo nʼamagulu gange.
22.17: Nondolohire bugali weene era sobola ohubala nʼamagumba gange, abakejaho banehaata.
22.18: Bagabana ebyambalo byange era engoye jange bajihubbiraho ahalulu.
22.19: Aye Musengwa , otamba ŋaleeŋi. Ewe amaani gange, yanguŋaho wunjeede.
22.20: Ponie epiima, omwoyo gwange ogwʼebbeeyi, guŋonie embwa.
22.21: Nunule mu meeno gʼepologoma, ponie ameega gʼembogo.
22.22: Nahamanyisa abalebe bange obuhulu wʼesiina liryo, nahembe ni kujumirya mu humbaaniro.
22.23: Enywe abatya Musengwa mumutenderese. Enywe abejuhulu ba Yakobbo mwesimwesi, mujumirye Musengwa . Abejuhulu ba Yisirayiri mwesimwesi, muŋe Musengwa eŋono.
22.24: Hiri hiityo olwohuba sanyooma bagadi, oba ohutaafayo hu bulumi wʼoyo ali mu higosi, samwehwehe aye aŋuliiye ohwerira huhwe.
22.25: Mu ewe funa omulamwa ohuhuŋa eŋono mu moni jaabo abahutya, nja hwoheresa ohweyama hwange.
22.26: Abagadi baja hulya beegute, abo abendula Musengwa balimujumirya, babenga balamu emirembe nʼemirembe.
22.27: Amawanga gosigosi galihebulira Musengwa , era abaatu hu hyalo bosibosi balihubba amafuha mu moni jije,
22.28: olwohuba Musengwa nje habaha, era aŋuga amawanga gosigosi.
22.29: Bosibosi abaŋinda hu hyalo balirya embaga era bajumirya Musengwa , bosibosi balimuhubbira amafuha.
22.30: Abaana aba balisaala balimuŋeeresa, abaatu baliromera abʼomulembe oguuja ebiŋamba hu Musengwa.
22.31: Abaatu abahiiri husaaliwa balibalomera baati, “ Musengwa ganoŋola abaatu babe.”

23.1: Musengwa njʼowunjemera, mbula hyosihyosi ehi nahayenga.
23.2: Gandeha nagandaala mu muloofe, gapira aŋali amaaji amateehi.
23.3: Agobosa obulamu wange bunyaaha, gatangirira mu ngira enduŋamu ngʼolu gasuubisa.
23.4: Wayire ngendera ŋagati wʼehisisigo hyʼohufa, ŋaŋuma ehi nja hutya olwohuba oli ŋalala ni neese, oluga nʼesimbo yiyo bimbudabuda.
23.5: Wutegehera ehiiŋulo abalabe bange ni balengereeye. Wunjuhaho amafuta hu mutwe agaleeta ekabi, ehihopo hyange hijuuye paka nohu muniga.
23.6: Mu butuufu oweene, ehisasabirisi nʼohwenda huhwo binabenga ni neese mu bulamu wange wosiwosi, era nja humenya mu nyumba ya Musengwa emirembe nʼemirembe.

24.1: Ehyalo nʼebiitu byosibyosi ebihirimo bya Musengwa , ehyalo ko nabosibosi abahirimo babe.
24.2: Hiri hiityo olwohuba njʼowahitongola hu nyanja era gagumya omusingi gwahyo hu maaji.
24.3: Njʼani asobola ohuniina hu lusozi lwa Musengwa ? Era njʼani asobola ohwemeerera mu hifo hihye ehyawufu?
24.4: Njʼoyo ali nʼemihono emirongoofu era nʼomwoyo omugwalaafu, oyu bulamu wuwe wutaŋemba hu bitali Hatonda wayire ohulayira ebinambulamo.
24.5: Oyo alisuna ekabi ohuŋwa eyiri Musengwa era Hatonda omunoŋosi wuwe alimufuula mugwalaafu.
24.6: Abo njʼabaatu abʼomulembe ogumwendula, abendula Hatonda wa Yakobbo.
24.7: Enywe emiryango emihalehale mweyigule, njigi enywe ekalekale mweyigule Habaha owʼeŋono gengire.
24.8: Njʼani Habaha oyo owʼeŋono? Nje Musengwa owʼamaani nʼobuŋangi, Musengwa omusira nʼasoola.
24.9: Enywe emiryango emihalehale mweyigule, njigi enywe ekalekale mweyigule habaha owʼeŋono gengire.
24.10: Njʼani habaha oyo owʼeŋono? Musengwa Omwene Maŋe nje habaha owʼeŋono.

25.2: O Hatonda wange, kwesiga otandeha huswala. Era otaleha balabe bange ohupangula.
25.3: Ŋaŋuma ahwesiga aja ohuswala aye abo abekwe baliswala ni ŋaŋuma hyʼohweŋambya.
25.4: O Musengwa , ndage ebi wenda kole, somese ohugendera mu magira gago.
25.5: Somese era butangirire mbeŋo mu mazima gago olwohuba ndiiwe Hatonda omunoŋosi wange, era ndiiwe oyu nesiga habuhyabuhya.
25.6: O Musengwa , hebulira ngʼolu bundagire ehisasabirisi nʼohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu, olwohuba byaŋwa ahale nahale.
25.7: Otahebulira ebibi nʼobujeemu owomu buvubuka wange. Olwʼohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu, kebulire olwohuba Musengwa oli mulaŋi.
25.8: Musengwa mulaŋi era ahola ebiruŋamu olwʼehyo asomesa abahosi bʼebibi amagira gage.
25.9: Atangirira abawombeefu ohuhola ebiruŋamu era abasomesa ebi genda bahole.
25.10: Hiisi hiseera Musengwa nʼowesigwa nʼohwenda, atangirira abo abahuuma endagaano yiye era bagondera ebiragiro bibye.
25.11: O Musengwa , olwʼesiina liryo soniŋe ebibi byange wayire bingi.
25.12: Njʼani atya Musengwa ? Aja humulaga engira eyi ali nʼohugenderamo.
25.13: Musengwa aja humuŋanga ebiraŋi mu bulamu wuwe wosiwosi. Era abejuhulu babe balisikira ehyalo hino.
25.14: Musengwa alomeraho abo abamutya ebyama bibye, era abasomesa ebiri mu ndagaano yiye.
25.15: Emoni jange njitaaye hu nje Musengwa . Era aja hununula mu bigosi.
25.16: O Musengwa , cuuha wukejeho, saasire olwohuba ndimu hiŋubaalo era mbonaabona.
25.17: Ebigosi mu bulamu wange byeyongeeye ohwala, nunule mu bigosi.
25.18: Bona ebiguudyo nʼohubonaabona ohu ndimo, soniŋe ebibi byange byosibyosi.
25.19: Bona abalabe bange ngʼolu beyongeeye obungi era ngʼolu bacaawiiye erala.
25.20: Kuume era wuponie, otandeha huswala olwohuba ndiiwe oyu nesiga.
25.21: Ekola enuŋamu nʼamazima gange biitaase olwohuba Musengwa , ndiiwe oyu nesiga.
25.22: O Hatonda, nunula Abayisirayiri mu bigosi byawe byosibyosi.

26.1: O Musengwa , langirira ngʼolu pumaaho musango, olwohuba mu bulamu wange pumaaho mbalo, era nesiga Musengwa ni puma hubuusabuusa.
26.2: O Musengwa , hebera omwoyo nʼebiŋeego byange
26.3: olwohuba bunyendera erala era keesi hiisi obuhya ngendera mu mazima gago.
26.4: Siniisa hirala nʼabadulingi era singendera ŋalala nʼabanafuusi.
26.5: Sikola muhumba nʼabahola ebibi era sifugiirira hwihala nʼabahosi bʼebibi.
26.6: O Musengwa , saaba mu ngalo jange ohulaga ti mbula musango era natiina hu hituuti hihyo nahyetoloola ni njumirya.
26.7: Era kujumirya nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani ni ndoma hu byamaliholiho ebi ohola.
26.8: O Musengwa , nyumirwa ohuba mu nyumba yiyo omu omenya, ehifo omu eŋono liryo liba.
26.9: Otapirira ŋalala nʼababbengi, otambalira ŋalala nʼabatemu,
26.10: abaŋeega hu huhola ebibi era abaliira mu nguzi.
26.11: Ne ese mbulaaho musango, era pambire ehisa, wununule.
26.12: Nemeereye aŋaatu aŋagumu, era nja hwebasanga Musengwa mu luhumbaano olubba.

27.1: Musengwa njʼenjase yange era njʼOmunoŋosi wange, njʼani oyu nja hutya? Musengwa njʼahuuma obulamu wange, njʼani aja hutiisa?
27.2: Ababi ni banumba ohwenda ohunjita, era abalabe bange banumba, baja hwegumula, nga bagwa.
27.3: Wayire eŋe eramba lineswanigirisa, mu mwoyo gwange sinja hutya, omwoyo gwange siguja hutya. Wayire olutalo lugwaŋo hu ese, sigala ni ndi mugumu.
27.4: Hirala ehi sunga Musengwa era ehi nenda obugali era ehiitu ehyo cʼehino ti, nahaba mu nyumba ya Musengwa obulamu wange wosiwosi, ohweboneranga obuŋoono wa Musengwa , nʼohusaba mu Yekaalu yiye.
27.5: Hiri hiityo olwohuba mu biseera ebigosi, aja hukuumira mu weema yiye era aliita ŋamugulu hu lwanda.
27.6: Nja huŋangula abalabe bange abaneswanigirihise. Ndiŋaayo eŋongo mu Weema yiye enjawufu nindi nʼesangaalo. Nja hwemba ni njumirya Musengwa .
27.7: O Musengwa , ŋulira ejanjaasi lyange ni kulanga pambire ehisa, bungobolemo.
27.8: Mula mu mwoyo gwange, pulira ni wundoma oti, “Njumirye.” Olwʼehyo, Musengwa nja huhujumirya.
27.9: Otanjehwehaho, otabbinga muŋeeresa wuwo nʼobusungu. Ndiiwe omuyeedi wange, otandehaŋo oba wakubba omugongo, O Hatonda omunoŋosi wange!
27.10: Wayire bbaabba ni maama bandehaŋo aye Musengwa aja hundabiriranga.
27.11: O Musengwa , somese ebi wenda kole, tangirire mu ngira enduŋamu olwohuba ndi nʼabalabe bangi.
27.12: Otapayo eyiri abalabe bange, olwohuba abajulizi abʼobudulingi banjenyoheyeeho nʼobuhambwe.
27.13: Aye nehahasa ti nja hubona ngʼolu Musengwa ali mulaŋi mu bulamu wahatyane.
27.14: Wesige Musengwa , galuhamo amaani era guma omwoyo, ohuumirire Musengwa ohuhuyeeda.

28.1: O Musengwa , olwanda lwange, ŋulira ohusaba hwange, otagaana hupulirisa olwohuba singa oŋolera huŋoleera, nja huba hyʼabatiina emagombe!
28.2: Ŋulira ohulira hwange, pambire ehisa, kulomba ohunjeeda, ni paniha emihono jange eyiri ehifo hihyo Ehyawufu Obugali.
28.3: Otapirira ŋalala nʼabahosi bʼebibi ni naabo abahola ebibi, baloma nʼabaliranwa baawe bulaŋi hu mugulu, aye mu myoyo jaawe bejuuye obucaayi.
28.4: Begalule olwʼebikolwa byawe nʼolwebibi byawe ebi bahola. Baŋe epeera esaanira emirimo jaawe, baŋe ehyo ehi basaana.
28.5: Ngʼolu bataŋira ebi Musengwa ahola ngʼehibbala, aja hubasihiirisa batagobolayo huboneha nindi.
28.6: Musengwa gebasiwe olwohuba aŋuliiye ohulira hwange gapambira ehisa.
28.7: Musengwa njʼamaani era njʼengabo yange, mwesiga era ganjeeda. Omwoyo gwange gubinuha nʼesangaalo era nja humweyaasa ni nemba.
28.8: Musengwa njʼaŋa abaatu babe amaani, njʼehyehwehero hyʼobunoŋosi owʼomuutu wuwe oyu gajuhaho amafuta.
28.9: Noŋola abaatu babo era obaŋe ekabi, obe mwayi waawe era obalabirirenga emirembe nʼemirembe.

29.1: Muŋe Musengwa eŋono, enywe ebitonde ebyomwigulu, muŋe Musengwa eŋono olwʼamaani gage.
29.2: Muŋe Musengwa eŋono, muhubbe amafuha mu moni jʼohira Owawufu nʼeŋono.
29.3: Ejanjaasi lya Musengwa liŋulirihana hu nyanja, Hatonda owʼeŋono abbwabbwanuha hu nyanja josijosi.
29.4: Ejanjaasi lya Musengwa lyʼamaani, ejanjaasi lya Musengwa lyengunjisa bugali!
29.5: Ejanjaasi lya Musengwa libbwaga emisaala eʼjamaani, Musengwa abbwaga emisaala ejʼe Lebbanooni ejʼamaani.
29.6: Agira esozi jʼe Lebbanooni nʼolusozi Hamoni byatuumatuuma hyʼenyana yʼeŋombe.
29.7: Ejanjaasi lya Musengwa liŋwamo endimi ejʼomuliro.
29.8: Ejanjaasi lya Musengwa litengesya olulafu, Musengwa atengesya olulafu lwʼe Kadesi.
29.9: Ejanjaasi lya Musengwa litengesya emitumba, ligira amahoose gʼemisaala mu madeŋo gakukumuha. Era hiisi muutu mu Yekaalu yiye alomera ŋamugulu ati, “Oŋeewe eŋono!”
29.10: Musengwa aŋuga amataba Musengwa aŋuga nga Habaha emirembe nʼemirembe.
29.11: Musengwa aŋa abaatu babe amaani, Musengwa aŋa abaatu babe emiyaaya.

30.1: Nja huhutenderesa Musengwa , olwohuba wununuuye, ndoleha balabe bange huneyagaliraho.
30.2: O Musengwa Hatonda wange, nahweriririra ohunjeeda era waponia.
30.3: O Musengwa , waatusa emagombe waponia ohutiina emagombe.
30.5: Obusungu wuwe wʼehiseera buseera, aye ehisa hihye hyʼemirembe nʼemirembe. Amasiga gabaaŋo owiire aye esangaalo liija mu mugamba.
30.6: Ni naali ni puma ehinduma naloma ti, “Ŋaŋuma ehija hutengesya.”
30.7: O Musengwa , olwohuba waali wufuuye wʼamaani hyʼolusozi oluleeŋi. Ne ni wanjehweha, neralihirira.
30.8: O Musengwa , nahweriririra, negayirira Musengwa gapambire ehisa.
30.9: Hyamugaso hi ese ohufa ese ohutiina emagombe? Efuuhe lija huhujumiryanga? Lija hulangiriranga owesigwa wuwo?
30.10: O Musengwa , ŋulira wupambire ehisa, O Musengwa , njeede.
30.11: Ohunakuŋala hwange ohufuuye huhina. Wutuhiseeho ehigwali wanyambasa esangaalo hyʼehyambalo
30.12: ko nahahwembera ni taŋoleera. O Musengwa Hatonda wange, nahweyaasenga emirembe nʼemirembe.

31.1: O Musengwa , ndiiwe omuneŋogoma, otandeha huswala. Ohola ebiruŋamu, nunule.
31.2: Tegere ohutwi yanguŋaho wununule ba pungulu yange omunehweha, ofuuhe ebaale eringadirira.
31.3: Ngʼolu oli ndiiwe olwanda lwange omuneŋogoma era ehifo omundulumira ohusuna obuhuumi, olwʼesiina liryo tangirire era wunduŋamye.
31.4: Ponie omutego ogu baategire, olwohuba neŋogoma mu ndiiwe.
31.5: Kuŋambya omwoyo gwange, O Musengwa nunule ewe Hatonda omwesigwa.
31.6: Caawa abo abajumirya ebinambulamo, ese nesiga Musengwa .
31.7: Nja husangaala era saŋalye olwʼehyere hihyo olwohuba omanyire ohubonaabona nʼenaku yʼobulamu wange.
31.8: Siiwupayo mu mihono jʼabalabe bange aye wumboŋolooye netaaye.
31.9: O Musengwa , pambire ehisa olwohuba ndi mu bigosi. Emoni jange jejuuye amasiga era omwoyo nʼomubiri gwange bijuuye enima.
31.10: Obulamu wange wijuuye hubonaabona hwoŋene. Era mwaha hu mwaha, ndi mu hubonaabona hubonaabona. Amaani gapooye olwʼehibi hyange, era amagumba gange ganafuŋire.
31.11: Abalabe bange bosibosi banjerega. Abaliranwa bange banjenyinyalya, abameeri bange baatya era ni bambona hu ngira, banduluma.
31.12: Banjebiriiye oti hani nafa hale, nafuuha hyʼolujo.
31.13: Pulira bangi ni bangeya, esisi yineswanigirihise. Basalira oluhwe era banesoomera ohunjita.
31.14: Aye kwesiga ewe Musengwa , era ndoma ti, “Ndiiwe Hatonda wange.”
31.15: Obulamu wange buli mu mihono jijo, nunule mu mihono jʼabalabe bange, abo abakiyaania.
31.16: Pambire ehisa ese omuŋeeresa wuwo, noŋole olwʼohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu.
31.17: O Musengwa , otandeha huswala, kweriririiye. Ne leha ababi baŋemuhe era balambagale emagombe.
31.18: Leha obudulingi waawe weete aŋalafu olwohuba bali nʼamalala nʼohujerega, baloma ni banyomoola abo abahola ebiruŋamu.
31.19: Ebiraŋi bibyo ebi otegeheeye abahutya, nga bingi! Hiisi muutu amanyire ngʼolu oli mulaŋi, ngʼolu ohuuma abo abahwesiga.
31.20: Obahweha wabafumbeerera ohubaŋonia ekwe jʼabaatu. Obahuumira aŋa oli ŋaŋume ehibolaho wabaŋonia ebibono ebyʼobudulingi.
31.21: Musengwa aŋeewe eŋono olwohuba gandagire ehisa hihye ehyeŋunjisa, ni naali mu hibuga abalabe ni baneswanigirihise wandaga ngʼolu wunyenda ehibitiiriye.
31.22: Nahubba enduulu ni ndoma ti, “Wumbingire ohuŋwa mu moni jijo!” Aye waŋulira ni nahweriririra wunjeede.
31.23: Mwende Musengwa enywe mwesimwesi abagwalaafu babe. Musengwa ahuuma abamwesiga aye abehudumbasa ababoneresa ngʼolu hisaanira.
31.24: Mube nʼamaani era mugume emyoyo enywe mwesimwesi omuli nʼesuubi mu Musengwa .

32.1: Gesiimire oyo oyu basoniŋa ebibi bibye oyu bawiiha hu bibi bibye.
32.2: Gesiimire oyo oyu Musengwa atabalaho bibi ebi aholire era aŋumamo budulingi.
32.3: Ni naali ni cigeene ohwatula ebibi byange, amagumba gange ganafuŋira erala olwʼohulira ohunabangamo ni talehera.
32.4: Wamboneresanga omuusi nʼowiire, naŋwamo amaani ngʼolu maaji gomeera mu biseera byʼehyeya.
32.5: Nga mbutula ebibi byange eyi oli era sinahweha bubi wange. Naloma ti, “Nja hwatulira Musengwa ebibi byange,” era waasoniŋa ebibi byange byosibyosi.
32.6: Olwʼehyo, hiisi muutu ahujumirya ahweŋe alombe nʼohiboneha. Mu butuufu amataba ni galiija sigalisobola humwolaho.
32.7: Ndiiwe ehyehwehero hyange, oja hukuuma ohutagwa mu bigosi era oja huupa olwembo olwʼobuŋangusi.
32.8: Nga Musengwa aloma ti, “Nja huhulaga engira eyohugenderangamo. Nja huhusomesa era nja huhulabirira.
32.9: Mutaba hyʼembalaasi oba nasugirya ejiŋumamo magesi, era ejenda ohujitaamo ehyoma nʼoluhoba ko jaahola ehi oba ni wenda jihole.”
32.10: Abahosi bʼebibi bali nʼohubonaabona hungi, aye Musengwa genda ehibitiiriye abaatu abamwesiga.
32.11: Musangaale era musaŋalye hulwa Musengwa , enywe abahola ebiruŋamu, enywe mwesimwesi abagwalaafu mu myoyo, mwembe.

33.1: Enywe abagwalaafu mwembere Musengwa nʼesangaalo, hiraŋi enywe abamugondera, ohumujumirya.
33.2: Mujumirye Musengwa nʼahatongooli, mumwembere ni muhubba ogutongooli ogwʼewaaya ehumi.
33.3: Mumwembere olwembo olunyaaha, mumwembere nʼobuhugu, era mwembere ŋamugulu nʼesangaalo.
33.4: Hiri hiityo olwohuba ehibono hya Musengwa hyʼamazima era hituufu, sigehubbira mu byosibyosi ebi ahola.
33.5: Musengwa genda obuluŋamu nʼohutehubbira, ehyalo hijuuye ohwenda huhwe ohubitiirifu.
33.6: Musengwa galagira hulagira, egulu lyatondewa, nʼebirimo byaholewa nʼehibono hihye.
33.7: Ahumbaania amaaji agʼomunyanja ŋalala gaaba hyʼagali mu songo. Abunga amaaji agomu njuho gaaba oti mu sitoowa.
33.8: Ehyalo hyosihyosi hitye Musengwa , abaatu bosibosi hu hyalo bamuŋe eŋono,
33.9: olwohuba galoma huloma, ngʼehyalo hibaaŋo. Galagira hulagira ehyalo hyaŋandalala.
33.10: Musengwa afafagania etegeha jʼamawanga, agumbaasa ebigendererwa byʼabaatu.
33.11: Aye etegeha ja Musengwa jibaaŋo emirembe nʼemirembe, ebigendererwa byʼomwoyo gugwe bibaaŋo emirembe josijosi.
33.12: Lyesiimire egwanga eri Musengwa aŋuga nga nje Hatonda walyo abaatu abagatobola ohuba ababe.
33.13: Musengwa nʼali mwigulu alengera ŋaasi gabona abaatu bosibosi.
33.14: Hu tebe yiye eyʼobuŋugi abona bosibosi abali hu hyalo.
33.15: Oyo njʼawumba emyoyo jʼabaatu, era njʼamanyire ehi hiisi muutu ahola.
33.16: Ŋaŋuma habaha aŋangula olwʼobungi weŋe lirye era ŋaŋuma musooli aŋona mu lutalo olwʼamaani gage omwene.
33.17: Hiŋuma mahulu ohwesiga embalaasi ohuhununula. Wayire yiri nʼamaani mangi, siŋanga huŋonia omuutu mu lutalo.
33.18: Aye Musengwa ahuuma abo abamutya, abo abasuubirira mu hyere hihye ehingi,
33.19: abaŋonia ohufa era abahuuma ni bali balamu mu biseera ebyʼenjala.
33.20: Huhuumirira ni huli nʼesuubi mu Musengwa , njʼatubeera era njʼengabo yeefe.
33.21: Atuleetera ohusaŋalya, olwohuba hwesiga esiina lirye eryawufu.
33.22: Musengwa , leha ohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu hube hu efe, ni hweyongera ohuhutaamo esuubi.

34.1: Nja hwebasanga Musengwa hiisi hiseera era namujumiryenga ni talehera.
34.2: Nja hujumirya Musengwa olwʼebi ahola era leha ababonaabona baŋulire bahasaŋalya.
34.4: Neŋunderera Musengwa era gangobolamo, gaanunula mu byosibyosi ebyali ni bitiisa.
34.5: Abo abamwesiga bameregenya basuna esangaalo era sibaliswala wayire lulala.
34.6: Omugadi gamusunga gamuŋulira, gamutusa mu bigosi byosibyosi ebi galimo.
34.7: Malayika wa Musengwa geswanigirisa abo abamutya era abanunula.
34.8: Mugesesye waheega oti Musengwa mulaŋi. Gesiimire oyo adulumira eyi ali amuhuume mu bigosi.
34.9: Mutye Musengwa enywe abagwalaafu babe olwohuba abamutya eŋuma hiitu hyosihyosi ehi badamba.
34.10: Wayire epologoma ejʼamaani jisobola ohuhaya ehyohulya enjala yajiruma aye abo abeeŋa Musengwa eŋuma hiraŋi ehi bahaya.
34.11: Baana bange, muje muŋuliirise, nja hubasomesa engeri eyʼohuŋamo Musengwa eŋono.
34.12: Hiisi muutu hu enywe owenda obulamu era owegomba ohuwangaala,
34.13: ali nʼohuhuuma olulimi lulwe ohutalimirira bahye nʼohutaloma ebyʼobudulingi.
34.14: Era alehere aŋo ohuhola ebibi ahole ebiraŋi, abe omuutu aleeta emiyaaya era geyongere mu jo.
34.15: Emoni ja Musengwa jiri hu abo abahola ebiruŋamu era aŋulira ohusaba hwawe.
34.16: Aye aŋahania abo abahola ebibi Musengwa abalengerera nʼobuhambwe, ohubasihiirihisa erala eŋume hubahebulira hu hyalo.
34.17: Abahola ebiruŋamu beŋunderera Musengwa gabaŋulira, abaŋulira gabanunula mu bigosi byawe byosibyosi.
34.18: Musengwa aba huupi ni naabo abanafuŋire mu myoyo jaawe era anunula abo abaŋooyemo amaani nʼesuubi.
34.19: Omuutu ahola ebiruŋamu aŋanga ohuba nʼehibbiryo hyʼebigosi aye Musengwa amununula mu byosibyosi.
34.20: Ahuuma amagumba gage gosigosi sihulibbwagihaho wayire erala.
34.21: Ehibi hyʼomubi hija humuleetera ohufa, abalabe baabo abagwalaafu balibaboneresa.
34.22: Musengwa anunula abaŋeeresa babe, eŋuma wayire mulala hu bamwesiga oyu balisalira omusango.

35.1: O Musengwa , ŋiriŋana ni naabo abaŋiriŋana ni neese, soola ni naabo abasoosa
35.2: ŋamba engabo etono nʼembala winyoheremo bunjeede.
35.3: Ŋamba efumo nʼembasa oholoŋe abo abanyendula, wundome oti, “Ndi Munoŋosi wuwo.”
35.4: Leha abo abenda ohunjita baswale era abo abasala oluhwe ohukenaŋo bibasobere bagoboleyo ni baswaye.
35.5: Leha babe hyʼomuhuuji ogu embeŋo ehubba yaŋira eyo, malayika wa Musengwa nʼababbinga.
35.6: Leha engira yaawe yijuule ehiirema nʼobuterere, Malayika wa Musengwa nʼababbinga.
35.7: Ngʼolu baatega omutego gwawe aŋaŋuma songa, era ngʼolu banjabira eroŋo mbo ngwemo,
35.8: hibaŋiranga hu lunya olugalamu basirihiira eyo ni batamanyire era nʼomutego ogu baatega gubaŋambe abeene bagwe mwiroŋo eryo basihiirihe.
35.9: Ndisangaala olwa Musengwa era ndisaŋalya olwʼobunoŋosi wuwe.
35.10: Nʼomwoyo gwange gwosigwosi ndiroma ti, “O Musengwa , njʼani ali hyʼewe? Onunula abagadi mu banamaani, abagadi era abali mu wetaavu, obaŋonia abo ababanyagulula.”
35.11: Abajulizi abʼobudulingi betusaayo, basidihaho ebiitu ebitamanyire.
35.12: Basasula ehibi olwʼebiraŋi ebi kola era ŋaŋuma owundiho.
35.13: Atenga ni baali balwaye, nambala ebigwali era nabasabira ni siiba nʼohusiiba. Ohusaba hwange ni hutagobolewamo,
35.14: hyapambya enaku oti hani baali boluganda oba bameeri bange. Nahotamya omutwe hyʼalira nyina.
35.15: Aye ni nʼali mu bugosi, bosibosi basangaala era behumbaania ohunjeherera, abaatu abatamanyire basalaho ebibono ni batalehera.
35.16: Banduulira hyʼabatamanyire Hatonda, era baluma emba olwange.
35.17: O Musengwa, olyosa ŋe ohuŋoleera huŋoleera nʼotanjeeda? Ponie olufuluuto lwawe, ponie epologoma jino.
35.18: Nja huhweyaahisa mu luhumbaano olubba, era nja huhujumirihisya mu duuli lyʼabaatu.
35.19: Otaganya balabe bange ohusaŋalya ni ŋaŋuma songa, otaleha abo abacaawira wereere, otabaganya huminanira moni ni basangaalira enaku yange.
35.20: Endoma yaawe yebboogo, era bahola gwohuŋayirisa abo abaŋuma songa.
35.22: O Musengwa , bino byosibyosi obiweene, otaŋoleera huŋoleera. O Musengwa otamba ŋaleeŋi.
35.23: Yinyoheramo wungayire. Soolere, Hatonda wange era Musengwa wange.
35.24: Mu buluŋamu wuwo, langirira oti mbulaaho musango, O Musengwa Hatonda wange, otabaganya hunjeha.
35.25: Otabaleha huŋeega baati, “Otyo, hufunire ehi hwenda.” Oba “Oyo humufunire.”
35.26: Leha abo bosibosi abasangaalira enaku yange, baswale era bataŋambagana. Leha abo bosibosi abanepaahiraho, esoni jibahubbe.
35.27: Leha abo abasangaala olwʼese ohuŋumaho musango bahubbe ebigalagala olwʼesangaalo nʼohusaŋalya, era hiisi hiseera balome baati, “ Musengwa atenderesewe, asangaala omuŋeeresa wuwe nʼali bulaŋi.”
35.28: Olulimi lwange luja hulomanga hu buluŋamu wuwo nʼetendo liryo oludaalo lwosirwosi.

36.1: Omuhosi wʼebibi gegaana Hatonda mu mwoyo gugwe era sibamuŋa ŋono, hiisi hiseera aŋeega hu huhola hibi.
36.2: Omwene gebona ati waŋamugulu, era aŋeega mbo Hatonda saaja humuboneresa olwʼebibi bibye.
36.3: Ebibono bibye bibi era byabudulingi, ebiitu ebi ahola sibyamagesi era sibiraŋi.
