36.4: Nohu buliri wuwe aba muhusala magesi huhola ebibi, sigenda hulehaŋo ohuhola ebibi.
36.5: Musengwa , ohwenda huhwo hubitiirifu, hubbala era hwola hwigulu, owesigwa wuwo butuumaho ebireri.
36.6: Owabufu wuwo buli hyʼesozi embala, ohutehubbira huhwo huleeŋi hyʼenjuho eyʼamaani mu nyanja. O Musengwa , olabirira abaatu nʼebisolo.
36.7: O Hatonda, ohwenda huhwo hubitiirifu, sihuhoma era sihuguliha, abegingihiriri nʼabaŋaasi beŋogoma mu mabaŋa gago.
36.8: Balya hu bingi ebyomu nyumba yiyo, era obaŋa ebyʼohunywa ebihuluhuta hya maaji gomu lwabi.
36.9: Ndiiwe esibuho yʼobulamu, olwʼenjase yiyo husobola ohubona enjase.
36.10: Yeyongere ohulaga ohwenda huhwo eyiri abo abahumanyire, nʼobutukirivu wuwo obulage abo abali nʼemyoyo ejihola ebiruŋamu.
36.11: Otaganya abehudumbasa ohunumba, oba abahosi bʼebibi ohumbinga.
36.12: Bona abahosi bʼebibi ngʼolu balambagaaye, baguuye ŋaasi sibasobola nʼohwinyoha.

37.1: Oteŋendeheranga olwʼabahosi bʼebibi oba esaalwa ohuhuŋamba olwʼabo abahola ebitali biruŋamu,
37.2: olwohuba bali hyʼenyaasi baja huŋotoha hyʼebimera mu hiseera ehitali hya ŋaleeŋi, hyʼomuloofe ngʼolu guŋotoha mangumangu boosi baja hufa baatyo.
37.3: Wesigenga Musengwa , era oholenga ebiraŋi omenye mu hyalo onyumirwenga ebiraŋi ebi ahuŋa.
37.4: Sangaalanga olwa Musengwa , alihuŋa ebi omwoyo gugwo guŋembaho.
37.5: Ŋambya Musengwa obulamu wuwo omwesigenga era aja huhuyeeda.
37.6: Aja huleetera obugwalaafu wuwo ohwaduhirira hyʼenjase mu mawiiwi, nʼohuba omuutu atehubbira ohwaduha hyʼeryuba eryomu muusi tangalwe.
37.7: Weŋomehanga mu moni ja Musengwa omuhuumiirire nʼobugumiikiriza, oteralihiriranga abaatu banabitamo mu tegeha jaawe ecaamu.
37.8: Leheraaŋo ohunyiiga oba obuhambwe, bihuleetera bigosi byereere.
37.9: Abahosi bʼebibi baja husihiiriha, aye abesiga Musengwa baja huba njʼabeene ehyalo ehi gasuubisa.
37.10: Mu hamanga hatono, abahosi bʼebibi baja huŋwaŋo era nʼoja hubendula, sibaja huboneha.
37.11: Aye abeŋomeha balisikira ehyalo hino era baja huba nʼemiyaaya mingi.
37.12: Abahosi bʼebibi besoomera abagwalaafu era baluma emba olwʼobucaayi.
37.13: Aye Musengwa ajeherera abahosi bʼebibi olwohuba amanyire ati oludaalo lwawe luja hwola basihiirihe.
37.14: Abahosi bʼebibi basoŋolayo epiima era balasa obusaale ohusihiirisa abagadi nʼabali mu wetaavu ko nʼohwita abo abahola ebiruŋamu.
37.15: Aye nawoogi wʼefumo wiita nʼobuŋagaaye epiima jaawe jija hubeta nibo abeene era obusaale waawe buja hubbwagiha.
37.16: Ebitono ebi omugwalaafu ali ni nabyo byamugaso, ohuhira obuŋinda wʼabahosi bʼebibi eduuli.
37.17: Hiri hiityo olwohuba amaani gʼabahosi bʼebibi gaja huhoma aye Musengwa njʼahuuma abagwalaafu.
37.18: Musengwa alabirira abagwalaafu era obusika waawe buja huba wʼemirembe nʼemirembe.
37.19: Mu biseera ebigosi sibaja huŋotoha era mu biseera ebyʼenjala baja hubanga nʼemere mbitiirufu.
37.20: Aye abahosi bʼebibi balisihiiriha, abalabe ba Musengwa baliŋotoha hyʼebimuli era baja hugotaŋo hyʼeriisi.
37.21: Abahosi bʼebibi beŋola ne sibasasula aye abagwalaafu bagaba nʼomwoyo mulala.
37.22: Abo aba Musengwa aŋa ekabi balisikira ehyalo hino aye abo aba aŋwaba balisihiiriha.
37.23: Musengwa anaba nʼasiima engenda yʼomuutu amutaho obuhuumi,
37.24: nʼolu atagala saaja hugwa olwohuba Musengwa amulera mu ngalo jije.
37.25: Naali muŋere ne ŋaahani ndi kulire simbonangaho Musengwa nʼahubbire omugwalaafu omugongo oba abaana babe ni basungirisa emere.
37.26: Baba nʼehyere hiisi hiseera baŋola ni baŋuma ehi beŋambya era nʼabaana baawe baja husuna ekabi.
37.27: Mucuuhe ohuŋwe mu bibi muhole ebiruŋamu muja humenya hu hyalo hino emirembe nʼemirembe.
37.28: Musengwa genda abatehubbira era salehaŋo abesigwa babe. Aja hubahuuma emirembe nʼemirembe aye olulyo lwʼabahosi bʼebibi lulisihiiriha.
37.29: Abagwalaafu baja husikira ehyalo era balihimenyamo emirembe nʼemirembe.
37.30: Omuutu omuluŋamu ebimuŋwamo biba byʼamagesi era aloma ebiruŋamu.
37.31: Ahuuma amagambi ga Hatonda wuwe mu mwoyo gugwe era sagalehaŋo.
37.32: Omubi geteega omugwalaafu ni genda amwite
37.33: aye Musengwa salireha bagwalaafu mu buŋangi wʼababi oba ohuleha bamusalire omusango.
37.34: Wesigenga Musengwa era ogenderenga mu magira gage, oja husikira ehyalo hino. Era olibona ababi ni basihiiriha.
37.35: Nabona omuhosi wʼebibi nʼaŋuma hisa era nʼali bulaŋi hyʼomusaala gwʼe Lebbanooni, oguhulira mwiroba egimu
37.36: aye siŋabita hiseera ngʼafa era ngagota ni namwendula sinamubona.
37.37: Wehaŋaase omuutu omugwalaafu era omulaŋi aja huba nʼobulamu owʼemiyaaya mu moni eyo.
37.38: Aye abahola ebibi bosibosi baja husihiiriha baŋwereŋo erala.
37.39: Obunoŋosi wʼabagwalaafu buŋwa eyiri Musengwa era njʼabahuuma mu biseera ebigosi.
37.40: Musengwa njʼabayeeda era njʼabanunula, abaŋonia abahosi bʼebibi era gabanoŋola olwohuba bamwesiga.

38.1: O Musengwa , otanenya nʼoluŋire oba ohumboneresa nʼehiruŋi.
38.2: Obusaale wuwo busimitire era omuhono gugwo gukangavuuye.
38.3: Olwʼehiruŋi hihyo omubiri gwange gwalwala era amagumba gange ganafuŋire olwʼebibi byange.
38.4: Esoni jipinga olwʼebibi byange, hyʼomugugu ogutasobola ohubbeda.
38.5: Olwʼobuŋubeebe wange amabbwa gange gaŋunya ehibulu.
38.6: Nefudunga era fuuhire ehitagasa siiba mu bulumi oludaalo lwosirwosi.
38.7: Omubiri gwange gwohyerera olwʼobulumi era gapooye ndi huupi hufa.
38.8: Nyongobaaye era mbwagijihire nerira olwʼenaku hu mwoyo.
38.9: O Musengwa, omanyire byosibyosi ebi peegaho oŋulira ohubinda hwange.
38.10: Omwoyo gwange guhubbahubba nʼamaani gapoyeemo era emoni jange sijihibona.
38.11: Abameeri bange sibasemberera olwʼamabbwa aga ndi ni nago, nʼabaliranwa bange banesambire.
38.12: Abenda ohunjita baatega emitego, abanjendesa ohufa banesoomera era hiisi hiseera baasalira ekwe.
38.13: Ndi hyʼomusiŋa ataŋulira era hyʼoyo atasobola huloma.
38.14: Fuuhire hyʼomuutu ataŋulira era atasobola hugobolamo.
38.15: O Musengwa , nesiga ndiiwe Musengwa Hatonda wange oja hungobolamo.
38.16: Nahusunga ti, “Otaleha balabe bange husaŋalihisyaho olwʼohugwa hwange.”
38.17: Ndi huupi hwefumuliraŋo, ndi nʼobulumi wubitiirifu.
38.18: Naatula ebibi byange, ebibi byange bindambya.
38.19: Abalabe bange bali mu bulamu obulaŋi era abo abatanyenda aŋaŋuma hiitu, bangi.
38.20: Abo abasasula ehibi olwʼebiraŋi ebi kola bangeya olwʼohwenda ohuhola ebiraŋi.
38.21: O Musengwa , otandehulira. Otamba ŋaleeŋi, O Hatonda wange.
38.22: Yanguŋaho wunjeede O Musengwa , Omunoŋosi wange.

39.1: Naloma ti, “Nehuumenga mu sambo jange era negenderesenga ohutaloma hibi. Sinja huloma hiitu hyoshyosi abahosi bʼebibi ni baliŋo.”
39.2: Ne wayire naŋoleera nʼohuloma nandindoma neyongera hubonaabona.
39.3: Omwoyo gweyongera ohunefubuha, era ni gwahubba amaluga neyongera ohwerarihirira. Nga ndoma ti,
39.4: “O Musengwa ndomere, ndifa ŋaali era nja huhena myaha jinga? Kebulise ti obulamu wange wa haseera buseera.”
39.5: Wahola endaalo jʼobulamu wange waaba wuupi hyʼekengo jʼenjala. Emyaha jʼobulamu wange sihiitu mu moni jijo. Obulamu wa hiisi muutu, muuya wuuya.
39.6: Omuutu hisisigo busisigo! Byosibyosi ebi huhola byawereere abunga obuŋinda aye saamanya alibuŋira.
39.7: Ne ŋaahani Musengwa hiina ehi nendula? Esuubi lyange liri mu ndiiwe.
39.8: Noŋole mu bibi byange byosibyosi otandeha baŋubeebe hunjeherera.
39.9: Nja huŋoleera huŋoleera olwohuba ndiiwe oli humboneresa.
39.10: Lehera aŋo ohumboneresa amaŋi agawukubbire gahena.
39.11: Ohayula era waboneresa abaatu olwʼebibi byawe olya obuŋinda waawe hyʼebisereŋi hiisi muutu muuya wuuya.
39.12: O Musengwa , ŋulira ohusaba hwange, ŋuliirisa ni sunga obuyeedi, nja wunjeede nahweriririra, otaba hyʼomusiŋa eyiri ohulira hwange, ndi mugendi hyʼabasehulu bange.
39.13: Ndehe nahamwenyaho ko pwe hu hyalo huno.

40.1: Nahuumirira Musengwa nʼobugumiikiriza, gaŋulira ngʼagobolamo ohwerira hwange.
40.2: Gaatusa ohuŋwa mu madosi mwiroŋo eritiisa nga ganjemeeresa hu lwanda gaagira nagenda ni tagwa.
40.3: Gaapa olwembo olunyaaha olwembo olwohujumirya Hatonda wange. Bangi baja hubona batye era besigenga Musengwa .
40.4: Gesiimire omuutu owesiga Musengwa , atesiga abo abepaahapaaha era abagotera mu hujumirya ebinambulamo.
40.5: O Musengwa Hatonda wange, oholire ebyamaliholiho bingi, eŋuma owʼohuhugerageraniaho. Ŋaŋuma asobola ohwanja ebiitu ebi otegehire ohutuholera gahenayo, bingi bugali weene sibibaliha era nolu nahagehisyeho ohubibala sinahasoboye.
40.6: Siwendire birabo nʼeŋongo eŋongo eyi bohya ehwiye lyaguguliha ni neeryo eri baŋaayo olwʼebibi siwabisiima ne waapa ohutwi ohuhuŋulira.
40.7: Ngʼaŋo ndoma ti, “Nijire ohuhola ebi osiima ngʼolu bapandiihaho mu Byaŋandiihiwa.
40.8: O Hatonda wange, nenda ohuhola ebi osiima, amagambi gago bagaŋandiiha mu mwoyo gwange.”
40.9: O Musengwa , ndangirira owawufu wuwo mu luhumbaano olubba. Sinja huhiŋoleraho ngʼolu omanyire.
40.10: Mu luhumbaano lwʼabaatu babo sipolera hu bunoŋosi wuwo. Ndangirira ebiŋamba hu hwenda nʼowesigwa wuwo.
40.11: O Musengwa , otalehera hupambira hisa hihyo leha ohwenda nʼamazima gago bikuumenga habuhyabuhya.
40.12: Hiri hiityo olwohuba ebigosi eduuli bineswanigirihise ebibi byange bipinga era binjigaaye emoni. Bihira efiiri johu mutwe gwange obungi era omwoyo gwange gunafuŋire.
40.13: O Musengwa , hihusangaase wununule O Musengwa , yanguŋaho wunjeede.
40.14: Leha abo abenda ohunjita baswale era hibagwemo abeene nʼabeene. Leha abo abasangaalira ohufafagana hwange bagameyo ni bawomboŋaaye.
40.15: Leha abo abakondyola bagameyo ni baswaye olwohuba baloma baati, “A a! Hwahulomera!”
40.16: Leha abo bosibosi abahwendula basangaale era basaŋalye olwʼewe, era leha abo abenda ohunoŋoha balomerenga ŋamugulu baati, “ Musengwa aŋeewe eŋono!”
40.17: Ndi mugadi era ndi mu wetaavu, Musengwa kusunga wupeegeho. Ndiiwe obunjeeda era ndiiwe omununuzi wange. O Hatonda wange, otalwa ohunjeeda!

41.1: Gesiimire oyo alumirwa abagadi, Musengwa amuŋonia mu biseera ebigosi.
41.2: Musengwa aja humuhuuma era aliŋonia obulamu wuwe aja humuŋa ekabi mu hyalo era saaja humuŋaayo mu mihono jʼabalabe babe.
41.3: Musengwa aja humuhuuma nʼalwaye era aja humuŋonia obulwaye.
41.4: Naloma ati, “O Musengwa , pambire ehisa, ponie olwohuba nonoona mu moni jijo.”
41.5: Abalabe bange bebuusa baati, “Alifa ŋaali, bamwerabire hu hyalo?”
41.6: Hiisi owuuja ohumbonaho gaja hukema hya muhanwa ni gagamayo, nga ko abyanja.
41.7: Abalabe bange bosibosi bahubba owaama, banyendesa bibi byereere era baloma baati,
41.8: “Obulwaye obumuluma wʼamaani saaja hugangamuha huŋwa hu buliri.”
41.9: Ni meeri yange oyu neesiganga, oyu nalyanga ni naye hu hiiŋulo hirala, gacuuhiiye.
41.10: Aye Musengwa , pambire ehisa era ponie sobole ohubesasusa ebi bakola.
41.11: Manyire ti kwesiimisa era omulabe wange sasobola hupangula.
41.12: Ohuumi re obulamu wange olwohuba kola ebiraŋi era nja huba mu moni jijo emirembe nʼemirembe.
41.13: Gebasiwe Musengwa Hatonda wa Yisirayiri emirembe nʼemirembe. Amiina era Amiina.

42.1: Ngʼolu enjobe yirahalaha ni yenda ohunywa amaaji, O Hatonda, nʼomwoyo gwange guutyo poguhuyayaanira.
42.2: Omwoyo gwange guŋemba hu Hatonda Omwene Bulamu. Nahatiine ŋaali ohuba aŋali Hatonda?
42.3: Amasiga agandira mu muusi nʼowiire njʼemere yange. Abaatu bambuusa hiisi hiseera baati, “Hatonda wuwo ali ŋeena ohuhuyeeda?”
42.4: Neŋunamira ni kebulira ngʼolu nagendanga nʼehibbubbu hyʼabaatu, ni kitangirira ohutiina mu nyumba ya Hatonda ni bahubba ebigalagala era ni beyaasa.
42.5: Lwahiina neŋunamira? Lwahiina omwoyo gwange gugulungutana? Esuubi lyange ndita mu Hatonda olwohuba ndigobolamo namujumirya, oyo omunoŋosi wange
42.6: era Hatonda wange. Omwoyo gwange gweŋunamiiye olwʼehyo nja huhuhewulira mu hyalo hyʼe Yoludaani nohu ngingi jʼe Herumooni ohuŋwa hu lusozi Mizali.
42.7: Naŋandi ŋano, obutahi owʼamaani bunduma wuli hyʼamaaji agayomboha ŋaasi, wuli hyʼamayengo gʼamaaji agaŋolomboga ni gaŋindigana ni gatabaala ŋaasi.
42.8: Musengwa olaga ohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu mu muusi, mu wiire mbe nʼolwembo olu nemba, lube saala eyiri Hatonda owʼobulamu wange.
42.9: Ndoma Hatonda olwanda lwange ti, “Lwahiina bunjibiriiye? Lwahiina ngenda ni neŋunamiiye olwʼabasigu abakiyaania?”
42.10: Ebiduho ebi banduha bikenireemo amaani era basiiba ni bambuusa baati, “Hatonda wuwo ali ŋeena?”
42.11: Lwahiina neŋunamira? Lwahiina omwoyo gwange gugulungutana? Esuubi lyange ndita mu Hatonda olwohuba ndigobolamo namujumirya, oyo omunoŋosi wange era Hatonda wange.

43.1: O Hatonda, njeede obe puliida wange eyiri egwanga eritahujumirya. Ponie abaatu abadulingi era abahosi bʼebibi.
43.2: Ndiiwe Hatonda obukuuma. Lwahiina wukubba omugongo? Lwahiina siiba ni neŋunamiiye, abalabe bange ni bakiyaania?
43.3: Pindihire enjase yiyo nʼamazima gago, leha bitangirire, leha binjose hu lusozi lulwo olwawufu, ehifo omu omenya.
43.4: Nja hutiina hu hituuti hya Hatonda eyiri Hatonda, esangaalo lyange era owunesiimisa. Ndihubba ahatongooli ni kujumirya O Hatonda, Hatonda wange.
43.5: Lwahiina neŋunamira? Lwahiina omwoyo gwange gugulungutana? Esuubi lyange ndita mu Hatonda, olwohuba ndigobolamo namujumirya oyo omunoŋosi wange era Hatonda wange.

44.1: O Hatonda, hwaŋulira nʼamatwi geefe abasehulu beefe ni batuŋayira ebyamaliholiho ebi wahola halehale mu mulembe gwawe.
44.2: Watambisa obuŋangi wuwo wabbinga amawanga omu watongosa abasehulu beefe. Wasaaŋasaaŋa abanamawanga ngʼoŋa abasehulu beefe efuma.
44.3: Ohuŋangula amawanga sihyali lwa bisoosa byʼabasehulu beefe abeene. Sihyaŋwa hu maani gaawe abeene hyaŋwa mu maani gʼomuhono gugwo omulungi nʼobuŋangi wuwo. Ohubaaŋo huhwo mu njase yiyo nʼohwenda ohu wabendamo byabaŋangusa.
44.4: Ndiiwe habaha wange era Hatonda wange, oyeeda abaatu ba Yakobbo ohuŋangula.
44.5: Olwʼobuŋangi wuwo, huŋangula abalabe beefe, olwʼewe, huniinirira abatulumba.
44.6: Sinesiga hasaale hange, era epiima yange sinje egira naŋangula.
44.7: Ne ndiiwe otuŋa ohuŋangula abasigu beefe, era oswasa abatucaawa.
44.8: Oludaalo lwosirwosi hwenyumikirihisa mu ndiiwe Hatonda era hunahujumiryenga emirembe nʼemirembe.
44.9: Aye ŋaahani otuhubbire omugongo era otwihiise ŋaasi sohitiina mu lutalo nʼamaŋe geefe.
44.10: Waagima hwaduluma abalabe beefe era abasigu banyaga ebyefe.
44.11: Watuŋayo batunawuujule hyʼetaama era otusalanihisiiye mu mawanga.
44.12: Watunda abaatu babo hu bbeeyi eyaŋaasi omuŋuma ehi wasunamo.
44.13: Otufuuye eduho eyiri abaliranwa beefe ehiitu ehi abatweswanigirihiise batala.
44.14: Otufuuye ehiitu ehyohwenyinyalya eyiri abanamawanga, abaatu banyeenya emitwe ni batunyooma.
44.15: Basiiba ni banyooma, era nijuuye huswala.
44.16: Eriyo abo abakayuhira ni banduulira olwʼomulabe owefumbiririiye hu hwesasusa.
44.17: Ebyo byosibyosi bitwolireeho wayire sihuhwibiriranga oba ohubbwaga endagaano eyi wahola ni neefe.
44.18: Mu myoyo jeefe sihuhuŋwangaho era sihujemeranga biragiro bibyo.
44.19: Aye watuleha mu gasolo eŋuma otuyeeda watudanyirira mu hiirema ehiŋambire ti ngungungu.
44.20: Singa hwali hwibiriiye Hatonda weefe oba ni hujumirya hatonda omugwira,
44.21: Hatonda amanyire ebyama ebiri mu myoyo jʼabaatu, sigahahimanyire?
44.22: Atenga hiisi ludaalo batwehoyera ohutuhenaŋo hu lulwo. Batubisya hyʼetaama eyi baja husala.
44.23: O Musengwa, yinyoha lwahiina oŋenyuha? Yinyoheramo, otatudanyirira watiinirira!
44.24: Lwahiina otwehweha wibirira ohubonaabona nʼohunyigirisiwa ohu hulimo?
44.25: Huguuye mu fuuhe, emibiri jeefe jiŋwereeye ŋaasi.
44.26: Yinyoha otuyeede, tununule olwʼohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu.

45.1: Omwoyo gwange gwituluha ebiraŋi ni nembera habaha ebi seega olulimi lwange lusengeja ebibono hyʼekalaamu yʼomuŋandiisi haŋunye.
45.2: Ndiiwe omusinde omuŋoono ohira abandi bosibosi era omanyire ohuloma olwohuba Hatonda gahuŋa ekabi ejʼemirembe nʼemirembe.
45.3: Wefiihe epiima yiyo hu nduuhu ewe owʼamaani amangi. Yambala engoye endaŋi ejʼomutangirisi.
45.4: Mwiŋono liryo oŋanguuye hulwa amazima, obuwombeefu nʼowawufu. Leha omuhono gugwo ogwʼamaani guhole ebiitu ebitiisa.
45.5: Lasula obusaale wuwo owoogi bufumite emyoyo jʼabalabe ba Habaha. Leha ogaluse amawanga mu buŋangi wuwo.
45.6: O Hatonda, owahabaha wuwo buja hubererera emirembe nʼemirembe. Era oja huŋuga abaatu babo nʼotehubbira.
45.7: Wenda obutukirivu aye ocaawa ehibi. Olwʼehyo, Hatonda wuwo ahutobooye mu bahyo era gahuta mu hifo ehyʼeŋono ehiitu ehija huhuŋweramo esangaalo ohuhiraho abahyo.
45.8: Ebyambalo bibyo ebyʼobuŋugi biŋunya ahaloosa aha miira nʼaha alowe naha kasiya. Mu mbuga eji batimbire amasyaka ebifuga bihusangaasa.
45.9: Mu bahasi abahulabirira mulimo nʼabahaana ba habaha. Hu muhono gugwo omulungi pohuli omumbeja owambaaye ezaabbu ehira obulaŋi ohuŋwa mu Ofiri.
45.10: Muhaana, ŋuliirisa era faayo hu ebi ndoma yibirira abalebe babo nʼabomu hiha hihyo.
45.11: Obuŋoono wuwo wuŋirire omwoyo gwa habaha. Muŋe eŋono olwohuba nje musengwawo.
45.12: Abaatu bʼe Tiiro balihuleetera ebirabo nʼabaŋinda balyehoyahoya ni benda obasiime.
45.13: Omumbeja ali mu lubiri era gejuuye eŋono. Ehyambalo hihye batungiraho ezaabbu.
45.14: Mu byambalo ebigohobe obulaŋi bamuŋerehera ewa habaha abahaana bahye abataŋenyuhangaho nʼomusinde bamuŋerehera era bali humuhuleetera.
45.15: Bali humuleeta mu sangaalo nʼohusaŋalya ni bengira mu lubiri lwa habaha.
45.16: Abaana babo balisikira abasehulu baawe oli bafuula baŋugi mu hyalo hyosihyosi.
45.17: Nja huleetera abaatu abʼemirembe josijosi ohuhuhebuliranga era olwʼehyo amawanga gosigosi ganahujumiryenga emirembe nʼemirembe.

46.1: Mu Hatonda njomu hweŋogoma era njʼamaani geefe njʼatuyeeda hiisi hiseera ni huli mu bigosi.
46.2: Ehyo njʼehitugumya wayire ehyalo hinateetemenga sihuja hutya era wayire esozi jinasiguhenga jedaanya mu buliba wʼenyanja,
46.3: wayire amaaji mu nyanja ganaŋolombogenga gatumbeera nʼesozi jateetema olwʼetiisa eyo.
46.4: Ŋaliŋo olwabi oluliho emyombe ejireeta esangaalo mu hibuga hya Hatonda, ehifo ehyawufu omu Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali amenya.
46.5: Hatonda ali mu hibuga ehyo era sihiritenga. Bulihya mu mugamba pwipwipwi Hatonda gahiyeeda.
46.6: Amawanga gejuuye ohutya era owahabaha wuŋwaŋo Hatonda awaatuha ngʼehyalo hisanuuha.
46.7: Musengwa Omwene Maŋe ali ni neefe, hweŋogoma mu Hatonda wa Yakobbo.
46.8: Muuje mubone ebi Musengwa aholire mubone ebyeŋunjisa ebi aholire hu hyalo.
46.9: Ahenaŋo etalo mu hyalo hyosihyosi, abbwaga obusaale era afoomafooma amafumo goohya engabo nʼomuliro.
46.10: Nʼalagira ati, “Mubunjeere era muhimanye muuti ndiise Hatonda baja huupa eŋono mu mawanga gosigosi baja huupa eŋono mu hyalo hyosihyosi.”
46.11: Musengwa Omwene Maŋe ali ni neefe, hweŋogoma mu Hatonda wa Yakobbo.

47.1: Abaatu mwesimwesi muhubbe mu ngalo muhubbe ebigalagala ni mujumirya Hatonda,
47.2: olwohuba Musengwa Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali atiisa era nje habaha ahira obuhulu mu hyalo hyosihyosi.
47.3: Agima hwaŋangula abalabe beefe era hwabaŋuga.
47.4: Gatutobolera ehyalo omwohumenyanga efe abaatu ba Yisirayiri abagenda oti hi.
47.5: Hatonda aniina ŋamugulu gehala hu tebe yiye eyobuŋugi. Amajanjaasi gebigalagala ebibahubba nʼamagwala aga bafuuŋa, biŋulirihana Musengwa nʼatiina ŋamugulu.
47.6: Mwembe enyembo ejipaaha Hatonda, mwembe enyembo ejipaaha, mwembe enyembo ejipaaha Habaha weefe, mwembe enyembo ejipaaha.
47.7: Hatonda nje habaha wʼehyalo hyosihyosi, mumwembere ezabbuli eji mupaaha.
47.8: Hatonda aŋuga amawanga gosigosi. Hatonda gehaaye hu tebe yiye eyʼobuŋugi era enjawufu.
47.9: Abahungu bʼamawanga bahumbaana nʼabaatu ba Hatonda wa Yibbulayimu olwohuba aŋuga abahabaha bamawanga era nje Hatonda owʼeŋono eryʼamaani.

48.1: Musengwa ali nʼeŋono eryʼamaani asaniiye ohumujumirihisyanga mu hibuga hya Hatonda weefe hu lusozi lulwe olwawufu.
48.2: Sayuuni lusozi luŋoono era luleetera ehyalo hyosihyosi esangaalo. Olusozi Sayuuni hibuga hya habaha owʼeŋono.
48.3: Hatonda alagire ati omwene njʼomuhuumi wʼabaatu abomu hibuga ehyo.
48.5: Ne ni bahibona beŋunja era batya bafulumuha.
48.6: Emama yabaŋambira eyo era baali mu bulumi hyʼomuhasi owenda ohusaala.
48.7: Wabasihiirisa hyʼamaato gʼe Talusiisi aga muyaga ogwʼebuŋwalyuba gwabbwagabbwaga.
48.8: Ebi hwaŋuliranga mbebi huweene mu hibuga hya Musengwa Omwene Maŋe mu hibuga hya Hatonda weefe, Hatonda ahihuuma emirembe nʼemirembe.
48.9: O Hatonda, ni huli mu Yekaalu yiyo huŋeega hu hwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu.
48.10: O Hatonda, abaatu hiisi ŋaatu bahujumirya efuma yiyo ehwene mu hyalo hyosihyosi era oŋuga nʼotehubbira.
48.11: Leha abaatu bomu Sayuuni basangaale abaatu bomu Buyudaaya basaŋalye olwohuba osala emisango nʼotehubbira.
48.12: Mugende mu Sayuuni muhyeswanigirise mubale eminaala ejirimo.
48.13: Muhaŋaase era mwetegerese ebirimo ko mwahaŋayira abʼomulembe oguuja muuti,
48.14: Hatonda nje Hatonda weefe emirembe nʼemirembe era njʼanatutangirirenga ohwola olu hulifa.

49.1: Hiisi muutu aŋulire hino abaatu mwesimwesi mu hyalo hino muŋuliirise,
49.3: Nja huloma ebibono ebyʼamahulu era ebi muja huŋulira ohuŋwa mu mwoyo gwange bija hubafuula abaatu abali nʼohutegeera.
49.4: Nja hwetegeeresa engero njinyonyole mu lwembo ni kubba ahatongooli.
49.5: Mu biseera ebigosi sinja hutya wayire abalabe bange banjeswanigirisa,
49.6: abo abesiga obuŋinda waawe era abepaaha olwʼobuŋinda waawe obubitiirifu.
49.7: Eŋuma muutu aŋanga ohununula omuutu wahye, wayire aŋanga ohusasula Hatonda amuhuuma.
49.8: Obulamu wʼebbeeyi bugali era eŋuma aŋanga ohugulirira,
49.10: Hiisi muutu ahibona ti nʼabagesi boosi bafa, abaŋubeebe nʼabaŋuma ehi bategeera boosi basihiiriha era balehera abandi obuŋinda waawe.
49.11: Amagombe gaawe gaja husigala ni gali njʼamago gaawe endaalo josijosi, pomu balimenya emirembe nʼemirembe nʼolu baliba nʼebyalo ebiri mu masiina gaawe.
49.12: Aye omuutu nʼolwaba muŋinda atye sihimugaana hufa era alisihiiriha hyʼebisolo.
49.13: Ehyo njʼehyola hu abo abaŋeega ti behena ni naabo ababesiga era babehirihisamo.
49.14: Boosi bali nʼohufa hyʼetaama era olumbe lulibalya. Bulihya abagwalaafu babaŋuga era sibaligobolayo humenya mu mayumba gaawe agʼomutindo.
49.15: Aye Hatonda aja huununula ohuŋwa emagombe, mu butuufu omwene alipira ewuwe.
49.16: Hitahubisyanga bubi singa omuutu asuna obuŋinda obubitiirifu singa obuŋinda buwe weyongera obungi
49.17: olwohuba nʼalifa eŋuma ehi alitiina ni nahyo era saalitiina emagombe nʼeŋono lirye.
49.18: Wayire omuutu geranga wʼekabi era abaatu bamupaaha olwʼobuŋinda
49.19: aye ali tiina geŋimba hu basehulu babe abataligaluhamo hubona hu lyuba.
49.20: Omuutu omuŋinda aŋuma hutegeera yeesi wahusihiiriha hyʼesolo.

50.1: Hatonda Omwene Buŋangi, Musengwa alanga ehyalo hyosihyosi ohwehumbaania ohuŋwera erala ebuŋwalyuba ohwola ebugwalyuba.
50.2: Hatonda amasamasa ohuŋwa mu Sayuuni ehibuga ehiŋoono era hyaduhirira hyʼeryuba.
50.3: Hatonda weefe alihuuja saaja huŋoleera era omuliro ni gumutangiriyeemo ni hibuyaga atiisa amweswanigirihiise.
50.4: Alanga egulu nʼehyalo ohuba bajulizi nʼasalira abaatu babe emisango.
50.5: Aloma ati, “Humbaania abaatu bange abaahola endagaano ni nange ni baŋayo eŋongo.”
50.6: Egulu lirangirira owawufu wuwe olwohuba Hatonda omwene njʼomulamuzi.
50.7: “Baatu bange muŋulire era nja huloma enywe Abayisirayiri nja hubaŋaaho obujulizi ndiise Hatonda, Hatonda wenywe.
50.8: Simbanenya olwʼeŋongo lyenywe oba olwʼeŋongo eyi bohya ehwiye lyaguguliha eri muupa hiisi haseera.
50.9: Sinetaaga bunwa ejomu bidooli byenywe oba embusi ejomu lugo lwenywe.
50.10: Hiri hiityo olwohuba esolo josijosi ejomwisugu jange era hiisi ŋombe ejiri hu sozi olukumi, jange.
50.11: Manyire hiisi nyuni eyiri hu sozi era hiisi hitonde mwisugu, hyange.
50.12: Ni nahali njala sihyetagisa hubalomera olwohuba ehyalo nʼebihirimo byosibyosi byange.
50.13: Ndya nyama jʼebunwa oba nywa amafugi gʼembusi?
50.14: Mulehe ohweyaasa hwenywe hube njʼeŋongo lyenywe eyiri Hatonda era mwoherese oweyamo wenywe eyiri oyo Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali.
50.15: Onaba mu bigosi, ndange nja huhununula era oja huupa eŋono.”
50.16: Aye Hatonda abuusa omuhosi wʼebibi ati, “Lukusa hi olu oli ni nalwo ohuloma hu magambi gange oba ohuloma hu ndagaano yange?
50.17: Ocaawa ebi kulagira era ebi ndoma obihubba omugongo.
50.18: Omwibi njʼoyu ohola ni naye omuhumba era ohola omuhago nʼabahwedi.
50.19: Hiisi hiseera oloma bibi byereere era ebibono bibyo bijuuye budulingi wereere.
50.20: Hiisi hiseera oba muhuloma hu mugandawo era oloma hu mwana wa maawo.
50.21: Ebyo byosibyosi obiholire naŋoleera ngʼoŋeega oti ndi hyʼewe. Aye nja huhuhangavula era kunenye moni hu moni.
50.22: Ŋulira hino, ewe owibirira Hatonda nja huhunawujula mu bugusugusu ŋaŋume owʼohuhuyeeda.
50.23: Oyo aŋaayo eŋongo ohunjeyaasa aba gaapa eŋono era mu butuufu nja humulaga obunoŋosi wa Hatonda.”

51.1: O Hatonda, pambire ehisa olwʼohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu. Olwʼehisa hihyo ehibitiirifu kusunga osangule ebibi byange byosibyosi.
51.2: Njogeho ebibi byange byosibyosi, ehibi hipweho tuhulire erala.
51.3: Manyire ti ndi mubbengi era habuhyabuhya manyire ehibi hyange.
51.4: Nasunguŋasa ndiiwe wamwene. Nahola ebibi mu moni jijo era cʼehigira ebyʼoloma ni biri byʼamazima, era siwehubbira nʼosala emisango.
51.5: Mu butuufu ndi mubbengi ohuŋwera erala mu buŋere wange, mubbengi ohuŋwera erala hu ludaalo olu nagwa mu hida hya maayi yange.
51.6: Mu butuufu ewe wenda omuutu owʼamazima olwʼehyo somese ohuba mwesigwa mu mwoyo gwange.
51.7: Njogeho ni hayisopu era nja hufuuha mugwalaafu, njoge tuhule ohuhiraho amabaale gʼefula.
51.8: Leha sangaale era saŋalye, leha amagumba agʼobbwagire gasangaale.
51.9: Lehera aŋo ohuheja hu bibi byange era tuseho ebibi byange byosibyosi.
51.10: O Hatonda, tondeemo omwoyo omugwalaafu era ngobosemo bunyaaha omwoyo omwesigwa.
51.11: Otambinga ohuŋwa mu moni jijo, oba watusaho Omwoyo wuwo Omutukuvu.
51.12: Ngobohese bunyaaha esangaalo eryʼobunoŋosi wuwo era wuupe omwoyo ogwenda ohuhugondera.
51.13: Ehyo hija hundeetera ohusomesa ababbengi amagira gago era baja hucuuha bagobole eyi oli.
51.14: O Hatonda, noŋole ohuŋwa mu butemu ewe Hatonda omunoŋosi wange era nja hwemba ebiŋamba hu butukirivu wuwo.
51.15: O Musengwa, njeede sobole ohuloma era nja hulangirira etendo liryo.
51.16: Eŋongo sinje erihusangaasa nahahuleteeye eŋongo eyi bohya ehwiye lyaguguliha sinje lihwesiimisa.
51.17: Eŋongo eri Hatonda genda njʼomwoyo omugondi, O Hatonda, sooja hutala omwoyo omugondi era omuwombeefu.
51.18: Heja hu Sayuuni nʼehisa era oyeede otongole ebiteepe bya Yerusaalemu.
51.19: Oja husangaala abaatu ni bahuŋa eŋongo nʼomwoyo omulaŋi, eŋongo eyi bohya ehwiye lyaguguliha era baja huŋaayo ebunwa jʼeŋombe hu hituuti hihyo.

52.1: Lwahiina weranga owʼamaani wepaahapaaha olwʼebibi ebi ohola? Lwahiina wepaahapaaha oludaalo lwosirwosi aye Hatonda mwesigwa emirembe nʼemirembe.
52.2: Hiisi ludaalo oyiiya ohusihiirisa abahyo era ebibono bibyo byogi hyʼekereta hiisi ehi oloma hya budulingi.
52.3: Onyumirwa ebibi ohuhira ebiraŋi onyumirwa ohudulinga ohuhira ohuloma amazima.
52.4: Mudulingi ewe onyumirwa ohusihiirisa abahyo nʼebibono bibyo!
52.5: Mu butuufu Hatonda alihusihiirihisa erala. Alihuŋamba gahudyedyesa ohuŋwa mu mago gago aja huhuhuula ohuŋwa mu hyalo omu omenyire.
52.6: Abagwalaafu baja hubona era balitya baja humujeherera baati,
52.7: “Bona omuutu owagaana ohwesiga Hatonda aye geesiga obuŋida wuwe obubitiirifu era gahulahulana olwʼohusihiirisa abahye.”
52.8: Aye ndi hyʼomusaala omuzayiti oguhulira mu nyumba ya Hatonda, nesiga Hatonda olwʼohwenda huhwe ohubitiirifu ohwʼemirembe nʼemirembe.
52.9: Nja huhujumiryanga emirembe nʼemirembe olwʼebi oholire nja huta esuubi lyange mu ewe olwohuba oli mulaŋi. Nja huhujumirya mu luhumbaano lwʼabagwalaafu babo.

53.1: Omuŋubeebe aloma mu mwoyo gugwe ati, “Ŋaŋumaaŋo Hatonda.” Abahosi bʼebibi, ebi bahola byambiho. Era ŋaŋuma wayire mulala ahola ehiraŋi.
53.2: Hatonda aba mwigulu galengerera baatu ŋaasi hu hyalo, abone oba ŋaliŋo omuutu yesiyesi ategeera, yesiyesi amwendula.
53.3: Aye bosibosi babbaama, bosibosi ŋalala bahola ebibi. Era eŋuma wayire mulala ahola ebiruŋamu eŋuma wayire mulala.
53.4: Abahola ebibi sibaja hwega? Bahenireeŋo ohulya abaatu bange oti balya mere era sibasunga Hatonda ohubayeeda.
53.5: Aye bulihya lulala jabagaana olwohuba Hatonda aja husalaania amagumba gʼabalabe babe. Era esoni jija hubaŋamba Hatonda nʼabahubbire omugongo.
53.6: Era saba ti omuutu aŋwe mu Sayuuni anunule Yisirayiri! Hatonda nʼaligobosa abaatu babe bunyaaha leha olulyo lwa Yakobbo lusangaale era Yisirayiri asaŋalye!

54.1: O Hatonda, noŋole olwʼobuŋangi wuwo era nunule olwʼamaani gago.
54.2: O Hatonda, ŋulira ohusaba hwange ŋulira ebi kusunga.
54.3: Abamalimbe banumba abaatu abahambwe bendula obulamu wange abaatu abo sibatya Hatonda.
54.4: Mu butuufu Hatonda njʼobunjeeda era Musengwa njʼobukuuma.
54.5: Leha ebi balabe bange bategeha ohukola bibagobolere abeene. Basihiirise olwohuba oli mwesigwa.
54.6: Nja huhuŋongera nʼesangaalo, O Musengwa , nja huhujumirya olwohuba ehyo hiraŋi.
54.7: Hiri hiityo olwohuba gaanunula mu bigosi byange byosibyosi era neboneyeho nʼemoni jange abalabe bange ni baŋooye amaani.

55.1: O Hatonda, ŋulira ohusaba hwange otagaana hwegayirira hwange.
55.2: Ganya wupuliirise era wungobolemo, ebiŋeego bikenireemo.
55.3: Neŋendeherera olwʼebibono byʼabalabe bange. Banjohise hu bigosi era bandiho ehiruŋi ehyʼamaani.
55.4: Omwoyo gwange guhubbahubba era noleheeye ohufa.
55.5: Teetema olwʼobuti era mbula ngeri eyʼohuleheramo ohuteetema.
55.6: Naloma ti, “Singa naali nʼamabaŋa hyʼeŋuusi nahaguluhire natiina eyi tiina nesunira emiyaaya.
55.7: Nahaguluhire natiina ŋaleeŋi namenya eyo mu lulafu.
55.8: Nahanguŋire mangu nasuna aŋa neŋogoma naŋona hibuyaga owʼamaani nʼefula eyʼamabaale.”
55.9: O Musengwa, tabuujula tabuujula olulimi lwʼabahosi bʼebibi hiisi muutu atategeera ehi wahye aloma. Hiri hiityo olwohuba mbona abaatu mu hibuga bahola ebikolwa ebibi era begugunga.
55.10: Omuusi nʼowiire basiiba hugenda ni betoloola ehibuga, ni bahola emivuyo nʼebiitu ebyenyinyasa.
55.11: Hiisi ŋaatu ŋaliŋo husihiiriha era mu nabiŋwera mwejuuye budulingi nʼohulyakula.
55.12: Singa omulabe ganduula, nahamwehalirihire. Era singa omulabe ganjinyoheraho nahamwehwehire.
55.13: Aye omuutu oyo ndiiwe omuutu hyange oyu ndya ni naye mu swa ndala era meeri yange,
55.14: oyu naali nʼomuhumba ni naye ni hutiinanga huutyo mu nyumba ya Hatonda.
55.15: Leha ohufa hugwe hugwa hyʼomwibi hu balabe bange era amagombe gabamire balamu olwohuba ehibi himenyire mu bulamu waawe.
55.16: Aye ndanga Hatonda, era Musengwa ganoŋola.
55.17: Mu mugamba nomu muusi nʼegulo, neririgana enaku yange era gaŋulira ejanjaasi lyange.
55.18: Aja hungobosa miyaaya ohuŋwa mu lutalo wayire ndi nʼeduuli lyʼabalabe.
55.19: Hatonda aŋuga emirembe nʼemirembe era oja huŋangula abalabe bange olwohuba bageene ohucuusa ebikolwa byawe bahujumirye.
55.20: Oyu ndya ni naye mu swa ndala alumba meriiwe gebirira endagaano eyi gahola.
55.21: Endoma yiye ndaŋi ohuhiraho omuzigo aye omwoyo gugwe gwijuuye talo njereere. Ebibono bibye bigonda hyʼamafuta agahaloosa ngʼolu gagondya omubiri aye bisala hyʼepiima.
55.22: Yanjuliranga Musengwa ebigosi bibyo aja huhuyeeda saaja huleha baŋangule abagwalaafu babe.
55.23: Aye ewe Hatonda oja huŋindiha abahosi bʼebibi mwiroŋo ereeŋi basihiirihe, abatemu nʼabadulingi sibaja huŋesa nʼehitundu hyʼemyaha jaawe ejʼobuhulu aye ese nesiga ndiiwe.

56.1: O Hatonda, pambire ehisa olwohuba omulabe gakiyaania hiisi hiseera.
56.2: Abalabe bange bapiima oludaalo lwosirwosi era mu hwepaahapaaha hwawe, bangi abanumba.
56.4: Nesiga Hatonda olwʼebi gasuubisa. Nesiga Hatonda era ŋaŋuma ehija hutiisa. Omuutu buutu aŋanga hukola hi?
56.5: Oludaalo lwosirwosi baba muhucuusacuusa bibono byange era baba mu husala magesi ohukenaŋo.
56.6: Behobana era behweha aŋaatu babone hiisi ehi kola ni basuubira ohunjita.
56.7: O Hatonda, otabaleha huŋunuha hiruŋi hihyo aye basihiirihise erala.
56.8: Ŋandiiha ohweririgana hwange, ŋamba amasiga gange ogajuhe mu cupa yiyo, amasiga gage gali hu lukalala lulwo.
56.9: Ohuhweriririra hwange huja hugima abalabe bange bagamirirayo enyuma. Kimanyire ti Hatonda ali hu luuyi lwange.
56.10: Jumirya Hatonda olwʼebyo ebi gasuubisa jumirya Musengwa olwʼebyo ebi gasuubisa.
56.11: Nesiga Hatonda era sinja hutya hiitu hyosihyosi. Omuutu buutu aŋanga hukola hi?
56.12: O Hatonda, nja hwoheresa ebi nasuubisa era nja huleeta ebirabo ohuhweyaasa.
56.13: Hiri hiityo olwohuba waponia ohufa nʼamagulu gange ohutaterera olwʼehyo nja hugendera mu moni ja Hatonda ngendere mu njase eyi leeta obulamu.

57.1: O Hatonda, pambire ehisa, pambire ehisa olwohuba neŋogoma mu ndiiwe. Nja hweŋogoma mu hisisigo hyʼamabaŋa gago ohwola olu bugosi buliŋwaŋo.
57.2: Neŋunderera Hatonda Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali, eyiri Hatonda owoheresa ehigendererwa hihye mu bulamu wange.
57.3: Gapeeresa obuyeedi ohuŋwa mwigulu era ganoŋola ne aja huleeta ebigosi hu abo abanumba. Hatonda mwesigwa era aja hundaga ohwenda huhwe ohubitiirifu.
57.4: Ndi ŋagati wʼepologoma mu meeno ga nasaŋa mu baatu abali nʼameeno amoogi oti fumo nʼobusaale ebibono byawe byogi hyʼepiima.
57.5: O Hatonda, laga etendo liryo hiisi ŋaatu mwigulu era leha eŋono liryo libe hu hyalo hyosihyosi.
57.6: Abalabe bange bategire olutuula lupambe amagulu, omwoyo gwange gweŋunamiiye! Banjabira eroŋo mu ngira yange aye abeene baliguyeemo.
57.7: Olwʼewe Hatonda ndi mugumu bugali ndi mugumu era nja hwemba.
57.8: Nja hwinyoha, nja hwinyoha pambe ogutongooli nʼahatongooli, nja husisimuha pwipwipwi nembe!
57.9: O Musengwa, nja huhweyaasanga ni ndi mu baatu abangi, nja huhujumiryanga ni ndi mu mawanga.
57.10: Hiri hiityo olwohuba ohwenda huhwo hubitiirifu era hwola hwigulu. Owesigwa wuwo bubitiirifu ohwola hu bireri.
57.11: O Hatonda, laga etendo liryo hiisi ŋaatu mwigulu era leha eŋono liryo libe hu hyalo hyosihyosi.

58.1: Enywe abaŋugi muloma amazima? Era musala emisango ni mutehubbira?
58.2: Mbe! Muŋeega hu huhola bibi byoŋene, era muba muhuleeta mivuyo hu hyalo.
58.3: Ohuŋwa mu husaaliwa, omuhosi wʼebibi gabbaama era ohuŋwa mu hida hya nyina aloma byʼobudulingi.
58.4: Bejuuye obusagwa hyʼomusota basiŋa hyʼekolokima etaŋulira,
58.5: seŋulira janjaasi lyʼomuŋeŋa ahongeresa emisota, aŋamba emisota gajiŋa obulesi jagonda wayire mukugu mu mulimo ogwo.
58.6: O Hatonda, babbwagebbwageemo ageeno, O Musengwa , babbwagebbwageemo ageeno agali oti gʼepologoma.
58.7: Leha baŋwereŋo erala hyʼamaaji agomubando agatalwaŋo leha ebisoosa byawe biŋume mugaso.
58.8: Leha bomeetane hyʼagasooko aga bajuhire hu woomu era leha babe hyʼomwana afa nataweene hu lyuba.
58.9: Leha babaheneŋo mangu hyʼenyaasi eri muliro gududumusa.
58.10: Abagwalaafu baja husangaala ohubona abahosi bʼebibi ni basuna omugabo ogu basaanira, ni basaaba amagulu mu mafugi gʼabahosi bʼebibi.
58.11: Ngʼabaatu baloma baati, “Mu butuufu abagwalaafu babaŋaaye omuhemba. Era mu butuufu Hatonda asala emisango nʼatehubbira, aliŋo!”

59.1: O Hatonda wange, nunule ohuŋwa mu balabe bange ngadirire eyiri abo abanjinyoheraho.
59.2: Nunule ohuŋwa mu bahosi bʼebibi era njeede abatemu batanjita.
59.3: O Musengwa , bona ngʼolu banjeteega ohunjita, nʼobuhambwe behobana ohuukosa ni ŋaŋuma hisobyo oba ehibi ehi mbaholire.
59.4: Eŋuma hibi ehi mbaholire aye betegeha ohunumba. Yinyoheramo wunjeede banyendesa bigosi.
59.5: O Musengwa Hatonda Omwene Maŋe, Hatonda wa Yisirayiri yinyoha obonerese amawanga gosigosi era abo abahosi bʼebibi otabasasira.
59.6: Bagaluha ehyegulo ni bahiritira hyʼembwa bagenda ni betoloola ehibuga.
59.7: Bona ebi bahaasa ohuŋwa mu hanwa haawe bahaasa ebibono ebiri hyʼepiima. Era baloma baati, “Ŋaŋuma aŋulira ebi huloma.”
59.8: Aye O Musengwa obajeherera, ojeherera ababi abo bosibosi.
59.9: Ewe ndiiwe amaani gange era Hatonda neŋogoma mu ndiiwe.
59.10: Hatonda wange ganyenda aja huuja eyi ndi, aja hutangirira naŋangula abalabe bange.
59.11: Ne ewe Musengwa engabo yeefe, kusunga otabeeta olwohuba abaatu bange bahanda bebirira. Basasaanie nʼamaani gago era obaŋangule.
59.12: Olwʼebibono ebibi ebi baloma, leha ohwepaahapaaha hwawe hubafuhumire. Olwʼebiŋwabo nʼobudulingi obu baloma,
59.13: basihiirise nʼehiruŋi era basihiirise baŋwereŋo erala abaatu bosibosi baja humanya baati Hatonda aŋuga Yisirayiri.
59.14: Bagaluha ehyegulo ni bahiritira hyʼembwa bagenda ni betoloola ehibuga.
59.15: Bendula ebyohulya aye batiina ohuŋenyuha ni ŋaŋuma ehi badanyire mu hida.
59.16: Aye nja hwemba hu maani gago. Mu mugamba nja hwemba hu hwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu olwohuba neŋogoma mu ndiiwe mu biseera ebigosi.
59.17: Ndiiwe amaani gange era nja hwemba ni kujumirya Hatonda ndiiwe owukuuma era obunyenda.

60.1: O Hatonda, otuhubbire omugongo era watudanyirira watuluŋira ale ŋaahani tugobose bunyaaha.
60.2: Otengehisye ehyalo wahyadisamo aye ŋaahani hidabirise olwohuba hiri huyuuga.
60.3: Olehire abaatu babo ohubonaabona bugali era hugenda ni hutagataga oti hunyooye mwenge.
60.4: Aye eyiri abo abahutya obaaye buŋonere waawe baŋone ohusihiiriha.
60.5: Twanuhule otununule nʼotambisa omuhono gugwo omulungi, oŋonie abo aba wenda.
60.6: Hatonda nʼali mu hifo hihye ehyawufu gasuubisa ati, “Nja husalamo mu hibuga Sekemu era ngabe ehiiho hyʼe Sukosi mu butundutundu.
60.7: Ehyalo hyʼe Giliyaadi hyange nehya Manase hyosi hyange, ehyalo hyʼEfulayimu njʼekofiira yange eyʼohwambala mu lutalo ehyalo hya Yuda njʼesimbo yange eyʼobuŋugi.
60.8: Ehyalo hyʼe Mowaabbu njʼebbaafu omu saabira. Ehyalo hyʼEdomu pohuuta amagulu. Abafirisuuti baŋeega baati basobola ohupangula?”
60.9: Njʼani aja huupira mu hibuga ehyʼamaani? Njʼani aja hutangirira ohutiina mu Edomu?
60.10: Hatonda, sindiiwe otuhubbire omugongo era otenda hutiina ni neefe mu lutalo?
60.11: Tuŋe obuyeedi ohuŋangula abalabe. Hiri hiityo olwohuba obuyeedi wʼomuutu obuutu buŋuma mahulu.
60.12: Hatonda nʼali hu lubega lwefe huja huŋangula era aja hutyakirira abalabe beefe.

61.1: O Musengwa , ŋulira ohulira hwange, ŋuliirisa ohusaba hwange.
61.2: Pulira puma suubi mu bulamu wange kusunga ni ndi ŋaleeŋi nʼengo pire mu hifo ehyohweŋogomamo.
61.3: Hiri hiityo olwohuba ndiiwe omuneŋogoma, omunaala ogwʼamaani eyiri abalabe.
61.4: Leha mbenga ni neewe mu weema yiyo emirembe nʼemirembe neŋogome mu hisisigo hyʼamabaŋa gago.
61.5: O Hatonda, oŋuliiye oweyamo wange wupaaye ekabi eji oŋa abahutya.
61.6: Yongesa habaha endaalo ejʼobulamu wuwe, awangaale emyaha nʼemyaha.
61.7: Leha aŋugire mu moni jijo emirembe nʼemirembe. Ohwenda nʼowesige wuwo bibenga ni naye.
61.8: Kale nja huhujumiryanga era hiisi ludaalo noheresa ebi suubisa.

62.1: Nindirira Hatonda nʼobugumiikiriza ohunoŋola era niye yeŋene njʼoyu nesiga.
62.2: Niye yeŋene njʼolwanda lwange era njʼobunoŋosi wange njʼobutaasa era sinja hutya.
62.3: Mulyosa ŋeena ohunumba, ese aŋuma ehi ndi era omunafu hyʼolukomera olwagwa ŋaasi?
62.4: Musala amagesi ohungwisa ŋaasi, mundomaho ebyʼobudulingi era mwefuula ohuba abanyendesa ehiraŋi aye mu myoyo jenywe jejuuye obucaayi.
62.5: Hatonda nje yeŋene owuupa emiyaaya era njʼesuubi lyange.
62.6: Hatonda yeŋene njʼolwanda lwange era omunoŋosi wange nja gakuuma olwʼehyo sinja hutya.
62.7: Obuŋangusi nʼeŋono lyange biŋwa eyiri Hatonda njʼomuhuumi wange owʼamaani njʼolwanda era omu neŋogoma.
62.8: Abaatu bange mwesige Hatonda ehiseera hyosihyosi humuŋambye emyoyo jeefe olwohuba njʼomuhweŋogoma.
62.9: Abaatu hwesihwesi huli muuya buuya, ŋaŋuma owʼamaani hu begingihiriri nʼabaŋaasi singa batupima hu mizaani huli muuya buuya.
62.10: Siwesigamanga hu biitu ebi osunire mu magira amabi oba ohwenyumirisanga mu biitu ebyʼowiibi era wayire obuŋinda buwo weyongera, sobutangaho mwoyo gugwo.
62.11: Hatonda aloma lwatu era emirundi mingi kiŋuliiye ti Hatonda njʼomwene obuŋangi.
62.12: Era ti Musengwa ohwenda huhwo sihuhoma. Mu butuufu oja huŋa hiisi muutu omuhemba ni weema hu bikolwa bibye.

63.1: O Hatonda, ndiiwe Hatonda wange, kwendula nʼomwoyo gwange. Nesunga bugali ohuba ni neewe ngʼolu muutu aŋemba hu maaji nʼali mu hyalo ehiŋumamo maaji.
63.2: Kuweene mu hifo ehyawufu era mbwene ngʼolu oli nʼamaani nʼeŋono.
63.3: Ohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu husingira obulamu era nja huhujumirya.
63.4: Ni kiiri mu bulamu buno nja huhwebasanga era nja hugololanga emihono jange ni saba.
63.5: Wunjigusa ohuhiraho emere endaŋi eyijuuye ebirungo, nja hwemba ni kujumirya nʼesangaalo.
63.6: Ni ndi hu hitanda hyange kuhebulira, era kuŋeegaho owiire wosiwosi.
63.7: Olwohuba oli muyeedi wange nembera ŋaasi wʼehisisigo hyʼamabaŋa gago.
63.8: Nediiye hu ndiiwe era omuhono gugo omulungi gunjeeda.
63.9: Abo abenda ohunjita balibasihiirisa, baja hutiina emagombe.
63.11: Aye habaha aja husangaala olwohuba Hatonda amuŋa obuŋangusi. Abo bosibosi abeyama mu siina lya Hatonda baja humujumirya aye abo abadulingi baliŋuma hya huloma.

64.1: O Hatonda, ŋulira ohusaba hwange ni kulomera ebinduma. Kuume abalabe batanjosaho hibi.
64.2: Taase etegeha jʼabaatu abahosi bʼebibi, ogubbubbu gwʼababbengi.
64.3: Ebibono byawe byogi hyʼepiima era ebibono byawe biri oti busaale.
64.4: Aŋaŋuma hutya balumba abaatu abaŋumaho musango babataho ebibono ni baŋuma hutya.
64.5: Begobosamo amaani ohuhola ebibi bateesa aŋa banaate emitego jaawe ni baloma baati, “Ŋaŋuma oŋanga ohujibona.”
64.6: Bahola etegeha embi ni baloma baati, “Engeri eyi hutegehiremo ebyefe, ŋaŋuma ayimanyire.” Mu butuufu ŋaŋuma amanyire ebi baatu baŋeega mu myoyo jaawe.
64.7: Aye Hatonda aja hubalasa nʼobusaale abate ŋaasi mu dakiika ndala.
64.8: Ebibono byawe ebyene biribaleetera ohusihiiriha era hiisi alibabona aja hubatala.
64.9: Abaatu bosibosi balitya era baliŋeega hu ebi Hatonda aholire era baaloma hu hikolwa ehyo.
64.10: Leha abagwalaafu basangaale olwa Musengwa era beŋogome mu ye leha abo bosibosi abalaŋi mu myoyo jaawe bamujumirye.

65.1: O Hatonda, hiraŋi ohuhujumirya mu Sayuuni era huja hwoheresa oweyamo weefe.
65.2: Ewe oŋulira esaala abaatu baja huuja eyi oli.
65.3: Wayire ohubbenga hwefe hutusitoŋerera aye otusoniŋa.
65.4: Besiimire abo abotobola wabaleeta huupi ohuba mu hifo hihyo ehyawufu. Husuna ebiraŋi ebyomu nyumba yiyo ebituhuumire mu Yekaalu yiyo enjawufu.
65.5: Otuŋa obuŋangusi era ohola ebyeŋunjisa ohutunoŋola. O Hatonda, abaatu bosibosi hu hyalo ni naabo abali engereha wʼenyanja ejaŋaleeŋi, banahwesigenga.
65.6: Wahola esozi olwʼobuŋangi wuwo era oli nʼamaani.
65.7: Obunjeesa amayengo hu nyanja obunjeesa nʼebimoto byʼamaaji abaatu balehera aŋo ohuteetema.
65.8: Abo abamenya aŋaleeŋi eyo beŋunja ebyamaliholiho ebi ohola era bosibosi ohuŋwa ebuŋwalyuba ohwola ebugwalyuba bejula esangaalo olwʼebiitu ebi ohola.
65.9: Olabirira ehyalo Watonyesa efula ebimera ebya hiisi ngeri byahula enjabi jejula amaaji.
65.10: Ojuhirira amalime gagonda nʼefula eyʼamaani ohuyeeda ebimera ebihiiri ebiŋere ohuhula.
65.11: Oli mulaŋi eyi huli otuŋaaye amakungula mangi bugali.
65.12: Enyaasi eryʼebyayo ohwaya lingi era esozi jijuuye ebisangaasa.
65.13: Esugu lijuuye embusi nʼetaama engaano ereremaaye mu hiiho era hiisi hiitu hyembera ŋamugulu olwʼesangaalo.

66.1: Abaatu hu hyalo hyosihyosi mwembere Hatonda nʼesangaalo.
66.2: Yemba hu ŋono lyʼesiina lirye, mujumirye nʼomuŋa eŋono.
66.3: Loma Hatonda oti, “Ebiitu ebi ohola byeŋunjisa era ebi ohola bireetera abalabe babo ohuhubbira amafuha olwʼohuhutya.
66.4: Abaatu hu hyalo hyosihyosi bahujumirya, bemba hu ŋono liryo ni bahutendereza.”
66.5: Nja webonere ebi Hatonda aholire, ebikolwa ebyeŋunjisa ebi aholera abaatu.
66.6: Gafuula enyanja yaaba hyʼowoomu ngʼabasehulu beefe babitaamo nʼamagulu. Kale olwa niye muuje husangaale.
66.7: Aŋuga emirembe nʼemirembe olwʼamaani gage emoni jije jibona amawanga olwʼehyo ŋaŋume amwepahiraho.
66.8: Abaatu mwesimwesi mwebase Hatonda weefe era amajanjaasi geefe gaŋulirihane.
66.9: Atuhuumire ni huli balamu era sigatuleha hwefumuliraŋo.
66.10: O Hatonda, watugezesa ngʼolu feeza bayita hu muliro ohuyihenunulamo obucaafu.
66.11: Watuleha hwagwa mu mutego watutwiha emigugu.
66.12: Waleha abalabe beefe batwema hu mitwe. Hwabita mu muliro nomu maaji aye watwambusa watwosa mu hyalo ehyejuuye ebiraŋi.
66.13: Nja huuja mu nyumba yiyo nʼeŋongo eri bohya ehwiye lyaguguliha ohwoheresa ebi neeyama,
66.14: nja huleeta ehi neeyama ni ndi mu bigosi.
66.15: Nja huŋonga ebyayo ebisava emiigu yʼetaama nʼebunwa yʼeŋombe ko nʼembusi, eriisi litiine ŋamugulu.
66.16: Mwesimwesi abaŋa Hatonda eŋono muuje muŋulire leha mbalomere ehi gakoleeye.
66.18: Mbanga ni naali ni ndehire ehibi mu bulamu wange ni nasifayo singa Musengwa sigapuliirisa.
66.19: Aye Hatonda gaapulira era gagobolamo ohusaba hwange.
66.20: Hatonda gebasiwe olwohutagaana huŋulira esaala jange oba ohugaana ohundaga ohwenda huhwe ohubitiirifu.

67.1: O Hatonda, tuŋambire ehisa otuŋe ekabi otuhejeho nʼesangaalo.
67.2: Abaatu hu hyalo bamanye amagira gago obunoŋosi wuwo mu mawanga gosigosi.
67.3: O Hatonda, abaatu bahujumiryenga abaatu bosibosi bahujumiryenga.
67.4: Abaatu basangaale era bembe olwʼesangaalo olwohuba oŋuga abaatu nʼotehubbira era otangirira amawanga hu hyalo.
67.5: O Hatonda, abaatu bahujumiryenga abaatu bosibosi bahujumiryenga.
67.6: Eroba lija hutuleetera amakungula mangi era Hatonda, Hatonda weefe aja hutuŋa ekabi.
67.7: Hatonda aja hutuŋa ekabi era abaatu bosibosi hu hyalo bamuŋenga eŋono.

68.1: Leha Hatonda genyohe, abalabe babe basalaanihe leha abamucaawa bafulumuhe embiro.
68.2: Hyʼolu mbeŋo ehubba eriisi, babbinge baŋweŋo hyʼolu musubbaawa gusaanuha mu muliro nʼabahosi bʼebibi basihiirihire mu moni ja Hatonda.
68.3: Aye abagwalaafu basaŋalye era basangaalire mu moni ja Hatonda leha basangaale era basaŋalye.
68.4: Mwembere Hatonda, mumwembere ni mumujumirya. Mulongose engira yʼoyo agendera hu bireri, esiina lirye nje Musengwa era musangaalire mu moni jije.
68.5: Nje Bbaabba wʼabafuubbi agayira abanamwandu. Nje Hatonda aba mu hifo hihye ehyawufu.
68.6: Hatonda aŋamba abali mu hiŋubaalo gabaŋa amago. Gejeerese abasibe emisango aye aŋamba abajeemu gabata mu hyalo ehiduleere.
68.7: O Hatonda, ni wanunula abaatu babo ohuŋwa e Misiri wabatangirira basobola ohubita mu lulafu,
68.8: ehyalo hyateetema efula yajofumuha mu moni ja Hatonda owʼe Sinaayi mu moni ja Hatonda, Hatonda wa Yisirayiri.
68.9: O Hatonda, Watonyesa efula eyʼamaani yahubba eroba lyagobolaŋo bunyaaha.
68.10: Ngʼabaatu babo bamenyamo era wayeeda abagadi olwohuba oli mulaŋi.
68.11: Musengwa gaaŋa ehiragiro nga bangi babuulira amaŋuliro amalaŋi.
68.12: “Abahabaha nʼamaŋe gaawe baduluma baleha ebi banyaga. Ngʼabahasi abasigala mu kambi babyegabanira.
68.13: Ni naabo abasigala mu mago ohuhuuma ebyayo besunira enjiiwa ni jiri nʼamabaŋa agʼefeeza nʼamooya agʼezaabbu agameregenya.”
68.14: Omwene Buŋangi ni gasasaania abahabaha nʼamaŋe gaawe hyali hyʼamabaale gʼefula hu lusozi Zalumooni.
68.15: Ngʼesozi jʼe Bbasani mbala era jiriho emitwe mingi bugali!
68.16: Lwahiina enywe esozi jʼe Bbasani muheja hu lusozi Sayuuni nʼesaalwa, olusozi olu Hatonda gatobola ohuba amago gage? Musengwa aja humenya ohwo emirembe nʼemirembe.
68.17: Musengwa atiina mu hifo hihye ehyawufu nʼaŋwa e Sinaayi nʼali nʼamagaali ekumi nʼekumi.
68.18: Musengwa ni watiina mu hifo ehya ŋamugulu obugali waŋira abasibe bangi era wasuna ebirabo ohuŋwa nomu bajeemu era omenyenga mu hifo ehyawufu.
68.19: Oŋeewe eŋono Musengwa Hatonda omunoŋosi weefe atulaga ehyere habuhyabuhya.
68.20: Hatonda weefe nje Hatonda anoŋola. Musengwa atununula mu hufa.
68.21: Mu butuufu Hatonda aja hutetenula emitwe jʼabalabe babe abo abeyongera ohuhola ebibi.
68.22: Musengwa galoma ati, “Nja huleeta abalabe babo ohuŋwa e Bbasani nja hubaleeta ohuŋwa mu nyanja ŋaasi,
68.23: muja husaaba amagulu nʼamafugi gaawe nʼembwa jeefe jija huba nʼomugabo gwajo.”
68.24: Huweene ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ni bahumba ni batiina mu hifo ehyawufu ohujumirya Hatonda wange era habaha.
68.25: Abembi batangiriiye nʼabebivuga ni balondaho ŋalala nʼabahaana ni bacakasa etambulini.
68.26: Gebasiwe Hatonda mu luhumbaano gebasiwe Musengwa mu luhumbaano lwʼAbayisirayiri.
68.27: Ehiha ehitotono ehya Bbenjamini njʼehibatangirira, nga hulondaho abatangirisi ohuŋwa mu hiha hya Yuda, nga hulondaho abatangirisi ohuŋwa mu hiha hya Zebbulooni ni Nafutaali.
68.28: O Hatonda weefe, laga obuŋangi wuwo O Hatonda, nindi tulage ngʼolu watulagaho ahale.
68.29: Abahabaha baja huhuleetera ebirabo olwa Yekaalu yiyo mu Yerusaalemu.
68.30: Hangavula esolo eyimenya mu hiiho, egwanga eriri nʼabatangirisi ko nʼabaatu abali hyʼeŋombe ebunwa bahuŋe efeeza. Salaania abo abanyumirwa ohuhola etalo.
68.31: Leha Abamisiri bahuleetere ebirabo ebyʼebihomo era leha abaatu bʼEsopiya bagolole emihono eyiri Hatonda.
68.32: Amawanga gosigosi hu hyalo mwembere Hatonda, mwembere Musengwa.
68.33: Mwembere oyo agendera mu bbanga, muŋulire ejanjaasi eribbwabbwanuha nʼamaani.
68.34: Mulangirire ebiŋamba hu buŋangi wa Hatonda, abaatu bamuŋa eŋono mu Yisirayiri era njʼaŋuga ebireri mu bbanga.
68.35: Nga Hatonda otiisa nʼoli mu hifo hihyo ehyawufu! Hatonda wa Yisirayiri aŋa abaatu babe amaani. Hatonda gebasiwe.

69.1: O Hatonda, noŋole amaaji ganjolire mu mamiro!
69.2: Neyiniha mu luteete, ŋaŋuma eroba egumu aŋa panga ohwemeerera era amataba genda huumira.
69.3: Ndembire ohulira ni nenda obuyeedi noomire ŋa mamiro era nʼemoni jange sijihibona bulaŋi olwʼohulira ni nendula Hatonda wange.
69.4: Abo abacaawa aŋaŋuma songa yosiyosi bangi bugali bahiraaho nʼobungi wʼefiiri hu mutwe gwange. Ndi nʼabalabe bangi aŋaŋuma songa abo abenda ohunjita era baapagia ohuliŋa ebi teeba.
69.5: O Hatonda, omanyire ebibi byange ŋaŋuma hibi hyange ehi otamanyire.
69.6: O Musengwa Omwene Maŋe, otaleha abo abahwesiga ohuswala olwʼese, otaleha abo abahwendula ohuswala olwʼese O Hatonda wa Yisirayiri.
69.7: Nehalirihire ebiduho hu lulwo era nejuuye soni njereere.
69.8: Ndi hyʼomulugendwa eyiri abaganda bange era ndi hyʼomugwira eyiri abaana ba maama.
69.9: Hiri hiityo olwohuba ohwenda ohunendamo enyumba yiyo hulinjitisa era ebi baatu baloma ni bahuduha bigobola hu ndiise.
69.10: Ni ndira era nasiiba ndi nʼohugumira ebiduho.
69.11: Banjeherera ni nambala ehigwali ohulaga ti enaku yipambire.
69.12: Abo abeehala hu mulyango banjerega era nafuuha lwembo lwʼabameesi.
69.13: Aye Musengwa , kusunga wungobolemo mu hiseera hihyo ehiragaane era Hatonda mu hwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu ngobolemo wununule ngʼolu wasuubisa.
69.14: Ponie, otandeha hweyiniha mu luteete nunule mu balabe bange njinunule mu maaji amangi.
69.15: Otaleha mataba huupira oba ohugwa mu njuho oba eroŋo ereeŋi ohuumira.
69.16: O Musengwa , gobolamo ohusaba hwange olwʼobulaŋi wʼohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu nʼehisa ehyʼamaani, njeede.
69.17: Otehweha mwidu wuwo ndi mu bugosi owʼamaani kusunga bungobolemo mangumangu.
69.18: Sembera era wununule, noŋole ohuŋwa mu balabe bange.
69.19: Omanyire ngʼolu balabe bange banjooga, banduula era baaswasa, omanyire abalabe bange bosibosi.
69.20: Banduhire era bakeniremo amaani ndi aŋo tyotyo. Naheja owohupambira ehisa aye ŋaaŋuma. Naheja owohungobosamo amaani aye ŋaŋuma wayire mulala.
69.21: Enjala ni yaali ni yinduma, baapa emere eyi batayemo enduse era enduŋo ni yaali ni yinduma, baapa omwenge gwʼemizabbibbu ogusalire.
69.22: Kale leha ebiiŋulo byawe bibafuuhire mutego, bibafuuhire hagumba wegoge, leha emiyaaya jaawe jibafuuhire lutuula.
69.23: Leha emoni jaawe jiijeho olubooha batabona nʼohubona nʼemigongo jaawe jigodame emirembe nʼemirembe.
69.24: Bajuheho ehiruŋi hihyo era balage obusungu wuwo.
69.25: Leha ehibbwe hyembere mu gunda lirye, ŋaŋume amenyamo.
69.26: Hiri hiityo olwohuba bahiyaania abo aba wahena hale ohuboneresa era baloma hu abo abali mu bulumi.
69.28: Basangule mu hitabo ehyʼobulamu era otababalira ŋalala nʼabagwalaafu.
69.29: Ndi mu bulumi nʼohubonaabona O Hatonda, nunule.
69.30: Najumiryenga Hatonda nʼolwembo ni muŋa eŋono era ni mweyaasa.
69.31: Ehyo hija husangaasanga Musengwa ohuhiraho ohumuŋa esaame, ohuhiraho ebunwa eyʼameega.
69.32: Abagadi baja hubona basangaale enywe abendula Hatonda mugobolemo amaani.
69.33: Musengwa aŋulira esaala jʼabali mu wetaavu era sigebirira baatu babe abali mu komera.
69.34: Ebiitu ebiri mwigulu nohu hyalo, bimujumirye enyanja ko nʼebiramu byosibyosi ebirimo bimujumirye.
69.35: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Hatonda alinoŋola Sayuuni era atongole bunyaaha ebibuga bya Yuda. Abaatu babe baja humenyamo.
69.36: Abejuhulu babaŋeeresa babe balihisikira ni naabo abamwenda balimenyamo.

70.1: O Hatonda, yinyoheramo wununule O Musengwa , yanguŋaho wunjeede.
70.2: Leha abenda ohunjita baswale leha abo abasangaalira ohufafaagana hwange bagameyo ni bawomboŋaaye.
70.3: Leha abo abandoma baati, “A a! Hwahulomera!” Bagameyo ni baswaye.
70.4: Aye leha abo bosibosi abahwendula basangaale era basaŋalye olwʼewe era leha abo abenda obunoŋosi wuwo balomerenga ŋamugulu baati, “Nga Hatonda wʼamaani!”
70.5: Aye ndi mugadi era ndi mu wetaavu, O Hatonda, nja mangumangu. Ndiiwe Musengwa obunjeeda era obununula, otalwa hunjeeda.

71.1: O Musengwa , ndiiwe omuneŋogoma otandeha huswala.
71.2: Ohola ebiruŋamu nunule, tegere ohutwi yanguŋaho wununule ba pungulu yange omunehweha, ofuuhe ebaale eringadirira.
71.3: Ba lwanda lwange omuneŋogoma ehifo omundulumira ohusuna obuhuumi. Lagira ohunoŋola. Ndiiwe olwanda lwange era ehifo hyange omunehweha.
71.4: O Hatonda wange, nunule ohuŋwa mu bahosi bʼebibi era wuponie amaani gʼehibi abaatu abehubbira era abahambwe.
71.5: O Musengwa Omwene Buŋangi, esuubi lyange liri mu ndiiwe era kwesigire ohuŋwa buvubuka wange.
71.6: Obaaye ni nange ehiseera hyosihyosi ehyʼobulamu wange wukumire ohuŋwa olu naŋwa mu hida hya maama era nja huhujumiryanga hiisi hiseera.
71.7: Obulamu wange hyahuboneraho eyiri abaatu bangi olwohuba ndiiwe ehifo ehyʼamaani omuneŋogoma.
71.8: Cʼehifa kutendereza oludaalo lwosirwosi ni ndangirira ebiŋamba hu eŋono liryo.
71.9: Olwʼehyo otanetusaho olwohuba ŋahani ndi musahulu, otandehulira olwʼohubona ti ŋahani gapooye.
71.10: Abalabe bange bateesa ohunjita behobana ohukenaŋo.
71.11: Era baloma baati, “Hatonda gamuhubba omugongo hutiine humuŋambe olwohuba ŋaŋuma owʼohumununula.”
71.12: O Hatonda, otamba ŋaleeŋi. O Hatonda wange, nja mangu wunjeede.
71.13: Leha abo abapaŋabira baswale era obasihiirise leha abo abenda ohukosa baswale.
71.14: Aye ese habuhyabuhya esuubi lyange linabenga mu ndiiwe nja hweyongera ohuhujumiryanga.
71.15: Nasiibenga ni ndomera abaatu hu biŋamba hu biruŋamu ebi ohola ebiŋamba hu bunoŋosi wuwo, wayire nga simanyire bungi wabyo.
71.16: O Musengwa Omwene Buŋangi nahujumiryenga olwʼebyamaani ebi ohola era nja hulangirira obuluŋamu wuwo, owuwo woŋene.
71.17: O Hatonda, ohuŋwa mu buvubuka wange wusomehiise era nʼohwola hatyane ndomera abaatu hu biŋamba hu byeŋunjisa ebi ohola.
71.18: O Hatonda, kusunga atandehulira mu busahulu buno otakubba mugongo ohwola olu ndiromera abʼomulembe oguuja ebiŋamba hu maani gago hu maani gago eyiri abo aba baja husaala.
71.19: O Hatonda, obuluŋamu wuwo woola nohwigulu oholire ebyeŋunjisa bingi O Hatonda, njʼani ali hyʼewe?
71.20: Wayire wundehire nabonaabona nʼebigosi bingi era ebyʼamaani oja hungobosa bunyaaha oja hundamusa ohuŋwa e magombe.
71.21: Oja hufuula ohuba owʼeŋono eryʼamaani era wambudabuda nindi.
71.22: O Hatonda wange, nja huhujumirya ni kubba ogutongooli olwohuba oli mwesigwa nja huhujumirya ni kubba ahatongooli olwohuba ndiiwe Omwawufu wa Yisirayiri.
71.23: Nja hwembera ŋamugulu olwʼesangaalo ni kwembera etendo ese oyu wanunula.
71.24: Oludaalo lwosirwosi nja huloma hu biŋamba hu biruŋamu ebi ohola olwohuba abo abenda ohuukosa obaswahise era obatabujuuye.

72.1: O Hatonda, yeeda habaha omusaani wa habaha abenga wʼamazima hyʼewe nʼalamula.
72.2: Ehyo hija humuyeeda ohuŋuganga abaatu babo bulaŋi era abagadi ababisye bulaŋi nʼatehubbira.
72.3: Leha esozi jireete emiyaaya nʼeŋingi jireete ebibala byobugwalaafu.
72.4: Habaha aja hulabiriranga abagadi, ayeede abo abatesobola era asihiirise abalabe baawe.
72.5: Habaha aŋuge emirembe josijosi hyʼeryuba nʼomwesi ngʼolu biriŋo lubeerera.
72.6: Leha obuŋugi wa habaha wube hyʼefula, eŋosa eroba yayeeda ebibala mu ndimiro byahula.
72.7: Mu mulembe gugwe ohuhola ebiruŋamu huhwane, ohwola omwesi olu gulihoma ohwaduha.
72.8: Aja huŋuga ohuŋwa hu nyanja ohwola hu nyanja, ohuŋwa hu lwabi Yufuleeti ohwola ehyalo aŋa hihoma.
72.9: Abaatu bomu lulafu balimuhubbira amafuha, era abalabe babe baligafubira mu fuuhe.
72.10: Abahabaha bʼe Talusiisi nʼabomu bizinga balimuleetera ebirabo. Era abahabaha bʼe Seebba ni Seeba balimuleetera ebirabo.
72.11: Abahabaha bosibosi balimuhubbira amafuha nʼamawanga gosigosi galifuuha baŋeeresa babe.
72.12: Hiri hiityo olwohuba aja hununula abatesobola abamweriririra abo abagadi abaŋumiririraho wʼohubayeeda.
72.13: Aja huŋambira abanafu nʼabatesobola ehisa abatesobola abataase ohufa.
72.14: Aja hubanunula ohuŋwa mu hubanyigirisa nʼohubabisya obubi olwohuba obulamu waawe wʼebbeeyi eyi ali.
72.15: Wangaala habaha! Abaatu bahuŋenga ezaabbu ohuŋwa e Seebba. Leha abaatu basabirenga habaha era leha bamwebasenga hiisi ludaalo.
72.16: Ebibala biijule hiisi ŋaatu nohu sozi hwosi. Leha ebibala bireremale hyʼebyomu Lebbanooni. Era abaatu beejule ebibuga babe hyʼenyaasi.
72.17: Habaha abeŋo emirembe nʼemirembe gaaliŋo konyo eryuba libeŋo. Abaatu bosibosi balisuna ekabi ohubita mu habaha oyo. Era baja humulanganga wʼekabi.
72.18: Musengwa Hatonda, Hatonda wa Yisirayiri aŋeewe eŋono, yeŋene njʼahola ebyeŋunjisa.
72.19: Gebasiwe emirembe nʼemirembe ehyalo hyosihyosi hiijule eŋono lirye. Amiina era Amiina.
72.20: Yino njʼengohoba yʼohusaba hwa Dawudi omusaani wa Yese.

73.1: Mu butuufu Hatonda mulaŋi eyiri Yisirayiri, eyiri abo abagwalaafu mu myoyo.
73.2: Aye naali huupi huterera, naali mbuliraho hatono ohugwa
73.3: olwohuba esaalwa yapamba ni mbona abaatu abepaahapaaha, ni nabona ebiitu ni bitiinira bulaŋi abahosi bʼebibi.
73.4: Baŋuma bigosi emibiri jaawe jibulaamo bulwaye era bali nʼamaani gaawe.
73.5: Sibabonaabona hyʼabaatu abandi obulwaye sibubajoogajooga ngʼolu bujooga abandi.
73.6: Ohwepaahapaaha njʼebihomo ebi bambala mu mamiro era emivuyo njʼehyambalo hyawe.
73.7: Emyoyo jaawe jijuuye bibi byereere, ebiŋeego byawe bibererera hutegeha embi.
73.8: Bajeherera era balimirira abandi, bepaahapaaha era bategeha hunyigirisa abahyawe.
73.9: Baloma wubi hu Hatonda mwigulu banyooma nʼabaatu babe hu hyalo.
73.10: Cʼehigira nʼabaatu bacuuha baaba hya nibo, bafugiirira ebi baloma.
73.11: Baloma baati, “Hatonda saaja humanya. Oyo Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali sasobola humanya.”
73.12: Abahosi bʼebibi baatyo polu baba obulamu wubabereeye bulaŋi era bebbiryaho obuŋinda.
73.13: Mu butuufu sihyamahulu ohuhuuma omwoyo gwange ni guli mugwalaafu, hyawereere ohwehuuma ni tabbenga.
73.14: Mbonaabona oludaalo lwosirwosi hiisi mugamba bamboneresa.
73.15: Singa naloma ti, “Nja hwebisya hya nibo,” sinahabaaye wʼamazima eyiri abaatu babo.
73.17: Ohwola olu natiina mu hifo hya Hatonda ehigwalaafu nga ko tegeera ekomerero yaawe.
73.18: Hituufu obata aŋali obuterere bagwe basihiirihe.
73.20: O Musengwa nʼolinyoha, baja husihiiriha, babanyoome hyʼehirooto ehiŋumamo ehi muutu gebirira ni buhyeye.
73.22: Mu moni jijo naali muŋubeebe hyʼesolo ni tahutegeera.
73.23: Aye hiisi ludaalo ndi ŋalala ni neewe era oŋambiriiye omuhono gwange omulungi.
73.24: Wutangirira ni wundabbira oluvanyuma oja hu nyanirisa ohwingira mu ŋono.
73.25: Puma wundi yesiyesi mwigulu ohutusaho ewe, era hu hyalo puma ehinenda ehindi ohutusaho ewe.
73.26: Ebiŋeego nʼomubiri gwange binafu aye Hatonda wange njʼamaani gange njʼeyi netaaga emirembe nʼemirembe.
73.28: Aye hiraŋi ese ohuba ŋaapi ni Hatonda, Musengwa Omwene Buŋangi njʼomuneŋogoma, nja huloma hu bikolwa bibyo byosibyosi.

74.1: O Hatonda, lwahiina watuhubba omugongo? Oja hutwesamba emirembe nʼemirembe? Lwahiina oluŋira etaama jijo?
74.2: Hebulira abaatu babo abawefunira ohuŋwa ahale, egwanga eriwetobolera aba wanunula, hebulira olusozi Sayuuni ohu wamenyanga.
74.3: Lambuula amagunda egʼehibuga, abalabe basihiirisa ehifo hihyo ehyawufu.
74.4: Abalabe babo balangirira obuŋangusi mu Yekaalu yiyo nga basimihamo nʼebbendera jaawe ohulaga obuŋangusi waawe.
74.5: Bafaanana hyʼabaatu abatema ebisaala nʼembasa mwideŋo.
74.6: Babbwaga ebibaaje byosibyosi ni babyadisa nʼembasa ko nʼenyundo.
74.7: Boohya ehifo hihyo ehyawufu era baholera mu Yekaalu yiyo ebyʼembiho.
74.8: Baloma mu myoyo jaawe baati, “Huja hubaheneraŋo erala.” Basihiirisa nʼomuliro hiisi hifo aŋa bajumirihisyanga Hatonda.
74.9: Ŋaŋuma bubonero oweŋunjisa nʼabanaabbi abasigaayeŋo era ŋaŋuma hu efe amanyire embeera yino aŋa yija hwagamira.
74.10: O Hatonda, abalabe balyosa ŋe ohuhufodogola? Omulabe aja huhutala emirembe nʼemirembe?
74.11: Lwahiina ogaana ohubaaho nʼehyohola? Lwahiina weyongera ohuhweha omuhono gugwo omulungi? Tusayo omuhono gugwo obasihiirise.
74.12: Aye ohuŋwa ahale nahale ewe Hatonda ndiiwe habaha wange oleeta obunoŋosi hu hyalo.
74.13: Ndiiwe owaabulamo enyanja habiri olwʼamaani gago, wasusungula emitwe jʼagasolo agomu maaji.
74.14: Ndiiwe owateetena emitwe jʼebinyaŋa era wabiŋaayo ngʼemere eyiri ebitonde byomu lulafu.
74.15: Ndiiwe owegula esulo nʼenjabi era woomya enjabi embala.
74.16: Wataŋo omuusi nʼowiire, ndiiwe owatonda eryuba nʼomwesi.
74.17: Ndiiwe owataŋo esalo josijosi ejʼehyalo era wataŋo ebiseera ebyʼehyeya nʼebyobuŋololohi obungi.
74.18: Aye Musengwa hebulira ngʼolu balabe bahuduuye, ngʼolu baŋubeebe bahunyoomire.
74.19: Otaleha baatu babo abali hyʼeŋuusi wabalehera abalabe baawe abahambwe. Abaatu babo ababanyigirisa otabebirira emirembe nʼemirembe.
74.20: Hebulira endagaano eyi wahola ni neefe olwohuba emivuyo jejuuye hiisi ŋaatu mu hyalo hino.
74.21: Otaleha abo aba banyigirisa ohuswala leha abagadi nʼabali mu wetaavu bahujumiryenga.
74.22: O Hatonda, yinyoha osolerere ebibyo hebulira ngʼolu baŋubeebe bahufodogola oludaalo lwosirwosi.
74.23: Otebirira hubogola hwʼabalabe babo nʼohwegugunga hwawe ohutahoma.

75.1: O Hatonda, huhweyaasa, huhweyaasa olwohuba oli huupi, hiisi ŋaatu baloma hu bikolwa bibyo ebyeŋunjisa.
75.2: Oloma oti, “Ehiseera hyange ehiragaane, ndisala omusango ni tehubbira.
75.3: Ehyalo nʼabaatu ni bateetema, ndiise aŋambirira emisingi jaahyo.
75.4: Ndoma abepaahapaaha ti, ‘Mulehere aŋo ohwepaahapaaha.’ Era ndoma abahosi bʼebibi ti, ‘Mulehera aŋo ohwehudumbasa olwʼamaani genywe.
75.5: Mbaloma ohulehera aŋo ohwepaahapaaha era mulehera aŋo ohuloma nʼehitigi.’ ”
75.6: Eŋuma mulamuzi ohuŋwa ebuŋwalyuba oba ebugwalyuba oba mu lulafu aja huuja ni gepaahapaaha.
75.7: Aye Hatonda njʼomulamuzi, geesa ono, genyosa ola.
75.8: Musengwa aŋambire mu ngalo jije ehihopo hyʼomwenge ogusalire ogwʼobusungu wuwe. Agujuha ngʼabahosi bʼebibi bosibosi bagunywa bahenaŋo baati cwi.
75.9: Aye ese nja hulomanga hu ebi Hatonda aholire, nja hwembera Hatonda wa Yakobbo ni mujumirya.
75.10: Hatonda aloma ati, “Nja husihiirisa amaani gʼabahosi bʼebibi bosibosi, aye aga bagwalaafu galyeyongera hweyongera.”

76.1: Hatonda amanyiheene mu hyalo hya Yuda, esiina lirye lyʼamaani mu Yisirayiri.
76.2: Eweema yiye yiri mu Yerusaalemu amago gage gali hu lusozi Sayuuni.
76.3: Eyo peyi gabbwagabbwagira obusaale wʼomulabe nʼengabo nʼepiima ebisoosa byomu lutalo.
76.4: Hatonda, ngʼoli wʼeŋono, ohumba hya habaha ohuŋwa hu sozi eyi waŋangulira abalabe.
76.5: Babanyagireho abasooli baawe abasira bosibosi, eŋuma aŋanga ohutwinyoheraho.
76.6: O Hatonda wa Yakobbo, ni wahayuha embalaasi nʼamagaali, byaŋwera mwiroba.
76.7: Aye ewe weŋene njʼoyu bali nʼohutya! Njʼani asobola ohwemeerera mu moni jijo nʼoluŋire?
76.8: Nʼoli mwigulu wasala emisango abaatu hu hyalo baatya era baŋolerehana,
76.9: O Hatonda, ni waŋwayo wabasalira emisango ohunoŋola ababanyigirisa bosibosi hu hyalo.
76.10: Mu butuufu oweene obusungu wʼabaatu buŋwamo ohuhuŋa eŋono era abo abaja huŋona mu talo, balihutendereza.
76.11: Mweyamanga eyiri Musengwa Hatonda wenywe era mwoheresenga. Amawanga agohumulirano, galeetera oyo oyu batya ebirabo.
76.12: Gehahania ehitigi hyʼabaŋugi era abahabaha hu hyalo bamutya.

77.1: Neriririra Hatonda ganjeede, neriririra Hatonda aŋulire ohusunga hwange.
77.2: Ni naali mu bigosi nasaba Musengwa, owiire nagolola emihono jange ni talehera era omwoyo gwange ni gutamatira.
77.3: O Hatonda, nahuhebulira era nabinda nʼamaani gapwamo.
77.4: Olwʼewe Hatonda sinalimba hwiro naali nʼebigosi nʼohuloma ni tasobola huloma.
77.5: Naŋeega hu endaalo ejʼegongo, emyaha ejahale.
77.6: Nahebulira enyembo jange eji nembanga owiire. Mu mwoyo gwange nebuusa ti,
77.7: “Musengwa aja hukubba omugongo emirembe nʼemirembe? Saligaluhayo hupambira hisa nindi?
77.9: Hatonda galeeheraŋo ohuba wʼehisa? Obusungu wugimire alehire ohuba wʼehisa?”
77.10: Ngʼaŋo ndoma ti, “Ehindumya obugali cʼehino ti: Hatonda Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali, sahiiri wʼamaani.”
77.11: Nja huhebulira ebikolwa bya Musengwa , nja huhebulira ebyamaliholiho bibyo ebi waholanga ahalehale.
77.12: Nja huŋeeganga hu bikolwa bibyo byosibyosi, nja huŋeeganga hu bikolwa bibyo ebyʼamaani.
77.13: O Hatonda, amagira gago mawufu hatonda hi owʼamaani hya Hatonda weefe?
77.14: Ndiiwe Hatonda ahola ebyamaliholiho olaga amaani gago mu baatu.
77.15: Wanunula abaatu babo nʼamaani mangi abejuhulu ba Yakobbo ni Yosefu.
77.16: O Hatonda, amaaji gahubona, amaaji gahubona gahutya enjuho jʼenyanja jateetema.
77.17: Ebireri byajuha amaaji, eraadu lyaduma mwigulu, obusaale wuwo wabitabitana ŋano ni naŋala!
77.18: Ejanjaasi lyʼohubbwabbwanuha huhwo lyali mu hafuusa, ohumyasa hwahwana ehyalo hyosihyosi, ehyalo hyateetema era hyayuuga.
77.19: Watema engira mu nyanja, engira yiyo mu maaji amangi wayire amagulu gago sigaboneha aŋa wabita.
77.20: Watangirira abaatu babo hyʼetaama, Musa ni Alooni njʼabaali abatangirisi.

78.1: Baatu bange muŋulire esomesa yange. Mutegere amatwi muŋulire ebibono byange.
78.2: Nja huloma ni nabo mu ngero, nja huloma ebyama ebi bahweha ahale nahale.
78.3: Ebiitu ebi hwaŋulira era ebi humanyire, ebiitu ebi basehule beefe batulomera.
78.4: Sihuja hubihweha abaana beefe, huja hulomera abʼomulembe oguuja ebiŋamba hu maani ga Musengwa nohu byʼamaani nʼebyeŋunjisa ebi gaahola.
78.5: Gaŋa abejuhulu ba Yakobbo ebiragiro, gaŋa abasehulu beefe Abayisirayiri amagambi bagasomese abaana baawe,
78.6: abʼomulembe ogulondaho bahagamanya era ni naabo ababahiiri husaala boosi bahagasomesa abaana baawe.
78.7: Bahesiga Hatonda era batebirira ebi ahola aye bahaŋamba ebiragiro byange.
78.8: Bataba hyʼabasehulu baawe, omulembe ogwʼabaatu abahahanyafu era abajeemu abaali nʼemyoyo ejitagonderanga Hatonda era abatamwesiganga.
78.9: Abaatu bomu hiha hyʼEfulayimu wayire baali nʼobusaale, baatya baduluma hu ludaalo lwʼolutalo.
78.10: Babbwaga endagaano ya Hatonda era bajeemera amagambi gage.
78.11: Beebirira ebi gaali nʼaholire ebyeŋunjisa ebi gabalaga.
78.12: Gaahola ebyamaliholiho mu moni jʼabasehulu baawe mu hyalo hyʼe Misiri, mu twale lyʼe Zowani.
78.13: Gaabula enyanja ngʼabaatu babitaamo. Gaahola amaaji gemeerera hyʼehiteepe hu luuyi nohu luuyi.
78.14: Mu muusi gabatangiriranga nʼali mu hireri ngʼowiire abatangirira nʼomuliro.
78.15: Gaadisa amabaale mu lulafu gabaŋa amaaji amangi oti gʼenyanja.
78.16: Gaaleetera esulo jʼamaaji ohuŋwa mwibaale, amaaji nga gahuluhuta hya gʼolwabi.
78.17: Aye ni bali mu lulafu beeyongera ohwonoona bajeemera oyo Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali.
78.18: Basalaŋo ohuhema Hatonda ni baduhanira ebyʼohulya.
78.19: Bemulugunya hu Hatonda baati, “Dala Hatonda asobola ohutuŋa emere mu lulafu luno?
78.20: Ni gahubba hwibaale amaaji ameene amangi gaŋwamo. Aye asobola ohuŋa abaatu babe enyama nʼemere?”
78.21: Musengwa ni gabaŋulira ni baloma baatyo gabaluŋira gaŋwana omuliro hu Yakobbo era ehiruŋi hihye hyali hu Yisirayiri.
78.22: Sibafugiirira bya Hatonda era sibesiga ti aja hubanoŋola.
78.23: Aye galagira ebireri mu bbanga gegulaŋo enjigi ejʼegulu,
78.24: gakukumuhisa abaatu emaanu balye gabaŋa emere ohuŋwa mwigulu.
78.25: Abaatu balya hu emere eyʼabamalayika, bosibosi gabaŋa emere mu bungi.
78.26: Galehula hibuyaga ohuŋwa ebuŋwalyuba gafuuŋa era olwʼamaani gage gagira embeŋo ohuŋwa mu mehiriro yahubba.
78.27: Gabakukumuhisa enyama hyʼefuuhe, enyuni ejiguluha ehibbiiryo hyʼomujehe hwigobo lyʼenyanja.
78.28: Enyuni ejo jagwa ohweswanigirisa ekambi jaawe, ohwetoloola eweema jaawe.
78.29: Abaatu balya byabameera hu myoyo olwohuba gabaŋa ehi baali ni baŋembaho.
78.30: Aye ni baali ni bahiirya era emere ni yaali nʼehiiri mu hanwa,
78.31: Hatonda gabaluŋira nga geeta abaali ni basinga ohuba abʼamaani era gasalaho abavubuka mu Yisirayiri.
78.32: Aye wayire gabahola atyo beeyongera ohwonoona era wayire gabalaga ebyamaliholiho sibafugiirira bibye.
78.33: Olwʼehyo baheneeresa obulamu waawe wubi era emyaha jaawe bajihenera mu bigosi.
78.34: Hiisi olu Hatonda gahabeetire, nga bebbwaga bamwendula bacuuhisa erala emyoyo jaawe.
78.35: Nga bahebulira baati Hatonda gaali njʼolwanda lwawe Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali gaali njʼOmununuzi waawe.
78.36: Aye ebibono byawe byali byʼobudulingi wereere, eŋuma ehi baloma ehyʼamazima.
78.37: Emyoyo jaawe sijaali miheneerefu, sibaali besigwa ohuhuuma endagaano yiye.
78.38: Aye Hatonda gaali wʼehisa eyi bali, gabasoniŋa ebibi byawe era sigabasihiirisa. Emirundi mingi gahuuma obusungu wuwe era sigabajuhaho hiruŋi hihye.
78.39: Gahebulira ati baali baatu buutu baali mbeŋo eyifuuŋa yaŋwaŋo.
78.40: Ne mirundi mingi bamujeemera eyo mu lulafu, bamweŋunamisa eyo mu luhoola.
78.41: Mirundi mingi bahema Hatonda, banyiigisa Omwawufu wa Yisirayiri.
78.42: Sibahebulira baati ali nʼobuŋangi oludaalo olu gabanunula mu balabe.
78.43: Oludaalo olu gahola obubonero oweŋunjisa e Misiri, ebyamaliholiho ebi gahola mu twale lyʼe Zowani.
78.44: Amaaji gomu lwabi gafuuha mafugi era Abamisiri sibaganywa.
78.45: Gabasindihira agasoŋera agabahehera nʼagahere agabaleetera ohwesinya.
78.46: Endimiro jaawe gajiŋa amadeede era ebirime byawe gabiŋa esige.
78.47: Efula eyʼamabaale yonoona emizabbibbu jaawe nʼemisaala emitiini jasihiiriha.
78.48: Efula eyʼamabaale yahubba eŋombe jaawe, ebisolo byawe byafa olwʼohubbwabbwanuha nʼohumyasa hwʼekuba.
78.49: Gabajuhaho ehiruŋi hihye, gabataaho obusungu nʼohunyiiga, ehibbubbu hyʼabamalayika hyabasihiirisa.
78.50: Gabajofumulaho obusungu wuwe, sigabaŋonia hufa aye gabataho haŋupuli baafa.
78.51: Geeta abaana abadaayi bosibosi mu Misiri, ebibala ebidaayi mu weema ja Haamu.
78.52: Ngʼaŋo atangirira abaatu babe hyʼetaama gabaluŋamya mu lulafu.
78.53: Gabatangirira bulaŋi weene ni ŋaŋuma hutya. Aye enyanja yamira abalabe baawe.
78.54: Ngʼaboosa hu salo yʼeroba lirye eryawufu, ehyalo ehyʼesozi olu gaŋangula nʼamaani gage.
78.55: Gabbinga amawanga agaalimo ngʼaŋamba ehyalo ehyo ahiŋa abaatu babe ngʼobusika amago gaawe, gagaŋa Abayisirayiri.
78.56: Aye bahema Hatonda era bajeemera Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali, sibahuuma biragiro bibye.
78.57: Sibaali badimamu era baŋuma hufugiirira hyʼabasehulu baawe, ni becuusa hyʼembasa mu muŋaya.
78.58: Bamuleetera obusungu olwʼamasabo gaawe hu sozi ni bajumirya ebiitu ebibbote.
78.59: Hatonda ni gabona ebiitu ebyo gabaluŋira ngʼahubbira erala Yisirayiri omugongo.
78.60: Gahubba Eweema Enjawufu e Siilo omugongo, eweema eyi gaali ni gemehire ŋagati wʼabaatu babe.
78.61: Galeha Esanduuku yiye enjawufu bayiŋira mu buŋaŋanguse eyaali ni yiraga eŋono lirye ohutiina ohuba mu balabe.
78.62: Galeha abaatu babe babeeta nʼepiima, ganyiigira abaatu babe bugali.
78.63: Omuliro gwasihiirisa abaseere baawe, abahaana baawe bahaya nʼobufumbo.
78.64: Galeha beeta abasengi baawe nʼepiima era abanamwandu baawe babagaana nʼohubalira.
78.65: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa genyoha ohuŋwa mwiro hyʼomeeye omwenge
78.66: ngʼabbinga abalabe babe era baswalira erala olwohuba gabaŋangula.
78.67: Gahubba abejuhulu ba Yosefu omugongo era sigatobola hiha hyʼEfulayimu.
78.68: Aye gatobola ehiha hya Yuda, olusozi Sayuuni olu genda.
78.69: Aŋo paŋa gatongola ehifo hihye ehyawufu ohuba hyʼamago gage mwigulu, hyʼehyalo ehi gataŋo emirembe nʼemirembe.
78.70: Gatobola Dawudi ohuba muŋeeresa wuwe oyu gatusa mu hwaya etaama,
78.71: ohuŋwa mu hwemera etaama, gamufuula mwayi wʼabejuhulu ba Yakobbo, Abayisirayiri, abaatu ba Musengwa.
78.72: Era Dawudi gabaaya bulaŋi nʼowesigwa gabaŋuga nʼamagesi.

79.1: O Hatonda, amawanga galumbire ehyalo hihyo, baholire ebyʼembiho hu Yekaalu yiyo enjawufu, ehibuga Yerusaalemu bahirehire ni hiri magunda.
79.2: Emirambo jʼabaŋeeresa babo bajiŋa esega ohuba mere, emibiri jʼabagwalaafu babo bajiŋa esolo jeriire.
79.3: Amafugi gʼabaatu aba beeta, gabanda hiisi ŋaatu mu Yerusaalemu oti maaji, ni ŋaŋuma wa hubasiiha.
79.4: Abaliranwa beefe batuduula, batujerega era batujeherera.
79.5: Musengwa olihyosa ŋeena? Oja hutuluŋira emirembe nʼemirembe? Ebuba liryo lija hwosa ŋe ohwaduha hyʼomuliro?
79.6: Luŋira amawanga agatahumanyire, abaatu abo abatahujumirya.
79.7: Hiri hiityo olwohuba bahenireeŋo abejuhulu ba Yakobbo, baasihiirisa ehifo hyawe.
79.8: Otatuboneresa olwʼebibi byʼabasehulu beefe. Yanguŋaho otuŋambire ehisa olwohuba hwenda obuyeedi.
79.9: O Hatonda, tuyeede otunoŋole, ehyo hija huhuŋeesa eŋono, tununule era tusoniŋe ebibi byefe olwʼesiina liryo.
79.10: Lwahiina abaatu abamawanga bebuusa baati, “Hatonda waawe ali ŋeena?” Leha huhubone ni wegalula amawanga olwʼohwita abaŋeeresa babo.
79.11: Ŋulira ohubinda hwʼabasibe era olwʼobuŋangi bubo, huuma abo aba basalira ogwʼohufa.
79.12: O Musengwa, yesasule abaliranwa beefe emirundi musanvu olwʼebiduho byawe ebi bahuduha.
79.13: Efe abaatu babo, etaama ejomu hidooli hihyo huja huhweyaasa emirembe nʼemirembe huja huhujumiryanga emirembe josijosi.

80.1: Tuŋuliirise ewe olabirira Yisirayiri hyʼomwayi, ewe otangirira Yosefu ngʼolu muutu atangirira etaama, ewe owihala ŋagati wʼabakerubbi, leha enjase yiyo yaduhire
80.2: ehiha hyʼEfulayimu ni Bbenjamini ni Manase. Tunoŋole olwʼamaani gago.
80.3: O Hatonda, tugobose bunyaaha tuŋambire ehisa hwahanoŋoha.
80.4: O Musengwa Hatonda Omwene Maŋe, olihyosa ŋe ohuluŋa olwʼesaala jʼabaatu babo?
80.5: Otwiŋuuye ohubonaabona era otuŋaaye ohunywa ehihopo hyʼamasiga ameene amangi.
80.6: Otufuuye ehiitu ehyʼohwenyinyalya eyiri abaliranwa beefe era abalabe beefe batujeherera.
80.7: O Hatonda Omwene Maŋe, tugobose bunyaaha, tuŋambire ehisa hwahanoŋoha.
80.8: Watusa omuzabbibbu ohuŋwa e Misiri, wabbinga amawanga ohuŋwa mu byalo ebyo, ngʼohena oguhomaamo.
80.9: Wagulongohesa ehisambu nga gusimiha emirandira gulanda mu hyalo.
80.10: Ehisisigo hyagwo hyawiihirira hu hiisi lusozi ngʼamasaga gaagwo gawiiha emitumba emireeŋi.
80.11: Amasaga gaagwo gatandabala ohwola hu nyanja Meditereniani nohu lwabi Yufuleeti.
80.12: Lwahiina wabbwaga olukomera olugugadirira, hyaleetera bosibosi ababitaŋo ohwenogera ebibala byagwo?
80.13: Embiiji jomwisugu jigutyakirira nʼesolo josijosi ejomwisugu jigulya.
80.14: O Hatonda Omwene Maŋe, cuuha ogobole eyi huli. Heja ŋaasi ohuŋwa mwigulu obone era olabirire omuzabbibbu guno,
80.15: omulandira ogu muhono gugwo omulungi gwahoma, olusaga lulwo olu wamwene wafuula olwʼamaani.
80.16: Baatema omuzabbibbu gugwo bagwohya omuliro abaatu babo basihiiriha onabahangavula nʼobuhambwe.
80.17: Leha omuhono gugwo gube hu muutu ali hu luuyi olwʼomuhono omulungi omwana wʼomuutu oyu wamwene wehuhisa.
80.18: Tugobese bunyaaha huja huhujumiryanga nindi era sihuja huhuŋwaho.
80.19: O Musengwa Hatonda Omwene Maŋe, tugobese bunyaaha tuŋambire ehisa hwahanoŋoha.

81.1: Mwembere Hatonda nʼesangaalo olwohuba njʼamaani geefe, mwembera Hatonda wa Yakobbo mu janjaasi eryaŋamugulu!
81.2: Mutandiihe olwembo ni muhubbireho nʼetambulini muhubbireho ahatongooli ko nʼogutongooli.
81.3: Mufuuŋe olwiga lwʼetaama emiigu omwesi ni gwahabaluha era nʼomwesi ni guhulire hu ludaalo lwefe olwʼembaga.
81.4: Lino gambi eyiri Abayisirayiri, hiragiro hya Hatonda wa Yakobbo.
81.5: Galiŋa ohuba egambi eyiri Yosefu olu gawaagala ehyalo hyʼe Misiri eyi hwaŋulira olulimi oluhutategeera.
81.6: Aloma ati, “Nabatwihula emigugu era nabatusaho ehinaaba ehisito ehi baali ni babbeedire.
81.7: Ni mwali mu bigosi mwananga nga mbanunula, nabagobolamo mu hireri ehibbwabbwanuha. Nabagezesa hu maaji gʼe Meribba.
81.8: Enywe abaatu bange muŋulire, enywe Abayisirayiri nja hubalabula singa mupulirisa.
81.9: Simujumiryanga bahatonda abandi era simuhubbiranga bahatonda abandi amafuha.
81.10: Ndiise Musengwa Hatonda wenywe owabatusa mu hyalo hyʼe Misiri. Mwasamye eminwa jenywe, nja hubegusa.
81.11: Aye abaatu bange sibapulirisa, Abayisirayiri sibagonda.
81.12: Olwʼehyo nabaŋwaho nabaleha bahole ngʼolu hwegomba hwʼemyoyo jaawe hwali, ohuhola ngʼolu abeene benda.
81.13: Singa abaatu bange bapulirisa, O singa Abayisirayiri bagendera mu ngira yange,
81.14: nahabaŋanguliiye abalabe baawe bosibosi mu dakiika ndala, era omuhono gwange gwahabaholireho.
81.15: Abo abacaawa Musengwa bahamuhubbiye amafuha olwʼohutya era ehibonerezo hyawe hyahali hyʼemirembe nʼemirembe.
81.16: Aye mwahaliiye engaano enyene endaŋi nʼomudugere ohuŋwa mwibaale mweguta.”

82.1: Hatonda njʼomuhulu wʼoluhiiho mwigulu aŋa esala eyʼemisango mu bahatonda.
82.2: “Mulyosa ŋe ohusala emisango ni mwehubbira, ni mubeera abahosi bʼebibi?
82.3: Muyeede abagadi nʼabafuubbi era musolerenga abaatu aba banyigiirisa.
82.4: Muyeede abanafu nʼabali mu wetaavu, mubanunule ohuŋwa mu buŋangi wʼabahosi bʼebibi.”
82.5: “Ŋaŋuma ehi bamanyire era ŋaŋuma ehibategeera, bagendera mu hiirema era emisingi josijosi ejʼehyalo jiteetema.
82.6: Naloma ti, ‘Muli bahatonda, mwesimwesi muli baana bʼoyo Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali.’
82.7: Aye muja hufa hyʼabaatu obuutu, muja huheneresa hyʼabaŋugi abandi.”
82.8: O Hatonda, yinyoha osalire ehyalo omusango olwohuba amawanga gosigosi gago.

83.1: O Hatonda, otaŋoleera huŋoleera O Hatonda, otaba aŋo ni ŋaŋuma ehi oloma.
83.2: Bona abalabe babo benyoheene, abo abahucaawa bahujeemera.
83.3: Bahola ekwe hu baatu babo. Bacuhiiye abaatu babo abahoda.
83.4: Baloma baati, “Muuje hutiine hubasihiirise ngʼegwanga, esiina lya Yisirayiri ligote batagobolayo hulihebulira nindi.”
83.5: Era bosibosi beesa hirala mu tegeha yaawe, beehobana ohuhuyeekera,
83.6: eweema jʼEdomu nʼAbayisimayiri ohuŋwa e Mowaabbu nʼAbahagari,
83.7: nʼAbagabbali nʼAbamooni, Abameleki nʼAbafirisuuti ko nʼabaatu bʼe Tiiro.
83.8: Era ni Busuuli yibegaatireho ohuyeeda olulyo lwa Luuti.
83.9: Bahole ngʼolu waahola Abamidiyaani ngʼolu waahola Sisera ni Yabbini hu lwabi Kisoni,
83.10: aba wasihiirisa mu Endori era emibiri jaawe jabolera hwiroba.
83.11: Hola abatangirisi baawe ngʼolu waahola Orebbu ni Zeebbu hola abatangirisi baawe ngʼolu waahola Zeebba ko ni Zalumuuna.
83.12: Abaatu abo baloma baati, “Muhole hweŋirire ehyalo hya Hatonda.”
83.13: O Hatonda wange, basalaanie ngʼolu mbeŋo esalaania ebisasiro,
83.14: hyʼolu muliro gugugulisa amadeŋo oba hyʼolu omuliro gwohya olusozi,
83.15: babbinge nʼomuyaga gugwo ogwʼamaani, era batiise ni hibuyaga wuwo.
83.16: O Musengwa , baleetere ohuswala ko abaatu bahategeera amaani gagwo.
83.17: Balehe esoni jibahubbe emirembe nʼemirembe, leha basihiirihe ni ŋaŋuma abaŋa eŋono.
83.18: Leha bamanye baati ewe Musengwa ewe weŋene ndiiwe Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali aŋuga hiisi hiitu hu hyalo hyosihyosi.

84.1: O Musengwa Omwene Maŋe, ngʼenyumba yiyo ndaŋi!
84.2: Obulamu wange wuŋemba bugali hu huba mu lunya lwa Musengwa , omwoyo nʼomubiri byeriririra Hatonda Omwene Bulamu.
84.3: Ni namuhuuji asunire amago atongola ehitala aŋa namalala ahuumira owaana waayo huupi nʼehituuti hihyo O Musengwa Omwene Maŋe, habaha wange era Hatonda wange.
84.4: Besiimire abo ababa mu nyumba yiyo, baba muhuhujumirya hiisi hiseera.
84.5: Besiimire abo abahufuula ewe ohuba amaani gaawe abo abalumirwa ohutiinanga mu nyumba yiyo hu lusozi Sayuuni ohuhujumirya.
84.6: Ni babita mu hiiho hyʼe Bbaka ehiŋumamo maaji, balihifuula ehifo ehyʼamaaji, hyejula nʼefula eyisookera erala ni huŋwa mu hiseera hyʼendobooli.
84.7: Abaatu babo beyongera ohusuna amaani era baja hwola hu lusozi Sayuuni mu moni ja Hatonda.
84.8: O Musengwa Hatonda Omwene Maŋe, ŋulira ohusaba hwange. O Hatonda wa Yakobbo, puliirise.
84.9: O Hatonda, ŋa habaha weefe ekabi era oyu watobola omuhejeho nʼehisa.
84.10: Oludaalo lulala olukenera mu lunya lwa Yekaalu yiyo, luhira endaalo olukumi ejikenera aŋaatu aŋandi. Era mala gaba muhuumi ŋa mulyango gwʼenyumba ya Hatonda wange ohuhira ohumenya mu weema jʼabahosi bʼebibi.
84.11: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Musengwa Hatonda njʼeryuba era engabo yeefe gandaga ehisasabirisi era gafuula owʼeŋono. Saŋanga hutaŋa ebiraŋi abo abahola ebiruŋamu.
84.12: O Musengwa Omwene Maŋe, gesiimire oyo ahwesiga.

85.1: O Musengwa , waaŋa ehyalo hihyo ekabi era oleeteeye abejuhulu ba Yakobbo ohuba bulaŋi.
85.2: Wasoniŋa ohubbenga hwʼabaatu babo era wabatusaho ebibi byawe byosibyosi.
85.3: Walehera aŋo ohutuluŋira nʼohuba nʼobusungu bungi eyi huli.
85.4: O Hatonda Omunoŋosi weefe, tugobose bunyaaha era olehere aŋo ohutuluŋira.
85.5: Oja hutuluŋira emirembe nʼemirembe? Oja hweyongera ohuba nʼobusungu?
85.6: Sooja hutugobosa bunyaaha nindi, abaatu babo basangaale hu lwʼewe?
85.7: O Musengwa , tulage ohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu era otunoŋole.
