85.8: Nja huŋuliirisa ehi Hatonda Musengwa aja huloma, olwohuba asuubisa abaatu abagwalaafu babe emiyaaya ohutusaho batagobolayo mu buŋubeebe waawe.
85.9: Mu butuufu oweene ali ŋaapi ohunoŋola abo abamutya ko eŋono lirye lihwane ehyalo hyefe.
85.10: Ohwenda nʼowesigwa byeŋimbire era obuluŋamu nʼemiyaaya bigwijana mu hifuba.
85.11: Owesigwa buŋwera mu hyalo hino obuluŋamu busiziira mwigulu nga wiiha ŋaasi hu hyalo.
85.12: Musengwa aja hutuŋa ebiraŋi era ehyalo hyefe hija hwama ebibala bingi bugali.
85.13: Obuluŋamu bumutangiriramo era wamweyulira engira omu abita.

86.1: O Musengwa , tegere ohutwi era wungobolemo, olwohuba ndi mugadi era ndi mu wetaavu.
86.2: Huuma obulamu wange olwohuba neŋayeeyo eyi oli. Oli Hatonda wange, noŋola omuŋeeresa wuwo, oyo ahwesiga.
86.3: O Musengwa pambire ehisa olwohuba oludaalo luŋwerereraho ni kweriririra.
86.4: O Musengwa sangaasa omuŋeeresa wuwo olwohuba nahuŋambya obulamu wange.
86.5: O Musengwa osoniŋa era oli mulaŋi olaga ohwenda ohubitiirifu eyiri abo bosibosi abahujumirya.
86.6: O Musengwa , ŋulira ohusaba hwange, ŋuliirisa ohulira hwange ni sunga wupambire ehisa.
86.7: Ni ndi mu bugosi kulanga olwohuba oja hungobolamo.
86.8: O Musengwa, ŋaŋumaaŋo hatonda ali hyʼewe. Era ŋaŋumaaŋo wayire mulala ahola ebi ohola.
86.9: O Musengwa, amawanga gosigosi aga watonda gaja huuja gahujumirye era gaja huhuŋa eŋono.
86.10: Hiri hiityo olwohuba oli wʼamaani era ohola ebyeŋunjisa, ewe weŋene ndiiwe Hatonda.
86.11: O Musengwa , somese amagira gagwo era nja hugendera mu mazima gago. Pe omwoyo ogubulamo wasiwaasi, nahahuŋa eŋono.
86.12: O Musengwa Hatonda wange, nja huhujumirya nʼomwoyo gwange gwosigwosi nja huhujumirya emirembe nʼemirembe.
86.13: Hiri hiityo olwohuba ohwenda ohuwunyendamo hubitiirifu, wanunula ohuŋwa emagombe mu hufa.
86.14: O Hatonda, abo abehudumbasa banumba, abaatu abahambwe bendula obulamu wange abaatu abatahutya.
86.15: Aye ewe Musengwa oli Hatonda owʼehyere era oli nʼehisasabirisi, olwaŋo ohuluŋa wijuuye ohwenda nʼowesigwa.
86.16: Cuuha eno wupambire ehisa, ŋa omuŋeeresa wuwo amaani, onoŋole omusaani wʼomwidu wuwo omuhasi.
86.17: Musengwa , pe ahabonero ahalaga ngʼolu oli mulaŋi ko abalabe bange baswale olwohuba bunjedire.

87.1: Musengwa gatongola ehibuga hu lusozi olwawufu.
87.2: Musengwa genda ehibuga Sayuuni ohusinga ebifo byosibyosi ebya Yakobbo.
87.3: Baloma ebiraŋi hu ewe ehibuga hya Hatonda.
87.4: Hatonda aloma ati, “Misiri ni Bbabbulooni ni Firisuuti ni Tiiro nʼEsopiya, mawanga agaaŋondera era abaatu baamo baloma baati, ‘Ono musaale wʼe Sayuuni.’ ”
87.5: Mu butuufu baja huloma hu Sayuuni baati, “Ono ni noola, basaale bʼe Sayuuni era Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali aja huhifuula ohuba hyʼamaani.”
87.6: Musengwa aliŋandiiha ati, “Ono musaale wʼe Sayuuni.”
87.7: Abembi nʼabahini balyemba baati, “Sayuuni njʼesibuho yʼekabi jeefe.”

88.1: O Musengwa Hatonda omunoŋosi wange, kweriririra omuusi nʼowiire.
88.2: Ŋulira ohusaba hwange, ŋuliirisa ohulira hwange.
88.3: Nijuuye bigosi byereere era ohufa hundi ŋaapi.
88.4: Bambala ohuba mulala hubatiina emagombe, ndi hyʼoŋuma maani.
88.5: Bandeha ohuba ŋalala nʼabafu hyʼabafu abali emagombe aba otahebulira, abo aba otayeeda.
88.6: Wundanya mwiroŋo ereeŋi eryene era erijuuye ehiirema ehiŋambire oti ngu.
88.7: Obusungu wuwo bungi hu bulamu wange, amayengo gago ganyigiirisa.
88.8: Wutuhiseeho abameeri bange, wufuuye hyenyinyasa eyi bali. Ndi musibe atasobola huŋwa mu busibe.
88.9: Emoni jange sijibona olwʼenaku eyi ndimo. Musengwa , hiisi ludaalo kusunga obuyeedi, ngolola emihono ni saba.
88.10: Oholera abafu ebyamaliholiho? Abafu benyoha bahujumirya?
88.11: Abanamagombe basobola ohuloma hu hwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu nʼowesigwa wuwo mu hifo ehyʼohusihiiriha?
88.12: Ebyamaliholiho bibyo babimanyire mu hiirema oba obulaŋi wuwo mu hyalo hyʼabo aba berabira?
88.13: Aye Musengwa kusunga obuyeedi era mu mugamba kusunga.
88.14: Lwahiina Musengwa wukubbire omugongo era nʼohukejaho siwenda hukejaho?
88.15: Mbweneweene ohuŋwera erala mu buvubuka huupi fe nʼohufa era pooye embaha olwʼebibonerezo bibyo.
88.16: Ehiruŋi hihyo hikenireeŋo era ohunyigirisa ohubunyigirisa husihiirihise.
88.17: Baneswanigirisa oludaalo lwosirwosi hyʼamataba, banjetolooye enjuyi josijosi.
88.18: Ogimire abameeri bange ni naabo aba nenda bapwaho era ehiirema nje meeri yange.

89.1: Nja hwemba hu hwenda hwa Musengwa ohubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe. Nja huloma hu wesigwa wuwe eyiri abaatu emirembe josijosi.
89.2: Nja hulangirira ebiŋamba hu hwenda huhwo ohwʼemirembe nʼemirembe, owesigwa wuwo sibuŋwaŋo hyʼegulu.
89.3: Waloma oti, “Nahola endagaano nʼomutobole wange. Nalayirira Dawudi omuŋeeresa wange ti,
89.4: ‘Mu lulyo lulwo muja hubaamo omuŋugi nga habaha emirembe nʼemirembe.’ ”
89.5: Musengwa egulu lihutendereza olwʼebyamaliholiho bibyo era leha abamalayika bahutendereze olwʼowesigwa wuwo.
89.6: Njʼani ali mwigulu owegerageraniaho hu Musengwa ? Hu abo abali mwigulu njʼani ali hya Musengwa ?
89.7: Hatonda bamutya mu luhiiho lwʼabawufu, atiisa ohuhira bosibosi abamweswanigirihiise.
89.8: O Musengwa Hatonda Omwene Maŋe, O Musengwa , njʼani ali hyʼewe! Era oli mwesigwa mu biitu byosibyosi.
89.9: Oŋuga obusungu wʼenyanja, obunjeesa amayengo agatumbera.
89.10: Wabbwagabbwaga Rahabbu, wasalaania abalabe babo nʼobuŋangi wuwo owʼamaani.
89.11: Egulu nʼehyalo bibyo, nʼebibirimo byosibyosi bibyo olwohuba ndiiwe owabihola.
89.12: Watonda amaniino nʼamehiriro, esozi Tabbori ni Herumooni jihwembera nʼesangaalo.
89.13: Oli nʼobuŋangi, amaani gago gaŋamugulu era omuhono gugwo gwʼamaani mangi.
89.14: Obuluŋamu nʼohutehubbira njʼomusingi gwʼobuŋugi wuwo, ohwenda nʼowesigwa njʼebi oholeraho.
89.15: O Musengwa , besiimire abo abahujumirya, abamenya mu njase eyʼehyere hihyo.
89.16: Basangaala oludaalo lwosirwosi era bahujumirya olwʼobulaŋi wuwo
89.17: olwohuba ndiiwe ogima baba nʼeŋono nʼamaani era otuŋa obuŋangusi olwʼehisa hihyo.
89.18: Mu butuufu Musengwa njʼengabo yeefe era Omwawufu wa Yisirayiri gaatuŋa habaha weefe.
89.19: Mu biseera ebyahale waloma abaatu babo abesigwa mu hwolesewa oti, “Paaye omusooli amaani, nenyosa omuvubuka oyu natobola namuŋa etebe eyʼobuŋugi.”
89.20: Paaye Dawudi omuŋeeresa wange owahabaha era mujuhireeho amafuta amawufu.
89.21: Nabenga ni naye era mu butuufu nja humuŋa amaani.
89.22: Abalabe babe sibaja humuŋangula ŋaŋuma muhosi wʼebibi aja humunyigirisa.
89.23: Nja husihiirisa abalabe babe nʼabona abo abamucaawa baja hufa.
89.24: Nja humwenda era mbe mwesigwa eyi ali, era nʼabita mu ese aja huba wʼamaani.
89.25: Nja hugalamya owahabaha wuwe ohuŋwa hu nyanja Meditereniani ohwolera erala hu lwabi Yufuleeti.
89.26: Aja huloma ati, “Ndiiwe Bbaabba Hatonda wange, olwanda lwange era omunoŋosi wange.”
89.27: Nja humufuula mwana wange omudaayi ahira abahabaha bosibosi hu hyalo.
89.28: Nja humwenda emirembe nʼemirembe era endagaano yange ni naye yʼemirembe nʼemirembe.
89.29: Mu lulyo lulwe muja huŋwamo habaha aja huŋuga emirembe nʼemirembe era etebe yiye eyʼobuŋugi yija hweyongera ohubaaŋo hyʼegulu.
89.30: “Singa abejuhulu babe babbwaga amagambi gange era bagaana ohugondera ebiragiro byange,
89.31: singa banyooma ebiragiro byange, amagambi gange gabahaya ohuhuuma,
89.32: nja hubahangavula olwʼebibi byawe, nja hubabonyaabonya olwʼobujeemu waawe
89.33: aye sinja huleheraŋo hubenda era nja husigala ni ndi mwesigwa eyi bali.
89.34: Sinja hubbwaga ndagaano yange oba ohucuusamo ehi nasuubisa.
89.35: Mu wawufu wange nalayira nahena era sinja hudulinga Dawudi.
89.36: Mu lulyo lulwe muja huŋwamo habaha owʼemirembe nʼemirembe era owahabaha wuwe bulibereraŋo hyʼeryuba.
89.37: Obuŋugi wuwe buja hubaaŋo hyʼomwesi hwigulu, obujulizi owʼamazima hwigulu.”
89.38: Aye oluŋiiye habaha wuwo oyu watobola era omuhubbire omugongo.
89.39: Obbwagire endagaano yiyo eyi waahola nʼomuŋeeresa wuwo era engule yiye oyidanyire mu fuuhe.
89.40: Olukomera olwʼehiteepe hihye ehyʼehibuga olubbwagire, walufuula gunda era watangajula ebibagadirira.
89.41: Ababitaŋo bosibosi beeba ebibye era nʼabaliranwa babe bamujeherera.
89.42: Abalabe babe obaŋaaye obuŋangusi era obaŋaaye esangaalo.
89.43: Ebisoosa bibye sibihiiri byamugaso era omulehire bamuŋangula.
89.44: Omutuhiseeho eŋono, odanyire etebe yiye eyʼobuŋugi ŋaasi.
89.45: Omuhayiriŋihiisye nʼahiiri muŋere era omuswahiise. Era omuhubbire esoni.
89.46: O Musengwa , olihyosa ŋeena ohutwehweha emirembe nʼemirembe? Onahoseŋe ohuba nʼehiruŋi ehyohya hyʼomuliro?
89.47: Hebulira oti obulamu wange wʼehiseera buseera. Hebulira oti watutonda baatu buutu hwesihwesi.
89.48: Njʼani atalifa oba genoŋola ohutatiina emagombe?
89.49: O Musengwa, ohwenda huhwo ohwahale ohubitiirifu, ohuwasuubisa Dawudi mu wesigwa wuwo huli ŋeena?
89.50: Musengwa, hebulira ngʼolu baduuye omuŋeeresa wuwo, ngʼolu ngumiiye ebiduho byʼabaatu bangi.
89.51: O Musengwa , abalabe babo baduha oyu wajuhaho amafuta, bamuduha hiisi aŋa aja.
89.52: O Musengwa , aŋeewe eŋono emirembe nʼemirembe! Amiina era Amiina.

90.1: Musengwa, ohuŋwa ahale nahale obaaye mago geefe.
90.2: Konyo otonde esozi oba konyo otonde ehyalo nʼebirimo, waaliŋo era oli Hatonda emirembe nʼemirembe.
90.3: Wagamyayo abaatu mwiroba obaloma oti, “Mwagameyo mwiroba, enywe abaana bʼabaatu.”
90.4: Emyaha olukumi hu ewe jiri hyʼoludaalo olwejo olwabitire oba hyʼesaawa ejohuŋungulaho endiidiri mu wiire.
90.5: Ogima abaatu batiina emagombe mangumangu, bali hyʼenyaasi eryahamera mu mugamba,
90.6: wayire mu mugamba limera, ne aŋa wirira liba liŋotohire nga lyoma.
90.7: Obusungu wuwo butusihiirisa, onaluŋa nga hweŋendeherera.
90.8: Ebibi byefe biri ŋalafu eyi oli, obona ebibi byefe ebyomu ngiso.
90.9: Emyaha jeefe jisaliwaho olwʼobusungu wuwo, obulamu weefe hubuhena ni hulira.
90.10: Obungi wʼendaalo ejʼobulamu weefe jiri emyaha esanvu, oba kinaana hunaba ni huli bʼamaani, atenga jiba jijuuye ohubonaabona nʼebigosi. Jiduluma mangu, nga huŋwaŋo.
90.11: Njʼani amanyire amaani gʼobusungu wuwo? Njʼani amanyire etiisa eyi busungu wuwo buleeta?
90.12: Tusomese obuupi wʼendaalo jʼobulamu weefe, hyahatuleetera ohubaamo amagesi.
90.13: O Musengwa , olyosa ŋe ohuba nʼobusungu? Ŋambira abaŋeeresa babo ehisa.
90.14: Otwijusenga nʼohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu mu mugamba, hwahemba nʼesangaalo era husaŋalyenga endaalo josijosi ejʼobulamu weefe.
90.15: Tuŋe esangaalo ohutusasula ebiseera bira ebyʼohubonaabona, emyaha emingi ejo eji hubaaye nʼebigosi.
90.16: Olage abaŋeeresa babo ebyamaliholiho, olage abejuhulu baawe eŋono liryo.
90.17: Leha ehisasabirisi hya Musengwa Hatonda weefe hitubeho, leha byosibyosi bitutiinire bulaŋi, byosibyosi bitutiinire bulaŋi.

91.1: Hiisi amenya mu hisisira hyʼoyo Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali, asuna obuhuumi wʼOmwene Buŋangi.
91.2: Era nalomenga ti, “ Musengwa ndiiwe olwanda lwange era omuhuumi wange, oli Hatonda wange oyu nesiga,”
91.3: Era mu butuufu aja huhuŋonianga emitego jʼabalabe era ahuŋonie ni haŋupuli.
91.4: Anahuwihenga namabaŋa gage, wasunira omwo obuŋonere. Era owesigwa wuwe bunaabenga ngabo yiyo.
91.5: Sonatyenga hiitu hyosihyosi owiire, oba obusaale obu balahiise mu muusi
91.6: oba ohutya haŋupuli agwaŋo mu njirema, oba namusisa abaluhaŋo mu muusi.
91.7: Abaatu ekumi nʼekumi balifiira aŋo nʼobona, aye ewe ŋaŋuma ehiri hwolaho kadi.
91.8: Olibona nʼemoni jijo omubi nʼasuna ehibonerezo.
91.9: Musengwa njʼohugadirira, era Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali njʼomuhuumi wuwo.
91.10: Era ŋaŋuma higosi hyosihyosi ehija huhwolaho, ŋaŋuma ehija hwola hu mago gago.
91.11: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Hatonda aliragira abamalayika babe bahuyeeda.
91.12: Era balihubbaha ndiwegumula hu mabaale huhulumya magulu.
91.13: Oja hutyakirira epologoma nʼekolokima oja hwema hu pologoma ekambwe nohu gusota.
91.14: Musengwa aloma ati, “Nja huŋonia abo abanyenda. Era nja huhuuma abo abaamanyire.
91.15: Anaabenga nʼebigosi gandanga, nja humugobolangamo era mbe ŋalala ni naye muhuume era muŋe eŋono.

92.1: Hiraŋi ohweyaasa Musengwa nʼohwembera Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali enyembo,
92.2: ohulangirira ohwenda huhwo mu mugamba nʼowesigwa wuwo owiire,
92.3: nʼohuhubba ogutongooli, ehifuga ehyʼewaaya ehumi ko nʼahatongooli.
92.4: O Musengwa , ndi musangaafu olwʼebi ohola, olwʼebi oholire, nemba nʼesangaalo.
92.5: O Musengwa , nga ebi ohola byeŋunjisa, ngʼebiŋeego bibyo bija hireeŋi.
92.6: Omuutu ataŋeega, saamanyire era abaŋubeebe baŋuma hutegeera,
92.7: baati wayire abahosi bʼebibi bameruha hyʼenyaasi, baja hubasihiirihisa erala.
92.8: Aye ewe Musengwa oja hutuŋuga emirembe nʼemirembe.
92.9: Musengwa , mu butuufu oweene abalabe babo, mu butuufu oweene abalabe babo baja husihiiriha, abahosi bʼebibi bosibosi baja huboŋaania.
92.10: Wupaaye amaani hya gʼebunwa yʼeŋombe, wunjuhireeho amafuta amalaŋi.
92.11: Samwene neboneyeeho ni baŋangula abalabe bange, amatwi gange gaaŋulira ebiŋamba huhusihiiriha hwʼabahosi bʼebibi.
92.12: Abagwalaafu baja huhulahulana hyʼomuhindu, baja huhula hyʼemitumba jʼe Lebbanooni,
92.13: ogu bahoma mu nyumba ya Musengwa era jija hweyagalira mu lunya lwa Hatonda.
92.14: Jija hwama ebibala nomu buhayire waajo, jija husigala ni jitooma.
92.15: Ehyo hiraga hiiti Musengwa sigehubbira njʼolwanda lwange era aŋuma hibi mu ye.

93.1: Musengwa aŋuga era gambaaye amaani nʼeŋono. Waŋamba ehyalo wahita aŋa hiri era sihyenyeenya.
93.2: Etebe yiyo eyʼobuŋugi yaaliŋo ohuŋwa hale nahale, ya mirembe nʼemirembe.
93.3: O Musengwa , enyanja yefuhuuye, enyanja yefuhuula nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani, enyanja yefuhuula nʼamayengo.
93.4: Musengwa ali ŋamugulu wʼamaani ohusinga ohuŋuuma hwʼenyanja, nʼohuhira amayengo gaayo ago enaba nʼetabuhire.
93.5: O Musengwa , ebiragiro bibyo sibiŋwaŋo, enyumba yiyo njawufu emirembe nʼemirembe.

94.1: O Musengwa , Hatonda owesasusa, O Hatonda owegalula, ale ni webonese.
94.2: Yinyoheramo ewe asala emisango hu hyalo, abehudumbasa baŋe ehi basaanira.
94.3: O Musengwa , balyosa ŋe? Abahosi bʼebibi balyosa ŋe ohweyagala?
94.4: Bajofumula ebibono ni bepaahapaaha abahosi bʼebibi bejuuye ohweginiha.
94.5: O Musengwa , bahiyaania abaatu babo, banyigirisa abo abawefunira.
94.6: Batemula abanamwandu nʼabalugendwa era batemula abafuubbi.
94.7: Baloma baati, “ Musengwa saabona, Hatonda wa Yakobbo sabifaho.”
94.8: Baatu enywe, muli baŋubeebe ba ngeri hi? Muliba nʼamagesi ŋaali?
94.9: Oyo owatonda amatwi, saŋulira? Owahola emoni, saabona?
94.10: Oyo ahangavula amawanga, saaja hubahangavula? Omuŋi wʼamagesi asobola ohuŋuma magesi?
94.11: Musengwa amanyire ebiŋeego byʼabaatu, amanyire ati ebiŋeego byawe biŋuma mahulu.
94.12: Musengwa , nga gesiimire oyo oyu oŋamo endabusi, omuutu oyu osomesa amagambi gago.
94.13: Omuŋa ehiŋuumulo mu biseera ebigosi ohwola olu bayabira abahosi bʼebibi obuloŋo,
94.14: olwohuba Musengwa salireha baatu babe, saaja hwabulira abo ababe.
94.15: Abaŋugi baja husala emisango ni batehubbira, era abʼemyoyo emigwalaafu baja huhisiima.
94.16: Njʼani aja hwemeerera hu lwange ohuŋahania abahosi bʼebibi? Njʼani aja ohuŋiriŋania abahola ebibi?
94.17: Singa Musengwa siganjeeda, hani natiina hale e magombe.
94.18: O Musengwa , ni naloma ti, “Ohugulu ni hwaterera,” ohwenda huhwo hwapambirira.
94.19: Ni naali ni neralihiriiye bugali ohumbudawuda hyandeetera esangaalo.
94.20: Oŋuma kolagana nʼabaŋugi abahosi bʼebibi sibasobola huloma baati oli ŋalala ni nabo, abalanga ohwehubbira baati hiraŋi?
94.21: Behobaana ohwita abagwalaafu, era abo abaŋumaho omusango babasalira ogwʼohufa.
94.22: Aye Musengwa njʼowukuuma, era Hatonda wange njʼebaale omuneŋogoma.
94.23: Aja hubegalula olwʼebibi byawe era aja hubasihiirisa olwʼebibi byawe, Musengwa Hatonda weefe aja hubasihiirisa.

95.1: Muuje hwembere Musengwa nʼesangaalo, leha huhayaanire ŋamugulu ni hwembera Hatonda olwanda atunoŋola.
95.2: Leha hutiine mu moni jije nʼohweyaasa, humwembere nʼesangaalo ni humujumirya.
95.3: Musengwa nje Hatonda owʼamaani, habaha owʼamaani ahira abahatonda bosibosi.
95.4: Ehyalo hyosihyosi hiri mu mihono jije, nʼowegingihiriri wʼesozi woosi wuwe.
95.5: Enyanja jije olwohuba njʼowajitonda, era emihono jije nje jahola eroba.
95.6: Muuje huhubbe amafuha ni humujumirya, leha huhome ekumbo mu moni ja Musengwa owatutonda,
95.7: olwohuba nje Hatonda weefe era efe huli baatu babe, etaama jije eji alabirira. Olwaleero ni muŋulira ejanjaasi lirye,
95.8: mutahahanyasa myoyo jenywe hyʼabasehulu benywe olu baahola e Meribba, ngʼolu bahola hu ludaalo olu baali e Maasa mu lulafu
95.9: eyi basehulu benywe baakema wayire baabona ebinahola.
95.10: Cʼehyagira naluŋira abaatu abo emyaha amahumi ane era nʼaloma ti, “Emyoyo jaawe jiŋaba era sibaŋamba biragiro byange.
95.11: Cʼehyagira naluŋa nalayira ti, ‘Sibalyola mu hifo omu naali nʼohubaŋeramo ehiŋuumulo hyange.’ ”

96.1: Yembera Musengwa olwembo olunyaaha, enywe abaatu hu hyalo hyosihyosi mwembere Musengwa .
96.2: Yembera Musengwa omwebase, hiisi ludaalo mulangirire ngʼolu gatunoŋola. Mulangirire eyiri amawanga ngʼolu ali nʼeŋono.
96.3: Mulangirire eyiri amawanga ngʼolu ali nʼeŋono, mulome hu ebyamaliholiho ebi aholera abaatu.
96.4: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Musengwa wʼamaani bugali era asaana ohumutendereza, abaatu bali nʼohumutya ohuhira abahatonda abandi bosibosi.
96.5: Abahatonda abamawanga bosibosi biwumbe buwumbe, aye Musengwa gatonda egulu.
96.6: Eŋono nʼobuhulu, obuŋangi nʼobuŋoono bijuuye mu hifo hihye ehyawufu.
96.7: Hiisi hiha hyʼabaatu mwesimwesi muŋe Musengwa eŋono, mumujumirye olwʼamaani nʼeŋono lirye.
96.8: Muŋe Musengwa eŋono erimusaanira, muleete ehirabo era mutiine mu lunya lwa Yekaalu yiye.
96.9: Mujumirye Musengwa mu wawufu wuwe, leha ehyalo hyosihyosi hiteeteme mu moni jije.
96.10: Mulomere amawanga muuti, “ Musengwa aŋuga.” Ehyalo higumu sihitengeta era sihisagasagana, alisalira abaatu emisango nʼatehubbira.
96.11: Leha egulu lisangaale nʼehyalo hisaŋalye, leha enyanja nʼebirimo byosibyosi biŋuume.
96.12: Leha endimiro yisaŋalye nʼebirimo byosibyosi. Emisaala mu madeŋo jija hwemba olwʼesangaalo,
96.13: jija hwemba mu moni ja Musengwa olwohuba gaaja, gaaja ohusalira ehyalo emisango. Aja husalira ehyalo emisango mu buluŋamu, asalire abaatu emisango mu mazima.

97.1: Musengwa aŋuga, leha ehyalo hisaŋalye, leha ebizinga byosibyosi bisangaale.
97.2: Ebireri nʼehiirema ehiŋambire oti ngu bimweswanigirihiise, obuŋugi buwe wijuuye obuluŋamu nʼohutehubbira.
97.3: Omuliro guŋwera aŋa ali, gwohya abalabe babe abamweswanigirihiise.
97.4: Ahubba ehimyaso hu hyalo, abaatu babona bateetema.
97.5: Esozi jisanuuha hyʼamasavu mu moni ja Musengwa mu moni ja Musengwa wʼehyalo hyosihyosi.
97.6: Ebitonde ebiri mwigulu biraga biiti Musengwa ahola ebiruŋamu era hiisi muutu abona eŋono lirye.
97.7: Aswasa hiisi muutu ajumirya ebibbote abaswasa era abahatonda bosibosi bahubbira Musengwa amafuha.
97.8: O Musengwa , abaatu bomu Sayuuni basangaala nʼabomu bibuga bya Yuda basaŋalya olwʼohuŋulira emisango eji olamula.
97.9: O Musengwa , ndiiwe Ali Ŋamugulu Obugali era oŋuga ehyalo hyosihyosi, ohirira ŋale abahatonda bosibosi.
97.10: Enywe omwenda Musengwa , mucaawe ehibi. Ahuuma abaatu babe era gabanunula ohuŋwa mu maani gʼababi.
97.11: Enjase yaduhira abahola ebiruŋamu nʼesangaalo liba nʼabemyoyo emigwalaafu.
97.12: Enywe abagwalaafu mwesimwesi musangaale olwʼebyo ebi Musengwa ahola. Mumweyaase olwʼowawufu wuwe.

98.1: Mwembere Musengwa olwembo olunyaaha olwohuba aholire ebyamaliholiho. Aŋanguye nʼobuŋangi nʼamaani agʼomuhono gugwe omwawufu.
98.2: Musengwa alagire obunoŋosi wuwe, gahwehulira amawanga ebiruŋamu ebi ahola.
98.3: Ahebuliiye ohwenda huhwe ohubitiirifu nʼohuba mwesigwa eyiri Abayisirayiri, abaatu hu hyalo hyosihyosi babona obunoŋosi wa Hatonda weefe.
98.4: Abaatu mwesimwesi hu hyalo hyosihyosi, mwembere Musengwa nʼesangaalo ni muhayaanira ŋamugulu, mutumbuhe nʼohwemba nʼohusaŋalya.
98.6: Mufuuŋe egwala nʼejanjaasi yʼolwiga lwʼemiigu, muhayaane nʼesangaalo mu moni ja Musengwa habaha.
98.7: Leha enyanja nʼebiyirimo byosibyosi bimwembere. Leha ehyalo nʼebiitu byosibyosi byembe.
98.8: Leha enjabi jihubbe mu ngalo, leha esozi jihoohere ŋalala nʼesangaalo,
98.9: leha jembere mu moni ja Musengwa , olwohuba alihuuja ohusalira abaatu hu hyalo emisango. Aja husalira ehyalo emisango mu buluŋamu, aliramula abaatu nʼatehubbira.

99.1: Musengwa aŋuga, leha amawanga gateeteme. Gehala ŋagati wʼabakerubbi hu tebe yiye eyʼobuŋugi, leha ehyalo hitengete.
99.2: Musengwa wʼamaani mu Sayuuni, ali ŋamugulu wʼamawanga gosigosi.
99.3: Leha bamujumirye olwʼamaani nʼetiisa yiye era mwawufu.
99.4: Habaha ali nʼobuŋangi, genda ohutehubbira, wataŋo ohusala emisango nʼotehubbira mu bejuhulu ba Yakobbo, wahola ebituufu nʼotehubbira.
99.5: Mugulumize Musengwa Hatonda weefe, muhubbe amafuha mu moni jʼetebe yiye niye mwawufu.
99.6: Musa ni Alooni baali balala hu basengi ba Hatonda, Samwiri gaali mulala hu balanganga esiina lirye. Balanganga Musengwa era gabagobolamo.
99.7: Galoma ni nabo nʼali mu hireri, baŋamba amagambi nʼebiragiro ebi gabaŋa.
99.8: O Musengwa Hatonda weefe, wabagobolamo, walaga oti ndiiwe Hatonda asoniŋa, eyiri Yisirayiri, waali Hatonda asoniŋa, wayire wabaŋamo endabusi olwʼobujeemu waawe.
99.9: Mugulumise Musengwa Hatonda weefe, era mumujumirihisye hu lusozi lulwe olwawufu, olwohuba Musengwa Hatonda weefe mwawufu.

100.1: Abaatu hu hyalo hyosihyosi muhubbire Musengwa ehigalagala nʼejanjaasi eryaŋamugulu.
100.2: Muŋeerese Musengwa nʼesangaalo, muuje mu moni jije nʼenyembo ejʼohusaŋalya.
100.3: Mumanye muuti Musengwa nje Hatonda. Njʼowatutonda era huli babe. Huli baatu babe, etaama eji alabirira.
100.4: Mwingire mu nyumba yiye nʼohweyaasa nomu lunya lulwe nʼohumutendereza era mumweyaase.
100.5: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Musengwa mulaŋi era ohwenda huhwe hwʼemirembe nʼemirembe, owesigwa wuwe wʼemirembe josijosi.

101.1: Nja huhwembera ebiŋamba hu hwenda nʼohutehubbira huhwo, Musengwa , nja hwemba ni kujumirya.
101.2: Nja hwegenderesa ohuba nʼobulamu obuŋumaho mbalo. Oliija ŋaali eyi ndi? Nja huba nʼobulamu obugwalaafu mu mago gange.
101.3: Nja hugaana ehiitu ehyʼembiho ohuba mu moni jange. Caawa ebikolwa byʼabo abahola ebitasaana era sinja huhola muhumba ni nabo.
101.4: Abaatu abʼemyoyo emibi baja humba ŋaleeŋi, sinja hulirihana hibi.
101.5: Nja huŋoleresa hiisi aloma ebyakalebule hu wahye. Sinja hugumikiriza oyo owʼemoni embi nʼabepaahapaaha.
101.6: Emoni jange jija huba hu abo abesigwa hu hyalo ko bahaba ni nange, oyo aŋumaaho mbalo aja hupeeresanga.
101.7: Eŋuma aloma ebitali bituufu aja huba mu nyumba yange era eŋuma mudulingi aja humenya ni nange.
101.8: Hiisi ludaalo nja huŋoleresanga abahosi bʼebibi hu hyalo, nja husalaho abahosi bʼebibi mu hibuga hya Musengwa .

102.1: O Musengwa , ŋulira ohusaba hwange, leha ohwerira hwange hwole eyi oli.
102.2: Otakubba mugongo ni ndi mu bigosi. Tegere ohutwi, ni kulanga ngobolemo mangumangu.
102.3: Hiri hiityo olwohuba obulamu wange buli hudumuuha hyʼeriisi erya haseera buseera, nʼamagumba gange gahumulya huhumulya.
102.4: Ndi huŋotoha huŋotoha hyʼenyaasi nebirira nʼohulya emere.
102.5: Olwʼohubinda ohumbindamo ohutahoma sigaaye magumba mereere.
102.6: Ndi hya woogu owomu lulafu, hya woogu ali eyo yeŋene mwigunda.
102.7: Sinimba hwiro, ndi hyʼenyuni eyiri yoŋene hu hisuli hyʼenyumba.
102.8: Abalabe bange basiiba banduha era esiina lyange lyafuuha duho.
102.9: Era egohe njʼemere yange, amasiga njʼamaaji aga nywa,
102.10: olwʼehiruŋi hihyo ehyʼamaani, wapamba wandanya ebulafu.
102.11: Obulamu wange buli hyʼehisisigo era buŋotoha hyʼenyaasi.
102.12: Aye ewe Musengwa , wihaaye hu tebe eyʼobuŋugi emirembe nʼemirembe, era hiisi mulembe guja huhuhebuliranga.
102.13: Oja huŋambira Sayuuni ehisa, olwohuba njʼehiseera ohuŋambira abaatu baamo ehisa. Ehiseera ehiragaane hyolire.
102.14: Abaŋeeresa babo benda ehibuga Sayuuni bugali era hibaluma bugali ohubona ni higuuye.
102.15: Amawanga gosigosi gaja hutya Musengwa abahabaha bosibosi balihuŋa eŋono.
102.16: Musengwa aja hutongola Sayuuni bunyaaha, aja hulaga amaani gage.
102.17: Aja hwanuhula esaala jʼabagadi, saaja hunyooma hwerira hwawe.
102.18: Leha hino bahiŋandiihire abʼomulembe oguuja, abaatu abahiiri husaaliwa bahajumirya Musengwa ,
102.19: baati, “ Musengwa nʼali mu hifo hihye ehyawufu, nʼali mwigulu gaaheja ŋaasi hu hyalo,
102.20: ohuŋulira ohubinda hwʼabasibe, anunule abo ababasalira ogwʼohufa.”
102.21: Olwʼehyo efuma ya Musengwa baja huyiŋayangaho mu Sayuuni, etendo lirye baja huliŋayangaho mu Yerusaalemu,
102.22: olu baatu nʼabahabaha banahumbaanenga ohujumirya Musengwa .
102.23: Nahali kiiri nʼamaani aye Musengwa gandeteeye ohuŋuma maani ni kiiri muvubuka, obulamu wange abusalireeho.
102.24: Nga ndoma ti, “Ewe Hatonda wange, otatusaŋo ni kiiri husahuluŋa, ndiiwe aliŋo emirembe josijosi.
102.25: Mu hutagiha watonda ehyalo era nʼegulu ndiiwe owalihola.
102.26: Egulu nʼehyalo biriŋwaŋo aye ewe olibaaŋo emirembe nʼemirembe. Byosibyosi birihayiriŋa hyʼolugoye. Birihayiriŋa hyʼolugoye byaŋwaŋo.
102.27: Aye ewe osigala cʼehyene era olibaaŋo emirembe nʼemirembe.
102.28: Abaana ba baŋeeresa babo baja huba ni neewe era olulyo lwawe luja huba bulaŋi.”

103.1: Omwoyo gwange gwebase Musengwa , hiisi ehiri mu ese hyebase esiina lirye eryawufu.
103.2: Omwoyo gwange gwebase Musengwa era gutebirira ebiraŋi ebi ahola.
103.3: Asoniŋa ebibi bibyo byosibyosi era ahuŋonia obulwaye wuwo wosiwosi.
103.4: Ahununula ohuŋwa mwiroŋo, gahulaga ohwenda nʼehyere.
103.5: Ahuŋa ebiraŋi bingi, wasigala nʼohiiri muŋere nʼoli nʼamaani hya haŋungu.
103.6: Musengwa wʼamazima musala eyʼemisango era agayira abo ababanyigirisa nʼatehubbira.
103.7: Gahwehulira Musa etegeha yiye, era galaga Abayisirayiri ebikolwa bibye ebyʼamaani.
103.8: Musengwa ali nʼehisa nʼehisasabirisi, alwaŋo ohusunguŋala era ali nʼohwenda ohubitiirifu.
103.9: Saaja huba mu hwoloobyanga hiisi hiseera oba ohusidihirira obusungu hu mwoyo emirembe nʼemirembe.
103.10: Satuhangavula ngʼolu hyahali ni hisaana olwʼebibi byefe era satwegalula ni geema hu hubbenga hwefe.
103.11: Ngʼolu egulu liri ŋaleeŋi nʼehyalo, nʼohwenda huhwe huutyo hubitiirifu eyiri abo abamutya.
103.12: Ngʼolu ebuŋwalyuba yiri ŋaleeŋi bugali nʼebugwalyuba, atyo po atutusaho ebibi byefe gaabita ŋaleeŋi ni neefe.
103.13: Ngʼolu omusaaye aŋambira abaana babe ehisa, ni Musengwa yeesi po aŋambira abo abamutya ehisa.
103.14: Hiri hiityo olwohuba amanyire ngʼolu gatuwumba, ahebulira ati gatuwumba ohuŋwa mu fuuhe.
103.15: Obulamu wʼomuutu buli hyʼenyaasi, ali hyʼehimuli ehiŋotoha ehiseera hyosihyosi.
103.16: Embeŋo ehifuuŋa nga hikukumuha era ŋaŋuma alihebulira aŋa hyali.
103.17: Aye ohuŋwa ahale nʼahale Musengwa genda abo abamutya era mulaŋi eyiri abejuhulu nʼebijuhulu,
103.18: abo abahuuma endagaano yiye era bagondera ebiragiro bibye.
103.19: Musengwa atongohiise etebe eyʼobuŋugi buwe mwigulu era aŋuga emirembe nʼemirembe.
103.20: Mweyaase Musengwa enywe abamalayika abasooli abʼamaani abahola ebi genda, abagondera ehibono hihye era mwaŋulirisa ebi aloma.
103.21: Mweyaase Musengwa enywe eŋe lirye mwesimwesi mwigulu, enywe abaŋeeresa babe abahola ebi genda.
103.22: Mweyaase Musengwa enywe ebitonde bibye mwesimwesi, hiisi hifo aŋa aŋuga. Omwoyo gwange gujumirye Musengwa .

104.1: Omwoyo gwange gweyaase Musengwa O Musengwa Hatonda wange, oli wʼamaani bugali, wetwihire eŋono nʼobubbala.
104.2: Wewihirira enjase hyʼehyambalo era wanjulusa egulu hyʼeweema.
104.3: Watongola amago gago ŋamugulu wʼamaaji era otambisa ebireri hyʼehigaali, wagendera hu mabaŋa gʼembeŋo.
104.4: Afuula abahwenda babe ohuba hyʼembeŋo, nʼabaŋeeresa babe ohuba hyʼendimi jʼomuliro.
104.5: Waata ehyalo hu musingi omugumu era ŋaŋuma aŋanga ohuhitengesya.
104.6: Enyanja yawiiha hu hyalo hyʼomuutu owetaho ehyambalo era amaaji gawiiha esozi.
104.7: Aye ni wahayula amaaji, gaŋulira ejanjaasi liryo era ni lyawatuha, gaduluma.
104.8: Gahuluhutira hu sozi nga gaserengetera mu biinamo mu hifo ehi wataŋo ti pomu gali nʼohwehumbanihisya.
104.9: Waataŋo olwaha ohwabula ehyalo nʼamaaji era sigaja hwambuha hubanda hu hyalo nindi.
104.10: Oleetera esulo jʼamaaji ohuhuluhutira mu biinamo, nʼenjabi ohuhuluhutira mu sozi.
104.11: Jiŋa esolo josijosi amaaji, nasugirya ejomwisugu jinywa jaŋona enduŋo.
104.12: Enyuni jitongola ebiswi byajo hu maaji, jembera mu masaga gʼemisaala.
104.13: Atonyesa efula hu sozi ni yiŋwa mwigulu, ngʼehyalo hyejula ebibala bibye.
104.14: Amerusa enyaasi hu hyalo ebyayo ohwaya, omuutu ohulima ebimera bireeta emere ohuŋwa mwiroba.
104.15: Era bahungula omwenge ogwʼemizabbibbu gwabaleetera esangaalo, nʼamafuta agahaloosa aganyerengesa oweeni waawe, nʼemere ebaŋa amaani.
104.16: Efula ejuhirira emisaala ja Musengwa , emitumba ohuŋwa mu Lebbanooni eji gahoma.
104.17: Mu misaala ejo, enyuni jitongolamo ebitala nga jalutu gesunira amago.
104.18: Esolo ejomwisugu ejifaana oti embusi jimenya hu sozi endeeŋi, obusolo obutono bumenya mu pungulu.
104.19: Wataŋo omwesi ohwabula ebiro, eryuba limanyire esaawa eyohugwa mu maaji.
104.20: Wataŋo ehiirema ngʼohiranga wiire, ngʼesolo ejomwisugu jiŋwayo ohwendula emere.
104.21: Epologoma epere jeŋunduguma, ni jiŋiima ehi Hatonda anajiŋe ohulya.
104.22: Eryuba ni liŋwayo nga jagamayo, jiŋenyuha mu pungulu jaajo.
104.23: Ngʼaŋo abaatu batiina mu ndimiro jaawe, batamba ohwola ehyegulo.
104.24: O Musengwa , nga waahola ebiitu bingi bugali! Ehyalo hyejuuye bitonde bibyo.
104.25: Agayanja nʼobugalamu waago, gejuuye bitonde bibyo ebitabaliha, ebiramu ebitono nʼebibbala.
104.26: Emeeri jigenderaho eyi ni neeyi, ehinyaŋa ehi watonda higuduliramo.
104.27: Ebitonde byosibyosi bihuumirira ndiiwe ohubiŋa emere mu biseera.
104.28: Nʼobiŋa emere, nga bijibunga era onaganjuula omuhono gugwo nga byeguta.
104.29: Onaheja eruuyi, byeraliihirira, nʼobitusamo omuuya, nga bifa, bifa nga byagama mwifuuhe omu byaŋwa.
104.30: Nʼobitamo omuuya nga bifuuha biramu, ngʼehyalo ohigobosa bunyaaha.
104.31: Leha Musengwa geyongere ohuba wʼeŋono emirembe nʼemirembe, era leha Musengwa asangaale olwʼebiitu ebi gatonda.
104.32: Oyo aheja huheja hu hyalo, hyateetema era aŋamba hu sozi jaduunya eriisi.
104.33: Nja hwemberanga Musengwa mu bulamu wange wosiwosi. Nja hwemba ni jumirya Hatonda ni kiiri mulamu.
104.34: Leha epeega yange emusangaasenga, olwohuba esangaalo lyange liŋwa yiwa Musengwa .
104.35: Aye leha abahola ebibi basihiirihe baŋwe mu hyalo era abahosi bʼebibi baŋwereŋo erala. Omwoyo gwange gweyaase Musengwa . Mujumirye Musengwa .

105.1: Mweyaase Musengwa , mumujumirye, mulomere abaatu ebi ahola.
105.2: Mumwembere, mumwembere ni mumujumirya, mulome hu byeŋunjisa byosibyosi ebi aholire.
105.3: Mwejage hu lwʼowawufu wuwe, leha abaatu abo abali nʼemyoyo ejendula Musengwa basangaale.
105.4: Mwendulenga Musengwa nʼamaani gage era mumujumiryenga hiisi hiseera.
105.5: Muhebulire ebyeŋunjisa ebi gaahola, ebyamaliholiho nʼekola eyi gasalamo emisango,
105.6: enywe olulyo lwa Yibbulayimu omuŋeeresa wuwe, abejuhulu ba Yakobbo aba gatobola.
105.7: Nje Musengwa Hatonda weefe, asala emisango hu hyalo hyosihyosi nʼatehubbira.
105.8: Ahebulira endagaano yiye emirembe nʼemirembe, ebi gasuubisa emirembe olukumi,
105.9: endagaano eyi gahola ni Yibbulayimu nʼehi gasuubisa Yisaka nʼamulayirira.
105.10: Gayinywanywasa eyiri Yakobbo, eyiri abaatu Bayisirayiri ngʼendagaano eyʼemirembe nʼemirembe.
105.11: Galoma ati, “Ndibaŋa ehyalo hyʼe Kanani ohuba omuŋuluko gwenywe.”
105.12: Ni baali ni bahiiri batono, ni bali badiidiri, era ni bali bawuli mu hyalo ehyo,
105.13: batiina ŋano ni naŋala mu mawanga, ohuŋwa mu wahabaha buno ni nobula.
105.14: Sigaleha muutu yesiyesi hubanyigirisa era bagima gahayula abahabaha.
105.15: Nʼaloma ati, “Mutaŋamba hu baatu bange, aba najuhaho amafuta, simukosanga banaabbi bange.”
105.16: Gaŋindiha enjala hu hyalo ehyo, ngʼemere yaawe yosiyosi yiŋwaŋo.
105.17: Gatuma omuutu ohubatangiriramo, Yosefu oyu batunda hyʼomwidu.
105.18: Balumya amagulu gage ni bamusidiha nʼenjegere, bamusidiha ehyoma mu mamiro,
105.19: ohwola olu ebyo ebi galomaho byolerera. Ehibono hya Musengwa hyahahasa ti gaali mutuufu.
105.20: Habaha wʼe Misiri gatumisa nga bamusitula, omuŋugi gamulehula.
105.21: Gamuŋa obuhulu hu baatu babe, gamuŋambya ohulabirira ebibye byosibyosi,
105.22: alaabbire abahungu babe ngʼolu gaali ni genda era aŋenga abasaaja bahulu amagesi.
105.23: Ngʼaŋo Yisirayiri atiina e Misiri, nga Yakobbo gesenga mu hyalo hyʼe Haamu.
105.24: Musengwa galeetera abaatu babe ohusaala bugali, gabaŋa amaani ohusinga abalabe baawe.
105.25: Galeetera emyoyo jʼAbamisiri ohucaawa abaatu babe, ohulya mu baŋeeresa babe oluhwe.
105.26: Ngʼatuma Musa omuŋeeresa wuwe, ni Alooni abaatu abagatobola.
105.27: Baahola obubonero wuwe oweŋunjisa mu Bamisiri, ebyamaliholiho bibye mu hyalo hyʼe Haamu.
105.28: Musengwa gaŋindiha ehiirema ngʼaleetera ehyalo ohumaliŋa aye Abamisiri bajeema ohuŋuliririsa ebibono bibye.
105.29: Gafuula amaaji gaawe ohuba mafugi, hyaleetera enyeeni jaawe ohufa.
105.30: Ehyalo hyawe hyejula amahere, agejula nomu bisenge bya baŋugi baawe.
105.31: Musengwa ni gaŋa ehiragiro esoŋera nʼobugujwi byamalaala egwanga lyawe lyosiryosi.
105.32: Gafuula efula yaba mabaale, nʼohumyasa hwaba mu hyalo hyawe.
105.33: Gasihiirisa emizabbibbu nʼemitiini jaawe, gabbwagabbwaga emisaala josijosi mu gwanga lyawe.
105.34: Galoma huloma ngʼesige jiija, amadeede agatabaliha.
105.35: Galya hiisi himera hyosihyosi mu gwanga lyawe, nga galya emere yaawe yosiyosi.
105.36: Ngʼasihiirisa abasaani baawe abadaayi bosibosi mu gwanga lyawe, abo ababeeta amaseere.
105.37: Ngʼotusaayo Abayisirayiri ni babbeedire efeeza nʼezaabbu, era ŋaŋuma hu baatu babe owasigala enyuma.
105.38: Abamisiri basangaala abaatu abo ni baŋwa mu gwanga lyawe, olwohuba Abayisirayiri baali babaleteye olusisimo.
105.39: Musengwa ganjulusa ehireri ohubawiiha, nʼomuliro ohubaŋa enjase mu wiire.
105.40: Ni bamusunga gabaŋa esindu era ngʼabaŋa emigaati ohuŋwa mwigulu.
105.41: Gegulaŋo ebaale ngʼamaaji gajofumuha gahuluhuta mu lulafu hyʼolwabi.
105.42: Gahebulira ehisuubiso hihye ehyawufu ehi gaaŋa Yibbulayimu omuŋeeresa wuwe.
105.43: Gatusayo abaatu babe ni bemba nʼesangaalo, ababe abagatobola.
105.44: Gabaŋa ehyalo hya mawanga, basikira ebyo ebi bandi bafululuhanira,
105.45: basobole ohuŋambanga ebiragiro bibye, era bahuumenga amagambi gage. Mujumirye Musengwa .

106.1: Mujumirye Musengwa . Mweyaase Musengwa olwohuba mulaŋi era ohwenda huhwe hwʼemirembe nʼemirembe.
106.2: Njʼani asobola ohuloma hu byosibyosi ebi Musengwa ahola, oba gamujumirya ehihena?
106.3: Besiimire abo abatehubbira, abahola ebiruŋamu hiisi hiseera.
106.4: Musengwa kebulirenga nʼoyeeda abaatu babo, keesi mbe mu abo aba onunula,
106.5: nahasunaaho omugabo ogwa baatu babo, nahasangaalira ŋalala nʼegwanga liryo, keesi mbegaateho ni bahujumirya.
106.6: Efe hwabbenga hyʼabasehulu beefe, hwahola ebibi era hwebisya mu ngeri etasaana.
106.7: Abasehulu beefe ni baali e Misiri sibategeera ebyamaliholiho bibyo, sibahebulira hwenda huhwo eyi bali era nga bajeema ni boola hu nyanja, Enyanja Enando.
106.8: Aye gabanoŋola hu lwʼesiina lirye ni genda ohulaga obuŋangi wuwe owʼamaani.
106.9: Galagira Enyanja Enando yomeera ngʼab atangirira oti hani hu woomu, hyʼababita mu lulafu.
106.10: Gabanoŋola ohuŋwa mu buŋangi wʼabo abaali ni baabacaawa, gabanunula ohuŋwa mu balabe.
106.11: Amaaji gamira abalabe baawe, ŋaŋuma wayire mulala owaŋona.
106.12: Ngʼaŋo bafugiirira ebi gaali nʼabasuubihiise, nga bemba ni bamujumirya.
106.13: Aye sibalwa hwibirira ebi gaahola, era sibahuuma hubona ehi Hatonda gaali nʼategehire ohuhola.
106.14: Ni baali mu lulafu baholanga ebi baŋembangaho, era mu lulafu baahema Hatonda.
106.15: Kale gabaŋa ebi bamusunga, aye gabataho endwaye eyʼehiŋindo.
106.16: Ni baali mu kambi, esaalwa yabaŋamba olwa Musa ni Alooni oyu Musengwa gafuula mwawufu.
106.17: Eroba lyasama lyamira Dasani, lyawiiha hu Abbiraamu nʼabajeemu bahye.
106.18: Omuliro gwiha mu baloobera baawe gwasihiirisa abahosi bʼebibi.
106.19: Ni baali e Horebbu basanuusa ezaabbu, babbotamo enyana yʼeŋombe, nga bayijumirya.
106.20: Mu hifo hyʼohuŋa Hatonda eŋono, baaliŋa nyana yʼeŋombe eyaaya enyaasi.
106.21: Beebirira Hatonda owabanunula, owaali nʼaholire ebyamaliholiho e Misiri,
106.22: ebyamaliholiho mu hyalo hyʼe Haamu, ebitiisa hu Enyanja Enando.
106.23: Ngʼaŋo aloma ati aja hubasihiirisa ne Musa omutobole wuwe gegayirira Hatonda ohutabasihiirisa olwʼehiruŋi hihye.
106.24: Nga bajerega ehyalo ehisangaasa, sibafugiirira mu ehi gabasuubisa.
106.25: Ni baali mu weema jaawe bemulugunya, era sibagondera Musengwa .
106.26: Olwʼehyo, gaberayirira ati baja hufiira mu lulafu,
106.27: aja huleetera abejuhulu baawe ohusasaanira mu mawanga.
106.28: Abaatu ba Hatonda ni boola e Pewori, boosi batandiiha ohujumirya Bbaali era balya ebi baŋongeranga abahatonda abaŋuma bulamu.
106.29: Baleetera Musengwa ohuluŋa olwʼebikolwa byawe ebibi, ngʼaŋo haŋupuli abagwamo.
106.30: Ne Fenekaasi gaŋwayo gaboneresa abo ababbenga, ngʼaŋo haŋupuli ahoma aŋo.
106.31: Ehyo hyamuleetera ohumubala ohuba omugwalaafu emirembe nʼemirembe.
106.32: Hu sobere jʼe Meribba, baleetera Musengwa ohubaluŋira, nga baleetera Musa ebigosi ebyʼamaani,
106.33: olwohuba baleetera Musa ohuluŋa, era ngʼaloma atyo atyo.
106.34: Sibasihiirisa baatu abamawanga agandi ago ngʼolu Musengwa gabalagira,
106.35: aye bamenya ŋalala nʼamawanga ago, era nga baŋamba esambo jaawe embi.
106.37: Baŋongayo abaana baawe, abaseere nʼabahaana eyiri emisambwa.
106.38: Bajuha amafugi gʼabaatu abaali ni baŋumaho musango, batugumbula abaana baawe abaseere nʼabahaana aba baŋongayo eyiri ebibbote byʼe Kanani. Ehyo hyaleetera ehyalo ohubiiŋa.
106.39: Beyonoona olwʼebikolwa byawe, olwʼebi baahola ni bajumirya ebibbote, waali buhwedi mu moni ja Hatonda.
106.40: Olwʼehyo, Musengwa galuŋira abaatu babe era gabesinya.
106.41: Gabaŋayo mu buŋangi wʼamawanga agandi era nga abalabe baawe babaŋuga.
106.42: Abalabe baawe babanyigirisa era babaŋugira erala nʼamaani.
106.43: Emirundi mingi gabanunulanga aye baali bajeemu era bagoteranga mu bibi byawe.
106.44: Ne gabona ohubonaabona hwawe era nga aŋulira ohulira hwawe.
106.45: Hu lwawe gahebulira endagaano yiye, era olwʼohwenda huhwe ohwʼamaani, gabasoniŋa nasabahangavula.
106.46: Galeetera abaali ni babanyigirisa ohubaŋambira ehisa.
106.47: Tunoŋole Musengwa Hatonda weefe, otuhumbaanie ohuŋwa mu mawanga hwahahweyaasanga ewe omwawufu, hwahejaganga mu huhujumirya.
106.48: Aŋeewe eŋono Musengwa Hatonda wa Yisirayiri emirembe nʼemirembe. Leha abaatu bosibosi balome baati, “Amiina.” Mujumirye Musengwa .

107.1: Mweyaase Musengwa olwohuba mulaŋi, ohwenda huhwe hwʼemirembe nʼemirembe.
107.2: Leha aba Musengwa ganunula balome baatyo, abo aba ganunula ohuŋwa mu balabe.
107.3: Abo abagatusa ohuŋwa mu mawanga, ohuŋwa e buŋwalyuba nʼe bugwalyuba, ohuŋwa mu maniino nomu mehiriro.
107.4: Abandi batangatangira mu lulafu era sibabona ngira eyitiina mu hibuga omwohumenya.
107.5: Enjala nʼenduŋo byabaluma era baŋwamo esuubi.
107.6: Ngʼaŋo beriririra Musengwa mu bigosi byawe era ngʼabanunula mu hunyigirisiwa ohu baalimo.
107.7: Gabatangirira mu ngira enuŋamu eyitiina mu hibuga ehyʼohumenyamo.
107.8: Leha beyaase Musengwa olwohuba ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu nʼolwebyamaliholiho bibye ebi aholera abaatu.
107.9: Hiri hiityo olwohuba aba enduŋo eruma abaŋa ehyohunywa era aba enjala eruma abaŋa ebiraŋi.
107.10: Abandi baali baŋutaliiye mu hiirema, ni beboŋeeye mu hubonaabona, era aba basidihire enjegere ejʼebyoma,
107.11: olwohuba baali bajemeeye ebiragiro bya Hatonda Owaŋamugulu Obugali era ni banyooma ebi abalaabbira.
107.12: Gaabaŋwa olwʼohufululuhana ohwʼamaani, befuumulirangaŋo eminyiha aye nga ŋaŋuma abayeeda.
107.13: Ngʼaŋo beriririra Musengwa mu bigosi byawe era ngʼabanunula mu hunyigirisiwa ohu baalimo.
107.14: Ngʼabatusa mu hiirema nomu hufa, nga ahapujula enjegere ejaali ni jibaboŋire.
107.15: Leha beyaase Musengwa olwohuba ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu nʼolwebyamaliholiho bibye ebi aholera abaatu.
107.16: Hiri hiityo olwohuba abbwagabbwaga enjigi ejʼebihomo era gabotojola emitalimbwa.
107.17: Balala hu bo bafuuha baŋubeebe olwʼebibi byawe, era babonaabona olwʼohubbenga hwawe.
107.18: Emyoyo jaawe nga jenyinyalya ebyʼohulya byosibyosi, era baali huupi hufa.
107.19: Ngʼaŋo beriririra Musengwa mu bigosi byawe era ngʼabanunula mu hunyigirisiwa ohu baalimo.
107.20: Galagira hulagira baŋona, gabanunula ohuŋwa emagombe.
107.21: Leha beyaase Musengwa olwohuba ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu nʼolwebyamaliholiho bibye ebi aholera abaatu.
107.22: Leha baŋeyo eŋongo ni beyaasa, era bembe nʼesangaalo.
107.23: Abandi hu bo basabaalira mu meeri hu nyanja baali basubuuzi ni baholera hu gayanja agabbala.
107.24: Baabona ebi Musengwa ahola, ebyamaliholiho hu gayanja agabbala.
107.25: Galagira omuyaga gwenyoha, gwenyosa amayengo hu nyanja.
107.26: Bedunda ŋamugulu mu bbanga nga bahena beeha ŋaasi mu njuho, mu tiisa eyʼamaani abagimbi bʼemeeri baŋwamo esuubi.
107.27: Olumbuuju lwabaŋamba era batagala hyʼabameesi, baŋwamo ahategeera.
107.28: Ngʼaŋo beriririra Musengwa mu bigosi byawe era ngʼabanunula mu hunyigirisiwa ohu baalimo.
107.29: Gehahania omuyaga era amayengo hu nyanja gabunjeera.
107.30: Basangaala enyanja ni yabunjeera, nga abatangirira boola hu mwalo omulaŋi.
107.31: Leha beyaase Musengwa olwohuba ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu nʼolwebyamaliholiho bibye ebi aholera abaatu.
107.32: Leha balangirire obubbala wuwe mu lwijuuye lwʼabaatu era bamujumirye mu luhumbaano lwʼabatangirisi.
107.33: Gafuula enjabi lulafu, amaaji aŋa gahuluhutiranga ŋafuuha ŋoomu.
107.34: Ehyalo ehigimu gahifuula ehyʼoluunyu, olwʼebibi byʼabo abamenyangamo.
107.35: Gafuula olulafu bidiba byʼamaaji, nʼehyalo ehyoomu gahifuula esulo ejihuluhuta amaaji.
107.36: Omwo njʼomugata abayala era batongolamo ehibuga omu baamenya.
107.37: Bamwa obumo mu bisambu, era nga bahoma emizabbibbu, omwaŋwa egesa eryʼamaani.
107.38: Gabaŋa ekabi baala bugali weene era sigaleha byayo byawe huhendeera.
107.39: Ngʼaŋo bahendeera obungi era babatusaaho obuŋangi ohunyigirisiwa nʼendibo nʼohubonaabona byabagwira.
107.40: Oyo agima abahungu babajerega, gabaleetera ohutangatangira mu lulafu.
107.41: Aye gaŋonia abagadi gabatusa mu hubonaabona hwawe era gabaleetera ohusalagana hyʼebidooli byʼetaama.
107.42: Abagwalaafu babibona nga basaŋalya ne abahosi bʼebibi bosibosi bagawiihaho.
107.43: Hiisi ali nʼamagesi, ate omwoyo hu biitu ebyo, baŋeege hu hwenda hwa Musengwa ohubitiirifu.

108.1: Olwʼewe Hatonda, ndi mugumu bugali, nja hwemba nʼomwoyo gwange gwosigwosi.
108.2: Nja hwinyoha pambe ogutongooli nʼahatongooli, nja husisimuha pwipwipwi nembe.
108.3: O Musengwa , nja huhweyaasanga ni ndi mu baatu abangi, nja huhujumiryanga ni ndi mu mawanga.
108.4: Hiri hiityo olwohuba ohwenda huhwo hubitiirifu huhiraho egulu, owesigwa wuwo bubitiirifu ohwola hu bireri.
108.5: O Hatonda, laga etendo liryo hiisi ŋaatu mwigulu era leha eŋono liryo libe hu hyalo hyosihyosi.
108.6: Twanuhule otununule nʼotambisa omuhono gugwo omulungi, oŋonie abo aba wenda.
108.7: Hatonda nʼali mu hifo hihye ehyawufu gasuubisa ati, “Nja husalamo mu hibuga Sekemu era ngabe ehiiho hyʼe Sukosi mu butundutundu.
108.8: Ehyalo hyʼe Giliyaadi hyange nehya Manase hyosi hyange. Ehyalo hyʼEfulayimu njʼekofiira yange eyʼohwambala mu lutalo, ehyalo hya Yuda njʼesimbo yange eyʼobuŋugi.
108.9: Ehyalo hyʼe Mowaabbu njʼebbaafu omu saabira. Ehyalo hyʼEdomu pohuuta amagulu. Abafirisuuti baŋeega baati basobola ohupangula?”
108.10: Njʼani aja huupira mu hibuga ehyʼamaani? Njʼani aja hutangirira ohutiina mu Edomu?
108.11: Hatonda, sindiiwe otuhubbire omugongo, era otenda hutiina nʼeŋe lyefe mu lutalo?
108.12: Tuŋe obuyeedi ohuŋangula abalabe. Hiri hiityo olwohuba obuyeedi wʼomuutu obuutu buŋuma mahulu.
108.13: Hatonda nʼali hu lubega lwefe huja huŋangula era aja hutyakirira abalabe beefe.

109.1: Hatonda wange oyu njumirya, otaŋoleera huŋoleera,
109.2: olwohuba abahosi bʼebibi nʼabadulingi bandomaho ebyakalebule.
109.3: Bandomaho ebibono ebyobucaayi era banumba ni ŋaŋuma ehi kolire.
109.4: Bapayirisa wayire ese mbenda era mbasabira.
109.5: Mu biraŋi ebi kola basasulamo bibi, era mu muhago basasulamo bucaayi.
109.6: Musuneyo omuutu omuhosi wʼebibi amuŋayirise, leha mulala hu balabe babe amulumirise.
109.7: Ni bamuŋira mu mbuga leha bamusalire omusango era leha ebi asaba bibe bibi byereere.
109.8: Leha obulamu wuwe owohu hyalo huno wube wuupi, era ehifo hihye bahiŋe omuutu owundi.
109.9: Abaana babe bafuuhe bafuubbi, nʼomuhasi wuwe afuuhe namwandu.
109.10: Abaana babe balerengenga ni basungirisa era bababbinge mu magunda gaawe.
109.11: Amubanja anyage byosibyosi ebi ali nabyo, abagwira banyage byosibyosi ebi gaholerera.
109.12: Ŋaŋume amuŋambira ehisa wayire ohulabirira abafuubbi aba galeha.
109.13: Olulyo lulwe lwosirwosi lusihiirihe eŋume amuhebulira mu mulembe ogugobolaho.
109.14: Leha Musengwa ahebulire ebibi byʼabasehulu babe era eŋume asoniŋa ehibi hya nyina.
109.15: Leha Musengwa ahebulirenga ebibi byawe hiisi hiseera, ko ŋaŋume amuhebulira hu hyalo
109.16: olwohuba gaŋuma hisa, gahiyaania abagadi nʼabaali mu wetaavu, nʼabaŋuma suubi gabaleetera ohufa.
109.17: Gaŋomerwanga ohuŋwaba abandi, leha bimugobolere. Sigendesanga bahye ekabi, era leha yeesi aŋume hiraŋi.
109.18: Ohuŋwaba gahufuula hyambalo hihye, hwamwingira mu mubiri hyʼamaaji, hwamwingira hyʼamafuta mu magumba.
109.19: Leha ebiŋwabo bimweswanigirise hyʼehyambalo, bibe hyʼomusibiro ni bimuhadire emirembe nʼemirembe.
109.20: Musengwa abasasule atyo abo abapayirisa, abo abandomaho ebibi.
109.21: Aye Musengwa Omwene Buŋangi, njeede ngʼolu wasuubisa olwohuba oli mulaŋi era wunyenda.
109.22: Ndi mugadi era ndi mu wetaavu era omwoyo gwange guliho amabbwa.
109.23: Ndi hugota hyʼehisisigo hyʼegulo basambulya hyʼesige.
109.24: Ekumbo jange jigondire olwʼohutalya, nondire sigaaye magumba.
109.25: Ndi duho eyiri abo abapayirisa, ni bambona basugusa emitwe jaawe.
109.26: Njeede Musengwa Hatonda wange noŋole olwʼohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu.
109.27: Leha bategeere baati Musengwa ndiiwe owuponisye.
109.28: Basobola ohuŋwaba, aye ewe waapa ekabi ni banumba, leha baswale aye ese omuŋeeresa wuwo saŋalye.
109.29: Abapayirisa bambale ehiswalo era esoni jibambale hyʼehyambalo.
109.30: Nja hweyaase Musengwa nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani, nja humujumirya mu lwijuuye
109.31: olwohuba abeera abagadi era abaŋonia abo ababasalira ogwʼohufa.

110.1: Musengwa galoma Musengwa yange ati, “Yiihala ni wundireene hu lubega olwʼomuhono gwange omulungi, ohwola olu ndifuula abasigu babo ekookolo eyʼohutaho amagulu gago.”
110.2: Musengwa aja hugalamya obuŋugi wuwo ohuŋwa e Sayuuni, era oja huŋuga abalabe babo.
110.3: Hu ludaalo olwʼolutalo, abasirikale babo balyeŋaayo ohusoola nʼomwoyo mulala. Ngʼolu obona olume olwomu mugamba, abavubuka babo baliija baatyo hu lusozi lulwo olwawufu.
110.4: Musengwa galayira era salicuusa biŋeego bibye olu gahulayirira ati, “Oli musengi emirembe nʼemirembe hya Melukezedeki.”
110.5: Musengwa ali hu luuyi lwʼomuhono gugwo omulungi, nʼaliruŋa, alibulungula abahabaha.
110.6: Alisalira amawanga omusango, gawunga emungo jʼemirambo alisihiirisa abaŋugi mu hyalo hyosihyosi.
110.7: Aye omwene alinywa amaaji ohuŋwa mu sobere eyohu tulo wʼengira, nʼahenire ohuŋangula abalabe babe.

111.1: Mujumirye Musengwa . Nja hweyaasa Musengwa nʼomwoyo gwange gwosigwosi mu luhumbaano lwʼabagwalaafu nomu lwijuuye lwʼabaatu.
111.2: Musengwa ahola ebyʼamaani, abo bosibosi ababisangaalira babiŋeegaho.
111.3: Ebi ahola byosibyosi biraga eŋono nʼobuŋangi wuwe era mulaŋi emirembe nʼemirembe.
111.4: Musengwa satuleha hwibirira byamaliholiho bibye, ali nʼehyere era nʼehisa.
111.5: Abamutya abaŋa ebyohulya, era ahebulira endagaano yiye emirembe nʼemirembe.
111.6: Alagire abaatu babe obuŋangi mu ebi ahola, nʼabaŋa ehyalo hyʼamawanga agandi.
111.7: Mwesigwa era sigehubbira mu byosibyosi ebi ahola, ebiragiro bibye byesigiha.
111.8: Sibicuuhacuuha emirembe nʼemirembe, gabitaŋo mu butuufu nʼamazima.
111.9: Ganunula abaatu babe gahola endagaano yiye, endagaano enjawufu, eyʼemirembe nʼemirembe. Esiina lirye lyawufu era lyʼeŋono.
111.10: Ohutya Musengwa njʼetandiha yʼamagesi. Bosibosi abahola ebi alagira, bali nʼobutegeefu. Abaatu basaana bamujumiryenga emirembe nʼemirembe.

112.1: Mujumirye Musengwa ! Ali nʼekabi oyo atya Musengwa , asangaalira bugali ebiragiro bibye.
112.2: Abaana babe banaabenga bʼamaani hu hyalo huno. Olulyo lyʼomugwalaafu luja husuna ekabi.
112.3: Obusuni nʼobuŋinda binabenga mu mago gage era ebiraŋi ebi bahola bija hubaaŋo emirembe nʼemirembe.
112.4: Enjase yaduhira ahola ebiruŋamu wayire mu hiirema, omuutu oyo ali nʼehisa nʼehyere ko nʼobugwalaafu.
112.5: Gesiimire oyo omugabi era aŋola aŋaŋuma humuŋalirisa era omwesigwa mu hiisi ehi ahola.
112.6: Mu butuufu oweene ŋaŋuma ehija humuteetemya, omuutu omugwalaafu, baja humuhebulira emirembe nʼemirembe.
112.7: Saaja hutya huŋulira maŋuliro amabi, olwohuba gesiga Musengwa ohumulabirira.
112.8: Omwoyo gugwe mugumu, saaja hutya aja huheneresa nʼaŋanguuye abalabe babe.
112.9: Gagabira abagadi nʼehyere era balihebulira ehyere hihye emirembe nʼemirembe. Era aja huba wʼamaani oyu baatu baŋa eŋono.
112.10: Ebyo abahosi bʼebibi ni babona, bibaleetera ohuluŋa era beninala. Ohuŋemba hwʼomuhosi wʼebibi sihuja hwolerera.

113.1: Mujumirye Musengwa . Mujumirye Musengwa , enywe abaŋeeresa babe, Mujumirye Musengwa .
113.2: Leha Mujumirye Musengwa hatyane era emirembe nʼemirembe.
113.3: Ohuŋwa eryuba eyi liŋwera ohwola eyi ligwira mu maaji, abaatu bajumiryenga Musengwa .
113.4: Musengwa aŋuga amawanga gosigosi, eŋono lirye lyaŋamugulu bugali ohuhiraho egulu.
113.5: Eŋuma ali hya Musengwa Hatonda weefe, oyo owihaaye hu tebe eyʼobuŋugi ŋamugulu.
113.6: Nʼali eyo ahotama gahubba emoni hu ebiri hwigulu nohu hyalo.
113.7: Atusa abagadi mu fuuhe era ayeeda abali mu wetaavu,
113.8: gabeehasa ŋalala nʼabahombe, abahombe abaŋuga abaatu babe.
113.9: Aŋamba omuhasi omugumba gamwihasa mu bufumbo era gamuŋa nʼolusaaye. Mujumirye Musengwa .

114.1: Abayisirayiri ni baŋwa e Misiri, enyumba ya Yakobbo ohuŋwa mu baatu abaloma olulimi olwenjabulo,
114.2: ehyalo hya Yuda hyafuuha hifo hya Musengwa ehyawufu, Yisirayiri abaatu babe.
114.3: Ni boola hu nyanja Enando, amaaji gababona gabaduluma. Amaaji gomu lwabi Yoludaani, gagamayo enyuma.
114.4: Esozi jamaduha hyʼetaama emiigu, eŋingi jamaduha hyʼenyana jʼetaama.
114.5: Lwahiina nyanja ewe womeera? Lwahiina ewe Yoludaani wabaŋwereŋo wagamayo enyuma?
114.6: Lwahiina enywe esozi mwamaduha hyʼetaama emiigu? Lwahiina enywe eŋingi mwamaduha hyʼenyana jʼetaama?
114.7: Ewe ehyalo teetema olwa Musengwa, olwa Hatonda wa Yakobbo,
114.8: owafuula olwanda hidiba hyʼamaaji, ebaale egumu galifuula sulo jʼamaaji.

115.1: Sindiife, Musengwa , sindiife aye ewe oŋeewe eŋono, olwʼohwenda ohubitiirifu nʼowesigwa wuwo.
115.2: Lwahiina amawanga gebuusa gaati, “Hatonda waawe ali ŋeena?”
115.3: Hatonda weefe ali mwigulu, era ahola hiisi ehimusangaasa.
115.4: Aye ebi bajumirya biwumbe ebi bahola mu feeza nʼezaabbu, era abaatu njʼababibbota nʼemihono jaawe.
115.5: Biri nʼeminwa aye sibiroma, biri nʼemoni aye sibibona.
115.6: Biri nʼamatwi aye sibiŋulira, biri nʼesuulu aye sibiŋunyira.
115.7: Biri nʼengalo aye sibiŋamba, biri nʼamagulu aye sibigenda nʼohutusa ejanjaasi sibitusa.
115.8: Ababiwumba balifaanana hya nibyo, hiityo pohiri nʼeyiri abo bosibosi ababitamo owesige.
115.9: Ne enywe enyumba ya Yisirayiri, mwesige Musengwa , njʼomuyeedi era njʼengabo yenywe.
115.10: Enywe abomu nyumba ya Alooni, mwesige Musengwa njʼomuyeedi era njʼengabo yenywe.
115.11: Enywe abatya Musengwa mumwesige, njʼomuyeedi era njʼengabo yenywe.
115.12: Musengwa atuhebulira era aja hutuŋa ekabi. Aja huŋa Abayisirayiri ekabi era aja huŋa abomu nyumba ya Alooni ekabi.
115.13: Musengwa aja huŋa hiisi muutu amutya ekabi, haabe mwegingihiriri oba wa ŋaasi.
115.14: Musengwa geyongere ohuhwasa, ewe nʼabaana babo.
115.15: Musengwa abaŋe ekabi, owatonda egulu nʼehyalo.
115.16: Egulu eryaŋamugulu eweene lya Musengwa aye ehyalo gaahiŋa abaatu.
115.17: Abafu sibajumirya Musengwa abo abatiina emagombe eyi baba ni baŋoleeye.
115.18: Aye efe abalamu ndiife abajumirya Musengwa , ohuŋwa hatyane ohwola emirembe nʼemirembe. Musengwa gebasiwe.

116.1: Nenda Musengwa olwohuba aŋulira ejanjaasi lyange, gaŋulira ni namweriririra ohupambira ehisa.
116.2: Era olwohuba gategera ohutwi, nja humulombanga mu bulamu wange wosiwosi.
116.3: Ohufa hwandumba obulumi owʼemagombe wanjijira, ebigosi nʼobutahi byakenamo amaani.
116.4: Ngʼaŋo neŋunderera Musengwa ti, “O Musengwa ponie!”
116.5: Musengwa ali nʼehisa era mulaŋi, Hatonda weefe gejuuye ohusaasira.
116.6: Musengwa ahuuma abaŋuma buyeedi, gaaponia ni naali mu bigosi.
116.7: Omwoyo gwange gwihahene, olwohuba Musengwa mulaŋi eyi oli.
116.8: O Musengwa , onunuuye obulamu wange ohuŋwa mu hufa, emoni jange ohuŋwa mu masiga, amagulu gange ohutaterera,
116.9: ko ngendenga mu moni ja Musengwa mu hyalo hyʼabalamu.
116.10: Nafugiirira olwʼehyo naloma ti, “Mbweneweene luhulu lwene!”
116.11: Era olwʼobulumi obu nalimo naloma ti, “Abaatu bosibosi badulingi!”
116.12: Hiina ehi panga ohusasula Musengwa , olwʼebiraŋi byosibyosi ebi gakoleeye?
116.13: Nja huŋira omwenge ogwomu mizabbibbu peyo eŋongo ohweyaasa Musengwa olwʼohunoŋola.
116.14: Nja hwoheresa ebi neeyama mu moni ja Musengwa mu lwijuuye lwʼabaatu babo.
116.15: Ohufa hwʼomuutu omugwalaafu hwamuŋendo bugali mu moni ja Musengwa .
116.16: O Musengwa , mu butuufu weene ndi muŋeeresa wuwo, ndi muŋeeresa wuwo era omusaani wʼomuhasi omwidu wuwo, wuponisye ohuŋwa mu njegere.
116.17: Nja huhuŋa eŋongo ni kweyaasa era Musengwa nja huhweŋunderera.
116.18: Nja hwoheresa ebi neeyama mu moni ja Musengwa , mu lwijuuye lwʼabaatu babo,
116.19: mu lunya lwʼe nyumba ya Musengwa, mu Yerusaalemu. Mujumirye Musengwa .

117.1: Mujumirye Musengwa , enywe amawanga gosigosi, enywe abaatu mwesimwesi, mumugulumisenga.
117.2: Ehyo hiri hiityo olwohuba atwenda bugali, era owesigwa wuwe wʼemirembe nʼemirembe. Mujumirye Musengwa .

118.1: Mweyaase Musengwa olwohuba mulaŋi, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
118.2: Leha Abayisirayiri balome baati, “Ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.”
118.3: Leha abomu lulyo lwa Alooni balome baati, “Ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.”
118.4: Leha abo abatya Musengwa balome baati, “Ohwenda huhwe hwʼemirembe nʼemirembe.”
118.5: Ni naali mu hanyigo, neriririra Musengwa , gangobolamo, ganunula.
118.6: Musengwa ali ni neese, sinja hutya. Omuutu obuutu aŋanga hukola hi?
118.7: Musengwa ali ni neese era njʼowunjeeda, nja hubona Hatonda naŋangula abalabe bange.
118.8: Hiraŋi ohwesiga Musengwa , ohuhira ohwesiga omuutu obuutu.
118.9: Hiraŋi ohwesiga Musengwa ohuhira ohwesiga abahombe.
118.10: Amawanga gosigosi ganeswanigirisa aye nabaŋangula hu lwʼamaani ga Musengwa .
118.11: Baneswanigirisa enjuyi josijosi aye nabaŋangula hu lwʼamaani ga Musengwa .
118.12: Banjabuluhiraho hyʼenjuhi ne basihiiriha oti hani masanja aga badanyireho omuliro, aye nabaŋangula hu lwʼamaani ga Musengwa .
118.13: Baasindiha hinyumanyuma era naali huupi hwehubbiraŋo aye Musengwa ganjeeda.
118.14: Musengwa njʼamaani gange era njʼolwembo lwange era njʼomunoŋosi wange.
118.15: Enyembo ejʼesangaalo nʼobuŋangusi jiŋwera mu weema jʼabagwalaafu ni baloma baati, “ Musengwa aholire ebyʼamaani.
118.16: Amaani ga Musengwa gatuleteeye ohuŋangula era Musengwa oyo aholire ebyʼamaani.”
118.17: Sinja hufa ohutusaho nja husigala ni ndi mulamu era ndomere abaatu ebi Musengwa aholire.
118.18: Musengwa gambonerehiise bugali aye sigandehe hufa.
118.19: Munjigulireŋo emiryango ja Yekaalu omu bagwalaafu bengirira, ningire neyaase Musengwa .
118.20: Guno njʼomulyango gwa Musengwa omu bagwalaafu bengirira.
118.21: Nahweyaasenga olwohuba wangobolamo era ofuuhire wunoŋosi wange.
118.22: Ebaale eri abatongoli baatala baati siraŋi njʼeryafuuha ehulu eryʼomugaso.
118.23: Hino Musengwa njʼowahihola, era hyesiimisa ohubona.
118.24: Luno njʼoludaalo olu Musengwa atuŋaaye, leha husangaale era hulusaŋalihisyemo.
118.25: O Musengwa , tunoŋole. O Musengwa , tuyeede huŋangule.
118.26: Ali nʼekabi oyo owuujira mu siina lya Musengwa . Huja huhujumirya ni huli mu nyumba ya Musengwa .
118.27: Musengwa nje Hatonda, atumulihisiiye enjase yiye. Huhujumirya ni huŋambire esaga jʼemihindu, ni hutiina ohwola hu hituuti.
118.28: Ndiiwe Hatonda wange era nahweyaasenga. Ndiiwe Hatonda wange, nahuŋenga eŋono.
118.29: Mweyaase Musengwa olwohuba mulaŋi, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.

119.1: Bali nʼekabi abo abahola ebiraŋi abagondera amagambi ga Musengwa .
119.2: Bali nʼekabi abo abahuuma ebiragiro bibye, era bamwendula nʼomwoyo gwawe gwosigwosi.
119.3: Era sibahola hibi bagendera mu magira gage.
119.4: O Musengwa , watuŋa amagambi gago era watulagira ohugagonderanga.
119.6: Naŋeegenga hu biragiro bibyo ehyo hyahandeetera ohutaswala.
119.7: Nja huhujumirya nʼomwoyo ogwʼamazima, ni neega esala yiyo eyʼemisango nʼotehubbira.
119.8: Nja hugonderanga ebiragiro bibyo, otakubba mugongo.
119.9: Omuvubuka asobola atye ohwehuuma ko asobole ohweŋala ohuhola ehibi? Gehuuma nʼagondera ehibono hihyo.
119.10: Kwendula nʼomwoyo gwange gwosigwosi, otandeha huŋaba ohuŋwa hu biragiro bibyo.
119.11: Kwehire ehibono hihyo mu mwoyo gwange, ko tabbenga mu moni jijo.
119.12: O Musengwa , oŋeewe eŋono, somese ebiragiro bibyo.
119.13: Nʼejanjaasi eryaŋamugulu ndoma hu ebyo byosibyosi ebi watulabbira.
119.14: Hisangaasa ohugondera ebiragiro bibyo ngʼolu muutu asangaala olwʼobuŋinda obungi.
119.15: Omwoyo gwange guŋeega hu biragiro bibyo era nehenenya ebi wusomesa.
119.16: Sangaalira ebiragiro bibyo, sinjahwerabira ehibono hihyo.
119.17: Bisya bulaŋi omuŋeeresa wuwo, ko mbeŋo mulamu, nja hugondera ehibono hihyo.
119.18: Njigule emoni jange nahabona ebyeŋunjisa, ebiri mu magambi gago.
119.19: Ndi mulugendwa hu hyalo huno, otakweha biragiro bibyo.
119.20: Omwoyo gwange guŋemba hu magambi gago hiisi hiseera.
119.21: Ohangavula abehudumbasa, abaŋwabe era ababbaama baŋwa hu biragiro bibyo.
119.22: Otabaleha hunduha nʼohunyooma olwohuba nʼoheresa ebiragiro bibyo.
119.23: Wayire abatangirisi behala ŋalala bandomaho bubi, ese omuŋeeresa wuwo naŋembenga hu biragiro bibyo.
119.24: Ebiragiro bibyo njʼesangaalo lyange, era njʼebiipa ehyohuholeraho.
119.25: Obulamu wange buli huupi hutiina emayeera, ngobose bunyaaha ngʼolu wasuubisa.
119.26: Nebbwaga olwʼebibi ebi nahola byosibyosi, era wasaasira, somese ebiragiro bibyo.
119.27: Njeede nahategeera amagambi gago, sobole ohuŋembanga hu somesa yiyo eyeŋunjisa.
119.28: Omwoyo gwange gwejuuye enaku, ngalusemo amaani ngʼolu wasuubisa.
119.29: Kingirise tagendera mu magira amacaamu, pambire ehisa wusomese amagambi gago.
119.30: Salireeŋo ohubanga wʼamazima, era ebiŋeego byange mbitaaye hu magambi gago.
119.31: Kolera hu biragiro bibyo, olwʼehyo Musengwa otandeha huswala.
119.32: Nja hugondera ebiragiro bibyo olwohuba wunjeeda ohubitegeera.
119.33: O Musengwa , somese ohugondera amagambi gago, sobole ohugaholerangaho habuhyabuhya.
119.34: Njeede ohutegeera amagambi gago, hija hundeetera ohugagonderanga nʼomwoyo mulala.
119.35: Njeede ohugonderanga ebiragiro bibyo, olwohuba ehyo hindeetera esangaalo.
119.36: Cuusa omwoyo gwange guŋembenga hu biragiro bibyo, sosi ohululuhanira obuŋinda.
119.37: Kuume ohutaŋembanga hu biitu ebiŋuma mugaso aye ohuume obulamu wange ngʼolu wasuubisa.
119.38: Yoheresa ebi wasuubisa omuŋeeresa wuwo ko abaatu bahahutya.
119.39: Tuseho eduho olwohuba nditya, ngʼendamula yiyo yʼamazima!
119.40: Nga peega bugali hu biragiro bibyo! Kusunga wuupe obulamu obunyaaha olwohuba oli mwawufu.
119.41: O Musengwa , ndage ohwenda huhwo era wunoŋole ngʼolu wasuubisa.
119.42: Nja hugobola mu abo abanduula olwohuba nesiga ehibono hihyo.
119.43: Otatusamo hibono hihyo olwohuba hyʼamazima era esuubi lyange liri mu magambi gago.
119.44: Nja hugonderanga amagambi gago emirembe nʼemirembe.
119.45: Nja huba mu dembe, olwohuba fubaho ohuŋamba ebiragiro bibyo.
119.46: Esoni sijija hupamba ohulomera abahabaha ebiŋamba hu magambi gago.
119.48: Ebiragiro bibyo mbiŋa eŋono era mbyenda nja huŋeeganga hu biragiro bibyo.
119.49: Hebulira ehi wasuubisa omuŋeeresa wuwo era ehyo hiipa esuubi.
119.50: Ehingumya mu hubonaabona hwange, cʼehino ti wasuubisa ohukuuma.
119.51: Abaatu abepaahapaaha basiiba banjeeja ni batalehera aye sinja huŋwa hu magambi gago.
119.52: O Musengwa , kebulira esala yiyo eyʼemisango era esala eyo yingumya.
119.53: Hipambya obusungu, ni mbona ababi ni babbwaga amagambi gago.
119.54: Amagambi gago njʼomulamwa gwʼolwembo lwange hiisi aŋa mba.
119.55: O Musengwa , mu wiire kuhebulira era nja huhuumanga amagambi gago.
119.56: Era eyo njʼebaaye ekola yange, ngondera ebiragiro bibyo.
119.57: O Musengwa , ndiiwe owange, nasuubisa ohugonderanga ebibono bibyo.
119.58: Kwegayiriiye nʼomwoyo gwange gwosigwosi, pambire ehisa ngʼolu wasuubisa.
119.59: Ni nehubba mu hifuba hu ngeri eyi ŋendamo, suubisa ohuhuuma ebiragiro bibyo.
119.60: Sinja husidihamo, nja hwanguŋa ohugondera ebiragiro bibyo.
119.61: Wayire abahosi bʼebibi bakaada emigoye, sinja hwibirira magambi gago.
119.62: Mu wiire ŋagati ninyoha nahweyaasa olwʼamagambi gago amawufu.
119.63: Ndi nʼomuhumba eyiri abo bosibosi abahutya abo abagondera ebiragiro bibyo.
119.64: O Musengwa , olagire baatu hu hyalo ohwenda huhwo, somese ebiragiro bibyo.
119.65: O Musengwa , holera omuŋeeresa wuwo ebiraŋi ngʼolu wasuubisa.
119.66: Pe amagesi nʼohutegeera, olwohuba nesiga ebiragiro bibyo.
119.67: Ni waali nʼohiiri humboneresa nabbama, aye ŋaahani ngondera ehibono hihyo.
119.68: Oli mulaŋi era ebi ohola biraŋi byereere, somese ebiragiro bibyo.
119.69: Wayire abepaahapaaha bapahire esiro aye kuuma ebiragiro bibyo nʼomwoyo mulala.
119.70: Emyoyo jaawe mihahanyafu era jasiriŋala, aye ese sangaalira amagambi gago.
119.71: Wahola bulaŋi ohupaamo endabusi, hyanjeeda ohwega amagambi gago.
119.72: Amagambi gago gamuŋendo bugali ohusinga eduuli lyʼezaabbu nʼefeeza.
119.73: Wamumba nʼengalo jijo olwʼehyo pe ohutegeera nahamanya ebiragiro bibyo.
119.74: Leha abo abahutya basangaale ni bambwene, olwohuba esuubi lyange liri mu hibono hihyo.
119.75: O Musengwa , manyire ti amagambi gago mawufu era wamboneresa olwohuba oli mwesigwa.
119.76: Leha ohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu hungumye, ngʼolu wasuubisa omuŋeeresa wuwo.
119.77: Pambire ehisa, sobole ohuba nʼobulamu, olwohuba sangaalira amagambi gago.
119.78: Leha abepaahapaaha baswale olwʼohunjolonga aŋaŋuma ehi kolire aye nja huŋeeganga hu biragiro bibyo.
119.79: Leha abo abahutya baaje eyi ndi, abo abategeera ebiragiro bibyo.
119.80: Njeede ohuŋamba ebiragiro bibyo, ko nahaŋona ohuswala.
119.81: O Musengwa , omwoyo gwange guŋemba hu bunoŋosi wuwo aye esuubi lyange liri mu hibono hihyo.
119.82: Emoni jange jidembire ohuhuumirira ohubona ehi wasuubisa, nebuusa ti, “Olinjeeda ŋaali?”
119.83: Wayire fuuhire hyʼesaŋu yʼehyanjo eyiŋuma mugaso, sinibiriranga biragiro bibyo.
119.84: Omuŋeeresa wuwo aja huhuumirira hwosa ŋe? Oligudya ŋaali abakiyaania?
119.85: Abepaahapaaha, sibagondera magambi gago, banjabiiye amaloŋo mbo ngwemo.
119.86: Ebiragiro bibyo byosibyosi mbyesiga. Njeede olwohuba abaatu bakiyaania aŋaŋuma hibi hyosihyosi ehi kola.
119.87: Ŋabulira ŋatono ohukenaŋo hu hyalo, aye sipwanga hu biragiro bibyo.
119.88: Olwʼohunyenda ehibitiiriye, huuma obulamu wange butagota, nja hugonderanga ebiragiro bibyo.
119.89: O Musengwa , ehibono hihyo hyʼemirembe nʼemirembe, era hiri mwigulu.
119.90: Owesigwa wuwo wahweyongera ohubaaŋo mu hiisi mulembe, watongosa ehyalo era sihitenga.
119.91: Ebiragiro bibyo bisigala ni biri bituufu, olwohuba ebiitu byosibyosi bihuŋeeresa.
119.92: Amagambi gago gabanga ni gatasangaasa, hani nasihiirihira mu hubonaabona ohu naalimo.
119.93: Sinja hwibirira biragiro bibyo olwohuba njʼebigira nʼohuumire obulamu wange.
119.94: Noŋole olwohuba ndi wuwo, fubaho ohwoheresa ebiragiro bibyo.
119.95: Abahosi bʼebibi bahuumiriiye ohukenaŋo aye naŋembenga hu biragiro bibyo.
119.96: Ebiitu byosibyosi biri nʼaŋabihoma aye ebiragiro bibyo biŋuma hyagamo.
119.97: Nga nenda amagambi gago bugali! Ngaŋembaho hiisi hiseera.
119.98: Ebiragiro bibyo bifuula omugesi, ohusinga abalabe bange. Hiri hiityo olwohuba hiisi hiseera mbebi ngenderaho.
119.99: Tegeera bingi nʼohuhiraho abasomesa bange bosibosi, olwohuba peega hu biragiro bibyo.
119.100: Ndi nʼohutegeera ohusingaho abakiraho obuhulu mu myaha, olwohuba ngondera amagambi gago.
119.101: Nehuumire ohutagendera mu ngira embi, ko nahasobola ohugondera ehibono hihyo.
119.102: Sindehuliranga magambi gago olwohuba ewe wamwene wusomehiise.
119.103: Ngʼebibono bibyo bipoomera, biŋooma ohuhira omudugere.
119.104: Amagambi gago gafuula mugesi, olwʼehyo caawa esambo embi.
119.105: Ehibono hihyo taala yʼamagulu gange, njase eyimuliha mu ngira yange.
119.106: Ndayira era kihahasa ti, nja hugondera amagambi gago amawufu.
119.107: O Musengwa , mbweneweene bugali, huuma obulamu wange ngʼolu wasuubisa.
119.108: O Musengwa , fugiirira ohuhujumirya hwange era wusomese amagambi gago.
119.109: Wayire ndi mwetegefu ohuŋaayo obulamu wange, sinja hwibirira magambi gago.
119.110: Abahosi bʼebibi bategire omutego, aye sipwanga hu biragiro bibyo.
119.111: Ebiragiro bibyo njʼomuhemba gwange emirembe nʼemirembe, era njʼesangaalo lyʼomwoyo gwange.
119.112: Nasalaŋo mu mwoyo gwange ohugonderanga ebiragiro bibyo ohwola olu ndifa.
119.113: Caawa abaatu abemeerera nʼohugulu hulala eyi neeyi, aye ese nenda amagambi gago.
119.114: Ndiiwe omu neŋogoma era engabo yange, nesiga ebi wasuubisa.
119.115: Mupwereŋo enywe ababbengi, nahahuuma ebiragiro bya Hatonda wange.
119.116: Pe amaani ngʼolu wasuubisa, mbe mulamu, otandeha nasuubirira wereere.
119.117: Panirire era nja huŋunuha, hiisi hiseera naŋembenga hu biragiro bibyo.
119.118: Ocaawa abo bosibosi abaŋwa hu biragiro bibyo, era etegeha jaawe jiŋuma mahulu.
119.119: Abahosi bʼebibi bosibosi hu hyalo obabisya hyʼebisasiro olwʼehyo nenda ebiragiro bibyo.
119.120: Omubiri gwange guteetema olwʼohuhutya, olwʼengeri eyi osalamo emisango.
119.121: Kolire ebiraŋi era ebisaana, otapayo mu mihono jʼabalabe bange.
119.122: Yeeda omuŋeeresa wuwo, otaleha abepaahapaaha ohunyigirisa.
119.123: Emoni jange jidembire ohuhuumirira ohubona obunoŋosi wuwo obu wasuubisa.
119.124: Ŋamba omuŋeeresa wuwo nʼehisa, era wusomese ebiragiro bibyo.
119.125: Ndi muŋeeresa wuwo, pe amagesi, nahategeera ebiragiro bibyo.
119.126: O Musengwa , hino njʼehiseera ohubaaho nʼehyohola, olwohuba abaatu bali hubbwaga amagambi gago.
119.127: Hiri hiityo olwohuba nenda ebiragiro bibyo ohuhiraho ezaabbu, ezaabbu enongose obugali,
119.128: era olwohuba pira ebiragiro bibyo ohuba ebituufu, caawa amagira amabi gosigosi.
119.130: Esomesa yʼehibono hihyo, ereeta ohutegeera eyiri abo abatamanyire.
119.132: Kejeho wupambire ehisa, ngʼolu habuhyabuhya oholera abo abahwenda.
119.133: Luŋamya amagulu gange ngʼolu wasuubisa, ŋaŋumeŋo ehibi ehiŋuga obulamu wange.
119.134: Noŋole mu hunyigirisiwa hwʼabahosi bʼebibi, sobole ohugondera ebiragiro bibyo.
119.135: Ŋambira omuŋeeresa wuwo ehisa, era wusomese ebiragiro bibyo.
119.136: Ndira amasiga bugali, olwohuba abaatu sibagondera magambi gago.
119.137: O Musengwa , oli mwawufu, era amagambi gago matuufu.
119.138: Amagambi aga wataŋo matuufu, era gesigiwa.
119.139: Obusungu wange wohyerera mugati hyʼomuliro olwohuba abalabe bange sibafa hu bibono bibyo.
119.140: Ebisuubiso bibyo babigezesya bulaŋi weene era omuŋeeresa wuwo abisiima.
119.141: Wayire puma mugaso era banyooma, sipanga hwibirira biragiro bibyo.
119.142: Oli mwesigwa emirembe nʼemirembe era amagambi gago matuufu.
119.143: Ngwiriiye ebigosi nʼohubonaabona, aye ebiragiro bibyo njʼebisangaasa.
119.144: Ebiragiro bibyo bituufu emirembe nʼemirembe. Pe ohutegeera nahaba nʼobulamu.
119.145: O Musengwa , kwegayirira nʼomwoyo gwange gwosigwosi, ngobolemo, nja hugondera amagambi gago.
119.146: Kwegayirira, noŋole era nja hugonderanga amagambi gago.
119.147: Puuna pwipwipwi, nahweririra wunjeede esuubi lyange nditaaye mu hibono hihyo.
119.148: Sinimba hwiro owiire wosiwosi olwohuba mba mu huŋeega hu ebi wasuubisa.
119.149: O Musengwa , ŋulira ehi ndoma olwʼohunyenda era huuma obulamu wange olwʼebiragiro bibyo.
119.150: Abo abaŋuuna ohugunjaŋo amagira amabi, bandi ŋaapi, aye bali ŋaleeŋi nʼamagambi gago.
119.151: Ne O Musengwa , oli ŋalala ni nange, era ebiragiro bibyo byosibyosi bituufu.
119.152: Ohuŋwa ahale neega ebiragiro bibyo, ti wabitaŋo ohubaaŋo emirembe nʼemirembe.
119.153: Bona ngʼolu mbonaabona wununule, olwohuba sinibiriranga magambi gago.
119.154: Tereeŋo ahabega wununule, huuma obulamu wange ngʼolu wasuubisa.
119.155: Abahosi bʼebibi sibaja hunoŋoha olwohuba sibagondera biragiro bibyo.
119.156: O Musengwa , oli nʼehisa hingi, huuma obulamu wange ngʼolu hiri mu magambi gago.
119.157: Ndi nʼabakiyaania bangi, aye sipwe hu biragiro bibyo.
119.158: Ni mbona abaatu abatafugiirira, pulira obulumi mu mwoyo gwange olwohuba sibagondera hibono hihyo.
119.159: O Musengwa , bona ngʼolu nenda ebiragiro bibyo huuma obulamu wange olwohunyenda.
119.160: Ebibono bibyo byosibyosi byʼamazima, amagambi gago gosigosi maawufu era gʼemirembe nʼemirembe.
119.161: Abaŋugi bakiyaania aŋaŋuma songa, aye ehibono hihyo njʼehiteetemya.
119.162: Ebi wasuubisa bisangaasa hyʼomuutu owangala ebyʼobuŋinda ebyʼamaani.
119.163: Caawira erala obudulingi aye nenda amagambi gago.
119.164: Hiisi ludaalo kujumirya emirundi musanvu olwohuba osala emisango nʼotehubbira.
119.165: Abenda amagambi gago bali nʼemiyaaya ejʼamaani era ŋaŋuma ehisobola ohubaleetera ohwegumula.
119.166: O Musengwa , suubirira mu ndiiwe ohununula era ngondera ebiragiro bibyo.
119.167: Ngondera ebiragiro bibyo olwohuba mbyenda bugali.
119.168: Ngondera ebiragiro bibyo nʼamagambi gago olwohuba omanyire amagira gange gosigosi.
119.169: O Musengwa , ŋulira ohulira hwange, pe ohutegeera ngʼolu wasuubisa.
119.170: Ŋulira ohweŋundera hwange, nunule ngʼolu wasuubisa.
119.171: Nahujumiryenga hiisi hiseera olwohuba wusomesa ebiragiro bibyo.
119.172: Nembenga ehibono hihyo, olwohuba ebiragiro bibyo byosibyosi byawufu.
119.173: Wetegehe ohunjeeda olwohuba nasalaŋo ohuŋamba ebiragiro bibyo.
119.174: O Musengwa , nesunga obunoŋosi wuwo, era amagambi gago nja gasangaasa.
119.175: Leha mbe mulamu sobole ohuhujumiryanga era leha amagambi gago ganjeede.
119.176: Mbamire hyʼetaama eyigotire yendula omuŋeeresa wuwo, olwohuba sinibiriranga biragiro bibyo.

120.1: Nʼalanga Musengwa ni ndi mu bugosi era gangobolamo.
120.2: O Musengwa , nunule wuutuse mu badulingi nʼabaloma ebyakalebule.
120.3: Hatonda ali bahola hiina, enywe abadulingi?
120.4: Ali bagudya nʼobusaale owoogi, era bahoohye nʼamanda agekeeka omuliro.
120.5: Jinjageene ohuba ni menya e Meseki oba nʼabaatu be Kedali!
120.6: Pirire ehiseera hireeŋi, ni menya nʼabaatu abacaawa emiyaaya.
120.7: Ese ndi muutu owenda emiyaaya, aye ni ndoma hu miyaaya, nibo benda husoola.

121.1: Ngangamusa emoni jange, narengerera hu sozi, obuyeedi wange buŋwa ŋeena?
121.2: Obuyeedi wange buŋwa eyiri Musengwa , owatonda egulu nʼehyalo.
121.3: Musengwa saaja huhuleeha hutyerera, oyo ahuhuuma, saaja huŋongera.
121.4: Mu butuufu oyo ahuuma Yisirayiri, saaja huŋongera oba huŋenyuha.
121.5: Musengwa ahuhuuma, ali huupi ni neewe hu nduuhu ohuhuuma.
121.6: Eryuba sirija huhwohya mu muusi wayire omwesi ohuhukosa mu wiire.
121.7: Musengwa aja huhuhuuma mu bugosi wosiwosi era aja hulabiriranga obulamu wuwo.
121.8: Musengwa aja huhulabiriranga mu matiina nʼamagobolere ohuŋwa ŋaahani ohwola emirembe nʼemirembe.

122.1: Nasangaala olu bandoma baati, “Nja hutiine mu nyumba ya Musengwa .”
122.2: O Yerusaalemu hatyane huli ŋano, hwemereeye mu miryango jijo.
122.3: Yerusaalemu hibuga ehi batongola ni behoota, eŋuma aŋanga ohuhijagiija.
122.4: Era eyo peyi biha bya Yisirayiri bitiina ohujumirya Musengwa ngʼolu egambi lirye libalagira.
122.5: Mu hibuga ehyo pomuli etebe ya Dawudi eyʼobuŋugi ohu beehala basala emisango.
122.6: Sabira Yerusaalemu ohubaamo emiyaaya ti, “Abo abahwenda babe bulaŋi.
122.7: Ha emiyaaya jibe mu bisenge bibyo, obuhuumi mu lubiri lulwo.”
122.8: Olwʼabalebe nʼabameeri bange nja huloma Yerusaalemu ti, “Emiyaaya jibe mu ewe!”
122.9: Olwʼenyumba ya Musengwa Hatonda weefe, kusabira ohulahulane.

123.1: Ngangamusa emoni jange eyi oli, eyi oli mwigulu hu tebe eyʼobuŋugi.
123.2: Hyʼabeedu ngʼolu balengerera ehiŋwa mu ngalo ja musengwa yaawe era ngʼolu abaŋeeresa abahasi balengerera ehiŋwa mu muhono gwʼomuhasi oyu baŋeeresa, hwesi huutyo huhuumirira ehiŋwa ewa Musengwa Hatonda weefe ohwola olu atuŋambira ehisa.
123.3: O Musengwa , tuŋambire ehisa, tuŋambire ehisa olwohuba batunyooma bugali.
123.4: Hugumiiye ebiduho bingi ohuŋwa eyiri abepaahapaaha era abehudumbasa batunyooma bugali.

124.1: Singa Musengwa sigaali hu luuyi lwefe, leha Yisirayiri yigobolemo yiiti,
124.2: singa Musengwa sigaali hu luuyi lwefe olu baatu batulumba
124.4: Hani amataba gatuŋira, hani amaaji gatumira,
124.6: Musengwa gebasiwe ataleha abalabe beefe hutunawulanawula nʼameeno gaawe.
124.7: Huŋunuhire hyʼenyuni eŋooye mu lubanjo, oluhumbeeri luhapuhire hwaŋunuha.
124.8: Obuŋonere weefe buŋwa eyiri Musengwa owatonda egulu nʼehyalo.

125.1: Abo abesiga Musengwa bali hyʼolusozi Sayuuni olu tatenga aye luliŋo emirembe nʼemirembe.
125.2: Ngʼolu esozi jeswanigirihiise Yerusaalemu, ni Musengwa yeesi atyo po geswanigirisa atyo abaatu babe ohuŋwa hatyane ohwola emirembe nʼemirembe.
125.3: Abahosi bʼebibi sibaja husigala ni baŋuga ehyalo hyʼabagwalaafu olwohuba abagwalaafu baŋanga ohutandiha ohubbenga.
125.4: O Musengwa , holera abaatu abalaŋi ebiitu ebiraŋi, abo abagwalaafu mu myoyo jaawe.
125.5: Aye abo abaŋaba baŋamba amagira amagodajami, Musengwa aja hubagudihisa ŋalala nʼabahola ebibi. Emiyaaya jibe hu Yisirayiri.

126.1: Musengwa ni gatugobosa mu Sayuuni ohuŋwa mu busibe, hwali hyʼabaloota.
126.2: Hwejula amamwemwe era hwemba nʼesangaalo. Nga abanamawanga baloma baati, “ Musengwa abaholeeye ebyeŋunjisa!”
126.3: Musengwa atuholeeye ebyeŋunjisa era huli basangaafu.
126.4: O Musengwa , tugaluse bunyaaha hyʼefula ngʼolu yejusa enjabi ejomeera mu Negevu.
126.5: Abo abamwa ni balira baja huhungula ni basaŋalya.
126.6: Atiina ohumwa nʼalira aligaluha engo nʼahubba ebigalagala era ni getwihire emiganda jʼamakungula.

127.1: Ohutusaho nga Musengwa njʼatongooye enyumba abayitongola bateganira wereere. Ohutusaho nga Musengwa njʼahuuma ehibuga, abahihuuma bateganira wereere.
127.2: Hiŋuma mahulu ohuŋuuna ohuhataabana, era waalwa ohuja hu buliri olwʼohwendula ehyohulya. Aye aba Musengwa genda abaleetera ohulimba hwiro.
127.3: Abaana hirabo ohuŋwa eyiri Musengwa , era njʼekabi eji husuna ohuŋwa eyi ali.
127.4: Abaana aba muutu asaala mu buvubuka baba hyʼobusaale mu mihono jʼomusira.
127.5: Gesiimire omuutu oyo ali nʼobusaale bungi sibaja huswala ni basoola nʼabalabe baawe.

128.1: Besiimire abo bosibosi abatya Musengwa abo abagendera mu magira gage.
128.2: Oja hulya hu bibala byʼamaani gago, ebiraŋi nʼekabi binabenga bibyo.
128.3: Omuhasi wuwo mu mago aja huba hyʼomuzabbibbu ogwama ebibala ebingi. Abaana babo baja hweswanigirisanga ehiiŋulo.
128.4: Omuutu atya Musengwa , mu butuufu atyo polu bamuŋa ekabi.
128.5: Musengwa ahuŋe ekabi ohuŋwa mu Sayuuni, endaalo josijosi ejʼobulamu wuwo, obone Yerusaalemu nʼehulaahulana.
128.6: Era owangaale obone hu bejuhulu babejuhulu babo. Emiyaaya jibe hu Yisirayiri.

129.1: Leha hiisi Muyisirayiri alome ati, “Abalabe bakiyaanisye ohuŋwa mu buŋere.”
129.2: Ohuŋwa mu buŋere wange abalabe bakiyaanisye aye sibapangulanga.
129.3: Bafuuhisye omugongo gwange ohuba hyʼehisambu bagwijuhiise mabbwa mereere.
129.4: Aye Musengwa ahola ebiruŋamu gatuhiise mu migoye jʼabahosi bʼebibi.
129.5: Ale bosibosi abacaawa Sayuuni baŋangulwe era bagameyo egongo ni baswaye.
129.6: Leha babe hyʼenyaasi erimera ŋamugulu hu nyumba era eryoma ni lihiiri huhula,
129.7: ohuula enyaasi eryo, saliŋesamo hinywa, ni nooyo olihumbaania saliŋesamo muganda bbe.
129.8: Era eŋume abitaŋo gabaloma ati, “ Musengwa ahuŋe ekabi era hwesi hubendesa ekabi mu siina lya Musengwa .”

130.2: O Musengwa ŋulira ohulira hwange, tegere ohutwi wupambire ehisa wunjeede.
130.3: O Musengwa , obanga ni weŋambirira, njʼani owahaŋunuhire ohumusalira omusango?
130.4: Aye ewe otusoniŋa, olwʼehyo abaatu bahutya.
130.5: Kumirira Musengwa ohunjeeda, omwoyo gwange guhuhuumirira era nesiga ehibono hihye.
130.6: Omwoyo gwange guhuumirira Musengwa ohusinga abahuumi ngʼolu bahuumirira owiire ohuhya, ohusinga abahuumi ngʼolu bahuumirira owiire ohuhya.
130.7: Yisirayiri wesigenga Musengwa olwohuba ali nʼohwenda ohubitiirifu, era niye njʼali nʼamaani ohuhununula.
130.8: Niye omwene aja hununula Abayisirayiri ohuŋwa mu bibi byawe byosibyosi.

131.1: O Musengwa , sinehudumbasa mu mwoyo gwange era puma keja embi sineyingisa mu songa ejitapambaho oba ebiitu ebitasobola.
131.2: Aye nesomesa ohuba mubombeefu mu bulamu wange hyʼomwana owaŋwa hu hwoka hyʼomwana owaŋwa hu mabeere ga nyina nʼobulamu wange pobuli buutyo.
131.3: Yisirayiri, wesige Musengwa ohuŋwa ŋahani ohwola emirembe nʼemirembe.

132.1: O Musengwa , hebulira Dawudi nʼebigosi byosibyosi ebi gagumira.
132.2: Galayirira Musengwa geyama mu moni jʼOmwene Buŋangi owa Yakobbo ati,
132.3: “Sinja hwingira mu nyumba yange oba huniina hu hitanda hyange
132.4: oba huŋenyuha hu hwiro wayire huŋongera
132.5: ohwola olu ndifunira Musengwa ehifo aŋa Omwene Buŋangi owa Yakobbo anamenyenga.”
132.6: Hwaŋulira hu biŋamba hu Sanduuku yʼEndagaano mu Efulaasi era hwayibona e Jaari.
132.7: Ngʼaŋo huloma huuti, “Hutiine hwingire omu Musengwa amenya, humujumirihisye ŋa tebe yiye eyʼobuŋugi.
132.8: O Musengwa , yinyoha otiine mu hifo hihyo ehyʼohuŋumuliramo, obemo nʼEsanduuku yʼEndagaano ahabonero ahʼobuŋangi wuwo.
132.9: Abasengi babo bahole ebiruŋamu era leha abagwalaafu babo bembe nʼesangaalo.”
132.10: Hu lwʼomuŋeeresa wuwo Dawudi, otahubba muutu wuwo oyu wajuhaho amafuta, omugongo.
132.11: Musengwa galayirira Dawudi oweyamo obu ataŋanga hubbwaga gamuloma ati, “Nja huŋamba mulala hu basaani babo mute hu tebe yiyo eyʼobuŋugi.
132.12: Singa abaana babo bahuuma endagaano yange nʼebiragiro ebi mbaŋa, abaana baawe baja hwihala hu tebe yiyo eyʼobuŋugi emirembe nʼemirembe.”
132.13: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Musengwa getobosamo Sayuuni ohuba ehifo hihye ehyʼohumenyamo.
132.14: Galoma ati, “Hino njʼehifo hyange omu naŋuumulirenga emirembe nʼemirembe ŋano nja aŋa siimire ohuŋugiranga.
132.15: Nja hujofumulira Sayuuni ekabi eja hiisi hiitu, abagadi baja hulyanga hiisi ehi benda.
132.16: Nja huŋa abasengi baamo ekabi mu hiisi ehi bahola era abagwalaafu abahirimo baja husangaalanga.
132.17: Mu hifo hino paŋa ndifuulira mulala hu basaani ba Dawudi ohuba habaha owʼamaani. Era omutobole wange aliba hyʼetaala eyitasima.
132.18: Nja huŋambya abalabe babe esoni aye owahabaha wuwe wulihulahulana era wafuma.”

133.1: Nga hiraŋi era hisangaasa aboluganda ohumenya ŋalala ni bali mu bulala!
133.2: Hiri hyʼamafuta agʼomuŋendo aga bajuhire hu mutwe ko gahuluhuta ni geeha hu hirefu hyʼAlooni ohwola hu hitogi hyʼehyambalo hihye.
133.3: Hiri oti lume lwʼolusozi Herumooni olugwa hu lusozi Sayuuni, hiri hiityo olwohuba eyo peyi Musengwa ajofumulira ekabi jije ejʼobulamu hu baatu babe owʼemirembe nʼemirembe.

134.1: Musengwa gebasiwe, enywe mwesimwesi abaŋeeresa ba Musengwa abamuŋeeresa owiire mu nyumba ya Musengwa .
134.2: Mugolole emihono jenywe mu hifo ehyawufu mweyaase Musengwa .
134.3: Musengwa owatonda egulu nʼehyalo abaŋe ekabi ohuŋwa mu Sayuuni.

135.1: Mujumirye Musengwa . Mujumirye Musengwa , mumujumirye, enywe abaŋeeresa ba Musengwa ,
135.2: enywe abemeerera baŋeeresa mu nyumba ya Musengwa , mu lunya lwʼenyumba ya Hatonda weefe.
135.3: Mujumirye Musengwa olwohuba mulaŋi. Mumwembere etendo olwohuba ehyo hisangaasa.
135.4: Musengwa gatobola Yakobbo ohuba wuwe, Yisirayiri ohuba hyʼomuŋendo hihye.
135.5: Manyire ti Musengwa wʼamaani, era ti Musengwa weefe asinga abahatonda bosibosi amaani.
135.6: Musengwa ahola hiisi ehigenda ohuhola mwigulu oba hu hyalo, mu nyanja nomu buliba.
135.7: Agima ebireri byenyohera hu njuyi josijosi ejʼehyalo, aŋindiha ohumyasa nʼefula era atusaayo hibuyaga ohuŋwa mu sitoowa jije.
135.8: Galeetera abaseere abadaayi abʼe Misiri, abaana abaseere abadaayi nʼebisolo ohufa.
135.9: Gaŋindiha ebyamaliholiho nʼebyeŋunjisa hu baatu bʼe Misiri ohusoosa habaha nʼabahungu babe bosibosi.
135.10: Gasihiirisa amawanga mangi era giita nʼabahabaha abʼamaani,
135.11: Sihoni habaha wʼAbamooli, ni Ogi habaha wʼe Bbasani, nʼabahabaha bosibosi abʼe Kanani.
135.12: Era ehyalo hyawe gahiŋayo ngʼomuŋuluko, omuŋuluko eyiri abaatu babe Abayisirayiri.
135.13: O Musengwa , oliŋo emirembe nʼemirembe era efuma yiyo Musengwa yija huba yʼemirembe nʼemirembe.
