135.14: Musengwa aja hwejeeresa abaatu babe era aŋambire abaŋeeresa babe ehisa.
135.15: Ebi mawanga gajumirya, bibbote ebi bahola mu feeza nʼezaabbu era abaatu njʼababibbota nʼemihono jaawe.
135.16: Biri nʼeminwa aye sibiroma biri nʼemoni aye sibibona.
135.17: Biri nʼamatwi aye sibiŋulira era sibiŋeera nʼohuŋeera.
135.18: Ababiwumba balifaanana hya nibyo, hiityo pohiri ni naabo bosibosi ababitamo owesige.
135.19: Enywe olulyo lwa Yisirayiri mujumirye Musengwa . Enywe abʼolulyo lwʼAlooni, mweyaase Musengwa .
135.20: Enywe abʼolulyo lwa Leevi, mweyaase Musengwa , enywe abatya Musengwa , mweyaase.
135.21: Mujumirye Musengwa mu Sayuuni, mujumirye oyo amenya mu Yerusaalemu. Musengwa gebasiwe.

136.1: Mweyaase Musengwa olwohuba mulaŋi, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.2: Mweyaase Hatonda wa bahatonda, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.3: Mweyaase Musengwa wʼabasengwa, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.4: Niye yeŋene njʼahola ebyeŋunjisa, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.5: Owahola egulu mu magesi gage, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.6: Owata ehyalo hu maaji, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.7: Owahola ebyaduha ebibbala, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.8: Owahola eryuba liŋugenga mu muusi, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.9: Owahola omwesi nʼemunyeenye biŋugenga mu wiire, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.10: Oyo owiita abaana abaseere abadaayi e Misiri, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe,
136.11: ngʼatusa Abayisirayiri e Misiri, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe,
136.12: nʼamaani amangi nʼobuŋangi, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.13: Gaabula mu Nyanja Enando ŋabiri, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.14: Era gatusayo Abayisirayiri baabita mu nyanja eyo, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.15: Ne gasihiirihisa Falaawo nʼeŋe lirye mu Nyanja Enando, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.16: Oyo owatangirira abaatu babe mu lulafu, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe,
136.17: owasihiirisa abahabaha abʼamaani, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.18: Era geeta abahabaha abaali ni bamanyiheene, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe,
136.19: Sihoni habaha wʼAbamooli, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe,
136.20: ni Ogi habaha wʼe Bbasani, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.21: Era ehyalo hyawe gahiŋa abaatu babe ngʼomuŋuluko, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe,
136.22: ohuba muŋuluko gwa Yisirayiri omuŋeeresa wuwe, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.23: Eyiri oyo owatuhebulira ni hwali banafu era ni batunyooma, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe
136.24: gatununula ohuŋwa mu balabe beefe, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.25: Oyo aŋa ebitonde byosibyosi emere, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.
136.26: Mweyaase Musengwa owomwigulu, ohwenda huhwe hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe.

137.1: Hu njabi jʼe Bbabbulooni hwihala ŋaasi hwalira amasiga ni hwahebulira Sayuuni.
137.2: Ngʼaŋo huŋaniha obutongooli weefe hu misaala ejaali aŋaapi
137.3: olwohuba abatuŋamba batuloma ohubembera. Abatubonyaabonyanga batulagira hubembere enyembo ejʼesangaalo. Batuloma baati, “Mutwembere enyembo ejiŋamba hu Sayuuni.”
137.4: Huŋanga huutye ohwemba enyembo ejiŋamba hu Musengwa ni huli mu hyalo ehitali hyefe?
137.5: Ni nibiriranga Yerusaalemu, omuhono gwange omulungi gwibiriranga ohuhubba ogutongooli.
137.6: Era ni kwibiriranga, olulimi lwange lweŋambanga ŋamugulu wʼomunwa, ni kwibiriranga ewe Yerusaalemu ohusinga byosibyosi ebisangaasa.
137.7: O Musengwa , hebulira ehi baatu bomu Edomu baahola hu ludaalo olu eŋe lyʼe Bbabbulooni lyaŋamba ehibuga hyʼe Yerusaalemu, baloma baati, “Muhisihiirise, muhisihiirise hiŋwereŋo erala!”
137.8: Ewe Bbabbulooni baja huhusihiirisa. Ali nʼekabi ahwesasusa ebyo ebi watuhola.
137.9: Ali nʼekabi oyo aŋamba abaana babo abaŋere gabaminiangulira hu mabaale!

138.1: O Musengwa , nja huhujumiryanga nʼomwoyo gwange gwosigwosi, nja hwemba ni kujumirya mu moni ja bahatonda.
138.2: Nja huhubba amafuha ni nengereeye Yekaalu yiyo enjawufu era nja hujumirya esiina liryo olwʼohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu nʼowesigwa wuwo olwohuba ebiitu byosibyosi biri ŋaasi wʼesiina liryo nʼehibono hihyo.
138.3: Ni nahulanga, wangobolamo, wafuula musira era wangumya.
138.4: O Musengwa , abahabaha bosibosi mu hyalo bahujumiryenga, hiisi olu banaŋulirenga ebibono bibyo.
138.5: Baja hwemba hu ebi Musengwa ahola, Musengwa wʼeŋono bugali.
138.6: Wayire Musengwa ali ŋamugulu, alabirira aba banyooma aye ali ŋaleeŋi nʼabepaahapaaha.
138.7: Wayire ngenda ebigosi ni binetolooye aye ohuuma obulamu wange. Oŋiriŋania abasigu bange, omuhono gugwo njʼoguponia.
138.8: Musengwa aja hwoheresa ehigendererwa hihye mu bulamu wange, O Musengwa , ohwenda huhwo hubitiirifu emirembe nʼemirembe. Otatwesamba olwohuba watutonda.

139.2: Omanyire nimba ni nihaaye oba nimba ni nemereeye era ko peege hu hiitu oba ohimanyire.
139.3: Wutegeera amagendere nʼamaŋumulire gange, ebi kola byosibyosi obimanyire.
139.4: O Musengwa , mbanga kiiri huloma, oba ohenire ohumanya ehi nja huloma.
139.5: Wuneswanigirihiise enjuyi josijosi amaani gago njʼobuhuumi wange.
139.6: Ohumanya ohuwumanyiremo hubitiirifu era hubita aŋa koma ohuhutegeera.
139.7: Ŋeena aŋa panga ohutiina nehweha hu Mwoyo wuwo? Era ŋeena aŋa panga ohudulumira aŋa otali?
139.8: Singa tiina mwigulu eyo oliyo, nolu tiina ŋaasi e magombe, yoosi oliyo.
139.9: Nolu nguluha nabisya ebuŋwalyuba, oba namenya aŋale eyo ebugwalyuba,
139.10: ni neeyo kwagaanayo ohutangirira, omuhono gugo omulungi guja hunjeeda.
139.11: Singa ndoma ti, “Mu butuufu ehiirema hija hukweha, era enjase eyineswanigirihiise yafuuha hiirema,”
139.12: nʼehiirema ehyo sihija huba hiirema eyi oli, olwohuba hu ewe, owiire buli hyomuusi era ehiirema hiri hyʼenjase.
139.13: Watonda hiisi hitundu hyʼomubiri gwange, ndiiwe owamumba mu hida hya maama.
139.14: Kujumirya olwohuba waatonda mu ngeri eyeŋunjisa, ebi ohola byeŋunjisa era ehyo kimanyire bulaŋi weene.
139.15: Amagumba gange ni baali ni bagatonda mu ngiso mu hida hya maayi yange, ewe wamanya
139.16: wambona ni kiiri husaaliwa. Endaalo jange josijosi bajiŋandiha mu hitabo hihyo ni kiiri nahubaŋo.
139.17: O Hatonda, ebi wupeegaho nga byamuŋendo bugali era nga sibibaliha!
139.18: Singa naali wahubibala, byahasingire embehe jʼomujehe obungi. Era aŋa sisimuhira mba kiiri ni neewe.
139.19: O Hatonda, singa wiita abahosi bʼebibi! Mupwereŋo, enywe abaŋemba hu hwita.
139.20: Bahulomaho nʼebigendererwa ebibi, abasigu babo bahulomaho ebyʼobudulingi.
139.21: O Musengwa , ese caawa abahucaawa era nyooma abahusoosa.
139.22: Eŋuma hindi ehi ndi ni nahyo ohutusaho ohubacaawa, mbaŋira ohuba balabe bange.
139.23: O Hatonda, njehebeeje, ngesesye omanye ebiŋeego byange.
139.24: Bona hanye ŋaliŋo aŋa ndi nʼekenyera mu bulamu wange, ohene butangirire mu ngira eyʼobulamu owʼemirembe nʼemirembe.

140.1: O Musengwa , nunule mu baatu abahosi bʼebibi, kuume eyiri abatemu.
140.2: Abayiiya etegeha embi mu myoyo jaawe era hiisi obuhya baleeta etalo.
140.3: Ebi baloma biruma hyʼobusagwa wʼetemu, hyʼobusagwa wʼefulugundu.
140.4: O Musengwa , nunule mu mihono jʼabahosi bʼebibi, taase mu batemu abehobana ohukubbiraŋo.
140.5: Abaatu abepaahapaaha baategire omutego mu ngiso, banjuluhiise olutuula lwawe benda bapambye mu ngira omu mbita.
140.6: Ndoma Musengwa ti, “Oli Hatonda wange.” O Musengwa , ŋulira ohwerira hwange wunjeede.
140.7: O Musengwa Omwene Buŋangi, omunoŋosi wange owʼamaani, engabo yange mu lutalo.
140.8: O Musengwa , ababi otabaŋa ebi benda olwohuba baŋanga behudumbasa.
140.9: Otaleha balabe bange ohupangula, leha ebibi ebi banyendesa bibagobolere abeene.
140.10: Leha amanda agekeeka gabagweho, leha bagwe mu muliro, mwiroŋo eri batalisobola huŋwamo.
140.11: Abaloma ebyakalebule hu bahyawe batabitamo, leha ebiŋeeriŋeeri bibasihiirise.
140.12: Manyire ti Musengwa agayira abagadi era asolerera abali mu wetaavu.
140.13: Hituufu abagwalaafu baja huhujumirya era abahola ebiruŋamu balimenya ni neewe.

141.1: O Musengwa , kweriririra nja mangu wunjeede. Ŋulira ejanjaasi lyange ni kulanga.
141.2: Leha ohusaba hwange hwole eyi oli hyʼobubbaani, leha ohugolola emihono jange hube hyʼeŋongo eyi baŋayo egulo.
141.3: O Musengwa , njeede ohusengeeja ebibono byange, ŋuga olulimi lwange.
141.4: Leha omwoyo gwange gutagotanira mu hibi ohwenyigira mu bikolwa byʼabahosi bʼebibi, leha talya hu binoli byawe.
141.5: Leha omuutu omugwalaafu gapemo endabusi, aba gandagire ehyere. Anakangavula, hiba hyʼamafuta agʼekabi hu mutwe gwange, sinja hugaana olwohuba mu husaba hwange, soosa ebikolwa bya bahosi bʼebibi.
141.6: Balidanya abaŋugi baawe ŋaasi ohuŋwa ŋamugulu hu lusozi era abahola ebibi balimanya baati ebi ndoma byolerera.
141.7: Ngʼolu boŋaania eroba ni balima, nʼamagumba geefe baligoŋania hu magombe.
141.8: Aye O Musengwa Omwene Buŋangi, emoni jange njitaaye hu ndiiwe, ndiiwe omuneŋogoma, otandeha hufa.
141.9: Kingirise emitego eji bategire, ohuŋwa mu lutuula olu bahosi bʼebibi baategire.
141.10: Leha abahosi bʼebibi abeene bagwe mu mitego jaawe eji bategire, ese ni nebitira hwebitira.

142.1: Neriririra Musengwa nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani Musengwa gapambire ehisa.
142.2: Mujofumulira ohwemulugunya hwange, mulomera ebigosi byange.
142.3: Mula omwoyo gwange ni guba ni gunafuŋire, ndiiwe amanyire ehi ndi nʼohuhola. Abaatu bategire omutego, mu ngira omu mbita.
142.4: Ni keja hu muhono omulungi ohubona owohunjeeda, ŋaŋuma owufaaho. Puma aŋohweŋogoma era eŋuma alumirwa obulamu wange.
142.5: O Musengwa , ndiiwe oyu neriririra, ndoma ti, “Ndiiwe omuneŋogoma era oyu netaaga mu bulamu buno.”
142.6: Ŋulira ohwerira hwange olwohuba ndi mu wetaavu owʼamaani, nunule ohuŋwa mu balabe bange olwohuba baasinga amaani.
142.7: Mboŋolole ohuŋwa mu komera konyo sobole ohuhujumirya. Ehyo hija huleetera abagwalaafu ohuneswanigirisa olwʼobulaŋi wuwo.

143.1: O Musengwa , ŋulira ohusaba hwange, ŋulira ohwerira hwange, ŋulira wupambire ehisa, mu wawufu wuwo ŋulira ohwerira hwange, ngobolemo ngʼolu oli mwesigwa.
143.2: Otasalira muŋeeresa wuwo musango humusinga olwohuba eŋuma muutu ahola ebiruŋamu mu moni jijo.
143.3: Omulabe ali humbinga gafulyafulihiisya mwiroba era agira ni menya mu hiirema hyʼabaafa ahale.
143.4: Ehyo hireetera obulamu wange ohunafuŋa era omwoyo gwange mweralihirifu.
143.5: Kebulira endaalo ejahale peega hu byosibyosi ebi wahola, ebi wahola nʼemihono jijo.
143.6: Kugololera emihono jange ni saba, omwoyo gwange guhuli nduŋo, hyʼeroba eriŋalahaaye olwʼohuŋuma amaaji.
143.7: O Musengwa , ngobolemo mangu olwohuba poyeemo amaani. Otakubba mugongo, kanda naaba hyaba batiina e magombe.
143.8: Hiisi mu mugamba kebulisenga ohwenda huhwo ohubitiirifu olwohuba nesiga ndiiwe. Ndage engira eyi ndi nʼohugenderamo olwohuba ndiiwe oyu ndengereeye ohutangirira.
143.9: O Musengwa , nunule ohuŋwa mu balabe bange olwohuba ndiiwe omuneŋogoma.
143.10: Somese ohuhola ebi wenda olwohuba ndiiwe Hatonda wange. Mwoyo wuwo omulaŋi gatangirire mu ngira enuŋamu.
143.11: O Musengwa , olwʼesiina liryo, huuma obulamu wange mu wawufu wuwo, tuse mu bigosi.
143.12: Olwʼohunyenda obugali, ŋolereesa abalabe bange, sihiirisa abalabe bange bosibosi olwohuba ndi muŋeeresa wuwo.

144.1: Gebasiwe Musengwa olwanda lwange otendeha emihono jange ohusoola nʼenjala jange ohwetegehera olutalo.
144.2: Musengwa ganyenda ehibitiiriye njʼengabo yange era njʼomuneŋogoma, njʼomununuzi wange oyu nesiga ohukuuma. Aŋamba amawanga gosigosi gagata ŋaasi wʼamagulu gange.
144.3: O Musengwa , omuutu njʼani ohuba ti omulabirira era omwana wʼomuutu njʼani ohuba ti omuŋeegaho?
144.4: Omuutu ali hyʼomuuya obuuya endaalo jije jiri hyʼehisisigo ehitalwa hugotaŋo.
144.5: O Musengwa , ŋwa mwigulu liryo wiihe era ŋamba hu sozi, jiduunye eriisi.
144.6: Ŋindiiha ohumyasa abasigu babo basasaane. Balase obusaale buwo obafulumuse.
144.7: Januula omuhono gugwo ohuŋwa mwigulu wununule era wuponie ohuŋwa mu buŋangi wʼabalugendwa,
144.9: O Hatonda wange, nja huhwembera olwembo olunyaaha nʼogutongooli ogwʼewaaya ehumi.
144.10: Ndiiwe aŋa abahabaha obuŋangusi, onunula Dawudi omuŋeeresa wuwe ohutafa piima.
144.11: Nunule era ponie ohuŋwa mu buŋangi wʼabalugendwa, abejuuye obudulingi era abalayira ebyʼobudulingi.
144.12: Hino hija huleetera abasaani beefe mu buvubuka waawe ohuba bʼomuhulo hyʼomuloofe. Era nʼabahaana beefe baliba hyʼebisindi ebiŋoono ebyʼohujolijinja olubiri.
144.13: Ebyagi byefe birijula amakungula aga hiisi ngeri. Etaama jeefe jirisaalagana emidudu nʼemidudu, ekumi nʼekumi.
144.14: Eŋombe jeefe jisalagane ekasi nʼesinde, ŋaŋumeŋo ejisumula, era ŋaŋumeŋo maliro olwʼenaku mu nguudo jeefe.
144.15: Besiimire abaatu abo aba hino hiŋambaho. Besiimire abaatu abo abali ni Musengwa nga Hatonda waawe.

145.1: Nja huhugulumisanga ewe Hatonda wange era Habaha wange, nja huhwebasanga emirembe nʼemirembe.
145.2: Nja huhweyaasanga hiisi ludaalo, nja huhugulumisanga emirembe nʼemirembe.
145.3: Musengwa ali nʼamaani era asaana eŋono bugali olwohuba wʼamaani ohusinga ngʼolu baatu bahitegeera.
145.4: Abaatu aba hiisi mulembe baja huhutenderesanga olwʼebikolwa bibyo, baja huloma hu byamaliholiho bibyo.
145.5: Baja huloma hu ŋono nʼamaani gago era nja huŋeeganga hu biitu bibyo ebyeŋunjisa ebi ohola.
145.6: Abaatu baja hulomanga hu byeŋunjisa ebyʼamaani ebi ohola era nja hulangirira ti oli wʼamaani.
145.7: Baja hulomanga hu bulaŋi wuwo era baja hwemba hu wawufu wuwo ni basaŋalya.
145.8: Musengwa ali nʼehisasabirisi nʼehisa alwaŋo ohusunguŋala era ali nʼohwenda ohubitiirifu.
145.9: Musengwa mulaŋi eyiri abaatu bosibosi era aŋambira ebitonde byosibyosi ebi gatonda ehisa.
145.10: Musengwa ebitonde byosibyosi biija huhweyaasanga, abagwalaafu babo baja huhutenderesanga.
145.11: Baja hulomanga hu ŋono lyʼobuŋugi buwo, baja huŋayanga hu buŋangi buwo,
145.12: abaatu bosibosi bahamanya ebyʼamaani ebi ohola, nʼeŋono lyʼobuŋugi wuwo.
145.13: Obuŋugi wuwo sibuja huŋwaŋo era owahabaha wuwo wʼemirembe nʼemirembe. Musengwa mwesigwa mu ebi gasuubisa era ali nʼehisa mu byosibyosi ebi ahola.
145.14: Musengwa ayeeda abo bosibosi abali mu bugosi, era genyosa abo abaŋaasi.
145.15: Ebitonde byosibyosi birengerera ndiiwe ohubiyeeda era obiŋa emere mu hiseera.
145.16: Ojanuula engalo nga hiisi hiitu hisuna ehi hyetaaga.
145.17: Musengwa mwawufu mu byosibyosi ebi ahola era ali nʼehisa hu byosibyosi ebi gatonda.
145.18: Musengwa ali ŋaapi ni naabo abamwegayirira, abo bosibosi abamwegayirira mu mazima.
145.19: Goheresa ohuyayaana hwabo abamuŋa eŋono, aŋulira ohwerira hwawe gabanoŋola.
145.20: Musengwa ahuuma abo bosibosi abamwenda aye abahola ebibi bosibosi ali basihiirisa.
145.21: Najumiryenga Musengwa leha ebitonde bibye byosibyosi byebasa Hatonda omwawufu emirembe nʼemirembe.

146.1: Mujumirye Musengwa , omwoyo gwange gujumirya Musengwa .
146.2: Nja hujumirya Musengwa , obulamu wange wosiwosi nja hwemberanga Hatonda wange ni kiiri mulamu.
146.3: Simwesiganga batangirisi, abaatu obuutu, abataŋanga hubanoŋola.
146.4: Omuuya gunabaŋwamo nga baagama mwiroba, hu ludaalo olwene olwo etegeha jaawe nga jifa.
146.5: Gesiimire oyo ali ni Hatonda wa Yakobbo ngʼomuyeedi wuwe era asuubirira mu Musengwa Hatonda wuwe,
146.6: owatonda egulu nʼehyalo nʼenyanja ko nʼebiitu byosibyosi ebirimo, oyo Musengwa omwesigwa emirembe nʼemirembe.
146.7: Agonjoola esonga jʼababanyigirisa nʼatehubbira, abayala abaŋa ehyohulya, Musengwa aboŋolola abasibe,
146.8: Musengwa gegula emoni jʼabaŋofu, Musengwa ayeeda abakokomaaye, Musengwa genda abagwalaafu.
146.9: Musengwa ahuuma abalugendwa era ayeeda abanamwandu nʼabafuubbi aye asihiirisa ekola yʼabahosi bʼebibi.
146.10: Musengwa aŋuga emirembe nʼemirembe. Ewe Sayuuni, Hatonda wuwo aja huŋuga emirembe nʼemirembe. Mujumirye Musengwa .

147.1: Mujumirye Musengwa . Nga hiraŋi ohwemba ni hujumirya Hatonda weefe, nga hisangaasa era hyolana ohumujumirya.
147.2: Musengwa agaluhamo ohutongola Yerusaalemu, ahumbaania Abayisirayiri abasasaanira mu buŋaŋanguse.
147.3: Aŋonia abʼemyoyo ejibbwagijihire era abasidiha nʼebbandeji hu birwaye.
147.4: Njʼasalaŋo obungi wʼemunyeenye, josijosi gajiguliha amasiina.
147.5: Musengwa weefe muhulu ali nʼobuŋangi bungi era amagesi gage sigahoma.
147.6: Musengwa genyosa abeŋomeha aye afulabihisya abahosi bʼebibi ŋaasi.
147.7: Mwembere Musengwa ni mumweyaasa mwembere Hatonda weefe nʼahatongooli.
147.8: Awiiha ebireri hwigulu, atonyesa efula hu hyalo, amesa enyaasi hu sozi.
147.9: Aŋa ebisolo ebyohulya, nʼowaana wa nahinywamalwa ni wulirira emere, awuŋa.
147.10: Amaani gʼembalaasi sinje agamusangaasa oba obusira wʼabasirikale.
147.11: Musengwa asangaala olwʼabo abamutya, abo abasuubirira mu hwenda huhwe ohubitiirifu.
147.12: O Yerusaalemu, ŋa Musengwa eŋono ewe Sayuuni tendereza Hatonda wuwo
147.13: olwohuba ahuuma ebisindi byʼenjigi jijo era aŋa abaana benywe ekabi.
147.14: Aleeta emiyaaya ohweswanigirisa esalo jijo era ahuŋa engaano ehira obulaŋi.
147.15: Aŋindiha ehiragiro hu hyalo, ehibono hihye higenda mbiro nawangu.
147.16: Ganjala amabaale gʼefula oti hani mooya gʼetaama era adumuusa ehisuusu oti hani gohe.
147.17: Adumuusa amabaale gʼefula hyʼepuli, njʼani aŋanga ohugumira obuŋololohi obu aŋindiha?
147.18: Alagira hulagira byasanuuha. Aŋindiha omuuya gugwe ngʼamaaji gahuluhuta.
147.19: Ahwehuliiye Yakobbo ehibono hihye, amagambi nʼebiragiro bibye eyiri Abayisirayiri.
147.20: Hino sahiholerangaho gwanga lindi lyosiryosi era sibamanyire magambi gage. Mujumirye Musengwa .

148.1: Mujumirye Musengwa . Enywe abali mwigulu, mujumirye Musengwa , mumujumirye ŋamugulu mu bbanga.
148.2: Abamalayika babe mwesimwesi mumujumirye, eŋe lyomwigulu mumujumirye.
148.3: Mumujumirye, enywe eryuba nʼomwesi, mumujumirye, enywe emunyeenye josijosi ejimeregenya.
148.4: Mumujumirye, enywe egulu eryaŋamugulu obugali nʼamaaji agali ŋamugulu mu bbanga.
148.5: Leha byosibyosi ebyo bijumirye Musengwa olwohuba galagira hulagira nga bibaaŋo.
148.6: Gabita mu bifo byabyo ohubaamo emirembe nʼemirembe, era ehiragiro hihye hyʼemirembe nʼemirembe.
148.7: Enywe ebitonde hu hyalo, mujumirye Musengwa , enywe ebitonde ebyomu nyanja nʼobuliba wʼagayanja.
148.8: Enywe ehimyaso hyʼefula nʼamabaale gaayo, obuŋololohi nʼebireri ni hibuyaga bigondera ehiragiro hihye.
148.9: Enywe esozi nʼengingi josijosi, emisaala ejaama ebibala nʼemitumba josijosi,
148.10: enywe esolo ejomwisugu nʼejaŋango josijosi, ebyeŋalula nʼenyuni ejiguluha,
148.11: abahabaha hu hyalo nʼamawanga gosigosi, enywe abatangirisi nʼabaŋugi hu hyalo mwesimwesi,
148.12: enywe abosuho nʼabajoŋu, abasaahulu nʼabaana abaŋere.
148.13: Ebitonde byosibyosi ebyo bijumirye Musengwa , olwohuba nje yeŋene asaana, eŋono lirye bitiirifu ohuhiraho ehyalo nʼegulu.
148.14: Aŋaaye abaatu babe obuŋangusi, abagwalaafu babe bosibosi bahamuŋa eŋono, Abayisirayiri bali hu mwoyo gugwe. Mujumirye Musengwa .

149.1: Mujumirye Musengwa . Mwembere Musengwa olwembo olunyaaha, mwembe etendo lirye mu luhumbaano lwʼabagwalaafu.
149.2: Leha Abayisirayiri basaŋalye olwʼoyo owabatonda. Leha abaatu bomu Sayuuni basaŋalye olwa habaha waawe.
149.3: Leha bamujumirye nʼohuhina era bamwembere ni bahubba etambulini nʼahatongooli
149.4: olwohuba Musengwa asangaalira abaatu babe, abewombeeha abatihira engule eyʼobuŋangusi.
149.5: Abamwesiga bosibosi basaŋalye olwohuba baŋanguuye, bembe nʼesangaalo ni bali hu buliri waawe.
149.6: Leha bembe enyembo ni bajumirya Hatonda, ni baŋambire nʼepiima enjogi hu njuyi jombi,
149.8: basidihe abahabaha baawe, baboŋe nʼabatangirisi baawe epingu,
149.9: bahole ebibonerezo ebi babasalira. Eryo njʼeŋono lyʼabagwalaafu babe. Mujumirye Musengwa .

150.1: Mujumirye Musengwa . Mujumirye Hatonda mu hifo hihye ehyawufu, mumujumirye mwigulu lirye eryʼamaani.
150.2: Mumujumirye olwʼebi ahola ebyʼamaani, mumujumirye olwʼobubbala wuwe obu otasobola hwegeragaraniaho.
150.3: Mumujumirye nʼejanjaasi eryʼehifuga ehyʼewaaya ehumi, mumujumirye nʼogutongooli nʼahatongooli.
150.4: Mumujumirye nʼetambulini nʼohuhina, mumujumirye nʼedingidi nʼemirere.
150.5: Mumujumirye nʼebifuga obugali, mumujumirye nʼebitaasa ebisagala.
150.6: Ebiitu ebiramu byosibyosi bijumirye Musengwa . Mujumirye Musengwa .

1.1: Jino jʼengero ja Sulemaani omusaani wa Dawudi era habaha wa Yisirayiri.
1.2: Emigaso jʼengero jino, hulabbira omuutu ohusuna amagesi nʼesambo endaŋi ko nʼohutegeera ebibono ebyʼamahulu.
1.3: Jisomesa omuutu ohuba nʼesambo endaŋi nʼohuba mwesigwa nʼatehubbira era omudimamu.
1.4: Engero jiigula emoni jʼabo abatamanyire bingi jʼabaleetera ohutegeera era jiŋa abavubuka amagesi mu husalaŋo ehyʼohuhola.
1.5: Leha omugesi aŋulirise geeyongere ohubeera erala mugesi era leha omutegeefu asune ohumanya,
1.6: ohutegeera amahulu gʼengero nʼendoma eyʼohubbumbirya ko nomu bibono nʼebikoyiko ebyʼabaatu abagesi.
1.7: Ohutya Musengwa njʼetandiha yʼohumanya. Ne abaŋubeebe banyooma amagesi era sibenda hwega.
1.8: Mwana wase, ŋuliirisa ebi lataawo ahulaabbira era solehanga ebi maawo ahusomesa.
1.9: Ebi wasoma bija huba hyʼengule eyʼeŋono hu mutwe gugwo era hyʼomudaali ogwʼeŋono mwigosi.
1.10: Mwana wase, singa abahosi bʼebibi bahuhongeresa ohuhola ehibi, otafugiirira huhihola.
1.11: Singa bahuloma baati, “Nja otweŋimbeho, huje hweteege hwite omuutu hwesangaase, wayire atuŋumaho songa yosiyosi,
1.12: leha hubalye balamu hubamire, ngʼolu amagombe gamira abaatu.
1.13: Huja hunyaga ebiitu ebyʼomuŋendo ebya hiisi ngeri era hwijuse amayumba geefe nʼebyomunyago.
1.14: Nja otwegaateho, huja hugabana ebi hwiba.”
1.15: Mwana wase otahola muhumba ni nabo era otaholanga ebi bahola,
1.16: olwohuba baŋemberesa ohuhola ebibi era bangu ohutemula abahyawe.
1.17: Nga hiŋuma mugaso ohutega oluhumbeeri enyuni eji wenda ohuŋamba ni jibona!
1.18: Ebi baatu abo bahola bibalondoola abeene era nawoogi wʼefumo siwutya awuŋagaaye.
1.19: Baatyo pobaliba abo abasuna obuŋinda mu kola embi, baheneresa ni bafiriiye obulamu waawe. Amagesi galanga
1.20: Amagesi galanga nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani mu nabiŋwera galanga nʼamaani mu bifo ebyʼolukale,
1.21: galangirira nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani mu akisoni nohu mulyango gwʼehibuga gaati,
1.22: “Enywe abaŋuma ehi mumanyire, mulyosa ŋe ohwenda ohuba mu hutategeera? Enywe abanyoomi mulyosa ŋe ohunyumirwa obunyoomi wenywe? Era abaŋubeebe enywe mulyosa ŋe ohucaawa ohumanya?
1.23: Ŋuliirisa nimba ni kuleegera, nja huhuŋa amagesi amalaŋi kuŋe nʼebiŋeego byange.
1.24: Ne ngʼolu wanegaana ni nahulanga era siwafayo ni nahusimirya,
1.25: ngʼolu wanyooma amagesi aga nahuŋa era siwebbwaga ni nahunenya,
1.26: keesi ndi hujeherera nʼoli mu bugosi ndi hulengerera hulengerera ebigwa ni bitalagire ni bihuguyeho,
1.27: ebigosi ni biri huujira hyʼomuyaga ni biri hweswanigirisa hya hafuusa, olu ebigwa ni bitalagire birihunyigirisa byahuŋinga.
1.29: Ngʼolu bacaawa ohumanya era ndibatoboleŋo ohutya Musengwa .
1.30: Ngʼolu bagaana amagesi gange era banyooma ohubanenya,
1.31: baja hulya hu bibala byʼebikolwa byawe era balyesinya ebibala ebiŋwa mu bujeemu waawe.
1.32: Ehiita abaŋubeebe, hugaana magesi era ehibeeta hutafaayo.
1.33: Aye hiisi aŋuliirisa ebi ndoma anaabenga nʼemiyaaya era nʼeŋuma ehi atya nʼehimusindusa.”

2.1: Mwana wase singa ofugiirira ebibono ebi ndoma era waŋamba ebiragiro byange,
2.2: waŋulira ebibono ebyʼamagesi era waŋayo omwoyo ohubitegeera
2.3: era onayayanira ohumanya wegayirira ohuhuŋa ohutegeera
2.4: era wendula amagesi hyʼowendula efeeza hyʼowendula ebyʼobuŋinda ebi bahweha,
2.5: aŋo oja humanya ohutya Musengwa ehi hitegeesa era oja hutegeera Hatonda.
2.6: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Musengwa njʼaŋa amagesi era ebibono bibye bireeta ohumanya nʼohutegeera.
2.7: Ayeeda era ahuuma abagwalaafu era njʼengabo yaabo abesigwa.
2.8: Agadirira abo abatehubbira era ahuuma abesigwa.
2.9: Nʼoja huŋayo omwoyo gugwo hu ebi kulabbira, oja humanya ebituufu ebyʼamazima era ebi osaana ohuhola.
2.10: Oja hufuuha mugesi era ohumanya huja huhufuula musangaafu.
2.11: Ohumanya huja huhuhuumanga era obutegeefu buja huhugadiriranga.
2.12: Amagesi gaja huhuŋonia amagira gʼabahosi bʼebibi, gaja huhuŋonia abaatu abagodama,
2.13: abo abaleha ohugendera mu ngira enduŋamu nga bagendera mu hiirema.
2.14: Abanyumirwa ohuhola ebibi era basangaalira obugodami,
2.15: amagira gaawe magodami era ebi bahola sibiraŋi.
2.16: Amagesi gaja huhuŋonia omuhasi omuhwedi, gahutaase nʼebibono bibye ebihusendasenda.
2.17: Owalehaŋo wamwe owomu buvubuka wuwe, gabbwaga endagaano eyi gaahola mu moni ja Hatonda.
2.18: Ohwingira mu nyumba yiye huba hutiina mu hufa era nʼengira eyitiinayo yija yimagombe.
2.19: Hiisi atiina eyi ali, aba aŋambire engira eyʼohusihiiriha.
2.20: Olwʼehyo oja hugenderanga mu ngira eyʼabaatu abagwalaafu era ogumirenga hu magira aga bagwalaafu,
2.21: olwohuba abagwalaafu njʼabaja ohumenya hu hyalo era abaŋumaho mbalo njʼabalihisigalamo.
2.22: Aye Hatonda aja hutusa abahosi bʼebibi hu hyalo era asihirise abatali besigwa.

3.1: Mwana wase, siwibiriranga ebi kusomesa aye ohuumanga ebiragiro byange mu mwoyo gugwo,
3.2: olwohuba bija huhuleetera ohuwangaala emyaha nʼemyaha nʼobulamu owʼemiyaaya.
3.3: Ohwenda nʼowesigwa sibihuŋwangamo. Obyesidihanga mu mamiro gago era obiŋandihanga hu mwoyo gugwo.
3.4: Ehyo hija huhuleetera ohuba muhoda ko nʼesiina eraŋi mu moni ja Hatonda nʼabaatu.
3.5: Wesige Musengwa nʼomwoyo gugwo gwosigwosi, era otesiganga magesi gago huwuwo.
3.6: Mu hiisi ehi ohola omuhebuliranga era aja huhuluŋamyanga mu ngira enduŋamu.
3.7: Otefuulanga huba mugesi, aye tyanga Musengwa , weŋalenga ohuhola ehibi.
3.8: Ehyo njʼehija hubanga obulesi obuŋonia omubiri gugwo era ehiŋangasa amagumba gago.
3.9: Oŋanga Musengwa eŋono nʼomuŋa hu bibyo, hu bidaayi mu huhungula,
3.10: ko ebyagi bibyo bijulenga nohu muniga era ebi obiihamo bijulenga omwenge ogwomu mizabbibbu.
3.11: Mwana wase sonyoomanga Musengwa anahuŋamo endabusi era otaŋwangamo maani nʼahunenya,
3.12: olwohuba oyo oyu Musengwa genda amuŋamo endabusi ngʼolu omusaaye ahangavula omwana wuwe omuhoda.
3.13: Gesiimire oyo asuna amagesi omuutu oyo asuna ohutegeera,
3.14: olwohuba amagesi gamuŋendo bugali ohusinga efeeza era ebigaŋwamo bisinga nʼezaabbu.
3.15: Amagesi gamuŋendo ohusinga amabaale agʼomuŋendo era ŋaŋuma ehi osobola ohuŋembaho ohusuna ehisinga amagesi.
3.16: Amagesi gahuleetera ohuwangaala, nʼohuba nʼobuŋinda nʼeŋono.
3.17: Amagira gaago gasangaasa era gosigosi ga miyaaya.
3.18: Amagesi gali hyʼomusaala oguleeta obulamu eyiri abageeŋa era besiimire abo abatagaŋwaho.
3.19: Musengwa gatambisa amagesi ohutonda ehyalo era gatonda egulu olwʼohutegeera huhwe.
3.20: Olwʼobumanyi wuwe, agayanja geyawula nʼebireri byatonyesa efula hu hyalo.
3.21: Mwana wase, otaganya huleha magesi nʼohutegeera era byeŋambeeho hyʼobulimbo.
3.22: Amagesi gaja huhuleetera ohuba nʼobulamu, hyʼehihomo mwigosi ehi ŋeesa eŋono.
3.23: Aŋo oligenda bulaŋi mu lugendo lulwo, nʼeŋuma hwegumula.
3.24: Nʼonaŋenyuhenga hu buliri wuwo, oja huŋuma ehi otya era onaŋenyuhenga ero lyahuŋoomera.
3.25: Sooja hweŋendehereranga ebigwa ni bitalagire, oba ohusihiiriha ohujira abahosi bʼebibi,
3.26: olwohuba Musengwa aja huhuhuumanga era aja huhuhingirisanga otagwa mu mitego.
3.27: Otagaananga huŋa muutu yesiyesi obuyeedi ni hiba ni hiŋangiha.
3.28: Solomanga muliranwawo oti, “Onahagaluhe ejo nahuyeeda,” atenga ko oli nahyo aŋo ehi genda.
3.29: Sotegehanga hwosa hu wahyo obugosi naali ni neewe miyaaya.
3.30: Sobeŋeranga muutu aŋaŋuma songa era aŋaŋuma ehi ahuholire.
3.31: Otegombanga muutu owetima wayire ohuhola ebi ahola
3.32: olwohuba Musengwa acaawa abahola ebibi aye abahola ebiraŋi abafuula bameeri babe.
3.33: Ehiŋwabo hya Musengwa hiri hu mago gʼababi aye aŋa ekabi amago gʼabagwalaafu.
3.34: Anyooma abepaahapaaha aye aŋambira abo abeŋomeha ehisasabirisi.
3.35: Abagesi babaŋa eŋono aye abaŋubeebe baliswala.

4.1: Baana bange muŋulirisenga ebi senywe abasomesa. Mutengayo omwoyo ko mwahasuna ohutegeera.
4.2: Ebi mbasomesa biraŋi olwʼehyo mutabiŋwangaho.
4.3: Ni naali ni kiiri mu nyumba ya laata yange ni kiiri museere muŋere era ni ndi mulala hu maayi yange,
4.4: bbaabba gaasomesanga ni gandoma ati, “Nʼonahuumenga ebiragiro byange mu mwoyo gugwo oja huwangaala.
4.5: Nenda obe mwana alimo amagesi era ategeera siwibiriranga bibono ebi kuloma era sobiŋwangaho.
4.6: Solehanga magesi olwohuba gaja huhuhuuma era yendanga ohuba nʼamagesi, gaja huhulabirira.
4.7: Ohusuna amagesi njʼehiitu ehisinga obuhulu mu byosibyosi. Wayire hihuŋiraho ebiitu byosibyosi aye ofubanga wagasuna.
4.8: Yendanga amagesi galihugulumisa waaba wʼamaani bugali gafumbetererenga galihuŋeesa eŋono.
4.9: Amagesi galihutwihira engule eyʼeŋono gaja huhuŋeesa engule eyʼobuŋoono.”
4.10: Mwana wase ŋulirisanga ebibono ebi kuloma, oja huwangaala.
4.11: Kuluŋamya mu ngira ayʼamagesi era kulaga engira enduŋamu.
4.12: Nʼonabenga nʼogenda sooja hwegumula sooja hwetega nʼoduluma.
4.13: Ŋira esomesa yange ngʼehihulu soyiŋwangaho, oyihuumanga bulaŋi olwohuba njʼobulamu wuwo.
4.14: Otaholanga ebi bahosi bʼebibi bahola oba ohugenderanga mu magira gʼabahola ebibi.
4.15: Ehyo ohyebayanga era soholanga hya nibo otagenderanga ŋalala nʼabaatu hyʼabo,
4.16: olwohuba abahosi bʼebibi sibaŋenyuha ni bataholire bibi, sibaŋenyuha ohutusaho ni bakohiise omuutu.
4.17: Ebi balya nʼebi banywa mbebyo ebi baba ni basunire mu hutemula abahyawe.
4.18: Aye ekola yʼabagwalaafu yiri hyʼohwanuuha hwʼeryuba ni litandihirisa ohuŋwayo, enjase yitiina ni yeyongera hweyongera ohwola olu guba mu muusi tangalwe.
4.19: Ne ekola yʼabahosi bʼebibi yiri hyʼehiirema ehiŋambire oti ngu ngu ngu sibamanyire ehi begumulaho.
4.20: Mwana wase, taayo omwoyo hu ebibono byange ŋuliirisa ebi ndoma.
4.21: Bitahuŋwanga mu biŋeego obihuumanga hu mwoyo gugwo,
4.22: olwohuba bireeta obulamu eyiri abo ababitegeera era bulesi eyiri omubiri gwʼomuutu.
4.23: Mu byosibyosi, huumanga omwoyo gugwo olwohuba njʼesimuho yʼobulamu.
4.24: Yeŋalamenga ohuloma ebyakalebule, weŋalenga ohuloma ebi otamanyireho mutwe nʼamagulu.
4.25: Luŋamya emoni eyi oba nʼotiina, yegumyenga ohulengerera mu moni eyi oja.
4.26: Teresanga amagendere gago gabe maluŋamu era ogumirenga ohuhola ebiitu ebiraŋi.

5.1: Mwana wase, ŋira ebibono ebyʼamagesi ebi kuŋa ngʼehihulu oŋuliirise bulaŋi ebibono byange ebi huleetera ohutegeera,
5.2: wahamanya ehiraŋi ehyʼohuhola, ko ebi oloma birage biiti oli wʼamagesi.
5.3: Ebibono byʼomuhasi omuhwedi biŋomerera hyʼomudugere nʼendoma yiye yiri hyʼamafuta gʼemizayiti.
5.4: Aye hu komerero aluluŋa hyʼenduse mwogi era wabulabe hyʼempiima enjogi hu mbega jombi.
5.5: Singa omwetehera, oja hutiina mu hufa engira eyi aŋambire ehuŋira yimagombe.
5.6: Gabbaama gaŋwa hu ngira ereeta obulamu amagira gage magodami aye sahimanyire bbe.
5.7: Olwʼehyo baana bange, mupulirise mutabbaamanga huŋwa hu bibono ebi mbalomera.
5.8: Mweŋalenga ebikolwa bibye era simutiinanga ŋaapi nʼomulyango gwʼenyumba yiye.
5.9: Singa ohihola oja hufiirwa eŋono liryo abandi abaŋuma hisa baliriŋira,
5.10: abagwira baja huŋira obuŋinda wuwo omuutu owundi gaaba njʼonyumirwa ohuhalabana huhwo.
5.11: Hu komerero yʼobulamu wuwo oja hubinda omubiri ni guŋoyeho enyama.
5.12: Oja hwehebulisa oti, “Lwahiina mu mwoyo gwange nacaawa ohulabulwa ohu bapanga era mu bulamu wange nanyoomanga abandabula!
5.13: Sinaŋulirisanga basomesa bange oba huŋuliirisa abo abandabbiranga.
5.14: Ŋaahani nolire ohusihiiriha era swale mu lwijuuye!”
5.15: Omuhasi wuwo ali hyʼesobere yʼamaaji amalaŋi, olwʼehyo nywanga amaaji agahuluhuta ni gaŋwa mu sobere yiyo.
5.16: Hisaana amaaji gago ohuhuluhutira mu nguudo, esulo jʼamaaji gago ohuhuluhutira mu nabiŋwera?
5.17: Leha amaaji gomu sulo ejo gabe gogo weŋene era sogabananga nʼabaatu abandi.
5.18: Leha omuhasi wuwo abenga hyʼesulo eyʼekabi era osangaalenga olwʼomuhasi oyu wasuna ni muhiiri bavubuka.
5.19: Omuhasi wuwo muŋoono era mulaŋi leha amabeere gage gahusangaasenga endaalo josijosi era leha ohwenda huhwe eyi oli huhuŋambirirenga habuhyabuhya.
5.20: Mwana wase, lwahiina omuhasi omuhwedi ahuhenamo esamuuna? Lwahiina muhabeene geeba omwoyo gugwo?
5.21: Musengwa abona byosibyosi ebi ohola era hiisi aŋa oja ahubona.
5.22: Omuhosi wʼebibi agwa mu mitego jʼebibi bibye omwene. Emitego jʼebibi bibye jimuŋamba.
5.23: Aja hufa olwʼohutaŋuga wongo wuwe aja huŋaba olwʼobuŋubeebe wuwe.

6.1: Mwana wase, singa weyimirira owahyo olwʼebbanja, nʼoba nʼofugiiriye ohumuteraŋo omusingo ohumuŋola,
6.2: singa weboŋa olwʼendagaano yiyo ebibono ebi waloma ebyene byahuboŋa,
6.3: wedanya mu mihono jije. Olwʼehyo otiinanga wamwegayirira afugiirire musalemo endagaano.
6.4: Otagayaalanga huhihola otaŋuumula nʼohiiri huhihola.
6.5: Wefubengaho hyʼenjobe olu yefubaho embiro ohuŋona omuŋiimi, hyʼenyuni egululuha ohuŋwa mu lubanjo. Ohweŋala obudoto
6.6: Mudoto ewe, ŋeega hu kola yʼamage ohene weege ogobolemo amagesi.
6.7: Amage gaŋuma mutangirisi wayire muŋugi oba nyapala,
6.8: aye gahola nʼamaani ohwendobooli gewungira emere eyi galya ohwefula.
6.9: Kale mudoto ewe olyosa ŋe ohuŋenyuha? Oja huŋwa ŋaali mwiro?
6.10: Oŋosa oti, “Leha punguleho ahalo ŋatotono, pongereho ŋatotono, pumuleho ŋatotono,”
6.11: aye obugadi wuja huhugwira hyʼomwibi, obugadi bulihulumba hyʼomutemu.
6.12: Abaatu abaŋuma mugaso era abahosi bʼebibi batiina hiisi ŋaatu ni bageesya syetu.
6.13: Bahola obubonero wʼobudulingi ni baminanira emoni, ni banyeenya amagulu era ni basoosya nʼolwala.
6.14: Abahosi bʼebibi bategeha huhola bibi mu mwoyo jaawe era sibalehera huleeta bigosi.
6.15: Ebi bahola bija hubaŋweramo ebigosi ni batamanyire era baja husihiiriha ni ŋaŋuma huŋona.
6.16: Ŋaliŋo ebiitu mukaaga ebi Musengwa acaawa, biri musanvu ebyʼembiho eyi ali,
6.17: ekeja eyʼamalala nʼebibono ebyʼobudulingi nʼobutemu
6.18: nʼomwoyo ogupanga ekwe nʼohudulumirira ohuhola ebicaamu,
6.19: omujulizi ajofumula ebyʼobudulingi, nʼomuutu aleeta ohutawuujuha mu mago. Ohulabula ohuŋamba hu buhwedi
6.20: Mwana wase, oŋambanga ebiragiro bya lataawo era solehanga ebi maawo ahusomesa.
6.21: Ebibono ebyo obihuumanga hu mwoyo gugwo obyesidihanga mu mamiro.
6.22: Bija huhuluŋamyanga nʼogenda bija huhuhuumanga nʼoŋenyuhire era bija hulomanga ni neewe nʼosisimuhire,
6.23: olwohuba ebiragiro biri hyʼetaala ohuhuŋa enjase, bija huhusomesa ohufuga owongo nʼohuhutangirira mu ngira eyʼobulamu.
6.24: Bija huhutaasa omuhasi omuhwedi, bihutuse hu muhabeene ali nʼebibono ebihongeresa.
6.25: Otegombanga buŋoono wuwe otaleha keja yʼemoni jije huhuhongeresa.
6.26: Omuhasi malaaya bamugula hu bbeeyi yʼemere aye ohwenda muhabeene hihuleetera ohufiirwa obulamu wuwo.
6.27: Omuutu aŋanga gagegera hu hifuba hihye amanda agekeeka, engoye jije ndijinye?
6.28: Oba omuutu asobola ohugendera hu manda agekeeka amagulu ndigababuhe?
6.29: Pohiri hiityo nʼomuutu aŋenyuha ni muhabeene, hiisi ahihola baja humuboneresa.
6.30: Singa omuutu geeba olwohuba abaaye afa enjala, sibamusoniŋa.
6.31: Singa bamuŋamba, aja huliŋa emirundi musanvu nʼolu hiba ti ali nʼohutunda ebi ali ni nabyo mu mago gage byosibyosi.
6.32: Aye ahwedesania ni muha owahye aba muŋubeebe. Oyo ahihola, asihiirisa bulamu wuwe omwene.
6.33: Bali mwosaho ebisago era balimutala ehiswalo ehi aliba nʼasunire sihirimuŋwaho,
6.34: olwohuba ewuba lyʼomusinde omwene muhasi muhambwe era saaliba nʼehisa ni gegalula.
6.35: Salifugiirira ndiŋi, saaja huŋira mutango wayire mubbala guutye.

7.1: Mwana wase, hebuliranga ebi kulaabbira, era siwibiriranga biragiro byange.
7.2: Hola ebi kuloma ohuhola oja hubaŋo mulamu. Huumanga ebi kusomesa ngʼolu ohuuma emunge yʼemoni yiyo.
7.3: Hiisi hiseera obihuumanga era obiŋandiihe hu mwoyo gugwo.
7.4: Yendanga amagesi ngʼolu wenda mbojooyo era wende ohutegeera hyʼolu wenda meriiwo owohu mwoyo.
7.5: Hija huhuhingirisa omuhasi omuhwedi era bihuŋonie ohutiinira hu bibono bibye ebisendasenda. Obukodyo wʼomuhwedi
7.6: Lulala naheja ebulafu ni ndi ŋa dinisa yʼenyumba yange,
7.7: nga mbona abavubuka ababuyabuya ne nehalirisamo mulala owaali omuŋubeebe.
7.8: Nabita mu ngira huupi nʼekoona, aŋaali enyumba yʼomuhasi omuhwedi oyo,
7.9: ehyʼegulo mu hiirema ehidaayi, ehiirema ehyʼamaani aŋa hiijira.
7.10: Ngʼaŋo omuhasi owambala ebyambalo ebisendasenda aŋwayo ni genda amuŋigule omwoyo.
7.11: Omuhasi oyo gaali aŋuma soni era atehalisa ŋango.
7.12: Gaberereranga ni gereresa mu hiisi luguudo era nomu nabiŋwera.
7.13: Gatiina ngʼagwa omuvubuka oyo mu hifuba, nga gooma emoni amuhejaho amuloma ati,
7.14: “Engo ndiyo nʼeŋongo eyʼohutabagana olwa leero noherehise oweyamo wange.
7.15: Olwʼehyo nijire ni kwendula era njono kwageene ŋano.
7.16: Naalire obuliri wange nʼamasuuka aga bahola mu lugoye olulaŋi olwa laasi ohuŋwa e Misiri.
7.17: Obuliri mbuhubbireho ahaloosa ahamiira eyi baahola mu bubbaani nʼaloowe ko ni sinamooni.
7.18: Nja hutiine huhyese owiire ni hunywa obulamu, leha hwesangaasemo,
7.19: olwohuba engo wamwange aŋumaayo, gatiinire mu lugendo aŋaleeŋi.
7.20: Gatiinire nʼehihapu hyʼebbeesa aja hugobola ni ŋabitireŋo ewiiki ebiri.”
7.21: Nʼebibono ebi hooŋahooŋa, galeetera omuvubuka ohubbaama gamusendasenda nʼebibono bibye.
7.22: Aŋo ni naaŋo gamulondaho hyʼeŋombe eyi baŋira ohwita, hya namoli agwa mu mutego,
7.23: paka olu hasaale hamufumita omwoyo hyʼenyuni eyingira mu lubanjo. Sigamanya ati obulamu wuwe waali butiina emayeera!
7.24: Kale baana bange muŋulire ebibono ebi ndoma era mute emyoyo hubi mbaloma.
7.25: Mutaleha muhasi oyo hwiba myoyo jenywe oba hubbaamira hu magira gage.
7.26: Agwihiise bangi era mu butuufu oweene abasihiirihiise sibabaliha.
7.27: Enyumba yiye ngira ehuŋira emagombe, njʼengira eyaŋaapi eyitiina mu hufa!

8.1: Ŋuliirisa amagesi ni galanga era ŋulira ohutegeera ni hulanga.
8.2: Hu lusozi ohuupi nʼengira nomu masaŋangira gemeerera,
8.3: ŋa miryango ejingira mu bibuga aŋa bengirira, paŋa alomera nʼamaani ati,
8.5: Enywe abaŋuma ehimumanyire muŋangale enywe abaŋubeebe musune ohutegeera.
8.6: Muŋuliirise olwohuba ndi nʼebyamahulu ebi nenda hubalomera. Omunwa gwange ngwasamya ohuloma ebituufu.
8.7: Ebi ndoma byʼamazima era sikolagana nʼobudulingi.
8.8: Ebi ndoma byosibyosi bituufu era muŋumamo budulingi oba ohucaamya.
8.9: Ebi ndoma bitegereheha eyiri ategeera era eyiri amanyire, biri ŋalafu.
8.10: Musaleŋo ohuŋira ebi mbalegera ohusinga ohuŋira efeeza, ohumanya ohusinga ezaabbu ekenene,
8.11: olwohuba amagesi gamuŋendo bugali ohusinga amabaale aga balanga baati rubbisi. Eŋuma ehi oŋembaho ehiŋeraŋerana nʼamagesi.
8.12: “Ese magesi, menya ŋalala nʼohusalaŋo ohulaŋi. Manyire aŋʼohwagaana amagesi nʼobutegeefu.
8.13: Ohutya Musengwa hihuleetera ohucaawa ehibi. Ese caawa ohwehudumbasa nʼohwepaapaaha era caawa ekola etali nuŋamu nʼendoma embi.
8.14: Ndi wʼamaani nʼohutegeera, kola etegeha era najoheresa.
8.15: Njeeda abahabaha ohuŋuga nʼabatangirisi ohutaaŋo amagambi amalaŋi.
8.16: Njeeda abaŋugi ohuŋuga era njeeda abahombe ohulamula bulaŋi hu hyalo hino.
8.17: Nenda abo abanyenda era abo abanyendula, bambona.
8.18: Ndi nʼobuŋinda nʼeŋono obuŋinda owolubererera ko nʼohutehubbira.
8.19: Ebibala byange bisinga ezaabbu endaŋi, ebi ngaba bisinga efeeza endaŋi.
8.20: Ebi kola biruŋamu, era kola ni tehubbira.
8.21: Abanyenda mbaŋa obuŋinda era esitoowa jaawe jejula.
8.22: “ Musengwa gaali ni nange mu hutandiha, gahihola nʼahiiri hutonda hiitu hyosihyosi.
8.23: Naaliŋo ohuŋwa mu hutandiha ehyalo ni hihiiri nʼohubaŋo.
8.24: Nasaaliwa agayanja ni gahiiri hubaaŋo nʼesulo ejiŋwamo amaaji ni jihiiri hubaaŋo,
8.25: naaliŋo esozi ni jihiiri hubaaŋo ko engingi ni jihiiri hubaaŋo,
8.26: ko Hatonda atonde ehyalo oba eroba hu hyalo.
8.27: Naaliŋo nʼataŋo egulu mu hifo hyalyo, naaliŋo ko nʼataŋo esalo yʼenyanja.
8.28: Naaliŋo nʼatonda ebireri gabita mu bbanga era nʼataŋo esulo mwiroba.
8.29: Naaliŋo nʼataŋo esalo ya gayanja amaaji gatatuuma hiragiro hihye, era nʼolu gataŋo omusingi gwʼehyalo,
8.30: ndiise owaali omuhubbi wʼepulaani oyu gaali ni naye. Ndiise owamwesiimisanga habuhyabuhya. Nʼasangaalanga olwʼohubaŋo huhwe,
8.31: naali musangaafu olwʼehyalo ehi gatonda era ni sangaala olwʼabaatu aba gatonda.
8.32: “Ŋaahani baana bange, muŋuliirise olwohuba bali nʼekabi abagendera mu magira gange.
8.33: Muŋulirisenga ebi mbasomesa mwahaba bagesi era mutabigayaliriranga.
8.34: Gesiimire oyo aŋulira ebi ndoma abo ababererera hu lwigi lwange ni banindirira hu mulyango ogwingira ewange,
8.35: olwohuba abo abaneeŋa baba bafumbuuye obulamu era basuna owende ohuŋwa ewa Musengwa.
8.36: Aye abo abataneeŋa bekosa abeene, bosibosi abatanyenda baba bendula hufa.”

9.1: Amagesi gatongooye enyumba yago era gayiholeyeeho nʼesiiro musanvu.
9.2: Gategehire enyama yaago nʼebyohunywa era gategehire emeeza eyʼohugabuliraho.
9.3: Gatumire abaŋeeresa baago abahasi ohwanirisa abaatu bosibosi. Galanga ni geemire mu hifo ehyegingihiriri ŋamugulu mu hibuga gaati,
9.4: “Leha oyo atamanyire gaaje ewange.” Era ehyo ahiroma abo abaŋubeebe ati,
9.5: “Muuje mulye emere era munywe omwenge gwʼemizabbibbu.
9.6: Lehaŋo obuŋubeebe buwo ko wahaba mulamu ogendere mu hutegeera.”
9.7: Hiisi anenya omuutu omunyoomi bamuduha humuduha, oyo aloma hu muhosi wʼebibi njʼakosewa.
9.8: Sogesyangaho huluŋamya omuutu omunyoomi olwohuba aja huhucaawa olwʼehyo. Ne singa obuulirira omugesi aja huhwenda.
9.9: Laabbira omugesi, aja hweyongera ohuba mugesi somesa omuutu omugwalaafu aja hweyongera ohumanya.
9.10: Ohutya Musengwa njʼetandiha yʼamagesi era hyabutegeefu ohumanya Oyo Omwawufu.
9.11: Hiri hiityo olwohuba amagesi gaja huhuleetera ohuwangaala emyaha emyene emingi.
9.12: Ohuba nʼamagesi hihugasa ndiiwe wamwene. Era onaba muutu omunyoomi, ewe wamwene ndiiwe aja hubonaabona.
9.13: Obuŋubeebe buli hyʼomuhasi aŋumamo soni, alomera ŋamugulu era aŋuma ehi amanyire.
9.14: Gehala ŋa mulyango gwʼenyumba yiye, hu tebe aŋegingihiriri aŋa boneherera mu hibuga,
9.15: nʼalanga abo ababita, abali hu ngendo jaawe ati,
9.16: “Leha oyo atamanyire gaaje ewange.” Era ehyo ahiroma abo abaŋubeebe ati,
9.17: “Amaaji agowiibi gaŋooma era ebiryo ebi baliira mu ngiso njʼebisinga ohuŋooma.”
9.18: Aye abaŋubeebe sibamanyire baati mu nyumba yiye yiriyo abafu era baati abageni babe bali emagombe.

10.1: Engero ja Sulemaani: Omwana omugesi asangaasa semwana aye omuŋubeebe anakuŋasa nyina.
10.2: Obuŋinda obu osuna mu bukupania buŋuma ehi bugasa aye ohuba owʼamazima hihuleetera ohuwangaala.
10.3: Musengwa saleeha mugwalaafu ohuhaya emere aye aloberesa abahosi bʼebibi ohusuna ebi balubirira.
10.4: Ohulera engalo hireeta obugadi aye ohutamba nʼamaani hireeta obuŋinda.
10.5: Omuutu awunga emere mu hiseera ehyʼegesa aba mugesi aye oyo aba mu hufuluta mu hiseera ehyʼohuhungula aŋambya esoni.
10.6: Omugwalaafu aja husuna ekabi aye abahosi bʼebibi baloma ni bawihirira hu bibi ebi bahola.
10.7: Omugwalaafu bamuhebulira ngʼomuutu owʼekabi aye omuhosi wʼebibi baja humwibirira mangu.
10.8: Omuutu omutegeefu afugiirira amagesi aga bamuŋa aye omuŋubeebe owerohopa, gesihiirisa omwene.
10.9: Omuutu owebisya obulaŋi abaaŋo neŋuma ehimuluma hu mwoyo aye oyo agendera mu ngira engodami, sibalwa humuŋambya.
10.10: Omuutu ataloma mazima aleeta ebigosi aye oyo aloma nʼatabbumbirya aleeta emiyaaya.
10.11: Ebibono byʼomugwalaafu biri hyʼesulo ejireeta obulamu aye abahosi bʼebibi baloma ni bawihirira hu bibi ebi bahola.
10.12: Obucaayi buleeta ohuduhana aye ohwenda huleeta ohusoniŋa ebibi byosibyosi.
10.13: Omuutu omutegeefu aloma ebirimo amagesi aye omuŋubeebe asaanamo endabusi.
10.14: Abaatu abagesi benda ohumanya aye endoma yʼomuŋubeebe yireeta ohusihiiriha.
10.15: Obuŋinda wʼomuutu buli hyʼehiteepe ehigumu ehyeswanigirihiise ehibuga aye obugadi buleetera omugadi ohusihiiriha.
10.16: Omugwalaafu bamuŋa omuhemba ogwʼohuwangaala aye enyingisa yʼomuhosi wʼebibi yimuleetera ohweyongera ohuhola ebibi.
10.17: Oyo afugiirira ebi bamusomesa ahuuma obulamu wuwe aye oyo agaana ohumunenya, abbaamya abandi.
10.18: Omuutu ahweha obucaayi wuwe, aba mudulingi era ni nooyo ageya abahye aba muŋubeebe.
10.19: Mu hwelomaaja obugali mubamo ohubbenga aye oyo ahuuma olulimi lulwe mugesi.
10.20: Ebibono byʼomuutu omugwalaafu biri hyʼefeeza esengeje aye ebi omuhosi wʼebibi aŋeega mu mwoyo biŋuma mugaso.
10.21: Ebibono byʼomuutu omugwalaafu bigasa bangi aye ehiita abaŋubeebe hutamanya husalaŋo bulaŋi.
10.22: Ekabi eji Musengwa aŋa jireeta obuŋinda era sijireeta naku.
10.23: Omuŋubeebe anyumirwa ohuhola ebibi aye omuutu omugesi anyumirwa bugali ohwega.
10.24: Ehi omuhosi wʼebibi atya hija humwolaho aye ebi omugwalaafu asuubira aja hubisuna.
10.25: Abahosi bʼebibi basihiiriha hibuyaga ni gaaja aye abagwalaafu baba bagumu emirembe nʼemirembe.
10.26: Sotumanga omuutu omudoto, aja huhulumya hyʼomwenge endota hu meeno oba eriisi mu moni.
10.27: Ohutya Musengwa hireeta ohuwangaala aye abahosi bʼebibi sibawangaala.
10.28: Ebi bagwalaafu basuubira bibaleetera esangaalo aye ebi bahosi bʼebibi basuubira sibyolerera.
10.29: Musengwa ahuuma abaatu abʼamazima aye asihiirisa abahola ebibi.
10.30: Eŋuma ehiritiisatiisa abagwalaafu aye abahosi bʼebibi sibalimenya hu hyalo huno.
10.31: Ebi abagwalaafu baloma byʼamagesi aye baja huŋoleresa abadulingi.
10.32: Abagwalaafu bamanya ebi basaana ohuloma aye abahosi bʼebibi bamanyire bigodami byereere.

11.1: Musengwa acaawa abatambisa ebipimo ebicaamu aye asiima ebipimo ebituufu.
11.2: Ohwepaahapaaha huleeta ohuswala aye ohweŋomeha hihufuula mugesi.
11.3: Onahola ebiraŋi amazima gaja huhuluŋamya aye abatali besigwa basihiiriha.
11.4: Obuŋinda buŋuma mugaso hu ludaalo olwʼohusaliraho emisango aye ohuhola ebiruŋamu hiri huŋonia ohufa.
11.5: Obugwalaafu wʼomuutu bumuleetera ohumulaga ehyʼohuhola aye ebikolwa byʼabahosi bʼebibi bibaleetera ohusihiiriha.
11.6: Obuluŋamu wʼabagwalaafu bubanunula aye ohwegomba ohubi ohwabatali besigwa hubafuuhira mutego.
11.7: Esuubi lyʼomuhosi wʼebibi anafa lisihiiriha. Era ebi galubiriranga ohuhola olwʼamaani gage byosi bihoma.
11.8: Omuutu omugwalaafu aŋunuha ebigosi aye omuhosi wʼebibi abigwamo.
11.9: Omuutu atali mwesigwa alimirira muliranwawe aye amagesi gʼomugwalaafu gamuŋonia.
11.10: Omuutu omugwalaafu anasuna ekabi abaatu mu hibuga basangaala aye omuhosi wʼebibi anafa basaŋalya.
11.11: Olwʼekabi jʼomugwalaafu ehibuga hifuuha hyʼeŋono aye ebibono byʼabahosi bʼebibi bihireetera ohusihiiriha.
11.12: Hyabuŋubeebe ohunyooma abahyo aye omuutu ategeera geŋolerera.
11.13: Omuutu owʼolugambo sahuuma byama aye omwesigwa abihuuma.
11.14: Ŋanaŋumaŋo omuutu owʼamagesi aluŋamya egwanga hirireetera ohugwa aye aŋali abaŋi bʼamagesi abangi, ŋabaaŋo obuŋangusi.
11.15: Oyo ateeraŋo oweŋola oyu atamanyire omusingo, himuŋweramo ohubonaabona aye ohutabyeyingisamo njʼehisinga.
11.16: Omuhasi owʼehyere bamuŋa eŋono aye abaatu abaŋuma sambo basuna obuŋinda woŋene.
11.17: Omuutu owʼehisa aganyulwamo aye omuhambwe omwene gereetera ebigosi.
11.18: Omuhosi wʼebibi asuna ebiitu ebyʼobudulingi aye onahola ebiruŋamu oja husuna ebiitu ebyʼamazima.
11.19: Omuutu ahola ebiraŋi asuna obulamu aye ahola ebibi himuŋweramo ohufa.
11.20: Musengwa acaawa abʼemyoyo ejekirihindi aye asangaalira abo abahola ebituufu.
11.21: Obutuufu aŋaŋuma hubuusabuusa baligudya abahosi bʼebibi, aye abaatu abagwalaafu baja hwebeera bulaŋi.
11.22: Omuhasi omuŋoono aŋuma episa ali hyʼepeta eyʼezaabbu mu suulu yʼembiiji.
11.23: Ebiitu ebi bagwalaafu baŋeegaho biba biraŋi aye ebi bahosi bʼebibi basuubira ohuhola bireeta obugosi.
11.24: Ŋaliŋo aŋamba ebbeesa gayeeda abaatu era geyongera ohuba muŋinda aye nakumuumu geyongera hwafuŋala.
11.25: Omuutu omugabi aja husuna obuŋinda, oyo ayeeda abahye yeesi baja humuyeeda.
11.26: Omuutu ahweha emere nʼahuuma ebbeeyi ohweyongera, bamulomaho wubi aye oyo abagusa bamuloma biraŋi byereere.
11.27: Ebigendererwa bibyo binaba biraŋi baja huhusiima aye ebigosi bija hugwira oyo abyendula.
11.28: Oyo owesiga obuŋinda wuwe aligwa aye omuutu ahola ebiruŋamu aja huhulahulana hyʼamahoose gʼomusaala.
11.29: Oyo aleetera amago gaawe ebigosi alihaya ehyʼohusikira era omuŋubeebe aja hufuuha mwidu wʼoyo omugesi.
11.30: Ebiitu ebi mugwalaafu ahola musaala oguleeta obulamu era oyo ali nʼesambo endaŋi abandi bajironderera.
11.31: Obanga omugwalaafu bamuŋa omuhemba gugwe hu hyalo huno, ne olwo hiriba hiitye eyiri abatamanyire Hatonda ko nʼabahosi bʼebibi?

12.1: Omuutu afugiirira ohumuŋa amagesi aba genda ohumanya aye oyo atenda humunenya nagodeeme aba muŋubeebe.
12.2: Omuutu omulaŋi asuna obuhoda ohuŋwa eyiri Musengwa aye Musengwa asalira abakuyikuyi omusango.
12.3: Ohuba omuhosi wʼebibi sihireeta obuhuumi hu bulamu wʼomuutu aye eŋuma aŋanga ohugengula omugwalaafu.
12.4: Omuhasi omwegenderesa agima abaatu baŋa wamwe eŋono aye omuhasi aŋuma esambo aba oti bulwaye obuleetera amagumba ga wamwe ohuseseŋa.
12.5: Etegeha jʼabaatu abagwalaafu jiba jʼamazima aye amagesi agʼabahosi bʼebibi gabudulingi.
12.6: Endoma yʼabahosi bʼebibi yahujuha mafugi aye endoma yʼabagwalaafu yibanunula.
12.7: Abahosi bʼebibi basihiiriha bosibosi aye olulyo lwʼabagwalaafu nirwo siruŋwaŋo.
12.8: Singa oba mugesi, abaatu baja huhusiima aye onaba muŋubeebe, balihunyooma.
12.9: Hiraŋi abaatu ohuhunyooma ne waholerera obulamu wuwo ohuhira olu weranga ohuba omwegingihiriri aye nʼohaya nʼehyohulya.
12.10: Abaatu abalaŋi balabirira ebyayo byawe aye abahosi bʼebibi sibafayo hu byawe.
12.11: Omuutu ahola emirimo nʼamaani asuna emere nyingi aye oyo ahenera ebiseera hu biitu ebitagasa muŋubeebe.
12.12: Abahosi bʼebibi baŋemba hu huhola bibi aye abagwalaafu sibatangatanga.
12.13: Obudulingi wʼababi wubaŋambirayo abeene aye omugwalaafu aŋunuha ebigosi.
12.14: Omuutu asuna omuhemba ohwema hubi aloma nʼebi ahola hiisi muutu aja husuna ehimusaanira.
12.15: Omuŋubeebe aŋeega mbo ati hiisi ehi ahola hiraŋi aye omugesi aŋuliirisa ebi bamulomera.
12.16: Omuŋubeebe saalwa hulaga busungu wuwe aye omuutu omutegeefu geŋomeha nʼolu bamuduha.
12.17: Omujulizi owʼamazima aŋa obujulizi obutuufu aye abadulingi baloma byakalebule.
12.18: Ebibono abaatu abaŋubeebe ebi beromboja bifumita bugali hyʼepiima aye ebyʼamagesi bireeta ohuŋona.
12.19: Amazima sigaŋwaŋo emirembe nʼemirembe aye obudulingi wa haseera buseera.
12.20: Abahosi bʼebibi bejuuye budulingi mu myoyo aye abo abateesa ebiraŋi baleeta esangaalo.
12.21: Eŋuma habi ahoola hu mugwalaafu aye ebigosi bingi bigwira abahosi bʼebibi.
12.22: Musengwa acaawira erala abaloma ebyʼobudulingi aye asangaalira abo abaloma amazima.
12.23: Omuutu omutegeefu sigehenamo ebi amanyire aye abaŋubeebe berebula.
12.24: Ohuhola nʼamaani hihuleetera ohuŋuga aye obugayaafu buhuleetera ohuba omwidu.
12.25: Omwoyo omuti guhuhenaho esangaalo aye ebibono ebiraŋi bigobosamo amaani.
12.26: Omuutu omugwalaafu aluŋamya meriiwe aye amagira gʼabahosi bʼebibi gabaŋira mu hubbaama.
12.27: Sosuna ehi wenda onaba nʼoli mudoto aye atamba nʼamaani aligwa mu biitu.
12.28: Engira yʼomugwalaafu yimuleetera ohuba nʼobulamu era oluguudo olwo luli ŋaleeŋi nʼohufa.

13.1: Omwana omugesi ataayo omwoyo hu ebi semwana amulaabbira aye omunyoomi saŋulira nʼolu muhangavula.
13.2: Omuutu omugwalaafu asuna omuhemba olwʼebibono ebiraŋi ebi aloma aye abo abadulingi baŋemba huhuhola ebitoola.
13.3: Oyo owegenderesa mu ndoma ahuuma obulamu wuwe aye oyo oweromaja hifaabi gesihiirisa omwene.
13.4: Omuutu omudoto safuna ehi gegomba aye oyo owʼehyonji asuna ehi aba ni genda.
13.5: Omuutu omugwalaafu acaawa obudulingi aye omuhosi wʼebibi ahola ebiswasa.
13.6: Esambo jʼomugwalaafu jimuŋonia aye ehibi hyʼomubbengi himuhubbiraŋo.
13.7: Ŋaliŋo omuutu oweranga ohuba muŋinda atenga ko panaŋo ne ŋabaaŋo owehosa ati mugadi aye nga ali nʼobuŋinda buhehere.
13.8: Omuŋinda atambisa obuŋinda wuwe ohwenunula mu higosi aye omugadi aŋuma ehimweralihirisa.
13.9: Omugwalaafu ali hyʼenjase eyimulisa hiisi ŋaatu aye omuhosi wʼebibi ali hyʼetaala eyisimire.
13.10: Amalala galeeta obuyoga aye hiraŋi ohuba omuutu aŋeeha amagesi.
13.11: Obuŋinda obu muutu asuna mu ngeri embi buŋwaŋo mangumangu aye oyo abuhumbaania polapola weyongera ohwala.
13.12: Ohuŋuma esuubi hireetera omwoyo ohulwala aye ehi obaaye nʼoŋembaho hinolerera hihusangaasa.
13.13: Oyo anyooma ebi bamubulirira aja husihiiriha aye oyo agondera ehiragiro alisuna omuhemba.
13.14: Esomesa yʼomuutu omugesi yiri oti sulo eyireeta obulamu era yireetera omuutu ohuŋwa mu mitego jʼohufa.
13.15: Ohusalaŋo ohulaŋi hihuleetera owende aye abo abatali besigwa baŋambire oluguudo olutiina mu husihiiriha.
13.16: Omuutu omutegeefu ahena huŋeega hu hiitu ko gahihola aye omuŋubeebe golesa obutamanya wuwe.
13.17: Omuhwenda omuhosi wʼebibi ahugwisa mu bugosi aye oyo omwesigwa aleeta emiyaaya.
13.18: Atenda humubuulirira gafuŋala gahena gaswala aye aleha bamunenya, asuna eŋono.
13.19: Omuutu asangaala singa asuna ehi abaaye nʼaŋembaho aye abaŋubeebe sibenda hulehaŋo ebibi byawe.
13.20: Oyo ahola omuhumba nʼomuutu omugesi yeesi afuuha mugesi aye oyo asyana nʼabaŋubeebe gereetera hubonaabona.
13.21: Ebigosi birumba abo abahosi bʼebibi aye abagwalaafu basuna ebiraŋi.
13.22: Omuutu omulaŋi asuna obuŋinda obu aleeheraho nʼabejuhulu babe aye owʼomubbengi babubungihira bagwalaafu.
13.23: Endimiro yʼomugadi yisobola ohwama emere nyingi aye abatali bʼamazima sibamuganya huyirya.
13.24: Oyo ataŋamo mwana wuwe endabusi aba samwenda aye owenda omwana wuwe afaayo ohumuluŋamya.
13.25: Omugwalaafu alya geguta aye omuhosi wʼebibi asiiba nʼali njala.

14.1: Omuhasi omugesi gemeeresaŋo amago gage aye omuŋubeebe abbwagaŋo agage omwene.
14.2: Oyo agendera mu magira amaluŋamu atya Musengwa aye oyo agendera mu magodajami, alaga ati amujerega.
14.3: Endoma yʼomuŋubeebe yimuleetera ohumuhubba aye eyʼoyo ali nʼamagesi yimuhuuma.
14.4: Aŋaŋuma esaame ohulima eŋuma ehiba mu hyagi aye aŋa jiba ni jirima ebyagi bijula emere.
14.5: Omujulizi owʼamazima sadulinga aye omudulingi aloma ebyakalebule.
14.6: Omuutu omunyoomi nʼolu gendula amagesi sagasuna aye hyangu omutegeefu ohugasuna.
14.7: Yeŋale omuŋubeebe olwohuba ŋaŋuma ehyʼamagesi ehi oja hwega.
14.8: Omugesi ategeera ehyʼohuhola olwohuba mugesi aye omuŋubeebe aŋeega ati amanyire.
14.9: Abaŋubeebe bahola ehibi era ndibafeyo aye omuutu omulaŋi genenya.
14.10: Omuutu omwene njʼamanya enaku oba esangaalo ebiba hu mwoyo gugwe era ŋaŋuma aŋanga ohubigabana nʼowundi muwiijufu.
14.11: Amago gʼomuhosi wʼebibi gaja hufuuha gunda aye olulyo lwʼomugwalaafu luja husigala ni luhiiriŋo.
14.12: Ŋaliŋo ekola yʼebiitu eyiboneha ohuba endaŋi eyiri omuutu aye hu komerero ni yimuŋira mu hufa.
14.13: Enjeho jisobola ohuŋwamo enaku nʼesangaalo ohuŋwamo ohunakuŋala.
14.14: Omuutu omubi mu mwoyo alisuna ehimusaanira era nʼomulaŋi yeesi balimuŋa omuhemba ogumusaanira.
14.15: Omuŋubeebe afugiirira hiisi hiitu aye omutegeefu ahena hwetegeresa ko gabaho nʼehi ahola.
14.16: Omuutu omugesi atya ohugwa mu bigosi era geŋala ohuhola ebibi aye omuŋubeebe geranga mugesi era sigegenderesa mu ebi ahola.
14.17: Abaatu abatalwa hunyiiga bahola ebyʼobuŋubeebe era omuutu owʼekwe bamucaawa.
14.18: Abaŋubeebe bagendera mu buŋubeebe aye abategeefu basuna eŋono olwʼobumanyi.
14.19: Abahola ebibi balihubbira abalaŋi amafuha era ababbengi balihubbira abagwalaafu amafuha.
14.20: Eŋuma owenda omugadi era wayire muliranwawe samwenda aye abaŋinda baba nʼemihago mingi.
14.21: Hiba hibi omuutu ohunyooma muliranwawe aye besiimire abo abayeeda abagadi.
14.22: Abo abahola ebibi baŋaba aye abaatu abahola ebiraŋi babenda era babesiga.
14.23: Ohuhola emirimo nʼamaani hireeta amagoba aye olugambo lusaala enjala.
14.24: Obuŋinda wʼabagesi njʼeŋono lyawe aye omuŋubeebe amanyihira hu lwʼobuŋubeebe wuwe.
14.25: Omujulizi aloma amazima aŋonia obulamu wʼabaatu aye obujulizi owʼobudulingi siwesigiha.
14.26: Oyo atya Musengwa aba nʼaŋohweŋogoma era hireetera omuutu nʼabaana babe ohubaaho obuhuumi.
14.27: Ohutya Musengwa hiri oti sulo eyireeta obulamu, era hireetera omuutu ohuŋwa mu mitego jʼohufa.
14.28: Obungi wʼabaatu njʼeŋono lya habaha aye aŋaŋuma ehyo ŋaŋuma fuma.
14.29: Omuutu omugumikiriza aba mutegeefu aye owʼobusungu owaŋaapi ŋaapi alaga obuŋubeebe wuwe.
14.30: Omwoyo ogwijuuye emiyaaya guleetera omubiri ohuba mu mbeera endaŋi aye esaalwa yibosa amagumba.
14.31: Anyigirisa abagadi aba anyooma Oyo Owabatonda aye omuutu aŋambira abagadi ehisa aba aŋa Hatonda eŋono.
14.32: Abahosi bʼebibi bereetaho ebigosi olwʼebi bahola aye abagwalaafu nomu hufa baba nʼaŋohweŋogoma.
14.33: Hiisi hiŋeego hyʼomuutu omugesi hiba hyʼabutegeefu aye omuŋubeebe aŋuma ehyʼamagesi ehi amanyire.
14.34: Abaatu banaba bagwalaafu ehyo hiŋeesa egwanga lyawe eŋono aye ehibi hireeta ehiswalo.
14.35: Omuŋeeresa omulaŋi asangaasa habaha aye ahangavula oyo atahola mirimo bulaŋi.

15.1: Engobolamo endaŋi, yihahania ehiruŋi aye ebibono ebyʼehabyo bireeta obusungu.
15.2: Omuutu omugesi aloma ebisaana aye omuŋubeebe aloma ebiŋuma mahulu.
15.3: Musengwa abona hiisi ŋaatu era emoni jije ajitaaye hu bahosi bʼebibi nʼabagwalaafu.
15.4: Ebibono ebiŋonia biri hyʼomusaala oguleeta obulamu aye ebibono ebyʼobudulingi bibbwaga omwoyo.
15.5: Hya buŋubeebe ohuŋwa hu ebi lataawo gahusomesa aye hiisi aŋamba ebi bamulabbira aba mugesi.
15.6: Amago gʼomuutu omugwalaafu mubaamo ebyʼobuŋinda bingi aye ebyefuna byʼabahosi bʼebibi bibaŋweramo ebigosi.
15.7: Ebibono byʼabagesi bireetera abandi ohumanya aye ehyo sihiri mu myoyo jʼabaŋubeebe.
15.8: Musengwa genyinyalya eŋongo lyʼabahosi bʼebibi aye ohusaba hwʼabagwalaafu humusangaasa.
15.9: Musengwa acaawa esambo jʼabahosi bʼebibi aye genda abo abafayo ohuhola ebiruŋamu.
15.10: Singa oleha engira endaŋi baja huhuhangavula luhulu lwene era oyo acaawa ohumunenya aja mu hufa.
15.11: Musengwa aŋuma ehi atamanyire ehiŋamba hu hufa nʼohusihiiriha olwʼehyo eŋuma ehi atamanyire ehiri mu myoyo jʼabaatu.
15.12: Omunyoomi sigenda humulomaho era sigenda hwebuusaho hu bamuhiraho ohumanya.
15.13: Omwoyo omusangaafu guleeta amamwemwe mu moni aye ohulumwa hu mwoyo huleeta ohunakuŋala.
15.14: Omuutu owʼamagesi genda bugali ohwega aye omuŋubeebe gebona ati ali bulaŋi mu obuŋubeebe wuwe.
15.15: Obulamu wʼomugadi wijuuye bigosi aye abasangaafu mu myoyo nibo baba mu hweyagala.
15.16: Hiraŋi ohwebeera nʼahadiidiri onaba nʼotya Musengwa ohuhira ohuba nʼobuŋinda ehibbiiryo aye nʼoŋuma miyaaya.
15.17: Omala galiira eryani eryamagala ne ni mwendana ohusinga ohuliira ebinoli aye ni mwejuuye obucaayi.
15.18: Omuutu atalwa hunyiiga atanula etalo aye oyo aŋamba pola ebiitu gehahania obuduhani.
15.19: Onaba mudoto oja hwagaana ebigosi mu bulamu wuwo aye onaba mwesigwa sooja huba nʼobugosi.
15.20: Omwana omugesi asangaasa semwana aye omuŋubeebe anyooma nyina.
15.21: Obuŋubeebe wusangaasa abaŋuma magesi aye omuutu omutegeefu ahola ebisaana.
15.22: Aŋaŋuma huhuŋa magesi, etegeha siyolerera aye yolerera abaŋi bʼamagesi banaba ni bali bangi.
15.23: Hiisi muutu asangaalira engobolamo endaŋi era nga hisangaasa ohuba nʼendomaloma eyolaana mu hiseera ehituufu.
15.24: Abaatu abʼamagesi bagendera mu ngira eja ŋamugulu eyiri obulamu sosi engira eyija ŋaasi mu hufa.
15.25: Musengwa asihiirisa amago gʼomuutu owehudumbasa aye ahuuma ebiitu byʼanamwandu.
15.26: Musengwa acaawa ebiŋeego byʼabahosi bʼebibi aye ebyʼabagwalaafu bimusangaasa.
15.27: Omuutu owomuŋudu aleetera amago gage ebigosi aye oyo acaawa enguzi aja huwangaala.
15.28: Omugwalaafu asooka huŋeega mu mwoyo hu ehi aja huloma konyo gagobolamo aye omuhosi wʼebibi aloma hifaabi.
15.29: Musengwa aba ŋaleeŋi nʼabahosi bʼebibi aye aŋulira ohusaba hwʼabagwalaafu.
15.30: Ohumwemwejera huleeta esangaalo hu mwoyo era amaŋuliro amalaŋi gagobosa mu magumba amaani.
15.31: Aŋuliirisa ni bamunenya aja hufuuha mugesi.
15.32: Agaana ohwega gerumya omwene aye afugiirira ohumunenya geeyongera amagesi.
15.33: Ohutya Musengwa hireetera omuutu ohuba mugesi era ohuba omuutu oweyiisa ŋaasi, hihuŋeesa eŋono.

16.1: Omuutu ategeha mu mwoyo gugwe ebi gahendire ahole aye Musengwa njʼasalaŋo.
16.2: Osobola ohuŋeega oti hiisi ehi ohola hiraŋi aye Musengwa njʼamanyire ehiri mu mwoyo.
16.3: Etegeha jijo jiŋambye Musengwa aja hujoheresa.
16.4: Hiisi ehi Musengwa gataŋo hiri nʼehigendererwa era abahosi bʼebibi gabateeraŋo oludaalo olwʼohubaboneresa.
16.5: Musengwa genyinyalya abo bosibosi abepaahapaaha mu myoyo jaawe era mu butuufu oweene aja hubahangavula.
16.6: Ba wa hisa era mwesigwa, Hatonda aja huhusoniŋa ebibi era oyo atya Musengwa geŋala ohuhola ehibi.
16.7: Onaba nʼosangaasa Musengwa afuula abasigu babo ohuba bameeri babo.
16.8: Omala gaba nʼehitono ne nʼoli mugwalaafu ohuhira ohuba nʼehibbiryo hyʼobuŋinda nʼobusunira mu bukuyakuyi.
16.9: Hutegeha ebi hwahendire huhole aye Musengwa njʼasalaŋo ngʼolu binagende.
16.10: Ebi habaha aloma abiroma hu buŋangi wa Hatonda era ebi asalaŋo byʼamazima.
16.11: Emizaani nʼebipimo ebyolana bya Musengwa , era ebi bapimiraho byosibyosi bibye.
16.12: Habaha acaawa ebikolwa ebibi olwohuba ohuhola ebiitu mu buluŋamu hinywanywasa etebe eyʼobuŋugi.
16.13: Abahabaha basangaalira amazima era benda abo abaloma ebituufu.
16.14: Habaha analuŋa aŋanga geeta omuutu aye omuutu omugesi amuŋooyaŋooya.
16.15: Habaha anasangaala aŋo ŋabaaŋo obulamu era ohuba muhoda eyi ali hiri hyʼefula ohwendobooli.
16.16: Ohuba nʼamagesi hisinga ezaabbu era ohuba nʼohutegeera hisinga efeeza.
16.17: Abaatu abaluŋamu beŋalama amagira agabaleetera ohuhola ebibi olwʼehyo manya amagendere gago wahaŋonia obulamu wuwo.
16.18: Amalala galeeta ohusihiiriha, ohwepaahapaaha huŋwamo ehigo.
16.19: Omala gaba muutu owaŋaasi era waba ŋalala ni naabo ababanyigirisa ohuhira ohugabana ebyʼomunyago ni naabo abehudumbasa.
16.20: Hiisi aŋuliirisa ebi bamulabbira aja huhulahulana era gesiimire oyo owesiga Musengwa .
16.21: Omuutu omugesi omubonera hu butegeefu wuwe abandi bamwigiraho ebibono bibye binaba ni biri byʼamahulu.
16.22: Obutegeefu sibuho yʼobulamu eyiri abo abagesi aye ohugesyaho ohusomesa abaŋubeebe hiba huhena biseera.
16.23: Omuutu owʼamagesi gehuuma mu ndoma yiye era ebi aloma biba byʼamahulu.
16.24: Ebibono ebyʼehisa biri hyʼomudugere bigalusamo amaani era bireeta obulamu.
16.25: Ŋaliŋo ekola yʼebiitu eyiboneha ohuba endaŋi eyiri omuutu aye hu komerero ni yimuŋira mu hufa.
16.26: Ohwegomba ohulya ohu mutambi aba ni nahwo humuleetera ohuhola bugali era ehyo himuleetera ohusuna ehi genda.
16.27: Abahosi bʼebibi basiiba bayiiya engeri eyʼohukosamo abahyawe era ebi baloma byohya hyʼomuliro.
16.28: Omuutu owakalebule aleeta etalo era gabuhania abameeri.
16.29: Abaatu abʼemyoyo emibi badulinga abahyawe era babagwisa mwiroŋo.
16.30: Oyo ahumiinamiinira emoni aba asala luhwe huhugwisa mu bigosi era oyo ahusosya omunwa aba ahwendesa hibi.
16.31: Ohusahuluŋa wamera efi yiba ngule yʼeŋono ohuyifuna oba obaaye ohola ebiruŋamu.
16.32: Omala gaba mugumiikiriza ohuhira ohuba musooli wʼetalo, era omuutu afuga obusungu ohusinga ohusoola waŋangula ehibuga ehiramba.
16.33: Abaatu bahubba ahalulu aye Musengwa njʼasalaŋo ngʼolu hanaabe.

17.1: Omala galya amahayaga nʼoli nʼemiyaaya ohusinga ohulya ebinoli mu mago omuli ohuduhanaduhana.
17.2: Omwidu omugesi aliŋuga omwana owa musengwawe aŋuma mahulu era alisuna omugabo ogwʼobusika oti hani yeesi mulala hu bomu mago ago.
17.3: Ezaabbu nʼefeeza babita mu muliro ohutusamo obucaafu aye Musengwa njʼahebera emyoyo.
17.4: Abahosi bʼebibi baŋulirisa kalebule era omudulingi aŋuliirisa olugambo.
17.5: Aduulira abagadi aba afodogola Owabatonda baja huhuboneresa onaba nʼosangaala abaatu abandi ni baguuye mu bigosi.
17.6: Abaana bejuhulu hya ŋono eyiri abo abasaahulu era nʼabaana benyumikiriza mu basaaye baawe.
17.7: Sihyabulijo omuŋubeebe ohuloma ebiitu ebyamahulu era sihiba hyamahulu omuŋugi ohuloma ebyʼobudulingi.
17.8: Abaatu baŋeega mbo ohugulirira hihubisyamo era hiisi ahihola abitaamo.
17.9: Oyo asoniŋa abahye agobosaŋo omuhago aye oweŋambirira geeta omuhago.
17.10: Omuutu omutegeefu aŋuliirisa ni bamulabula ohusinga olu ohubba omuŋubeebe efaalu cikumi.
17.11: Omuhosi wʼebibi anyumirwa ohuhola ebibi aye baja humuboneresa nʼamaani.
17.12: Omala gasaŋaana engwe eyi bebireho enyana yayo ohusinga omuŋubeebe mu buŋebeebe wuwe.
17.13: Singa omuutu ahuholera ebiraŋi aye ewe wamusasulamo ehibi, ehibi sihija huŋwa mu mago gago.
17.14: Ohutandiha obuduhani hiri hyʼohwigula omulyango ogwʼamataba olwʼehyo, hihomye ni gahiiri gamutumbu.
17.15: Ohwejeeresa aholire omusango nʼohusingisa oyo aŋumaaho songa omusango, byombi Musengwa abicaawa.
17.16: Hyamugaso hi omuŋubeebe ohuba nʼebbeesa ejʼohwesasulira hu somero olwohuba aŋuma mwoyo ogwenda ohwega.
17.17: Meriiwo ahwenda hiisi hiseera. Era ehigumya olulebe huyeedagana mu bigosi.
17.18: Omuŋubeebe njʼoweeta mu buvunanyiziwa owʼohusasula ebbanja eritali lirye, oba gataŋo omusingo hulwa muliranwawe.
17.19: Hiisi anyumirwa ohuduhana aba anyumirwa ehibi era hiisi owehudumbasa aba gendula husihiiriha.
17.20: Omuutu owʼomwoyo mubi saŋanga huhulahulana era owʼendoma mbi emudaanya mu bigosi.
17.21: Ohusaala omwana omuŋubeebe hihuleetera enaku hu mwoyo era eŋuma musaaye wʼomuŋebeebe aba musangaafu.
17.22: Ohuba nʼomwoyo omusangaafu woosi bulesi obuŋonia aye ohuba nʼomwoyo omunakuŋafu hijoleesa omubiri.
17.23: Omuhosi wʼebibi afugiirira enguzi mu ngiso ohugosya amazima.
17.24: Omuutu omutegeefu gehuunirira hu byʼamagesi aye emoni jʼomuŋubeebe jiba hu hiisi hiitu ehiri hu hyalo.
17.25: Omwana omuŋubeebe anakuŋasa semwana era aleetera nyina enaku.
17.26: Sihiraŋi ohuboneresa omuutu aŋumaaho omusango oba ohufaduula omutangirisi olwohuba mwesigwa mu ebi ahola.
17.27: Omugesi gehuuma mu ndoma yiye era omutegeefu aŋuga obusungu wuwe.
17.28: Singa omuŋubeebe aŋoleera, bamubala mugesi era mutegeefu.

18.1: Oyo ataholagana nʼabahye niye geyendulira bibye omwene era aŋahania ehi hiisi muutu amanyire ati njʼehituufu.
18.2: Omuŋubeebe saafayo hutegeera hiitu aye ganguŋirisa ohulaga ngʼolu ali wʼamagesi.
18.3: Ehibi nʼohuswala bitiinira ŋalala era ehiswalo hisaala eduho.
18.4: Ebibono ebi omuutu aloma biŋangire ohuba simuho yʼamagesi era biri hyʼamaaji agomu njuho oba agaduluma mu lwabi.
18.5: Sihiraŋi ohuwihirira hu bikolwa byʼomuhosi wʼehibi oba ohugaana ohuŋa omuutu aŋumaaho omusango ehimusaanira.
18.6: Ebibono byʼomuŋubeebe bimuŋweramo ohuŋahana era byamuleetera ebihubbe.
18.7: Ebi muŋubeebe aloma bimuŋweramo ohusihiiriha era ebibono bibye ebyene mutego eyi ali.
18.8: Owʼolugambo ebi aloma biŋomerera, era biri hyʼemere eyi olya yeehala mu hida.
18.9: Omuutu omudoto ali hyʼoyo ahena ebiitu ohwonoona.
18.10: Musengwa ali hyʼomunaala omugumu, abagwalaafu pomu badulumira basuna obuŋonere.
18.11: Omuŋinda aŋeega ati obuŋinda wuwe busobola ohumuŋonia hyʼehiteepe ehigumu ehyeswanigirihiise ehibuga.
18.12: Amalala galeetera omuutu ohugwa aye omuutu asooka hweŋomeha ko gasuna eŋono.
18.13: Ŋulira konyo obe nʼehyohugobolamo. Nʼotahihola, oba oli muŋubeebe era oswasa.
18.14: Ohwenda ohweyongera ohuba mulamu hihuŋambiirira nʼolwaye aye ohwesinya obulamu hihenamo esuubi.
18.15: Abaatu abali nʼamagesi benderera ohwega era amatwi gʼoli nʼamagesi genda ohumanya.
18.16: Wenda ohulomaho nʼomuutu omwegingihiriri? Onamuŋirira ehirabo hija huhwanguŋira.
18.17: Asooka ohweŋosyaho aboneha oti njʼomutuufu ohwola oyu aŋosa ni naye ganja ebibye yeesi.
18.18: Ohuhubba ahalulu hihenaŋo embaha era higaya abʼamaani.
18.19: Hyangu ohubbwaga ehiteepe ehyeswanigirihiise ehibuga ohuhira ohufaaŋana nʼomulebe oyu okohiise era obuduhani buli hyʼomulyango ogwʼehibuga ogu bagunyira.
18.20: Omuutu asaanira ohugumira ebiŋwa mu bi aloma.
18.21: Amaani gʼobulamu nʼohufa gali hu lulimi. Olwʼehyo, oli nʼohugumira ebiŋwa mu ebi oloma.
18.22: Oyo asuna omuhasi aba gesiimire era aba asunire ekabi ohuŋwa eyiri Musengwa .
18.23: Omugadi gegayirira bamuŋambire ehisa aye omuŋinda agobolamo nʼebbogo.
18.24: Omuutu ali mihago ejitesigiha saalwa hugwa mu bigosi ne ŋaliŋo ohuba ni meriiwo nʼahusingira ni mugandaawo.

19.1: Hiraŋi ohuba mugadi ne waba wʼamazima ohuhira ohuba omuŋubeebe omudulingi.
19.2: Sihiraŋi ohubugutanira ohuhola ehiitu ehi obulaho bumanyi, onabugutana ohuhihola ogwa mu bigosi.
19.3: Abaatu abandi olwʼobuŋubeebe waawe beyita abeene nga nindi banenya Musengwa .
19.4: Obuŋinda wugima waba nʼemihago mingi, aye abameeri bʼomuutu omugadi bamuŋwaho.
19.5: Omuutu aŋa obujulizi owʼobudulingi saliŋona humuboneresa ni nooyo aloma ebyakalebule salyejeerera.
19.6: Baatu bangi bendula obuhoda hu baŋugi era hiisi muutu genda abe meeri wʼomuutu omugabi.
19.7: Omuutu anaba mugadi nʼabolulyo lulwe olwene bamunyooma nʼabemihago jije bamweŋalama era nʼolu mugadi abegayirira, bamuŋwaho.
19.8: Oyo osuna amagesi aba gefaaho era hebuliranga ebi wasoma ko wahahulahulana.
19.9: Omuutu aŋa obujulizi owʼobudulingi saliŋona humuboneresa ni nooyo aloma ebyakalebule salyejeerera.
19.10: Sihiraŋi omuŋubeebe ohuba mu bulamu owʼohwejalabya ngʼolu hitasaana mwidu ohuŋuga abalangira.
19.11: Omuutu omutegeefu afuga obusungu wuwe era ohutalonderesa songa hihuŋeesa eŋono.
19.12: Obusungu wa habaha, wuli hyʼepologoma ebuluguma aye ehyere hihye hiri hyʼolume hu birime.
19.13: Omwana omuŋubeebe aba higosi eyiri semwana era nʼomuhasi aduhanirisa ali hyʼefula etahya.
19.14: Abasaaye basikisa abaana baawe amayumba nʼobuŋinda aye ohusuna omuhasi omutegeefu hiba hirabo ohuŋwa eyiri Musengwa .
19.15: Obudoto buleeta ero eryʼamaani era ehihala busa hisaala enjala.
19.16: Oyo ahuuma ebiragiro ataasa obulamu wuwe aye oyo abinyooma himuŋweramo ohufa.
19.17: Oyo owʼehyere eyiri abagadi aba aŋola nje Musengwa era aja humuŋa omuhemba olwʼebyo ebi ahola.
19.18: Hangavula omwana wuwo ni gahiiri gamutumbu aye singa sohihola oba omuyeeda hwonoonoha.
19.19: Omuutu owʼobusungu obungi ali nʼohugumira ebibuŋwamo, singa lulala omuyeeda mu higosi nindi oja humuyeeda olundi.
19.20: Ŋulirisanga ebi bahulabbira era oŋambenga ebiragiro, mu moni eyo oja huba mugesi.
19.21: Omuutu aba nʼetegeha nyingi mu mwoyo gugwe aye Musengwa njʼasalaŋo.
19.22: Ehyere cehi muutu ahira ohwenda era omala gaba mugadi ohutabaaye mudulingi.
19.23: Ohutya Musengwa hihuwangaasa era hihuleetera obuhuumi nʼohuŋona ebigosi.
19.24: Omudoto aŋira engalo mu bbakuli ohubugula emere aye yimuhaya ohuta mu hanwa!
19.25: Hangavula omuutu omunyoomi, omubuyabuya gahega, omugesi geega banamuhangavula.
19.26: Abisya semwana bubi oba abbinga nyina amuŋwere ŋa wuwe, aswasa era hyʼembiho.
19.27: Mwana wase, onalehera ohuŋuliirisa ebibono ebi kulaabbira, oja hwibirira nʼebi omanyire.
19.28: Omuutu aŋa obujulizi owʼobudulingi, ahihola olwʼohwenda ohulumya oyu aŋosya ni naye. Era abahosi bʼebibi benda ebiitu hyʼebyo.
19.29: Omunyoomi ali nʼohuhimanya ati baja humuvunaana era omuŋubeebe baja humufaduula efaalu.

20.1: Sihiraŋi ohumeera olwohuba hyabuŋubeebe eyi oli era ohumeera huhuleetera ohusoola.
20.2: Habaha analuŋa abuluguma hyʼempologoma olwʼehyo oyo amuleetera obusungu aba geyita omwene.
20.3: Ohweŋala ohusoola hihuŋeesa eŋono aye hiisi muŋubeebe ganguŋirisa ohuduhana.
20.4: Omudoto sategeha hisambu mu hiseera olwʼehyo mu hiseera ehyʼohuhungula ahenamo emoni ni ŋaŋuma ehi abonaho.
20.5: Ebigendererwa byʼomuutu mu mwoyo biri hyʼobuliba wʼamaaji aye omuutu ali nʼohutegeera abisengeeja.
20.6: Abaatu bangi beeranga ohuba bʼamazima aye sihyangu ohusuna omuutu omwesigwa.
20.7: Abahola ebiruŋamu obulamu waawe sibubaho mbalo, era abaana baawe balisuna ekabi.
20.8: Habaha ni gehala hu tebe yiye eyʼobuŋugi ohusala emisango, atambisa emoni jije ohusengeeja ehiraŋi nʼehibi.
20.9: Njʼani asobola ohuloma ati, “Ese omwoyo gwange mugwalaafu era puma hibi hyosihyosi mu bulamu wange?”
20.10: Musengwa acaawa abatambisa emizaani nʼebipimo ebicaamu.
20.11: Nʼomwana omuŋere omumanyira hu bikolwa bibye, wamanya oba enebisya yiye ndaŋi era tuufu.
20.12: Amatwi ohuŋulira nʼemoni ohubona, Musengwa njʼowawumba byombi.
20.13: Onenda ohuŋenyuha bugali obugadi buja huhuŋamba aye onahalabana osuna emere mu bungi.
20.14: Agula apatana nʼajerega ati, “Ebbeeyi yaŋamugulu, ebbeeyi yaŋamugulu.” Aye oluhena ohugula, atiina ni gebuuja ngʼolu adondooye.
20.15: Ezaabbu nʼamabaale agʼomuŋendo biri mu biha bingi aye omuutu aloma ebyʼamagesi hyamuŋendo ehitaboneha aŋa ni naaŋa.
20.16: Owetaŋo ohweyimirira omuutu oyu atamanyire olwʼebbanja, asaana ohutaaŋo omusingo ohuhahasa ati anahasasule.
20.17: Emere eyʼowiibi eŋoma aye oheneresa nʼehutulira mu suulu.
20.18: Etegeha yolerera singa oŋamba amagesi agabahuŋa era otatiina mu lutalo nʼoŋuma abaŋi bʼamagesi.
20.19: Owʼolugambo sabiiha hyama olwʼehyo weŋale abaatu abali nʼeminwa ejitagwaho soŋera.
20.20: Singa omuutu aduha semwana oba nyina obulamu wuwe buheneresa ni buli hyʼetaala esimiiye mu hiirema ehiŋambire ti ngu.
20.21: Obuŋinda owamangumangu ni huhiiri baŋere sibubamo kabi hu komerero.
20.22: Solomanga oti, “Nja huhwesasusa olwʼehibukolire.” Aye wesiganga Musengwa aja huhununula.
20.23: Musengwa acaawa abaatu abatambisa ebipimo nʼemizaani ebitali bituufu.
20.24: Musengwa njʼategeha amagendere gʼomuutu. Olwʼehyo ŋaŋumaaŋo asobola ohutegeera ebitiina mu moni.
20.25: Otanguŋirisanga husuubisa Hatonda ehiitu nʼohiiri hweŋeegamo, olwohuba hisobola ohuhuŋweramo ohwehebulisa.
20.26: Habaha omugesi asengeja abahosi bʼebibi era ababoneresa aŋaŋuma husaasira.
20.27: Enjase ya Musengwa emuliha mu mwoyo gwʼomuutu yaata ŋalafu hiisi higendererwa ehi bahweha.
20.28: Habaha aja hweyongera nʼaŋuga anaba nʼali mwesiga nʼatehubbira era ni genda abaatu babe.
20.29: Abavubuka benyumirisa olwʼamaani gaawe aye efi njʼeŋono lyʼabasahulu.
20.30: Endabusi yigira hwalehaŋo esambo embi era ehibbooko higira hwacuusamo enebisya.

21.1: Musengwa njʼaŋuga omwoyo gwa habaha aguluŋamya ngʼolu aluŋamya amaaji mu lwabi gatiina eyi agendesa.
21.2: Ebi muutu ahola byosibyosi bimubonehera bulaŋi aye Musengwa njʼahebera emyoyo.
21.3: Ohuhola ebiitu ebiruŋamu nʼohutehubbira Musengwa ahisiima ohuhira ohumuŋa eŋongo.
21.4: Ohulaga obuhambwe nʼohwepaahapaaha biŋuga abahosi bʼebibi era ehyo hibi.
21.5: Etegeha yʼomuutu owʼehyonji, yireeta ekulahulana ngʼolu ohwanguŋirisa ebiitu huleeta obugadi.
21.6: Obuŋinda obu osuna mu budulingi budumuuha hyʼomuuya era buhuŋira mu mutego gwʼohufa.
21.7: Obuhambwe obu bahosi bʼebibi bahola bulibaŋiriramo nʼabeene olwohuba bagaana ohuhola ebiitu ebiruŋamu.
21.8: Abahosi bʼemisango bagendera mu magira amabi aye abaluŋamu bahola ebisaana.
21.9: Omala gebanda ŋamugulu hu hasolya hʼenyumba ohutabaaye mu nju ndala nʼomuhasi aduhanirisa.
21.10: Omuhosi wʼebibi aŋemba hu huhola ebibi era sasaasira muliranwawe.
21.11: Singa baboneresa omunyoomi liba somo eyiri oyo omubuyabuya. Era onalaabbira omuutu omutegeefu geyongera ohuba mugesi.
21.12: Hatonda oyo omutukuvu amanya ehi hiisi bahosi bʼebibi bahola mu mago gaawe era aja hubasihiirisa.
21.13: Singa omugadi gerira ne somudulumirire weesi eŋuma ali hudulumirira ni wenda obuyeedi.
21.14: Singa omuutu ahuluŋira ne wamuŋa ehirabo mu ngiso, himwisa obusungu.
21.15: Ohutehubbira husangaasa abagwalaafu aye hireeta ohwehanga eyiri abahosi bʼebibi.
21.16: Omuutu aŋaba gaaŋwa hu hituufu, amagombe gamulindiriiye.
21.17: Abo abenda ebyamasaŋalyo, baja hwafuŋala era hiisi owenda ohunywa omwenge nʼohwejalabya, salifuuha muŋinda.
21.18: Abahosi bʼebibi bereetaho ohubonaabona ohu bendesa abagwalaafu, ebi abatali besigwa baleetera abahola ebiruŋamu.
21.19: Omala gamenya mu lulafu, ohuhira ohumenya nʼomuhasi aduhanirisa era owʼobusungu.
21.20: Omuutu omugesi abunga obuŋinda aye omuŋubeebe asalaania ebibye.
21.21: Fubangaho ohuba wʼehyere era omwesigwa, oja huwangaala era abaatu baja huhubisya bulaŋi era bahuŋe nʼeŋono.
21.22: Omuutu omugesi alumba ehibuga ehyʼabanamaani gabbwagaŋo ebyo ebi besiga.
21.23: Oyo atelombooja atyo atyo geŋonia ebigosi.
21.24: Omuutu owepaahapaaha era aduula abahye bamulanga “Omunyoomi,” ahola ebi ahola nʼaŋeega ati njʼahihenaho.
21.25: Omudoto geyita omwene olwohuba aŋuuna hulera ngalo.
21.26: Era asiiba mu hululuhanira biitu aye abo abagwalaafu bagaba nʼomwoyo mulala.
21.27: Eŋongo yʼabahosi bʼebibi lyenyinyasa, ohusingira erala analiŋayo nʼehigendererwa ehibi.
21.28: Omuutu aŋa obujulizi owʼobudulingi aja husihiiriha aye omwesigwa ebi aloma babiŋuliirisa.
21.29: Abahosi bʼebibi bekaza aye abagwalaafu nibo baŋeega hubi bahola.
21.30: Ŋaŋuma magesi wayire tegeera oba etegeha yosiyosi eyisobola ohuhayisa Musengwa .
21.31: Bategeha embalaasi ohuja mu lutalo aye ohuŋangula huŋwa eyiri Musengwa .

22.1: Ohuholerera esiina eraŋi hyesiimisa hihira ohuba nʼobuŋinda obungi. Abaatu ohuhuŋa eŋono hiraŋi, hihira ohuba nʼezaabbu oba efeeza.
22.2: Ehigaata omuŋinda nʼomugadi cʼehino ti: bombi Musengwa njʼowabatonda.
22.3: Omuutu omutegeefu, abona ebigosi ni biija, gabyebaaya aye omuŋubeebe atiina hutiina gabigwamo.
22.4: Ohweŋomeha nʼohutya Musengwa bigima wasuna obuŋinda nʼabaatu ohuhuŋa eŋono nʼohuwangaala hu hyalo.
22.5: Nʼoba ni wenda obulamu wuwo, weŋalenga ohugendera mu magira gʼabahosi bʼebibi. Ehyo hija huhuyeeda ohutagwa mu mitego.
22.6: Tendehanga omwana nʼahiiri muŋere ngʼolu ali nʼohwebisya nʼaja huhula, saaja huŋwa hu ebi wamusomesa.
22.7: Omuŋinda aŋuga omugadi era oweŋola afuuha mwidu wʼaba nʼamuŋolire.
22.8: Oyo amwa obucaayi aligesa ebigosi era ohunyigirisa ohwanyigirisa abahye huja huhoma.
22.9: Omuutu ali nʼomwoyo omugabi Hatonda aja humuŋa ekabi olwohuba aŋaho abagadi emere.
22.10: Webbingeho omuutu omunyoomi, oliba wetusaho etalo nʼohuduhana nʼohuŋahana.
22.11: Oyo owenda ohuba mugwalaafu mu mwoyo gugwe nʼohuba nʼendoma endaŋi, aja huba meeri ya habaha.
22.12: Musengwa alabirira abo abamutegeera aye afafagania etegeha jʼabadulingi.
22.13: Omudoto aloma ati, “Epologoma yiri ebulafu, sinja hutula yiŋangire ohunjita.” Oba ati, “Sinatiine hutamba olwohuba abatemu bali mu nabiŋwera.”
22.14: Ebibono byʼomuhasi omuhwedi biri hyʼomutego era biŋambya oyo oyu Musengwa galuŋira.
22.15: Abaana bosibosi balimo obuŋubeebe aye nʼobaŋamo endabusi batereera.
22.16: Oyo anyigirisa abagadi olwʼohwenda ohugagaŋala ko ni nooyo aŋa abaŋinda ebirabo bombi baja huheneresa ni bali bagadi. Ebibono ebya bagesi
22.17: Ŋuliirisa ebibono ebya bagesi, taayo omwoyo hu bikusomesa.
22.18: Hija huhuleetera esangaalo, singa obihebulira era wabiŋayangaho.
22.19: Wesige Musengwa cʼehigira mbihusomesa olwa leero.
22.20: Kuŋandihiiye ebiitu adatu ebibono ebyʼamagesi nʼohumanya,
22.21: era bija huhusomesa ohumanya amazima wagamye obuhwenda obutuufu eyiri abo aba hutuma.
22.22: Sonyigirisanga bagadi olwohuba bagadi era nomu mbuga, sonyigirisa muutu ali mu wetaavu,
22.23: olwohuba Musengwa aja hubasoolerera era aja hulumba abo ababanyigirisa.
22.24: Soholanga muhumba nʼomuutu owʼobusungu era otemanyirisa omuutu atalwa huluŋa,
22.25: olwohuba oŋangire ohwega esambo jije hyahubeera mutego nandi osobola hweŋunula.
22.26: Siweyamanga husasula ebbanja lyʼomuutu obundi. Era sotangayo ehiitu hihyo ngʼomusingo olwʼebbanja lirye.
22.27: Ebbeesa ni jirihuhaya ohusasula baja huŋira obuliri buwo.
22.28: Socuusacuusanga biroowa ebi basaaye babo baahoma.
22.29: Omutambi ahola emirimo jije bulaŋi aja huŋeeresa mu mago ga habaha, sosi huba mwidu.

23.1: Ni wiihalanga hu hiiŋulo nʼomuŋugi ohulya, wegenderesanga ohuhuuma episa.
23.2: Nʼoba nʼolya bugali, hulwo gesyaho ohwepima emere.
23.3: Soluluhaniranga mere eyi ahwiŋuuye, habibe binoli biitye olwohuba aŋangire ohuba nʼahupima ohumanya esambo yiyo.
23.4: Siwehenererangamo olwʼohwenda ohusuna obuŋinda onagesyaho wabona oti bigeene, baamo amagesi obirehe.
23.5: Obuŋinda buŋangire ohuhuŋwaho hyʼohubbalya hwʼemoni, bumera amabaŋa wagululuha hya haŋungu watiina.
23.6: Solyanga mere yʼomuutu owenge otegombanga binoli bibye wayire biba biraŋi biitye
23.7: olwohuba njʼomuutu mula mu mwoyo gugwe aŋeega hu bbeesa ejitiinire hu mere eyo. Aŋangire ohuhuloma ati, “Lya era onywe,” aye ni geromesa hu mugulu.
23.8: Oja husesema ebi oliiye, ohusiima huhwo huhufe wereere.
23.9: Sohenanga biseera mbo oŋa omuŋubeebe amagesi olwohuba aja hutala hutala ehi omulomera.
23.10: Socuusanga hiroowa ehi bahoma ahalehale oba ohwingiriranga omuŋuluko gwʼabafuubbi,
23.11: olwohuba Omununuzi waawe wʼamaani aja hweŋambiramo mu songa jaawe ohuŋosya.
23.12: Taayo omwoyo hu bibahusomesa era oŋulirisenga ebibono ebyʼamagesi.
23.13: Solehanga huhangavula mwana olwohuba saaja hufa olwʼohumuŋamo endabusi.
23.15: Mwana wase singa oba mugesi mu mwoyo gugwo, hija husangaasa.
23.16: Nja husangaala ni pulira nʼoloma ebibono ebyʼamagesi.
23.17: Esaalwa sehuŋambanga olwʼababbengi aye genderanga mu hutya Musengwa hiisi hiseera.
23.18: Mu butuufu, onaholenga otyo oli nʼesuubi mu moni eyo era ŋaŋuma ehija huhutigatigania.
23.19: Mwana wase tegere ohutwi wahaba mugesi era webisyenga bulaŋi mu mwoyo.
23.20: Soholanga muhumba ni naabo abanywa omwenge babitiirisa oba abʼomulyerye,
