23.21: olwohuba abameesi nʼabomulyerye bafuuha bagadi era ohusiiba mwiro hibaleetera ohwambala ebireebo.
23.22: Ŋulirisanga lataawo owahusaaye era sotalanga maawo nʼasahuluŋire.
23.23: Ofubangaho wagula amazima era sogatundanga suna amagesi nʼesambo ko nʼobutegeefu.
23.24: Semwana yʼomugwalaafu aba musangaafu bugali era oyo ali nʼomwana omugesi amwesiimisa.
23.25: Leha lataawo ni maawo basaŋalye, leha omuhasi owahusaala asangaale.
23.26: Mwana wase, taayo omwoyo hu ebi kuloma era pire ngʼehyohuboneraho eyi oli.
23.27: Abahasi abamalaaya nʼabahwedi bali hyʼeroŋo ereeŋi.
23.28: Hyʼabakondo, abahasi abo beteega abasinde bangi, babaleetera ohwonoonoha.
23.29: Njʼani ali nʼebigosi hiisi hiseera? Nʼjani asiiba mu huŋahana nʼohusoola? Njʼani asiiba ni gemulugunya? Njʼani ali nʼebinubulire? Njʼani ali nʼemoni etwahaali?
23.30: Njʼoyo ahenera ebiseera mu hunywa omwenge era atabula ebiha byʼomwenge.
23.31: Otahejanga hu mwenge huhusendasenda ni gutumbeera efulo mu giraasi, nʼogunywa guŋoomerera.
23.33: Emoni jijo jija hutandiha ohubona biroliroli era sooja huŋeega nʼohuloma ebirimo amahulu.
23.34: Oja huba hyʼomuutu agendera hu maaji, epunga ni muhubba yaŋira eyi ni neeyi hu nyanja.
23.35: Oja huloma oti, “Bakubba aye sibaakosa. Bakubba aye sineŋulisamo. Era nenyohe ŋaali nendule omwenge ogundi?”

24.1: Soŋambiranga bahosi bʼebibi esaalwa era soŋembanga huhuhola muhumba ni nabo
24.2: olwohuba mu myoyo jaawe bategeha hukosa bahyawe era ebi baloma bitabula bahyawe.
24.3: Amagesi njʼomusingi gwʼamago era obutegeefu wugemeresaŋo.
24.4: Era ohuba nʼohumanya hireetera ebisenge byʼenyumba eyo ohwijula ebiitu ebitaboneha aŋa naaŋa era ebyomuŋendo.
24.5: Omuutu omugesi wʼamaani mangi era ali nʼohumanya geyongera ohuba nʼamaani,
24.6: olwohuba ko otandihe olutalo wetaaga ohusuna amagesi ohuŋwa eyiri abaatu bangi.
24.7: Abaŋubeebe sibategeera endoma eyʼamagesi era bahaya ebyʼohuloma ni baba ni bateesa hu biitu ebyʼomugaso.
24.8: Oyo abererera mu huyiiya ohuhola ebibi, baja humumanyira hu tegeha yiye.
24.9: Hiisi ehi muŋubeebe aŋeegaho ohuhola hiba hibi era abaatu bacaawa omuutu anyooma abahye.
24.10: Singa oba munafu mu biseera ebigosi, oba oli nʼamaani matono!
24.11: Onunulanga abo aba baba ni baŋira ohwita ni ŋaŋuma ehi baholire.
24.12: Singa oloma oti, “Sihwahimanyaho kadi,” Hatonda ategeera ehiri mu myoyo jʼabaatu, ahubona. Era oyo ahuhuuma, amanyire ati wamanya era aja husasula hiisi muutu ni geema hu bikolwa bibye.
24.13: Mwana wase, nywanga omudugere olwohuba mulaŋi. Omudugere ogwomu biyali guhuŋomera.
24.14: Mu ngeri njʼenyene oli nʼohuhimanya oti amagesi malaŋi eyiri obulamu wuwo. Singa ogasuna, obulamu wuwo owomu moni buliba bulaŋi. Era ŋaŋuma alityaka mu suubi liryo.
24.15: Otabanga hyʼabahosi bʼebibi abeteega abagwalaafu ohubanyagulula babatuseho nʼamago gaawe,
24.16: olwohuba wayire omugwalaafu gehubbiraŋo emirundi musanvu aja hwinyoha nindi. Aye abahosi bʼebibi baja huŋweraŋo erala.
24.17: Sosangaalanga omulabe wuwo nʼasunire ebigosi oba ohusaŋalya mu mwoyo ko nʼatagala nʼebigosi,
24.18: olwohuba Musengwa nʼalihibona atyo aja huleheraŋo ohumuboneresa.
24.19: Oteralihiriranga olwʼabahosi bʼebibi era sobaŋambiranga saalwa,
24.20: olwohuba abahosi bʼebibi baŋuma hiraŋi mu moni eyo ehi basuubiriramo era etaala yʼabahosi bʼebibi yija husima.
24.21: Mwana wase tyanga Musengwa ni habaha era soholanga muhumba nʼabajeemu,
24.22: olwohuba balisuna ebigosi era ŋaŋuma amanyire ebigosi ebi balisuna ohuŋwa eyiri Musengwa oba habaha. Ebibono ebindi ebya bagesi
24.23: Bino byosi bibono ebya bagesi: Sihiraŋi ohwehubbira nʼosala emisango.
24.24: Hiisi aloma asaaye omusango ati, “Wejereeye,” abaatu mu mawanga gosigosi baja humucaawa.
24.25: Aye abo ababoneresa asaaye omusango, baja husuna ekabi era baja huba bulaŋi.
24.26: Ohugobolamo nʼotehubbira hiraŋi, habonero ahalaga haati oli wʼomuhago omutuufu.
24.27: Hena ohutegeha endimiro jijo bulaŋi ko otandiihe ohutongola enyumba.
24.28: Sooŋanga bujulizi owʼobudulingi hu wahyo oba ohuloma ebyakalebule.
24.29: Solomanga oti, “Keesi nja humuhola ngʼolu gaakola, oyo nja humwesasusa.”
24.30: Nabita hu ndimiro eyʼomuutu omudoto, endimiro eyʼemizabbibbu eyʼomuutu aŋuma magesi.
24.31: Amaŋwa gaali gamerire hiisi ŋaatu nʼenyaasi ni lyejuuye endimiro yosiyosi era nʼolukomera olu batongolesa amabaale ni lwagwa ŋaasi.
24.32: Ni nabona ngʼolu endimiro yifaana hyapa ehyohwega ti hulomanga ti,
24.33: “Leha punguleho ahalo ŋatotono, pongereho ŋatotono, pumuleho ŋatotono,”
24.34: aye obugadi wuja huhugwira hyʼomwibi, obugadi bulihulumba hyʼomutemu.

25.1: Jino njʼengero ja Sulemaani ejindi eji batangirisi ba Hezekiya habaha wa Buyudaaya bahopolola.
25.2: Huŋa Hatonda eŋono olwʼebiitu ebi agisa era huŋa abahabaha eŋono olwʼebyo ebi banyonyola abaatu.
25.3: Ngʼolu egulu liri ŋaleeŋi nʼebiri ŋaasi mu nyanja mu ngeri njʼenyene sosobola humanya ebi bahabaha baŋeega mu myoyo.
25.4: Singa batusa obucaafu mu feeza esigalaŋo omuŋeesi asobola ohusunamo ehiitu ehyʼomuŋendo.
25.5: Mu ngeri njʼenyene habaha nʼaba wʼohuŋuga nʼatehubbira, abahosi bʼebibi bali nʼohubatusa mu moni jije.
25.6: Nʼobanga mu moni ja habaha solaganga ngʼolu oli womunina era siwiihalanga mu baatu ebegingihiriri.
25.7: Hiraŋi omwene gahuloma ati, “Nja ŋamugulu eno,” ohuhira ohuhuswasa mu moni jʼabahombe babe.
25.8: Siwanguŋirisanga huŋira musango mu mbuga olwohuba basobola ohuhuswahisayo!
25.9: Nʼobanga nʼesonga hu muliranwawo, mwihalenga ŋalala mwatabagana era sotusanga byama ebiŋamba hu wahyo.
25.10: Abaatu ni bali manya baati sohuuma byama hija huhuleetera ohuswala mu moni jaawe.
25.11: Hiraŋi ohuloma ehiitu mu hiseera hyahyo ehituufu ehyo hiba hyʼezaabbu eyi bataaye hu suniya eyi babbota mu feeza.
25.12: Oyo aŋuliirisa omuutu namulaabbira ali hyʼehihomo ehyʼezaabbu enyene nʼenyene.
25.13: Omuhwenda omwesigwa ali hyʼamaaji agʼohunywa agagwisa enduŋo mu hiseera hyʼendobooli eyiri oyo aba nʼamutumire.
25.14: Omuutu asuubisa ehiitu ndigoherese, ali hyʼebireri ebidumbadumbana aye ndibitonyese efula.
25.15: Ohuloma neŋooyo ko nʼobugumiikiriza hiŋosaŋosa omuŋugi era hireetera ohutusaŋo ebigosi.
25.16: Singa osuna omudugere, onywanga sobitirisa olwohuba ohanda wasesema.
25.17: Otasiibanga ewa muliranwawo olwohuba aja huhwesinya ngʼahucaawa.
25.18: Omuutu aŋaayirisa owahye ali hyʼepiima oba hyʼahasaale oba hyamuhubbire ehinabbiro.
25.19: Ohwesiga omuutu atali mwesigwa mu biseera ebigosi, hiri hyʼohuliisa eriino erihuumulya oba ohugendesa ohugulu ohuleme.
25.20: Ohwembera omuutu ali nʼenaku hu mwoyo, hiri hyʼohwambula omuutu ekooti mu hiseera ehyʼembeŋo oba hyʼajuhire cumbi mu hibbwa.
25.21: Enjala yinaba ni yiruma omulabe wuwo, omuŋanga emere galya era enduŋo yinaba nʼemuluma omuŋanga amaaji ganywa.
25.22: Onahola otyo onahabe oŋeesa amanda agaduha omuliro hu mutwe gugwe era Musengwa alihuŋa omuhemba.
25.23: Ngʼolu mbeŋo epololohi yireeta efula nʼolugambo lwosi luleetera abaatu ohuluŋa.
25.24: Omala gebanda ŋamugulu hu hasolya hʼenyumba ohutabaaye mu nju ndala nʼomuhasi aduhanirisa.
25.25: Amaŋuliro amalaŋi ohuŋwa aŋale gali hyʼamaaji amaŋololohi agagwisa enduŋo.
25.26: Omugwalaafu afugiirira omuhosi wʼebibi ohumubuzabuza ali hyʼesobere yʼamaaji agadumbuhire.
25.27: Sihiraŋi ohunywa omudugere wabitiirisa oba ohwenda abaatu bahuŋe eŋono.
25.28: Omuutu atasobola hweŋuga ali hyʼehibuga ehiŋumaho lukomera.

26.1: Ngʼolu obuŋololohi butabaŋo mu hiseera hyʼomumwi nʼefula ngʼolu etasaana hutonya mu hiseera hyʼegesa nʼomuutu omuŋubeebe sasaanira eŋono.
26.2: Hyʼenyuni egululuha ni eŋuma ŋa hwebanda ehiŋwabo sihisobola huhuŋamba onaba nʼoŋumaho musango.
26.3: Hutambisa esimbo hu mbalaasi hwatambisa oluhoba hu nasugirya ohuhola ehi hwenda nʼomuŋubeebe yeesi gendamo ehibbooko.
26.4: Sogobolanga mu hibuuso hyʼomuŋubeebe, onamugobolamo, weesi oliba muŋubeebe hya niye.
26.5: Omuŋubeebe omugobolangamo mu ngeri eyʼehiŋubeebe ko gafaania ati ehibuuso hihye hibaaye hyabuŋubeebe. Ni hitali cehyo, aja huŋeega ati mugesi.
26.6: Ohutuma omuŋubeebe ohuŋira obuhwenda hiri hyʼohwetemaho ohugulu wamwene oba ohunywa obutwa.
26.7: Engero eyiri omuŋubeebe jiŋuma mahulu, hyʼohugulu ohuleme eyiri omwenehwo ni hulereeja hulereeja.
26.8: Hiŋuma mahulu ohuŋa omuŋubeebe eŋono hifaana hyʼomuutu aboŋa ebaale mu panda ko gahubba.
26.9: Omuŋubeebe ohutambisa engero hiri hyʼomumeesi agesyaho ohweyiŋa oluŋwa.
26.10: Ohuŋa omuŋubeebe omulimo, hiri hyʼomuutu agoba galasa hulasa obusaale hifaabi.
26.11: Omuŋubeebe agobolamo ohuhola ehiitu cʼehyene, ali hyʼembwa egaluhira ebirusi byayo.
26.12: Omuutu ahirira erala ohuba omuŋubeebe asinga oyo oweranga ohuba omugesi.
26.13: Omuutu omudoto aloma ati, “Epologoma yiri mu luguudo, epologoma egendera mu nabiŋwera.”
26.14: Ngʼolu olwigi lucuuhira hu pata, omudoto yeesi atyo po gecuuhisa hu buliri wuwe.
26.15: Omudoto aŋira engalo mu bbakuli ohubugula emere aye yimudembya ohuyita mu hanwa.
26.16: Omuutu omudoto aŋeega ati mugesi ohuhira abaatu abangi abaloma nʼamagesi.
26.17: Omuutu oweyingisa mu buduhani obutamuŋambaho, ali hyʼomuutu aŋamba hu matwi gʼembwa eyi atamanyire eyi eŋwera.
26.19: ali hyʼomuutu adulinga muliranwawe ngʼahena amuloma ati, “Mbaaye saaga husaaga.”
26.20: Ŋanaŋumaŋo asendamo ekwi, omuliro gusima era aŋaŋuma lugambo siŋaba buduhani.
26.21: Ngʼolu kwi jihuuma omuliro ni gwaduha, mu ngeri njʼenyene nʼomuutu aleeta obuyoga agima obuduhani weyongera.
26.22: Owʼolugambo ebi aloma biŋomerera, era biri hyʼemere eyi olya yeehala mu hida.
26.23: Omuutu oweŋoomya mu ndoma aye mugati mula nʼali nʼomwoyo omubi, ali hyʼetamu eyi baŋahaho erangi yaboneha bulaŋi ate nga ko panaŋo.
26.24: Omunafuusi ahweha obucaayi wuwe era geŋomya mu malomere aye mu mwoyo gugwe ni gejuuye budulingi wereere,
26.25: wayire geŋomya mu malomere aye sofugiiriranga ebi aloma, olwohuba omwoyo gugwe gwijuuye bibi byereere.
26.26: Asobola ohuwiiha hu bucaayi wuwe aye obubi wuwe buja hweta ŋalafu mu lwijuuye.
26.27: Singa oyaba eroŋo, oja huligwamo wamwene era oyo aŋiringisya ebaale, lirimugaluhira lyamuhenaŋo omwene.
26.28: Omuutu adulinga abahye aba saabenda era obudulingi buleeta ohusihiiriha.

27.1: Otewuujanga hu ebi onahahole obuhyeye olwohuba somanyire ebinahabeeŋo.
27.2: Olehanga abaatu abandi bahutenda sosi ewe omwene ohwepaaha.
27.3: Ebaale nʼomujehe, byombi bisitoŋa aye sibyola hu bigosi ebi muŋubeebe aleeta.
27.4: Obusungu wubi era ehiruŋi hiri oti mataba aye esaalwa esingisaho owubi.
27.5: Bamala gahuhayula mu lwatu ohuhira ohuhwenda mu ngiso.
27.6: Meeriwo nʼahwoloobya aba ahwendesa ohulya aye omulabe wuwo anahugwa mu hifuba aba ahudulinga.
27.7: Omuutu anaba ni gegutire, sigenda nʼohuhomba hu mudugere aye ehyohulya wayire hiba hirulu hiitye, hiŋomera oyu enjala yiruma.
27.8: Enyuni eyibbama yalehaŋo ehiswi hyayo yiri hyʼomuutu alehaŋo amago gage.
27.9: Amafuta agahaloosa ko nʼobubbaani obuŋunya obulaŋi busangaasa omwoyo. Era nʼohulabula ohuŋwa ewa meriiwo huba hulaga huuti ahuliho.
27.10: Sodanyiriranga meriiwo oba meeri ya lataawo. Era sotiinanga ewa mugandawo ohumusunga obuyeedi nʼoli mu bigosi. Muliranwawo ohuli ohuupi ahusingira mugandawo ahuli aŋale.
27.11: Ba mugesi mwana wange, ehyo hija husangaasa omwoyo gwange era hija hupeererera amaani ohugobolamo abo abanyooma.
27.12: Omuutu omutegeefu abona ebigosi ni biija gabyebaaya aye omuŋubeebe atiina hutiina gabigwamo.
27.13: Omuutu oweyimirira oyu atamanyire olwʼebbanja, asaana ohutaŋo omusingo.
27.14: Ohuhayuha nʼoheesa owahyo mu mugamba pwipwipwi, oba hyʼomuhubba ehisiraani.
27.15: Omuhasi aduhanirisa ali hyʼefula eyitonya ni tahya,
27.16: era omuhasi hyʼoyo higosi ohumulobera ngʼolu hiri higosi ohutigalira embeŋo ohufuuŋa oba ngʼolu hiri higosi ohudederera amafuta mu hyaba.
27.17: Ngʼolu ehyoma hiŋagala ehyoma hyahye omuutu yeesi atyo ko agunjula omuutu wahye.
27.18: Oyo alabirira omusaala omutiini aja hulya hu bibala byagwo, ni nooyo aŋeeresa musengwawe baja humuŋanga eŋono.
27.19: Ngʼolu omuutu gebona mu maaji nʼomwoyo gwʼomuutu gwosi gulaga ehyo ehi ali.
27.20: Emagombe nʼohusihiiriha sibijula, hiri hyʼabaatu ngʼolu baŋemba hu husuna ebiitu.
27.21: Ezaabbu nʼefeeza babita mu muliro ohutusamo obucaafu nʼomuutu yeesi bamubona ngʼolu gebisyamo abaatu ni bamupaaha.
27.22: Wayire oŋuula omuŋubeebe mu hinu, sooja humutusamo buŋubeebe wuwe.
27.23: Fubangaho ohulabirira ebyayo bibyo era oteyo omwoyo ohulabiriranga etaama nʼembusi jijo.
27.24: Hiri hiityo olwohuba obuŋinda sibubaŋo emirembe nʼemirembe era nʼengule yʼobuŋugi siyaluberera.
27.25: Oluvanyuma lwʼohusala enyaasi ohuliisa ebyayo, enyaasi erindi enyaaha limera era enyaasi eryohu lusozi balisala balibunga mu sitoowa,
27.26: oja husuna ehyohwambala ohuŋwa mu mooya gʼetaama era watunda embusi wagulamo eroba.
27.27: Embusi jinahuŋenga amabeere mangi ewe nʼabomu mago gago ko nʼabaŋeeresa babo abahasi, mwanywa.

28.1: Omuhosi wʼebibi aduluma ni ŋaŋuma nʼamubbinga aye abagwalaafu baba basira hyʼepologoma.
28.2: Egwanga omuba etalo ejitaŋwesa liba nʼabaŋugi bangi aye omuŋugi omugesi era omutegeefu agima egwanga lyatereera.
28.3: Omuŋugi anyigirisa abagadi ali hyʼefula erimo hibuyaga esihiirisa emere yosiyosi.
28.4: Abo abalehaŋo amagambi, batenderesa abahosi bʼebibi aye abo abagaŋamba babaŋahania.
28.5: Abaatu abahosi bʼebibi sibategeera ehi hutehubbira hitegeesa aye abajumirya Musengwa bahitegeera bugali weene.
28.6: Omala gaba mugadi nʼoli mwesigwa ohusinga ohuba omuŋinda omukupanya.
28.7: Omwana agondera amagambi aba mugesi aye ahola omuhumba nʼabaatu abaŋuma mahulu aswasa semwana.
28.8: Onasuna obuŋinda olwohutoosa abaatu amagoba mangi obuŋinda wuwo bulitiina eyiri oyo aja huba wʼehisa eyiri abaatu abagadi.
28.9: Omuutu yesiyesi atagondera magambi, nʼesaala yiye yiba yambiho mu moni ja Hatonda.
28.10: Oyo aleetera omuutu omugwalaafu ohwonoona, aja hugwa mu mutego gugwe omwene aye abo abaŋumaho mbalo balisuna ebiraŋi.
28.11: Omuŋinda aŋangire ohuba mugesi ngʼolu mwene gebona aye omugadi ali nʼohutegeera amanyire ohumuhira.
28.12: Omugwalaafu anafuuha muŋugi abaatu basaŋalya aye omuhosi wʼebibi anaba njʼomuŋugi abaatu baba mu hwehweha.
28.13: Oyo awiiha hu bibi bibye saaja huhulahulana aye hiisi abyatula gebbwaga bamusoniŋa.
28.14: Gesiimire omuutu atya Musengwa hiisi hiseera aye oyo ahahanyasa omwoyo gugwe aja hugwa mu bigosi.
28.15: Omuŋugi abisya wubi abagadi ali hyʼempologoma eŋunduguma oba hya nalaŋa owendula ehyohulya.
28.16: Omuŋugi atategeera anyigirisa abaatu aye oyo acaawa enguzi aja huwangaala.
28.17: Omuutu omutemu geyabira omwene amagombe era omuutu hyʼoyo somubeeranga.
28.18: Oyo ahola ebiruŋamu ŋaŋuma hibi ehirimwolaho aye oyo atahola ebituufu aja husihiiriha.
28.19: Omuutu ahola emirimo nʼamaani asuna emere nyingi aye oyo ahenera ebiseera hu biitu ebitagasa aja hufuuha mugadi.
28.20: Omuutu omwesigwa alisuna ekabi aye oyo owenda ohusuna obuŋinda owamangumangu, balimuboneresa.
28.21: Sihiraŋi ohuba omuutu owehubbira aye abalamuzi bahola ebitasaana olwʼohubaŋamo ahaatu.
28.22: Omuutu owʼamayiru abuguutana ohusuna obuŋinda aye samanyire ati obugadi bumuhuumiriiye.
28.23: Oyo agolola omuutu esobi jije oluvanyuma balimusiima, ohuhiraho oyo aba mu humupaahapaaha.
28.24: Oyo aŋeega ati sihibi ohwiba semwana oba nyina ali hyʼomutemu.
28.25: Omuutu aluluhanira ebiitu aleeta ohusoola aye oyo owesiga Musengwa aja huhulahulana.
28.26: Oyo owesiga amagesi gage muŋubeebe aye oyo agendera mu hwenda ohumanya ahola hiraŋi.
28.27: Oyo agabiraho abagadi ŋaŋuma ehi anadambenga aye oyo atenda huheja hu mugadi aja husuna ebiŋwabo.
28.28: Omuhosi wʼebibi anafuuha muŋugi abaatu baba mu hyehwehere aye omuhosi wʼebibi anasihiiriha abagwalaafu baŋira obuŋugi.

29.1: Omuutu asigala nʼahahanyala oluvanyuma lwʼohumulabula efunda nyingi aja husihiiriha ni ŋaŋuma huŋona.
29.2: Omugwalaafu anaba nʼaŋuga abaatu basangaala aye abahosi bʼebibi banaba njʼabaŋuga, abaatu beŋunduguma.
29.3: Omwana owenda ohuba mugesi asangaasa semwana aye ahola omuhumba nʼabamalaaya adubuuda buŋinda wuwe.
29.4: Habaha omwesigwa aleeta emiyaaya mu gwanga aye oyo owenda enguzi aligwisa.
29.5: Omuutu ahiina owahye, aba genda amudanye mu mutego.
29.6: Ebibi byʼomuhosi wʼebibi bija humufahira mu sobi jije enyene aye omugwalaafu aja huyiŋona gembe nʼesangaalo.
29.7: Abagwalaafu bafaayo hu dembe lya bagadi aye abahosi bʼebibi sibafayo.
29.8: Abaatu abatalumirwa bahyawe bagwisa ehibuga mu bigosi aye abo abategeefu behahania ehiruŋi.
29.9: Singa omuutu omutegeefu aŋira omuŋubeebe mu mbuga, omuŋubeebe aja huloma nʼobusungu nʼohuduhana era siŋaja hubaŋo miyaaya.
29.10: Abatemu sibenderaho erala abaatu abalaŋi aye bendula ngeri yʼohubahenaŋo.
29.11: Omuŋubeebe alaga obusungu wuwe mu lwatu aye oyo omugesi afuga owongo wuwe.
29.12: Singa omuŋugi aŋuliirisa ebyʼobudulingi abatangirisi babe bosibosi bafuuha bahosi bʼebibi.
29.13: Ehigaata omugadi ni nooyo amunyigirisa hiri ti bombi Musengwa njʼowabaŋa emoni ohubona.
29.14: Habaha nʼanasalenga emisango jʼabagadi nʼatehubbira anawangalirenga mu buŋugi.
29.15: Hiraŋi ohuŋaamo omwana endabusi geega aye onamuleha ohweholera ehi genda aja huswasa nyina.
29.16: Abahosi bʼebibi ni baba mu buŋangi nʼehibi hyosi hyeyongera obungi aye abagwalaafu baja hubaaŋo bebonere ohugwa hwawe.
29.17: Omwana wuwo muŋeemo endabusi, ŋaja hubaaŋo emiyaaya onahola otyo era aja huhuleetera ohwesiima.
29.18: Hatonda nʼatatangiriiye baatu, sibaabulaŋo hiraŋi nʼehibi aye gesiimire oyo agondera amagambi ga Hatonda.
29.19: Ebibono byoŋene sibisobola huhangavula mwidu wayire aŋangire ohuhutegeera aye saaja huhola ehi wenda.
29.20: Omuŋubeebe ali nʼesuubi ohusinga omuutu aloma nʼatasookire huŋeega hu ehi aja huloma.
29.21: Omwidu oyu obisya bulaŋi ohuŋwera erala mu buvubuka ali hufuuhira higosi hu komerero.
29.22: Omuutu owʼobusungu owaŋaapi ŋaapi aleeta obuduhani nʼebigosi bingi.
29.23: Omuutu owepaahapaaha bamwisa ŋaasi aye oweŋomeha bamuŋa eŋono.
29.24: Ahola omuhumba nʼomwibi alyecaawa omwene olwohuba ni baliba ni bamulayisa ohuloma mazima saligaloma hyamuŋweramo Hatonda ohumuboneresa.
29.25: Ohutya omuutu obuutu hyabulabe bugali aye Musengwa ahuuma oyo amwesiga.
29.26: Abaatu bangi abenda ohuba bahoda eyiri abatangirisi aye Musengwa njʼatehubbira.
29.27: Omugwalaafu genyinyalya atali mwesigwa nʼomuhosi wʼebibi acaawa ahola ebiruŋamu.

30.1: Ebibono bya Aguli omusaani wa Yake owʼe Maasa ebi galomera Yisiyeeli ni Wukali ati:
30.2: Ndi muŋubeebe bugali ohusinga abaatu bosibosi, mbulaamo habuutu era sitegeera.
30.3: Simbangaho mugesi era ŋaŋuma ehi manyire ebiŋamba hu Hatonda.
30.4: Njʼani owatiinaho mwigulu nindi gagobola? Njʼani owahumbaaniaho embeŋo mu ngalo jije? Njʼani afumbirangaho amaaji mu lugoye lulwe gasigalamo? Njʼani owataŋo esalo hu hyalo? Esiina lirye njʼani era omusaani wuwe njʼani? Ndomere nʼoba nʼomumanyire!
30.5: Hiisi ehi Hatonda aloma hituufu era Hatonda oyo njʼengabo yʼabo abeŋogoma mu ye.
30.6: Someedanga hu bibono bibye, nʼoja huhihola aja huhwaniha alage abaatu ngʼolu oli mudulingi.
30.7: O Hatonda, kusunga wuupe ebiitu bibiri ni kiiri mulamu:
30.8: Njeede taba mudulingi era otandeha huba mugadi bugali oba ohuba omuŋinda aye pe ebyo ebiikena.
30.9: Hiri hiityo olwohuba singa mba muŋinda ohubitiirira sobola ohuhwegana naloma ti, “Ko Musengwa njʼani?” Oba naaba mugadi bugali nahanda niiba nʼohwiba naswasa Hatonda wange.
30.10: Sogeyanga mwidu eyiri musengwawe omwidu oyo aja huhucaawa era osune ebigosi.
30.11: Ŋaliŋo abaatu ababisya bubi abasaawe era sibasiima banyinaawe,
30.12: abo beranga bagwalaafu atenga ko bejuuye bubi wereere,
30.13: abo abebona baati baŋamugulu ohuhira abandi,
30.14: abo abatambisa obuhambwe waawe ohutulugunya abagadi nʼabatesobola basobole ohwesunira ehinabemereseŋo.
30.15: Omuutu owʼomuluulu ali nʼabaana babiri era bombi babalanga baati, “Peeho, peeho.” Ŋaliŋo ebiitu bidatu ebitaŋerwa biri bine ebitaloma biiti, “Ehyo hihena.”
30.16: Era ebiitu ebyo mbebino: amagombe nʼehida hyʼomuhasi omugumba, nʼeroba eritaŋerwa maaji ko nʼomuliro ogutaloma guuti, “Ehyo hihena.”
30.17: Abo abanyooma saawe oba abatala nyinaawe esega jigwene jibalye oba jibomolemo emoni.
30.18: Ŋaliŋo ebiitu bidatu ebinjeŋunjisa bine ebikayire ohutegeera:
30.19: engeri eyi haŋungu agululuhamo mu bbanga, engeri eyi musota gweŋalulira mu gabaale, engeri eyi emeeri yiyererehamo hu nyanja, nʼengeri eyi musinde ahobyamo omuhasi!
30.20: Ebikolwa byʼomuhasi omuhwedi biri biiti, ahena ohulya nga gesabuusa hu munwa aloma ati, “Puma hibi ehi kolire.”
30.21: Ŋaliŋo ebiitu bidatu ebiteetemya ehyalo bine ebi hitasobola hubigumikiriza:
30.22: omwidu ohufuuha habaha nʼomuŋubeebe ohuba ni hiisi ehi genda,
30.23: nʼomuhasi owadiba ohuba mufumbo nʼomuhasi omwidu ohuleetera musengwawe ohunoba.
30.24: Hu hyalo huno huliho nʼebiitu bine ebitootono aye mu magesi sibisoboha.
30.25: Amage gali nʼamaani matootono aye gebiihira emere gerindiisa endobooli.
30.26: Nawangeye hasolo ahali nʼamaani matootono aye hamenya mu mabaale.
30.27: Esige jiŋuma habaha aye jigendera mu nyiriri hyʼamaŋe.
30.28: Ahapunu haatu hatootono era osobola ohuhaŋamba nʼengalo aye ohasaŋaana mu lubiri lwa habaha.
30.29: Ŋaliŋo ebiitu bidatu oba bine ebisangaasa ohubona ni bigenda:
30.30: epologoma yʼamaani ohuhira esolo josijosi era siyitya wayire ndala hu solo jahye,
30.31: engoho edwaya yiri nʼolwerago, embusi epaya ko ni habaha nʼali nʼeŋe lirye ni limweswanigirihiise.
30.32: Nʼoba nʼobaaye muŋubeebe era ni wepaahapaaha oba nʼotegehire ohuhola ehibi ohuŋwa ŋaahani, yegoboleeho.
30.33: Ohusaja amabeere gaŋwamo omuzigo era onahubba esuulu yituluha amafugi nʼobusungu buŋweramo omuutu ohuduhana.

31.1: Ebibono bya habaha Lamweli ebi nyina gamusomesa ati:
31.2: “O mwana wase! O mwana owomu mala gange, omwana oyu nasaba ko nahusaala, olwʼehyo pulirise.
31.3: Soheneranga maani gago hu bahasi basihiirihise abahabaha.
31.4: O Lamweli wange sihiraŋi abahabaha ohunywa omwenge oba abaŋugi ohuŋemba hu himeesa
31.5: olwohuba ni banywa berabira amagambi, basigalaŋo ni banyigirisa abagadi.
31.6: Omwenge oguŋanga abo abadembereye abo abaŋuma suubi mu bulamu waawe.
31.7: Leha banywe berabire obugadi waawe era batahebulira bigosi ebi bali ni nabyo.
31.8: Banga janjaasi lyʼabo abatasobola hweromereraho era osolererenga abo abaŋuma abayeeda.
31.9: Banga janjaasi era obe mulamuzi atehubbira solehereranga abagadi nʼabali mu wetaavu.” Omuhasi owʼesambo endaŋi
31.10: Njʼani asobola ohuvumbula omuhasi owʼesambo endaŋi? Omuhasi hyʼoyo wamuŋendo, ohuhira amabaale agebbeeyi bugali.
31.11: Wamwe amwesigira erala era ŋaŋumaaŋo ehyʼomuŋendo ehi aŋuma.
31.12: Omuhasi oyo aholera wamwe ebiraŋi byereere era ŋaŋuma hibi ehi amwosaho mu bulamu wuwe wosiwosi.
31.13: Afululuhana nʼengalo jije gatunga engoye ohuŋwa mu mooya gʼetaama ko nʼeja laasi.
31.14: Era omuhasi oyo ali hyʼemeeri, eyireeta emere ohuŋwa engereha wʼenyanja.
31.15: Genyoha mu mugamba pwipwipwi, gategehera amago gage emere era galaabbira abaŋeeresa babe abahasi ehyʼohuhola.
31.16: Nʼabona ehibanja gahyegomba ahigula era atambisa ebbeesa jije ngʼahomaamo emizabbibbu.
31.17: Ali nʼamaani era mutambi wʼemirimo emihono jije simidoto.
31.18: Gefaaho ohubona ati hiisi ehi ahola himuleetera amagoba era ahola ohwirisa owiire.
31.20: Ali nʼehyere eyiri abagadi era ayeeda abali mu wetaavu.
31.21: Mu biseera ebyʼobuŋololohi obubitiirifu niye saatya olwohuba abomu mago gage bosibosi bali nʼebyambalo ebyʼembeŋo.
31.22: Omwene getungira amasuuka era gambala engoye eja laasi nʼeja namasyoma.
31.23: Wamwe amanyiheene bugali era ngʼomutangirisi, abaatu bamuŋa eŋono mu hibuga.
31.24: Omuhasi oyo atunga engoye eja laasi ko nʼemisibiro ngʼajitunda agusa abasubuuzi.
31.25: Wʼamaani era abaatu bamuŋa eŋono saatya ehiija mu moni.
31.26: Aloma nʼamagesi agʼehikugu era alaga ehisa nʼabuulirira.
31.27: Alabirira abomu mago gage era saŋuuna hulera ngalo.
31.28: Abaana babe basiima ebi ahola era wamwe amusiima, gamutenderesa.
31.29: Amuloma ati, “Eriyo abahasi bangi abaholire ebiitu ebyʼamaani hu hyalo huno aye ewe obahira bosibosi!”
31.30: Emboneha yʼomuhasi yisobola ohuhudulinga era obuŋoono wuwe buŋwaŋo aye omuhasi atya Musengwa bamuŋenga eŋono.
31.31: Mumuŋe omuhemba era olwʼebiitu ebi aholire, mumuŋenga eŋono mu lwijuuye.

1.1: Lulala Musengwa galoma Yona omusaani wʼAmitaayi ati,
1.2: “Yinyoheramo otiine mu hibuga ehibbala ehi balanga baati Nineeve olome abaatu baamo oti ‘Nogenwe nʼebibi byawe.’ ”
1.3: Aye Yona gasalaŋo ohudulumaŋo atiine e Talusiisi aŋwe aŋali Musengwa . Nga gehirira atiina hu mwalo gwʼe Yoopa eyi gagaana emeeri ni yitiina e Talusiisi. Ngʼasasula ebbeesa ejʼohumwambusa, gengira mu meeri ohusabaala atiine e Talusiisi, aŋwe aŋali Musengwa .
1.4: Emeeri ni yaali nʼehiiri mu lugendo, nga Musengwa aŋindiha omuyaga ogwʼamaani hu nyanja nga guhubba emeeri eyiganiha nʼehabira hubbwagiha.
1.5: Olwʼesisi, hiisi mulala hu baali mu meeri gatandiha ohulirira hatonda wuwe gaaje abayeede. Batagiha nʼohudanya mu nyanja emigugu ejaali mu meeri beyihendeseho obusito. Aye Yona niye mu hamanga aho hosihosi gaali mu hisenge ehya ŋaasi mu meeri nʼafiiriiye mwiro.
1.6: Ngʼomuhulu wʼemeeri eyo atiina aŋa Yona gaali amubuusa ati, “Obaaye otye ewe ofuluuta? Yinyoha olombe hatonda wuwo obuyeedi, hamunga gatuŋambira ehisasabirisi gatuŋonia.”
1.7: Ngʼaŋo abagimbi bʼemeeri basalaaŋo bahubbe ahalulu babone njʼani hu bo abaleeteye endibo. Ni bahubba ahalulu, hagwa hu nje Yona.
1.8: Nga bala bamubuusa baati, “Tulomereho, njʼani atuleeteye endibo jino? Ohola mirimo hi? Oŋwereeye ŋeena era oli mwina?”
1.9: Nga Yona abagobolamo ati, “Ndi Mubbebbulaniya. Hatonda owomwigulu owatonda ehyalo nʼenyanja nje Musengwa oyu peeresa.”
1.10: Ngʼaŋo abaloohesa ngʼolu gaali nʼatenguŋire Musengwa era nʼali hu mudulumaho. Bala abaali mu meeri ni baŋulira ebibono ebyo, obuti wabaŋamba nga bamuloma baati, “Ee! Oholire hiina ehyo?”
1.11: Ahateŋama aho hosihosi enyanja niyo yaali etaama hutaama ohubefuuhuulira. Nga bamubuusa baati, “Huhuhole huutye konyo enyanja eteehe?”
1.12: Ngʼabagobolamo ati, “Mundunde mundanye mu nyanja yinateehe olwohuba manyire ti ehibi hyange njʼehyenda hugira mufe olwagaane.”
1.13: Aye bala sibahihola wabula bagesyaho ohugimba emeeri mangumangu baagame hwigobo. Ehyo sihyasoboha olwohuba enyanja yeyongerera erala ohwefuhuula ngʼebahayisa.
1.14: Ngʼaŋo batandiiha ohulirira Musengwa wa Yona baati, “O Musengwa huhulomba otatusihiirisa olwʼohutusaŋo obulamu wʼomusinde ono wayire olwʼohwita omuutu atubulaho musango olwohuba esobi siyeefe aye tegeha yiyo ewe omwene.”
1.15: Ngʼaŋo abasinde abo badunda Yona bamudanya mu nyanja nga nʼohuteeha eteeha.
1.16: Hino hyabaleetera ohuŋa Musengwa eŋono, baamuŋongera era beyama nʼohumuŋeeresa.
1.17: Nga Musengwa atusa eyi gatusa oguyeeni ogwene ogubba gumira Yona. Nga Yona ahena mu guyeeni ogwo endaalo edatu owiire nomu muusi.

2.1: Yona ni gaali mu guyeeni, galomba Musengwa Hatonda wuwe.
2.2: Galomba ati, “Ni naali ŋagati mu biŋeeriŋeeri, Musengwa nahweŋundeerera wunjeede nga wungobolamo. Ni naali mu hyalo hyʼabamagombe nahweŋunderera wategera ohutwi era wanjeeda.
2.3: “Ni wanjuguja mu njuho ŋagati neyinihire ŋaasi mu buliba amaaji ganeswanigirisa, amayengo aga wasindihire ganjolohera hu mutwe nʼamaani gosigosi.
2.4: Nga peega ti olwo ko wundanyiriiye, kuŋooye mu moni? Sikigoboyeyo hwingira mu Yekaalu yiyo enjawufu?
2.5: Amaaji gaamirire getotera ohunjita neyinihire mu njuho ŋagati nʼebinyaasi byomu nyanja byanewotolera hu mutwe.
2.6: Neyinihire nolera erala hu simuho yʼesozi eyo, ŋaasi mu hyalo hyʼabamagombe. Aye ewe Musengwa Hatonda wange, wanjinululayo naŋwayo mulamu.
2.7: Ni naŋulira obulamu ni butiina, Musengwa nahebulira nahweŋundeerera ni kulomba ngobole eyi oli. Weesi ni waali mu hifo hihyo ehyabufu omu wihala, waŋulira ohweŋundeera hwange.
2.8: Abo abagaaniiye mu hujumirya emisambwa ejibula ehi jiyeeda, bafiirwa emiyaaya ohuŋwa eyi oli.
2.9: Aye ese, ewe ndiiwe oyu najumiryenga. Nahahuŋe eŋongo, noherese hiisi ehi neyamire. Olwohuba ewe Musengwa ndiiwe onoŋola.”
2.10: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa alagira oguyeeni guhaasa Yona hwigobo.

3.1: Nga nindi Musengwa aloma Yona ati,
3.2: “Yinyoheramo otiine mu hibuga ehihulu ehi balanga baati Nineeve olomere abaatu baamo obuhwenda obu kuŋa.”
3.3: Nga Yona aganya genyoheramo atiina e Nineeve, ngʼolu Musengwa gamuloma. Nineeve hyali hibuga higalamu bugali ni hiŋirira omuutu endaalo edatu ohuhigendamo hyosihyosi.
3.4: Yona ni gengira mu hibuga, gagendaho olugendo lwʼoludaalo lulala ngʼatandiha ohulangirira ati, “Esigaayeyo endaalo amahumi ane Hatonda asihiirise ehibuga hino.”
3.5: Abaatu bʼe Nineeve ni baŋulira obuhwenda owo bafugiirira ebibono bya Hatonda. Nga basalaŋo basiibe batalya wayire ohunywa amaaji. Ngʼaŋo bosibosi ohuŋwera erala hu begingihiriri ohwola hu baŋaasi bewoŋa ebigwali. Bino babihola ohulaga baati bebbwagire olwʼebibi byawe.
3.6: Ni byagwa habaha wʼe Nineeve mu hutwi, gahutuha mu tebe yiye eyʼobuŋugi geyambula ehimolo nga yeesi gewoŋa ehigwali. Nga gehala mwigohe, ohulaga ati gebbwagire olwʼebibi ebi gaali nʼahola.
3.7: Nga habaha alangirira eyiri abaatu bomu Nineeve bosibosi ati, “Hino njʼehiragiro ohuŋwa eyiri habaha nʼabataka babe abahulu: ‘Ŋabula muutu yesiyesi ahomba hu hyʼomutamu wayire ehyʼohunywa. Ŋatabaŋo hyayo hyosihyosi: eŋombe oba etaama oba embusi eyaaya wayire eyinywa hu maaji.
3.8: Hiisi muutu ateehwa ohwewoŋa ehigwali ohulaga ati gebbwagire, alombe Hatonda nʼomwoyo mulala nindi aleheŋo obuhambwe nʼebibi ebi abaaye nʼahola.
3.9: Hamunga Hatonda gacuusa ebiŋeego gatugoboleramo nasatusihiirisa.’ ”
3.10: Hatonda ni gabona ni bacuhire ni balehireŋo ebibi ebi baholanga, ngʼabaŋambira ehisasabirisi nasabasihiirisa ngʼolu gaali nʼategehire oludaayi.

4.1: Yona ehyo sihyamusangaasa aye galuŋira huluŋira Hatonda Musengwa.
4.2: Ngʼalomba Musengwa ati, “ Musengwa ni naali ni kiiri engo si naloma mu mwoyo gwange ti hino kehi onahahole? Ehyo njʼehyali ni higirire ni kudulumireho ohutiina e Talusiisi. Namanya ngʼolu oli Hatonda owʼehisasabirisi, owijuuye ohwenda ate agumikirisa. Aŋanga ohucuusa ebiŋeego nasasihirisa.
4.3: Ŋaahani ngʼolu hiri hiityo, Musengwa , tusaŋo obulamu wange. Ohufa husingira ohuba omulamu.”
4.4: Aye Musengwa ngʼamubuusa ati, “Oba mutuufu ohuluŋa?”
4.5: Nga Yona atula mu hibuga agendaho ŋadiidiri nʼaluŋama ewuŋwalyuba, ngʼaluha ehiŋolu gehalamo nʼahuuma ohubona ehinoole hu hibuga ehyo.
4.6: Ngʼaŋo Musengwa Hatonda amesa enderema erandira hu hiŋolu ehi Yona gebbotera hamwongere ehiŋolu aŋulire emirembe. Yona ngʼasangaala bugali olwʼahasaala aho.
4.7: Ni wahyeye, mu mawiiwi Hatonda ngʼalagira ehisiisa hiruma ahasaala aho, nga haŋotoha.
4.8: Eryuba ni lyaŋanga, Hatonda ngʼasindiha embeŋo embalire ohuŋwa ewuŋwalyuba ngʼehubba Yona. Ngʼeryuba lyosi limwohya omutwe oti afeho olweso. Nga gegomba afe. Ngʼaloma ati, “Ohufa husingira ohuba omulamu.”
4.9: Aye Hatonda gamubuusa ati, “Oba mutuufu ohuluŋa olwʼahasaala?” Nga Yona amugobolamo ati, “Cʼehyo, ndi mutuufu ohuluŋa. Ohumanya ni nduŋire, ohufa husingira ohuba omulamu.”
4.10: Aye Musengwa gamuloma ati, “Ewe osaliirwe olwʼahasaala aha otahomire wayire ohuhalabirira. Aheene hamerire hu waaho mu hiire hirala nga wuhya ni hoomire.
4.11: Olwo ese ndiise otahabaaye nʼehisasabirisi eyiri ehibuga hyʼe Nineeve, ate nga hirimo abaatu ababita mu emitwalo ehumi nʼebiri abahiiri humanya ohwawula ehiraŋi nʼehibi, ŋalala nʼebyayo oluhulende omwo?”

1.1: Luno njʼolukalala lwʼamasiina gʼabaatu abomu lulyo lwa Yesu Kurisito Omwijuhulu wa Dawudi, owaali omwijuhulu wa Yibbulayimu.
1.2: Yibbulayimu gasaala Yisaka, nga Yisaka asaala Yakobbo. Nga Yakobbo asaala Yuda ko nʼabalebe babe,
1.3: nga Yuda asaala Pereezi ni Zeera era nyinaawe gaali nje Tamali. Nga Pereezi asaala Kezirooni, nga Kezirooni asaala Raamu,
1.4: nga Raamu asaala Aminadabbu. NgʼAminadabbu asaala Nasoni, nga Nasoni asaala Salumooni;
1.5: nga Salumooni asaala Bbowaazi. Era nyina ya Bbowaazi gaali nje Rahabbu. Bbowaazi gasaala Obbedi, nyina yʼObbedi gaali nje Luusi era nga Obbedi asaala Yese.
1.6: Nga Yese asaala Habaha Dawudi, nga Dawudi asaala Sulemaani era nyina ya Sulemaani gaali muha Wuriya mu husooka.
1.7: Nga Sulemaani asaala Rehobbowaamu, nga Rehobbowaamu asaala Abbiya, ngʼAbbija asaala Asa.
1.8: NgʼAsa asaala Yokosofaati, nga Yokosofaati asaala Yolamu, nga Yolamu asaala Wuziiya.
1.9: Nga Wuziiya asaala Yosamu, nga Yosamu asaala Ahazi, ngʼAhazi asaala Hezekiya.
1.10: Nga Hezekiya asaala Manase, nga Manase asaala Amoni, ngʼAmoni asaala Yosiya.
1.11: Nga Yosiya asaala Yekoniya nʼabalebe babe era ebiseera ebyo njʼebi baŋiriramo Abayisirayiri mu buŋaŋanguse e Bbabbulooni.
1.12: Oluvanyuma lwʼehiseera ehyo ehi baŋiriramo Abayisirayiri e Bbabbulooni, Yekoniya gasaala Seyalutiyeri, nga Seyalutiyeri asaala Zerubbabbeeri.
1.13: Nga Zerubbabbeeri asaala Abbiwudi, ngʼAbbiwudi asaala Eliyakimu, ngʼEliyakimu asaala Azori.
1.14: NgʼAzori asaala Zadooki, nga Zadooki asaala Akimu, ngʼAkimu asaala Eliwudi.
1.15: Nga Eliwudi asaala Elyazaali, ngʼElyazaali asaala Matani, nga Matani asaala Yakobbo.
1.16: Nga Yakobbo asaala Yosefu yamwe ya Malyamu, nyina ya Yesu oyu balanga baati Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu.
1.17: Ŋaaliŋo emirembe ehumi neene ohuŋwa hu Yibbulayimu ohwola hu Dawudi, ehumi nʼene ohuŋwa hu Dawudi ohwola olu baŋira Abayisirayiri mu buŋaŋanguse e Bbabbulooni. Nindi ehumi neene ohuŋwa mu buŋaŋanguse ohwola olu basaala Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu. Ohusaaliwa hwa Yesu Kurisito (Luk 2:1-7)
1.18: Bino njʼebyaliŋo ko basaale Yesu Kurisito: nyina Malyamu ni Yosefu baali basalireŋo ohufumbirigana. Aye ko bafumbirigane, bavumbula Malyamu nʼali hida hu lwʼobuŋangi wʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu.
1.19: Olwohuba Yosefu yamwe ya Malyamu gaali muutu ahola ebiruŋamu, sigendire humuswasa mu baatu. Olwʼehyo, gendire amuleheŋo mu ngiso.
1.20: Ne ni gaali nʼategeha ohuhola atyo, nga malayika wa Hatonda Musengwa amubonehera mu hirooto amuloma ati, “Yosefu, omwijuhulu wa Dawudi, otatya huŋira Malyamu ngʼomuhasi wuwo. Ehida ehi ali ni nahyo hyʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu.
1.21: Aja husaala omwana musinde era olimuguliha esiina oti Yesu; olwohuba aja hunoŋola abaatu babe mu bibi byawe.”
1.22: Bino byosibyosi byaliŋo ohwoheresa ehi Musengwa gaaloma nʼabitira mu naabbi ati,
1.23: “Omuhaana ahiiri ohweŋimbangaho nʼomusinde aliba hida, ngʼasaala omwana omusinde. Era balimuguliha esiina baati Emanweri,” (amahulu galyo ti, “Hatonda ali ni neefe.”)
1.24: Olwʼehyo Yosefu ni gasisimuha, gaahola ngʼolu malayika wa Musengwa gamulagira, gaŋira Malyamu ngʼomuhasi wuwe.
1.25: Aye sigeŋimba ni naye ohwola olu gasaala omwana omusinde, nga Yosefu amuguliha esiina ati Yesu.

2.1: Oluvanyuma lwʼohusaaliwa hwa Yesu e Bbeserekemu mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya, mu hiseera ehi Herode gaali habaha, abasinde abagesi ohuŋwa ewuŋwalyuba baatiina e Yerusaalemu.
2.2: Ni boola nga babuusa baati, “Omwana oyu basaaye ohuba habaha wʼAbayudaaya ali ŋeena? Hwaweene emunyeenye nʼeraga ohusaaliwa huhwe, njʼohuuja humujumirye.”
2.3: Ehyo ni hyagwa habaha Herode mu hutwi, hyamweralihirisa era nʼabaatu bosibosi mu Yerusaalemu beralihirira.
2.4: Olwʼehyo, Herode galanga oluhiiho lwʼabatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi bosibosi, ngʼababuusa ati, “Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu wahusaaliwa ŋeena?”
2.5: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Wahusaaliwa e Bbeserekemu mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya, olwohuba naabbi gaŋandiiha ati,
2.6: “ ‘Aye enywe abaatu bomu Bbeserekemu mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya, abaŋugi bomu Buyudaaya bamanyire baati ehibuga hyenywe hirala hu bibuga ebyʼomugaso, olwohuba mu nywe muliŋwamo omutangirisi, aliŋuga Yisirayiri, abaatu bange.’ ”
2.7: Ngʼaŋo Herode alanga abasinde abagesi abo mu ngiso ababuusa ehiseera ehyene nʼehyene ehi baboneramo emunyeenye.
2.8: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Mutiine e Bbeserekemu mubuuhirise hu biŋamba hu mwana oyo era ni muvumbula aŋa ali, muutebuseeho keesi nahatiina mujumirye.”
2.9: Oluvanyuma lwa habaha Herode ohubaloma atyo, baŋamba engira batiina e Bbeserekemu. Ni baali ni bahiiri mu ngira nga nindi babona emunyeenye yira eyi baabona era nga yibatangiriramo ohwola olu yemereera ŋamugulu wʼenyumba omu mwana gaali.
2.10: Ni baabona emunyeenye eyo, basangaala bugali weene.
2.11: Ni bengira mu nyumba, baabona omwana nʼali ni nyina Malyamu, nga bahubba amafuha bamujumirya. Ngʼaŋo batusa mu saŋu jaawe ebirabo ebyʼezaabbu, obubbaani nʼebyahaloosa ebi balanga baati miira bahena batonera omwana oyo.
2.12: Ehiseera ehyʼohwagamayo ewaawe ni hyola, baŋamba engira eyindi olwohuba Hatonda galoma ni nabo mu hirooto nʼabalabula ohutagama eyiri Herode. Ohudulumira e Misiri
2.13: Oluvanyuma lwʼabasinde abagesi abo ohutiina ewaawe, malayika wa Musengwa gabonehera Yosefu mu hirooto, ngʼamuloma ati, “Yosefu yinyoheramo oŋambe omwana ni nyina mweyibe mutiine e Misiri, mube eyo ohwola olu ndi balomera ehyohuhola, olwohuba Herode aja hutuma abaatu bendule omwana bamwite.”
2.14: Ngʼaŋo Yosefu genyoheramo owiire owo, aŋamba omwana ni nyina batiina e Misiri.
2.15: Eyo gamenyayo ohwola olu Herode gafa. Hino hyaliŋo ohwoheresa ehi Musengwa galoma nʼabitira mu naabbi ati, “Nalanga omwana wange ohuŋwa e Misiri.” Ohwita abaana abaseere mu Bbeserekemu
2.16: Herode ni gategeera ati abasinde abagesi abo bamweholaholanisyeho, galuŋa era ngʼalagira beete abaana abaseere bosibosi abʼemyaha ebiri ohwiha ŋaasi mu Bbeserekemu nʼohumirirano. Ehyo gahihola ni geema hu hiseera ehi basinde abagesi baloma baati njʼehi baboneramo emunyeenye.
2.17: Ngʼaŋo ehi naabbi Yeremiya galoma ati,
2.18: “Ejanjaasi liŋwera mu Raama, enduulu nʼohulira ohwʼamaani, Lakeeli nʼalira abaana babe era nʼatenda muutu yesiyesi humugumyagumya, olwohuba abaana babe bafuuye,” hyolerera. Yosefu, Malyamu ni Yesu baŋwa e Misiri
2.19: Oluvanyuma lwa Herode ohufa, malayika wa Musengwa gabonehera Yosefu mu hirooto e Misiri,
2.20: ngʼamuloma ati, “Yosefu; yinyoheramo oŋire omwana ni nyina e Yisirayiri, olwohuba abo abaali ni benda ohwita omwana, bafuuye.”
2.21: Olwʼehyo, nga Yosefu genyoha aŋamba omwana ni nyina nga bagamayo e Yisirayiri.
2.22: Aye Yosefu ni gaŋulira ati Arucelaawo njʼowagobola mu magulu ga semwana Herode nga habaha wa Buyudaaya, gatya ohwagamayo. Ne olwohuba Hatonda gamulabula mu hirooto, gasalaŋo hutiina mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya,
2.23: ngʼatiina mu habuga ahabalanga baati Nazaleesi. Ngʼebyo ebi abanaabbi baaloma baati, “Bali mulanga Munazaleesi,” byolerera.

3.1: Ehiseera hyola nga ŋabaaŋo omuutu oyu balanganga baati Yowaane Omubatiza, owatiina mu lulafu lwʼomu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya, nʼabuulira ati,
3.2: “Mwebbwage muleheŋo ebibi byenywe, olwohuba obuŋugi bwomwigulu bwigereeye.”
3.3: Yowaane oyo njʼoyu naabbi Yisaaya galomaho ati, “Ŋaliŋo ejanjaasi eriŋwera mu lulafu, omuutu nʼalangirira ati, ‘Muhosiirire Musengwa engira, muluŋamye amagira gage.’ ”
3.4: Yowaane gambalanga ehyambalo ehi baahola mu mooya gʼesolo eyi balanga baati engamiya era ni gesidiha omusipi ogwʼehyanjo mu hihunya. Emere yiye yalinga esige nʼomudugere.
3.5: Era olwʼohubuulira huhwe, abaatu baŋwerehererangamo ohuŋwa mu hibuga hyʼe Yerusaalemu nomu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya ko nʼebitundu ebiririheene olwabi Yoludaani.
3.6: Nga batiina benenya ebibi byawe era ngʼababatiza mu lwabi Yoludaani.
3.7: Aye Yowaane ni gabona eduuli lyʼAbafalisaayo nʼAbasadukaayo ni batiinayo ohubabatiza, ngʼabalomanga ati, “Enywe abaatu abahabi hyʼetemu, njʼani owabalabula ohuŋunuha ehiruŋi hya Hatonda?
3.8: Ale ŋaahani muhole ebikolwa ebiraga biiti mwebbwagire mulehireŋo ebibi byenywe.
3.9: Mulehere aŋo ohweginiha muuti mbo muli bagwalaafu olwohuba muli bejuhulu ba Yibbulayimu. Mbalomera ti Hatonda aŋanga ohucuusa amabaale gano gafuuha bejuhulu ba Yibbulayimu.
3.10: Ŋaahani mumanye muuti muli hyʼemisaala eji muutu ategeheeye aŋo embasa ohujitema. Era hiisi musaala ogutaama bibala ebiraŋi baja hugutema, bagudanye mu muliro.
3.11: “Ese mbabatiza nʼamaaji ohulaga ti mwebbwagire era mulehireŋo ebibi byenywe. Aye ŋaliŋo aliija oluvanyuma lwange owukira obuŋangi oyu ese toola wayire ohufihulamo engayito. Oyo alibabatiza nʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu nʼomuliro.
3.12: Niye anahaabule mu baatu ngʼolu omuutu aŋamba olugali gaahonja ohwawula omuhuuji nʼembehe. Embehe nijo ajihumbaania gajibiiha aye omuhuuji ŋalala nʼebidete alibyohya nʼomuliro ogutasima.” Ohubatiziwa hwa Yesu (Mar 1:9-11; Luk 3:21-22)
3.13: Mu hiseera ehyene ehyo, nga Yesu aŋwa mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya, atiina eyiri Yowaane amubatize mu lwabi Yoludaani.
3.14: Aye Yowaane gagesyaho ohugaana ohubatiza Yesu nʼaloma ati, “Ndiiwe owʼohumbatiza, lwahiina wuuja eyi ndi?”
3.15: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Hahibe hiityo, olwohuba hiraŋi ohuhola byosibyosi ebisangaasa Hatonda.” Ngʼaŋo Yowaane afugiirira ohubatiza Yesu.
3.16: Aŋo ni naaŋo, Yesu ni gahena ohubatiziwa ngʼaŋwa mu maaji. Mu hiseera ehyo ngʼegulu liwihuha, ngʼabona Omwoyo wa Hatonda nʼamwihaho nʼali mu hifaananyi hyʼeŋuusi.
3.17: Ngʼejanjaasi liŋwa mwigulu ni ŋaliŋo aloma ati, “Ono njʼOmwana wange omuhoda, owunesiimisa.”

4.1: Oluvanyuma, ngʼOmwoyo aluŋamia Yesu amuŋira mu lulafu Sitaani ohumuhema.
4.2: Oluvanyuma lwa Yesu ohusiiba endaalo amahumi ane omuusi nʼowiire, enjala yamuluma.
4.3: Ngʼaŋo Sitaani atiina amuloma ati, “Nʼoba nʼoli Mwana wa Hatonda, lagira amabaale gano gafuuhe biryo olye.”
4.4: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, ‘Omuutu saanabenga mulamu lwa biryo byoŋene aye nʼolwa hiisi hibono hya Hatonda.’ ”
4.5: Ngʼaŋo Sitaani aŋira Yesu mu hibuga ehyawufu ehi balanga baati Yerusaalemu amuniinia hu hisuli hya Yekaalu,
4.6: amuloma ati, “Nʼoba nʼoli Mwana wa Hatonda, tuuma ogwe ŋaasi, olwohuba hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, “ ‘Hatonda aliragira abamalayika babe bahuyeeda era hiiti balihubbaha, ndiwegumula hu mabaale huhulumya magulu.’ ”
4.7: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Era nindi hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti; ‘Soohemanga Musengwa Hatonda wuwo.’ ”
4.8: Nga nindi Sitaani aŋira Yesu ŋamugulu hu lusozi, amulaga owahabaha wosiwosi owohu hyalo nʼebiraŋi byamo.
4.9: Ngʼamuloma ati, “Ebyo byosibyosi nja hubihuŋa, singa wunjumirya.”
4.10: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma Sitaani ati, “Pwereŋo! Hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti; ‘Onajumiryenga nje Musengwa Hatonda wuwo era njʼoyu onaŋeeresenge yeŋene.’ ”
4.11: Ngʼaŋo Sitaani amuleha era ngʼabamalayika batiina baja bamuŋeeresa. Yesu atandiha ohusomesa e Galilaaya (Mar 1:14-15; Luk 4:14-15)
4.12: Oluvanyuma, Yesu ni gaali nʼahiiri mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya, gaŋulira ati badanyire Yowaane mu komera, nga gaagamayo mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya.
4.13: Ni goola eyo, gatiina e Nazaleesi eyi gaŋwa ngʼatiina amenya e Kaperanawumu, ehiri hu nyanja mu hitundu hyʼe Zebbulooni ni Nafutaali.
4.14: Hino hyali hiityo, ohwoheresa ehi naabbi Yisaaya galoma ati,
4.15: “Ehyalo hyʼe Zebbulooni, nʼehyalo hyʼe Nafutaali, hu luguudo olutiina hu nyanja yʼe Galilaaya, engereha wa Yoludaani, ni Galilaaya, omu Abatali Bayudaaya bamenya!
4.16: Enjase eyʼamaani yaduhiiye abaatu abahosi bʼebibi. Enjase yaduhiiye abo abali mu hiirema.”
4.17: Ohuŋwa mu hiseera ehyo, nga Yesu atandiha ohubuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi ati, “Mwebbwage olwohuba obuŋugi bwomwigulu bwigereeye.” Yesu alanga abenuli bane ohuba beegi babe (Mar 1:16-20; Luk 5:1-11)
4.18: Lulala, Yesu ni gaali nʼagenda hwigenya lyʼenyanja yʼe Galilaaya, gabona abalebe babiri: Simooni oyu balanga Peetero nʼAndereya. Abalebe abo baali benuli bʼenyeeni ni batega ahatimba mu nyanja.
4.19: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Muuje munonde mugendenga ni neese, ndibafuula benuli bʼabaatu.”
4.20: Aŋo ni naaŋo nga baleha aŋo obutimba waawe, bamulondaho.
4.21: Ni gesendaho mu moni ŋatotono, ngʼabona abalebe babiri, Yakobbo ni Yowaane abasaani ba Zebbedaayo ni bali ni saawe mu lyato ni bagonjoola obutimba waawe.
4.22: Nga boosi abalanga. Aŋo ni naaŋo nga baleha eryato ni saawe Zebbedaayo nga nibo batiina ni Yesu bagendanga ni naye. Yesu asomesa era aŋonia abalwaye (Luk 6:17-19)
4.23: Ngʼaŋo Yesu atiina hiisi ŋaatu mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya nʼasomesa mu mahumbaaniro gaawe, nʼabuulira abaatu Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu buŋugi wa Hatonda era ngʼaŋonia hiisi bulwaye mu baatu.
4.24: Ngʼefuma lirye lihwana mu gwanga lya Siriya mwosimwosi. Era nga bamuleetera abalwaye aba hiisi ngeri, abaali nʼobulumi owʼamaani, abaaliho emisambwa, abʼesimbu nʼabasanyalaala, ngʼabaŋonia.
4.25: Ngʼaŋo ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ohuŋwa mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya, nʼe Dekapooli, nʼe Yerusaalemu, nomu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya era nʼengereha wʼolwabi Yoludaani bagendanga ni naye.

5.1: Lulala, Yesu ni gabona ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu, gatiina hu lusozi nga gehala. Ngʼaŋo abeegi babe batiina aŋa gaali,
5.2: ngʼatandiha ohubasomesa ati,
5.3: “Bali nʼekabi abo abamanyire baati benda Hatonda abayeede, olwohuba njʼaba genda babe mu buŋugi buwe.
5.4: Bali nʼekabi abalira hatyane, olwohuba Hatonda alibagumyagumya.
5.5: Bali nʼekabi abo abawombeefu, olwohuba Hatonda alibaŋa ehyalo hino, nʼebiraŋi byosibyosi ebi abendesa.
5.6: Bali nʼekabi abayala era abʼenduŋo eruma olwʼohwenda ohuhola ebi Hatonda genda, olwohuba banahegute.
5.7: Bali nʼekabi abo abali nʼehisa, olwohuba Hatonda alibaŋambira ehisa.
5.8: Bali nʼekabi abo abali nʼemyoyo emigwalaafu, olwohuba balibona Hatonda moni hu moni.
5.9: Bali nʼekabi abo abenda emiyaaya, olwohuba balifuuha baana ba Hatonda.
5.10: Bali nʼekabi abo ababahiyaania olwʼohwenda ohuhola ebi Hatonda genda, olwohuba abo mbaba genda babe mu buŋugi buwe.
5.11: “Muli nʼekabi ni banabaduhenga, babahiyaania era babaŋayirisa hiisi hibi olwohuba baloobera bange.
5.12: Musangaalenga era musaŋalyenga olwohuba muli nʼomuhemba mubba mwigulu. Mu ngeri njʼenyene nʼabanaabbi boosi babahiyaania. Omunyu nʼenjase (Mar 9:50; Luk 14:34-35)
5.13: “Muli hyʼomunyu omuherehe mu hyalo muno. Aye singa omunyu gufuuha heresu, oŋanga otye ohugugobosamo obunoli nindi? Guba gubula mugaso ohutusaho ohugudanya ngʼabaatu bagutyakirira.
5.14: “Enywe muli hyʼenjase mu hyalo muno emulihira hiisi muutu era muboneherera hyʼehibuga ehi batongola hu lusozi.
5.15: Era omuutu saaŋambya taala gayifunihira mu hisero oba gayita mu kuliiti aye ayita hu hihondo aŋa yinaaŋe hiisi muutu ali mu nyumba enjase.
5.16: Mu ngeri njʼenyene, mube hyʼenjase eyiri abaatu, ko bajumiryenga Senywe ali mwigulu ni babona ebikolwa byenywe ebiraŋi.” Ohwoheresa amagambi
5.17: Nga Yesu geyongera abaloma ati, “Mutaŋeega muuti naaja hudibya magambi aga baŋa Musa oba ebi banaabbi baŋandiiha. Sinaaja hubidibya kadi aye ohubyoheresa.
5.18: Mbalomera ehituufu ti, ohutusaho ngʼegulu nʼehyalo biŋoyeeŋo, ŋabula hanjikuta huŋwa hu magambi ga Hatonda, ohwola olu byosibyosi bija hwolerera.
5.19: “Olwʼehyo, omuutu yesiyesi abbwaga erala hu magambi wayire erisingayo obutono ohuba lyʼomugaso era gasomesa nʼabandi ohuhola cʼehyene, omuutu oyo njʼalisembayo ohutaba wʼomugaso mu buŋugi wa Hatonda. Aye oyo aŋamba ebiragiro era gabisomesa nʼabandi, aja huba muhulu mu buŋugi buwe.
5.20: Era mbalomera ti; ohutusaho nga muholire ebi Hatonda genda ohuhiraho ngʼolu basomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda nʼAbafalisaayo bahola, simulingira mu buŋugi buwe. Obusungu (Luk 12:57-59)
5.21: “Mwaŋulira muuti Hatonda gaaloma abaatu abahalehale ati, ‘Siwiitanga muutu wahyo. Era omuutu yesiyesi owiita, balimusalira omusango.’
5.22: Aye ese mbaloma ti; hiisi aluŋira owahye, balimusalira omusango. Nindi oyo aloma owahye ati, ‘Oboneha hirangi,’ bamuŋaŋabira mu Luhiiho lwʼAbayudaaya Olubbala. Era hiisi aloma owahye ati, ‘Musiru ewe,’ balimudanya mu muliro namehere ogutasima.
5.23: “Olwʼehyo, nʼobanga nʼoŋira eŋongo yiyo eyiri Hatonda hu hituuti, ne wahebulira oti mulebewo ali nʼehyahwemulugunyaho,
5.24: olehanga aŋo eŋongo liryo ŋa hituuti, watiina watabagana ni naye, ko wagobola waliŋayo.
5.25: “Singa ŋabaŋo ahuŋaŋabira, nʼaba nʼahuŋira mu mbuga fuba nʼamaani mufugiirisanie ni muhiiri mu ngira. Ne ni mutafugiirisania, nʼalihwosa mu moni wʼomulamuzi, balihusalira omusango bahena bahuŋayo eyiri omuhulu wʼabasirikale bahudanye mu komera.
5.26: Kulomera ehituufu ti, sooliŋwa mu komera ohutusaho nʼosasuuye ebbeesa josijosi eji ahubanja. Obuhwedi
5.27: “Mwaŋulira muuti amagambi aga baŋa Musa galoma gaati, ‘Soholanga buhwedi.’
5.28: Aye mbaloma ti omuutu yesiyesi aheja hu muhasi gamwegomba, aba ahenire ohuhola obuhwedi mu mwoyo gugwe.
5.29: Olwʼehyo hanye emoni yiyo eyohu muhono omulungi njʼehuleetera ohuhola ehibi, yomoleemo oyidanye. Hiraŋi obe wa moni ndala aye wingire mu buŋugi wa Hatonda, ohuhira olu osigasa emoni jombi aye bahudanya mu hifo omu oja husihiirihira.
5.30: Era hanye omuhono gugwo omulungi njʼoguhuleetera ohuhola ehibi, gutemeeho ogudanye. Hiraŋi ohufiirwa hirala hu bitundu byʼomubiri gugwo aye osune obulamu obutaŋwaŋo ohuhira olu badanya omubiri gugwo gwosigwosi mu hifo omu oja husihiirihira. Ohwabuhana hwʼabafumbo (Mat 19:9; 5:32; Mar 10:11-12; Luk 16:18)
5.31: “Mwaŋulira muuti amagambi aga baŋa Musa galoma gaati, ‘Omuutu yesiyesi abbinga omuhasi wuwe, amuŋanga ebbaluŋa eyihahasa yiiti amubbingire.’
5.32: Aye ese mbaloma ti, hiisi abbinga omuhasi wuwe, ohutusaho olwʼobuhwedi, amuleetera ohuhola obuhwedi. Era omuutu yesiyesi afumbirwa oyu babbingire, aba ahola obuhwedi. Ohulayira
5.33: “Era nindi mwaŋulira muuti baaloma abahalehale baati, ‘Soolayiranga wereere aye woheresanga ebi wasuubisa Hatonda Musengwa.’
5.34: Aye mbaloma ti mutalayiranga wayire lulala oba ohulayira mbo muuti, ‘Mu mazima aga Hatonda ali mwigulu,’ olwohuba njʼetebe ya Hatonda,
5.35: oba ehyalo, olwohuba Hatonda njʼohwata amagulu gage, oba ni mutangirisa ehibuga Yerusaalemu, olwohuba njʼehibuga hya Habaha Ohihenaho.
5.36: Era soolayiranga wasinga nʼomutwe gugwo, olwohuba oguŋumaho buŋangi, ohufuula wayire olufiiri lulala ohuba luhosa oba lumali.
5.37: Olwʼehyo, onaba nʼonahole ehiitu, loma oti, ‘Nahihole’ oba oti, ‘Bbe sinahihole.’ Ehiitu hyosihyosi ehihiraho aŋo hiba hiŋwa eyiri hibooyi Sitaani.” Esomesa eŋamba hu hwegalula (Luk 6:29-30)
5.38: “Mwaŋulira muuti baaloma abahalehale baati, ‘Singa omuutu ahukosa emoni, weesi mukose moni, linaba liino weesi omukosa liino.’
5.39: Aye mbaloma ti siwegalulanga. Era omuutu nʼahuhubbanga oluŋi hwitama, mucuuhise ahubbe nʼohulindi lyosi.
5.40: Era singa omuutu ahuŋira mu mbuga ni genda ahunyageho esaati yiyo, omuŋanga nʼekooti yoosi.
5.41: Era singa omuutu ahuŋalirisa ohumugegera ebiitu emayiro ndala, bimugegere emayiro ebiri.
5.42: Singa omuutu ahusunga ehiitu, omuŋanga era ni bayo owenda ohumuŋola, omuŋolanga. Ohwenda abalabe (Luk 6:27-28,32-36)
5.43: “Mwaŋulira muuti baaloma abahalehale baati, ‘Yendanga omuutu wahyo aye ocaawenga omulabe wuwo.’
5.44: Ne mbaloma ti, mwendenga abalabe benywe era mulomberenga abo ababahiyaania,
5.45: ko muŋange ohuba abaana ba Senywe ali mwigulu. Olwohuba gaduhisa abalaŋi nʼababi omumwi era agwisa efula ewʼabahola ebiraŋi ko nʼabahola ebibi.
5.46: Ni munendenga ababenda boŋene, ehyo hibaŋeesa kabi hi? Nʼabaŋoosa aba muloma ti bahosi bʼebibi boosi benda ababenda.
5.47: Era singa muheesa abalebe benywe boŋene, ehi muba ni muholire hiba hihiriraho ŋe ehyʼabandi? NʼAbatali Bayudaaya boosi po bahola.
5.48: Olwʼehyo, enywe muli nʼohuba besigwa mu huhola ebiraŋi ngʼolu Senywe ali mwigulu ali mwesigwa.”

6.1: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Mwehuume ohutaholanga bikolwa ebiraŋi mu moni jʼabaatu olwʼohwenda bababone. Olwohuba singa muhola muutyo, simulisuna muhemba ohuŋwa eyiri Senywe ali mwigulu.
6.2: “Olwʼehyo nʼogabiranga abagadi, siwerangiriranga ngʼolu banafuusi bahola mu mahumbaaniro nomu nguudo, ni benda abaatu babaŋe eŋono. Mbalomera ehituufu ti, olwʼohwenda abaatu babaŋe eŋono, ogwo njʼomuhemba ogu basuna.
6.3: Aye ewe nʼobanga nʼogabira abagadi, sooganyanga muhono gugwo omugooda ohumanya omulungi ehi guholire.
6.4: Mu ngeri hyʼeyo ehi oliba nʼoŋaaye abagadi, hiriba mu ngiso. Era Hatonda abona ebi bahola mu ngiso alihuŋa omuhemba. Yesu gegirisa abeegi babe ohusaba (Luk 11:2-4)
6.5: “Era ni mubanga ni musaba, simubanga hyʼabanafuusi, olwohuba nibo benda ohwemereera mu mahumbaaniro nʼohutulo wʼenguudo ko abaatu bababone, babaŋe eŋono. Mbalomera ehituufu ti, eŋono eryo njʼomuhemba gwawe ogu balihomaho.
6.6: Aye enywe ni muba ni musaba, mwingiranga mu hisenge mwigalaŋo olwigi, nga ko musaba Hatonda ataboneha. Era Senywe abona ebi bahola mu ngiso aja hubaŋa omuhemba.
6.7: “Era ni musaba, mutagobojolangamo ebibono ebiŋuma mahulu ngʼolu ‘abahosi bʼebibi’ bahola olwohuba baŋeega mbo baati Hatonda aja huŋulira esaala jaawe olwʼebibono byawe ebingi.
6.8: Mutaba hya nibo olwohuba Senywe amanyire ebi mwenda ni muhiiri nʼohusaba.
6.9: “Ni muba ni musaba, mulombenga muuti, “ ‘Seefe ali mwigulu, oŋeewe eŋono,
6.10: obuŋugi buwo buuje, ebi wenda biholewe hu hyalo ngʼolu biholewa mwigulu.
6.11: Tufunise ebiryo ebyolwa leero
6.12: era tusoniŋe ebibi byefe, ngʼolu hwesi husoniŋa hiisi abatuhola ebibi.
6.13: Era otatuleha hugwa mu huhemewa, aye tunoŋole mu bubi. Obuŋugi nʼamaani ko nʼeŋono, bibyo emirembe nʼemirembe. Amiina.’
6.14: “Era ni munasoniŋenga abaatu ebibi ebi babahola, Senywe ali mwigulu anabasoniŋenga mwesi.
6.15: Aye ni mutasoniŋenga ababahola ebibi, mwesi Senywe saanabasoniŋenga. Ohusiiba
6.16: “Ni mubanga ni musiiba, simunakuŋalanga hyʼabanafuusi abeyonoona mu moni, ohulaga abaatu baati bali husiiba. Mbalomera ehituufu ti, olwʼohwenda abaatu babaŋe eŋono, ogwo njʼomuhemba gwawe ogu balihomaho.
6.17: Aye ni muba ni musiiba, musaabenga mu moni, mweŋahe amafuta era mususule nʼefiiri,
6.18: ko abaatu batategeera baati muli husiiba, ohutusaho Hatonda ataboneha abe njʼababona. Era Hatonda oyo abona ebi bahola mu ngiso alibaŋa omuhemba. Obuŋinda owomwigulu
6.19: “Simwebihiranga buŋinda hu hyalo huno ohu bisereŋi nʼobutalagi bibyonoona nʼabeebi babbwaga enyumba babiiba.
6.20: Aye mwebiihirenga obuŋinda wenywe mwigulu eyi butalagi nʼebisereŋi bitoola; nʼabeebi eyi bataŋanga hutiina babbwaga, beeba.
6.21: Olwohuba eyi obuŋinda bubwo buba nʼomwoyo gugwo njʼeyi gusiiba ni guŋemba.
6.22: “Emoni yiri hyʼetaala hu mubiri. Era emoni jenywe jinaba ni jibona bulaŋi, obulamu wenywe wosiwosi buja hwijula enjase.
6.23: Aye emoni jenywe jinaba ni jitabona bulaŋi, muba muli mu hiirema. Enjase eyiri mu nywe yinafuuha hiirema, ehiirema ehyo hiba hibitiirifu!
6.24: “Ŋaŋuma aŋanga ohuba nʼabasengwa babe babiri. Hinaba hiityo acaawaho mulala nga genda owundi oba agonderaho mulala ngʼatala owundi. Omuutu saaŋanga huŋira ebbeesa ngʼehiitu ehihulu era gasigala nʼahiŋeeresa Hatonda.” Ohuta owesige mu Hatonda
6.25: Nga Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Olwʼehyo, mbaloma ti muteŋendehereranga olwʼehyohulya oba ehyʼohunywa oba ehyohwambala. Obulamu si wa muŋendo ohuhira ebiryo, nʼomubiri gwosi siguhira ebyʼohwambala?
6.26: Ale mubonere hu nyuni, sijirima era jiŋuma byagi omu jibunga ebiryo aye Bbaabba owomwigulu ajiŋa ebijirya. Enywe simuhirira ŋaleeŋi enyuni ejo bbe?
6.27: Era njʼani hu enywe aŋanga ohweyongesaho wayire oludaalo lulala hu bulamu wuwe olwʼohweŋendehereranga?
6.28: “Lwahiina mweŋendeherera olwʼebyohwambala? Mubonere hu bimuli, sibirima wayire ohutungisa engoye.
6.29: Era mbalomera ti; nʼeŋono eri Habaha Sulemaani gaali ni nalyo lyosiryosi sigambalanga hubihira emboneha.
6.30: Obanga eyo njʼengeri eyi Hatonda alabiirira ebimuli ebiriŋo ehiseera buseera nga babyohya omuliro, saalibambasa enywe abali nʼohufugiirira ohudiidiri?
6.31: “Kale muteŋendehereranga hu ebi munaalye oba munanywe oba munambale.
6.32: Byosibyosi ebyo mbebi baatu abatafugiirira Hatonda baŋembaho byabahenera ehiseera aye Senywe ali mwigulu amanyire ati mubyenda.
6.33: Ne enywe ohuhira byosibyosi, mwendulenga obuŋugi wa Hatonda nʼebiitu ebiruŋamu ebi genda muhole, ali bameedaho nʼebisigayeyo byosibyosi.
6.34: Kale simweŋendehereranga olwʼoludaalo olunahahye ejo. Olwohuba hiisi ludaalo luba nʼebyeŋendeheresa ebyalwo.

7.2: Olwohuba, mu ngeri enyene eyi musaliramo abahyenywe emisango, njʼeyi mwesi Hatonda alibasaliramo. Era ehipimo ehi mu pimiramo abandi, ehyene ehyo mwesi cʼehi balibapimiramo.
7.3: Lwahiina ehiri hu wahyo njʼehiraŋi hyʼohuloma, waleherera ehi huliho ewe wamwene?
7.4: Oŋanga otye ohuloma mulebewo oti, ‘Mulebe yange, leha kutuse ahaatu hu moni,’ aye ewe wamwene nʼotebona oguutu oguhuli hu moni?
7.5: Munafuusi ewe, sooka wetuseho oguutu oguhuli hu moni ko oŋange ohutusa ahaatu ahali hu wahyo.
7.6: “Simuŋambanga ebiitu ebyawufu mwabiŋa ababbengi. Olwohuba bali hyʼembiiji ejityakirira ebiitu ebyʼomugaso jonoona era bali hyʼembwa ejibacuuhira jabaluma.” Saba, yendula era kookona (Luk 11:9-13)
7.7: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Mulombenga, Hatonda alibaŋa ehi musaba, mwegumyenga ohwendula, muligundula era mukookonenga, balibeguliraŋo.
7.8: Olwohuba hiisi asunga bamuŋa, owendula agundula, nʼakookona yeesi bamwiguliraŋo.
7.9: Ale njʼani hu enywe aŋa omwana wuwe ebaale nʼamusungire omugaati
7.10: oba aŋa omwana wuwe etemu nʼamusungire enyeeni?
7.11: Olwo ŋaahani obanga enywe ababi mumanyire ohuŋa abaana benywe ebiraŋi, ne Senywe ali mwigulu saalihira bugali weene ohuŋa ebiraŋi abo abamusunga?
7.12: “Olwʼehyo mu hiisi hiitu hyosihyosi, muholerenga abahyenywe ebi mwahendire mwesi babaholere. Ebyo mu buupi njʼebiri mu magambi nomu ebi banaabbi baŋandiiha.” Omulyango omudiiŋi nʼomugalamu (Luk 13:24)
7.13: Yesu geyongera ohuloma abeegi babe ati, “Mufubenga ohwingirira mu mulyango omudiiŋi, olwohuba omulyango ogwingira mu husihiiriha mugalamu, nʼengira eyolayo ngalamu era bangi abayibitamo.
7.14: Ne omulyango ogwingira mu bulamu obutaŋwaŋo mudiiŋi, nʼengira eyolayo yahwenyigiirisa, nʼabayigundula sibangi. Omusaala nʼebibala byagwo (Luk 6:43-44; 13:25-27)
7.15: “Mwehuumenga abanaabbi abʼobudulingi, abaaja eyi muli ni baboneha bawombeefu hyʼetaama aye mugati mula ni bali hya nalaŋa.
7.16: Ne munahabafaanihisye hu bikolwa byawe. Ebibala ebyʼomusaala ogu balanga baati omutiini sibabinoga hu buŋwa obusaba, nʼebibala byʼemizabbibbu sibabinoga hu manani.
7.17: Mu ngeri njʼenyene hiisi musaala omulaŋi gwama ebibala ebiraŋi aye omusaala omubi gwama ebibala ebibi.
7.18: Omusaala omulaŋi sigwama bibala ebibi era nʼomusaala omubi sigwama bibala ebiraŋi.
7.19: Hiisi musaala ogutataho bibala ebiraŋi bagutemaaŋo era bagudanya mu muliro.
7.20: Hyʼemisaala, abanaabbi abʼobudulingi boosi mulibafaanihisya hu bikolwa byawe.
7.21: “Sihiisi owunanga ati, ‘Musengwa, Musengwa,’ aja hwingira mu buŋugi wa Hatonda, ohutusaho oyo ahola ebi Bbaabba ali mwigulu genda.
7.22: Hu ludaalo olwo, bangi balindoma baati, ‘Musengwa, Musengwa, sihwasomesanga mu siina liryo? Sihwabbinganga emisambwa hu baatu era hwahola ebyamaliholiho bingi mu siina liryo?’
7.23: Aye ese ndibagobolamo lwatu ti; ‘Simbamanyire era simanyire nʼeyi muŋwera. Olwʼehyo, mupwere ni naaŋo enywe abahosi bʼebibi.’ Omutongoli omugesi nʼomubuyabuya (Luk 6:47-49)
7.24: “Olwʼehyo hiisi aŋulira ebibono byange gahena gabiholeraho, ali hyʼowatongola enyumba yiye hu mabaale.
7.25: Efula yagwa, ngʼamaaji gabanda, ngʼepunga ehubba enyumba eyo aye siyefumuliraŋo olwohuba gayitongola hu mabaale.
7.26: Aye hiisi aŋulira ebibono byange ebyo, ndabiholeraho, ali hyʼomuutu omubuyabuya, owatongola enyumba yiye hu mujehe.
7.27: Efula ni yagwa, ngʼamaaji gabanda, ngʼepunga ehubba enyumba eyo yefumuliyeŋo yosiyosi yaŋwera hwiroba.”
7.28: Yesu ni gahena ohuloma ebibono ebyo, ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu hyeŋunja bugali esomesa yiye.
7.29: Olwohuba gasomesanga nʼobuŋangi, sosi hyʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda.

8.1: Oluvanyuma Yesu ni gaŋwa hu lusozi ngʼehibbubbu hyʼabaatu himulondaho.
8.2: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaŋo omusinde omugenge owatiina aŋa gaali, ngʼahubba amafuha mu moni jije, amwegalihira ati, “Muhulu, ni huba ni huli husiima huhwo, ponie.”
8.3: Nga Yesu ajanuula omuhono amuŋambaho, amuloma ati, “Njʼohusiima hwange, ale ŋona.” Nga ŋaweene aŋo ebigenge biŋona.
8.4: Ngʼaŋo Yesu amuhamiirisa ati, “Omanya, hino otahiromeraho muutu kadi mulala. Aye tiina weyanjule eyiri omusengi wa Hatonda, oŋeyo eŋongo eyi Musa galagira, bube bujulizi obubahahasa buuti oŋonire.” Ohufugiirira hwʼomusirikale Omurooma (Luk 7:1-10)
8.5: Ngʼaŋo Yesu atiina mu hibuga hyʼe Kaperanawumu. Mu hibuga omwo mwalimo Omurooma owaali omuhulu wʼehibinja hyʼabasirikale cikumi. Omwidu wʼomuhulu oyo gaali mulwaye nʼali huupi hufa. Ngʼaŋo omuhulu aŋamba engira atiina eyiri Yesu amwegayirira ati,
8.6: “Muhulu, omwidu wange engo eyo ali hu buliri gasanyalaala era ali hubonaabona bugali.”
8.8: Ngʼomuhulu oyo amugobolamo ati, “Musengwa, sipoomera ewe ohuuja ewange aye loma ehibono hyoŋene, omwidu wange anaŋone.
8.9: Hiri hiityo olwohuba ndi nʼabasengwa bange abaapira era keesi ndi nʼabasirikale abali ŋaasi wange. Nʼaloma ono ti, ‘Tiina,’ ngʼatiina; nʼaloma ola ti, ‘Nja,’ nga gaaja; oba nʼaloma omwidu wange ti, ‘Hola hino,’ ahihola.”
8.10: Yesu ni gaŋulira ebi omuhulu oyo galoma, nga geŋunja. Ngʼaloma ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ehyali ni himulondaho ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu, kiiri hwaganaho omuutu yesiyesi mu Bayisirayiri ali nʼohufugiirira hyʼohwomusinde ono!
8.11: Mbahahasa ti abaatu baliŋwa enjuyi nʼenjuyi nga beehala hu mbaga ni Yibbulayimu, ni Yisaka ko ni Yakobbo mu buŋugi owomwigulu.
8.12: Aye mu hiseera ehyo, abo abahali abeene bo balibadanya ebulafu mu hiirema, eriba ohweninala nʼohulira amangi olwʼobusiba.”
8.13: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma omuhulu oyo ati, “Tiina, hija huba hiityo ngʼolu ofugiiriiye.” Era mu hiseera ehyene ehyo ngʼomwidu wuwe aŋoneraŋo. Yesu aŋonia abaatu bangi (Mar 1:29-34; Luk 4:38-41)
8.14: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aŋwa mu humbaaniro eryo, atiina ewa Peetero. Ni gengira mu nyumba, gasaŋaana masaala ya Peetero nʼalambaaye hubuliri nʼali mulwaye wʼomusuuja omwene ogwʼamaani.
8.15: Ngʼamuŋamba hu muhono, aŋo ni naaŋo omusuuja ogwali ni gumuluma nga guŋona era nga genyoha amutegeheraŋo ehyohulya.
8.16: Egulo ni lyola, abaatu abaali nʼabalwaye baawe abaali nʼobulwaye owa hiisi ngeri, babaleeta eyiri Yesu era ngʼaŋamba hu hiisi mulwaye amuŋonia. Era bangi abaaliho emisambwa, gajibabbingaho nʼajiragira ohubaŋwaho jitiine.
8.17: Ehyo hyali hiityo, ohwoheresa ebibono ebi naabbi Yisaaya gaaloma ati, “Gatutusaho obunafu era gaaŋira obulwaye owaali ni butuluma.” Ohweŋoheresa hwʼabaatu (Luk 9:57-62)
8.18: Yesu ni gabona ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ni himweswanigirihiise galoma abeegi babe ati, “Hwambuhe, hutiine engereha wʼenyanja.”
8.19: Baali bahiiri huniina eryato ngʼomusomesa wʼamagambi ga Hatonda atiina aŋa Yesu gaali, amuloma ati, “Musomesa, nagendenga ni neewe hiisi aŋa onatiinenga.”
8.20: Aye Yesu gamugobolamo ati, “Ebibbwe biri nʼekero omu biŋenyuha, enyuni joosi jiri nʼebiswi aye Omwana wʼOmuutu aŋuma aŋa ata olubafu.”
8.21: Nga ŋabaaŋo owundi hu abeegi babe owamuloma ati, “Muhulu, nahahene husiiha laata yange ko naaja.”
8.22: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Nja, ogendenga ni neese, leha abafu mu mwoyo basiihe abafu bahyawe.” Yesu gehahania hibuyaga hu nyanja (Mar 4:35-41; Luk 8:22-25)
8.23: Yesu ni ganiina eryato, abeegi babe baleha aŋo ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu, nga bambuha ni naye.
8.24: Ni baali ni bahiiri mu lugendo, ngʼero liŋamba Yesu aŋenyuha. Hibuyaga owʼamaani ngʼahubba hu nyanja ngʼebimoto byʼamaaji byedanyanga mu lyato.
8.25: Ngʼaŋo abeegi babe batiina bamusisimusa, ni bamuloma baati, “Tunoŋole Musengwa, enyanja yenda hutwita!”
8.26: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Lwahiina mutya? Muli nʼohufugiirira hutotono?” Nga genyoha ahayuhira hibuyaga ko nʼebimoto byʼamaaji ebyali ni byefuhisa hu nyanja. Ngʼaŋo hibuyaga ateeha nʼenyanja ngʼebunjeerera erala.
8.27: Ehyo hyahena abeegi abo efiiri hu mutwe, bebuusa abeene nʼabeene baati, “Omuutu ono wa ngeri hi oyu wayire hibuyaga nʼebimoto byʼamaaji hu nyanja biŋulira?” Yesu aŋonia abasinde babiri abaaliho emisambwa (Mar 5:1-20; Luk 8:26-39)
8.28: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Yesu nʼabeegi babe boola engereha wʼenyanja mu hyalo hyʼAbagaraasa. Yesu gaali ko gahaŋwa ati mu lyato, abasinde babiri abaliho emisambwa nga bamwagaana ni baŋwera mu pungulu eji basiihangamo abafu. Abasinde abo baali nʼoluswa bugali, nʼeŋuma muutu yesiyesi abita mu ngira eyo.
8.29: Nga bahayaana ni baloma baati, “Otuhaabya hiina, ewe Yesu Omwana wa Hatonda? Wujire ŋano ohutubonyaabonya ehiseera ni hihiiri hwola?”
8.30: Ohuupi aŋo ŋaaliŋo ehidooli hyʼembiiji ni jaaya.
8.31: Ngʼemisambwa jegalihira Yesu jiiti nʼaba nʼajibbinga, ajiganye jitiine mu mbiiji ejo.
8.32: Era nga Yesu ajiganya. Emisambwa ni jabaŋwaho, jatiina jingira mu mbiiji. Nga josijosi jifulumuha embiro jihirira jiŋwera mu nyanja jinywa etubbi nga jifa.
8.33: Abaali ni beemera embiiji nga baduluma baja balomera abaatu abomu hibuga hyawe, byosibyosi ebyali ni byolire hu basinde bala abaaliho emisambwa.
8.34: Ngʼaŋo abaatu bangi abomu hibuga ehyo baŋwerehereramo batiina ohwebonera Yesu. Ni boola aŋa gaali bamwegalihira aŋwe mu hitehere hyawe.

9.1: Nga Yesu aniina mu lyato, asomoha enyanja atiina mu hibuga hyʼewaawe.
9.2: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaŋo abasinde abaŋira omuutu owaali nʼasanyalaaye ni bamugegire hu musigaasiga. Yesu ni gabona ni bali nʼohufugiirira, ngʼaloma omulwaye ati, “Mwana wange oteŋendeherera, kusoniŋire ebibi bibyo.”
9.3: Mu hiseera ehyo, ŋaaliŋo abasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda abaali ni behaaye aŋo baaŋulira ebibono ebi Yesu gaaloma, nga baloma abeene nʼabeene baati, “Aŋanga atye ohuloma atyo? Ohwo huba hufodogola.”
9.4: Ŋaweene aŋo nga Yesu afaania mu mwoyo gugwe ebyali mu biŋeego byawe. Ngʼababuusa ati, “Lwahiina mufugiirira epeega embi ohuba mu myoyo jenywe?
9.5: Ehihiraho owangu njʼehiri ŋeena, ohuloma ti ‘Kusoniŋire ebibi bibyo,’ oba ti, ‘Yinyoha ogende’?
9.6: Ŋaahani nja hubalaga ti Omwana wʼOmuutu ali nʼobuŋangi hu hyalo ohusoniŋa ebibi.” Ngʼaloma owaali nʼasanyalaaye oyo ati, “Yinyoha ogege omusigaasiga gugwo wagameyo ewenywe.”
9.7: Ŋaweene aŋo ngʼomusinde oyo genyoha, aŋamba omusigaasiga gugwe atiina engo.
9.8: Ngʼabaatu bosibosi beŋunja era nga bajumirya Hatonda aŋa abaatu obuŋangi hyʼobwo. Yesu alanga Matayo (Mar 2:13-17; Luk 5:27-32)
9.9: Yesu ni gaali naŋwa mu hifo aŋa gaŋonehesya omuutu owaali nʼasanyalaaye, ngʼabona omuŋoosa oyu balanganga baati Matayo ni gehaaye aŋa baŋoosesa nʼaŋoosa. Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Nja ofuuhe mwegi wange.” Ngʼebyo byosibyosi Matayo abiŋwaho, genyoha atiina ni Yesu.
9.10: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Yesu atiina nʼabeegi babe ewa Matayo ohulya. Omutoolo gwʼabaŋoosa nʼabaatu abandi abahola ebibi, boosi batiinayo. Nga bosibosi beehala ni Yesu nʼabeegi babe, baliira ŋalala.
9.11: Abafalisaayo ni babona Yesu nʼalya nʼabaatu abo “abahola ebibi” nʼabaŋoosa nga babuusa abeegi babe baati, “Lwahiina alya nʼabaatu ‘abahosi bʼebibi’ nʼabaŋoosa?”
9.12: Yesu ni gaŋulira ehi babuusa, nga niye abaloma ati, “Abaatu abalamu sibetaaga musaŋu, ohutusaho abalwaye.
9.13: Aye mutiine mwendule amahulu gʼehyaŋandiihiwa ehiroma hiiti, ‘Nenda ehisa sosi eŋongo.’ Olwʼehyo mbaloma ti sinaaja hwendula aberanga abalaŋi, ohutusaho abahola ebibi.” Ohusiiba (Mar 2:18-22; Luk 5:33-39)
9.14: Ngʼaŋo abeegi ba Yowaane batiina eyiri Yesu bamubuusa baati, “Lwahiina efe nʼAbafalisaayo husiiba aye abeegi babo sibasiiba?”
9.15: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Abalange hu mbaga yʼobugole baŋanga ohunakuŋala ahooye omweŋa nʼahiiri ni nabo? Aye ehiseera hiryola babatusaho ahooye omweŋa. Hu olwo njʼolu balitandiha ohusiiba.
9.16: “Omuutu saahubba hiŋero ehyʼolugoye olunyaaha mu hyambalo ehihayire. Olwohuba ehiŋero ehyo ni hyehuuna, hihapuha ohuŋwa hu lugoye olwo oluhayire hyaŋiriraho nʼehimesu hyalwo, ngʼehituli hyeyongera ohugalama.
9.17: Mu ngeri njʼenyene, sibajuha mwenge epiiraŋo ogwomu mizabbibbu mu saŋu yʼehyanjo ekayire. Singa ohihola, yadisa esaŋu ngʼobifiirwa byombi. Aye omwenge epiiraŋo ogwo, bagujuha mu saŋu yʼehyanjo epyaha ko ndʼobifiirwe byombi.” Omuhaana wa Yayiro nʼomuhasi wʼoluheeŋo (Mar 5:21-43; Luk 8:40-56)
9.18: Yesu ni gaali nʼahiiroma, nga jireeta mulala hu bahulu bʼehumbaaniro lyʼAbayudaaya oyu baali ni balanga baati Yayiro. Yayiro oyo gatiina ngʼahubba amafuha mu moni jije, amwegalihira bugali nʼamuloma ati, “Muhulu ahahaana hange hahaŋwa ohufa, nja oje ohaŋambeho hanalamuhe.”
9.19: Ngʼaŋo Yesu nʼabeegi babe benyoha batiina ni naye.
9.20: Ŋaaliŋo omuhasi owaali nʼalwaye oluheeŋo ohuhena emyaha ehumi nʼebiri. Ngʼaŋo geyibirira aŋwera egongo wa Yesu aŋamba hu hyambalo hihye.
9.21: Hino gahihola olwohuba gaaloma mu mwoyo gugwe ati, “Ni naŋambe huŋambaho hu hyambalo hihye, naaŋone.”
9.22: Nga Yesu acuuha amubona amuloma ati, “Muhaana, ba mugumu! Ohufugiirira huhwo huhuŋonisye.” Ngʼomuhasi oyo aŋona mu haseera aho.
9.23: Yesu ni goola mu mago gʼomuhulu ola oyu balanga baati Yayiro, gengira mu nyumba, ngʼabona abembi nʼemirere ni bali huhooha enyembo eji bemba omuutu nʼafuuye, nʼabaatu bosibosi abaaliŋo ni bali hulira ni bahubba nʼenduulu olwʼohufa hwʼomuhaana oyo.
9.24: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Mutule ebulafu, omuhaana saafe aye ali huŋenyuha.” Aye nibo bamujeherera humujeherera, olwohuba baali bamanyire baati omuhaana gaali afuuye.
9.25: Ni bahena ohutusa ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ebulafu, nga Yesu gengira aŋamba omuhaana hu muhono, ngʼomuhaana gemeerera.
9.26: Amaŋuliro agaŋamba huhulamuha hwʼomuhaana oyo gahwana mu twale eryo lyosiryosi. Yesu aŋonia abaŋofu babiri
9.27: Yesu ni gaali nʼaŋwa mu hifo ehyo, abasinde babiri abaali abaŋofu bamulondaho ni balomera ŋamugulu baati, “Mwijuhulu wa Dawudi, tuŋambire ehisa otuŋonie!”
9.28: Ŋaahani Yesu ni gengira mu nyumba, abaŋofu abo boosi batiina aŋa gaali, ngʼababuusa ati, “Mufugiirira muuti sobola ohubaŋonia?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Musengwa, hufugiirira!”
9.29: Ngʼaŋo aŋamba hu moni jaawe, abaloma ati, “Hahibe hiityo olwʼohufugiirira hwenywe.”
9.30: Ŋaweene aŋo ngʼemoni jʼabasinde abo jirimbula batandiiha ohubona. Nga Yesu abalabula nʼabahutiira ati, “Mumanya ohutalomeraho muutu yesiyesi!”
9.31: Aye nibo baatula, batiina bahwania mu twale eryo lyosiryosi amaŋuliro agaŋamba hu Yesu. Yesu aŋonia kasiru
9.32: Abasinde abo ni baali ni batula ebulafu, nga ŋabaaŋo abaleetera Yesu omusinde owaaliho omusambwa nataŋanga nʼohuloma.
9.33: Yesu ni gabbinga omusambwa ogwo, omusinde oyo gatandiha ohuloma ngʼehiŋindi hyʼabaatu abaali aŋo beŋunja. Era nga baloma baati, “Hino hubaaye sihuhibonangaho mu Yisirayiri!”
9.34: Aye Abafalisaayo baaloma baati, “Abbinga emisambwa nʼatambisa obuŋangi wa Bbeluzebbuli omuhulu wʼemisambwa.” Abatambi batono
9.35: Yesu gagenda mu bibuga byosibyosi nomu byalo nʼasomesa mu mahumbaaniro gʼAbayudaaya, nʼabuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu buŋugi wa Hatonda. Era nʼaŋonia hiisi bulwaye.
9.36: Yesu ni gabona ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ni hihumbeene, nga bamuŋambya ehisa olwohuba baali beŋendehereye ni ŋabulaŋo owʼohubayeeda era ni baali hyʼetaama ejiŋumaho mwayi.
9.37: Ngʼaŋo aloma abeegi babe ati, “Abaatu abaja ohufugiirira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi bangi era bali hyʼebirime ebyolire ohuhungula aye abatambi sibahena.
9.38: Olwʼehyo, musunge Hatonda Musengwa omwene ndimiro asindihemo abatambi.”

10.1: Nga lulala Yesu alanga abeegi babe ehumi nʼababiri batiine aŋa gaali, ngʼabaŋa obuŋangi ohubbinganga emisambwa hu baatu era baŋonie hiisi bulwaye.
10.2: Abahwenda babe abo ehumi nʼababiri mba bano: asooka nje Simooni oyu balanga erindi baati Peetero ni mugandaawe Andereya; ko ni Yakobbo ni mugandaawe Yowaane abasaani ba Zebbedaayo;
10.3: Filipo ni Bbatulumaayo ni Matayo omuŋoosa ni Tomasi ni Yakobbo omusaani wʼAlufaayo; ni Sadaayo
10.4: ni Simooni Omuzelote, ko ni Yuda Yisikaryoti owalya mu Yesu oluhwe.
10.5: Yesu gatuma abahwenda abo nabalaabbira ati, “Mutatiina mu Batali Bayudaaya, oba ohwingira mu hibuga hyʼAbasamaliya hyosihyosi.
10.6: Aye mutiine eyiri abaatu ba Yisirayiri abaagota.
10.7: Mutiine mubalome muuti; ‘Obuŋugi bwomwigulu bwegereeye ŋaapi.’
10.8: Era muŋonie abalwaye, mulamuse abafu, muŋonie abali nʼebigenge, mubbinge emisambwa hu baatu. Musunire obuŋangi owo huwereere era mwesi mubutambisenga huwereere.
10.9: Mu lugendo luno, mutagega bbeesa josijosi mu saŋu jenywe.
10.10: Mutagega ehihapu oba ehyohwambala ehyohubiri oba omugogo gwʼengayito ogwohubiri oba omuhoomero olwohuba omutambi asaanira bamuŋe ebi genda.
10.11: “Hiisi hibuga oba mu hyalo eyi munolenga, mwendulirisanga omuutu aŋanga ohubasangaalira nga mumenya mu mago gage ohwola olu museebuha.
10.12: Ni mwingiranga mu mago omwo, mubasabiranga ekabi.
10.13: Abomu mago ago banabasangaalira, ekabi eji mubalombeeye jinabenga ni nabo. Aye banagaana ohubasangaalira, ekabi jenywe jibagoboleranga.
10.14: Ni mwolanga mu mago aŋaatu oba mu hibuga, ndibabasangaalira oba bagaana ohuŋuliirisa ebi mubaloma, nga muŋwaŋo. Era ni muba ni muŋwaŋo, mwekukumulangaho efuuhe mu magulu, habe habonero ahalaga ohulabula ohuŋwa eyiri Hatonda.
10.15: Mbalomera ehituufu ti hu ludaalo olwʼohusaliraho emisango, baliŋa abaatu bomu Sodoma ni Gomora ehibonereso ehiriho obudemwademwa ohuhira abomu hibuga ehyo.” Ohuhiyaania ohulibaŋo (Mar 13:9-13; Luk 21:12-17)
10.16: Nga Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Mbatuma aye mwehuume olwohuba eyi mbatuma muja huba hyʼenyana jʼetaama mu nalaŋa. Olwʼehyo mube bagesigesi mwehuume hyʼetemu era mube bawombeefu hyʼeŋuusi.
10.17: Mubeŋo ni muhimanyire era ni mwetegehire, olwohuba balibaŋamba babaŋaayo mu mbuga jʼamagambi era balibahubbira mu mahumbaaniro gaawe.
10.18: Balibemeha ohuŋosya mu mbuga jʼabaami neja bahabaha olwohuba baloobera bange. Hino hiribaleetera enywe ohulomera abaŋugi abo nʼAbatali Bayudaaya Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agapambaho.
10.19: Aye ni banabaŋambenga babaŋira mu mbuga jaawe, simweŋendehereranga ehi munalome oba ngʼolu munahirome. Olwohuba mu hiseera ehyo, Hatonda anabaŋenga ehyʼohuloma.
10.20: Era simuja huba ndinywe omuloma aye ebibono ebi muja hulomanga bija huba byʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu owa Senywe ali mwigulu.
10.21: “Mu hiseera ehyo, abalebe baja hulyanganamo oluhwe owundi gaŋayo owahye ohumwita, nʼabasaawe bʼabaana boosi baliŋaayo abaana baawe. Abaana balijeemera abasaaye baawe era bahena babaŋaayo ohubeeta.
10.22: Era enywe, abaatu bosibosi balibacaawa olwohuba baloobera bange. Aye oyo aligumira ebigosi ohwola hu komerero, njʼalinoŋoha.
10.23: Munatiina aŋaatu babahiyaania, mudulumiranga aŋandi. Mbalomera ehituufu ti; simulihenaho bibuga ebyomu Yisirayiri Omwana wʼOmuutu nʼatagobola.
10.24: “Omusomi saahira musomesa wuwe eŋono era eŋuma omwidu ahiraho musengwawe.
10.25: Omusomi saali nʼohweŋunja singa bamubisya ngʼolu babisya omusomesa wuwe, mu ngeri njʼenyene nʼomwidu yeesi saali nʼohweŋunja banaba ni bamubisya ngʼolu babisya musengwawe. Obanga omwene mago bamulanga Bbeluzebbuli, hiina ehibataliranga abomu mago gage!” Oyu baatu bali nʼohutya (Luk 12:2-9)
10.26: Nga Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Olwʼehyo simweŋendehereranga olwʼabaatu hyʼabo abalibahiyaania, olwohuba hiisi ehi bahweha balihigundula era ehiitu ehi bagisa hiryeta aŋalafu.
10.27: Byosibyosi ebi mbalomera mu wiire mubiromanga mu muusi etangalwe. Ehi babaŋweŋweterera mu hutwi, mubibbutulanga mu lwijuuye.
10.28: “Mutatyanga abo abeeta omubiri hyonyene. Mutyenga nje Hatonda olwohuba ali nʼobuŋangi ohusihiirisa obulamu nʼomubiri mu muliro ogutasima. Oyo njʼoyu muli nʼohutyanga.
10.29: “Obuyuni bubiri bulimo ebbeesa totono nyene aye eŋuma wayire halala hubwo ahafa, Senywe ali mwigulu nʼatendire.
10.30: Era ni nenywe mwesi, Hatonda amanyire nʼobungi wʼefiiri ejiri hu mitwe jenywe.
10.31: Kale muteŋendehereranga, olwohuba muli bamuŋendo nʼohuhiraho obuyuni owo eduuli.
10.32: “Hiisi oyu esoni jitaŋamba ohwatula mu abaatu ati gaafugiirira, keesi ndyatula mu moni ja Bbaabba ali mwigulu ti muutu wange.
10.33: Aye oyo oyu soni jiŋamba ohwatula mu baatu ati gaafugiirira, keesi ndimwegaana mu moni ja Bbaabba ali mwigulu.” Simiyaaya aye talo (Luk 12:51-53; 14:26-27)
10.34: Nga Yesu geyongera ohuloma ati, “Mutaŋeega muuti naaja huleeta miyaaya hu hyalo. Sinaaja huleeta miyaaya aye etalo.
10.35: Hiri hiityo olwohuba naaja ohwabuhania “omwana omuseere ni semwana, omwana muhaana ni nyina, omulya ni masaalawe.
10.36: Era abalabe bʼomuutu baja huba bomu mago gage ameene.”
10.37: Nga Yesu aloma ati, “Omuutu yesiyesi owenda semwana oba nyina oba abaana babe ohuhiraho ngʼolu ganyenda ese, saasanira huba muloobera wange.
10.38: Hiisi owenda ohuba omuloobera wange, ali nʼohwefiirisa gagega omusalabba gugwe gagendanga ni neese.
10.39: Hiisi owehenerera obulamu wuwe, alibufiirwa aye hiisi afiirwa obulamu wuwe hu lwange, alibunoŋola.” Omuhemba ohuŋwa eyiri Hatonda (Mar 9:41)
10.40: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Hiisi abasangaalira aba asangaaliiye ndiise era hiisi owusangaalira aba asangaliiye oyo owaatuma.
10.41: Hiisi asangaalira naabbi olwohuba naabbi, alisuna omuhemba hyʼogwa naabbi. Era hiisi asangaalira omuutu omugwalaafu olwohuba omuutu oyo mugwalaafu, alisuna omuhemba hyʼogwoyo omugwalaafu.
10.42: Mbalomera ehituufu ti, singa omuutu yesiyesi aŋa mulala hu beegi bange bano omwendo gwʼamaaji, olwohuba oyu baŋa muloobera wange wayire nga njʼasembayo ohuba wʼeŋono, mu hiisi ngeri Hatonda alisasula omuutu oyo.”

11.1: Oluvanyuma, Yesu ni gahena ohusomesa abeegi babe ehumi nʼababiri, ngʼaŋwa mu hifo ehyo atiina ohusomesa nʼohubuulira abaatu Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi mu bibuga byʼe Galilaaya.
11.2: Yowaane Omubatiza nʼali mu komera, bamuŋayira hu biitu ebi Kurisito gaali nʼali huhola. Ngʼatuma abeegi babe
11.3: ohubuusa Yesu baati, “Ndiiwe oyo oyu Hatonda gasuubisa ohuuja ohunoŋola abaatu oba eriyo owundi?”
11.4: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Mwagame mulomere Yowaane ebi mubona nʼebi muŋulira,
11.5: abaali abaŋofu ŋaahani babona; abaleme bagenda; abagenge balongooha, abasiŋa baŋulira, abafu balamuha nʼabagadi boosi basunire ekabi ohubalomera Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi.
11.7: Abahwenda ba Yowaane abo ni baali ni bagamayo, nga Yesu atandiha ohubuusa ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ebiŋamba hu Yowaane ati, “Ni mwatiina mu lulafu, mwatiina hubona hiina? Mwatiina hubona omuutu ali hyʼolugada olu embeŋo ehubba ni ŋira eyi ni neeyi?
11.8: Ni hitaba cʼehyo, mwatiina hubona hi? Omuutu owambaye engoye ejimeregenya? Si cʼehyo, olwohuba abambala engoye ejimeregenya baba mu lubiri ewa habaha.
11.9: Ne hiina ehyene ehi mwatiina ohubona mu lulafu? Peega ti mwatiina hubona naabbi. Era mu butuufu oweene, Yowaane oyo sinaabbi hyonyene.
11.10: Aye oyo, njʼoyu ehyaŋandiihiwa hiromaho hiiti, “ ‘Nja hutuma omuhwenda wange ahweherereyo aje ahutereehese engira.’
11.11: “Mbalomera ehituufu ti, mu baatu abahasaaliwa bosibosi, ŋabula ahira Yowaane Omubatiza eŋono cooka abaatu abali mu buŋugi womwigulu, asembayo ohuba owa ŋaasi, amuhira eŋono.
11.12: Ohuŋwa mu biseera bya Yowaane Omubatiza ohwola hatyane, abanamaani basoosa obuŋugi womwigulu bugali weene era oyo awingira awingirira hifuba.
11.13: Hiri hiityo olwohuba amagambi nʼebi banaabbi bosibosi baŋandiiha byaloma hu hiseera hyʼobuŋugi womwigulu, ohwola olu Yowaane gaaja.
11.14: Era ni muba ni mufugiirira obuhwenda owo, Yowaane oyo njʼEliya oyu baalomaho baati aja huuja.”
11.16: “Abaatu abʼomulembe guno nʼabagerageranie hu hi? Bali hyʼabaana abaŋere abehaaye mu nabiŋwera ko baaloma abahyawe baati,
11.17: “ ‘Hubafuuŋiiye emirere aye ndimuhine, era nʼolu hwembire olwembo oluŋambya enaku, ndimulire nahulira.’
11.18: “Ehyo kigeragerania hu Yowaane, sigalyanga biryo ebya bulijo oba hunywaho envinyo, olwʼehyo nga baloma baati, ‘Aliho emisambwa!’
11.19: Aye Omwana wʼOmuutu gaaja ni geriira ebiryo era nʼanywa nʼevinyo hyʼomuutu yesiyesi nga baloma baati, ‘Oyo wa mulyerye, mumeesi era ahola omuhumba nʼabaŋoosa ko nʼabahosi bʼebibi.’ Aye abo bosibosi abaholera hu magesi ga Hatonda bahahasa baati matuufu ni hibonehera hu bikolwa byawe.” Jageene abaatu abatafugiirira (Luk 10:13-15)
11.20: Ngʼaŋo Yesu atandiha ohunenya abaatu abomu bibuga omu gaholera ebyamaliholiho ebihira obungi olwohuba sibebbwaga.
11.21: Ngʼaloma ati, “Jibageene enywe abaatu abomu hibuga Korazini nʼe Bbesusayida! Ebyamaliholiho ebi baahola ewenywe, biba ni byali mu Tiiro nomu Sidoni, hani abaatu baayo beboŋa ebigwaali era beeŋaha nʼegohe ohulaga baati bebbwagire.
11.22: Aye mbalomera ti, hu ludaalo olwʼohusala emisango, baliŋa abaatu abomu Tiiro ni Sidoni ehibonereso ehiriho obudemwademwa hu hyenywe.
11.23: “Ate enywe abaatu bʼe Kaperanawumu, muŋeega muuti mulitiina mwigulu? Bbe, mulitiina mu geyeena, olwohuba ebyamaliholiho ebi baahola mu nywe, baba ni babihola mu hibuga hyʼe Sodoma, hani hihiiriŋo.
11.24: Aye mbalomera ti, hu ludaalo olwʼohusala emisango, baliŋa abaatu bomu Sodoma ehibonereso ehiriho obudemwademwa hu hyenywe.” Muuje eyi ndi musune ehiŋuumulo (Luk 10:21-22)
11.25: Mu hiseera ehyo, nga Yesu aloma ati, “Kujumirya Bbaabba, Musengwa owatonda egulu nʼehyalo, olwohuba wagisa aberanga abamagesi ohumanya amazima, ngʼohwehulira abaŋuma ehi bamanyire hyʼabaana abaŋere.
11.26: Hituufu Bbaabba, ehyo hyahusangaasa olwohuba njʼohwali ohusiima huhwo.”
11.27: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma abaatu ati, “Bbaabba gapambya ebiitu byosibyosi ohubiŋuga. Ŋaŋuma amanyire Omwana ohutusaho Semwana era ŋaŋuma amanyire Semwana ohutusaho Omwana ni naabo aba Omwana ahwehulira ehyama ehyʼohumutegeera.
11.28: “Muuje eyi ndi, enywe mwesimwesi abadembire era abaluŋiriiye nʼemigugu emisito, nja hubaŋa ehiŋuumulo.
