11.29: Mungondere ngʼolu eŋombe esaame yigonda bayitaaho ehijoogi. Mwegire hu ese olwohuba ndi muwombeefu era wagonjewa mu mwoyo, mulisuna ehiŋuumulo.
11.30: Ehyo kiroma olwohuba engeri eyi nja hubatangirirangamo eja huba ndaŋi era ehi mbaŋa ohuhola hyangu.”

12.1: Lulala hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato, Yesu nʼabeegi babe baali babita mu ngira eyibita mu muga gwʼengaano. Enjala yaali eruma abeegi babe era nga batiinanga ni baŋulula amagala gʼengaano bahena bemunga embehe.
12.2: Abafalisaayo ni bababona, nga baloma Yesu baati, “Bona, abeegi babo bahola ehi magambi gatatufugiirira huhola hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato!”
12.3: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Simusomangaho hu ehi Dawudi gahola olu niye nʼabahye aba gaali ni nabo ni baali ni baŋuma hyʼohulya?
12.4: Dawudi gengira mu weema ya Hatonda ngʼalya emigaati eji baali ni baŋongire eyiri Hatonda. Amagambi gaali gafugiirira basengi ba Hatonda boŋene ohulya emigaati ejo. Cooka Dawudi gajirya era gaŋaho nʼaba gaali ni nabo.
12.5: Oba simusomangaho mu magambi aga baŋa Musa muuti abasengi ba Hatonda ni bahola emirimo jaawe mu Yekaalu hulwa Sabbaato baba babbwaga egambi, cooka ate sibabaho musango?
12.6: Ne mbalomera ti, oyo ahira Yekaalu eŋono ali ŋano.
12.7: Era mubanga ni mumanyire amahulu gʼebibono ebiroma biiti; ‘Nenda ehisa sosi eŋongo,’ simwahali ni munenya abo abeŋumira musango.
12.8: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Omwana wʼOmuutu nje Musengwa aŋuga oludaalo lwa Sabbaato.” Yesu aŋonia omuutu hulwa Sabbaato (Mar 3:1-6; Luk 6:6-11)
12.9: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aŋwa aŋo, atiina mu humbaaniro lyʼAbayudaaya eryomu hitehere ehyo.
12.10: Hu olwo, mwalimo omusinde owaali nʼomuhono omuŋotohi. Mu weene omwo, mwalimo Abafalisaayo abaali ni bendula ehyʼohumweŋambya ehi baneemeho ohumuŋaŋabira. Kale nga bamubuusa baati, “Amagambi gʼefe gafugiirira ohuŋonia abaatu hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato?”
12.11: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Njʼani hu enywe, singa etaama yiye yiba yiguuye mwiroŋo hu ludaalo olwa Sabbaato, atafayo huyiŋalulamo?
12.12: Omuutu saahirira ŋale etaama omuŋendo? Olwʼehyo hiraŋi ohuhola obulaŋi hu Sabbaato.”
12.13: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma omusinde oyo owaali nʼomuhono omuŋotohi ati, “Waama, januula omuhono gugwo.” Ngʼola agujanuula, nga guŋonera erala guba hyagula ogundi.
12.14: Aye Abafalisaayo nga baŋwa mu humbaaniro batiina huseega magesi gʼohwitamo Yesu. Omuŋeeresa oyu Hatonda gatobola
12.15: Yesu ni gategeera oluhwe olwʼohumwita, gaŋwa mu hifo ehyo. Abaatu bangi nga bamulondaho era ngʼaŋonia abalwaye baawe bosibosi.
12.17: Ebyo byaliŋo ohwoheresa ehi naabbi Yisaaya galoma ati,
12.18: “Ono njʼomuŋeeresa wange oyu natobola, omuhoda era owunesiimisa. Nja humutaaho Mwoyo wange, alomere abaatu abamawanga gosigosi amazima.
12.19: Saliduhana oba ohuhayaana nʼomuutu yesiyesi, ejanjaasi lirye siririŋulirihana mu nguudo nʼahayaana.
12.20: Saalyabulira abali nʼohufugiirira ohutono; era aliyeeda hiisi muutu wayire abo abamwesiga ehitono ohwola olu alisala emisango nʼatehubbira.
12.21: Era aliba suubi lyʼabaatu mu mawanga gosigosi.” Yesu ni Bbeluzebbuli (Mar 3:20-30; Luk 11:14-23)
12.22: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaaŋo abaŋirira Yesu omusinde owaaliho omusambwa. Omusinde oyo gaali muŋofu era nʼataloma, ngʼamuŋonia atandiha ohuloma nʼohubona.
12.23: Abaatu bosibosi beŋunja nga bebuusa baati, “Ono aŋanga ohuba njʼOmwijuhulu wa Habaha Dawudi, oyu Hatonda gasuubisa?”
12.24: Aye Abafalisaayo ni baŋulira, baloma baati, “Abbinga emisambwa hu baatu, nʼatambisa obuŋangi wa Bbeluzebbuli omuhulu wʼemisambwa.”
12.25: Ngʼaŋo Yesu ategeera ebiŋeego byawe, abaloma ati, “Abaatu abʼowahabaha obulala banesalamo bahubbagana abeene nʼabeene, owahabaha owo busihiiriha. Era nʼolu hiba hibuga oba mago goosi ganeyabulamo, gabbwagiha.
12.26: Ni Sitaani yeesi singa gesoosa omwene, owahabaha buwe buba bunemeerereŋo buutye?
12.27: Ŋaahani obanga mbinga emisambwa ni tambisa obuŋangi wa Bbeluzebbuli, abaloobera benywe bajibbinga hu lwʼobuŋangi bwʼani? Ehyo cʼehigira abaloobera benywe abeene balibasalira omusango.
12.28: Aye nimba ni mbinga emisambwa hu lwʼOmwoyo wa Hatonda, ŋaahani obuŋugi buwe buujire eyi muli.
12.29: “Kale ŋabula aŋanga ohwingira mu nyumba yʼomuutu owʼamaani ganyaga ebibye nʼatasookire humusidiha ko gabinyaga.
12.30: “Oyo atali hu lubega lwange aba mulabe wange era atahumbaania ni nange, asalaania.
12.31: Era mbalomera ti, balisoniŋa abaatu ebibi byosibyosi, nga pomuli nʼohuloma ebibono ebifodogola. Aye hiisi afodogola Omwoyo Omutukuvu, sibalimusoniŋa.
12.32: Hiisi aloma ebibi hu Mwana wʼOmuutu, balimusoniŋa aye oyo aloma ebibi hu Omwoyo Omutukuvu sibalimusoniŋa emirembe nʼemirembe.” Omusaala nʼebibala byagwo (Luk 6:43-45)
12.33: Ngʼaŋo Yesu geyongera abaloma ati, “Singa omusaala guba mulaŋi, nʼebibala byagwo biba biraŋi aye gunaba mubi nʼebibala byagwo byosi biba bibi. Olwʼehyo omusaala bagumanyira hu bibala byagwo.
12.34: Enywe abaatu abaahabi hyʼetemu, muŋanga ohuloma ebiraŋi ni muli babi? Ebi omuutu aloma, abitusa hu mungo eyʼebyo ebiba mu mwoyo gugwe.
12.35: Omuutu anaba nʼomwoyo omulaŋi, ahola ebiraŋi ebiri mu mwoyo gugwe, ne anaba nʼomwoyo omubi, ahola ebibi nʼabitusa hu mungo yʼebibi ebiri mu mwoyo gugwe.
12.36: Aye mbalomera ti, hu ludaalo lwʼohusala emisango, hiisi muutu alyeromereraho hu hiisi hibono ehitasaana ehi gaaloma.
12.37: Ebibono bibyo ebyene njʼebirihusalira omusango ohuhuhira oba bbe.” Abafalisaayo basunga Yesu ahabonero (Mar 8:11-12; Luk 11:29-32)
12.38: Ngʼaŋo balala hu Bafalisaayo nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda baloma Yesu baati, “Musomesa, hwenda otulage ahabonero aheŋunjisa.”
12.39: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Abaatu bʼomulembe guno babi era sibesigwa eyiri Hatonda! Basunga ahabonero aheŋunjisa aye ŋaŋuma habonero ahabaja ohubaŋa ohutusaho ahabonero ha naabbi Yona mu guyeeni.
12.40: Ngʼolu Yona gaali mu hida hyʼoguyeeni endaalo edatu omuusi nʼowiire; mu ngeri njʼenyene nʼOmwana wʼOmuutu yeesi aliba e magombe endaalo edatu, owiire nʼomuusi.
12.41: Abaatu bʼe Nineeve hu ludaalo lwʼohusala emisango balyemeerera balumirisa abʼomulembe guno omusango gubahire olwohuba nibo Yona ni gabalomera ehibono hya Hatonda, bebbwaga. Aye ahira Yona eŋono ali ŋano ne simwenda hwebbwaga.
12.42: “Habaha omuhasi ohuŋwa mu gwanga lyʼe Syebba ehirirene mu mehiriro ga Yisirayiri alyemeerera gasalira abaatu bʼomulembe guno omusango ohubahira olwohuba gagenda olugendo olwene oluleeŋi gatiina mu Yisirayiri ohuŋuliirisa ebibono bya Habaha Sulemaani ebyʼamagesi. Aye ahira Sulemaani eŋono ali ŋano ne simufugiirira ebi aloma. Ohugobola hwʼomusambwa (Luk 11:24-26)
12.43: “Omusambwa ni guŋwa hu muutu, gulerenga mu lulafu ni gwendula aŋa guneŋogome nga guhaya.
12.44: Ni guhaya guloma guuti, ‘Nja hwagama eyi nabanga.’ Ni gwagama, gwagaana obulamu wʼomuutu oyo ni babulongoosa bulaŋi weene hyʼenyumba eyi basaguuye.
12.45: Ngʼaŋo gutiina guhobaho ejahye ejindi musanvu ejiguhiraho obubi, nga jija jimwingiramo. Era obulamu wʼomuutu oyo buliba bubi ohuhiraho ngʼolu waali oludaayi. Bino njʼebinahoole hu baatu bʼomulembe guno abahosi bʼebibi.” Abalebe ba Yesu ni nyina (Mar 3:31-35; Luk 8:19-21)
12.46: Yesu ni gaali nʼahiiroma nʼeduuli lyʼabaatu, abalebe babe ni nyina batiina aŋa gaali. Ni boola nga beema ebulafu ni benda ohuloma ni naye.
12.47: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaaŋo owamuloma ati, “Maawo nʼabalebe babo bali ebulafu, benda ohulomaho ni neewe.”
12.48: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Baatu ba ngeri hi abasaniiye ohuba maama nʼabalebe bange?”
12.49: Ngʼasosya hu beegi babe ahena aloma ati, “Maama nʼabalebe bange mba bano.
12.50: Hiisi ahola ebi Bbaabba ali mwigulu genda, njʼaba muganda yange, mboojo yange era njʼaba maama.”

13.1: Oluvanyuma, hu ludaalo olwene olwo, Yesu gaŋwa mu nyumba, ngʼatiina gehala hwigenya lyʼenyanja.
13.2: Ngʼaŋo oguŋindi gwʼabaatu guhumbaanira aŋa gaali era ehyaŋwamo ngʼaniina mu lyato gehala omwo, ne abaatu bosibosi bemeerera hwigenya.
13.3: Ngʼabalomera ebiitu bingi mu ngero ati, “Ŋaaliŋo omulimi owatiina ohumwa owumo.
13.4: Ni gaali nʼamwa, ngʼowumo obundi bugwa hu tulo wʼengira babutyakirira era ngʼenyuni jitiina jibulya.
13.5: Obundi nga bugwa hwiroba eryohu lwanda ohwali otuloba otugeregere. Era olwohuba waali hu mugulu, siwalwa humera.
13.6: Aye endobooli ni yatula, nga buŋotoha era nga bwoma olwohuba emisi jaali ndi jiiha ŋaasi ehihena.
13.7: Ngʼobundi bugwa mwiroba eryameramo amaŋwa, ni wamera nga buhulira ŋalala nʼamaŋwa ago era nga gabumiina gabuloberesa ohuhula.
13.8: Aye obundi nga bugwa hwiroba eraŋi. Ngʼowumo owo bwama, amagala gaabwo nga gajuhamo emoni. Amagala agandi nga gabaaho embehe cikumi; agandi embehe nkaaga; nʼagandi embehe amahumi adatu.
13.9: Ali nʼohutwi, aŋulire.” Ehigendererwa hyʼohusomesa mu ngero (Mar 4:10-12; Luk 8:9-10)
13.10: Ngʼaŋo abeegi babe besenda aŋa gaali, bamubuusa baati, “Lwahiina oloma nʼabaatu mu ngero?”
13.11: Ngʼabagobolamo ati, “Enywe muli nʼekabi ohumanya ebyama ebiŋamba hu buŋugi bwomwigulu aye abaatu abandi bayiŋuma.
13.12: Oyo ali nʼebingi balimumeedaho ebindi aye oyo aŋuma balimutusaaho nʼahadiidiri aho aha ali ni naho.
13.13: Ehyo cʼehigira ndoma ni nabo mu ngero, olwohuba wayire bahaŋaasa aye batafaania ehi bahaŋaasa. Baŋulire aye batategeera ehi baŋulira.
13.14: “Era hyolerere ehi Hatonda gabalomaho nʼabita mu naabbi Yisaaya ati, “ ‘Ohuŋulira muja huŋuliranga aye ni mutategeera; muja hubonanga aye ni mutetegeeresa.
13.15: Hiri hiityo olwohuba abaatu bano bali nʼemyoyo migumu, bamasiipe abali nʼamatwi aye sibaŋulira, bali nʼemoni aye sibabona, ate nga bahaweene nʼemoni jaawe, baŋulira nʼamatwi gaawe, bategeera nʼemyoyo jaawe, bacuuha nga mbaŋonia.’
13.16: “Aye enywe mwesiimire olwohuba emoni jenywe jibona era nʼamatwi genywe gaŋulira.
13.17: Mbalomera ehituufu ti abanaabbi ko nʼabaatu abagwalaafu bangi beegomba ohubona bino ebi mubona nʼohuŋulira ebi muŋulira aye sibasobola.” Amahulu gʼolugero lwʼomuŋaanyi wʼowumo (Mar 4:13-20; Luk 8:11-15)
13.18: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abaloma ati, “Ŋaahani muŋulire amahulu gʼolugero lwʼomuŋaanyi wʼowumo.
13.19: Omuutu yesiyesi aŋulira obuhwenda obuŋamba hu buŋugi wa Hatonda aye saabutegeere, Sitaani gaaja gabumutusamo. Oyo ali hyʼowumo owagwa hu tulo wʼengira.
13.20: Owumo owagwa mwiroba eryohu lwanda buli hyʼabaatu abaŋulira ehibono hya Hatonda, bahisangaalira nʼamanyonyo.
13.21: Aye olwohuba bali hyʼebirime ebiŋuma emisi ejihire mwiroba ehihena, ohufugiirira hwawe hwa haseera buseera. Ebigosi ni bibaajira oba abaatu babacaawa olwʼehibono hya Hatonda, banafuŋa.
13.22: Owumo owagwa mwiroba eryameramo amaŋwa buli hyʼabaatu abaŋulira ehibono hya Hatonda aye oluvanyuma ebiitu ebindi omuli ohuŋemba obugali hu byʼehyalo, ohusendasendebwa nʼomulungo gwʼobusuni, nʼohululuhanira ohusuna ebiitu, biŋuga emyoyo jaawe, byaloberesa ehibono ehi baŋuliiye ohuŋwamo ehiraŋi.
13.23: Owo owagwa mwiroba eraŋi, njʼabaatu abaŋulira ehibono hya Hatonda bahitegeera era baaba nʼehyasa. Abaatu abandi emirundi cikumi; abandi emirundi nkaaga, nʼabandi emirundi amahumi adatu.” Olugero oluŋamba hu bibereŋi
13.24: Nga Yesu abagerera olugero olundi ati, “Obuŋugi bwomwigulu huŋanga ohubugeragerania hu muutu owaŋaanya owumo obulaŋi mu ndimiro yiye eyʼengaano.
13.25: Aye abaatu ni baali ni baŋenyuha, ngʼomulabe atiina, amwa ebibereŋi ngʼahena geŋweraŋo.
13.26: Engaano ni yahula, nga yitulula, nʼebibereŋi byosi bitulula biboneherera.
13.27: Abeedu bʼomwene ndimiro nga batiina aŋa gaali bamuloma baati, ‘Muhulu, siwamwa owumo obulaŋi mu ndimiro yiyo? Ne ebibereŋi bira byaŋwa ŋeena?’
13.28: Ngʼaŋo abagobolamo ati, ‘Omulabe njʼowahola atyo.’ Ngʼabeedu bamuloma baati, ‘Wenda hutiine hubihuulemo?’
13.29: Ngʼabaloma ati, ‘Bbe, olwohuba ni munaabe ni mubihulamo, muŋanga ohuhuuliramo nʼengaano.
13.30: Mulehe byombi bihulire ŋalala ohwola hwigesa. Mu hiseera ehyo, ndiroma abaligesa beheerere huhumbaania ebibereŋi ebyo, babisidihe mu miganda babyohye aye bahumbaanie engaano baje bayibunge mu hyagi hyange.’ ” Olugero oluŋamba hu ahamo ha kalidaali (Mar 4:30-32; Luk 13:18-19)
13.31: Nga Yesu abagerera olugero olundi ati, “Obuŋugi bwomwigulu huŋanga ohubugeragerania hu ahamo ahʼehirime ehi balanga baati kalidaali aha omuutu gaŋira gahoma mu muga gugwe.
13.32: Wayire njʼahamo ahahiirira erala obutono mu wumo wosiwosi aye ni hamera hahula haŋwamo ehisaala ehyene ehibba, ngʼenyuni jitongolamo ebiswi mu masaga.” Olugero oluŋamba hu hasimbulusa (Luk 3:20-21; Mar 4:33-34)
13.33: Nga Yesu abagerera olugero olundi ati, “Obuŋugi womwigulu hubugeragerania hu hasimbulusa aha omuhasi gaŋamba gahatabula mu busyanu owʼengaano oweene obungi abuhande anyiyemo emigaati nga hengira mu tome lyosiryosi eri gahanda mu busyanu owo.”
13.34: Yesu galomera ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ebyo byosibyosi mu ngero. Era ŋabula ehiitu hyosihyosi ehi gabalomera ehitaali mu lugero.
13.35: Ehyo hyoheresa ehi naabbi galoma ati, “Nja huloma ni nabo mu ngero nja huloma ebyama ebi bahweha ohuŋwa hu hutonda hwʼehyalo.” Yesu anyonyola olugero oluŋamba hu bibereŋi
13.36: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aleha ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu, gengira mu nyumba. Ngʼabeegi babe bamulondaho bamuloma baati, “Tulomere amahulu gʼolugero oluŋamba hu bibereŋi.”
13.37: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Owaŋaanya owumo obulaŋi, njʼOmwana wʼOmuutu.
13.38: Endimiro njʼehyalo era owumo obulaŋi njʼabaatu abomu buŋugi wa Hatonda. Ebibereŋi njʼabaatu ba Sitaani.
13.39: Era omulabe owamwa nje Sitaani. Egesa njʼekomerero yʼehyalo era abamalayika njʼabaligesa.
13.40: Ngʼolu bahumbaania ebibereŋi babyohya omuliro, pohiriba hiityo hu komerero yʼehyalo hino.
13.41: Omwana wʼOmuutu alituma abamalayika babe, nga batusaamo ebireeta ehibi ni naabo bosibosi abahola ebibi
13.42: nga babadanya mu muliro eyiriba ohweninala nʼohulira amangi olwʼobulumi.
13.43: Hu olwo abagwalaafu balimeregenya hyʼeryuba mu buŋugi wa Bbaabba. Era oyo ali nʼohutwi, aŋulire. Olugero oluŋamba hu buŋinda obu bahweha
13.44: “Obuŋugi bwomwigulu huŋanga ohubugeragerania hu buŋinda obu bahweha mu hisugu aŋaatu. Omuutu ni gagundula, gabuhweha aŋaatu aŋandi, gatiina nʼesangaalo ngʼatunda ebibye byosibyosi ebi gaali ni nabyo, ngʼagula ehisugu ehyo.” Olugero oluŋamba hu mabaale agʼebbeeyi
13.45: Nga nindi Yesu abagerera olugero ati, “Obuŋugi bwomwigulu huŋanga ohubugeragerania hu musubuuzi, owendula amabaale agʼebbeeyi.
13.46: Ni gagwirihirira erihira ohuba eryʼebbeeyi obugali, gatiina gatunda ebibye byosibyosi ebi gaali ni nabyo, ngʼaja aligula.” Olugero oluŋamba hu hatimba hʼenyeeni
13.47: Nga nindi Yesu abagerera olugero ati, “Obuŋugi bwomwigulu buli hyʼahatimba ahabatega mu nyanja nga haŋambya enyeeni eja hiisi ngeri.
13.48: Ni hejula enyeeni, ngʼabenuli bahahwesa ohwola hwigenya. Nga beehala, bangalamo endaŋi bajita mu bisero aye nga badanya embi.
13.49: Pohiriba hiityo hu komerero. Abamalayika baliija baabulamo abalaŋi, ngʼababi
13.50: babadanya mu muliro ogutasima eyiriba ohweninala nʼohulira amangi olwʼobulumi.”
13.51: Nga Yesu ababuusa ati, “Ebyo byosibyosi mubitegeeye?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Hutegeeye.”
13.52: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Olwʼehyo, hiisi musomesa wʼamagambi ga Hatonda afuuha omwegi mu buŋugi wa Hatonda, ali hyʼomuutu omwene nyumba atusa ebiitu ebinyaaha nʼebihayire omu babibiiha.” Naabbi oyu bataŋa eŋono (Mar 6:1-6; Luk 4:16-30)
13.53: Yesu ni gaahena ohugera engero ejo, ngʼaŋwa mu hifo ehyo,
13.54: ngʼatiina mu hibuga hyʼewaawe. Ni goola, ngʼasomesa abaatu mu humbaaniro lyawe. Era abo abaŋulira nga beŋunja ni bebuusa baati, “Omusinde ono gatusa ŋeena amagesi nʼobuŋangi obuhola ebyamaliholiho?
13.55: Ono sinje omusaani wʼomubaaji? Era nyina sinje Malyamu? Nʼabalebe babe sinje Yakobbo ni Yosefu ni Simooni ko ni Yuda?
13.56: Nʼababoojo bosibosi sibamenya ŋano ni neefe? Amagesi nʼobuŋangi buno wosiwosi gabitusa ŋe?”
13.57: Ehyaŋwamo nga bagaana ohufugiirira ebibye. Aye Yesu niye ngʼabaloma ati, “Naabbi bamuŋa eŋono aŋaatu ŋosiŋosi, ohutusaho mu hitundu hyʼewaawe nomu mago ewaawe.”
13.58: Era eyo sigaholayo byamaliholiho bingi olwʼabaatu baayo ohutaba nʼohufugiirira.

14.1: Mu biro ebyo, Herode owaali nʼaŋuga etwale lyʼe Galilaaya gaŋulira efuma lya Yesu.
14.2: Ngʼaloma abaŋeeresa babe ati, “Omuutu oyo anaabe nje Yowaane Omubatiza alamuhire, cʼehifa ali nʼobuŋangi ohuhola ebyamaliholiho.”
14.3: Herode gaŋeega atyo olwohuba gaali aŋambire Yowaane nʼamudanyire mu komera olwʼohwenda ohusangaasa Herodiya oyu gaali nʼapaahise hu mulebewe Filipo.
14.4: Hino gaali ahiholire olwohuba Yowaane galomanga Herode ati, “Sihiraŋi ewe ohupaasa muha mulebewo.”
14.5: Herode gendire ohwita Yowaane aye gatya abaatu, olwohuba baali bamanyire baati Yowaane naabbi.
14.6: Hu ludaalo olwʼohuhebuliriraho ohusaaliwa hwa Herode, omuhaana wa Herodiya gabahinira era ehyo hyasangaasa Herode.
14.7: Ehyaŋwamo, gamulayirira era ngʼamusuubisa ohumuŋa hyosihyosi ehi anamusunge.
14.8: Nʼaholera hu amagesi ga nyina, ngʼomuhaana aloma Herode ati, “Nenda omutwe gwa Yowaane Omubatiza ni guli hu suniya.”
14.9: Ehyo hyanakuŋasa habaha bugali aye olwohuba gaali ahenire ohulayira nʼabageni babe ni baŋulira, ngʼahanda alagira bagumuŋe.
14.10: Era nga batiina mu komera batema hu Yowaane omutwe.
14.11: Nga baguleeta hu suniya baguŋa omuhaana, nga yeesi aguŋirira nyina.
14.12: Ngʼabeegi ba Yowaane batiina baja batusayo omulambo gugwe, bagusiiha. Ni bahena nga batiina balomeraho Yesu. Yesu aliisa abaatu ekumi etaanu (Mar 6:30-44; Luk 9:10-17; Yow 6:1-14)
14.13: Yesu ni gaŋulira ebyali ni byolire hu Yowaane, gaŋamba engira nʼabeegi babe baŋwa mu hifo ehyo nga baniina eryato batiina mu hifo ehiŋumamo baatu. Ne ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ni bahitegeera, baŋwa mu bibuga ebiririhene bamulondaho nʼamagulu.
14.14: Yesu ni gaŋwa mu lyato gabona ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ni hihumbeene, nga himuŋambya ehisa ngʼaŋonia abalwaye aba baali ni nabo.
14.15: Egulo ni lyola, ngʼabeegi batiina aŋa Yesu gaali bamuloma baati, “Ehifo hino hiduleere, ate owiire mbobuno butiinire. Seebula abaatu batiine mu bitahere ebyohu mulirano begulire ebiryo balye.”
14.16: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Sihibeetagisa hutiina, enywe mubaŋe ebiryo balye.”
14.17: Nga nibo bamuloma baati, “Huliŋo nʼemigaati etaanu nʼenyeeni ebiri joŋene.”
14.19: Nga Yesu alagira abaatu ohwihala ŋaasi hu nyaasi. Ngʼabugula emigaati jira etaanu nʼenyeeni jawaho ebiri, ngʼagangamusa emoni aheja mwigulu, geyaasa Hatonda. Ngʼaŋo abbwagabbwaga mu migaati ejo, ajiŋa abeegi babe bagabire abaatu.
14.20: Ngʼabaatu abo bosibosi balya beeguta. Ngʼaŋo abeegi babe bahumbaania obukukumuhira owasigalaho nga bijusa ebisero ehumi nabibiri.
14.21: Abaatu abaalya baali ngʼekumi etaanu ohwo nʼotataayeho abahasi nʼabaana. Yesu agendera hu maaji (Mar 6:45-52; Yow 6:15-21)
14.22: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo Yesu aloma abeegi babe baniine eryato batangirengamo bambuhe enyanja, niye nʼahiseebula abaatu.
14.23: Ni gahena ohubaseebula, ngʼatiina hu lusozi yeŋene ohusaba. Aŋa hiirema hyaŋambira, Yesu gaali ahiiri eyo yeŋene.
14.24: Cooka abeegi babe nibo ni bali mu lyato ni boolire ŋaleeŋi era amayengo ni gali huhubba, olwʼepunga eyaali ni baŋwa emutwe.
14.25: Ni waali ni bunatere ohuhya, Yesu gatiina eyi baali nʼagenda hu maaji.
14.26: Ni bamubona nʼagenda hu maaji, ngʼolusisimo lubaŋamba, baloma baati, “Himalyo!” ni binianguha olwʼohutya.
14.27: Aye aŋo ni naaŋo nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Ndiise, mugume mutatya!”
14.28: Ngʼaŋo Peetero amugobolamo ati, “Musengwa, nʼoba nʼoli ndiiwe ndome ngendere hu maaji niije eyi oli.”
14.29: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Nja.” Nga Peetero aŋwa mu lyato, agenda hu maaji nʼatiina eyiri Yesu.
14.30: Aye ni gabona amayengo ni genyoha, ngʼobuti bumuŋamba. Amaaji ni gamwiniha, gahayaana ati, “Musengwa, ponie!”
14.31: Ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo Yesu agolola omuhono, amuŋamba amuloma ati, “Lwahiina obuusabuusa, oli nʼohufugiirira hutotono?”
14.32: Era bombi ni bengira mu lyato, ngʼepunga eteeha.
14.33: Ngʼaŋo abaali mu lyato bajumirya Yesu ni baloma baati, “Mu butuufu oweene, oli Mwana wa Hatonda!” Yesu aŋonia abalwaye e Genesareeti (Mar 6:53-56)
14.34: Ni bambuha enyanja, nga boola mu hitehere ehi balanga baati Genesareeti.
14.35: Era abaatu baayo ni bahitegeera baati Yesu gaali goolire, basasaania amaŋuliro mu hitundu ehyo hyosihyosi ko nʼemirirano. Ngʼaŋo abaatu bamuŋirira abalwaye baawe bosibosi
14.36: nga bamwegalihira aganye abalwaye abo baŋambeho buŋambe hu gemo lyʼehyambalo hihye. Era hiisi owamuŋambaho, gaŋonanga huŋona.

15.1: Oluvanyuma balala hu Bafalisaayo nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda baŋwa e Yerusaalemu, baatiina eyiri Yesu bamubuusa baati,
15.2: “Lwahiina abeegi babo sibahola ngʼolu obulombolombo wʼabasehulu beefe butuloma? Balya ni bahiiri husaaba mu ngalo.”
15.3: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Ne lwahiina enywe mubbwaga egambi lya Hatonda olwʼobulombolombo wenywe?
15.4: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Hatonda gaaloma ati, ‘Ŋanga lataawo ni maawo eŋono,’ era ati, ‘Anaduhenga Semwana oba nyina, bali nʼohumwita.’
15.5: Aye enywe muloma muuti omuutu analoma semwana oba nyina ati, ‘Obuyeedi obunahahuŋaye, nabuŋongayo eyiri Hatonda,’
15.6: olwo aba nʼehiyale ehyʼohutaŋa Semwana obuyeedi. Mu ngeri eyo nga mudibya ehibono hya Hatonda olwʼobulombolombo wenywe.
15.7: Banafuusi enywe, ehibono hya Hatonda ehi naabbi Yisaaya gabalomaho hituufu olu gaaloma ati,
15.8: “ ‘Abaatu bano baapa eŋono lya hu munwa, aye emyoyo jaawe jipumaho.
15.9: Era banjumirya byahwehenahenaho olwohuba ebibono obubono ebyʼabaatu, mbebi baŋira ohuba amagambi gange.’ ” Ebyonoona omuutu biŋwa mu mwoyo gugwe (Mar 7:14-23)
15.10: Ngʼaŋo Yesu alanga ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu hitiina aŋa gaali, ngʼaloma ati, “Mutege ohutwi era mutegeere ehi nja ohuloma.
15.11: Ebi muutu alya sinje ebimonoona aye ebiŋwa mu munwa gugwe.”
15.12: Ngʼaŋo abeegi babe batiina aŋa gaali, bamubuusa baati, “Ohimanyire oti Abafalisaayo baluŋire ni baŋuliiye ebibono ebyo?”
15.13: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Hiisi musaala ogu Bbaabba ali mwigulu atahoma, banahaguhuuleŋo.
15.14: Olwʼehyo, Abafalisaayo abo batabahenera biseera olwohuba batangirisi abaŋofu. Era singa omuŋofu atangirira omuŋofu wahye, bombi bagwa mwiroŋo.”
15.15: Ngʼaŋo Peetero amuloma ati, “Tulomere amahulu gʼolugero olwo.”
15.16: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Koni mwesi simufaania mahulu gʼolugero olwo bbe?
15.17: Simumanyire muuti ebi muutu alya bitiina mu hida omu biŋwa byatula?
15.18: Aye ebi aloma biŋwa mu mwoyo gugwe era ebyo njʼebimwonoona.
15.19: Hiri hiityo olwohuba mu mwoyo gwʼomuutu pomuŋwa ebiŋeego ebibi, obutemu, obuhwedi, ohuba wʼemoni enyangu, ohuba nʼomuhono omuleeŋi, obudulingi nʼobuŋesi.
15.20: Ebyo njʼebyonoona omuutu; sosi ohulya nʼatasaabire mu ngalo.” Omuhasi Omukanani (Mar 7:24-30)
15.21: Yesu ni gaaŋwa mu hifo ehyo, ngʼatiina mu twale lyʼe Tiiro ni Sidoni.
15.22: Omuhasi Omukanani ohuŋwa mu hitundu ehyo, ngʼatiina aŋa gaali, genaana ati, “Musengwa, Omwijuhulu wa Dawudi, pambire ehisa! Omusambwa gugudya omuhaana wange bugali!”
15.23: Aye Yesu sigamugobolamo hiitu hyosihyosi. Olwʼehyo, abeegi babe batiina aŋa gaali bamwegalihira baati, “Mubbinge, olwohuba ali hutuhubbira oluhero!”
15.24: Nga Yesu agobolamo ati, “Baatuma eyiri Abayisirayiri ababbaama boŋene.”
15.25: Ngʼaŋo omuhasi oyo atiina ahubba amafuha mu moni jije amuloma ati, “Musengwa, njeede!”
15.26: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Sihiraŋi ohuŋamba ebiryo byʼabaana wabidanyira embwa jaawe.”
15.27: Ngʼomuhasi oyo amuloma ati, “Musengwa, pohiri aye nʼembwa joosi jirya obukukumuhira obugwa ŋaasi wʼemeeza ya musengwa waajo.”
15.28: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Muhasi ewe, oli nʼohufugiirira ohwʼamaani! Ale hahibe ngʼolu osungire.” Era omuhaana wuwe gaŋona mu saawa enyene eyo. Yesu aŋonia abaatu bangi
15.29: Yesu ni gaŋwa mu hifo ehyo, gatiina nʼagendera hwigenya lyʼenyanja yʼe Galilaaya, ngʼaniina hu lusozi gehala.
15.30: Abaatu bangi batiina aŋa gaali ni bamuŋirira abaleme nʼabahyafutafuta nʼabaŋofu nʼabagongobala nʼabataloma ko nʼabalwaye abandi. Nga babata aŋo ohuupi ni naye era ngʼabaŋonia.
15.31: Abaatu beŋunja ni baabona abaali ni bataloma ni baloma, abaleme ni bagenda, abaŋofu ni babona. Era nga bajumirya Hatonda wʼAbayisirayiri. Yesu aliisa abaatu ekumi ene (Mar 8:1-10)
15.32: Ngʼaŋo Yesu alanga abeegi babe batiine aŋa gaali abaloma ati, “Abaatu bano bapambya ehisa olwohuba babaaye ni neese endaalo edatu kwiye aye ŋaahani baŋuma hyʼohulya. Sinenda hubaseebula ni bali njala, bahanda bagwa hu ngira.”
15.33: Aye abeegi babe bamugobolamo baati, “Mu hifo ehiduleere hino omuutu aŋanga hutusa ŋeena ebiryo ebiŋanga ohuliisa abaatu bano bosibosi?”
15.34: Nga Yesu ababuusa ati, “Muliŋo nʼemigaati jinga?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Musanvu nʼobuyeeni butotono.”
15.35: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma abaatu behale ŋaasi.
15.36: Ngʼabugula emigaati ejo omusanvu nʼenyeeni jawaho, nga geyaasa Hatonda, ajibbwagabbwagamo ngʼahena ajiŋa abeegi babe bajigabire abaatu. Nga boosi bahola ngʼolu gabaloma.
15.37: Nga bosibosi balya beguta. Ni bahena ohulya, ngʼabeegi babe bahumbaania obukukumuhira owasigalaŋo, nga bwijula ebisero musanvu.
15.38: Abaatu abalya, baali ekumi ene, ohwo nʼatatayeho abahasi nʼabaana.
15.39: Oluvanyuma lwa Yesu ohuseebula abaatu, gahena ganiina eryato ngʼatiina mu twale lyʼe Magadani.

16.1: Lulala, balala hu Bafalisaayo nʼAbasadukaayo baatiina eyiri Yesu nga bamuloma abaŋe ahabonero aheŋunjisa ahalaga haati obuŋangi obu gaali ni nawo gabutusa yiri Hatonda. Ehyo bamuloma humuhema.
16.2: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Eryuba aŋa ligwira mu maaji, munabona egulu ni lifaana hyʼamafugi, muloma muuti; ‘Olwejo embeera yʼowiire yinahabe ndaŋi.’
16.3: Mu mugamba aŋa lyuba liŋwerayo munabona egulu ni lifaana hyʼamafugi nʼebireri ni bisidihire muloma muuti; ‘Olwa leero lunaabe lwʼehidumi.’ Mumanyire amahulu gemboneha yʼowiire aye simumanyire huvunula ebiriŋo mu hiseera hino.
16.4: Abaatu bʼomulembe guno babi era sibesigwa eyiri Hatonda! Benda ahabonero ahalaga haati Hatonda njʼowaatuma aye ŋaŋuma ahabonero ahabaja ohubaŋa ohutusaho ahabonero hyaha Yona olu gaali mu guyeeni.” Nʼebibono ebyo, nga Yesu abalehaŋo getiinira. Esomesa yʼAbafalisaayo nʼAbasadukaayo eyʼobudulingi (Mar 8:14-21)
16.5: Abeegi ba Yesu ni boola engereha wʼenyanja, bahebulira baati bebiriiye ohugega emigaati.
16.6: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Mwegenderese era mwehuume ehisimbulusa hyʼAbafalisaayo nʼAbasadukaayo.”
16.7: Nga nibo begeyamo abeene nʼabeene baati, “Aloma atyo olwohuba ndihugega migaati.”
16.8: Yesu gamanya ehi baali ni begeyamo ngʼababuusa ati, “Enywe abali nʼohufugiirira ohutotono, lwahiina muŋeega hu hyʼohuŋuma emigaati?
16.9: Nʼohwola haati muhiiri hutegeera? Si muhebulira olu nabbwaga mu migaati etaanu nagabira abaatu ekumi etaanu? Mwahumbaania ebisero binga ebyʼobukukumuhira?
16.10: Ate mwahumbaania ebisero byʼobukukumuhira binga olu nabbwaga mu migaati omusanvu nagabira abaatu ekumi ene?
16.11: Lwahiina simutegeera muuti simbaaye ni ndoma hu migaati? Aye mbalomire mwehuume ehisimbulusa hyʼAbafalisaayo nʼAbasadukaayo.”
16.12: Ngʼabeegi abo ko bategeera baati sigaali nʼabaloma hwehuuma hutalya migaati ejirimo ehisimbulusa aye esomesa yʼAbafalisaayo nʼAbasadukaayo eyʼobudulingi. Peetero abbutula ati Yesu nje Kurisito (Mar 8:27-30; Luk 9:18-21)
16.13: Yesu nʼabeegi babe ni boola mu hibuga Kayisaaliya ehya Filipi, ngʼababuusa ati, “Abaatu ni baba ni baloma hu Omwana wʼOmuutu, baloma baati njʼani?”
16.14: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Ŋaliŋo abaloma mbo ndiiwe Yowaane Omubatiza, abandi baati ndiiwe naabbi Eliya, abandi baati ndiiwe Yeremiya era nʼabandi baati oli mulala hu banaabbi.”
16.15: Ngʼaŋo ababuusa ati, “Ne enywe, muloma muuti ndiise ani?”
16.16: Nga Simooni oyu balanga baati Peetero amugobolamo ati, “Ndiiwe Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu era Omwana wa Hatonda Omwene Bulamu.”
16.17: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Simooni omwana wa Yona, oli nʼekabi olwohuba omuutu sinje ahuhwehuliiye ehyo aye Bbaabba ali mwigulu.
16.18: Olwʼehyo kuloma ti ndiiwe Peetero, hu lwanda huno nditongolaho ehibbubbu hyange ehyʼabafugiirira era amaani gʼe magombe sigalibaŋangula.
16.19: Ndihuŋa ebisumuluzo ebyʼobuŋugi bwomwigulu era hiisi ehi osidiha hu hyalo, nomwigulu mwosi balihisidiha era hiisi ehi ositula hu hyalo nomwigulu mwosi balihisitula.”
16.20: Ngʼahuutira abeegi babe batalomeraho muutu yesiyesi baati nje Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu. Yesu aloma hu hufa nʼohulamuha huhwe (Luk 9:22-27)
16.21: Ohuŋwa mu hiseera ehyo, nga Yesu atandiha ohusomesa abeegi babe ngʼolu ali nʼohutiina e Yerusaalemu, abaatu abahulu mu gwanga nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi nʼabatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda bamubonyaabonye bugali weene era bamwite aye ni ŋalibitaŋo endaalo edatu aliramuha.
16.22: Olwʼehyo, Peetero gaŋira Yesu hu tulo ngʼamuhayula ati, “Musengwa, ehyo sihija huhwolaho kadi!”
16.23: Nga Yesu acuuha amuloma ati, “Pwe mu moni, oli Sitaani! Oli hutigatigania ohuhola ebyagima naaja, sooli huŋeega hu mulimo gwa Hatonda ogwandeeta aye oli huŋeega hu byʼabaatu!”
16.24: Ngʼaŋo aloma abeegi babe ati, “Hiisi muutu owenda ohuba omuloobera wange, ateehwa ohwefiirisa byosibyosi era nʼali muheneerefu ohubbeeda omusalabba gugwe era agende ni neese.
16.25: Hiri hiityo olwohuba hiisi oweheneerera obulamu wuwe, alibufiirwa aye hiisi afiirwa obulamu wuwe hu lwange, alibunoŋola.
16.26: Ale higasa hi omuutu ohuba nʼobuŋinda bwohu hyalo huno wosiwosi aye gafiirwa obulamu wuwe? Ale dala ŋaliŋo ehi omuutu aŋanga ohuŋaayo ko gagobosaŋo obulamu wuwe ni buba ni buhenire ohugota?
16.27: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Omwana wʼOmuutu aja huuja mu eŋono lya Semwana, nʼali nʼabamalayika babe aŋe hiisi muutu omuhemba ni geema hu bikolwa byawe.
16.28: Mbalomera ehituufu ti, ŋaliŋo abandi hu enywe abemereeye ŋano, abatalifa ohutusaho ni bahenire ohubona Omwana wʼOmuutu ni gaaja ohuŋuga.”

17.1: Ni ŋabitaŋo endaalo mukaaga, nga Yesu aŋira Peetero ni Yakobbo ni Yowaane muganda ya Yakobbo batiina baniina hu olusozi olwegingihiriri baba eyo boŋene.
17.2: Ni baali eyo, abeegi babe abo baali baheja nga mu moni wuwe mucuuha mumeregenya hyʼeryuba era ebyambalo bibye nga bipepya bimesya hyʼenjase.
17.3: Aŋo ni naaŋo nga babona Eliya ni Musa ni baŋaya ni Yesu.
17.4: Nga Peetero aloma Yesu ati, “Musengwa, hiraŋi ti huli ŋano. Ni huba husiima huhwo, natongole ebitiira bidatu. Hirala hibe hihyo, ehindi hya Musa nʼehindi hyʼEliya.”
17.5: Peetero ni gaali nʼahiiroma, ehireri ehipepya nga hiija hibawiihaho. Ngʼejanjaasi liŋwera mu hireri ehyo, ni ŋaliŋo aloma ati, “Ono njʼOmwana wange omuhoda oyu nenda era owunesiimisa. Ale muŋulirise ebi abaloma.”
17.6: Abeegi abo ni baŋulira ebibono ebyo batya bugali, nga bagwa ŋaasi mahotamiriiye ni batenda nʼohumuhejaho.
17.7: Aye Yesu gatiina gabaŋambaho, ngʼabaloma ati, “Mwinyohe mutatya!”
17.8: Abeegi babe ni bagangamuha, sibabona muutu owundi yesiyesi ohutusaho Yesu yeŋene.
17.9: Ni baali ni baŋwa hu lusozi, nga Yesu abahamiirisa ati, “Mutalomeraho muutu yesiyesi ebyo ebi muweene ohwola olu Omwana wʼOmuutu aliramuha.”
17.10: Ngʼaŋo abeegi abo bamubuusa baati, “Lwahiina abasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda baloma baati naabbi Eliya ali nʼohweheerera ohugobola ko Kurisito gaaje?”
17.11: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Hituufu, Eliya ali nʼohweheerera ohuuja agobose bunyaaha emyoyo jʼabaatu.
17.12: Aye mbalomera ti Eliya gahena hale ohuuja aye sibamufaania era abaatu bamuhola byosibyosi ebi bendire. Mu ngeri njʼenyene baja hugudya nʼOmwana wʼOmuutu baatyo.”
17.13: Ngʼaŋo abeegi bategeera baati gaali abalomera hu Yowaane Omubatiza. Yesu aŋonia omuseere aliho omusambwa (Mar 9:14-29; Luk 9:37-43)
17.14: Yesu nʼabeegi babe bala abadatu ni baŋwa hu lusozi, nga bagaana ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu. Nga ŋabaaŋo omusinde owatiina eyiri Yesu, ahubba amafuha mu moni wuwe amuloma ati,
17.15: “Muhulu, kwegayiriiye ŋambira musaani yange ehisa, agwa efubu era abonaabona bugali. Efunda nyingi agwa mu muliro oba mu maaji.
17.16: Namuleetaho eyiri abeegi babo aye sibamuŋonia.”
17.17: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Enywe abaatu abaŋuma hufugiirira era abʼomulembe guno ogwabbaama, ndihena ni nenywe ahamanga ahaaga hatye ko mube nʼohufugiirira, ndyosa ŋeena ohubehaliiriha? Mundeetere ŋano omuseere oyo.”
17.18: Yesu ngʼahayuhira omusambwa guŋwa hu museere, ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo aŋona.
17.19: Oluvanyuma abeegi ba Yesu batiina aŋa gaali nʼali yeŋene nga bamubuusa baati, “Lwahiina sihwasobola hubbinga musambwa ogwo hu museere?”
17.20: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Ehyo hibaaye hiityo olwohuba muli nʼohufugiirira hutotono. Mbalomera ehituufu ti, singa muba nʼohufugiirira nʼolu huba hudiidiri hyʼahamo ha kalidaali, mwahalomire olusozi luno muuti, ‘Siguha ŋano oje wedaanye ŋala’ era nga ehi oloma hibaŋo. Ŋaŋuma ehiribahaya.
17.21: Aye omusambwa hyʼogwo siguŋanga hutiina ni ŋaŋuma husaba nʼohusiiba.” Nindi Yesu aloma hu hufa huhwe (Mar 9:30-32; Luk 9:43-45)
17.22: Abeegi bosibosi ni Yesu ni baali ni bahumbeene ŋalala e Galilaaya, nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Baja hulya mu Mwana wʼOmuutu oluhwe bahene bamuŋeyo eyiri abobuŋangi bamwite.
17.23: Baja humwita aye ŋalibitaŋo endaalo edatu ngʼalamuha.” Ehyo hyaleetera abeegi babe ohweŋunamira. Ohuŋa omusolo gwomu Yekaalu
17.24: Yesu nʼabeegi babe ni boola e Kaperanawumu, ngʼabaŋoosa bomu yʼe Yekaalu batiina eyiri Peetero bamubuusa baati, “Koni omusomesa wenywe niye saaŋa musolo gwomu Yekaalu?”
17.25: Nga Peetero abagobolamo ati, “Aŋa.” Peetero ni gengira mu nyumba, Yesu njʼoweherera ohuloma ngʼamubuusa ati, “Ne ewe Simooni oŋeega otye? Abahabaha baŋoosa baatu hi? Abaatu bomu gwanga lyawe oba abalugendwa?”
17.26: Nga Peetero amugobolamo ati, “Hu balugendwa.” Ngʼaŋo Yesu amuloma ati, “Abazaliranwa bomu gwanga sibali nʼohuŋa omusolo.
17.27: Aye ohutenda hubaluŋia tiina hu nyanja odanye omulobo mu maaji, enyeeni eyi oneheerere ohuŋambya, onayasamye wagaanamo ebbeesa. Jiŋambe otiine osasule omusolo ogugwo nʼogwange.”

18.1: Mu hiseera ehyo abeegi batiina aŋali Yesu, nga bamubuusa baati, “Njʼani ahira ohuba owʼeŋono mu baatu abali mu buŋugi owomwigulu?”
18.2: Ngʼaŋo Yesu alanga omwana omuŋere owaali aŋaapi aŋo, amwemeeresa ŋagati waawe.
18.3: Ngʼahena aloma ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu ti hiisi muutu ateesiga Hatonda hyʼomwana omuŋere ngʼolu geesiga abasaaye babe, sibalimubala huba mulala hu baatu aba Hatonda aŋuga.
18.4: Olwʼehyo hiisi oweŋomeha hyʼomwana omuŋere ono, njʼahira ohuba owʼeŋono mu baatu aba Hatonda aŋuga.
18.5: Era Hiisi asangaalira omwana omuŋere hyʼono hu lwange, aba asangaliiye ndiise.
18.6: Aye omuutu yesiyesi aleetera mulala hu baŋere bano abafugiirira ohubbenga, aŋoomera humusidihamo ogubaale ogusito mu mamiro, nga bahena bamudanya mu buliba.
18.7: “Nga jibageene abaatu abomu hyalo hino olwohuba mulimo ebiitu ebi baleetera ohwonoona. Ebiitu hyʼebyo biri nʼohubaŋo aye jimwageene oyo abireeta!
18.8: Olwʼehyo hanye muhono oba hugulu huhwo njʼohuhuleetera ohwonoona, hutemeeho. Hiraŋi osune obulamu obutaŋwaŋo nʼoli muleme, ohuhira olu osigasa emihono jombi oba amagulu gombi aye bahudanya mu muliro ogutasima emirembe nʼemirembe.
18.9: Era hanye emoni yiyo ehuleetera ohuhola ehibi yomoleemo. Hiraŋi obe wa moni ndala aye wingire mu buŋugi wa Hatonda, ohuhira olu osigasa emoni jombi aye bahudanya mu hifo omu oja husihiirihira. Olugero oluŋamba hu taama eyaali nʼegotire (Luk 15:3-7)
18.10: “Olwʼehyo omanya otatalanga wayire mulala hu baŋere bano, olwohuba mbalomera ti, abamalayika ababalabirira hiisi hiseera bolerera Bbaabba ali mwigulu.
18.11: Omwana wʼOmuutu gaaja ohunoŋola abaatu ababbaama.
18.12: “Enywe muŋeega muutye? Singa omuutu aba nʼetaama jije cikumi aye nga ndala yigotaho, saaleha aŋo ecenda namwenda ni jiri hwaya gatiina ohwendula endala eyo egotire ohwola olu ayibona?
18.13: Era mbalomera ehituufu ti, nʼayibona asangaala bugali olwʼetaama eyo endala, ohuhiraho jira ecenda namwenda.
18.14: Mu ngeri njʼenyene Senywe ali mwigulu sigenda wayire mulala hu baŋere bano ohubadanya mu muliro.” Owahyo ahuhola ehihulumya
18.15: Ngʼaŋo Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Singa owahyo ahuhola ehibi, tiinayo omulomere ehibi hihye ni muli babiri mweŋene. Nʼafugiirira ehi omuloma, muligobolaŋo nindi ohuholagana bulaŋi.
18.16: Aye singa saafugiirira ehi oloma, wagamangayo nʼowahyo mulala oba babiri ko hiisi songa bayihahasenga ni ŋaliŋo obujulizi owʼabaatu babiri oba badatu.
18.17: Singa agaana ohubaŋulirisa, mumuŋiranga mu hibbubbu hyʼabafugiirira, bamwiihasa bamubulirira. Anagaana ohuŋuliirisa, mumuŋiranga ohuba hyʼAtali Muyudaaya oba omuŋoosa oyu muloma muuti ali nʼebibi.
18.18: “Mbalomera ehituufu ti hiisi ehi osidiha hu hyalo, nomwigulu mwosi balihisidiha era hiisi ehi ositula hu hyalo, nomwigulu mwosi balihisitula.
18.19: “Nindi mbaloma ti, singa babiri hu hyalo huno banabenga bulala mu hiisi ehi musaba, Bbaabba ali mwigulu anahibaŋenga.
18.20: Hiri hiityo olwohuba babiri oba abadatu abafugiirira banahumbaana mu siina lyange, mba aŋo ni nabo.” Olugero oluŋamba hu mwidu atasoniŋa
18.21: Ngʼaŋo Peetero atiina aŋali Yesu amubuusa ati, “Musengwa, owahyange anakola ehibi, musoniŋe efunda jinga? Musoniŋe efunda musanvu?”
18.22: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Kuloma ti, si funda musanvu aye sanvu emirundi musanvu.
18.23: “Obuŋugi bwomwigulu huŋanga ohubugeragerania hu habaha owendire abeedu babe baŋeyo embalirira yʼebbeesa jije.
18.24: Ni gatandiha ohubala ebitabo nga baleeta mulala hu beedu oyu gaali nʼabanja etalanta omutwalo mulala.
18.25: Omwidu oyo gaŋuma bbeesa ohusasula musengwawe. Olwʼehyo musengwawe galagira bamutunde, nʼomuhasi wuwe nʼabaana babe ko nʼebiitu bibye byosibyosi, ohusasula ebbanja.
18.26: Ngʼaŋo omwidu oyo ahubba amafuha amwegalihira ati, ‘Ngumikirizeho, nahahusasule ebbeesa jijo josijosi eji wumbanja.’
18.27: Omwidu oyo gaŋambya musengwawe ehisa, ngʼamusoniŋa ebbanja ngʼamuleha gagamayo.
18.28: “Aye omwidu oyo ni gatula ebulafu, gagaanana nʼomwidu wahye oyu gaali nʼabanja dinaari cikumi. Ngʼamugwa mu mamiro amuloma ati, ‘Sasule ebbeesa jange!’
18.29: Ngʼaŋo omwidu wahye oyo ahubba amafuha, amwegalihira nʼaloma ati, ‘Ngumikirizeho, nja huhusasula ebbeesa jijo.’
18.30: Aye niye gagaana era galoma bamudanya mu komera ohwola olu alisasula ebbanja.
18.31: Abeedu bahye ni baabona ebyaliŋo, ehyo hyababisya bubi bugali weene era baŋamba engira batiina balomera musengwa yaawe byosibyosi.
18.32: Ngʼaŋo musengwa yaawe alanga omwidu oyo amuloma ati, ‘Mwidu ewe omubi, nahusoniŋa ebbanja eri naali ni kubanja olwohuba wanjegalihira.
18.33: Ndiiwe ataŋanga husoniŋa wahyo ngʼolu ese nahusoniŋa?’
18.34: Nʼobusungu bungi, musengwawe gamuŋambya abasirikale bamudanye mu komera bamugudye, ohwola olu alihena ohusasula ebbanja lyosiryosi.”
18.35: Nga Yesu agohoba ati, “Eyo njʼengeri eyi Bbaabba ali mwigulu alibisyamo hiisi mulala hu nywe, ohutusaho nga musoniŋire abahyenywe ohuŋwera erala mu myoyo jenywe.”

19.1: Yesu ni gahena ohuloma ebibono ebyo, ngʼaŋwa e Galilaaya atiina mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya, engereha wʼolwabi Yoludaani.
19.2: Ngʼaŋo ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu himulondaho era ngʼaŋonia abalwaye abaalimo.
19.3: Ngʼaŋo balala hu Bafalisaayo batiina bamuhema baati, “Amagambi geefe gafugiirira omuutu ohubbinga omuhasi wuwe olwʼesonga yosiyosi?”
19.4: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Simusomangaho ehyaŋandiihiwa hiiti; ‘Ohuŋwa hutandiha yʼehyalo, Hatonda gawumba omusinde nʼomuhasi?’
19.5: Era ngʼaloma ati, ‘Olwʼehyo omusinde analehenga semwana ni nyina, nga geŋimba nʼomuhasi wuwe, nga bombi bafuuha mubiri mulala?’
19.6: Olwo nga sibahiiri babiri, wabula mulala. Ale omuutu saaŋimbululanga ehi Hatonda gaŋimba ŋalala.”
19.7: NgʼAbafalisaayo abo bamubuusa baati, “Ne lwahiina Musa gataŋo ehiragiro ati omusinde abbinga omuhasi wuwe, amuŋanga ebbaluŋa eyihahasa yiiti amubbingire?”
19.8: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Musa gafugiirira abasinde ohuŋa abahasi baawe ebbaluŋa olwʼobuhahanyafu wʼemyoyo jaawe. Aye sihyali hiityo ohuŋwera erala mu hutandiha.
19.9: Mbaloma ti hiisi abbinga omuhasi wuwe ohutusaho olwʼobuhwedi, ngʼahena aleeta owundi, aba aholire obuhwedi.”
19.10: Ngʼabeegi babe bamuloma baati, “Ni hiba ni hiri hiityo ŋagati wʼomusinde nʼomuhasi wuwe, hiraŋi ohutafumbirwa.”
19.11: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Hiisi muutu saaŋanga hufugiirira esomesa eyo, ohutusaho abo aba Hatonda gaŋa ohuyitegeera boŋene.
19.12: Abaatu abandi sibaleeta bahasi olwohuba babasaala ni bali bafiirwa, abandi olwʼohubalaaŋa nʼabandi olwʼohwenda ohweŋerayo erala ohuŋeeresa Hatonda. Afugiirira ebyo ebindomire hu bufumbo, ahifugiirire.” Yesu asabira abaana abaŋere ekabi (Mar 10:13-16; Luk 18:15-17)
19.13: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaaŋo abaaŋira abaana abaŋere eyiri Yesu ohubaŋambaho abalombere ekabi aye abeegi babe bahayula abaatu abo.
19.14: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Mulehe abaana abaŋere baaje eyi ndi. Mutabagaana olwohuba abali hyʼabo, mbabengira mu obuŋugi womwigulu.”
19.15: Ni gahena ohubaŋambaho nʼohubasabira ekabi, ngʼaŋwa mu hifo ehyo. Yesu nʼomusinde omuŋinda (Mar 10:17-31; Luk 18:18-30)
19.16: Ŋaaliŋo omusinde owatiina eyiri Yesu ngʼamubuusa ati, “Musomesa, hiraŋi hi ehi ndi nʼohuhola ohusuna obulamu obutaŋwaŋo?”
19.17: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Lwahiina wumbuusa ehiŋamba hu biitu ebiraŋi? Ŋaliŋo mulala yeŋene Omulaŋi. Era nʼoba ni wenda ohusuna obulamu obutaŋwaŋo gondera ebiragiro bibye.”
19.18: Ngʼomusinde oyo amubuusa ati, “Biragiro hi ebyo?” Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Siwiitanga muutu, soholanga buhwedi, siwiibanga hiitu hyosihyosi, otabeŋeranga muutu ehi ataholire,
19.19: oŋanga lataawo ni maawo eŋono era ‘yendanga omuutu wahyo, ngʼolu weyenda wamwene.’ ”
19.20: Ngʼomusinde oyo amuloma ati, “Ebiragiro ebyo byosibyosi mbyoheresa. Hiina ehi kibuliraho?”
19.21: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Nʼoba ni wenda ohuba owolereeye, tiina otunde ebibyo byosibyosi, ebbeesa ejiŋwamo ojigabire abagadi olisuna obuŋinda owomwigulu. Nʼohena, wuuje obe muloobera wange.”
19.22: Omusinde oyo ni gaŋulira ebyo, gaŋwaŋo nʼawomboŋaaye olwohuba gaali nʼobuŋinda oweene obungi.
19.23: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu ti, higosi omuŋinda ohwingira mu buŋugi womwigulu!
19.24: Era mbalomera ehituufu ti, hyangu bugali weene engamiya ohubita mu ŋundu lyʼepiso, ohuhira omuŋinda ohwingira mu buŋugi wa Hatonda.”
19.25: Abeegi babe ni baŋulira ebibono ebyo, beŋunja bugali nga babuusa baati, “Olwo ŋaahani njʼani aŋanga ohunoŋoha?”
19.26: Nga Yesu abalengerera ahena abaloma ati, “Eyiri abaatu, higosi ohwenoŋola aye eyiri Hatonda ebiitu byosibyosi bisoboha era ŋabula ehimuhaya.”
19.27: Ngʼaŋo Peetero aloma Yesu ati, “Efe hwaleha ebyefe byosibyosi nga huuja hube baloobera babo, balituŋa hi?”
19.28: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu ti ni balihena ohugobosa hiisi hiitu bunyaaha, Omwana wʼOmuutu aliihala hu tebe yiye eyʼobuŋugi mu ŋono lirye, enywe abaloobera bange ehumi nʼababiri mwesi muliihala hu etebe ehumi nʼebiri ejʼobuŋugi, mwasalira ebiha bya Yisirayiri ehumi nabibiri emisango.
19.29: Era hiisi owaleha amago gage oba abaganda babe oba ababoojo oba nyina oba semwana oba abaana oba muŋuluko gugwe hu lwange, alisuna omuhemba emirundi cikumi ejʼebyo ebi gafiirwa era baamuŋa nʼobulamu obutaŋwaŋo.
19.30: Aye bangi hu begingihiriri mu hiseera hino abaliba abaŋaasi, nindi bangi hu baŋaasi mu hiseera hino abaliba abegingihiriri.”

20.1: Nga Yesu abagerera olugero ati, “Obuŋugi bwomwigulu huŋanga ohubugeragerania hu muutu owaali nʼendimiro yiye eyʼemizabbibbu. Lulala gaŋuuna mu mugamba ohwendula abaatu abohumutambira mu ndimiro yiye.
20.2: Ni gababona, ngʼafugiirisania ni nabo ohubasasula dinaari ndala, ngʼabasindiha batiina ohutamba mu ndimiro yiye.
20.3: Ni gatiina mu katale hu saawa ngʼedatu ohwendula abatambi abandi, gabona abaatu ni bemereeye aŋo ni baŋuma ehibahola.
20.4: Ngʼabaloma ati, ‘Enywe mwesi mutiine mutambe mu ndimiro yange eyʼemizabbibbu, nabasasule ebbeesa ejisaana.’
20.5: Era nga boosi batiina ohutamba mu ndimiro eyo. Nga nindi hu saawa mukaaga ejomu muusi nohu saawa mwenda gagamayo mu katale ahola ehiitu cʼehyene.
20.6: Hu saawa ehumi nandala gatiina era nga nindi abona abandi ni bemereeye aŋo ngʼababuusa ati, ‘Lwahiina oludaalo lwosirwosi muluheneye aŋo ni mwemereeye hwemeerera ni ŋaŋuma ehi muhola?’
20.7: “Ngʼabaatu abo bamugobolamo baati, ‘Hwemereeye ŋano olwohuba ŋaŋuma atuŋaye emirimo ohumutambira.’ Ngʼabaloma ati, ‘Ale mwesi mutiine mutambe mu ndimiro yange eyʼemizabbibbu.’
20.8: “Egulo, esaawa eyʼohwinuha hu muga ni yoola, ngʼomwene ndimiro aloma nyapala wuwe ati, ‘Langa abatambi obasasule omuhemba gwawe nʼotandiihira hu basembireyo ohuuja ohutamba, osembyeyo abo abehereeye.’
20.9: “Abaatu abo abaatiina esaawa ehumi nandala ohutamba, batiina nga hiisi muutu asuna edinaari ndala.
20.10: Abeheerera ohutiina ohutamba ni batiina ohubasasula, baŋeega baati baali bahusuna hibbala ohuhiraho abahyawe abo. Aye boosi baabaŋa edinaari ndala ndala.
20.11: Oluvanyuma lwʼohubaŋa ebbeesa, bemulugunya eyiri omwene ndimiro
20.12: baati, ‘Abasinde bano, abasembireyo ohuuja era abatambire esaawa ndala yoŋene, obasasuuye cʼehyene ni neefe abaholire omuusi gwosigwosi nʼogumwi gwatuŋweraho!’
20.13: Ngʼaŋo omwene ndimiro agobolamo mu mulala hu abo ati, ‘Wange nandikwibe, sihutegeregane edinaari ndala?
20.14: Olwʼehyo ŋamba eyiyo ote mu saŋu wetiinire. Hiri eyi ndi ohusasula nʼasembireyo ohuuja, cʼehyene ni neewe.
20.15: Ehi oloma puma buŋangi ohutambisa ebbeesa jange ngʼolu mba ni nendire? Oba ogongeera olwohuba ndi nʼehyere?’ ”
20.16: Nga Yesu agohoba ati, “Bangi hu begingihiriri mu hiseera hino abaliba abaŋaasi, nindi bangi hu baŋaasi mu hiseera hino abaliba abegingihiriri.” Yesu aloma hu hufa huhwe efunda eyohudatu (Mar 10:32-34; Luk 18:31-34)
20.17: Ŋaahani Yesu nʼabeegi babe ehumi nʼababiri ni baali ni batiina e Yerusaalemu, gabagobosa hutulo ngʼabaloma ati,
20.18: “Huli hutiina e Yerusaalemu aye ni hulyola eyo baja hulya mu Mwana wʼOmuutu oluhwe bahene bamuŋeyo eyiri abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi. Era baja humusalira ogwʼohufa,
20.19: bamuŋeyo eyiri abalugendwa bamujeeje era bamufadule efaalu bahene bamuhomerere hu musalabba. Ne ni ŋalibitaŋo endaalo edatu, aliramuha.” Ohusaba hwa nyina ya Yakobbo ni Yowaane (Mar 10:35-45)
20.20: Ngʼaŋo muha Zebbedaayo atiina nʼabasaani babe eyiri Yesu, ngʼahubba amafuha amusunga abeho nʼehi amuholera.
20.21: Nga Yesu amubuusa ati, “Wenda kuholere hi?” Ngʼomuhasi oyo amugobolamo ati, “Nʼonahehale hu tebe yiyo eyʼeŋono mu buŋugi buwo, nenda oganye abasaani bange bano bombi beehale ohuhulirana, mulala hu muhono gugwo omulungi, nʼowundi hu mugooda.”
20.22: Nga Yesu aloma abasaani ba Zebbedaayo ati, “Ehi musunga simuhitegeera. Muŋanga ohunywa hu hihopo ehyʼohubonaabona ehi nja hunywaho?” Nga nibo bamugobolamo baati, “Huŋanga.”
20.23: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Hituufu mwesi mulinywa hu hihopo ehyʼohubonaabona ehi nja hunywaho. Aye ehyʼohwihala ni mundireene hu muhono gwange omulungi oba omugooda, sindiise ahigaba. Ebifo ebyo, Bbaabba omwene alibiŋa abo aba gabitegehera.”
20.24: Abeegi bahyawe ehumi ni baŋulira ehi bahyawe ababiri abo basunga, nga babaluŋira.
20.25: Olwʼehyo nga Yesu abalanga bosibosi bahumbaanire aŋa gaali. Ngʼabaloma ati, “Mumanyire muuti abaŋugi bʼAbatali Bayudaaya benda babaŋeerese era abatangirisi baawe benda abaatu aba baŋuga bamanye baati babaliho obuŋangi.
20.26: Aye sihiri nʼohuba hiityo eyiri enywe. Hiisi owenda ohuba omuhulu mu nywe, ali nʼohuba muŋeeresa wʼabahye.
20.27: Era hiisi owenda ohuba omutangirisi, ali nʼohuba muŋeeresa wʼabahye.
20.28: Mu ngeri njʼenyene nʼOmwana wʼOmuutu sigaaja bamuŋeerese aye niiye ohuŋeeresa era nʼohuŋayo obulamu wuwe ohuba endiŋi eyʼohununula oluhulende.” Yesu aŋonia abaŋofu babiri (Mar 10:46-52; Luk 18:35-43)
20.29: Yesu nʼabeegi babe ni baali ni baŋwa e Yeriko, ngʼehiŋindi hyʼabaatu himulondaho.
20.30: Ŋaahani ŋaaliŋo abasinde babiri abaŋofu abaali ni behaaye hutulo wʼengira. Abasinde abo ni baŋulira baati Yesu abita, nga balangirira nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani baati, “Musengwa, Mwijuhulu wa Dawudi, tuŋambire ehisa otuŋonie!”
20.31: Nga bangi hu baatu abomu hiŋindi ehyo babahayula ni babaloma baŋoleere. Cooka nibo nga begumya hwegumya ohulangirira baati, “Musengwa Mwijuhulu wa Dawudi, tuŋambire ehisa!”
20.32: Nga Yesu gemeerera alagira baleete abaŋofu abo aŋa ali. Ni babaŋira, ngʼababuusa ati, “Mwenda mbaholere hi?”
20.33: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Musengwa, twigule emoni hubone.”
20.34: Yesu gabaŋambira ehisa ngʼabaŋamba hu moni. Aŋo ni naaŋo, ngʼemoni jʼabasinde abo jirimbula batandiiha ohubona era nga beŋimba hu baali ni balonda hu Yesu.

21.1: Ŋaahani Yesu nʼabeegi babe ni baali ni banatere ohwola mu Yerusaalemu, boola mu haalo ahabalanga baati Bbesufage, hu lusozi lwʼemisaala Emizayiti. Ngʼatuma babiri hu beegi babe ati,
21.2: “Mutiine mu hitehere ehi mulengera hira. Ni munaabe ni mwahengiramo, munaabone nasugirya nʼenyana yaayo ebunwa ni bajisidihire aŋo, mujiboŋolole mujindeetere.
21.3: Singa ŋabaŋo ababuusa lwahiina mujiboŋolola, munamugobolemo muuti; ‘Musengwa njʼajenda,’ era aŋo ni naaŋo anabafugiirire mwajireeta.”
21.4: Bino byaliŋo ohwoheresa ehi naabbi galoma ati,
21.5: “Mulomere abaatu bomu Sayuuni muuti; ‘Mubone, habaha wenywe ali huuja, muwombeefu era gehaaye hu nasugirya eperepere.’ ”
21.6: Ngʼaŋo abeegi abo batiina, bahola ngʼolu Yesu gabaloma.
21.7: Nga batangirisa nasugirya eyo nʼenyana yaayo bajimuŋirira. Ni boola bayaalaho engoye jaawe hu mugongo, nga Yesu ayiihalaho.
21.8: Ni baali ni batiina, ngʼehiŋindi hyʼabaatu hyala engoye mu ngira Yesu abiteho, nʼabandi nga baaliriramo obusaga wʼebisaala obuliho amahoose obu baabbwaga hu misaala. Bino babihola olwʼohuŋa Yesu eŋono.
21.9: Ngʼaŋo ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu abaali ni batangiriiye, nʼabaali ni bamuŋwaho egongo bahoohera ŋamugulu baati, “Tunoŋole, Omwijuhulu wa Dawudi. Ali nʼekabi oyo owuujira mu buŋangi wa Hatonda Musengwa! Aŋeewe eŋono Musengwa ali mwigulu.”
21.10: Yesu ni gengira mu Yerusaalemu, ehibuga hyosihyosi hyasamalirira. Era ehyo hyaleetera abaatu ohubuusa baati, “Njʼani oyo?”
21.11: Nga babagobolamo baati, “Nje Yesu, naabbi Omunazaleesi ohuŋwa mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya.” Yesu abbinga abaali ni batundira hu Yekaalu (Mar 11:15-19; Luk 19:45-48; Yow 2:13-22)
21.12: Yesu nʼabeegi babe ni boola e Yerusaalemu gengira mu lunya lwa Yekaalu ngʼabbingamo bosibosi abaali ni batundiramo nʼabaali ni bagula. Ngʼagengula emeeza jʼabaswanisa ebbeesa, nʼefoomu jʼabaali ni batunda enjiiwa.
21.13: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, ‘Enyumba yange yinaabenga nyumba omu baatu bananjumirihisyenga. Ne enywe muyifuuhisye pungulu eyi bakondo behwehamo.’ ”
21.14: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, ngʼabaŋofu nʼabaleme batiina aŋa Yesu gaali mu lunya lwa Yekaalu, ngʼabaŋonia.
21.15: Aye abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ni baabona ebyamaliholiho ebi Yesu gaali nʼahola, nʼabaana ni bahayaanira hu lunya lwa Yekaalu ni baloma baati, “Omwijuhulu wa Dawudi oŋeewe eŋono,” ngʼobusungu bubaŋamba.
21.16: Olwʼehyo nga babuusa Yesu baati, “Oli huŋulira ebi baana abo baloma?” Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Pulira.” Ngʼahena ababuusa ati, “Ne simusomangaho Ehyaŋandiihiwa ehiroma hiiti; “ ‘Wagunjula abaana abaŋere nʼebiwegera ohuhujumirya?’ ”
21.17: Ni gahena ohuloma atyo, ngʼabaleha aŋo aŋwa mu hibuga Yerusaalemu atiina e Bbesaniya eyi gaŋenyuha. Yesu aŋwaba omusaala omutiini (Mar 11:12-14,20-24)
21.18: Ni wahya mugamba, Yesu nʼabeegi babe ni baali ni baŋwa e Bbesaniya ni baagama e Yerusaalemu, gaŋulira enjala nʼemuluma.
21.19: Ni galengera omusaala omutiini hutulo wʼengira, ngʼatiina aje abone hanye aŋanga ohwagaanaho ebibala. Ni gagwolaho sigabona hibala kadi hirala ohutusaho amahoose. Ngʼaŋo aguloma ati, “Siwamanga bibala kadi!” Aŋo ni naaŋo ngʼomusaala ogwo guŋotoha nʼohuŋotoha.
21.20: Abeegi ni baabona ehyo, beŋunja! Nga bebuusa baati, “Omusaala omutiini guŋotohire guutye amangu ago?”
21.21: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu ti singa muba nʼohufugiirira era ni muŋuma hubuusabuusa, simulihola ehi kolire hu musaala omutiini ogwo hyoŋene aye muliŋanga nʼohuloma olusozi luno muuti, ‘Siguha ŋano oje wedaanye mu buliba’ era ehi mulomire hyabaŋo.
21.22: Era singa muba nʼohufugiirira, munasunenga hiisi ehi munalombenga Hatonda.” Abatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya babuusa eyi Yesu atusa obuŋangi (Mar 11:27-33; Luk 20:1-8)
21.23: Ngʼaŋo Yesu goola mu lunya lwa Yekaalu era ni gaali nʼasomesa, ngʼabatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga, batiina aŋa gaali nga bamubuusa baati, “Otusa ŋeena obuŋangi obuhuginiha ohuhola ebiitu ebyo ebi ohola? Era njʼani owahuŋa obuŋangi obwo?”
21.24: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Keesi leha mbabuuse ehibuuso hirala. Ni munangobolemo nga ko mbalomera eyi tusa obuŋangi obu neemaho ohuhola ebi kola.
21.25: Mundomere, Yowaane gatusa ŋeena obuŋangi owʼohubatiza? Gabutusa yiri Hatonda, oba yiri baatu?” Ngʼaŋo bahubbagania ebiŋeego ni baloma baati, “Humugobolemo huutye? Singa huloma huuti Hatonda njʼowamutuma anatubuuse ati, ‘Kale lwahiina simwafugiirira bya Yowaane?’ ”
21.26: Aye ni hunalome huuti, “Abaatu njʼabamutuma,” hitiisa olwohuba abaatu bosibosi bafugiirira baati Yowaane gaali naabbi.
21.27: Ehyaŋwamo nga bamugobolamo baati, “Sihumanyire.” Ngʼaŋo Yesu abaloma ati, “Kale keesi sinabalomere eyi tusa obuŋangi obuukosa ebi kola.” Olugero oluŋamba hu basaani bʼomuutu ababiri
21.28: Nga Yesu geyongera aloma abatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya ati, “Ŋaahani enywe muŋeega muutye hu lugero luno? Ŋaaliŋo omuutu owaali nʼabasaani babe babiri. Ngʼatiina eyiri omudaayi amuloma ati, ‘Mwana wange, olwa leero tiina otambe mu ndimiro yʼemizabbibbu.’
21.29: Nga niye amugobolamo ati, ‘Ngeene.’ Cooka oluvanyuma ngʼacuusa ebiŋeego atiina atamba.
21.30: Nga semwana atiina eyiri owohubiri ngʼamuloma cʼehyene. Niye ngʼamugobolamo ati, ‘Kale Bbaabba.’ Aye omusaani oyo sigatiina ohuhola ehi gamuloma.”
21.31: Kale njʼani hu bombi owahola ehi saawe gendire? Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Omudaayi.” Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu ti abaŋoosa nʼabahwedi bali hweyingirira mu buŋugi wa Hatonda enywe ni mudindibaliiye aŋo.
21.32: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Yowaane Omubatiza gaaja ohubalaga engira etuufu eyʼohuŋamba, mwagaana ohufugiirira obuhwenda wuwe. Aye abaŋoosa nʼabahwedi nibo bafugiirira. Era wayire mwababona ni bafugiirira, simwebbwaga mwamufugiirira.” Olugero oluŋamba hu bapangisa bʼendimiro yʼemizabbibbu (Mar 12:1-12; Luk 20:9-19)
21.33: Nga Yesu geyongera abaloma ati, “Muŋulire olugero olundi. Ŋaaliŋo omuutu owahoma endimiro eyʼemizabbibbu ngʼahena ayisitiriraho, ayabamo eroŋo eryohujungirangamo, ngʼatongolamo nʼehitiira hyʼomuhuumi, ngʼahena ayipangisa abaatu nga niye atiina mu gwanga erindi.”
21.34: Ehiseera ehyʼegesa ni hyola, gatuma balala hu baŋeeresa babe eyiri abapangisa, bamuŋe owiisa wuwe.
21.35: Cooka abapangisa abo baŋamba abaŋeeresa babe abo. Owundi nga bamuhubba, nga beeta owundi era ngʼowohudatu bamuhubba amabaale.
21.36: Nga nindi omwene ndimiro abatumira abaŋeeresa abandi bangi ohuhiraho abagabatumira oludaayi era boosi nga bababisya cʼehyene.
21.37: Omwene ndimiro gasembyayo nʼohubatumira omusaani wuwe, mula nʼaloma ati, “Baja huŋa omwana wange eŋono bamupeera owiisa wange.”
21.38: Cooka abapangisa ni babona omusaani, nga behobaana baati, “Ono njʼomusika. Muhole hu mwite hwegoboseho obusika.”
21.39: Ngʼaŋo bamusindigirisa bamutusa ebulafu wʼendimiro yʼemizabbibbu, nga bamwitira eyo.
21.40: Ngʼaŋo Yesu ababuusa ati, “Ŋaahani omwene ndimiro nʼaligobola alihola atye abapangisa abo?”
21.41: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Alitiina gasihiirisa abamalimbe abo nʼendimiro gayipangisa abaatu abandi abohumuŋanga owiisa buwe mu hiseera ehyʼegesa.”
21.42: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Simusomangaho ehyaŋandiihiwa ehiroma hiiti; ‘Ebaale eri abatongoli batala baati siraŋi, njʼeryafuuha ehulu eryʼomugaso mu gosigosi? Hino Musengwa omwene njʼowahihola, era hyeŋunjisa abahibona.’ ”
21.43: Nga Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Olwʼehyo mbalomera ti Hatonda alibatusaaho enywe obuŋugi buwe, gabugabira abaatu abaliba nʼebikolwa ebiraŋi.
21.44: Era hiisi agwa hu ebaale eryo, alibbwagijihamo aye oyo oyu lirigwaho, aliminianguha.”
21.45: Abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼAbafalisaayo ni baŋulira olugero olwo, bategeera baati Yesu gaali ali huloma hu nje nibo.
21.46: Olwʼehyo, bagesyaho ohwenda ohumuŋamba aye batya ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu, olwohuba nibo baali bafugiirira baati Yesu gaali naabbi.

22.1: Ngʼaŋo nindi Yesu agerera abatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya olugero ati,
22.2: “Owahabaha owomwigulu huŋanga ohubugeragerania hu habaha owategehera omusaani embaga eyʼobugole.
22.3: Esaawa eyʼobugole ni yoola, gatuma abeedu babe ohuhebulisa abageni abalange batiine. Aye abageni nga bagaana ohutiina.
22.4: “Ngʼaŋo nindi atuma abeedu abandi ati, ‘Mulome abageni abalange muuti kenire ohutegeha embaga era netire eŋombe esaame nʼebisonga ebisaata ebinabbiita olwʼembaga yʼobugole wʼomwana wange. Era hiisi hiitu hiŋooye, muuje hu mbaga.’
22.5: “Aye abageni abo abalange, sibafayo era hiisi muutu eyi gaali, gaŋamba engira yiye gaŋwaŋo. Ngʼabandi batiina mu ndimiro jaawe, abandi betiinira mu husubuula.
22.6: Abasigalaŋo, nga baŋamba abeedu aba baali ni batumire bababonyabonya bugali bahena babeeta.
22.7: Ehyo hyaluŋia habaha bugali weene. Era ehyaŋwamo, gaŋindiha eŋe lirye lyasihiirisa abatemu abo era nga bohya nʼehibuga hyabwe.
22.8: Ngʼahena aloma abeedu babe ati, ‘Kenire ohutegeha embaga. Aye abageni abalange bebihiisye bubi era eŋuma nʼosaaniiye ohuuja.
22.9: Olwʼehyo mutiine mu masaŋangira gʼenguudo ejomu hibuga, mulange hiisi muutu oyu munagaane gaaje hu mbaga.’
22.10: Ngʼaŋo abeedu batiina mu nguudo balanga abaatu bosibosi abalaŋi nʼababi ababagaana batiine hu mbaga. Olwʼehyo abaatu baŋwerereheramo batiina hu mbaga era enyumba omu bategehera nga yijula.
22.11: “Ne habaha ni gengira mu nyumba ohuheesa abageni, galengera omuutu owaali nʼatambaaye ebyambalo ebiŋomera ohwambala hu mbaga.
22.12: Ngʼamuloma ati, ‘Wange, wujire ŋano otye nʼotambaaye bulaŋi?’ Omusinde oyo gaŋuma hya huloma.
22.13: Ngʼaŋo habaha aloma abeedu babe ati, ‘Mumuhaade emihono nʼamagulu, muhene mumudanye ebulafu mu hiirema, eyiriba ohweninala nʼohulira amangi olwʼobulumi.’ ”
22.14: Ngʼaŋo Yesu agohoba ati, “Bangi aba Hatonda alanga aye gatobolamo badiidiri.” Ehibuuso ehiŋamba hu huŋa omusolo (Mar 12:13-17; Luk 20:20-26)
22.15: Ngʼaŋo balala hu Bafalisaayo batiina baseega amagesi agohutega Yesu bamuŋambihisye mubi analome.
22.16: Olwʼehyo, batuma balala hu beegi baawe ko nʼabawagizi ba habaha Herode, baje bamuheme bamuŋambire mu ndoma yiye. Batiina bamuloma baati, “Musomesa, humanyire huuti ewe ofiira hu mazima era osomesa mu mazima ebi Hatonda genda abaatu bahole, olwohuba obula hu byahuhusiima ebinambulamo.
22.17: Ŋaahani tulomere, hiraŋi efe Abayudaaya ohuŋa Kayisaali omusolo oba bbe?”
22.18: Aye Yesu mu hutegeera ehi baaliho, gabaloma ati, “Banafuusi enywe, lwahiina mukema?
22.19: Mundeetere ŋano endusu eyi batambisa ohuŋa omusolo.” Nga bamuŋirira edinaari.
22.20: Ngʼababuusa ati, “Ehifaananyi nʼamasiina ebiyiriho bino, byʼani?”
22.21: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Bya Kayisaali.” Ngʼaŋo Yesu abaloma ati, “Ale ebya Kayisaali mubiŋe Kayisaali, nʼebya Hatonda mubiŋe Hatonda.”
22.22: Ni baŋulira ebibono ebyo, nga beŋunja bugali engeri eyi aŋunuhiremo omubaso gwawe. Olwʼehyo bamuŋwaho, nga baŋamba engira bagamayo. Ehibuuso ehiŋamba hu hulamuha (Mar 12:18-27; Luk 20:27-40)
22.23: Hu ludaalo olwene olwo, balala hu Basadukaayo, bano njʼabatafugiirira baati eriyo ohulamuha, batiina eyiri Yesu bamubuusa baati,
22.24: “Musomesa, Musa omuŋeeresa wa Hatonda gatuŋandiihira egambi ati, ‘Singa omuutu afa galeha namwandu nʼatamusaayemo mwana, mugandaawe ateehwa ohumusika amusaalire abaana.’
22.25: Ŋaahani ŋaaliŋo aboluganda musanvu abamenyanga ni neefe. Ngʼomudaayi ahwa omuhasi, cooka ngʼafa nʼatamusaayemo mwana. Ngʼaleehera mutoowe omuhasi oyo.
22.26: Nga mutoowe asika namwandu oyo era nga yeesi afa nʼatamusaayemo mwana. Nʼowohudatu yeesi atyo. Bosibosi omusanvu nga bambalaho omuhasi oyo. Cooka ndibamusaalamo mwana.
22.27: Ŋaahani bosibosi ni baali ni baŋooye ohufa ngʼomuhasi oyo yeesi afa.
22.28: Olwo ŋaahani, hu ludaalo olu baatu bosibosi baliramuhiraho, omuhasi oyo aliba muha ani olwohuba gaaliho muhasi wʼabaatu abo omusanvu?”
22.29: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Aŋo mugotire era ehibaleeteeye ohugota, hutamanya Ebyaŋandihiwa, wayire obuŋangi wa Hatonda.
22.30: Hiri hiityo olwohuba abaatu ni baliramuha, baliba hyʼabamalayika mwigulu, ni batahwa era ni batafumbirwa.
22.31: Ate ebiŋamba hu hulamuha hwʼabafu simusomangaho ehyaŋandiihiwa, Hatonda nʼabaloma ati,
22.32: ‘Ndiise Hatonda wa Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka ni Yakobbo.’ Ehyo hiraga hiiti Hatonda, si Hatonda wʼabafu aye wʼabalamu.”
22.33: Ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ni hyaŋulira ebibono ebyo, bosibosi beŋunja esomesa yiye. Ehiragiro ehihira obubbala (Mar 12:28-34; Luk 10:25-28)
22.34: Ŋaahani Abafalisaayo ni baŋulira baati Yesu atangalahiise Abasadukaayo, nga behumbaania ohweteesamo ehi banahole.
22.35: Era nga mulala hu bo owaali omusomesa wʼamagambi ga Hatonda abuusa Yesu nʼamuhema ati,
22.37: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti; ‘Yendanga Hatonda Musengwawo nʼomwoyo gugwo gwosigwosi nʼobulamu wuwo wosiwosi ko nʼamagesi gago gosigosi.’
22.38: Ehyo cʼehiragiro ehidaayi era ehihira byosibyosi.
22.39: Ehiragiro ehironda hu ehyo mu bubbala era ehihifaanana, cʼehino, ‘Yenda omuutu wahyo ngʼolu ewe weyenda wamwene.’
22.40: Era amagambi gosigosi nʼebi abanaabbi baŋandiiha byediiye hu biragiro ebyo ebibiri.” Kurisito ni Dawudi (Mar 12:35-37; Luk 20:41-44)
22.41: Ŋaahani Abafalisaayo ni baali ni bahumbeene aŋo, nga Yesu ababuusa ati,
22.42: “Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu, mwijuhulu wʼani?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Mwijuhulu wa Dawudi.”
22.43: Nga Yesu ababuusa ati, “Lwahiina Dawudi omwene, gamulanga Musengwawe?” Omwoyo nʼamutangirira galoma ati,
22.44: “ ‘Hatonda Musengwa gaaloma Musengwa yange ati, Yiihala ni wundireene hu lubega olwʼomuhono gwange omulungi, ohwola olu ndifuula abasigu babo ekookolo eyʼohutaho amagulu gago.’
22.45: “Obanga Dawudi omwene alanga Kurisito ati Musengwawe, nindi aŋanga atye ohuba mwijuhulu wuwe?”
22.46: Ŋaŋuma wayire mulala hu bo owamugobolamo ehibono hyosihyosi. Era ohuŋwa hulwo ŋaŋuma owesinga ohumubuusa ebibuuso nindi.

23.1: Oluvanyuma, Yesu galoma ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ŋalala nʼabeegi babe ati,
23.2: “Buvunanyiziwa wʼabasomesa bʼamagambi nʼAbafalisaayo ohuvuunula amagambi ga Musa.
23.3: Olwʼehyo muli nʼohubagondera era muhole hiisi ehi babaloma. Aye simuŋambanga esambo jaawe olwohuba ebi basomesa sinje ebi bahola.
23.4: Batwiha abaatu amagambi amakambwe ate nga nibo abeene sibasobola nʼohugaŋamba.
23.5: “Hiisi ehi bahola, bahihola olwʼohwenda abaatu bababone. Cʼehigira besidiha mu weeni oba hu ngalo obusaŋu omuba enyiriri jʼebyaŋandiihiwa obubbala ohuhiraho owabandi era batunga nʼamajolobera amaleeŋi hu magandula gaawe.
23.6: Benda ohwihala mu bifo ebyʼeŋono hu mbaga nomu mahumbaaniro.
23.7: Era benda abaatu ohubaheesa mu akisoni nʼohubalanga baati, ‘Musomesa.’
23.8: “Aye enywe simufugiiriranga hubalanga ‘Basomesa,’ olwohuba Musengwa wenywe ali mulala yeŋene. Enywe mwesimwesi muli baluganda.
23.9: Era simulanganga muutu yesiyesi hu hyalo muuti ‘Bbaabba’ ohulaga muuti mumuŋa eŋono, olwohuba muli ni Senywe mulala era ali mwigulu.
23.10: Era ni nenywe mwesi simufugiiriranga hubalanga ti ‘Basomesa,’ olwohuba Omusomesa wenywe ali mulala, nje Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ahunoŋola abaatu.
23.11: Omuutu ahira ohuba omuhulu mu enywe, ali nʼohuba muŋeeresa wenywe.
23.12: Ehyo kiroma olwohuba hiisi owegulumisa, balimwisa aye oyo oweyisa balimugulumisa.” Jageene Abafalisaayo, nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi (Mar 12:40; Luk 11:39-42; 20:47)
23.13: Nga Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Jibageene enywe abasomesa bʼamagambi nʼAbafalisaayo. Banafuusi nywe! Mulobera abaatu ohwingira mu buŋugi bwomwigulu. Enywe mwabeene simwingira ate ni naabo abagesyaho ohwingira mubahingirira.
23.14: Jibageene enywe, abasomesa bʼamagambi nʼAbafalisaayo. Banafuusi enywe! Munyagulula ebiitu mwahena mu mayumba ga banamwandu era mujumirya Hatonda nʼebibono ebingi olwʼohweraga. Olwʼehyo, balibaŋa ehiguudyo ehihiraho obubbala.
23.15: “Jibageene enywe abasomesa bʼamagambi nʼAbafalisaayo. Banafuusi enywe! Mutiina hiisi ŋaatu olwʼohwenda muhongerese omuutu mulala ohufuuha omuloobera wenywe. Cooka anafugiirira, afuuha munafuusi ohuhiraho ni nenywe mwabeene era hino hija humuleetera ohubonaabona mu geyeena ohuhiraho enywe emirundi ebiri.
23.16: “Jibageene enywe abatangirisi abaŋofu! Muloma muuti; ‘Hiisi alayira nʼatangiirisa Yekaalu saaba nʼomusango nʼatoherehiise ehi galayira. Aye hiisi alayira nʼatangiirisa ebiitu ebya zaabbu ebiri mu Yekaalu, ali nʼohwoheresa ehi aba nʼalayiiye.’
23.17: Baŋofu era baŋubeebe enywe, hiri ŋeena ehihira ohuba ehyʼomugaso? Ebiitu ebi babbota mu zaabbu oba Yekaalu egima byaba byabufu?
23.18: Era nindi musomesa muuti mbo; ‘Omuutu yesiyesi analayira nʼatangiirisa ehituuti, saaba nʼomusango nʼatoherehiise ehi aba nʼalayiiye. Aye omuutu yesiyesi alayira nʼatangiirisa ehirabo ehiri hu hituuti, oyo ali nʼohuhyoheresa.’
23.19: “Baŋofu enywe, ehihiraho ohuba ehyʼomugaso cʼehiri ŋeena? Hirabo oba ehituuti ehifuula ehirabo ehyo ohuba ehyawufu?
23.20: Olwʼehyo omuutu yesiyesi alayira nʼatangiirisa ehituuti, aba alayiiye hu lwʼehituuti nʼolwebirabo ebi baba ni baŋongire eyiri Hatonda.
23.21: Era hiisi alayira nʼatangiirisa Yekaalu, salayira mu siina lya Yekaalu hyoŋene aye aba alayiiye nomu siina lya Hatonda ayiihalamo.
23.22: Era omuutu alayira nʼatangirisa egulu, aba salayira mu siina lyʼetebe ya Hatonda eyʼobuŋugi hyoŋene aye nomu siina lyʼoyo ayiihalaho.”
23.23: “Jibageene enywe abasomesa bʼamagambi nʼAbafalisaayo. Banafuusi enywe! Muŋa ehirala ehyʼehumi nʼohubirime ebisemberayo erala obutotono ebi mutambisa ohuŋomya ebyohulya aye mwebirira muuti ohusala emisango ni mutehubbira nʼowesigwa nʼohwenda Hatonda njʼebihira ohuba ebyʼomugaso. Muhole byosibyosi ni ŋaŋuma hulehayo ebindi.
23.24: Enywe abatangirisi abaŋofu, muta bugali esira huhugondera ohuhola ebiitu ebitali byʼamaani, nga mulagajalira ebiitu ebibbala mu magambi ga Hatonda aye ebyo mubihola ni mutamanyire!
23.25: “Jibageene enywe abasomesa bʼamagambi nʼAbafalisaayo. Banafuusi enywe! Muli hyʼabaatu aboosa hu mugulu wʼebihopo nʼembya aye mugati ni mwijuuye obucaafu. Mwesi mu myoyo jenywe mwijuuye ebibi.
23.26: Omufalisaayo omuŋofu ewe, sooka woose ehihopo nʼolubya mugati ko bibonehe hu mugulu hwosi ni biri biŋoono.
23.27: “Jibageene enywe abasomesa bʼamagambi nʼAbafalisaayo. Banafuusi enywe! Muli hyʼamagombe agabaŋahaho erangi ehosa nga gaboneha maŋoono hu mugulu aye mugati ni mwijuuye magumba gʼomufu nʼebiitu ebitali bigwalaafu!
23.28: Mu ngeri njʼenyene, eyiri abaatu muboneha hyʼabaatu abahola ebiruŋamu aye mugati mula mwijuuye obunafuusi nʼobubi. Ehibonereso hyabwe (Luk 11:47-51)
23.29: “Jibageene enywe abasomesa bʼamagambi nʼAbafalisaayo. Banafuusi enywe! Mudabirisa amagombe gʼabanaabbi era mudabirisa nʼagabaatu abaali abagwalaafu.
23.30: Nga muhena muloma muuti; ‘Singa hwaliŋo mu mirembe jʼabasehulu beefe, hani sihwabeŋimbaho ohwita abanaabbi.’
23.31: Olwʼebyo muli bajulizi, enywe mwabeene muŋa obuhahafu muuti muli bejuhulu baabo abeeta abanaabbi olwohuba muli hya nibo.
23.32: Muheneerese ohuhola ebibi ebi basehulu benywe batandiihirisa.
23.33: “Enywe abaatu abahabi hyʼetemu! Muliŋunuha muutye omusango ogwʼohubadanya mu geyeena?
23.34: Olwʼehyo, nja hubatumira abanaabbi nʼabasinde abagesi nʼabasomesa. Balala hu bo muja hubeeta abandi mubahomerere hu musalabba, abandi mubahubbire mu mahumbaaniro genywe nʼabandi mulibaŋiima mu hiisi hibuga mubaŋambe.
23.35: Ehyo cʼehigira balisalira abaatu bʼomulembe guno omusango olwʼohwita abanaabbi bosibosi ohuŋwera erala hu hutonda hwʼehyalo ohwola hatyane. Ohuŋwa ngʼolu beeta Abbiri omugwalaafu ohwola hu Zakaliya omusaani wa Bbalakiya oyu beetira ŋagati wʼehituuti nʼehifo ehigwalaafu mu Yekaalu.
23.36: Mbalomera ehituufu ti; ebyo byosibyosi birigira baasalira abaatu abʼomulembe guno omusango.” Yesu alumirwa abaatu bomu Yerusaalemu (Luk 13:34-35)
23.37: Nga Yesu geyongera abaloma ati, “Enywe abaatu bomu Yerusaalemu! Enywe abaatu bomu Yerusaalemu! Mweta abanaabbi era mwahubba aba babatumira amabaale! Efunda nyingi nendire ohubahumbaania hyʼengoho ngʼolu ehumbaania owaana bwayo aye ni mutafugiirira.
23.38: Mu butuufu oweene mbalomera ti Yekaalu yenywe yija hufuuha magunda.
23.39: Era simulimbona nindi ohwola olu ndigobola nga mundoma muuti, ‘Ali nʼekabi oyo owuujira mu buŋangi wa Hatonda Musengwa.’ ”

24.1: Oluvanyuma lwʼebyo, Yesu gaŋwa hu Yekaalu era ni gaali nʼatiina, abeegi babe beegerera aŋa gaali bamulaga ngʼolu bayitongola nʼebyamaŋoono.
24.2: Nga Yesu ababuusa ati, “Mubona ebizimbe ebyo byosibyosi? Mbalomera ehituufu ti, biribulunguha era siŋalibaŋo ebaale wayire erala eririsigala ni liri hu lyahye. Gosigosi baligatepulula gaagwa ŋaasi.”
24.3: Yesu nʼabeegi babe ni baali ni beyebire, ni gehaaye ni nabo hu lusozi olwʼemisaala Emizayiti, nga bamubuusa baati, “Tulomereho, ebyo biribaaŋo ŋaali? Habonero hi ahaliraga haati oli huupi hugobola era nʼekomerero yʼehyalo yoolire?”
24.4: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abaloma ati, “Mwehuume ŋatabaŋo abadulingadulinga.
24.5: Hiri hiityo olwohuba bangi baliija ni beranga ohutambisa obuŋangi wange era ni baloma baati, ‘Ndiise Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu’ era balidulinga bangi.
24.6: Era ni muŋuliranga etalo ŋano ni naŋala, simutyanga. Ebyo biri nʼohubaŋo aye ekomerero yiriba yihiiri hwola.
24.7: Amawanga galihubbana nʼowahabaha buliwaagala owahabaha obundi. Enjala erigwa hu hyalo ni musisi alitengesya ebitundu bingi hu hyalo.
24.9: “Balibaŋamba babaŋaayo ohubaboneresa bahene babeete. Era abaatu bosibosi balibacaawa olwohuba muli baloobera bange.
24.10: Mu hiseera ehyo bangi baliŋwa mu hufugiirira, baliryaŋanamo ekwe era bacaawagana.
24.11: Abanaabbi abʼobudulingi baliija era balidulinga bangi.
24.12: Era olwohuba ohuhola ebibi hulyeyongera bugali, bangi sibaja hwenda bahyawe.
24.13: Aye oyo aligumira ebigosi ohwola hu komerero, alinoŋoha.
24.14: Ko ŋatabaŋo ehyohweŋambya, Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu buŋugi wa Hatonda gaja hubuulirwa mu hyalo hyosihyosi eyiri abaatu bosibosi ko ekomerero yoole.” Ehiitu ehyʼembiho ehi benyinyalya (Mar 13:14-23; Luk 21:20-24)
24.15: Nga Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Ni mulibona ehiitu ehyʼembiho ehyenyinyasya, ehi naabbi Daniyeri galomaho ni bahitaaye mu hifo ehyawufu (asoma bino ategeere),
24.16: abaliba mu Buyudaaya, badulumiranga mu bitehere ebyʼobusozi.
24.17: Aliba ŋamugulu hu nyumba yiye nʼaninuhanga, sigengiranga mu nyumba ohutusamo ehiitu hyosihyosi ehyʼohutiina ni nahyo.
24.18: Era aliba hu muga, saagobolanga yingo hwiruhira ebyambalo bibye.
24.19: Mu ndaalo ejo abahasi abaliba ebida nʼabookesa njʼabalisinga ohubonaabona.
24.20: Musabe, bino bitabaŋo mu biseera ebyʼefula nʼobuŋololohi obungi oba hulwa Sabbaato.
24.21: Hiri hiityo olwohuba mu ndaalo ejo ŋalibaaŋo ohubonaabona ohwʼamaani, ni huhira hwosihwosi ohwali ni hubaayeŋo ohuŋwera erala hu hutonda hwʼehyalo nohwola hatyane. Era siŋalibaŋo hubonaabona ohuli hyʼohwo.
24.22: Era singa Hatonda Musengwa sigahendeesa hu ndaalo ejo ejʼohubonaabona, siŋahaŋonireho muutu kadi mulala. Aye olwʼabo abagatobolamo, endaalo ejo gajipiŋia.
24.23: Mu biseera ebyo, omuutu nʼalibaloma ati, ‘Bona! Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu njʼono ŋano,’ oba ati, ‘Bona! Njʼola ŋala,’ simufugiiriranga.
24.24: Hiri hiityo olwohuba bangi balidulinga ni beranga Kurisito, oba ni beranga abanaabbi era balihola obubonero owʼamaani nʼebyamaliholiho ebyeŋunjisa, ni hiba ni hiŋangiha babbaamye nʼabatobole ba Hatonda.
24.25: Aye enywe mbalabuuye ebyo ni bihiiri hubaaŋo. Kale mubeŋo ni muhimanyire era ni mwetegehire!
24.26: “Olwʼehyo singa omuutu yesiyesi abaloma ati, ‘Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu ali mu lulafu,’ simutiinangayo; oba ati, ‘Ali mu nyumba,’ simufugiiriranga.
24.27: Hiri hiityo olwohuba ohuuja hwʼOmwana wʼOmuutu huliba hyʼohumesya hwʼefula ohuhosya egulu ohuŋwa ebuŋwalyuba ohwola ebugwalyuba.
24.28: Ngʼolu hiri ti aŋaba ehifu paŋa esega jihumbaanira hiisi muutu gajibona, nʼohuuja hwʼOmwana wʼOmuutu huutyo po huliba.” Amagobola gʼOmwana wʼOmuutu (Mar 13:24-27; Luk 21:25-28)
24.29: Ngʼaŋo Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Oluvanyuma lwʼebiseera ebyo ebyʼohubonaabona, “ ‘eryuba liribaaho ehiirema, nʼomwesi gulisima. Emunyeenye jiriŋanuha ŋamugulu jakukumuha, nʼebiri ŋamugulu mu bbanga biritetema.’
24.30: “Mu hiseera ehyo ahabonero ahalaga ohuuja hwʼOmwana wʼOmuutu haliboneha hwigulu, abaatu bosibosi hu hyalo balinianguha. Era balibona Omwana wʼOmuutu ni gaajira hu hireri nʼobuŋangi nʼeŋono eryʼamaani.
24.31: Era alituma abamalayika babe nʼamagwala agafuga nʼamaani ohutiina mu njuyi josijosi ejʼehyalo, bahumbaanie abaatu babe abatobole ohuŋwa mu hiisi sonda yʼehyalo.” Omusaala omutiini ngʼehyohuboneraho (Mar 13:28-31; Luk 21:29-33)
24.32: Nga Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Mubonere hu musaala omutiini muhene mwege. Amasaga gʼomusaala ogwo ni guhena ohukukumusa gusebuhaho amahoose amanyenyeeri, ngʼomanya oti ebiro ebyʼendobooli binaatere ohwola.
24.33: Mu ngeri njʼenyene, ni mubonanga ebindomireho byosibyosi ni biriŋo, mumanyanga muuti ekomerero yinatere ohwola.
24.34: Mbalomera ehituufu ti ebiitu bino byosibyosi binahabeeŋo abaatu abʼomulembe guno ni bataŋwaŋo hufa.
24.35: Ehyalo hino nʼebiri ŋamugulu mu bbanga biriŋwaŋo aye ebibono byange sibirigwa ŋaasi.” Ŋabula amanyire oludaalo wayire esaawa (Mar 13:32-37; Luk 17:26-30)
24.36: Nga Yesu geyongera abaloma ati, “Cooka ŋaŋuma amanyire oludaalo olwene oba esaawa eyi biitu ebyo biribeeraŋo, nʼabamalayika mwigulu oba Omwana wa Hatonda sibamanyire ohutusaho Bbaabba yeŋene njʼamanyire.
24.37: Ngʼolu hyali mu mulembe gwa Nuwa, pohiriba hiityo nʼohuuja hwʼOmwana wʼOmuutu.
24.38: Mu hiseera ehyo, abaatu baali balya ni banywa ni bahwa era ni bafumbirwa ohwola hu ludaalo olu Nuwa gengira mu lyato
24.39: era baali sibamanyire ehija hubaŋo ohwola olu mataba gasihiirisa abaatu bosibosi. Nʼohugobola hwʼOmwana wʼOmuutu huliba huutyo.
24.40: Abaatu babiri baliba mu ndimiro, baliŋiraho mulala baleha owundi.
24.41: Abahasi babiri baliba ŋalala ni basa, baliŋiraho mulala nga baleha owundi.
24.42: “Olwʼehyo mubeŋo moni ni mwetegehire, olwohuba simumanyire ludaalo olu Musengwa yenywe aligobola.
24.43: Aye muhimanye muuti singa omwene amago amanya esaawa ejʼowiire eji omwibi anajiremo, saamuleha hubbwaga nyumba yiye ohumunyaga ebiitu bibye.
24.44: Mwesi mwetegehe olwohuba Omwana wʼOmuutu alijiira mu hiseera ehi mutamusuubiriramo.” Abeedu abetegehera ohugobola hwa musengwa yaawe (Luk 12:41-48)
24.45: Nga Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Ŋaahani njʼani omuŋeeresa omwesigwa era owʼamagesi? Njʼoyo oyu musengwawe gataŋo ohutangirira abahye era gabaŋa ebiryo byawe mu hiseera ehituufu.
24.46: Gesiimire omuŋeeresa oyu musengwawe alyagaana nʼahola atyo.
24.47: Mbalomera ehituufu ti musengwawe alimuŋa ohuhulira ebiitu bibye byosibyosi.
24.48: “Aye omuŋeeresa oyo anaba naali mubi, aloma mu mwoyo gugwe ati, ‘Musengwa yange anahalwe ohugobola,’
24.49: ngʼatandiha ohuhubba abahye era gaaba hu hulya nʼohunywera ŋalala nʼabameesi.
24.50: Musengwa wʼomuŋeeresa oyo aligobola hu ludaalo olu atamusuubiriraho nomu saawa eyi atamanyire.
24.51: Era musengwawe oyo alimugudya ebyembaha ebyene ngʼahena amubalira ŋalala nʼabanafuusi. Eyo peyi aliba mu hweninala nʼohulira amangi olwʼobulumi.”

25.1: Ngʼaŋo Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Mu hiseera ehyo ehi Omwana wʼOmuutu aligoboleramo, obuŋugi womwigulu huŋanga ohubugeragerania hu abahaana ehumi abataŋenyuhangaho nʼomusinde, abaatiina nʼetaala jaawe ohusangaalira omugole omusinde.
25.2: Hu bahaana abo ehumi, abataanu baali baŋubeebe aye abataanu baali bagesi.
25.3: Abaŋubeebe batiina nʼetaala jaawe aye sibagega mafuta mu cupa ohwerindisa.
25.4: Abagesi nibo batiina nʼetaala jaawe ko nʼamafuta mu cupa.
25.5: Omugole ni galwaŋo ohwola, bosibosi batandiiha ohuŋongera nga baŋenyuha.
25.6: “Ŋagati mu wiire ŋaaliŋo omuutu owalangirira ati, ‘Omugole njʼono goolire, mutule mumusangaalire.’
25.7: Ngʼaŋo abahaana abo ehumi benyoha, bahosiira etambi jʼetaala jaawe.
25.8: Ngʼabaŋubeebe baloma abahyawe abagesi baati, ‘Mutuŋeho hu mafuta genywe, olwohuba etaala jeefe jenda husima.’
25.9: Ngʼabahaana bala abagesi babagobolamo baati, ‘Siganatuhene hwesihwesi ohutusaho mutiine eyi bagatunda, mwegulireyo.’
25.10: “Aye abaŋubeebe ni baali ni bahiiri mu ngira ni batiina ohugula amafuta gʼetaala, ngʼomugole goola. Abahaana bala abaali ni betegehire, nga bengira nʼomugole mu nyumba omubategehera embaga. Ni bahena ohwingira, ngʼabaŋeeresa begalaŋo olwigi.
25.11: “Oluvanyuma, ngʼabahaana bala abaŋubeebe boosi boola, ngʼabalanga baati, ‘Muhulu, muhulu, twigulireŋo.’
25.12: Aye omugole omusinde ngʼabagobolamo ati, ‘Mbalomera ehituufu ti simbamanyire.’ ”
25.13: Nga Yesu agohoba ati, “Olwʼehyo, mubeŋo moni olwohuba simumanyire ludaalo oba esaawa eji Omwana wʼOmuutu aligoboleramo.” Olugero oluŋamba hu beedu abadatu (Luk 19:11-27)
25.14: Nga nindi Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Mu hiseera ehyʼohugobola hwʼOmwana wʼOmuutu, obuŋugi bwomwigulu huŋanga ohubugeragerania hu muutu owaali nʼolugendo, ngʼalanga abeedu babe abalehera ebiitu bibye babirabirire.
25.15: Ngʼalehera mulala hu bo ebbeesa ejibalanga baati etalanta etaanu, owundi ebiri, nʼowundi ndala. Hiisi mwidu bamuŋa etalanta ni bema hu busobozi buwe. Omuutu oyo ni gahena ohubaŋa etalanta ejo, ngʼatiina mu lugendo.
25.16: Aŋo ni naaŋo, oyo owaasuna etalanta ataanu, gaatiina ngʼajisubuulamo, nga jisaala etalanta ejindi etaanu.
25.17: Ni nooyo owasuna etalanta ebiri, gaahola atyo ngʼasaasamo etalanta ejindi ebiri.
25.18: Aye oyo owasuna etalanta ndala, gatiina gayaba eroŋo ngʼahwehamo etalanta eya musengwawe eyo.
25.19: “Oluvanyuma lwʼehiseera ehireeŋi, musengwa yʼabeedu abo gagobola, ngʼabaloma bamulomere ebiŋamba hu ebbeesa jije eji gabaŋa.
25.20: Ngʼomwidu owasuna etalanta etaanu, atiina aleeta etalanta ejindi etaanu ngʼamuloma ati, ‘Muhulu, waapa etalanta etaanu. Bona, nasaasamo ejindi etaanu nje jino.’
25.21: Nga musengwawe amuloma ati, ‘Webale bugali weene, oli mwidu mulaŋi era mwesigwa. Ngʼolu obaaye mwesigwa hu biitu ebidiidiri, nja huhuŋa obuvunanyiziwa hu biitu bingi. Yingira husaŋalihisye ŋalala.’
25.22: Ngʼola owaasuna etalanta ebiri yeesi gaaja, ngʼaloma ati, ‘Muhulu, waapa etalanta ebiri. Bona, nasaasamo etalanta ejindi ebiri.’
25.23: Nga musengwawe amuloma ati, ‘Webale bugali weene, oli mwidu mulaŋi era mwesigwa. Ngʼolu obaaye mwesigwa hu biitu ebidiidiri, nja huhuŋa obuvunanyiziwa hu biitu ebingi. Yingira husaŋalihisye ŋalala.’
25.24: Aye owohudatu owasuna etalanta ndala ni gaaja gamuloma ati, ‘Muhulu, namanya ti oli mugosi, ogesa aŋa otamwa era oŋira nʼehitali hihyo.
25.25: Olwʼehyo natya, ngʼatiina kweha etalanta yiyo mwiroba era nje yino, enyene nʼenyene.’
25.26: “Nga musengwawe amugobolamo ati, ‘Mwidu ewe omusirusiru era omudoto! Obanga omanyire oti pira ehitali hyange era ngesa nʼaŋa tamwa,
25.27: lwahiina ebbeesa eji nahuŋa siwajiŋola abasubuuzi ni nahagobooye samwene najitusayo ni jikoleeye amagoba?’
25.28: Ngʼaŋo musengwawe aloma balala hu beedu ati, ‘Mumutuseho nʼetalanta eyo, muyiŋe oyo ali nʼehumi.
25.29: Hiisi ali nʼebingi balimumeedaho ebindi aye oyo aŋuma balimutusaaho nʼahadiidiri aho aha ali ni naho.
25.30: Omwidu oyo aŋuma mugaso, mumudanye ebulafu mu hiirema, eyi aliba ni geninala era nʼalira amangi olwʼobulumi.’ ” Etaama nʼembusi
25.31: Nga Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Omwana wʼOmuutu nʼaliija mu ŋono lirye nʼabamalayika bosibosi, aliihala hu tebe yiye eyʼeŋono.
25.32: Hu olwo abaatu bosibosi balihumbaana mu moni jije. Ngʼababulamo ngʼolu omwayi gabula etaama mu mbusi.
25.33: Alyabula etaama jaaba hu muhono omulungi, embusi hu mugooda.
25.34: “Habaha aliroma abo abali hu muhono gugwe omulungi ati, ‘Enywe aba Bbaabba gaŋa ekabi, muuje mube mu bulamu obu babategeehera ohuŋwa olu batonda ehyalo.
25.35: Ehyo kiroma olwohuba enjala ni yaali ni yinduma, mwapa ehyohulya era enduŋo ni yaali ni yinduma, mwapa ehyʼohunywa. Era ni naali mugeni, mwasangaalira.
25.36: Ni naali ni puma hyambalo, mwanyambasa. Ni naali mulwaye, mwandabirira. Era ni naali mu komera, mwaja mwambonaho.’
25.37: “Ne abaatu abo abagwalaafu balimugobolamo baati, ‘Musengwa, hwahubona ŋaali enjala nʼehuluma hwahuŋa ehyohulya oba enduŋo nʼehuluma hwahuŋa ehyʼohunywa?
25.38: Era hwahubona ŋaali nʼoli mugeni, hwahusangaalira oba nʼoŋuma hyambalo hwahwambasa?
25.39: Era hwahubona ŋaali nʼoli mulwaye, oba nʼoli mu komera, hwaja hwahubona?’
25.40: “Habaha alibagobolamo ati, ‘Mbalomera ehituufu ti; hiisi ehiitu ehi mwaholera mulala hu balebe bange bano ababatala, mwahiholera ndiise.’
25.41: “Aye aliroma abo abali hu muhono gugwe omugooda ati, ‘Mupwe mu moni, enywe aba Hatonda gaŋwaba! Mutiine mu muliro ogutasima emirembe nʼemirembe ogubategehera Sitaani nʼabamalayika babe.
25.42: Naali njala ne simwapa hyʼohulya era enduŋo yanduma, ne simwapa hyʼohunywa.
