25.43: Ni naali mugeni, simwasangaalira mu mago genywe, ni naali ni puma hyahwambala simwanyambasa, ni naali mulwaye simwafaaho era ni naali mu komera simwandabirira.’
25.44: “Boosi balimugobolamo baati, ‘Musengwa, hwahubona ŋaali nʼoli enjala oba enduŋo nʼehuluma, oba nʼoli mugeni oba nʼoŋuma hyambalo oba nʼoli mulwaye oba nʼoli mu komera aye sihuhuyeeda?’
25.45: Alibagobolamo ati, ‘Mbalomera ehituufu ti; hiisi olu mwagaananga ohuyeeda mulala hu abo ababatala, mwagaananga huyeeda ndiise.’
25.46: “Balibaŋindiha eyi baligadira emirembe nʼemirembe. Aye abagwalaafu nibo balitiina mu bulamu obutaŋwaŋo.”

26.1: Yesu ni gahena ohuloma ebibono ebyo byosibyosi, ngʼaloma abeegi babe ati,
26.2: “Ngʼolu mumanyire esigayeeyo endaalo ebiri, Embaga eyʼohuhebuliriraho Ohubihisya yoole. Era baja huŋaayo Omwana wʼOmuutu, bamuhomerere.”
26.3: Ngʼaŋo abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga, bahumbaanira ewa Kayaafa omuhulu wʼabasengi ba Hatonda,
26.4: era nga basala amagesi agʼohuŋamba Yesu mu ngiso, bamwite.
26.5: Nga baloma baati, “Aye ehyo hutahihola mu biseera ebyʼEmbaga, olwohuba abaatu bahanda batabuha.” Omuhasi ajuha amafuta agʼebbeeyi hu Yesu (Mar 14:3-9; Yow 12:1-8)
26.6: Mu hiseera ehyo Yesu ni gaali mu habuga hʼe Bbesaniya mu nyumba ya Simooni owaali omugenge,
26.7: nga ŋabaaŋo omuhasi owatiinayo nʼecupa eyʼamafuta amalaŋi agaŋunya ahaloosa era agʼebbeeyi, ngʼagajuha hu mutwe gwa Yesu.
26.8: Abeegi ni baabona ehyo, basunguŋala, nga bebuusa baati, “Lwahiina gonoonire amafuta ago atyo?
26.9: Bahagatundire mwaŋwamo ebbeesa enyene enyingi, nga bajigabira abagadi.”
26.10: Yesu ni gategeera ehi baali ni baŋeega, ngʼabaloma ati, “Lwahiina mwoloobya omuhasi ono? Ehi gakoleeye hiraŋi.
26.11: Abagadi banabenga ni nenywe habuhyabuhya aye ese sinja huba ni nenywe ehiseera hyosihyosi.
26.12: Nʼajuhire amafuta agahaloosa hu mubiri gwange, ahiholire nʼagutegeha olwʼohugusiiha.
26.13: Mbalomera ehituufu ti hiisi ŋaatu mu hyalo hyosihyosi eyi banabuulirenga Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi, ni nahino ehi omuhasi ono aholire banahiromengaho nga bamuhebulira.” Yuda afugiirira ohulya mu Yesu oluhwe (Mar 14:10-11; Luk 22:3-6)
26.14: Ngʼaŋo mulala hu beegi babe ehumi nʼababiri oyu balanganga baati Yuda Yisikaryoti, atiina eyiri abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda,
26.15: ababuusa ati, “Munaape hiina singa mbayeeda ohumuŋamba?” Olwʼehyo bala bamubalira endusu jʼefeeza amahumi adatu ngʼabamuŋa.
26.16: Ohuŋwa hulwo nga Yuda atandiha ohwendula ahamanga ahohuŋayo Yesu eyi bali. Yesu alya nʼabeegi babe Embaga eyʼOhubihisya (Mar 14:12-21; Luk 22:7-13; Yow 13:21-30)
26.17: Hu ludaalo oludaayi mu ndaalo jʼEmbaga Eyi Baliiraho Emigaati Ejibatataayemo Ehisimbulusa, abeegi baatiina aŋa Yesu gaali bamubuusa baati, “Wenda huje hutegehere ŋeena eyi onaliire Embaga eyʼOhuhebuliriraho Ohubihisya?”
26.18: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Mutiine mu hibuga munagaane omuutu wange oyo oyu mumanyire mumulome muuti Omusomesa alomire ati, ‘Ehiseera hyange ehiragaane hinaatere ohwola. Kale ese ŋalala nʼabeegi bange, naliire yiwuwo Embaga eyʼOhuhebuliriraho Ohubihisya.’ ”
26.19: Ngʼaŋo abeegi bahola ngʼolu Yesu gabaloma era nga bategeha Embaga eyʼOhuhebuliriraho Ohubihisya.
26.20: Owiire ni wiira, nga Yesu nʼabeegi babe ehumi nʼababiri beehala ohulya.
26.21: Era ni baali ni balya, nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu ti, mulala hu enywe anandyemo oluhwe.”
26.22: Ehyo hyanakuŋasa bugali abeegi babe era nga hiisi mulala abuusa Yesu ati, “Musengwa, ndiise?”
26.23: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Anandyemo oluhwe njʼoyo ali hutonga ni neese mu lubya.
26.24: Omwana wʼOmuutu baja humwita ngʼolu Ebyaŋandihiwa bimulomaho. Aye jimwageene oyo amulyamo oluhwe! Hyahamubereeye hiraŋi singa sibamusaala!”
26.25: Ngʼaŋo Yuda owaali nʼanalye mu Yesu oluhwe amuloma ati, “Musomesa, ndiise?” Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Ndiiwe.” Ehiŋulo hya Musengwa weefe (Mar 14:22-26; Luk 22:14-20; 1 Kor 11:23-25)
26.26: Ni baali ni bahiirya nga Yesu abugula omugaati geyaasa Hatonda, ngʼagubbongolamo aguŋa abeegi babe abaloma ati, “Munaaŋe mulye, guno njʼomubiri gwange.”
26.27: Ngʼaŋo abugula ehihopo hyʼenvinyo ni gahena ohweyaasa Hatonda, ngʼabaŋa nʼaloma ati, “Mwesimwesi muhinyweho,
26.28: gano njʼamafugi gange aganahoŋohe hu lwʼabangi olwʼohubasoniŋa ebibi ni gahahasa endagaano epyaha eyi Hatonda ali huhola nʼabaatu babe.
26.29: Mbalomera ti sinja hunywa hu nvinyo yʼemizabbibbu ohwola olu ndinywa epyaha ni nenywe, mu buŋugi wa Bbaabba.”
26.30: Ni bahena ohwemba olwembo olwʼohujumirya Hatonda, nga batula batiina hu lusozi olwʼemisaala Emizayiti. Yesu aloma ati Peetero anamwegaane (Mar 14:27-31; Luk 22:31-34; Yow 13:36-38)
26.31: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Mwesimwesi munadulume mwandehaŋo mu hiire ehyene hino olwʼebinaabe ni binjolireho, olwohuba hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti; “ ‘Naheete omwayi, ngʼetaama jisalaaniha.’
26.32: “Aye oluvanyuma lwʼohulamuha, ndibeheerera ohutiina e Galilaaya.”
26.33: Ngʼaŋo Peetero amuloma ati, “Wayire abandi bosibosi banadulume bahulehaŋo, ese sinahuleheŋo.”
26.34: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Kulomera ehituufu ti mu hiire ehyene hino, engoho yinaabe yitaholyoha, ni wahanegaanira emirundi edatu.”
26.35: Aye Peetero nga muloma ati, “Wayire hunaabe hufiira ŋalala ni neewe, sinahwegaane.” Era nʼabahye bosibosi nga baloma cʼehyene. Yesu mu Gesesimane (Mar 14:32-42; Luk 22:39-46)
26.36: Ngʼaŋo Yesu nʼabeegi babe boola mu hifo ehi balanga baati Gasesimane. Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Muhole ni mwihala ŋano, ese nesendeho ŋala nombe Hatonda.”
26.37: Ngʼatiina ni Peetero nʼabasaani ba Zebbedaayo bombi era ngʼatandiha ohutya nʼohweŋendeherera bugali.
26.38: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Omwoyo gwange gwijuuye enaku eyoola nʼohunjita! Musigale ŋano ni muliŋo moni, mutaŋenyuha.”
26.39: Ni geeyongerayo ŋatono mu moni nga geyala hwiroba gegayirira Hatonda ati, “Bbaabba, ni hiba ni hiŋangiha, ponie esaawa yino eyʼohubonaabona! Aye ewe ehi wenda cʼehiba ni hiholebwa, sosi ehi ese nenda.”
26.40: Ngʼaŋo agobola eyiri abeegi babe, ngʼabagaana ni baŋenyuha ngʼaloma Peetero ati, “Ndimusobola hubaŋo moni ni neese wayire ohuhena esaawa ndala?
26.41: Mutaŋenyuha, mubeŋo moni ni musaba ko mutahemewa, mu butuufu emyoyo jenywe miheneerefu aye emibiri minafu.”
26.42: Ngʼatiina nindi efunda eyohubiri asaba ati, “Bbaabba, ni hiba ni hinjetagisa ohubita mu hubonaabona huno, kale ehi wenda hiholewe.”
26.43: Ni gagobola nga nindi abagaana ni baŋenyuha olwohuba emoni jaawe jaali jijuuye ero.
26.44: Olwʼehyo gabaleha, nindi ngʼatiina omulundi ogwohudatu asaba nʼaloma cʼehyene.
26.45: Ngʼaŋo gaagama eyiri abeegi abaloma ati, “Muhiŋenyuha era muhiŋuumula? Esaawa eyʼohuŋayo Omwana wʼOmuutu mu buŋangi wʼababbengi yoolire.
26.46: Mwinyohe hutiine. Bona! Obundyamo oluhwe njʼoyo gaaja.” Baŋamba Yesu (Mar 14:43-50; Luk 22:47-53; Yow 18:3-12)
26.47: Yesu ni gaali nahiiroma, nga Yuda mulala hu beegi babe ehumi nʼababiri, goola nʼehiŋindi hyʼabaatu abaali ni baŋambire epiima nʼesimbo. Abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga baali babatumire ohumuŋamba.
26.48: Oyo owalya mu Yesu oluhwe gaali ahenire ohubaloma ati, “Oyu naagwe mu hifuba anaabe nje niye, mumuŋambe.”
26.49: Yuda ni goola, ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo atiina aŋali Yesu, amuheesa ati, “Musomesa, oli otye!” Ngʼahena amugwa mu hifuba.
26.50: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Wange, hola ehihuleetereeye.” Nga bafuhumira Yesu, nga bamujasa.
26.51: Mulala hu abo abaali ni Yesu gasoŋolayo epiima, ngʼatema omwidu wʼomuhulu wʼabasengi ba Hatonda amuhapulaho ohutwi.
26.52: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Yagamyayo epiima yiyo aŋa yibaaye olwohuba abo bosibosi abaŋamba epiima, balifa piima.
26.53: Oŋeega oti sipanga husunga Bbaabba gapeeresa ebibinja byʼamaje gʼabamalayika ebituuma ehumi nabibiri basoolera?
26.54: Ne singa kihola, Ebyaŋandihiwa ebiroma biiti hino njʼehiri nʼohunjolaho, binolerere biitye?”
26.55: Mu hiseera ehyo, nga Yesu ababuusa ati, “Mujire ohupamba ni muli nʼepiima nʼemibbera hyʼabajiriiye omuyekera? Hiisi ludaalo mbaayenga nihala mu lunya lwa Yekaalu ni somesa, ni mutapamba.
26.56: Aye hino muhiholire, ohwoheresa ebi banaabbi baŋandiiha.” Ngʼaŋo abeegi babe bosibosi baduluma, bamulehaŋo. Bemeha Yesu mu moni jʼOluhiiho lwʼAbayudaaya (Mar 14:53-65; Luk 22:54-55,63-71; Yow 18:13-14,19-24)
26.57: Abo abaŋamba Yesu, bamuŋira ewa Kayaafa omuhulu wʼabasengi ba Hatonda, eyi basomesa bʼamagambi nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga bahumbaanira.
26.58: Aye Peetero galonda hu Yesu ni gesambireho ahanaaŋiro era gatiina ohwolera erala mu lunya lwʼomuhulu wʼabasengi. Ni goola, nga gengira mu lunya gehala nʼabahuumi ba Yekaalu ohubona ebinabeŋo.
26.59: Abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼAboluhiiho lwʼAbayudaaya Olubbala baali muhwendula obujulizi owʼobudulingi obu baneemeho ohwita Yesu.
26.60: Aye babuhaya wayire ŋaaliŋo bangi abatiina baŋa obujulizi owobudulingi. Oluvanyuma abaatu babiri beŋayo batiina ohuŋa obujulizi,
26.61: nga baloma baati, “Ono gaaloma mbo asobola ohubbwagaŋo Yekaalu ya Hatonda gahena gayitongola mu ndaalo edatu.”
26.62: Ngʼaŋo omuhulu wʼabasengi ba Hatonda gemeerera, abuusa Yesu ati, “Obula ehi ogobolamo? Hiina ehi oloma hu bino ebi bahulumiirisa?”
26.63: Aye Yesu gaŋoleera huŋoleera. Ngʼomuhulu wʼabasengi amuloma ati, “Mu mazima ga Hatonda Omwene Bulamu: tulomere hanye ndiiwe Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu, Omwana wa Hatonda.”
26.64: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Ngʼolu oloma olwo. Era mbaloma ti mulibona Omwana wʼOmuutu ni gehaaye hu lubega olwʼomuhono omulungi ogwa Hatonda Omwene Buŋangi era mulimubona ni gaajira hu bireri ebyomwigulu.”
26.65: Ngʼaŋo omuhulu wʼabasengi ahanula eganduula yiye mu busungu aloma ati, “Afodogooye! Hwendera hi obujulizi obundi. Bahyange, muŋuliiye nʼamatwi genywe mwabeene ebibono ebifodogola.
26.66: Muŋeega muutye?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Aŋomera hufa.”
26.67: Ngʼaŋo bamufuujaho agate mu moni era nga bamuhubba epuusi, nʼabandi bamuhubba amaŋi
26.68: ni bamuloma baati, “Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu, tulomere njʼani ahuhubbire?” Peetero gegaana Yesu (Mar 14:66-72; Luk 22:56-62; Yow 18:15-18,25-27)
26.69: Ŋaahani Peetero ni gaali ni gehaaye ebulafu mu lunya, nga ŋabaaŋo omuhaana owaŋeeresanga ewomuhulu wʼabasengi ba Hatonda owatiina aŋa gaali ngʼamuloma ati, “Ewe weesi oli muloobera wa Yesu Omugalilaaya.”
26.70: Aye Peetero gegaana mu moni jaawe bosibosi ati, “Simanyire ehi oloma.”
26.71: Ngʼaŋo Peetero genyohaŋo atiina ŋa mulyango, aŋa omuhaana omwidu owundi gamubonera, ngʼaloma abaatu abaali aŋo ati, “Omusinde ono yeesi abaaye ni Yesu Omunazaleesi.”
26.72: Nga Peetero nindi gegaana nʼalayira ati, “Mu mazima, omusinde oyo simumanyire.”
26.73: Ni ŋabitaŋo ahaseera hatotono, abaali ni bemereeye aŋo nga besenda aŋa Peetero gaali bamuloma baati, “Hituufu oli mulala hu baloobera ba Yesu, olwohuba engeri eyi olomamo yihuloopa yiiti oli Mugalilaaya.”
26.74: Ngʼaŋo Peetero atandiha ohulayira ati, “Mu mazima, ese simanyire omusinde oyo.” Ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo engoho yiholyoha.
26.75: Nga Peetero ahebulira ebi Yesu gaali nʼamulomire ati, “Engoho yinaabe yitaholyoha, ni wuneganiiye emirundi edatu.” Ngʼaŋo Peetero atula ebulafu, atemuha alira bugali weene.

27.1: Ni wahya mu mugamba, abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda bosibosi nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga bateesa nga basalaŋo ohwita Yesu.
27.2: Ngʼaŋo bamusidiha emihono bamuŋira bamuŋaayo eyiri Pilaato owaali gavana Omurooma mu hiseera ehyo. Ohufa hwa Yuda (Bik 1:18-19)
27.3: Yuda owalya mu Yesu oluhwe ni gabona ni basaliiye Yesu ogwʼohufa, gehebulisa ngʼagobohesa abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga endusu jʼefeeza amahumi adatu eji baali ni bamuŋaaye,
27.4: ngʼabaloma ati, “Nonoonire ohulya oluhwe mu muutu aŋuma musango!” Aye nibo nga bamugobolamo baati, “Ebyo bibyo, sihituŋambaho.”
27.5: Nga Yuda adanya ebbeesa ejomu Yekaalu ngʼatula atiina geetuga.
27.6: Ngʼaŋo abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda bangala ebbeesa ejo, baloma baati, “Sihiraŋi ohuta ebbeesa jino ŋalala nʼejebirabo olwohuba jiŋwa mu hwita muutu.”
27.7: Olwʼehyo, ni bahena ohusalaŋo ehi banahole ngʼabaŋamba ebbeesa ejo bajigulamo ehisugu hyʼomuwumbi basiihengamo abalugendwa.
27.8: “Cʼehigira ehisugu ehyo bahiranga baati ‘Ehisugu hyʼamafugi’ nʼohwola hatyane.”
27.9: Ngʼaŋo hyolerera ehi naabbi Yeremiya galoma ati, “Baŋira endusu ejʼefeeza amahumi adatu, nga njʼebbeeyi eyi batangirisi ba Yisirayiri bapatana,
27.10: nga bajigulamo ehisugu hyʼomuwumbi ngʼolu Hatonda Musengwa gandagira.” Bemeha Yesu mu moni ja Pilaato (Mar 15:1-5; Luk 23:3-5; Yow 18:33-38)
27.11: Ngʼaŋo baŋira Yesu bamwemeha mu moni ja Pilaato. Ngʼamubuusa ati, “Ndiiwe habaha wʼAbayudaaya?” Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Ngʼolu oloma olwo.”
27.12: Abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga ni bamuŋaŋabira, ŋaaŋuma ehigagobolamo.
27.13: Ngʼaŋo Pilaato amubuusa ati, “Sooŋulira ebi bahulumiirisa?”
27.14: Aye Yesu gaŋoleera huŋolera. Ehyo hyeŋunjisa gavana oyo bugali. Basalira Yesu ogwʼohufa (Mar 15:6-15; Luk 23:13-25)
27.15: Mu biseera byʼEmbaga eyʼOhuhebuliriraho Ohubihisya, gavana galehulanga omusibe oyu bamusunganga ohulehula.
27.16: Hu mulundi ogwo, mu komera mwalimo omusibe owaali nʼamanyiheene obugali olwʼebikolwa ebibi, oyu balanganga baati Yesu Bbarabba.
27.17: Ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ni hyahumbaana ewa Pilaato, ngʼababuusa ati, “Mwenda mbalehulire njʼani: Bbarabba oba Yesu oyu balanga Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu?”
27.18: Galoma atyo olwohuba gaali ategeeye ati abatangirisi bʼabasengi baali baŋayeeyo Yesu eyi ali olwʼekirihindi eyi baali ni nayo.
27.19: Pilaato ni gaali ni gehaaye hu etebe ohugehalanga nʼasala emisango, omuhasi wuwe gamutumira omuutu amulome ati, “Wegenderese nʼosala esonga ejiŋamba hu muutu oyo olwohuba muluŋamu era owiire obuhyeye olwa leero, mbweneweene bugali nʼehirooto ehimuŋambaho.”
27.20: Ne abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga, bahongeresa ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu basunge balehule nje Bbarabba aye Yesu bamwite.
27.21: Pilaato gababuusa ati, “Hu bano bombi, mwenda mbalehulire njʼani?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Bbarabba.”
27.22: Nga Pilaato ababuusa ati, “Kole tye Yesu oyu balanga Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu?” Nga bosibosi bamugobolamo baati, “Bamuhomerere hu musalabba!”
27.23: Nga Pilaato ababuusa ati, “Lwahiina? Aholire hibi hi?” Aye nibo nga beeyongera hweyongera ohuhayaana baati, “Mumuhomerere hu musalabba!”
27.24: Pilaato ni gabona ebiitu ni bimusobeeye era abaatu ni benda hutabuha, ngʼaŋamba amaaji asaaba mu ngalo mu moni jaawe bosibosi ngʼaloma ati, “Simbona musango hu muutu ono. Era amafugi gage gabe hu ndinywe mwabeene.”
27.25: Ngʼabaatu bosibosi bamugobolamo baati, “Leha amafugi gage gabe hu efe nʼabaana beefe.”
27.26: Pilaato gabalehulira Bbarabba ngʼolu bamusunga. Aye ngʼalagira bafaduule Yesu efaalu, nga ko ahena amuŋayo eyiri abasirikale baje bamuhomerere hu musalabba. Abasirikale bajeeja Yesu (Mar 15:16-20; Yow 19:2-3)
27.27: Ngʼaŋo abasirikale baŋira Yesu mu lubiri lwa Pilaato mu hifo ehi balanganga baati Purayitoriyo, nga bahoba abahyawe bosibosi abomu hibinja ehyo bahumbaana bamweswanigirisa.
27.28: Nga bamufihulamo engoye jije, bahena bamwambasa olugoye olulando.
27.29: Nga bagata amaŋwa mu ngeri yʼomuge bamufiiha hu mutwe. Nga bamuŋambya olugada mu muhono gugwe omulungi, nga bahubba amafuha mu moni jije, bamujeeja ni baloma baati, “Wangaala, Habaha wʼAbayudaaya!”
27.30: Nga bahena bamufuujaho agate, baŋamba olugada bamuhubba hu mutwe efunda nʼefunda.
27.31: Ni baahena ohumujeeja nga bamufihulamo olugoye lula olulando, nga bamwambasa engoye jije bamuŋira ohumuhomerera hu musalabba. Bahomerera Yesu hu musalabba (Mar 15:21-32; Luk 23:26-43; Yow 19:17-27)
27.32: Ni baali ni batula mu hibuga, baagaanana nʼomusinde owʼe Kireene oyu balanganga baati Simooni, nga bamuŋagia ohugega omusalabba gwa Yesu.
27.33: Ni boola mu hifo ehi balanga baati Gologosa, amahulu gahyo ti “Ehifo Ehyahaŋanga,”
27.34: nga baŋa Yesu envinyo ni bayitabuuyemo enduse. Cooka ni gahombaho, gageene ohunywa.
27.35: Ni baahena ohumuhomerera hu musalabba, bagabana ebyambalo bibye ni babihubbiraho ahalulu.
27.36: Abasirikale beehala aŋo ni bamuhuumire babone ehinamwoleho.
27.37: Ŋamugulu wʼomutwe gugwe nga bataŋo omusango ogu baali ni bamuhaabya baguŋandiiha hu hapande baati: ono nje yesu, habaha wʼabayudaaya .
27.38: Era bahomerera nʼabakondo babiri, hiisi muutu hu musalabba gugwe. Mulala hu muhono gugwe omulungi, owundi hu mugooda.
27.39: Abaali ni babitaŋo nga boosi basugusa emitwe jaawe nʼobusambuha ni baduha Yesu,
27.40: baati, “Ewe asobola ohubbwagaŋo Yekaalu, nindi wayitongola mu ndaalo edatu, wenoŋole. Era hanye oli Mwana wa Hatonda, niinuha hu musalabba!”
27.41: Mu ngeri njʼenyene abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga boosi bamujerega ni baloma baati,
27.42: “Ganoŋolanga bandi, saaŋanga hwenoŋola niye omwene. Nje Habaha wa Yisirayiri! Ŋaahani aŋwe hu musalabba, konyo humufugiirire.
27.43: Gesiga Hatonda. Leha Hatonda nʼaba ni genda, amununule. Ti galomanga mbo niye Mwana wa Hatonda.”
27.44: Abakondo ababahomerera hu misalabba huupi ni naye nga boosi bamuduha mu ngeri njʼenyene. Ohufa hwa Yesu (Mar 15:33-41; Luk 23:44-49; Yow 19:28-30)
27.45: Ohuŋwa esaawa mukaaga ejomu muusi, ohwola hu saawa mwenda ejʼegulo, ngʼehiirema hiŋamba ehyalo hyosihyosi.
27.46: Ngʼaŋo hu saawa nga mwenda, Yesu alanga nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani ati, “ Eloyi, Eloyi, lama sabbakusaani ?” Amahulu gaahyo ti, “Hatonda wange, Hatonda wange, lwahiina wundehireŋo?”
27.47: Balala hu abo abaali ni bemereeye aŋo ni baŋulira, nga baloma baati, “Ali hulanga Eliya!”
27.48: Ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo mulala hu bo aduluma, aŋamba ehisuumwa ahitimya mu nvinyo eyisalire, ahita hu lugada aŋa Yesu ohunywa.
27.49: Aye abandi nga baloma baati, “Leha hubone hanye Eliya anaaje gamunoŋola!”
27.50: Yesu ni galanga nindi nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani, ngʼahena afa.
27.51: Mu hiseera ehyo, olutimbe olwomu Yekaalu nga ludweduhamo ŋabiri, ohuŋwa ŋamugulu ohwola ŋaasi. Ehyalo hyatengeeta ngʼamabaale gaadiha.
27.52: Era nga ŋabaŋo amagombe agaadiha, ngʼabagwalaafu bangi abaali ni bafuuye, balamuha baŋwamo.
27.53: Baaŋwa mu magombe era Yesu ni galamuha batiina e Yerusaalemu, ehibuga ehyawufu era abaatu bangi bababona.
27.54: Omuhulu wʼehibinja hyʼabasirikale ecikumi ni naabo abaali ni bahuuma Yesu ni babona byosibyosi ebyaliŋo baŋulira nʼohutetema hwa musisi, batya bugali era nga baloma baati, “Mu butuufu ono abaaye Mwana wa Hatonda!”
27.55: Ŋaaliŋo nʼabahasi bangi abaali ni besambireho ahamanga ni bebonera. Abahasi abo baali balondire hu Yesu ohuŋwa e Galilaaya era njʼabamuŋeeresanga.
27.56: Mu abo mwalimo Malyamu Magadaleeni ni Malyamu nyina ya Yakobbo ni Yose era ni nyina yʼabasaani ba Zebbedaayo. Basiiha Yesu (Mar 15:42-47; Luk 23:50-56; Yow 19:38-42)
27.57: Egulo ni lyola, omusinde omuŋinda owʼe Alimataaya, oyu balanga baati Yosefu, ngʼatiina aŋa bahomerera Yesu. Era yeesi gaali afuuhire mwegi wuwe.
27.58: Kale ngʼatiina eyiri Pilaato amusunga omulambo gwa Yesu aje agusiihe. Nga Pilaato alagira bagumuŋe.
27.59: Nga Yosefu aŋira omulambo ogwo, aguboŋa mu lugoye olunyaha olwa laasi.
27.60: Ngʼaguta mu higombe hihye ehi gaali nʼabajire mwibaale mu ngeri yʼepungulu era ehi baali ni batatambisangaho. Ngʼaŋiringisya ogubaale, gegaliraŋo omulyango ogwingira mu higombe, ngʼaŋwaŋo.
27.61: Malyamu Magadaleeni ni Malyamu owundi baali behaaye huupi nʼehigombe ni bahirengereeye. Abahuumi hu higombe hya Yesu
27.62: Ni wahya, lwali lwa Sabbaato oludaalo lwʼAbayudaaya olwʼohuŋumuliraho, ngʼabatangirisi bʼabasengi nʼAbafalisaayo batiina eyiri Pilaato.
27.63: Nga bamuloma baati, “Muhulu, huhebulira omudulingi oyo ni gaali nʼahiiri mulamu galoma mbo nʼalifa ŋalibitaŋo endaalo edatu ngʼalamuha.
27.64: Olwʼehyo, huhusunga olagire bahuumire erala amagombe butiribiri ohwola endaalo edatu ni jibitireŋo olwohuba abeegi babe baŋanga ohuuja bamwibamo nga balomera abaatu baati alamuhire. Obudulingi owo, buja huhiraho owasooka.”
27.65: Nga Pilaato abaloma ati, “Mbaŋaaye abahuumi. Mutiine bahuumire erala amagombe ngʼolu hisoboha.”
27.66: Ngʼaŋo batiina bata ahabonero hu gubaale nga balehaŋo abahuumi ohuhuuma.

28.1: Oludaalo olwa Sabbaato ni lubitire, nga mu mawiiwi hu ludaalo oludaayi mu wiiki, Malyamu Magadaleeni ni Malyamu owundi batiina hu higombe omu baali ni bataaye omulambo gwa Yesu.
28.2: Ni boola eyo, ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo ŋabaaŋo musisi owʼamaani olwohuba malayika wa Musengwa gaŋwa mwigulu gatiina hu higombe ehyo ngʼaŋiringisya ebaale eryali ŋamulyango alitusaaŋo, ngʼahena aliihalaho.
28.3: Malayika oyo gaali amesya hyʼehimyaso hyʼefula nʼebyambalo bibye ni bipepya hyʼamabaale gʼefula.
28.4: Abahuumi ni bamubona, batya bugali, bateetema era nga bagwa bafaho olweso.
28.5: Ngʼaŋo malayika aloma abahasi abo ati, “Mutatya, manyire ti mwendula Yesu, oyu bahomerera hu musalabba.
28.6: Ŋano aŋumaŋo, alamuhire ngʼolu galoma. Muuje mubone aŋa baali ni bamutaaye,
28.7: muhahase konyo mutiine mangu, mulomere abeegi babe muuti; ‘Alamuhire era atangiiyemo atiina e Galilaaya. Eyo peyi munahamubonere.’ Owo njʼobuhwenda obu mbalomera.”
28.8: Ngʼabahasi abo batula mangu baŋwa hu higombe ni batiiye aye ni bejuuye esangaalo, nga baduluma batiina balomere abeegi babe.
28.9: Ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo Yesu ababonehera ngʼabaloma ati, “Emiyaaya jibe ni nenywe!” Nga bamwigereraho bahubba amafuha, bafuhumira amagulu gage nga bamujumirya.
28.10: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Mutatya, mutiine mulomere abeegi bange batiine e Galilaaya. Eyo peyi banahambonere.” Lipooti yʼabahuumi bʼehigombe
28.11: Abahasi abo ni baali ni batiina, balala hu basirikale abaali ni bahuuma ehigombe batiina mu hibuga Yerusaalemu nga baloohesa abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda byosibyosi ebyaliŋo.
28.12: Abatangirisi bʼabasengi abo nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga bahumbaana, nga bateesa basalaŋo baŋa abasirikale ebbeesa embitiirifu ni babagula.
28.13: Nga babaloma baati, “Mulome muuti; ‘Abeegi babe baajire owiire ni huŋenyuha nga beeba omulambo gugwe.’
28.14: Ni hinoole hu muŋugi Pilaato, efe hunamunyonyole nga hubaŋonia omusango.”
28.15: Ngʼabahuumi abo banaaŋa ebbeesa ejo, bahola ngʼolu babaloma. Era ebibono ebyo byahwana mu Bayudaaya nʼohwola hatyane. Yesu abonehera abeegi babe (Mar 16:14-18; Luk 24:36-49; Yow 20:19-23; Bik 1:6-8)
28.16: Ngʼaŋo abeegi ehumi namulala batiina e Galilaaya, hu lusozi eyi Yesu gabaloma ohutiina.
28.17: Ni bamubona, nga bamujumirya aye abandi hu bo bamubuusabuusa.
28.18: Nga Yesu atiina aŋa baali abaloma ati, “Bapaaye obuŋangi wosiwosi mwigulu nohu hyalo.
28.19: Olwʼehyo, mutiine mufuule abaatu bosibosi ohuba beegi bange, ni mubabatiza mu siina lya Bbaabba nʼOmwana nʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu
28.20: ni mubasomesanga ohuŋamba byosibyosi ebi nabalagira. Mu butuufu oweene, niija hubanga ni nenywe ohwola hu komerero yʼehyalo.”

1.1: Gano njʼAmaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu Yesu Kurisito Omwana wa Hatonda.
1.2: Gatandiha nʼebibono bya Hatonda ebi naabbi Yisaaya gaŋandiiha ati, “Nja hutuma omuhwenda wange ahweherereyo ohuuja ahutereehese engira.
1.3: Ŋaliŋo ejanjaasi eryʼamaani eriŋwera mu lulafu, ni ŋaliŋo alangirira ati, ‘Muhosiirire Musengwa engira, muluŋamye amagira gage.’ ”
1.4: Omuutu oyo oyu balanganga baati Yowaane Omubatiza, gabanga mu lulafu nʼabatiza era nʼabuulira, nʼaloma abaatu bebbwage bacuuse emyoyo babatiziwe, Hatonda abasoniŋe ebibi.
1.5: Ngʼaŋo abaatu baŋwerehererangamo ohuŋwa mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya lyosiryosi nomu hibuga hyʼe Yerusaalemu ni batiina eyi ali ni benenya ebibi byawe, ngʼababatiza mu lwabi Yoludaani.
1.6: Yowaane gambalanga olugoye olu baahola mu mooya gʼesolo eyi balanga baati engamiya era ni gesidiha omusipi ogwʼehyanjo. Galyanga esige nʼomudugere ogwomwisugu.
1.7: Mu hubuulira huhwe galomeranga abaatu ati, “Ŋaliŋo aliija owukira obuŋangi oyu toola wayire nʼohwinama ohumufihulamo engayito namwoga amagulu.
1.8: Ese mbabatiza nʼamaaji aye niye alibabatiza nʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu.” Ohubatiziwa hwa Yesu (Mat 3:13; 4:11; Luk 3:21-22; 4:1-13)
1.9: Mu hiseera ehyene ehyo, nga Yesu aŋwa mu habuga ahʼe Nazaleesi mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya, atiina eyiri Yowaane amubatize mu Lwabi Yoludaani.
1.10: Yesu ni gaŋwa mu maaji ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo abona egulu ni liwihuhire ngʼOmwoyo amwihaho nʼali mu hifaananyi hyʼeŋuusi.
1.11: Ngʼejanjaasi liŋwa mwigulu ni ŋaliŋo aloma ati, “Ndiiwe Omwana wange omuhoda, owunesiimisa.”
1.12: Ŋaweene aŋo ngʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu aluŋamya Yesu amuŋira mu lulafu.
1.13: Ngʼeyo ahenayo endaalo amahumi ane nʼamenyire ŋalala nʼesolo ejomwisugu Sitaani nʼamuhema, ngʼabamalayika batiina bamulabirira. Yesu atandiha ohubuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi (Mat 4:12-22; Luk 4:14-15; 5:1-11)
1.14: Ŋaahani abobuŋangi ni baali ni badanyire Yowaane mu komera, Yesu gatiina mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya ngʼalomeranga abaatu Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋwa eyiri Hatonda,
1.15: nʼaloma ati, “Ehiseera ehi mubaaye ni mulindirira hyolire. Obuŋugi wa Hatonda bwigereeye. Mwebbwage mucuuse emyoyo, mufugiirire Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu Buŋugi wa Hatonda.”
1.16: Ŋaahani ŋaaliŋo abasinde babiri Simooni nʼAndereya mulebewe. Abasinde abo baali benuli bʼenyeeni ni bateganga obutimba mu nyanja. Lulala Yesu ni gaali nʼagenda hwigenya lyʼenyanja Galilaaya, ngʼababona ni batega obutimba mu nyanja.
1.17: Ngʼaŋo abaloma ati, “Muuje munonde mugendenga ni neese, ndibafuula benuli bʼabaatu.”
1.18: Aŋo ni naaŋo nga baleha aŋo obutimba waawe, bamulondaho.
1.19: Ni gesendaho mu moni ŋatotono, ngʼabona Yakobbo ni Yowaane abasaani ba Zebbedaayo ni bali ni saawe mu lyato lyawe ni bagonjoola obutimba.
1.20: Aŋo ni naaŋo nga boosi abalanga, baleha aŋo saawe Zebbedaayo nʼabatambi babe mu lyato, nga nibo batiina ni Yesu bagendanga ni naye. Yesu abbinga omusambwa hu muutu (Luk 4:31-37)
1.21: Ngʼaŋo Yesu nʼabeegi babe, boola mu hibuga hyʼe Kaperanawumu. Olwa Sabbaato ni lwola, nga Yesu atiina mu humbaaniro lyʼAbayudaaya, atandiha ohusomesa.
1.22: Abaatu ni baŋulira, nga beŋunja bugali esomesa yiye. Olwohuba gasomesa nʼobuŋangi, sosi hyʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda.
1.23: Ŋaahani mu humbaaniro omwo mwalimo omusinde owaaliho omusambwa. Ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo aloma nʼahayaana ati,
1.24: “Otuhaabya hiina ewe Yesu Omunazaleesi? Wuujire hutusihiirisa? Ese kumanyire! Ndiiwe Omwawufu wa Hatonda.”
1.25: Yesu ngʼahayula omusambwa ogwo ati, “Ŋoleera! Ŋwa nohu muutu oyo!”
1.26: Omusambwa nga gujugumisa omusinde oyo nʼamaani, nga guhena gumuŋwaho ni gwiteera.
1.27: Abaaliŋo bosibosi nga beŋunja, nga bahena bebuusa baati, “Omuutu ono wa ngeri hi? Esomesa yiye pyaha ate ya buŋangi. Obona alagira nʼemisambwa joosi jamuŋulira!”
1.28: Ohuŋwa hulwo, ngʼafuma mu hyalo hyʼe Galilaaya hyosihyosi nʼemirirano. Yesu aŋonia eduuli lyʼabalwaye (Mat 8:14-17; Luk 4:38-41)
1.29: Yesu ni gaŋwa mu humbaaniro lyʼAbayudaaya, ngʼatiina ni Yakobbo ni Yowaane mu mago ga Simooni nʼAndereya.
1.30: Mu hiseera ehyo masaala ya Simooni gaali mu buliri omusuuja ni gumuluma era olu Yesu goola ati nga bamulomera.
1.31: Ngʼaŋo Yesu atiina aŋa ali, ngʼamuŋamba hu muhono amwinyosa. Aŋo ni naaŋo, omusuuja ogwali ni gumuluma nga guŋona, ngʼabategehera ehyohulya.
1.32: Ngʼaŋo egulo esaawa niija ohugwa mu maaji, abaatu baŋwerehereramo baŋira abalwaye nʼabaaliho emisambwa eyiri Yesu.
1.33: Era abaatu abomu hibuga ehyo bosibosi nga beejuha ebulafu ŋa mulyango gwʼenyumba omu gaali.
1.34: Ngʼaŋonia bangi abaali nʼobulwaye owa hiisi ngeri. Nʼabaaliho emisambwa gajibabbingaho, cooka nʼatajiganya huba nʼehi jiroma olwohuba jaali jimumanyire. Yesu abuulira mu Galilaaya (Luk 4:42-44)
1.35: Ni wahya mu mawiiwi, Yesu genyoha ngʼatiina mu hifo ehiduleere ngʼaba eyo nʼasaba.
1.37: Ni bamubona, nga bamuloma baati, “Hiisi muutu ali huhudaha.”
1.38: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Muhole hutiineho nomu bitahere ebirirene ŋano yoosi nje mbuulireyo olwohuba ehyo njʼehi najiriiye.”
1.39: Ngʼaŋo atiina hiisi ŋaatu mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya, nʼabuulira mu mahumbaaniro gaawe era nʼabbinga emisambwa hu baatu. Yesu aŋonia omugenge (Mat 8:1-4; Luk 5:12-16)
1.40: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaaŋo omusinde omugenge owatiina eyiri Yesu, ngʼahubba amafuha mu moni jije, amwegalihira ati, “Ni huba ni huli husiima huhwo, ponie.”
1.41: Omusinde oyo ngʼaŋambya Yesu ehisa. Ngʼaŋo ajanuula omuhono amuŋambaho, amuloma ati, “Njʼohusiima hwange, ale ŋona.”
1.42: Ŋaweene aŋo, ebigenge nga biŋona, ngʼalongooha.
1.43: Ngʼaŋo Yesu amuseebula nʼamuhamiirisa buhomya ati,
1.44: “Omanya hino otahiromeraho muutu kadi mulala. Aye tiina weyanjule eyiri omusengi wa Hatonda, oŋeyo eŋongo eyi naabbi Musa galagira, bube bujulizi obubahahasa ti oŋonire.”
1.45: Aye omusinde oyo gatiina gaatandiha hwerebulira hiisi muutu, ngʼolu Yesu gaali nʼamuŋonisye. Olwʼehyo, Yesu hyamubeera higosi ohubaaho nʼahabuga aha gengiramo lubonani aye gaabanga hutulo mu lulafu ebula baatu. Cooka ni nʼeyo yoosi abaatu baŋwanga hiisi ŋaatu ni batiina eyi ali.

2.1: Ni ŋaabitaŋo endaalo ndiidiri, nga Yesu gagama mu hibuga hyʼe Kaperanawumu. Ni hyagwa abaatu baayo mu hutwi ti ali mu mago aga gamenyangamo,
2.2: nga batiinayo abeene abangi bahumbaanira mu lunya, nʼohwolera erala ŋa mulyango nʼoŋuma nʼaŋa obisya hugulu. Yesu ni gaali nʼabalomera ehibono hya Hatonda,
2.3: nga ŋabaaŋo abasinde bane abatiinayo ni baŋira omuutu owaali nʼasanyalaaye ni bamugegire hu musigaasiga.
2.4: Olwʼobungi wʼabaatu bahaya engeri eyimwosa aŋa Yesu gaali. Ehyaŋwamo nga baniina ŋamugulu baŋomola eŋundu mu hasolya hʼenyumba omu gaali, nga babisya omulwaye mu ŋundu eryo, bamwihisa hu musigaasiga ohu bamuleetera ohumwosa aŋa Yesu gaali.
2.5: Yesu ni gabona ohufugiirira hwawe, ngʼaloma omulwaye ati, “Mwana wange, kusoniŋire ebibi bibyo.”
2.6: Ehiseera ehyo, ŋaaliŋo hu basomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda abaali ni behaaye aŋo. Ni baŋulira ebibono ebi Yesu galoma, nga baloma mu myoyo jaawe baati,
2.7: “Aŋanga atye ohuloma atyo? Ohwo huba hufodogola. Hatonda yeŋene njʼali nʼobuŋangi ohusoniŋa ebibi.”
2.8: Ŋaweene aŋo nga Yesu afaania mu mwoyo gugwe, ehyali mu biŋeego byawe. Ngʼababuusa ati, “Lwahiina muŋeega muutyo mu myoyo jenywe?
2.9: Ehihiraho owangu ohuloma owasanyalala njʼehiri ŋeena? Ohuloma ti: ‘Kusoniŋire ebibi bibyo’ oba ti: ‘Yinyoha ogege omusigaasiga gugwo wagameyo ewuwo?’
2.10: Ŋaahani nja hubalaga ti Omwana wʼOmuutu ali nʼobuŋangi hu hyalo huno ohusoniŋa ebibi.” Ngʼaloma owaali nʼasanyalaaye ati,
2.11: “Yinyoha ogege omusigaasiga gugwo, wagameyo ewenywe.”
2.12: Aŋo ni naaŋo bosibosi ni bamutaayeho emoni, ngʼomusinde oyo genyoha, aŋamba omusigaasiga gugwe ohu bamuŋirira, agenda atiina. Nga bosibosi beŋunja, bajumirya Hatonda, ni baloma baati, “A! Hino sihuhibonangaho!” Yesu gaajire hu lwʼabali nʼebibi (Mat 9:9-13; Luk 5:27-32)
2.13: Ngʼaŋo Yesu gagamayo hu nyanja Galilaaya. Ngʼehiŋindi hyʼabaatu hihumbaana aŋa gaali ngʼatandiha ohubasomesa.
2.14: Oluvanyuma ni gaali nʼagenda hwigenya lyʼenyanja, ngʼabona omuŋoosa oyu balanganga baati Leevi wʼAlufaayo ni gehaaye aŋa baŋoohesa. Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Nja wunonde ogendenga ni neese.” Nga Leevi genyoheramo amulondaho.
2.15: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Yesu atiina nʼabeegi babe ewa Leevi ohulya. Omutoolo gwʼabaŋoosa nʼabaatu abandi abahola ebibi, nga batiina ni naye. Nga bosibosi beehala baliira ŋalala ni Yesu nʼabeegi babe.
2.16: Balala hu basomesa bʼamagambi abʼehibbubbu hyʼAbafalisaayo ni babona Yesu nʼalya nʼabaatu abo abʼebibi nʼabaŋoosa nga babuusa abeegi babe baati, “Lwahiina alya nʼabaatu abahola ebibi nʼabaŋoosa?”
2.17: Yesu ni gaŋulira ehi babuusa, nga niye abaloma ati, “Abaatu abalamu sibetaaga musaŋu, ohutusaho abalwaye. Sinaaja hwendula aberanga abalaŋi, ohutusaho abahola ebibi.” Ehibuuso ehiŋamba hu husiiba (Mat 9:14-17; Luk 5:33-39)
2.18: Lulala, abeegi ba Yowaane Omubatiza nʼaba Bafalisaayo baali basiibire aye aba Yesu ni batasiibire. Nga ŋabaaŋo abaatu abaatiina eyiri Yesu nga bamubuusa baati, “Lwahiina abeegi ba Yowaane nʼaba Abafalisaayo basiiba aye ababo ni batasiiba?”
2.19: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Abalange hu mbaga yʼobugole baŋanga ohusiiba ahooye omweŋa nʼahiiri ni nabo? Ehiseera hyosihyosi ehi ahena ni nabo, sibasiiba.
2.20: Aye ehiseera hiryola, babatusaho ahooye omweŋa. Hu olwo ndolu balitandiha ohusiiba.” Nga geyongera ohubagerera engero ejindi ohubalaga ngʼolu esomesa yiye nʼobulombolombo waawe bitasobola huŋambagana.
2.21: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Omuutu saahubba hiŋero ehyʼolugoye olunyaaha mu hyambalo ehihayire. Olwohuba ehiŋero ehyo ni hyehuuna, hihapuha ohuŋwa hu lugoye olwo oluhayire hyaŋiriraho nʼehimesu hyalwo, ngʼehituli hyeyongera ohugalama.
2.22: Mu ngeri njʼenyene, sibajuha omwenge gwʼemizabbibbu epiiraŋo mu hisaŋu ehihayire. Singa bahihola, gwadisa ehisaŋu ehyo nga byombi obifiirwa. Aye omwenge gwʼemizabbibbu epiiraŋo, bagujuha mu hisaŋu ehinyaaha.” Yesu nje Musengwa aŋuga Sabbaato (Mat 12:1-8; Luk 6:1-5)
2.23: Lulala hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato, Yesu nʼabeegi babe baali babita mu ngira eyibita mu muga gwʼengaano. Abeegi babe nga batiinanga ni baŋulula embehe hu magala ni bemunga.
2.24: Balala hu Bafalisaayo ni bababona ni baŋulula amagala gʼeŋaano, nga babuusa Yesu baati, “E! Lwahiina abeegi babo bahola ehi magambi geefe gatatufugiirira huhola hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato?”
2.25: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Simusomangaho hu ehi Dawudi gahola olu niye nʼabahye aba gaali ni nabo baali ni baŋuma hyʼohulya?
2.26: Mu biseera ebi Abbiyasaali gaali njʼomuhulu wʼabasengi ba Hatonda, Dawudi gengira mu weema ya Hatonda ngʼalya emigaati eji baali ni baŋongire eyiri Hatonda. Amagambi gafugiirira basengi ba Hatonda boŋene ohulya emigaati ejo. Cooka ate Dawudi gajiryaho era gaŋaho nʼaba gaali ni nabo.”
2.27: Ngʼaŋo Yesu agohoba nʼaloma Abafalisaayo ati, “Hatonda gaataŋo oludaalo lwa Sabbaato lugase omuutu, sosi Sabbaato ohumuŋuga.
2.28: Olwʼehyo Omwana wʼOmuutu nje Musengwa aŋuga oludaalo lwa Sabbaato.”

3.1: Nga nindi olundi Yesu atiina mu humbaaniro lyʼAbayudaaya. Hu olwo mwalimo omusinde owaali nʼomuhono omuŋotohi.
3.2: Hu baali mu humbaaniro, mwalimo Abafalisaayo abaali ni bendula ehyʼohumweŋambya era nga bamutaho emoni babone oba anaŋonie owʼomuhono omuŋotohi hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato, basune ehi baneemeho ohumuŋaŋabira.
3.3: Nga Yesu aloma omusinde owaali nʼomuhono omuŋotohi ati, “Yinyoha, wemeerere aŋa hiisi muutu asobola ohuhubona.”
3.4: Ngʼaŋo Yesu ko abuusa abaali ni bamwendulirisa ati, “Kaho amagambi gatufugiirira huhola hiina hulwa Sabbaato? Huhola biraŋi, oba huhola bibi? Huŋonia bulamu, oba hubusihiirisa?” Aye nibo nga baŋoleera huŋoleera.
3.5: Nga Yesu abetoloosamo emoni nʼabasunguŋaliiye era nʼali munyikaafu olwʼobuhahanyafu wʼemyoyo jaawe, ngʼaloma omusinde oyo ati, “Waama januula omuhono gugwo.” Ngʼola agujanuula, nga guŋonera erala.
3.6: Ŋaweene aŋo, Abafalisaayo ni bahena ohubona Yesu nʼaŋonisye omusinde oyo, nga batula mu humbaaniro batiina beŋimba hu bawagizi ba Herode ohuseega magesi gʼohwitamo Yesu. Abaatu baŋwerehereramo ohuja ohwebonera Yesu
3.7: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aŋwaŋo nʼabeegi babe batiina hwigenya lyʼenyanja Galilaaya. Oguŋindi gwʼabaatu nga gumulondaho. Abaatu baŋwa enjuyi nʼenjuyi mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya nomu Buyudaaya,
3.8: nomu hibuga hyʼe Yerusaalemu, nomu hitundu hyʼe Yidumeya, nʼengereha wʼolwabi Yoludaani, nomu bitundu ebirirene ebibuga hyʼe Tiiro ni Sidoni nga batiina eyi gaali. Hino bahihola olwohuba baali baŋuliiye efuma yʼebi gaholanga.
3.9: Olwʼabaatu ohubitiirira obungi, Yesu galoma abeegi babe bamutegehereŋo eryato gehalemo nʼasomesa, abaatu batamunyigirisa.
3.10: Olwohuba gaali aŋonisye abaatu bangi, hiisi mulwaye hulwo gaali genyigirisa asobole ohumwolerera amuŋambeho.
3.11: Hiisi olu baatu abaaliho emisambwa bamubonanga, bagwanga ŋaasi mu moni jije, emisambwa ni jiiteera jiiti, “Ndiiwe Omwana wa Hatonda!”
3.12: Cooka niye gahayulanga huhayula emisambwa ejo nʼatajiganya hubbutula ehyama ehyo. Yesu atobola abahwenda ehumi nʼababiri (Mat 10:1-4; Luk 6:12-16)
3.13: Yesu ni gaŋwa aŋo ngʼatiina mu meeho gʼolusozi, ngʼagangalamo abaatu aba gendire nga beegerera aŋa ali.
3.14: Mu bano pomu gatobola ehumi nʼababiri gabafuula bahwenda babe, basobole ohubanga ni naye era abatumenga ohubuulira obuhwenda buwe.
3.15: Ni gahena ngʼabaŋa obuŋangi owʼohubbinganga emisambwa hu baatu.
3.16: Ehumi nʼababiri abo mba bano: Simooni, oyu gameedaho esiina erindi ati Peetero;
3.17: abasaani ba Zebbedaayo ababiri Yakobbo ni Yowaane, boosi aba gameedaho erindi ati, “Bbowanageruge” amahulu gaalyo ti, “Ababbwabbwanuha hyʼeraadu.”
3.18: Ngʼohwo omeedaho Andereya ni Filipo ni Bbatulumaayo ni Matayo ni Tomasi ni Yakobbo wʼAlufaayo ni Sadaayo ni Simooni Omuzelote ,
3.19: ko ni Yuda Yisikaryoti, owalya mu Yesu oluhwe. Yesu ahira Sitaani amaani (Mat 12:22-32)
3.20: Ebyo ni byaŋwa nga Yesu nʼabeegi babe baagama eyi bamenyanga. Nga nindi eyo yoosi ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu hihumbaana nga hyola nʼohutabaŋa simire eyʼohuŋamba hu hyomu tamu.
3.21: Ni hyagwa abalebe babe mu hutwi, nga batiina baje bamutuseyo olwohuba baali baŋeega baati alaluhire.
3.22: Ŋaaliŋo abasomesa bʼamagambi abaali ni bajire ohuŋwa e Yerusaalemu. Bano baaloma baati, “Yesu aliho Bbeluzebbuli omuhulu wʼemisambwa.” Era baati, “Atambisa buŋangi wa Bbeluzebbuli ohubbinga emisambwa hu baatu.”
3.23: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abalanga besende aŋa ali, ngʼabalomera mu ngero ati, “Sitaani omuhulu wʼemisambwa, aŋanga atye ohwebbinga omwene hu muutu?
3.24: Abaatu abʼowahabaha obulala banesalamo bahubbagana abeene nʼabeene, owahabaha owo busihiiriha.
3.25: “Nolu baba baatu mu mago boosi singa sibaŋambagana, amago ago gabbwagiha.
3.26: Mu ngeri njʼenyene singa ni Sitaani gesoosa omwene, obuŋangi buwe bwabuhanamo era aba anasihiirihe.
3.27: Kale ŋabula aŋanga ohwingira mu nyumba yʼomuutu owʼamaani ganyaga ebiitu bibye nʼatasookire humusidiha ko ganyaga ebibye.
3.28: Mbalomera ehituufu ti balisoniŋa abaatu ebibi byosibyosi, nga pomuli nʼohuloma ebibono ebifodogola.
3.29: Aye hiisi afodogola Omwoyo Omutukuvu, sibalimusoniŋa aye aba asaaye omusango ogu alisigala ni nagwo emirembe nʼemirembe.”
3.30: Hino Yesu gahiroma nʼagobola mu baali ni balomire baati aliho emisambwa. Abalebe ba Yesu ko ni nyina (Mat 12:46-50; Luk 8:19-21)
3.31: Ngʼaŋo nyina nʼabalebe babe boola eyi gaali. Ni boola nga beema ebulafu bamutumisa atiine eyi baali.
3.32: Hu nyanga eyo ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu hyali hihaaye ni himwetolooye. Nga ŋabaaŋo abamuloma baati, “Bona maawo nʼabalebe babo bali ebulafu benda ohuhubona.”
3.33: Nga Yesu ababuusa ati, “Baatu ba ngeri hi abasaniiye ohuba maama nʼabalebe bange?”
3.34: Ngʼaŋo getoloosa emoni mu abaatu abaali ni behaaye ohumwetoloola. Nga ko ahena aloma ati, “Maama nʼabalebe bange mba bano.
3.35: Hiisi ahola ebi Hatonda genda, njʼaba muganda yange, mboojo yange era njʼaba maama.”

4.1: Ngʼaŋo nindi Yesu atiina atandiha ohusomesa nʼali hwigenya lyʼenyanja Galilaaya. Oguŋindi gwʼabaatu ogwahumbaana aŋa gaali nga gubitiirira obubbala. Ehyaŋwamo ngʼaniina mu lyato balisenda mu maaji gehala omwo nʼasomesa, abaatu bosibosi bemeerera hwigenya.
4.2: Ngʼabasomesa ebiitu ebiŋera nʼatambisa engero. Mu husomesa huhwe, gabaloma ati,
4.3: “Ni mwetege! Ŋaaliŋo omulimi owatiina ohumwa owumo.
4.4: Ni gaali nʼamwa, ngʼowumo obundi bugwa hu tulo wʼengira ngʼenyuni jitiina jibulya.
4.5: Obundi nga bugwa hwiroba eryohu lwanda ohwali otuloba otugeregere. Era olwohuba waali hu mugulu, siwalwa humera.
4.6: Aye endobooli ni yatula, nga buŋotoha era nga bwoma olwohuba emisi jaali ndi jiiha ŋaasi ehihena.
4.7: Ngʼobundi bugwa hwiroba eryameramo amaŋwa, ni wamera nga buhulira ŋalala nʼamaŋwa ago era nga gabumiina gabuloberesa ohuhula era ehyo hyabuleetera ohutaama.
4.8: Aye obundi nga bugwa hwiroba eraŋi. Nibwo ni bwamera nga buhula era nga wiitulula, amagala gaabwo nga gajuhamo emoni. Amagala agandi nga gabaaho embehe amahumi adatu; agandi embehe nkaaga; nʼagandi, embehe cikumi.”
4.9: Nga Yesu agohoba ati, “Ali nʼohutwi aŋulire.” Ehigendererwa hyʼohusomesa mu ngero (Mat 13:10-17; Luk 8:9-10)
4.10: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, abaatu abahira obungi ni baali ni baŋooyeŋo, abeegi babe ehumi nʼababiri ko nʼabandi abaali ni basigaaye ni Yesu, nga bamusunga abanyonyole amahulu gʼengero.
4.11: Ngʼaŋo abaloma ati, “Enywe muli nʼekabi ohumanya ehyama ehiŋamba hu buŋugi wa Hatonda.” Aye abebulafu, hiisi hiitu hiba mu ngero konyo:
4.12: Bahaŋaase aye ni batafaania ehi bahaŋaasa. Baŋulirise aye ni batategeera ehi baŋulira, batahanda hwebbwaga bacuusa emyoyo babasoniŋa ebibi byawe. Amahulu gʼolugero lwʼomuŋaanyi wʼowumo (Mat 13:18-23; Luk 8:11-15)
4.13: Ngʼaŋo Yesu ababuusa ati, “Simufaania mahulu gʼolugero luno? Olwo ŋaahani munahaŋange muutye ohubaaho nʼolugero olu munahafaanie amahulu?
4.14: Omuŋaanyi wʼowumo, ali hyʼomuutu oyo abuulira ehibono hya Hatonda mu baatu.
4.15: Abaatu abandi bali hyʼowumo owagwa hu tulo wʼengira. Ni babaŋaanyamo ehibono, bahiŋulira aye ŋaweene aŋo Sitaani gaaja gahibatusamo.
4.16: Abandi bali hyʼowumo owagwa mwiroba eryohu lwanda. Ni baŋulira ehibono, bahisangaalira nʼamanyonyo.
4.17: Aye olwohuba bali hyʼebirime ebiŋuma emisi ejihire mwiroba ehihena, ohufugiirira hwawe hwa haseera buseera. Ebigosi ni bibajira oba abaatu babacaawa olwʼehibono hya Hatonda, nga banafuŋa.
4.18: Ate abandi bali hyʼowumo owagwa mwiroba eririmo amaŋwa. Bano baŋulira ehibono,
4.19: aye oluvanyuma ebiitu ebindi omuli ohuŋemba obugali hu byʼehyalo, ohusendasendebwa nʼomulungo gwʼobusuni, nʼohululuhanira ohusuna ebiitu ebindi, biŋuga emyoyo jaawe, byaloberesa ehibono ohuŋwamo ehiraŋi.
4.20: Aye abaatu abandi bali hyʼowumo owo owagwa mwiroba eraŋi. Ni baŋulira ehibono bahifugiirira nʼomwoyo mulala era baba nʼehyasa. Abaatu abandi emirundi amahumi adatu; ate bandi emirundi nkaaga, nʼabandi emirundi cikumi.” Sibaŋambya taala bayifunihira mu hisero (Luk 18:16-18)
4.21: Ngʼaŋo nindi Yesu abagerera olugero olundi nʼababuusa ati, “Ŋaliŋo aŋambya etaala gayifunihira mu hisero oba gaayita mu kuliiti mu hifo hyʼohuyita hu hihondo hyayo?
4.22: Olwʼehyo hiisi ehi bagisa, hiryeta aŋalafu. Era hiisi hyama balihiŋebbula.
4.23: Ale hanye ŋaliŋo ali nʼohutwi, aŋulire.”
4.24: Era ngʼameedaho ati, “Mwetegeresenga ebi muŋulira. Ehipimo ehi opimiramo abandi, ehyene ehyo weesi cʼehi balihupimiramo era bali huteeraho nʼenyongesa.
4.25: Oyo ali nʼebingi balimumeedaho ebindi. Oyo aŋuma, balimutusaaho nʼahadiidiri aha ali ni naho.” Olugero lwʼebirime ngʼolu bihula mu ngiso
4.26: Nga Yesu geyongera abagerera olugero olundi nʼaloma ati, “Obuŋugi wa Hatonda huŋanga bugeragerania nʼolugero luno: Omuutu aŋaanya owumo mu muga gugwe.
4.27: Ebiseera ebyomu muusi omuutu oyo ahola emirimo jije ejindi, owiire ngʼaŋenyuha. Owumo bumera, waahula, omwene hubuŋaanya nʼatamanyire ngeri eyi bumeramo, wayire eyi buhulamo.
4.28: Eroba eryene hu waalyo lihusa ebirime ebyo mu ngiso. Ebirime ebyo byeherera hutubbula emitombo, ni bihula nga bitulula, nga bijuhamo emoni.
4.29: Ni biŋangala, ngʼolwo omuutu aŋamba hageso ahagesa olwohuba egesa liba lyolire.” Olugero lwʼahamo ahasingamo obutono (Mat 13:31-32,34; Luk 13:18-19)
4.30: Nga Yesu abagerera olugero olundi nʼabaloma ati, “Obuŋugi wa Hatonda hunabugerageranie hu hiina? Oba lugero hi olu huŋanga ohutambisa ohubunyonyola?
4.31: Buli hyʼahamo hʼehirime ehi balanga baati kalidaali. Hano njʼahamo ahasingira erala obudidiri mu wumo wosiwosi hu hyalo.
4.32: Aye ni bahahoma mwiroba, hamera nga hahula haŋwamo ehirime hyʼeryani ehisingira erala byosibyosi obubbala. Hihubba amasaga ameene amabbala, aga enyuni jiŋanga ohutongolamo ebiswi, nʼohweyigama omumwi mu hiŋolu hyahyo.”
4.33: Yesu galomera abaatu ehibono hya Hatonda nʼatambisa engero ejiŋera ejifananaho ni najino, ni geema hu hutegeera hwawe.
4.34: Era ŋabula ehiitu hyosihyosi ehi gabalomera ehitaali mu lugero. Aye ni gasigalanga nʼabeegi babe boŋene, nga nibo abanyonyola amahulu gaajo goosi. Yesu gehahania hibuyaga hu nyanja (Mat 8:23-27; Luk 8:22-25)
4.35: Egulo hu ludaalo olwene olwo, Yesu galoma abeegi babe ati, “Hwambuhe, hutiine engereha wʼenyanja.”
4.36: Nga baleha aŋo ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu, baniina eryato eri Yesu gaalimo nga bambuha ni naye. Ŋaaliŋo nʼamaato agandi, nga goosi galondaho.
4.37: Baali bahiiri mu lugendo nga hibuyaga owʼamaani genyoha hu nyanja, ngʼebimoto byʼamaaji bitagiha ohwedanyanga mu lyato, ni lihaabira hwijula.
4.38: Mu hiseera ehyo, Yesu gaali yinyuma mu lyato ni geŋigihire nʼaŋenyuha. Ngʼaŋo abeegi babe bamwinyosa, bamuloma baati, “Musomesa, enyanja yenda hutwita nʼewe soofayo?”
4.39: Nga Yesu genyoha, ahabira hibuyaga ati, “Yihaahana!” Era ngʼalagira enyanja ati, “Wunjeera!” Nga hibuyaga gehahana, nʼenyanja ngʼewunjeerera erala yiiti ce!
4.40: Nga Yesu abuusa abeegi babe ati, “Lwahiina mubaaye muŋooyemo omwoyo? Muhiiri huba nʼohufugiirira?”
4.41: Aye nibo hino nga hibahenaho efiiri hu mutwe bahena bebuusa abeene nʼabeene baati, “Omuutu ono wa ngeri hi oyu wayire hibuyaga nʼebimoto byʼamaaji hu nyanja biŋulira?”

5.1: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Yesu nʼabeegi babe boola engereha wʼenyanja mu hyalo hyʼAbagaraasa.
5.2: Yesu gaali ko gahaŋwa ati mu lyato, ngʼomusinde owaaliho emisambwa aŋwera mu pungulu eji basiihangamo abafu, atiine gagaanane ni naye.
5.3: Omusinde oyo gaŋenyuhanga mu pungulu ejo. Hyali hiŋaaye omusinde oyo amaani ni ŋaŋuma hiitu hyosihyosi ehi baali ni basobola ohumusidiha ndahihapula, wayire olujegere.
5.4: Efunda nyingi bamusidihanga nʼenjegere emihono nʼamagulu, cooka nʼajihapula. Era ni ŋabula owʼamaani owaali nʼasobola ohumuhuuma.
5.5: Hiisi owahyanga, mu muusi nʼowiire gaberereranga alerenga eyo mu hifo nago ehi basiihangamo abafu nomu ngingi, ni geyasa era ni gesalasala amabaale hu mubiri.
5.6: Omusinde oyo ni galengera Yesu, gaduluma ngʼatiina aŋa gaali, ni goola ngʼahubba amafuha mu moni jije.
5.7: Ngʼomusambwa ogwamuliho gwinianguha ni guloma guuti, “Wukaabya hiina, ewe Yesu Omwana wa Hatonda ali Ŋamugulu Obugali? Kwegayiriiye mu siina lya Hatonda, otangudya.”
5.8: Nga Yesu alagira omusambwa ogwali hu musinde oyo ati, “Musambwa ewe ŋwa hu muutu oyo!”
5.9: Ngʼaŋo Yesu agubuusa ati, “Ndiiwe ani?” Nga gumugobolamo guuti, “Ndiise Maŋe, olwohuba huli buhehere.”
5.10: Nga gumwegayirira bugali ni gumusunga atajibbinga huŋwa mu hitundu ehyo.
5.11: Ohuupi aŋo mu hiiho gʼolusozi, ŋaaliŋo ehidooli hyʼembiiji ni jaaya.
5.12: Ngʼemisambwa jegayirira Yesu jiiti, “Tufugiirire huje hwingire mu mbiiji ejo.”
5.13: Ngʼajifugiirira, nga jiŋwa hu muutu oyo, jija jingira mu mbiiji. Nga wangewe ehidooli hyʼembiiji ehyali ni hiŋeramo embiiji ngʼekumi ebiri jifulumuha embiro jiŋwera mu nyanja jinywa etubbi.
5.14: Abaali ni beemera embiiji nga baduluma baja balomera abaatu abomu habuga haawe nʼabomu bitundu ebyʼomulirano. Nga batiina baje bebonere ebyali ni byolire hu musinde owaaliho omusambwa.
5.15: Ni boola aŋa Yesu gaali nga babona omusinde ola owabangaho eŋe lyʼemisambwa ni gehaaye, ni gambaaye ebyambalo, nʼohutegeera nʼategeera bulaŋi weene, nga batya.
5.16: Abaaliŋo baabona emisambwa ni jiŋwa hu musinde oyo ni jingira mu mbiiji, nga baloohesaho abahyawe abaali ni baajire ngʼolu bibaaye.
5.17: Bala ni baŋulira nga batandiiha ohwegalihira Yesu aŋwe mu hitehere hyawe.
5.18: Yesu ni gaali nʼaniina eryato abaŋwereŋo, omusinde ola oyu gabbingaho emisambwa ngʼamwegalihira amufugiirire atiine ni naye.
5.19: Cooka Yesu ndaamufugiirira, ngʼamuloma ati, “Yagamayo ewenywe eyiri abaatu babo, obalomere byosibyosi ebi Hatonda Musengwa ahuholeeye era ngʼolu ahuŋambiiye ehisasabirisi.”
5.20: Ngʼaŋo omusinde oyo abita nʼalomera hiisi muutu mu bitundu byʼe Dekapooli byosibyosi ebi Yesu gaali nʼamuholeeye. Bosibosi abaŋulira nga beŋunja. Omuhaana wa Yayiro nʼomuhasi wʼoluheeŋo (Mat 9:18-26; Luk 8:40-56)
5.21: Nga nindi Yesu nʼabeegi babe bambuha baagamayo engereha wʼenyanja. Ni boola ngʼoguŋindi gwʼabaatu gwesoloosa aŋa gaali hwigenya.
5.22: Gaali ahiiri aŋo, nga jireeta mulala hu bahulu bʼehumbaaniro lyʼAbayudaaya oyu balanganga baati Yayiro. Yayiro ni gahubba emoni hu Yesu, ngʼaja ahubba amafuha mu moni jije,
5.23: amwegalihira bugali nʼamuloma ati, “Ahahaana hange henda hufa. Muhulu, nja oje ohaŋambeho ohaŋonie hatafa.”
5.24: Ngʼaŋo Yesu atiina ni naye. Oguŋindi gwʼabaatu nga guŋindigana gumulondaho ni gutiina ni gumunyigirisa.
5.25: Mu guŋindi ogwo mwalimo omuhasi owaali nʼaweeneweene nʼobulwaye wʼoluheeŋo ohuhena emyaha ehumi nʼebiri.
5.26: Omuhasi oyo gaali aweeneweene bugali olwʼabagangi ehipyeda eyi gesombanga nʼatiina ohumuganga era nʼahenireŋo ebiitu bibye olwʼohubasasula cooka nʼataŋona aye obulwaye buwe ni butaamanga hutaama.
5.27: Olwohuba gaali aŋuliiyeho ni baloosa efuma ya Yesu, gaŋwaho enyuma ni genyigirisa mu guŋindi gwʼabaatu ogwali ni gulonda hu Yesu, ngʼaŋamba hu hyambalo hihye.
5.28: Hino gahihola olwohuba galoma mu mwoyo gugwe ati, “Hasinge ni naŋambe huŋambaho hu hyambalo hihye, naŋone.”
5.29: Ni gahiŋambaho, aŋo ni naaŋo ngʼoluheeŋo lwomeera. Ngʼaŋulira mu bulamu wuwe obulwaye obubaaye ni bumudambya ni buŋonire.
5.30: Hu nyanga enyene eyo, Yesu gategeera amaani gage agaŋonia ni gaholire omulimo. Ngʼacuuha ahejaheja abuusa ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ati, “Njʼani owupambire hu hyambalo?”
5.31: Abeegi babe nga bamugobolamo baati, “Weesi, obona ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ngʼolu hiri huŋindigana era wabuusa oti: ‘Njʼani owupambireho?’ ”
5.32: Aye Yesu nga gegumya ohuhejaheja abone omuutu amuŋambireho.
5.33: Ngʼaŋo omuhasi ola olwʼohumanya ehyali ni himwolireho, gatiina butibuti era nʼakaakana, ngʼahoma ekumbo mu moni ja Yesu, amulomera byosibyosi ebyamuliho.
5.34: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Muhaana, Ohufugiirira huhwo huhuŋonisye. Tiina nʼemiyaaya, nʼobulwaye obubaaye ni buhudambya buŋone.”
5.35: Yesu gaali ahiiroma, ngʼebaayo abahwenda abaŋwa ewa Yayiro omuhulu wʼehumbaaniro, nga baloma omuhulu oyo baati, “Muhulu odambihisya hiina Omusomesa? Omwana wuwo ahenire ohufa.”
5.36: Yesu ni gaŋulira ebi baali ni baloma, ngʼaloma Yayiro ati, “Ewe oteralihira, yegumye huba nʼohufugiirira.”
5.37: Ngʼaŋo Yesu asibira abaatu abandi ohumulondaho nʼatiina ni Yayiro, ohutusaho Peetero nʼaboluganda ababiri Yakobbo ni Yowaane.
5.38: Ni boola mu mago ga Yayiro, Yesu gageeneyo amaliro, abaatu ni balira era ni bahubba nʼenduulu.
5.39: Ni gengira mu nyumba, ngʼabaloma ati, “Amaliro nʼenduulu ebimuhubba, byahi? Omwana saafe aye ali huŋenyuha.”
5.40: Nibo bamujeherera humujeherera. Ni gahena ohubbingaŋo abaatu abandi, nga gengira nʼabasaye bʼomwana, ko nʼabeegi babe abadatu, mu hisenge omu mwana gaali.
5.41: Ngʼaŋamba omwana, hu muhono, amuloma ati, “Taliisa kumi” amahulu gaahyo ti, “Mwana ewe yinyoha!”
5.42: Ŋaweene aŋo, ngʼomwana oyo owaali nʼaŋesa emyaha ehumi nʼebiri, gemeerera agenda. Abaaliŋo nga basamalirira!
5.43: Nga Yesu abahamiirisa ehi aholire batahiromeraho abaatu bandi. Era ngʼalagira baŋeho omwana oyo ehyohulya.

6.1: Yesu ni gaŋwa mu hitundu ehyo, ngʼatiina mu habuga hʼewaawe aha balanga Nazaleesi. Ngʼabeegi babe batiina ni naye.
6.2: Oludaalo lwa Sabbaato ni lwola, ngʼatiina mu humbaaniro atandiha ohusomesa. Abahira obungi hu baŋulira ebi gaali nʼasomesa nga beŋunja ni bebuusa baati, “A! Omusinde ono bino ebi asomesa gabitusa ŋeena? Magesi hiina gano aga gasuna ohuba ti asobola nʼohuhola ebyamaliholiho?”
6.3: Nga bamujerega ni baloma baati, “Ono sinje omubaaji omusaani wa Malyamu, mulebe ya Yakobbo ni Yose, ni Yuda, ni Simooni? Era ababoojo sibamenyire huno ni neefe?” Ehyaŋwamo nga bagaana ohufugiirira ebibye.
6.4: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Naabbi bamuŋa eŋono hiisi ŋaatu, ohutusaho mu hitundu hyʼewaawe omuli abalebe babe nʼabehiha.”
6.5: Olwʼehyo, sigaholayo byamaliholiho, ohutusaho abalwaye ababale aba gaŋambaho baŋona.
6.6: Era geŋunja bugali abaatu baayo ohutaba nʼohufugiirira. Ngʼaŋo atiina ŋano ni naŋala mu bitundu ebyʼomulirano nʼasomesa abaatu ehibono hya Hatonda. Yesu atuma abeegi babe ehumi nʼababiri (Mat 10:5-15; Luk 9:1-6)
6.7: Mu hiseera ehyo nga Yesu alanga abeegi babe ehumi nʼababiri batiine aŋa gaali. Ngʼabatuma babiri babiri ohuja ohubuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu buŋugi wa Hatonda, ngʼabaŋa nʼobuŋangi ohubbinganga emisambwa hu baatu.
6.8: Ngʼabahamiirisa ati, “Mu lugendo luno mutagega hiitu hindi hyosihyosi, ohutusaho omuhoomero. Mutawoŋa ebyohulya era mutagega bihapu oba bbeesa.
6.9: Mwambale ebirayito aye mutagega byambalo ebindi ohutusaho ebi hiisi muutu anaabe ni gambaaye.
6.10: Hiisi hibuga ehi munaholengamo, mumenyanga mu mago gʼabaatu ababa ni babasangaaliiye, ohwola olu museebuha.
6.11: Era ni mwolanga aŋaatu ndibabasangaalira, oba bagaana ohuŋuliirisa ebi mubaloma, nga muŋwaŋo. Era ni muba ni muŋwayo, mwekukumulangaho efuuhe mu magulu, habe habonero ahalaga ohulabula ohuŋwa eyiri Hatonda.”
6.12: Ngʼaŋo abeegi batiina ni babuulira abaatu bebbwage bacuuse emyoyo balehe ebibi ebi bahola.
6.13: Nga babbinga emisambwa mingi hu baatu, nga nʼabalwaye bangi babajuhangaho amafuta ni baŋona. Ohufa hwa Yowaane Omubatiza (Mat 14:1-12; Luk 9:7-9)
6.14: Ehiseera hyola nga Herode owaali nʼaŋuga etwale lyʼe Galilaaya aŋulira efuma ya Yesu, olwohuba baali bamulomaho hiisi ŋaatu baati, “Nje Yowaane Omubatiza alamuhire, cʼehifa ali nʼobuŋangi ohuhola ebyamaliholiho.”
6.15: Aye abandi ni baloma baati, “NjʼEliya.” Nʼabandi baati, “Mulala hu banaabbi aba hale.”
6.16: Aye efuma ya Yesu ni yagwa Herode mu hutwi niye galoma ati, “Oyo anaabe nje Yowaane Omubatiza oyu nalagira batemaho omutwe, njʼalamuhire!”
6.17: Ŋanyumaho, Herode gaali alagiiye baŋambe Yowaane bamuwoŋe mu komera. Hino gahihola olwʼohwenda ohusangaasa Herodiya oyu gaali nʼahooye oluvanyuma lwʼohumupaasa ohuŋwa hu Filipo mugandaawe.
6.18: Efunda ejiŋera, Yowaane Omubatiza galomanga Herode ati, “Sihiraŋi ewe ohupaasa muha mugandawo.”
6.19: Hino hyaleetera Herodiya ohuŋalana Yowaane ni genda nʼohumwita cooka nʼahaya engeri,
6.20: olwohuba Herode gaali amuhuuma atoolaho higosi. Hino gahihola olwohuba gaali amanyire ati Yowaane musinde muluŋamu era muutu wa Hatonda, kale nʼatya ohigosi ohumwolaho. Herode gendanga ohuŋuliirisa ebi Yowaane galomanga wayire hiisi olu gamuŋulirisanga, gasigalangamo ahakukuna.
6.21: Lwali lulala nga Herodiya afuna ahakisa. Oludaalo olwo lwali lwʼamazaaliwa ga Herode. Herode ganyiiya embaga, ngʼalanga abahungu babe, nʼabahulu bʼabasirikale, nʼabaatu abegingihiriri mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya.
6.22: Ni baali ŋagati wʼembaga, omuhaana wa Herodiya gengira mu diiro omu baali ngʼahina, asangaasa bugali Herode nʼabageni babe. Ngʼaŋo Habaha aloma omuhaana oyo ati, “Loma ehiitu hyosihyosi ehi wenda, nahihuŋe.”
6.23: Ngʼalayira nʼohulayira ati, “Mazima ameene ehi onende hyosihyosi nahihuŋe, nʼolu onende oti hugabanire ŋagati owahabaha wange.”
6.24: Ngʼaŋo omuhaana atula aja gebuusa hu nyina ati, “Sunge hiina?” Nga nyina amugobolamo ati, “Tiina osunge mutwe gwa Yowaane Omubatiza.”
6.25: Omuhaana nga genyoheramo gagama eyiri habaha amuloma ati, “Nenda wupeere ŋaweene ŋano omutwe gwa Yowaane Omubatiza ni bagutereeye hu suniya.”
6.26: Ehyo hyanakuŋasa habaha bugali aye olwohuba gaali ahenire ohulayira nʼabageni babe ni baŋulira, gahaya engeri eyʼohumwima ehi amusungire.
6.27: Ŋaweene aŋo habaha galagira omusirikale omuhuumi wʼekomera aje ateme hu Yowaane omutwe aguleete. Nga oyu gatuma atiina mu komera atema hu Yowaane omutwe,
6.28: aguleetera hu suniya aguŋa omuhaana, nʼomuhaana ngʼaguŋa nyina.
6.29: Abeegi ba Yowaane ni baŋulira, nga baja batusayo omulambo gugwe baguŋira baja bagusiiha. Yesu aliisa abaatu ekumi etaanu (Mat 14:13-21; Luk 9:10-17; Yow 6:1-14)
6.30: Ngʼaŋo abahwenda aba Yesu gatuma ohutiina ohubuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi bagobola bamuloohesa byosibyosi ebi baali ni baholire nʼebi baali ni basomesiise.
6.31: Mu hiseera ehyo, abaatu oluhulende baali batiina hanjihinjihi aŋa baali. Bano babanga bahaŋwaŋo, nga nindi abandi boola, nga bahaya nʼehiseera ehyʼohuŋamba hu hyomu tamu. Nga Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Muhole hutiine mu hifo ehibulamo baatu aŋa hunaabe hweŋene, muŋuumuleho.”
6.32: Nga baniina eryato bambuhe batiine mu hifo ehiŋumamo baatu.
6.33: Aye nga ŋabaaŋo abaatu bangi abababona ni batiina babafaania ti nje nibo. Ngʼaŋo baŋwerehereramo ohuŋwa hiisi ŋaatu bamulondaho nʼamagulu ni babita hu woomu, nga baja babeherera mu hifo eyi Yesu nʼabeegi babe baali ni batiina.
6.34: Yesu ni gaŋwa mu lyato, gabona ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ni hyahumbaana, nga bamuŋambya ehisa olwohuba baali hyʼetaama ejiŋumaho mwayi. Ngʼaŋo abasomesa ebiitu ebyene ebitali bitono.
6.35: Abeegi babe ni babona owiire ni butiinire, nga batiina aŋa Yesu gaali bamuloma baati, “Ehifo hino hiduleere, ate owiire mbobuno butiinire.
6.36: Seebula abaatu batiine mu bitahere ebyohu mulirano begulire ebiryo balye.”
6.37: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Enywe mubaŋe biryo balye?” Nga nibo bamubuusa baati, “Oŋeega hunatuse ŋeena edinaari ebihumi bibiri, ko hubagulire ebiryo balye?” Ehyo hiŋanga ohuŋira omuhemba ogwʼemyesi nga munaana.
6.38: Nga niye ababuusa ati, “Muli nʼemigaati jinga? Mutiine mubone.” Ni bahena ohwetegeresa, nga bamuloma baati, “Etaanu, nʼenyeeni ebiri.”
6.39: Ngʼaŋo Yesu alagira abeegi babe balome abaatu bosibosi behale ŋaasi hu nyaasi mu bibbubbu.
6.40: Nga babehasa mu bibbubbu, ebyʼabaatu cikumi cikumi, ebindi amahumi ataanu ataanu.
6.41: Nga Yesu aŋamba emigaati jira etaanu nʼenyeeni ebiri, ngʼagangamusa emoni aheja mwigulu, nga geyaasa Hatonda. Ngʼaŋo abbwagabbwaga mu migaati ejo, ajiŋa abeegi babe bagabire abaatu. Nʼenyeeni jira ebiri joosi ngʼajigaba hiisi muutu afuna.
6.43: Ngʼaŋo abeegi bahumbaania obukukumuhira wʼemigaati nʼenyeeni ebyasigalaho nga bejusa ebisero ehumi nabibiri.
6.44: Abaatu abaalya baali abasinde ekumi etaanu. Yesu agendera hu maaji (Mat 14:22-33; Yow 6:15-21)
6.45: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo Yesu alagira abeegi babe baniine eryato batangirengamo bambuhe enyanja, batiine e Bbesusayida, niye nʼahiseebula abaatu.
6.46: Ni gahena ohubaseebula, ngʼatiina hu lusozi ohusaba.
6.47: Aŋa hiirema hyaŋambira, abeegi babe baali mu lyato ŋagati mu nyanja aye Yesu niye nʼali yeŋene hu woomu.
6.48: Yesu ni gaali eyo ngʼalengera abeegi babe ni bafaabiina ohugimba eryato nʼemiiho, olwʼepunga eyaali ni baŋwa emutwe. Ni waali ni bunatere ohuhya, gatiina eyi baali nʼagenda hu maaji. Era gatiina oti hani genda ohubabitamo.
6.49: Ne nibo ni bamubona nʼagenda hu maaji, nga baŋeega baati himalyo nga benianguha,
6.50: olwʼobuti owaali ni bubaŋambire bosibosi ni bamubona. Aŋo ni naaŋo nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Ndiise, mugume mutatya!”
6.51: Ngʼahena gengira mu lyato omu baali ngʼepunga eteeha. Hino hyatangalasa abeegi babe bugali,
6.52: olwohuba baali bahiiri humutegeera wayire nga gaali aholire ehyamaliholiho ehyʼohwasa emigaati. Ehyaleeta hino, myoyo jaawe huba mihahanyafu. Yesu aŋonia abalwaye e Genesareeti (Mat 14:34-36)
6.53: Ni bambuha enyanja, nga boola mu hitehere ehi balanga baati Genesareeti nga baŋwa mu lyato balihwesa balireeta hwigenya.
6.54: Baali bahaŋwa baati mu lyato, ngʼabaatu abaali aŋo bahitegeera baati nje Yesu.
6.55: Ni bamufaania nga baduluma betoloola hiisi ŋaatu mu hitundu ehyo ni basima hu baali nʼabalwaye babaŋira ni babagegeeye hu misigaasiga eyi baŋuliranga baati peyi Yesu ali.
6.56: Hiisi ŋaatu aŋa gatiinanga, hamube mu hyalo oba mu bibuga, abaatu batanga abalwaye baawe mu bifo ebihumbaania baatu, nomu bifo ebindi hyomu akisoni, nga bamwegalihira aganye abalwaye baŋambeho buŋambe hu gemo lyʼehyambalo hihye. Era hiisi owamuŋambangaho, ngʼaŋona.

7.1: Ŋaahani ŋaaliŋo balala hu Bafalisaayo nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda abaŋwa e Yerusaalemu abahumbaanira aŋa Yesu gaali.
7.2: Baali bahiiri aŋo nga babona balala hu beegi ba Yesu ni balya ni batehereeye husaaba mu ngalo mu ngeri eyʼohwegwalaasa ngʼolu obulombolombo waawe owʼEhiyudaaya waali ni bubetagisa ohuhola.
7.3: Abayudaaya bosibosi ko weyite Abafalisaayo, balondereranga ahalombolombo hʼabasehulu baawe ahʼohutalya ni bahiiri husaaba mu ngalo mu ngeri eyʼohwegwalaasa.
7.4: Era ni baŋwanga mu butale sibalyanga ni batehereeye husaaba mu ngeri eyo. Baali nʼobulombolombo obundi bungi obu balondereranga nga pomuli ahohwosa ebihopo, enywero, nʼembya ejʼebihomo eji batambisanga mu ngeri eyʼohubigwalaasa ngʼolu obulombolombo waawe waali ni bubaloma.
7.5: Ngʼaŋo Abafalisaayo abo nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi aba baali ni nabo babuusa Yesu baati, “Lwahiina abeegi babo sibahola ngʼolu obulombolombo wʼabasehulu beefe butuloma aye balya nʼengalo eji batehereeye husaaba?”
7.6: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Banafuusi enywe, ehibono hya Hatonda ehi naabbi Yisaaya gabalomaho hituufu olu galoma ati, “ ‘Abaatu bano baapa eŋono lya hu munwa, aye emyoyo jaawe jipumaho.
7.7: Era banjumirya byahwehenahenaho, olwohuba ebibono obubono ebyʼabaatu, mbebi baŋira ohuba amagambi gange.’
7.8: “Kale mu ngeri oyo, muleherera egambi lya Hatonda, mwaŋamba bulombolombo wʼabaatu.”
7.9: Ngʼameedaho abaloma ati, “Olwo ko muŋeega mbo muhola hiraŋi ohuleha ohuŋamba egambi lya Hatonda mwahola ebi bulombolombo wenywe bubaloma.
7.10: Ale Musa gaaloma ati, ‘Oŋanga lataawo ni maawo eŋono.’ Era ati, ‘Anaduhenga semwana oba nyina, bali nʼohumwita.’
7.11: Aye enywe muloma muuti singa omuutu aloma semwana oba nyina ati ehi gahamuŋaaye ngʼobuyeedi, hyafuuha Korubbani (amahulu gaahyo ti hiŋonge eyiri Hatonda),
7.12: olwo muba simuhimwihirisa hubaaho nʼehiitu hyosi ehi aholera semwana oba nyina.
7.13: Mu ngeri eyo nga mudibya ehibono hya Hatonda ni musomesa obulombolombo wenywe. Era nʼebindi bingi ebyʼengeri eyo ebi muhola.” Ebyonoona omuutu biŋwa mu mwoyo gugwe (Mat 15:10-20)
7.14: Nga nindi Yesu alanga ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu hitiina aŋa gaali. Ngʼabaloma ati, “Mutegere ohutwi era mutegeere ehi nja ohuloma.
7.15: Ebi muutu alya sinje ebimonoona, ohutusaho ebiŋwa mu mwoyo gugwe.
7.17: Ni galeha aŋo ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu abo gengira mu nyumba ngʼabeegi babe bamubuusa amahulu gʼehi gaali nʼalomire.
7.18: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Koni mwesi simufaania? Simumanyire muuti omuutu ebi alya sinje ebimonoona?
7.19: Ebi olya sibingira mu mwoyo gugwo aye bitiina mu hida, omu biŋwa byatula.” (Mu huloma atyo Yesu gaali ataaho enjihiso ngʼolu hiisi ehiriiwa hiri hiraŋi.)
7.20: Ngʼaŋo ameedaho ati, “Ebitula ohuŋwa mu mwoyo gwʼomuutu njʼebimonoona,
7.21: olwohuba mu mwoyo gwʼomuutu po muŋwa ebiŋeego ebibi, ohuba wʼemoni enyangu, owiibi, obutemu, obuhwedi,
7.22: ohwegomba, obubi owa hiisi ngeri; obudulingi, ohwetyolonga, omwoyo ogwʼekirihindi, obuŋesi, ohwebona, nʼobuŋwituhi.
7.23: Ebibi ebyo byosibyosi njʼebyonoona omuutu olwohuba biŋwa mu mwoyo gugwe.” Yesu nʼomuhasi Mufoyiniki (Mat 15:21-28)
7.24: Yesu ni gaaŋwa aŋo, ngʼatiina nʼabeegi babe mu hitehere ehirirene ehibuga hyʼe Tiiro. Ni goola eyo nga ŋabaaŋo amago aga gengiramo mu kweho nʼatenda baatu bamanye, cooka ndihiŋangiha.
7.25: Ŋaaliŋo omuhasi owaali nʼahahaana hahe ni haliho omusambwa cooka nʼaŋulira ati Yesu ali mu mago ago, gatiina aŋa gaali ngʼahoma ekumbo mu moni jije, amusunga abbinge omusambwa hu haana hahe.
7.26: Omuhasi oyo gaali Muyonaani ni bamusaala e Foyiniki mu hyalo hyʼe Siriya.
7.27: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Leha abaana beherere ohulya begute, olwohuba sihiraŋi ohuŋamba ebiryo byʼabaana wabidanyira embwa jaawe.”
7.28: Ngʼomuhasi oyo amuloma ati, “Musengwa pohiri. Aye nʼembwa joosi ni jiba ŋaasi wʼemeeza ohu baana baliira, jirya obukukumuhira.”
7.29: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Olwʼebibono ebi olomire, yagamayo engo omusambwa guŋooye hu muhaana wuwo.”
7.30: Ngʼaŋo omuhasi oyo gagamayo engo gagaana omuhaana wuwe nʼalambaaye hu buliri, omusambwa ni gumuŋooyeho. Yesu aŋonia kasiru
7.31: Yesu ni gaŋwa mu hitehere ehirirene ehibuga Tiiro nga nindi aŋamba olugendo atiina hu nyanja Galilaaya, nʼabitira mu hibuga hyʼe Sidoni nomu matwale gʼe Dekapooli.
7.32: Nga ŋabaaŋo abaatu abaŋira aŋa gaali omusinde owaali kasiru nʼataŋulira, bamwegalihira amuŋambeho aŋone.
7.33: Ngʼaŋo Yesu atusa omusinde oyo mu hiŋindi hyʼabaatu, amuŋira hu tulo, ngʼamuta enjala mu matwi, afuuja amate amuŋamba hu lulimi.
7.34: Ngʼagangamusa emoni aheja mwigulu ahena giisa omuuya, amuloma ati, “Efata!” Amahulu gaahyo ti, “Yiguha!”
7.35: Ngʼaŋo amatwi gʼomusinde oyo geguha, nʼehyali ni himusidihire olulimi hiwoŋoloha ngʼatandiha ohuloma bulaŋi.
7.36: Nga Yesu ahuutira abaatu abaaliŋo, ehi baweene batahiromeraho abaatu abandi. Cooka aŋa gahoma ohubahuutira, paŋa bahoma nʼohwerebulira hiisi muutu.
7.37: Bosibosi abahiŋulira, beŋunja bugali nga baloma baati, “Hiisi ehi ahola ahihola bulaŋi. Obona geegula amatwi gʼabataŋulira baŋulira nʼabakasiru gabawoŋolola olulimi basobola ohuloma!”

8.1: Olwola mu biseera ebyene ebyo, nga nindi oguŋindi gwʼabaatu guhumbaanira aŋaali Yesu. Ŋaahani abaatu abo ebiryo ni byali ni bibaŋoyeho, ngʼaŋo Yesu alanga abeegi babe batiine aŋa gaali abaloma ati,
8.2: “Abaatu bano bapambya ehisa, olwohuba babaaye ŋano ni neese endaalo edatu kwiye aye ŋaahani baŋuma hyʼohulya.
8.3: Singa mbaseebula baagameyo ewaawe enjala nʼebaluma, bahanda bagwa hu ngira ate abandi hu bo baŋwera ŋaleeŋi.”
8.4: Aye abeegi babe nga bamugobolamo baati, “Mu hifo ehiduleere hino omuutu aŋanga hutusa ŋeena ebiryo ebiŋanga ohuliisa abaatu bano bosibosi?”
8.5: Nga niye ababuusa ati, “Muliŋo nʼemigaati jinga?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Musanvu.”
8.6: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma abaatu behale ŋaasi. Ngʼaŋamba emigaati ejo omusanvu geyaasa Hatonda, ngʼajibbwagabbwagamo ahena ajiŋa abeegi babe bajigabire abaatu. Nga boosi bahola ngʼolu gabaloma.
8.7: Abeegi ba Yesu era baaliŋo nʼobuyeeni budidiri. Bwoosi, Yesu ni gahena ohweyaasa Hatonda ngʼabaloma babugabire abaatu.
8.8: Ngʼabaatu balya beguta. Ni bahena ohulya ngʼabeegi babe bahumbaania obukukumuhira owasigalaŋo, nga bwijula ebisero musanvu.
8.9: Abaatu abagaliisa baali baŋera ekumi ene. Ni bahena ohulya, nga Yesu abaseebula.
8.10: Ni gahena ganiina eryato nʼabeegi babe bambuha enyanja Galilaaya, nga batiina mu hitundu ehyʼe Dalumanuta. Abafalisaayo basunga Yesu ahabonero (Mat 12:38-42; 16:1-4)
8.11: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaaŋo balala hu Bafalisaayo abaatiina eyiri Yesu nga batandiiha ohumujojoberesa ni bamuloma abaŋe ahabonero ahalaga haati obuŋangi obu gaali ni nawo gabutusa yiri Hatonda. Hino bahihola olwʼohwenda humuhema.
8.12: Yesu ni gaŋulira ebibono byawe, nga bimulumya omwoyo, nga geesa omuuya ahena abaloma ati, “Lwahiina abaatu bʼomulembe guno basunga ahabonero aheŋunjisa? Mbalomera ehituufu ti ŋaŋuma habonero ahabanahabaŋe.”
8.13: Ngʼaŋo abaleha aŋo, nindi aniina eryato gambuha gagameyo engereha wʼenyanja. Ehisimbulusa hyʼAbafalisaayo ni Herode (Mat 16:5-12)
8.14: Mu lugendo luno, abeegi ba Yesu baali bebiriiye ohuwoŋa ebiryo ebihena ohutusaho omugaati omulala ogu baali ni nagwo mu lyato.
8.15: Ni baali ni batiina nga Yesu abaloma mu lugero nʼabalabula ati, “Mwegenderese, mwehuume batabadulinga nʼehisimbulusa hyʼAbafalisaayo nʼehya habaha Herode.”
8.16: Nga nibo begeyamo abeene nʼabeene baati, “Alomire atyo olwohuba ndihuwoŋa ebiryo ebihena!”
8.17: Aye Yesu ni gamanya ehi baali ni begeyamo ngʼababuusa ati, “Lwahiina muŋeega hu hyʼohuŋuma biryo ebihena? Nʼohwosa haati muhiiri hufaania era mutategeera? Emyoyo jenywe jihiiri mihahanyafu?
8.18: Muli nʼemoni aye sijibona? Era muli nʼamatwi aye sigaŋulira? Simuhebulira?
8.19: Olu nabbwaga mu migaati etaanu nagabira abaatu ekumi etaanu, mwahumbaania ebisero byʼobukukumuhira ebijufu binga?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Ehumi nabibiri.”
8.20: Nga nindi ababuusa ati, “Ate olu nabbwaga mu migaati omusanvu nagabira abaatu ekumi ene, mwahumbaania ebisero byʼobukukumuhira ebijufu binga?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Ebisero musanvu.”
8.21: Ngʼaŋo ababuusa ati, “Nʼohwosa haati muhiiri hutegeera ehi ndomire?” Yesu aŋonia omuŋofu mu habuga hʼe Bbesusayida
8.22: Ngʼaŋo Yesu nʼabeegi babe boola mu hibuga ehi balanga baati Bbesusayida. Nga ŋabaaŋo abaatu abaŋira omusinde omuŋofu aŋa gaali bamwegalihira amuŋambeho gahaŋona.
8.23: Nga Yesu aŋamba omusinde oyo omuŋofu hu muhono, amutusa ebulafu wʼahabuga aho. Ni boola eyo ngʼafuuja hu moni jʼomuŋofu, amuŋamba hu moni, nga ko amubuusa ati, “Obona?”
8.24: Omuŋofu ni galimbula gaamoga ngʼamugobolamo ati, “Mbona abaatu abagenda aye baafanira hyʼemisaala.”
8.25: Nga nindi Yesu gongera ohumuŋamba hu moni, omusinde oyo ni galimbula gahaŋaasa, ngʼemoni jije jirimbuha abona hiisi hiitu bulaŋi.
8.26: Ngʼaŋo Yesu amuseebula gagameyo ewaawe nʼamuloma ati, “Otagamayo mu habuga aho.” Peetero abbutula ati Yesu nje Kurisito (Mat 16:13-20; Luk 9:18-21)
8.27: Ngʼaŋo Yesu atiina nʼabeegi babe mu bitahere ebirirene ehibuga ehi balanga baati Kayisaaliya ehya Filipi. Ni baali ni batiina, nga Yesu abuusa abeegi babe ati, “Abaatu bandanga baatye?”
8.28: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Ŋaliŋo abaloma baati ndiiwe Yowaane Omubatiza. Abandi baati ndiiwe naabbi Eliya, ate abandi baati oli mulala hu banaabbi.”
8.29: Ngʼaŋo ababuusa ati, “Ne enywe muloma muuti ndiise ani?” Nga Peetero amugobolamo ati, “Ndiiwe Kurisito oyu Hatonda gafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu.”
8.30: Nga Yesu abahamiirisa ehi Peetero alomire batahiromeraho muutu yesiyesi. Yesu aloma hu hufa nʼohulamuha huhwe (Mat 16:21-28; Luk 9:22-27)
8.31: Ngʼaŋo Yesu atandiha ohubasomesa ngʼolu Omwana wʼOmuutu ali nʼohubonaabona bugali era abaatu abahulu mu gwanga, nʼabatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda, nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi bamwegaane. Era bamwite aye oluvanyuma lwʼendaalo edatu, aliramuha.
8.32: Bino gabibaloma butereefu natabbumbirya. Ehyaŋwamo nga Peetero aŋira Yesu hu tulo ngʼamuhayula olwʼohuloma ebibono hyʼebyo.
8.33: Cooka Yesu ni gacuuha gaaheja egongo, gahubba emoni hu beegi babe abandi, ngʼahayula Peetero ati, “Pwe mu moni, oli Sitaani! Sooli huŋeega hu mulimo gwa Hatonda ogwandeeta aye oli huŋeega hu byʼabaatu!”
8.34: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Yesu alanga abaatu abaali ohuupi aŋo ko nʼabeegi babe besende aŋa gaali ngʼabaloma ati, “Hiisi muutu owenda ohuba omuloobera wange, ateehwa ohwefiirisa byosibyosi abe muheneerefu ohubbeeda omusalabba gugwe era agende ni neese.
8.35: Hiri hiityo olwohuba hiisi oweheneerera obulamu wuwe, alibufiirwa aye hiisi afiirwa obulamu wuwe hu lwange nʼolwa Maŋuliro Amalaŋi alibunoŋola.
8.36: “Ale higasa hiina omuutu ohuba nʼobuŋinda wohu hyalo huno wosiwosi aye gafiirwa obulamu wuwe?
8.37: Ale dala ŋaliŋo ehi omuutu aŋanga ohuŋaayo ko gagobosaŋo obulamu wuwe ni buba ni buhenire ohugota?
8.38: Hiisi oyu esoni jiŋamba olwʼese nʼolwehibono hyange nʼali mu baatu abʼomulembe guno omubi ogwawuhana hu Hatonda, nʼOmwana wʼOmuutu yeesi alimwegaana olu aligobolera mu ŋono lya Semwana nʼabamalayika abagwalaafu ni bamuŋerehera.”

9.1: Ngʼaŋo Yesu geyongera ohubaloma ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu ti ŋaliŋo abandi hu enywe abemereeye ŋano, abatalifa ohutusaho ni bahenire ohubona Obuŋugi wa Hatonda ni buujire nʼamaani.” Emboneha ya Yesu yicuuha (Mat 17:1-13; Luk 9:28-36)
9.2: Ni ŋabitaŋo endaalo mukaaga, nga Yesu atiina ni Peetero, Yakobbo, ni Yowaane mu kweho abatangirira baja baniina hu olusozi olwegingihiriri. Ni boola eyo, abeegi babe abo bali baheja ngʼefaani yiye yicuuha ngʼafaana lundi.
9.3: Ebyambalo bibye nga bimeregenya, bipepya bugali ni ŋaŋuma kadi mulala hu hyalo owaali nʼasobola ohubyosa gabituhusa ohwaga aŋo.
9.4: Ngʼaŋo babona abanaabbi ba Hatonda Eliya ni Musa ni baŋaya ni Yesu.
9.5: Nga Peetero aloma Yesu ati, “Musomesa, hiraŋi ti efe huli ŋano. Leha hutongoleŋo ebitiira bidatu. Hirala hibe hihyo, ehindi hya Musa, nʼehindi hyʼEliya.”
9.6: Peetero galoma atyo olwohuba niye nʼabahye baali batiiye bugali ni bahaya nʼehyohuloma.
9.7: Nga ŋabaaŋo ehireri ehyaja hyabawiiha nʼehisisigo hyahyo era ngʼejanjaasi liŋwera mu hireri ehyo ni ŋaliŋo aloma ati, “Ono njʼOmwana wange omuhoda, muŋulirise ebi abaloma.”
9.8: Abeegi babe ni bagangamuha, sibabona muutu wundi ali ni nabo, ohutusaho Yesu yeŋene.
9.9: Ni baali ni baniinuha ohuŋwa hu lusozi, nga Yesu abahamiirisa ati, “Ebi muweene mutabiromeraho muutu wundi, ohwola olu Omwana wʼOmuutu aliramuha.”
9.10: Era boosi nga bagondera ehi gabaloma, ni bebuusa abeene nʼabeene baati, “Ategehiise hiina nʼalomire hu hulamuha?”
9.11: Ngʼaŋo bamubuusa baati, “Lwahiina abasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda baloma baati naabbi Eliya ali nʼohweheerera ohugobola ko Kurisito gaaje?”
9.12: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Hituufu, Eliya ali nʼohweheerera ohugobola atereese emyoyo jʼabaatu. Aye lwahiina hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti Omwana wʼOmuutu ateehwa ohuboneresebwa bugali era abaatu bamwegaane?
9.13: Aye mbalomera ti Eliya gahena hale ohuuja era abaatu bamuhola byosibyosi ebi bendire, ngʼolu Ebyaŋandihiwa byamulomaho.” Yesu aŋonia omuseere aliho omusambwa (Mat 17:14-21; Luk 9:37-43)
9.14: Yesu nʼabeegi babe abadatu ni baŋwa hu lusozi, nga bagaana ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ni betolooye abeegi babe abandi era abasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda ni bali huhubba ni nabo embaha.
9.15: Abaatu ni bahubba emoni hu Yesu nga basangaala bugali, nga baduluma ohutiina eyi ali ohumusangaalira.
9.16: Nga Yesu abuusa abeegi babe ati, “Hiina ehi muli huhubba embaha ni nabo?”
9.17: Mulala mu hiŋindi hyʼabaatu abaali aŋo ngʼamugobolamo ati, “Omusomesa, kuleteeye musaani yange aliho omusambwa ogumugaana ohuloma.
9.18: Hiisi olu gumubanda gumuhubba ehigo, ngʼatumbeera efulo mu munwa, galuma ameeno era nga gumuŋandalasa. Sungire abeegi babo ohugumubbingaho aye nga bibahaya.”
9.19: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Enywe abaatu bʼomulembe guno abaŋuma hufugiirira, ndihena ni nenywe ahamanga ahaaga hatye ko mube nʼohufugiirira, ndyosa ŋeena ohubehaliiriha? Mundeetere ŋano omuseere.”
9.20: Ngʼaŋo bamumuŋirira. Omusambwa ni gwabona Yesu, aŋo ni naaŋo nga gubanda omuseere, gumujugumisa, gumuhubba ehigo gegalangusa, nʼatumba efulo mu munwa.
9.21: Nga Yesu abuusa semwana yʼomuseere oyo ati, “Omusambwa guno gumuhenireho hamanga hi?” Nga niye agobolamo ati, “Ohuŋwera erala mu buŋere buwe.
9.22: Era efunda nyingi gubaaye gumudanyanga mu muliro, oba mu maaji, gumwite. Cooka nʼoba nʼoŋanga tuŋambire ehisasabirisi, otuyeede.”
9.23: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Olomire oti nimba ni panga? Manyire ti byosibyosi bisoboha, omuutu anaba nʼohufugiirira.”
9.24: Ngʼaŋo semwana yʼomuseere agobolamo ni gekakaba ati, “Fugiirira, ohutusaho ti Musengwa njeede, mu hufugiirira hwange tabamo hwemoota!”
9.25: Yesu ni gabona eduuli lyʼabaatu abandi ni baduluma ni batiina aŋa gaali ngʼahayuhira omusambwa ati, “Musambwawe ogusiriŋasa era ogutaloma kulagira ohuŋwa hu museere oyo era soomugobolangaho nindi.”
9.26: Nga wangewe omusambwa ogwo gujugumisa omuseere ebyembaha ebyene, nʼohwiteera nga pohu gutaaye nga ko gumuŋwaho gumuleha nʼajalaaye hyʼafuuye. Abahira obungi hu baaliŋo beboneraho nga baloma baati, “Afuuye!”
9.27: Aye Yesu ngʼamuŋamba hu muhono amwinyosa, nga gemeerera.
9.28: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, Yesu ni gengira mu nyumba, ngʼabeegi babe bamubuusa baati, “Lwahiina ndihusobola hubbinga omusambwa ogwo hu museere?”
9.29: Nga niye abagobolamo ati, “Omusambwa ogwʼengeri yino sigubbingiha hu muutu aŋabula husaba.” Yesu nindi aloma hu hufa huhwe (Mat 17:22-23; Luk 9:43b-45)
9.30: Ngʼaŋo Yesu nʼabeegi babe baŋwa mu hitehere ehyo nga batiina ni babitira mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya. Yesu sigendire abaatu abandi ohumanya aŋa ali,
9.31: olwohuba gaali gegeresa abeegi babe nʼabaloma ati, “Omwana wʼOmuutu baja humuŋaayo eyiri abaatu bamwite aye ni baliba ni bahenire ohumwita, ŋalibitaŋo endaalo edatu ngʼalamuha.”
9.32: Cooka sibategeera ehi gabaloma era baatya nʼohumubuusa. Omuutu ahira ohuba owʼeŋono eyiri Hatonda (Mat 18:1-5; Luk 9:46-48)
9.33: Ngʼaŋo Yesu nʼabeegi babe boola mu hibuga hyʼe Kaperanawumu. Ni bengira mu nyumba, nga Yesu abuusa abeegi babe ati, “Muŋahenenga hu hiina mu ngira?”
9.34: Aye nga nibo esoni jibaŋamba baŋoleera huŋoleera, olwohuba mu ngira baali baŋahene ni bebuusa njʼani hu bo ahira ohuba owʼeŋono.
9.35: Nga Yesu gehala alanga abeegi babe ehumi nʼababiri begerere aŋa ali. Ngʼabaloma ati, “Hiisi owenda ohuba owʼeŋono, ali nʼohweherera geyise afuuhe muŋeeresa wa basigaayeŋo bosibosi.”
9.36: Ngʼaŋo aŋamba omwana omuŋere owaali aŋaapi, amwemeeresa ŋagati waawe. Ngʼamufumberera, ahena abaloma ati,
9.37: “Hiisi asangaalira omwana omuŋere hyʼono hu lwange, aba asangaliiye ndiise. Nindi hiisi owusangalira ese, aba saasangaalira ndiise aye aba asangaliiye oyo owaatuma.” Atatusoosa saaba musigu (Luk 9:49-50)
9.38: Ngʼaŋo mulala hu beegi babe oyu balanga Yowaane aloma Yesu ati, “Omusomesa, hwaweene omuutu nʼabbinga emisambwa hu baatu nʼatambisa esiina liryo, efe nga humuloma alehere aŋo olwohuba simulobera wuwo hyefe.”
9.39: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Simugesyangaho ohulobera omuutu hyʼoyo, olwohuba hiisi muutu ahola ebyamaliholiho nʼatambisa obuŋangi obuli mu siina lyange, saaŋanga hwefudula mu hamanga ahatotono gandomaho bubi.
9.41: Mbalomera ehituufu ti hiisi abaŋa omwendo gwʼamaaji ohunywa olwohuba muli baloobera bange, mu buli ngeri Hatonda alimusasula. Ebihongeresa abaatu ohuhola ehibi (Mat 18:6-9; Luk 17:1-2)
9.42: “Era omuutu yesiyesi aleetera mulala hu baŋere bano abafugiirira ohubbenga, aŋoomera humusidiha ogubaale ogusito mu mamiro, bamudanya mu buliba.
9.43: Olwʼehyo hanye muhono gugwo njʼoguhuleetera ohwonoona, gutemeeho. Hiraŋi obe wʼomuhono mulala aye osune obulamu obutaŋwaŋo ohuhira olu osigasa emihono jombi aye bahudanya mu hifo omu oja husihiiriha,
9.44: omuli omuliro ogutasima era omutaŋwa enyende.
9.45: “Era hanye hugulu huhwo njʼohuhuleetera ohuhola ehibi hutemeeho. Hiraŋi osune obulamu obutaŋwaŋo nʼoli muleme, ohuhira olu osigasa amagulu gombi aye bahudanya mu hifo omu oja husihiiriha,
9.46: omuli omuliro ogutasima era omutaŋwa enyende.
9.47: “Era hanye emoni yiyo ehuleetera ohuhola ehibi yomoleemo. Hiraŋi obe wa moni ndala aye wingire mu buŋugi wa Hatonda, ohuhira olu osigasa emoni jombi aye bahudanya mu hifo omu oja husihiirihira,
9.48: omuli omuliro ogutasima era omutaŋwa enyende.
9.49: “Ngʼolu ebiryo babitamo omunyu byabamo obunoli, abafugiirira bosibosi balibita mu hyobo hya Hatonda gabaŋwanamo omuliro ohubalongoosa.
9.50: Omunyu omuherehe gwa mugaso aye gunafuuha heresu, oŋanga otye ohugugobosamo obunoli? Olwʼehyo esambo jenywe jibemo obunoli hyʼomunyu era muholaganenga.”

10.1: Yesu ni gaŋwa e Kaperanawumu, ngʼatiina mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya, nga gambuha olwabi Yoludaani atiina mu bitahere ebyʼengereha wʼolwabi. Nga nindi ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu hihumbaanira aŋa gaali era ngʼolu yaali esambo yiye ngʼatandiha ohubasomesa.
10.2: Ngʼaŋo balala hu Bafalisaayo batiina aŋa gaali bamubuusa ni bamuhema baati, “Hihirisiwa omusinde ohubbinga omuhasi wuwe?”
10.3: Niye ngʼabagobolamo ati, “Musa omuhwenda wa Hatonda gabalagira atye?”
10.4: Nga bamuloma baati, “Musa gafugiirira omusinde ohubbinga omuhasi wuwe, amuŋe ebbaluŋa eyihahasa yiiti amubbingire.”
10.5: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Musa gabateeraŋo ehiragiro ehyo lwʼobuhahanyafu wʼemyoyo jenywe,
10.6: aye Ebyaŋandihiwa biroma biiti ohuŋwa hutandiha yʼehyalo, ‘Hatonda gawumba omusinde nʼomuhasi.’
10.7: Olwʼehyo omusinde analehenga semwana ni nyina, nga geŋimba nʼomuhasi wuwe,
10.8: nga bombi bafuuha mubiri mulala. Olwo nga sibahiiri babiri, wabula mulala.
10.9: Kale omuutu saaŋimbululanga ehi Hatonda gaŋimba ŋalala.”
10.10: Ni gaŋwa mu baatu gengira mu nyumba nʼabeegi babe, abeegi nga bamuloma gongere ohubanyonyola hu songa yʼohubbinga omuhasi.
10.11: Ngʼaŋo abaloma ati, “Hiisi abbinga omuhasi wuwe, ngʼahena aleeta owundi, aba aholire obuhwedi.
10.12: Era singa omuhasi anoba hu wamwe, gahena gasuna obufumbo obundi, aba aholire obuhwedi.” Yesu asabira abaana abaŋere ekabi (Mat 19:13-15; Luk 18:15-17)
10.13: Lulala ŋaaliŋo abaatu abaŋira abaana abaŋere eyiri Yesu abaŋambeho abalombere ekabi aye abeegi babe nga babahayula hubahayula.
10.14: Yesu ni gabona ehi abeegi babe bahola, ngʼabaluŋira, abaloma ati, “Mulehe abaana abaŋere baaje eyi ndi. Mutabagaana, olwohuba abaatu abali hyʼabo, mbabengira mu buŋugi wa Hatonda.
10.15: Mbalomera ehituufu ti hiisi muutu ateesiga Hatonda hyʼomwana omuŋere ngʼolu geesiga abasaaye babe, saalingira mu buŋugi wa Hatonda.”
10.16: Ngʼaŋo alera abaana abo abaŋere, ngʼabaŋambaho abasabira ekabi. Yesu nʼomusinde omuŋinda (Mat 19:16-30; Luk 18:18-30)
10.17: Nindi Yesu ni gatandiha olugendo lulwe, nga ŋabaaŋo omusinde owaduluma gatiina eyi gaali ngʼahubba amafuha mu moni jije, ngʼamubuusa ati, “Omusomesa omulaŋi, kole hi ko sune obulamu obutaŋwaŋo?”
10.18: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Wema huhi ohunanga omulaŋi ate nga ŋaŋuma mulaŋi ohutusaho Hatonda yeŋene?
10.19: Omanyire ebiragiro bya Hatonda ebiroma biiti; ‘Siwiitanga muutu, soholanga buhwedi, siwiibanga, otabeŋeranga muutu ehi ataholire, otalyahanga byabeene, oŋanga lataawo ni maawo eŋono?’ ”
10.20: Omusinde oyo ngʼagobola mu Yesu ati, “Omusomesa, ohuŋwera erala mu buŋere wange nʼohwosa haati ebiragiro ebyo byosibyosi mbyoheresa.”
10.21: Nga Yesu alengerera omusinde oyo ngʼamusasira. Ngʼamuloma ati, “Ohibuliraho ehiitu hirala. Tiina otunde ebibyo byosibyosi, ebbeesa ejinaŋwemo ojigabire abagadi, ko ohene wuuje obe muloobera wange, olisuna obuŋinda mwigulu.”
10.22: Omusinde oyo ni gaŋulira ebyo gaŋulyana era gaŋwaŋo nʼawomboŋaaye olwohuba gaali nʼobuŋinda oweene obungi.
