10.23: Nga Yesu getoloosa abaaliŋo emoni, ngʼahena aloma abeegi babe ati, “Nga hiriba higosi abaŋinda ohwingira mu buŋugi wa Hatonda!”
10.24: Ngʼabeegi babe beŋunja ebibono bibye ebyo era ngʼobuti wubaŋamba. Cooka nindi nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Baana enywe, nga higosi omuŋinda ohwingira mu buŋugi wa Hatonda!
10.25: Hyangu bugali weene engamiya ohubita mu ŋundu lyʼepiso, ohuhira omuŋinda ohwingira mu buŋugi wa Hatonda!”
10.26: Ngʼaŋo ehyo ko hyongerera erala ohweŋunjisa abeegi babe, nga bamubuusa baati, “Olwo ŋaahani njʼani aŋanga ohunoŋoha?”
10.27: Nga Yesu abalengerera ahena abaloma ati, “Eyiri abaatu, higosi ohwenoŋola aye eyiri Hatonda ebiitu byosibyosi bisoboha era ŋabula ehimuhaya.”
10.28: Ngʼaŋo Peetero aloma Yesu ati, “Efe hwaleha ebyefe byosibyosi, nga huuja hube baloobera babo.”
10.29: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu ti ŋaŋuma muutu owaleha amago gage, oba abaganda babe, oba ababoojo, oba nyina, oba semwana, oba abaana babe, oba omuŋuluko gugwe, hu lwange nʼolwa Maŋuliro Amalaŋi,
10.30: atalisuna mu bulamu buno owohu hyalo, emirundi cikumi ejʼebyo ebi gafiirwa: amago, abaganda babe, ababoojo, abasaaye babe, abahasi, abaana, omuŋuluko, ohwo taaho nʼohumuŋalaana. Era mu biseera ebyomu moni, alisuna nʼobulamu obutaŋwaŋo.
10.31: Aye bangi hu begingihiriri mu hiseera hino abaliba abaŋaasi, nindi bangi hu baŋaasi mu hiseera hino abaliba abegingihiriri.” Yesu aloma hu hufa huhwe efunda eyohudatu (Mat 20:17-19; Luk 18:31-34)
10.32: Ŋaahani Yesu nʼaba gaali ni nabo baali mu lugendo, ni batiina mu hibuga hyʼe Yerusaalemu. Yesu gaali abatangiriyemo, nʼabalehireŋo ahamanga. Hino nga hyeŋunjisa abeegi babe nga hiŋa nʼabaatu abandi abaali ni babaŋwaho egongo obuti. Nga geeta amagulu abeegi babe ehumi nʼababiri bamwolaho. Nga nindi abagobosa hu tulo, atandiha ohubalomera ebyali ni bija humwolaho.
10.33: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Huli hutiina e Yerusaalemu; eyo baja hulya mu Mwana wʼOmuutu oluhwe bahene bamuŋeyo eyiri abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda, nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi. Era baja humusalira ogwʼohufa era bamuŋeyo eyiri abalugendwa.
10.34: Abo nibo baja humujeherera, bahene bamufujeho agate, bamuhubbe efaalu era bamwite. Ni ŋalibitaŋo endaalo edatu, aliramuha.” Ohusaba hwa Yakobbo ni Yowaane (Mat 20:20-28)
10.35: Ngʼaŋo Yakobbo ni Yowaane, abasaani ba Zebbedaayo, bolerera Yesu, bamuloma baati, “Omusomesa, hwenda otuholere ehiitu hyosihyosi ehi hunahulombe.”
10.36: Nga Yesu ababuusa ati, “Mwenda mbaholere hi?”
10.37: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Nʼonahehale hu tebe eyʼeŋono mu buŋugi buwo, hwenda oganye hwihale huhulirane, mulala hu muhono gugwo omulungi, nʼowundi hu mugooda.”
10.38: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Ehi musunga simuhitegeera. Muŋanga ohunywa hu hihopo ehyʼohubonaabona ehi nja hunywa, oba ohubatiziwa ohwʼohweyiniha mu hubonaabona ohu nja hubatiziwa?”
10.39: Nga nibo bamugobolamo baati, “Husobola.” Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Hituufu mwesi mulinywa hu hihopo ehyʼohubonaabona ehi nja hunywaho era mulibatiziwa mu ngeri eyi nja hubatiziwamo.
10.40: Aye ehyʼohwihala ni mundirene hu muhono omulungi oba omugooda, sindiise ahigaba. Ebifo ebyo, omwene alibiŋa abo aba gabitegehera.”
10.41: Abeegi bahyawe ehumi ni baŋulira ehi Yakobbo ni Yowaane basungire, nga babaluŋira.
10.42: Olwʼehyo nga Yesu abalanga bosibosi baje bahumbaanire aŋa ali. Ngʼabaloma ati, “Mumanyire muuti abaŋugi bʼAbatali Bayudaaya benda babaŋeerese era abatangirisi baawe benda abaatu aba baŋuga bamanye baati babaliho obuŋangi.
10.43: Aye sihiri nʼohuba hiityo eyiri enywe. Mu nywe, hiisi owenda ohuba omuhulu, ali nʼohuba muŋeeresa wʼabahye,
10.44: era hiisi owenda ohuba omutangirisi, ali nʼohuba mwidu wa basigaayeŋo.
10.45: “NʼOmwana wʼOmuutu sigaaja bamuŋeerese aye niiye ohuŋeeresa era nʼohuŋayo obulamu wuwe ohuba endiŋi ohununula abaatu oluhulende.” Yesu aŋonia Bbarutimaayo (Mat 20:29-34; Luk 18:35-43)
10.46: Ngʼaŋo Yesu nʼabeegi babe, nʼoguŋindi gwʼabaatu abaali ni bamulonda, boola mu hibuga e Yeriko. Eyo yaaliyo omusinde omuŋofu owehalanga hu ngira nʼasungirisa. Omusinde oyo baali bamulanga baati Bbarutimaayo (amahulu gesiina eryo baati omusaani wa Timaayo). Yesu nʼaba gaali ni nabo ni baali ni batula ehibuga, nga bagaana omusinde oyo omuŋofu ni gehaaye hu tulo wʼengira.
10.47: Bbarutimaayo ni gaŋulira ati Yesu Omunazaleesi njʼabitaŋo, ngʼatandiha ohulangirira nʼaloma ati, “Yesu Omwijuhulu wa Dawudi, pambire ehisa!”
10.48: Nga bangi hu baatu abomu hiŋindi bamuhayula ni bamuloma aŋoleere. Cooka niye nga gegumya hwegumya ohulangirira ati, “Mwijuhulu wa Dawudi, pambire ehisa!”
10.49: Ngʼaŋo Yesu geema, aloma ati, “Mumulange gaaje.” Nga bamulanga bamuloma baati, “Guma omwoyo, yinyoha ahulanga.”
10.50: Ngʼaŋo adanya ehihooti ehi gaalimo, genyoha mangu, atiina aŋali Yesu.
10.51: Nga Yesu amubuusa ati, “Wenda kuholere hiina?” Ngʼomuŋofu amugobolamo ati, “Musomesa, njigule emoni, mbone.”
10.52: Ngʼaŋo Yesu amuloma ati, “Kale tiina, ohufugiirira huhwo, huhuŋonisye.” Ŋaweene aŋo ngʼemoni jʼomusinde oyo jirimbula atandiha ohubona era nga yeesi geŋimba hu baali ni balonda hu Yesu.

11.1: Ŋaahani Yesu nʼabeegi babe ni baali ni banatere ohwola mu hibuga hyʼe Yerusaalemu, njʼohuloma ni boolire mu bubuga obuhirireene obuli mu hiiho gʼolusozi lwʼEmisaala Emizayiti, ahʼe Bbesufage ni Bbesaniya, nga Yesu atuma babiri hu beegi babe ati,
11.2: “Mutiine mu hitehere ehi mulengera mu moni. Ni munaabe ni mwahengiramo muuti, munaabone nasugirya eperepere eyi muutu ahiiri hwihalangaho ni bayisidihire hu hihongo, muyiwoŋolole muyindeetere ŋano.
11.3: Singa ŋanaabeŋo ababuusa ati, ‘Lwahiina muyiwoŋolola?’ Munamugobolemo muuti; ‘Musengwa njʼayenda era nʼanabe nʼahenire ehi ayetagira banayigobose ŋano mu wangu.’ ”
11.4: Ngʼaŋo batiina, nga bagaana nasugirya eperepere ni yemereeye ebulafu ŋa mulyango gwʼenyumba nʼeri sidihe hu hihongo ŋaapi nʼengira, nga bayiwoŋolola.
11.5: Nga ŋabaaŋo balala hu baali ni bemereeye aŋo, abababuusa baati, “Muhola hiina ehyo? Lwahiina muwoŋolola nasugirya eyo?”
11.6: Ngʼabeegi abo babagobolamo ngʼolu Yesu gaali nʼabalomire. Nga bala babaleha batiina ni nasugirya.
11.7: Ngʼaŋo abeegi batangirisa nasugirya eyo bayiŋirira Yesu. Nga bayaalaho hu mugongo engoye jaawe, Yesu ayiihalaho batandiiha olugendo.
11.8: Ni baali ni batiina nga bangi huba gaali ni nabo baala engoye jaawe mu ngira Yesu abiteho, nʼabandi nga baaliriramo obusaga wʼebisaala obuliho amahoose obu baabbwaga hu misaala. Bino babihola olwʼohuŋa Yesu eŋono.
11.9: Ngʼaŋo abaali ni batangiriiye, nʼabaali ni bamuŋwaho egongo ni bahoohera ŋamugulu baati, “Musengwa aŋeewe eŋono.” Ali nʼekabi oyo owuujira mu siina lya Musengwa,
11.10: Hatonda aŋe ekabi owahabaha wa sehulu yeefe Dawudi obuuja ohugobolaŋo. Musengwa, ali Ŋamugulu Obugali, aŋeewe eŋono.
11.11: Ngʼaŋo Yesu goola mu hibuga hyʼe Yerusaalemu, gengira mu Yekaalu. Ni gahena ohuhubba emoni hu hiisi hiitu nʼohubona ebyali ni bitiina mu moni, ngʼatula nʼabeegi babe ehumi nʼababiri batiina e Bbesaniya, olwohuba owiire waali huupi hwira. Yesu aŋwaba omusaala omutiini (Mat 21:18-19)
11.12: Hu ludaalo olwagobolaho, Yesu nʼabeegi babe ni baali ni baŋwa e Bbesaniya ohwagamayo e Yerusaalemu, nga Yesu aŋulira enjala nʼemuluma.
11.13: Ni galengera omusaala omutiini oguliho amahoose, ngʼatiina aje abone hanye aŋanga ohwagaanaho ebibala. Ni gagwolaho sigagaanaho hibala kadi hirala ohutusaho amahoose ameerere goŋene, olwohuba sibyali biro ebi mitiini jibeeraho ebibala.
11.14: Ngʼaŋo aguloma ati, “Ohuŋwa olwa leero ŋatabaŋo nindi muutu alirya ebibala bibyo!” Abeegi babe nga baŋulira nʼaloma ebibono ebyo. Yesu abbinga abaali ni batundira mu Yekaalu (Mat 21:12-17; Luk 19:45-48; Yow 2:13-22)
11.15: Yesu nʼabeegi babe ni boola e Yerusaalemu nga Yesu gengira mu lunya lwa Yekaalu atandiha ohubbingamo abaali ni batundiramo nʼabaali ni bagula. Ngʼagengula emeeza jʼabaswanisa ebbeesa, nʼefoomu jʼabaali ni batunda enjiiwa.
11.16: Era ngʼasibira hiisi muutu ohubisya ebiitu mu lunya lwʼe Yekaalu.
11.17: Ngʼaŋo asomesa abaaliŋo ati, “Hatonda sigaloma mu byaŋandiihiwa ati, ‘Enyumba yange yinaabenga nyumba omu baatu bananjumirihisyenga? Ne enywe muyifuuhisye pungulu eyi bakondo behwehamo!’ ”
11.18: Abatangirisi bʼabasengi nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda ni baŋulira ebi Yesu aholire nʼebi alomire, nga batandiiha ohusala amagesi agʼohumwita. Hino bahihola olwohuba beralihirira engeri eyi hiŋindi hyʼabaatu hyosihyosi hyali ni hisangaliiye esomesa yiye.
11.19: Owiire ni wiira, nga Yesu nʼabeegi babe baŋwa mu hibuga baagamayo eyi bamenyanga. Ehyʼohwega ohuŋwa hu musaala omutiini (Mat 21:20-22)
11.20: Ni wahya mu mugamba, Yesu nʼabeegi babe ni baali ni babita hu mutiini gula ogu Yesu gaali nʼaŋwebe nga babona ni gwomire ohuŋwera erala hu hiholo.
11.21: Nga Peetero ahebulira ebyaliŋo aloma Yesu ati, “Musomesa, bona! Omusaala omutiini ogu waŋwebe gwomire!”
11.22: Nga Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Mwesige Hatonda.
11.23: Mbalomera ehituufu ti singa omuutu gesiga Hatonda aŋanga ohuloma olusozi luno ati, ‘Siguha ŋano oje wedaanye mu buliba’ era ehi alomire hyabaŋo. Ehyetagisa hiri hirala, hya muutu hutabuusabuusa mu mwoyo gugwe aye gafugiirira ati ehi aloma hinolerere.
11.24: Olwʼehyo mbahahasa ti hiisi ehi munalombenga Hatonda, mufugiirire mu myoyo jenywe muuti muhenire ohuhisuna era mulihisuna.
11.25: “Era hiisi olu muneŋengayo eyiri Hatonda mu husaba, ni ŋabangaŋo abbengire eyi oli, omusoniŋanga ko weesi Senywe ali mwigulu ahusoniŋe ebibi bibyo.
11.26: Aye singa soomusoniŋa, weesi Senywe ali mwigulu saalihusoniŋa bibi bibyo.” Abatangirisi babuusa eyi Yesu atusa obuŋangi (Mat 21:23-27; Luk 20:1-8)
11.27: Ngʼaŋo nindi Yesu nʼabeegi babe boola e Yerusaalemu. Yesu ni gaali nʼagenda mu lunya lwʼe Yekaalu ngʼabatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi, nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga, batiina aŋa gaali.
11.28: Nga bamubuusa baati, “Otusa ŋeena obuŋangi obuhuginiha ohuhola ebiitu ebyo ebi ohola? Era njʼani owahuŋa obuŋangi owo?”
11.29: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Keesi leha mbabuuse ehibuuso hirala. Ni munangobolemo nga ko mbalomera eyi tusa obuŋangi obu nemaho ohuhola ebi kola.
11.30: Mundomere, Yowaane gatusa ŋeena obuŋangi owʼohubatiza? Gabutusa yiri Hatonda, oba yiri baatu?”
11.31: Ngʼaŋo bala bahubbagania ebiŋeego ni baloma baati, “Humugobolemo huutye? Singa huloma huuti Hatonda njʼowamutuma anatubuuse ati, ‘Kale lwahiina simwafugiirira bya Yowaane oyo?’ ”
11.32: Ate ni baŋeega ohumugobolamo baati, “Abaatu njʼabamutuma” nga hino bahitya olwohuba abaatu bosibosi baali bafugiirira baati Yowaane gaali naabbi dala.
11.33: Ehyaŋwamo nga bamugobolamo baati, “Sihumanyire.” Ngʼaŋo Yesu abaloma ati, “Kale keesi sinabalomere eyi tusa obuŋangi obuukosa ebi kola.”

12.1: Ngʼaŋo Yesu atandiha ohuloma nʼabaatu abo mu ngero. Ngʼabaloma ati, “Ŋaaliŋo omuutu owahoma endimiro eyʼemizabbibbu, ngʼahena ayisitiriraho, ayabamo eroŋo eryohujungirangamo, atongolamo ehitiira hyʼomuhuumi, ngʼahena ayipangisa abaatu nga niye atiina mu gwanga erindi.”
12.2: Ehiseera ehyʼegesa ni hyola, gatuma mulala hu baŋeeresa babe eyiri abapangisa, bamuŋe owiisa wuwe.
12.3: Ngʼaŋo bala baŋamba omuŋeeresa oyo bamuhubba bahena bamubbinga gagama ni ŋabula ehi bamuŋaaye.
12.4: Nga nindi omwene ndimiro abatumira omuŋeeresa owundi. Ngʼoyo bamuhubba oluguma, bahena bamuhola nʼebyobuŋemu.
12.5: Omwene ndimiro sigademba era ngʼatuma owundi. Oyo beeta wiite. Nʼabandi bangi aba omwene ndimiro gatuma ni bababisya mu ngeri njʼenyene. Abandi ni babahubba, nʼabandi ni babeeta.
12.6: “Hu komerero ya byosi omwene ndimiro gaali ahiiriyo nʼomuutu owundi mulala oyu gaali nʼaŋanga ohutuma. Omuutu oyo njʼomusaani wuwe omuhoda. Oyo njʼoyu gasembyayo ohubatumira nʼaloma ati, ‘Omwana wange banamuŋe eŋono bamupeera owiisa wange.’
12.7: Cooka abapangisa ni bamubona nga behobaana baati, ‘Ono njʼomusika. Muhole hu mwite hwegoboseho obusika.’
12.8: Ngʼaŋo bamusindigirisa bamutusa ebulafu wʼendimiro nga bamwitira eyo.
12.9: “Ŋaahani omwene ndimiro alihola hi abapangisa abo? Alitiina gabasihiirisa nʼendimiro gayipangisa abaatu abandi.
12.10: Kahasa ti mwali musomireho ehyaŋandiihiwa ehiroma hiiti; “ ‘Ebaale eri abatongoli batala baati ebi, njʼeryafuuha ehulu eryʼomugaso mu gosigosi.
12.11: Hino Musengwa omwene njʼowahihola, era hyeŋunjisa abahibona.’ ”
12.12: Abasigu ba Yesu ni bahisuna baati olugero olwo alugerire ni luŋamba hu nibo, nga bagesyaho ohwenda ohumuŋamba aye nga batya ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu, nga bamuleha batiina. Ehibuuso ehiŋamba hu huŋa omusolo (Mat 22:15-22; Luk 20:20-26)
12.13: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, abasigu ba Yesu bamutumira balala hu Bafalisaayo nʼababala hu bawagizi ba habaha Herode, baje bamuheme bamuŋambire mu malomere.
12.14: Ngʼaŋo batiina bamuloma baati, “Musomesa, humanyire huuti ewe ofiira hu mazima era obula hu byʼabaatu huhusiima ebinambulamo wabula abaatu bosibosi obabisya mu ngeri njʼenyene nʼobasomesa ebi Hatonda genda bahole aŋabula hwehubbirya. Ŋaahani Muhulu tulomere, hiraŋi ohuŋa Kayisaali habaha wa Barooma omusolo oba bbe? Huŋe omusolo oba hutaguŋa?”
12.15: Aye Yesu ngʼategeera ehi baaliho, ngʼabaloma ati, “Lwahiina mukema? Mundeetere ŋano endusu njibone.”
12.16: Ni bayimuleetera ngʼababuusa ati, “Ehifaananyi nʼamasiina ebiyiriho byʼani?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Bya Kayisaali.”
12.17: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abaloma ati, “Ale ebya Kayisaali mubiŋe Kayisaali, nʼebya Hatonda mubiŋe Hatonda.” Nga bala beŋunja engeri eyi aŋunuhiremo omubaso gwawe. Ehibuuso ehiŋamba hu hulamuha (Mat 22:23-33; Luk 20:27-40)
12.18: Ngʼaŋo balala hu Basadukaayo, bano njʼabatafugiirira baati eriyo ohulamuha, batiina eyiri Yesu bamubuusa baati,
12.19: “Musomesa, Musa omuŋeeresa wa Hatonda gatuŋandiihira egambi ati, ‘Singa omuutu afa galeha namwandu nʼatamusaayemo mwana, mugandaawe ateehwa ohumusika amusaalire abaana.’
12.20: “Ŋaahani ŋaaliŋo aboluganda musanvu. Ngʼomudaayi ahwa omuhasi, cooka ngʼafa nʼatamusaayemo mwana.
12.21: Owohubiri ngʼasika namwandu oyo era yeesi ngʼafa nʼatamusaayemo mwana. Nʼowohudatu yeesi atyo.
12.22: Bosibosi omusanvu nga bambalaho omuhasi oyo, cooka ndi bamusaalamo mwana. Ŋaahani bosibosi ni baali ni baŋooyeŋo ohufa, ngʼomuhasi oyo yeesi afa.
12.23: Olwo ŋaahani hu ludaalo olu baatu bosibosi baliramuhiraho, omuhasi oyo aliba muha ani olwohuba gaaliho muhasi wʼabaatu abo bosibosi?”
12.24: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Aŋo mugotire era ehibaleeteeye ohugota, hutamanya Ebyaŋandihiwa, wayire obuŋangi wa Hatonda.
12.25: Abaatu ni baliramuha, baliba hyʼabamalayika mwigulu, ni batahwa era ni batafumbirwa.
12.26: “Ate mu butuufu suubira ti mwasomaho mu hitabo hya Musa omuŋeeresa wa Hatonda, ebifa hu hulamuha hwʼabafu. Mu hitundu ehiroma hu hadeŋo aha Musa gabona ni hanya cooka ni hataguhuliha, Hatonda galoma Musa ati, ‘Ndiise Hatonda wa Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka ni Yakobbo.’
12.27: Ehyo hiraga ti Ye Hatonda wʼabalamu sosi wʼabafu.” Ehiragiro ehihira obubbala (Mat 22:34-40; Luk 10:25-28)
12.28: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaaŋo mulala hu basomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda owatiina, ngʼaŋulira Abasadukaayo ni bahubba embaha ni Yesu. Ni gabona Yesu nʼabagobooyemo bulaŋi, nga yeesi amubuusa ati, “Hiragiro hiina ehihira byosibyosi?”
12.29: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Ehiragiro ehisinga byosibyosi obubbala cʼehino: ‘Tega ohutwi ewe Yisirayiri, Hatonda Musengwa weefe nje Musengwa yeŋene.
12.30: Era yendanga Musengwa Hatonda wuwo, nʼomwoyo gugwo gwosigwosi, nʼobulamu wuwo wosiwosi, nʼamagesi gago gosigosi, nʼamaani gago gosigosi.’
12.31: Ehiragiro ehironda hwihyo mu bubbala, cʼehino: ‘Yenda omuutu wahyo ngʼolu ewe weyenda wamwene.’ Ebula hiragiro ehindi ehihira ebyo obubbala.”
12.32: Ngʼaŋo omusomesa wʼamagambi oyo aloma Yesu ati, “Musomesa, ogobooyemo bulaŋi. Ehi olomire oti Hatonda ali mulala yeŋene hituufu. Era ŋaŋuma wundi.”
12.33: Era hiroma hiiti “Yendanga Hatonda nʼomwoyo gugwo gwosigwosi, nʼamagesi gago gosigosi, nʼamaani gago gosigosi era yendanga muliranwawo ngʼolu weyenda wamwene. Era ngʼohugondera egambi lino hisinga ebisolo byosibyosi ebi baatu baŋaayo ngʼeŋongo babyohye ni biri bihwiye, ko nʼebindi byosi ebi baatu baŋaayo eyiri Hatonda.”
12.34: Yesu ni gabona omusomesa wʼamagambi ngʼolu amugobooyemo nʼamagesi, ngʼamuloma ati, “Sooli ŋaleeŋi nʼobuŋugi wa Hatonda.” Ohuŋwa hulwo, siŋaaliŋo muutu wundi owesinga ohumubuusa ebibuuso nindi. Kurisito ni Dawudi (Mat 22:41-46; Luk 20:41-44)
12.35: Olundi Yesu ni gaali mu lunya lwa Yekaalu nʼasomesa, ngʼabuusa abaatu ati, “Lwahiina abasomesa bʼamagambi baloma baati Kurisito Mwijuhulu wa Dawudi.
12.36: Ate nga Dawudi omwene, nʼaliho Omwoyo Omutukuvu, galoma ati, “ ‘Hatonda Musengwa gaaloma Musengwa yange ati, Yiihala ni wundireene hu lubega olwʼomuhono gwange omulungi, ohwola olu ndifuula abasigu babo ekookolo eyʼohutaho amagulu gago?’
12.37: “Obanga Dawudi omwene amulanga Musengwawe nindi olwo aŋanga atye ohuba mwijuhulu wuwe?” Ngʼehiŋindi hyʼabaatu abaaliŋo, baŋulirisa ebibono bibye bino nʼamanyonyo. Yesu alabula hu hwehuuma abasomesa bʼamagambi (Mat 23:1-36; Luk 20:45-47)
12.38: Nga Yesu atiina mu moni nʼohubasomesa ati, “Mwehuume mubone ti simuŋamba sambo yʼabasomesa bʼamagambi abagenda ni bambaaye amaganduula amaleeŋi agehwesa hwiroba ohulaga ngʼolu bahihenaho era abenda babaheese mu ngeri eyʼohubaŋa eŋono ni bali mu akisoni
12.39: nʼohwihala mu bifo ebyʼeŋono mu mahumbaaniro nohu mbaga.
12.40: Abanyagulula ebiitu baahena mu mayumba ga banamwandu era abajumirya Hatonda nʼebibono ebyene ebingi olwʼohweraga. Balibaŋa ehiguudyo ehihiraho obubbala.” Ehirabo hya namwandu (Luk 21:1-4)
12.41: Yesu ni gaali ni gehaaye ŋa hifo aŋa baŋeerayo ebirabo mu Yekaalu ngʼabona abaatu bangi ni baŋaayo ebirabo. Abaŋinda bangi nga bataamo ebbeesa ejiŋera.
12.42: Ngʼaŋo eŋwayo namwandu omugadi owatiina gaatamo obubbeesa bubiri obusembayo ohuba owʼomuŋendo omutono obugali.
12.43: Nga Yesu alanga abeegi babe, beegerera aŋa ali, ngʼabaloma ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu namwandu ono omugadi aŋayeyo hibbala bugali, ohuhira abandi bosibosi.
12.44: Bala bataayemo ni batusa hu hingi ehi bali ni nahyo. Aye namwandu ono omugadi, mu bugadi buwe aŋayeyo hyosihyosi ehi abaaye ni nahyo ehibaaye ni hija humuyeeda mu obulamu wuwe.”

13.1: Hu olwo Yesu ni gaali nʼaŋwa hu Yekaalu mulala hu beegi babe ngʼamuloma ati, “Musomesa, oweene otye amabaale gano nʼebizimbe bino ngʼolu biri biŋoono?”
13.2: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Ebizimbe bino ebibbala ebi obona byosibyosi biribulunguha era siŋalibaŋo ebaale wayire erala eririsigala ni liri hu lyahye. Gosigosi baligatepulula gaagwa ŋaasi.”
13.3: Yesu ni gaali ni gehaaye hu lusozi olwʼemisaala Emizayiti ohulengerera Yekaalu, nga Peetero ni Yakobbo ni Yowaane nʼAndereya bamuloma abebireho ehyama. Nga bamubuusa baati,
13.4: “Tulomereho, ebyo biribaaŋo ŋaali? Era habonero hi ahaliraga haati ebyo byosibyosi binatere ohubaŋo?”
13.5: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Mwehuume ŋatabaŋo abadulingadulinga.
13.6: Bangi baliija ni beranga ohutambisa obuŋangi wange era balidulinga bangi.
13.7: Era ni muŋuliranga etalo ŋano ni ŋala, simuŋuŋuhanga. Ejo jiri nʼohubaaŋo aye ekomerero yiriba yihiiri hwola.
13.8: “Amawanga galihubbagana, nʼowahabaha buliwaagala owahabaha obundi. Ŋalibaaŋo musisi mu bitundu bingi hu hyalo era enjala erigwa. Aye aŋo galiba gahiiri gamutumbu.
13.9: “Ne nywe mubeŋo ni muhimanyire era ni mwetegehire, olwohuba balibaŋamba babaŋaayo mu mbuga jʼamagambi. Balibahubbira mu mahumbaaniro gaawe era balibemeha ohuŋosya mu mbuga jʼabaami neja bahabaha ni babahabya ohuba baloobera bange, mubalomere obuhwenda wange era mube bujulizi eyi bali.
13.10: Ekomerero nʼehiiri hwola, Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi gali nʼohubuulirwa eyiri abaatu mu mawanga gosigosi.
13.11: “Era ni banabaŋambenga babaŋira mu mbuga jʼamagambi, simweŋendehereranga ehi munalome aye mulomenga ehyo ehi Hatonda anabaŋenga ohuloma mu hiseera ehyo. Ebibono ebi munalomenga sibinaabenga byenywe aye binaabenga byʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu.
13.12: “Mu hiseera ehyo, abalebe baja hulyanganamo oluhwe owundi gaŋayo owahye ohumwita, nʼabasaawe bʼabaana boosi baliŋaayo abaana baawe. Abaana balijeemera abasaaye baawe era bahena babaŋaayo ohubeeta.
13.13: Era enywe abaatu bosibosi balibacaawa olwohuba baloobera bange. Aye oyo aligumira ebigosi ohwola hu komerero, njʼalinoŋoha.”
13.14: “Ni mulibona ehiitu ehyʼembiho ehi benyinyalya ni bahitaaye mu Yekaalu aŋa hitasaniiye ohuba (asoma bino ategeere), hulwo abaliba mu Buyudaaya, badulumiranga mu bitundu ebyʼesozi.
13.15: Aliba ŋamugulu hu nyumba yiye, nʼaninuhanga, sigengiranga mu nyumba ohutusamo ehiitu hyosihyosi ehyʼohutiina ni nahyo.
13.16: Era aliba hu muga, saagobolanga yingo hwiruhira ebyambalo bibye.
13.17: Mu ndaalo ejo abahasi abaliba ebida nʼabookesa njʼabalisinga ohubonaabona.
13.18: Mwegalihire Hatonda, bino bitabaŋo mu biseera ebyʼefula nʼobuŋololohi obungi.
13.19: “Mu ndaalo ejo, ŋalibaŋo ohubonaabona ohwʼamaani, ni huhira hwosihwosi ohwali ni hubaayeŋo, ohuŋwera erala olu Hatonda gatonda ehyalo nʼohwola hatyane. Era siŋalibaŋo hubonaabona ohuli hyʼohwo.
13.20: Singa Hatonda Musengwa sigahendeesa hu ndaalo ejo ejʼohubonaabona, siŋahaŋonireho muutu kadi mulala. Aye olwʼabo abagatobolamo, endaalo ejo gajipiŋia.
13.21: “Mu hiseera ehyo, omuutu nʼalibaloma ati, ‘Bona! Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu njʼono ŋano,’ oba ati, ‘Bona! Njʼola ŋala,’ simwihirisanga.
13.22: Hiri hiityo olwohuba bangi balidulinga ni beranga Kurisito, oba ni beranga abanaabbi era balihola obubonero nʼebyamaliholiho ebyeŋunjisa, ni hiba ni hiŋangiha babbaamye nʼabatobole ba Hatonda.
13.23: Olwʼehyo, mwehuume mbalomeeye byosibyosi ni bihiiri hubaaŋo. Kale mubeŋo ni muhimanyire era ni mwetegehire!” Amagobola gʼOmwana wʼOmuutu (Mat 24:29-31; Luk 21:25-28)
13.24: “Aye mu ndaalo ejo, ehiseera ehyʼohubonaabona ni hiriba ni hiŋooye, eryuba liribaho ehiirema, nʼomwesi gulisima.
13.25: Emunyeenye jiriŋanuha ŋamugulu jakukumuha, nʼebiri ŋamugulu mu bbanga biri teteema.
13.26: “Mu hiseera ehyo abaatu balibona Omwana wʼOmuutu ni gaajira hu bireri mu ŋono nʼobuŋangi owʼamaani.
13.27: Era alituma abamalayika babe ohutiina mu njuyi josijosi ejʼehyalo, bahumbaanie abaatu babe abatobole ohuŋwa mu hiisi sonda yʼehyalo.” Omusaala omutiini ngʼehyohuboneraho (Mat 24:32-35; Luk 21:29-33)
13.28: “Mubonere hu musaala omutiini muhene mwege. Amasaga gʼomusaala ogwo ni gahena ohukukumuha, gusebuhaho amahoose amanyenyeeri, ngʼomanya oti ebiro ebyʼendobooli binaatere ohwola.
13.29: Mu ngeri njʼenyene, ni mubonanga ebindomireho ni biriŋo, mumanyanga muuti ekomerero yinatere ohwola.
13.30: “Mbalomera ehituufu ti ebiitu bino byosibyosi binahabeeŋo abaatu abʼomulembe guno ni bataŋwaŋo hufa.
13.31: Ehyalo hino nʼebiri ŋamugulu mu bbanga biriŋwaŋo aye ebibono byange sibirigwa ŋaasi.” Ŋabula amanyire oludaalo wayire esaawa (Mat 24:36-44)
13.32: Nga Yesu geyongera abaloma ati, “Cooka ŋaŋuma amanyire oludaalo olwene oba esaawa, eyi biitu ebyo biribeeraŋo, nʼabamalayika mwigulu oba Omwana wa Hatonda sibamanyire, ohutusaho Bbaabba yeŋene njʼamanyire.
13.33: Kale mubeŋo ni mwetegehire! Mutaŋongera, olwohuba simumanyire hiseera hino aŋa hiryolera.
13.34: “Ehiseera hino hunahigehesye hubi muutu ahola nʼaba nʼatiina mu lugendo. Omuutu oyo nʼaba nʼaŋwa mu mago, aleha nʼaŋambisye hiisi muŋeeresa ŋa wuwe omulimo ogwʼohuhola, ngʼahena alagira omuhuumi wʼohu mulyango ohuhuuma.
13.35: Olwʼehyo mubeŋo bulindaala ni mwetegehire, olwohuba simumanyire omwene mago aŋa aligobolera. Hamunga aligobola egulo, oba mu wiire ŋagati oba engoho ni yiholyoha, oba mu mugamba pwipwipwi.
13.36: Atahanda hubagwaho bugwe, gabagaana ni muŋenyuha.
13.37: Ehi mbaloma enywe era njʼehi ndoma nʼabasigaayeyo ti, ‘Mutaŋenyuha! Mubeŋo moni ni mwetegehire.’ ”

14.1: Mu hiseera ehyo, yaali esigaayeyo endaalo ebiri, Embaga yʼAbayudaaya eyʼOhuhebuliriraho Ohubihisya, nʼEmbaga eyi baliiraho emigaati eji batatayemo ehisimbulusa, joole. Abatangirisi bʼabasengi, nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda baali mu husala amagesi agʼohuŋamba Yesu mu ngiso, bamwite.
14.2: Aye nga baloma baati, “Hutamuŋamba mu biseera ebyʼembaga, olwohuba abaatu baja hwediima.” Omuhasi ajuha amafuta agʼebbeeyi hu Yesu (Mat 26:6-13; Yow 12:1-8)
14.3: Mu hiseera ehyo, Yesu ni gaali mu habuga hʼe Bbesaniya mu nyumba ya Simooni owaali omugenge, nʼalya, nga ŋabaaŋo omuhasi owatiinayo nʼecupa erimo amafuta amalaŋi agaŋunya ahaloosa era agʼebbeeyi obugali aga balanga baati narudo. Ni goola ngʼasembula ecupa eyo, amafuta agaalimo ngʼagajuha hu mutwe gwa Yesu.
14.4: Aye balala hu baaliŋo nga baluŋa. Nga baloma baati, “Lwahiina gonoonire amafuta ago atyo?
14.5: Bahagatundire, mwaŋwamo ebbeesa ejibita mu dinaari ebihumi bidatu, bajigabira abagadi.” Boloobya omuhasi oyo mu ngeri eyo.
14.6: Cooka Yesu ngʼabaloma ati, “Lwahiina mumwoloobya? Mumulehe. Ehi gakoleeye hiraŋi.
14.7: Abagadi banabenga ni nenywe bulijo era hiisi olu munendenga munabayeedenga. Aye ese sinja huba ni nenywe ehiseera hyosi.
14.8: Omuhasi ono aholire ehi asobooye. Ajuhire amafuta agahaloosa hu mubiri gwange ni kiiri hufa, nʼagutegeha olwʼohugusiiha.
14.9: Mbalomera ehituufu ti hiisi ŋaatu mu hyalo hyosihyosi eyi banabuulirenga Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi, ni nahino ehi omuhasi ono aholire, banahiromengaho nga bamuhebulira.” Yuda afugiirira ohulya mu Yesu oluhwe (Mat 26:14-16; Luk 22:3-6)
14.10: Ngʼaŋo Yuda Yisikaryoti, mulala hu beegi ba Yesu ehumi nʼababiri, atiina eyiri abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda, ni genda ohulya mu Yesu oluhwe bamuŋambe.
14.11: Abasengi ni baŋulira ehi genda ohubaholera, nga basangaala era nga basuubisa ohumuŋa ebbeesa. Ohuŋwa hulwo nga Yuda atandiha ohwendula ahamanga ahohuŋayo Yesu eyi bali. Yesu alya nʼabeegi babe Embaga eyʼOhubihisya (Mat 26:17-25; Luk 22:7-14; Yow 13:21-30)
14.12: Hu ludaalo oludaayi mu ndaalo jʼEmbaga Eyi baliiraho Emigaati Ejibatataayemo Ehisimbulusa era olu betiraho etaama eperepere eyʼEmbaga eyi bahebuliriraho Ohubihisya, abeegi ba Yesu nga bamubuusa baati, “Wenda huje hutegehere ŋeena eyi onaliire Embaga eyʼOhuhebuliriraho Ohubihisya?”
14.13: Ngʼaŋo Yesu atuma babiri hu bo, nʼabaloma ati, “Mutiine mu hibuga, munaagaane omusinde owetwihire esongo yʼamaaji, mumulonde.
14.14: Mulome omwene nyumba omu anengire muuti; ‘Omusomesa alomire ati mbo ehisenge hiri ŋeena omu niye nʼabeegi babe banaliire Embaga eyʼOhuhebuliriraho Ohubihisya?
14.15: Anabalage ehisenge ehibbala ŋamugulu, mu kalina ehi bahenire ohulongosa nʼohutegeha, kale mutegehere omwo.’ ”
14.16: Ngʼaŋo abeegi basimbuha, batiina mu hibuga. Era baagaana byosibyosi ni biri ngʼolu Yesu gaali nʼabalomire. Ngʼaŋo bategeha Embaga eyʼOhuhebuliriraho Ohubihisya.
14.17: Owiire ni wiira, nga Yesu atiina nʼabeegi babe ehumi nʼababiri.
14.18: Ni baali ni balya, nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu ti mulala hu enywe ali hulya ni neese hatyane, anandyemo oluhwe.”
14.19: Abeegi babe nga banakuŋala era hiisi mulala ngʼabuusa Yesu ati, “Ndiise?”
14.20: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Mulala hu nywe ehumi nʼababiri, ali hutonga ni neese mu lubya.
14.21: Omwana wʼOmuutu baja humwita, ngʼolu Ebyaŋandihiwa bimulomaho. Aye jimwageene oyo amulyamo oluhwe! Hyahamubereeye hiraŋi singa sibamusaala!” Yesu alya nʼabeegi babe ehiiŋulo ehisembayo (Mat 26:26-30; Luk 22:14-20; 1 Kor 11:23-25)
14.22: Ni baali ni bahiirya nga Yesu abugula omugaati. Ni gahena, geyaasa Hatonda, ngʼagubbongolamo aguŋa abeegi babe abaloma ati, “Munaaŋe mulye, guno njʼomubiri gwange.”
14.23: Ngʼaŋo abugula ehihopo hyʼenvinyo. Ni gahena ohweyaasa Hatonda ngʼabaŋa bosibosi bahinyweho.
14.24: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Gano njʼamafugi gange aganahoŋohe hu lwʼabangi, ni gahahasa endagaano epyaha eyi Hatonda aholire.
14.25: Mbalomera ehituufu ti sinja hunywa hu nvinyo yʼemizabbibbu nindi, ohwola olu ndinywa epyaha, mu buŋugi wa Hatonda.”
14.26: Ni bahena ohwemba olwembo olwʼohujumirya Hatonda, nga batula, batiina hu lusozi olwʼemisaala Emizayiti. Yesu aloma ati Peetero anamwegaane (Mat 26:31-35; Luk 22:31-34; Yow 13:36-38)
14.27: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Mwesimwesi munadulume mwandehaŋo, olwohuba hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti: ‘Naheete omwayi, ngʼetaama jisalaaniha.’
14.28: Aye oluvanyuma lwʼohulamuha, ndibeheerera ohutiina e Galilaaya.”
14.29: Ngʼaŋo Peetero amuloma ati, “Wayire abandi bosibosi banadulume bahulehaŋo ese sinahuleheŋo.”
14.30: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Mu butuufu kulomera ti mu hiire ehyene hino, engoho yinaabe yitagobolamo huholyoha efunda eyohubiri, ni wahaneganira emirundi edatu.”
14.31: Cooka Peetero ngʼagobolamo nʼamuhahahisa erala ati, “Wayire hinetagise ohufiira ŋalala ni neewe, sinahwegaane.” Nʼabahye bosibosi nga baloma baatyo. Yesu mu Gesesimane (Mat 26:36-46; Luk 22:39-46)
14.32: Nga Yesu nʼabeegi babe boola mu hifo ehi balanga baati Gasesimane. Ngʼaloma abeegi babe ati, “Muhole ni mwihala ŋano, ese nje sabeho.”
14.33: Ngʼatiina ni Peetero, Yakobbo ni Yowaane era ngʼatandiha ohutya nʼohweralihirira bugali.
14.34: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Omwoyo gwange gwijuuye enaku eyoola nʼohunjita! Musigale ŋano, ni muliŋo moni mutaŋenyuha.”
14.35: Ni geeyongerayo ŋatono mu moni ngʼahubba amafuha gegalihira Hatonda nʼamusaba ni hiba ni hisoboha esaawa eyʼohubonaabona yitamwolaho.
14.36: Ngʼaloma ati, “Bbaabba, ebiitu byosibyosi biŋangiha eyi oli. Tuseho esaawa yino eyʼohubonaabona. Aye ewe ehi wenda hibe njʼehiholewa, sosi ehi ese nenda.”
14.37: Ni gagobolayo nga gagaana Peetero, Yakobbo ni Yowaane ni baŋenyuha, ngʼaloma Peetero ati, “Simooni, oŋenyuha? Ndimusobola hubaŋo moni wayire ohuhena esaawa ndala yonyene?
14.38: Mutaŋenyuha, mubeŋo moni ni musaba ko mutahemewa, mu butuufu emyoyo jenywe miheneerefu aye emibiri minafu.”
14.39: Nga nindi gagamayo asaba ehiitu njʼehyene ngʼolu gasaba oludaayi.
14.40: Ni gagobola nga nindi abagaana ni baŋenyuha, olwohuba emoni jaawe jaali jijuuye ero. Nga bahaya ehyʼohuloma.
14.41: Ni gaagama omulundi ogwohudatu ngʼabaloma ati, “Muhiŋenyuha era muhiŋuumula? Ale mulehere aŋo! Esaawa ohuŋaayo Omwana wʼOmuutu mu buŋangi wʼabaatu ababbengi yoolire.
14.42: Mwinyohe hutiine. Bona! Owundyamo oluhwe njʼoyo gaaja.” Baŋamba Yesu (Mat 26:47-56; Luk 22:47-53; Yow 18:3-12)
14.43: Yesu gaali ahiiroma, ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo Yuda, mulala hu beegi babe ehumi nʼababiri, goola nʼehiŋindi hyʼabaatu abaali ni baŋambire epiima nʼesimbo. Abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda, nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi, ko nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga baali babatumire ohumuŋamba.
14.44: Oyo owalya mu Yesu oluhwe gaali ahenire ohubaloma ati, “Oyu naagwe mu hifuba anaabe nje niye, mumuŋambe muŋire ni mumuhuumire butiribiri.”
14.45: Yuda ni goola, ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo atiina aŋali Yesu amuloma ati, “Musomesa!” Ngʼahena amugwa mu hifuba.
14.47: Aye mulala hu baali ni bemereeye aŋo, ngʼasoŋolayo epiima yiye, atema omwidu wʼomuhulu wʼabasengi ba Hatonda amuhapulaho ohutwi.
14.48: Ngʼaŋo Yesu ababuusa ati, “Mujire ohupamba ni muli nʼepiima nʼebibbiro, hyʼabajire ohuŋamba omuyekera?
14.49: Hiisi ludaalo mbaayenga mba ni nenywe mu lunya lwa Yekaalu ni somesa, ni mutapamba. Aye hino muhiholire, Ebyaŋandihiwa bisobole ohwolerera.”
14.50: Ngʼaŋo abeegi babe bosibosi bamulehaŋo, baduluma.
14.51: Ŋaaliŋo omuseere nalunje owaali nʼatambaaye lugoye lundi ohutusaho olu gaali ni gewihiriiye, ngʼabaatu bamuŋamba nʼalonda hu Yesu.
14.52: Cooka ngʼabeŋunulaho aduluma majula, nʼabaleheeye olugoye. Bemeha Yesu mu moni jʼOluhiiho lwʼAbayudaaya (Mat 26:57-68; Luk 22:54-55,63-71; Yow 18:13-14,19-24)
14.53: Ngʼaŋo baŋira Yesu ewomuhulu wʼabasengi. Abatangirisi bʼabasengi bosibosi nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga, nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi, nga besoloosa beehala mu hijaami.
14.54: Peetero galonda hu Yesu, ni gesambireho ahanaaŋiro. Nga gengirira erala mu lunya lwʼomuhulu wʼabasengi ba Hatonda, gehala nʼabahuumi bʼembuga ŋa hihoso goota omuliro.
14.55: Abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼAboluhiiho lwʼAbayudaaya Olubbala baali muhwendula obujulizi owʼobudulingi obu baneemeho ohwita Yesu aye babuhaya.
14.56: Nga ŋabaaŋo bangi abaŋa obujulizi owʼobudulingi ni bamulumirisa aye obujulizi waawe ni butaŋambagana.
14.57: Era abandi nga benyoha, baŋa obujulizi owʼobudulingi ni bamulumirisa baati,
14.58: “Hwamuŋulira nʼaloma ati, ‘Ndibbwagaŋo Yekaalu yino eyi abaatu baatongola, oluvanyuma mu ndaalo edatu, nditongola eyindi, eyitatongolewa abaatu.’ ”
14.59: Aye obujulizi wa bano woosi ni butaŋambagana.
14.60: Ngʼaŋo omuhulu wʼabasengi ba Hatonda gemeerera mu moni jaawe, abuusa Yesu ati, “Obula ehi ogobolamo? Hiina ehi oloma hu bino ebi bahulumiirisa?”
14.61: Aye Yesu gaŋoleera huŋoleera, nʼasagobolamo. Omuhulu wʼabasengi nga geyongera ohumubuusa ati, “Ndiiwe Kurisito, Omwana wa Hatonda oyu hujumirya?”
14.62: Ngʼaŋo Yesu agobolamo ati, “Ndiise. Era mulibona Omwana wʼOmuutu ni gehaaye hu lubega olwʼomuhono omulungi ogwa Hatonda Omwene Buŋangi era mulimubona ni gaajira hu bireri ebyomwigulu.”
14.63: Ngʼaŋo omuhulu wʼabasengi ahanula ebyambalo ebi gaali ni gambaaye ahena aloma ati, “Hwendera hi obujulizi obundi?
14.64: Muŋuliiye ngʼolu afodogooye. Enywe muŋeega muutye?” Nga bosibosi basalira Yesu omusango baati asaanira ohufa.
14.65: Ngʼabandi batandiiha ohumufujaho agate, bamuwiiha mu moni, nga bamuhubba epuusi ni baloma baati, “Tulomere ahuhubbire.” Ngʼabahuumi bʼembuga bamuŋira ni bamuhubba amaŋi. Peetero geegaana Yesu (Mat 26:69-75; Luk 22:56-62; Yow 18:15-18)
14.66: Peetero ni gaali mu lunya, ngʼeŋwayo mulala hu bahaana abaŋeeresanga ewomuhulu wʼabasengi.
14.67: Ni gamubona ni goota omuliro, ngʼamuhaŋaasa ahena amuloma ati, “Ewe weesi obaaye ni Yesu Omunazaleesi.”
14.68: Cooka Peetero nga geegaana ati, “Ehi oloma sikimanyire era sikitegeera.” Ngʼaŋo Peetero aŋwa mu lunya, atiina mu luhuubo olutula ebulafu. Ngʼengoho yiholyoha.
14.69: Omuhaana ola nindi ni gabona Peetero ngʼaloma abaali ni bemereeye ohuupi ni naye ati, “Omusinde ono njʼomulala hu babaaye ni bagendanga ni Yesu.”
14.70: Nga Peetero atandiha ohulayira ati, “Mu mazima, ese simanyire omusinde oyu muloma.” Ŋabitaŋo ahamanga hatotono, abaali ni bemereeye ohuupi ni naye nga bamuloma baati, “Hituufu oli mulala hu babaaye ni bagendanga ni Yesu, olwohuba weesi oli Mugalilaaya hya niye.”
14.71: Aye Peetero gatandiha ohulayira nʼohweŋwaba ati, “Ese simanyire muutu oyo oyu mulomaho!”
14.72: Aŋo ni naaŋo ngʼengoho yiholyoha omulundi ogwohubiri. Nga Peetero ahebulira ebi Yesu gaali nʼamulomire ati, “Engoho yinaabe yitaholyoha efunda eyohubiri, ni wuneganiiye emirundi edatu.” Ngʼatemuha alira.

15.1: Ni wahya mu mugamba, abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga, nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ga Musa, ko nʼabaatu abandi boosi abohu Luhiiho lwʼAbayudaaya, nga bateesa ohubona ehi banahole Yesu. Nga bamuhaada bamuŋira bamuŋayo eyiri Pilaato.
15.2: Pilaato ngʼamubuusa ati, “Ndiiwe habaha wʼAbayudaaya?” Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Ngʼolu oloma olwo.”
15.3: Ngʼaŋo abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda bamuŋaŋabira emisango emyene emingi.
15.4: Nga Pilaato amubuusa ati, “Oŋuma hya hweŋosyaho? Soobona emisango eji bahuŋaŋabira ni jiri mingi?”
15.5: Aye Yesu gaŋolera huŋolera. Nga Pilaato geŋunja. Basalira Yesu ogwʼohufa (Mat 27:15-26; Luk 23:13-25)
15.6: Mu biseera byʼEmbaga eyʼOhuhebuliriraho Ohubihisya, Pilaato galehulanga omusibe oyu bamusunganga ohulehula.
15.7: Hu mulundi guno, mu komera mwalimo omusinde oyu balanganga baati Bbarabba, oyu baali ni bawoŋire nʼabajeemu bahye abaali ni beetire abaatu mu hediimo ahʼohujeemera Abarooma abaali ni baŋuga ehyalo hyawe.
15.8: Ngʼaŋo ehibbubbu hyʼabaatu hitiina ewa Pilaato himusunge abaholere ngʼolu gaali nʼabanahiise.
15.9: Pilaato ngʼababuusa ati, “Mwenda mbawoŋolorere Habaha wʼAbayudaaya?”
15.10: Ehyo gahiroma, olwohuba gamanya ati Abatangirisi bʼabasengi baali baŋayeeyo Yesu olwʼekirihindi eyi baali ni nayo.
15.11: Ne abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nga batuuya abaatu balome Pilaato abalehulire nje Bbarabba mu hifo hya Yesu.
15.12: Nga Pilaato ababuusa ati, “Ŋaahani oyu mulanga habaha wʼAbayudaaya muhole tye?”
15.13: Nga nibo bamugobolamo ni bahayaana baati, “Muhomerere hu musalabba!”
15.14: Nga Pilaato ababuusa ati, “Lwahiina? Aholire hibi hi?” Aye nibo nga beeyongera hweyongera ohuhayaana baati, “Mumuhomerere hu musalabba.”
15.15: Pilaato olwʼohwenda ohubasangaasa, gabalehulira Bbarabba ngʼolu bamusunga. Aye ngʼalagira bafaduule Yesu efaalu, nga ko ahena amuŋayo eyiri abasirikale baje bamuhomerere hu musalabba. Abasirikale bajeeja Yesu (Mat 27:27-31; Yow 19:2-3)
15.16: Ngʼabasirikale baŋira Yesu mu lubiri lwa Pilaato olu balanganga baati Purayitoriyo, nga bahoba abahyawe bosibosi abomu hibinja ehyo bahumbaana.
15.17: Nga bamwambasa eganduula eryʼerangi lya namasyoma, bagata amaŋwa mu ngeri yʼomuge bamufiiha hu mutwe.
15.18: Nga batandiiha ohumujeeja baati, “Wangaala, Habaha wʼAbayudaaya!”
15.19: Nga baŋamba olugada bamuhubba hu mutwe efunda nʼefunda. Nga bahena bamufuujaho agate, bamuhubbira nʼamafuha ohumuhiina ti bamuŋa eŋono.
15.20: Ni bahena ohumujeeja, nga bamufihulamo olugoye olwa namasyoma, nga bamwambasa engoye jije, nga ko bamutusa ebulafu bamuŋira ohumuhomerera hu musalabba. Bahomerera Yesu hu musalabba (Mat 27:32-44; Luk 23:26-43; Yow 19:17-27)
15.21: Mu hiseera ehyo, ŋaaliŋo omusinde owʼe Kireene oyu balanganga baati Simooni owaali nʼabita engira nʼaŋwa mu hitehere ehirirene ehibuga. Simooni ono njʼowaali semwana yʼAlekizanda ni Ruufusi. Abasirikale nga bamuŋagia ohubbeeda omusalabba gwa Yesu.
15.22: Ngʼaŋo boosa Yesu mu hifo ehi balanga baati Gologosa, amahulu gahyo ti Ehifo Ehyahaŋanga.
15.23: Nga bamuŋa envinyo yomu mizabbibbu ni bayitabuuyemo ehiresi ehi balanga baati miira. Cooka ngʼagaana ohuyinywa.
15.24: Nga bamuhomerera hu musalabba, bagabana ebyambalo bibye ni babihubbiraho ahalulu ohubona hiisi mulala ehi anaŋire.
15.25: Bamuhomerera ni jiŋera esaawa edatu ejomu mugamba.
15.26: Omusango ogu baali ni bamuhaabya nga baguŋandiiha hu hapande baati, habaha wʼabayudaaya , nga bahaŋaniha hu musalabba gugwe.
15.27: Ngʼaŋo bahomerera nʼabakondo babiri hiisi mulala hu musalabba gugwe. Mulala hu muhono gwa Yesu omulungi, owundi hu mugooda.
15.28: Ehyaŋandiihiwa nga hyolerera ehiroma hiiti, “Bamubalira ŋalala nʼababbwagi bʼamagambi.”
15.29: Abaali ni babitaŋo nga boosi basugusa emitwe jaawe nʼobusambuha ni baduha Yesu baati, “Ewe asobola ohubbwagaŋo Yekaalu nindi wayitongola mu ndaalo edatu,
15.31: Mu ngeri njʼenyene abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi, boosi bamujerega ni baloma baati, “Ganoŋolanga bandi aye saaŋanga hwenoŋola niye omwene!
15.32: Kurisito Habaha wa Yisirayiri, ale ŋaahani aŋwe hu musalabba, hubone konyo humufugiirire!” Ni naabo aba bahomerera ni naye nga boosi bamuduha. Ohufa hwa Yesu (Mat 27:45-56; Luk 23:44-49; Yow 19:28-30)
15.33: Ohuŋwa hu saawa mukaaga ejomu muusi ohwola hu mwenda ejʼegulo, ngʼehiirema hiŋamba ehyalo hyosihyosi.
15.34: Hu saawa eyʼomwenda, nga Yesu alanga nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani ati, “Eloyi, Eloyi, lama sabbakusaani?” Amahulu gaahyo ti, “Hatonda wange, Hatonda wange, lwahiina wundehireŋo?”
15.35: Balala hu abo abaali ni bemereeye ŋaapi aŋo, ni baŋulira nga baloma baati, “Muŋulire, ali hulanga Eliya!”
15.36: Ngʼaŋo mulala hu bo aduluma atimya ehisumwa mu nvinyo eyisalire, ahita hu lugada aŋa Yesu ohunywa nʼaloma ati, “Leha hubone hanye Eliya anaaje gamutusa hu musalabba!”
15.37: Yesu ngʼalira nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani, ngʼahena afa.
15.38: Ngʼaŋo olutimbe olwomu Yekaalu ludweduhamo ŋabiri, ohuŋwa ŋamugulu ohwola ŋaasi.
15.39: Omuhulu wʼehibinja hyʼabasirikale cikumi owaali ni gemereeye ŋa musalabba nʼalengereeye, ni gabona engeri eyi Yesu gafamo, ngʼaloma ati, “Mu butuufu omuutu ono abaaye Mwana wa Hatonda!”
15.40: Era ŋaaliŋo nʼabahasi abaali ni besambireho ahamanga ni balengereeye. Mu abo mwalimo Malyamu Magadaleeni, Salome, ni Malyamu nyina ya Yose ni Yakobbo omuŋere.
15.41: Abahasi bano bagendanga ni Yesu ni bamuŋeeresa, olu gaali mu hitehere hyʼe Galilaaya. Era ŋaaliŋo nʼabahasi abandi bangi abaali ni bajire ni naye e Yerusaalemu. Basiiha Yesu (Mat 27:57-61; Luk 23:50-56; Yow 19:38-42)
15.42: Bino byosibyosi byaliŋo hu ludaalo lwʼohwetegehera obunahye nʼenahabe Sabbaato. Ŋaaliŋo owʼeŋono owahiihanga mu Luhiiho lwʼAbayudaaya Oluhulu,
15.43: ni bamulanga baati Yosefu owʼe Alimataaya. Yosefu ono gaali alindirira ohuuja hwʼobuŋugi wa Hatonda. Nga Yosefu gesinga atiina eyiri Pilaato amusunga omulambo gwa Yesu.
15.44: Pilaato ni gaŋulira ati Yesu gaali ahenire ohufa, nga geŋunja. Ngʼalanga omuhulu wʼehibinja hyʼabasirikale, amubuuse hanye dala Yesu gaali afuuye.
15.45: Omuhulu wʼehibinja hyʼabasirikale ni gamuhahasa ngʼolu Yesu gaali ahenire ohufa, Pilaato gehirisa Yosefu ohuŋira omulambo.
15.46: Ngʼaŋo Yosefu agula olugoye olulaŋi olwa laasi, ngʼatusa omulambo gwa Yesu hu musalabba, agwambiha mu lugoye olwo, aguta mu higombe ehi baali ni babajire mwibaale mu ngeri yʼepungulu. Ngʼaŋiringisya ogubaale, gegaliraŋo omulyango ogwingira mu higombe ehyo.
15.47: Malyamu Magadaleeni, ni Malyamu nyina ya Yose, nga beetegeeresa aŋa bata omulambo gwa Yesu.

16.1: Oludaalo lwa Sabbaato ni lwaŋwaho, Malyamu Magadaleeni ni Salome ni Malyamu nyina Yakobbo, nga bagula amafuta agahaloosa, batiine baŋahe omulambo gwa Yesu.
16.2: Ni wahya, hu ludaalo oludaayi mu wiiki, mu mugamba pwipwipwi eryuba ni lyali ni lyahaŋwangayo, nga batiina hu higombe.
16.3: Batiinanga bebuusa baati, “Njʼani anatuŋiringisisye ebaale ohulitusa hu mulyango gwʼehigombe?”
16.4: Aye ni bagangamusa emoni ohuhejayo, nga babona baati baali baliŋiringihisye ni balituhiise hu mulyango gwʼehigombe ate nga ebaale eryo lyali bbala bugali.
16.5: Ni bengira mu higombe, babona omuseere nalunje ni gehaaye hu luuyi olwʼomuhono omulungi, ni gambaaye ekaaso ekosa. Ngʼobuti bubaŋamba.
16.6: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Mutatya. Mwendula Yesu Omunazaleesi oyu bahomerera hu musalabba. Aŋuma ŋano. Alamuhire. Mubone, hino njʼehifo aŋa baali ni bamutaaye.
16.7: Mutiine mulomere abeegi babe ko weyite Peetero, muuti; ‘Atangiiyemo atiina e Galilaaya. Eyo peyi munahamubonere ngʼolu gabaloma.’ ”
16.8: Ngʼabahasi abo batula mu higombe baduluma, olwohuba esisi nʼobuti byali bibaŋambire. Era olwʼobuti owo sibalomeraho muutu kadi mulala. Yesu abonehera Malyamu Magadaleeni (Mat 28:9-10; Yow 20:11-18)
16.9: Yesu ni gahena ohulamuha hu ludaalo oludaayi mu wiiki gasooka hubonehera nje Malyamu Magadaleeni oyu gabbingaho emisambwa omusanvu.
16.10: Ono njʼowatiina galomera abaloobera ba Yesu, mu hiseera ehyo aba obutahi waali ni wijuuye hu mwoyo nʼohulira ni balira.
16.11: Aye ni babalomera baati Yesu mulamu era ngʼolu Malyamu Magadaleeni gamubona, sibafugiirira. Yesu abonehera abeegi babiri (Luk 24:13-35)
16.12: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Yesu abonehera babiri hu beegi babe abaali ni batula ehibuga ni batiina mu hyalo cooka nʼatafaana ngʼolu gafaananga.
16.13: Ni gahena ohubabonehera nga baagamayo balomera abahyawe. Cooka nibo sibafugiirira hibono ehyo. Yesu abonehera abeegi babe ehumi namulala (Mat 28:16-20; Luk 24:36-49; Yow 20:19-23; Bik 1:6-8)
16.14: Oluvanyuma, nga Yesu abonehera abeegi babe ehumi namulala, ni behaaye ni balya. Ngʼabanenya olwʼohutafugiirira hwawe, nʼolwobuhahanyafu wʼemyoyo jaawe, olwohuba sibehirisa bibono byʼabo abaali ni baamuweeneho nʼahenire ohulamuha.
16.15: Era ngʼabaloma ati, “Mutiine mu mawanga gosigosi, mulomere abaatu bosibosi Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi.
16.16: “Hiisi afugiirira era gabatiziwa, alinoŋolewa aye atafugirira, omusango gulimuhira.
16.17: “Abafugiirira banaholenga ebyamaliholiho bino. Mu siina lyange banaabbingenga emisambwa hu baatu, banalomenga mu ndimi eji bahiiri hwega,
16.18: ni banaŋambenga hu misota oba ni bananywenga ehiitu hyosihyosi ehiita, sibanolengaho higosi hyosihyosi. Ni banaŋambenga hu balwaye banaŋonenga.” Yesu aŋiriwa mwigulu (Luk 24:50-53; Bik 1:9-11)
16.19: Yesu Musengwa ni gahena ohuloma ni nabo, ngʼaŋiriwa mwigulu, gehala hu luuyi olwʼomuhono omulungi ogwa Hatonda.
16.20: Ngʼabeegi babe batiina hiisi ŋaatu ni balomera abaatu Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi. Nga Yesu Musengwa abaŋambirangaho ni bahola ebyamaliholiho ohuhahasa obuhwenda waawe.

1.1: Owʼeŋono Tefiiro, abaatu bangi baŋandiihire hu biitu ebi Yesu atiinire nʼahola mu fe.
1.2: Baŋandiihire ni batambisa ebibono byʼabo ababyeboneraho nʼemoni jaawe ohuŋwera erala oludaayi ngʼolu gatandiha obuŋeeresa buwe era basasaania nʼehibono ehyo mu baatu.
1.3: Olwʼehyo, oluvanyuma lwʼohwendulirisa mu wiijufu hu hiisi hiitu ehibayeŋo keesi kuŋadiihira ewʼeŋono Tefiiro ebibono ebiroose obulaŋi ebyolereeye mu fe,
1.4: ko weesi ofaanie ehituufu ehiŋamba hu bibono ebi bahusomesa. Ohusaaliwa hwa Yowaane Omubatiza
1.5: Mu himanga ehi habaha Herode gaali nʼaŋuga Buyudaaya, ŋaaliŋo omusengi wa Hatonda oyu balanganga baati Zakaliya owomu hibbubbu hyʼabasengi ehi balanganga baati Abbiya. Omuhasi wuwe gaali njʼElizabbeesi yeesi owaali nʼaŋwa mu lulyo lwʼabasengi ba Hatonda, owomu lusaga lwʼAlooni.
1.6: Abaatu bano bombi baholanga biruŋamu mu moni ja Hatonda Musengwa era ni badembuhira amagambi nʼebiragiro bibye byosibyosi.
1.7: Aye baali baŋuma mwana olwohuba Elizabbeesi gaali mugumba, nindi bombi ni basahuluŋire.
1.8: Lulala ehibinja ehi Zakaliya gaŋeerehesangamo ngʼomusengi mu moni ja Hatonda ni hyali hu luŋalo,
1.9: abahye bamwangala ni bahubba ahalulu ngʼolu ekola yaawe yaali, aje adunyise obubbaani mu Yekaalu ya Hatonda Musengwa.
1.10: Ehimanga ehyʼohudunyisa obubbaani ni hyola, abaatu bosibosi baali bahumbeene ebulafu wa Yekaalu ni basaba.
1.11: Ngʼaŋo mu himanga ehyene ehyo Zakaliya abona malayika wa Hatonda Musengwa ni gemereeye hu lubega lwʼomuhono omulungi ogwʼehituuti ohubadunyihisanga obubbaani.
1.12: Zakaliya ni gamubona gesinduha bugali weene, nga nʼobuti wumuŋamba.
1.13: Aye malayika oyo ngʼamuloma ati, “Zakaliya, otatya olwohuba Hatonda aŋuliiye ohusaba huhwo. Era omuhasi wuwo Elizabbeesi aja huhusaalira omwana omuseere, olimuguliha esiina oti Yowaane.
1.14: Omwana oyo, aligira waaba nʼesangaalo nʼohusaŋalya era abaatu balisangaala olwʼohusaaliwa huhwe,
1.15: olwohuba anaahabe mwegingihiriri mu moni ja Hatonda Musengwa. Era saagesangaho ohunywa omwenge gwomu mizabbibbu wayire ehiitu hyosihyosi ehimeesa. Omwoyo Omutukuvu anahamumaamire ohuŋwera erala mu hida hya nyina.
1.16: Era aligira Abayisirayiri bangi bebbwaga baagobola eyiri Hatonda Musengwa yaawe.
1.17: Aliba nʼamaani gʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu hyʼEliya era njʼalyeheerera ohuuja ohweyulira Musengwa engira. Alifaŋania abaana nʼabasaawe era aligobosa abaatu abajeemera Hatonda mu ngira eyʼobugwalaafu, nʼabategeha olwʼohuuja hwa Musengwa.”
1.18: Ngʼaŋo Zakaliya abuusa malayika oyo ati, “Hiina ehihahasa hiiti ehi oloma hinaholerere? Ese nʼomuhasi wange hwesahuluŋiiye.”
1.19: Ngʼaŋo Malayika amugobolamo ati, “Ese, ndiise Gabbudyeri, aba mu moni ja Hatonda ni muŋeeresa. Hatonda gaatumire ohuhulomera amaŋuliro gano amalaŋi.
1.20: Aye olwʼohubuusabuusa ebi kulomera, sooja hugobolayo huloma ohwola olu Hatonda anahabyoherese ehiseera hyʼabo ni hyolire.”
1.21: Mu hiseera ehyo, abaatu baali ebulafu ni bahuumiriiye Zakaliya era ni bebuusa ehimwolireho.
1.22: Zakaliya ni gatula, gaali saahiŋanga huloma aye nʼagesya hugesya nʼengalo. Ngʼabaatu bahifaania baati gaali asunire ohwolesewa.
1.23: Olugobo lulwe olwʼohuŋeeresa mu Yekaalu ni lwaŋwaho, nga gagamayo ewuwe.
1.24: Ŋabitaŋo ehiseera ngʼElizabbeesi omuhasi wuwe aba hida, ngʼahena emyesi etaanu nʼatebonesa mu baatu.
1.25: Ngʼaŋo aloma ati, “Hatonda Musengwa gapambiiye ehisa mu hiseera hino gaatusaho eduho eryʼobugumba.” Malayika aloma hu husaaliwa hwa Yesu
1.26: Elizabbeesi nʼali hida ehyʼemyesi mukaaga, Hatonda gatuma Malayika Gabbudyeri mu hibuga ehi balanga baati Nazaleesi mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya,
1.27: eyiri omuhaana ataŋenyuhangaho nʼomusinde oyu balanga baati Malyamu owaali nʼaja hufumbirwa omusinde oyu balanganga baati Yosefu era gaali aŋwa mu lulyo lwa Habaha Dawudi.
1.28: Malayika oyo ngʼamuloma ati, “Oli otye ewe omuhoda wa Hatonda? Oli nʼekabi era Hatonda Musengwa ali ni neewe!”
1.29: Ebibono ebyo byeŋunjisa Malyamu bugali weene, ni gebuusa ehi bitegeesa.
1.30: Ngʼaŋo Malayika amuloma ati, “Malyamu, otatya olwohuba osunire obuhoda eyiri Hatonda.
1.31: Oliba hida wasaala omwana museere, olimuguliha esiina oti nje Yesu.
1.32: Omwana oyo, aliba nʼobuŋangi era balimulanga Mwana wa Hatonda oyo Owaŋamugulu Bugali. Hatonda Musengwa alimuŋa obuŋugi hyʼowa Dawudi sehulu wuwe.
1.33: Aliŋuga Yisirayiri emirembe nʼemirembe era obuŋugi buwe sibuliŋwaŋo.”
1.34: Nga Malyamu abuusa malayika oyo ati, “Naahabe tye hida, ese otaŋenyuhangaho nʼomusinde?”
1.35: Nga Malayika amugobolamo ati, “Omwoyo Omutukuvu anahahumaamire ngʼamaani ga Hatonda Owaŋamugulu Bugali gahuujaho, ngʼoba hida. Olwʼehyo omwana oyu olisaala aliba mwawufu era aliba Mwana wa Hatonda.
1.36: Nʼomulebe wuwo Elizabbeesi oyu babaaye ni balanga omugumba, yeesi aja husaala omwana mu busahulu buwe era guno aŋira omwesi gwa mukaaga nʼali hida.
1.38: Nga Malyamu aloma ati, “Ese ndi muŋeeresa wa Hatonda Musengwa. Hahibe hiityo hu ese ngʼolu olomire.” Ngʼaŋo Malayika aŋwaŋo getiinira. Malyamu ahyalira mugandaawe Elizabbeesi
1.39: Mu hiseera ehyene ehyo, Malyamu genyoheramo gaŋamba olugendo gatiina mu hibuga mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya mu ehyalo hyʼesozi eyi Zakaliya gamenyanga.
1.40: Ni goola gengira mu nyumba ya Zakaliya ngʼaheesa Elizabbeesi.
1.41: Wangewe, Elizabbeesi ni gaŋulira Malyamu nʼamuheesa, ngʼomwana asamba mu hida. NgʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu amaamira Elizabbeesi.
1.42: Ngʼaŋo Elizabbeesi olwʼesangaalo aloma nʼejanjaasi eryaŋamugulu ati, “Hatonda ahuŋaaye ekabi ohuhira abahasi bosibosi era nʼomwana oyu oja ohusaala yeesi ali nʼekabi.
1.43: Ko ndiise ani, ewe oja huba nyina ya Musengwa ohuupa eŋono lino eryʼamaani ohucaalira?
1.44: Olu puliiye ejanjaasi liryo ni bukeesa, omwana asambire mu hida olwʼesangaalo.
1.45: Oli nʼekabi olwʼohufugiirira oti ebi Hatonda Musengwa gaaloma bija hwolerera.” Malyamu ajumirya Hatonda nʼolwembo
1.46: Ngʼaŋo Malyamu aloma ati, “Mu mwoyo gwange njumirya Hatonda Musengwa.
1.47: Nʼobulamu wange busangaafu olwa Musengwa Omunoŋosi wange,
1.48: olwohuba gapambiiye ehisa ese omuŋeeresa wuwe aŋumaaho naŋaali. Ohuŋwa ŋaahani abaatu aba hiisi mulembe, bananangenga wʼekabi,
1.49: olwohuba Hatonda omwene buŋangi era omwawufu gakoleeye ebihulu.
1.50: Ohuŋwa mu hiisi mulembe ogubaluhaŋo ehisa hihye hiba eyiri abo abamutya.
1.51: Alagire obuŋangi wuwe owʼamaani mu byamaliholiho ebi ahola, ni goŋania abeŋeegaho baati njʼabahihenaho.
1.52: Aŋanuuye abaŋugi hu buŋugi aye genyosa abeŋomeha gabaŋa obubbala.
1.53: Geguhise abayala nʼebiraŋi, aye abo aberanga abaŋinda gabagamirisaho engalo ni jirereeja.
1.54: Ayedire Yisirayiri abaatu babe abamuŋeeresa abahebuliiye gaba nʼohusasira,
1.55: eyiri Yibbulayimu nʼolusaaye lulwe emirembe nʼemirembe, ngʼolu gahisuubisa abasehulu beefe.”
1.56: Nga Malyamu amenya nʼElizabbeesi emyesi ngʼedatu, nga ko gaagama engo. Ohusaaliwa hwa Yowaane Omubatiza
1.57: Endaalo ejʼohusaala ni joola, ngʼElizabbeesi asaala omwana omuseere.
1.58: Abaliranwa nʼabalebe babe ni baŋulira ngʼolu Hatonda Musengwa amuŋambiye ehisa gamuŋa omwana, nga boosi basangaala.
1.59: Omwana ni gaŋesa endaalo munaana, nga batiina ohumuhomola. Baali baja humuguliha esiina lya semwana baati nje Zakaliya.
1.60: Aye nyina ngʼaloma ati, “Bbe, humugulihe huuti nje Yowaane.”
1.61: Nga bamuloma baati, “Mu lulyo lulwo muŋumamo muutu kadi mulala oyu baguliha esiina eryo!”
1.62: Ngʼaŋo beeyedesa obubonero ohubuusa semwana yʼomwana esiina eri genda bamugulihe.
1.63: Zakaliya ngʼasunga ehipande ehyʼohuŋandiihaho, ngʼaŋandiiha ati, “Esiina lyʼomwana nje Yowaane.” Bosibosi nga beŋunja.
1.64: Aŋo ni naaŋo nga Zakaliya geguha omunwa era nʼolulimi lulwe nga luboŋoloha, ngʼatandiha ohuloma nʼajumirya Hatonda.
1.65: Hino hyaleetera abaliranwa babe bosibosi ohweŋunja. Era ngʼebibono bino bihwana hu ŋingi jʼe Buyudaaya josijosi.
1.66: Bosibosi ababiŋulira, bebuusanga abeene nʼabeene baati, “Omwana ono anaahabe muutu wa ngeri hi?” Baaloma baatyo olwohuba Hatonda Musengwa gaali ni naye. Olwembo lwa Zakaliya
1.67: Ngʼaŋo Omwoyo Omutukuvu amaamira Zakaliya semwana ya Yowaane ngʼaŋa obunaabbi nʼaloma ati,
1.68: “Hujumirye Hatonda Musengwa wa Bayisirayiri, olwohuba ahyaliiye abaatu babe era abanunuuye.
1.69: Atuŋaaye Omunoŋosi owʼamaani ohuŋwa mu lulyo lwa Dawudi omuŋeeresa wa Hatonda, atunoŋole
1.70: ngʼolu gasuubisa ahale nahale nʼabita mu banaabbi babe abagwalaafu,
1.71: atunoŋole ohuŋwa eyiri abasigu beefe, nomu muhono gwabo bosibosi abatatwenda.
1.72: Ngʼolu gasuubisa ohuŋambira abasehulu beefe ehisa era gahebulira endagaano yiye eyʼenjabulo
1.73: mu hirayiro ehi galayirira sehulu yeefe Yibbulayimu, ati alitununula ohuŋwa mu ngalo jʼabasigu beefe
1.75: mu bugwalaafu era ni hwolereeye mu moni jije obulamu weefe bosibosi.
1.76: Ne ewe mwana wase, balihulanga naabbi wa Hatonda oyo ali Ŋamugulu Obugali. Hiri hiityo olwohuba olitangiramo ohutiina ohweyulira Musengwa engira,
1.77: nʼohuleetera abaatu babe ohufaania engira eyʼobunoŋosi, Hatonda nʼabasoniŋa ebibi byawe,
1.78: olwʼehisasabirisi hihye ehingi, ehiriiha ohuŋwa mwigulu hyʼenjase eyʼeryuba ni liŋwayo,
1.79: ohwaduhira abali mu hiirema hyʼebibi nʼehisisigo hyʼolumbe, nʼohutuluŋamya mu ngira ereeta emiyaaya.”
1.80: NgʼOmwana ahula mu hirangi nomu bulamu wuwe owʼomwoyo era gamenyanga mu lulafu ohwola olu gatandiha ohulomera Abayisirayiri ehibono hya Hatonda.

2.1: Mu hiseera ehi habaha oyu balanganga baati Agusito gaŋugiyemo owahabaha wa Rooma, gaatusa ehiragiro ati abaatu bosibosi mu matwale gage, beŋandiise.
2.2: Ohweŋandiisa ohwo ohudaayi, hwaliŋo gavana oyu balanganga baati Kiriniyo nʼali njʼaŋuga etwale lyʼe Siriya.
2.3: Ngʼaŋo hiisi muutu atiina mu habuga hʼewaawe ohweŋandiisa.
2.4: Olwʼehyo, nga Yosefu yeesi aŋwa mu hibuga Nazaleesi mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya, atiina mu hibuga Bbeserekemu mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya. E Bbeserekemu eyo peyi basaala Habaha Dawudi era Yosefu yeesi gaali wamu lulyo olwo.
2.5: Yosefu gatiina ni Malyamu oyu gaali nʼahwa, beŋandiise. Malyamu gaali ali hida,
2.6: era ni bali eyo, ngʼehiseera hihye ehyʼohusaala hyola.
2.7: Nga Malyamu asaala omwana wuwe omudaayi omuseere, ngʼamuwiiha mu bugoye era ngʼamuta mu hiitu omu bisolo byaliranga. Gamusaalira mu hidooli olwohuba sibasuna hifo mu nyumba omu abagendi bapangisanga baŋenyuhamo. Abaayi nʼabamalayika
2.8: Aŋaapi aŋo mu hitundu ehyo, mwalimo abaayi abahuumanga etaama jaawe owiire mu hyayo.
2.9: Ni baali eyo, nga malayika wa Hatonda Musengwa abawonehera. Ngʼehimyaso hyʼeŋono lirye hibeswanigirisa. Hino hyabaleetera ohutya bugali weene!
2.10: Aye malayika ngʼabaloma ati, “Mutatya, olwohuba mbaleteeye amaŋuliro amalaŋi, agalileetera abaatu bosibosi esangaalo eryene eryʼamaani.
2.11: Olwa leero e Bbeserekemu mu hibuga eyi basaala Habaha Dawudi, basaaye Omunoŋosi wʼabaatu bosibosi, Kurisito Musengwa.
2.12: Hano njʼahabonero ahamunamufanihisyeho, muja hubona omwana museere ni bamuwiihire mu bugoye wʼabaŋere era ni bamutaaye mu hiitu omu bisolo biriira.”
2.13: Ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo eduuli lyʼabamalayika ohuŋwa mwigulu abandi beŋimba hu wahyawe ni bemba enyembo ejʼohujumirya Hatonda baati,
2.14: “Eŋono libe eyiri Hatonda mwigulu nʼemiyaaya jibe mu baatu abasiima!”
2.15: Abamalayika ni baŋwaŋo baagamayo mwigulu, ngʼabaayi baloma abeene nʼabeene baati, “Hutiine e Bbeserekemu huje hubone ebibaayeŋo ngʼolu Hatonda Musengwa atulomire.”
2.16: Ngʼaŋo abaayi beyuna batiina era nga babona Malyamu ni Yosefu nʼomwana ni bamutaaye mu hiitu nago omu bisolo biriira.
2.17: Ni bahena ohubona omwana, nga batiina balomera abaatu ebi malayika gaali nʼabalomeeye hu mwana oyo.
2.18: Era abaatu bosibosi mu hitundu ehyo beeŋunja ebi abaayi abo babalomera.
2.19: Aye Malyamu ngʼata ebibono ebyo byosibyosi hu mwoyo, nʼabiŋeegangaho bugali.
2.20: Ngʼaŋo abaayi bagamayo hu byayo byawe ni bajumirya Hatonda era ni bamuŋa eŋono olwʼebyo ebi baali ni baŋuliiye era ni baweene, olwohuba byosibyosi byali ngʼolu malayika gaali nʼabalomeeye. Abasaaye ba Yesu bamuŋayo eyiri Hatonda
2.21: Omwana ni goosa endaalo munaana ohumuhomola, bamuguliha esiina baati Yesu, eri malayika galoma omwana nʼahiiri nʼohuba mu hida.
2.22: Endaalo jʼomukolo gwʼohwegwalaasa ogwabangaŋo abahasi ni bahenire ohusaala ni jaŋwa ngʼolu magambi aga Hatonda gaŋa Musa galagira, nga Yosefu ni Malyamu baŋira Yesu e Yerusaalemu ohumuŋayo eyiri Musengwa.
2.23: Hino bahihola olwʼohwoheresa ehyaŋandiihiwa mu magambi ga Musengwa hiiti, “Hiisi mwana omuseere omudaayi banamuŋengayo eyiri Musengwa .”
2.24: Era batiina nʼebyohuŋonga ngʼolu hiri mu magambi ga Hatonda Musengwa: “enjiiwa ebiri oba amaŋuusi amaŋere abiri.”
2.25: Ŋaahani yaaliyo omusinde mu Yerusaalemu oyu balanganga baati Simyoni. Omusinde oyo gaaliho amaani gʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu, nʼali mugwalaafu, nʼaŋamba ebiragiro bya Hatonda era nʼahuumiriiye ohubonaho ohununula hwa Yisirayiri.
2.26: Omwoyo Omutukuvu gaali amusuubihiise ati alibona hu Kurisito oyu Hatonda Musengwa gafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu, ko gafa.
2.27: Ngʼaŋo Omwoyo Omutukuvu amutangirira amuŋira mu lunya lwa Yekaalu. Abasaaye ba Yesu ni bamwosa hu Yekaalu ohuhola ebi amagambi galoma,
2.28: nga Simyoni anaaŋa omwana hu nyina, ahena ajumirya Hatonda ati,
2.29: “Ale Hatonda Musengwa, ngʼolu wʼasuubisa ganya omuŋeeresa wuwo aŋuumule nʼemiyaaya.
2.32: abe enjase ohulaga Abatali Bayudaaya ehi Hatonda ali, era aŋeese abaatu babo Abayisirayiri eŋono.”
2.33: Nga Yosefu ni Malyamu beeŋunja olwʼebibono ebi Simyoni galoma hu mwana oyo.
2.34: Ngʼaŋo Simyoni abasabira ekabi ahena aloma Malyamu nyina ati, “Omwana ono Hatonda gamwangala, bangi mu Yisirayiri bamufugiirire banoŋohe era bangi bamwegaane basihiirihe. Aja huba ahabonero ohulaga ati aŋwa ewa Hatonda aye sibaja hu hifugiirira,
2.35: ko ebiŋeego ebibi ebyomu myoyo jʼabaatu abeene abangi byeyolehe. Era enaku erifumita omwoyo gugwo hyʼepiima.”
2.36: Era ŋaaliŋo naabbi omuhasi owaali omuhayire ni bamulanga baati Ana omuhaana wa Fanweri owʼehiha hya Aseri. Omuhasi oyo ni gafumbirwa gahena emyaha musanvu, wamwe ngʼafa.
2.37: Ohuŋwa hulwo gaali ahenire emyaha cinaana nʼene nʼali namwandu era omuusi nʼowiire sigaŋwanga mu Yekaalu, galinga mu hujumirya Hatonda, nʼasaba era nʼasiiba.
2.38: Nga mu hiseera ehyene ehyo, omuhasi oyo atiina aŋa Malyamu ni Yosefu baali, nga geyaasa Hatonda olwʼomwana oyo. Era ngʼalomera abo bosibosi abaali ni bahuumirira Hatonda ohununula Yerusaalemu ebiŋamba hu mwana oyo.
2.39: Yosefu ni Malyamu ni bahena ohuhola byosibyosi ngʼolu magambi ga Hatonda Musengwa galoma, nga balucuusa bagamayo ewaawe mu hibuga hyʼe Nazaleesi mu Galilaaya.
2.40: Ngʼaŋo omwana oyo geyongera ohuhula mu hirangi nomu magesi, ngʼaba nʼamaani era omuhoda eyiri Hatonda. Yesu mu Yekaalu
2.41: Ŋaahani hiisi mwaha abasaaye ba Yesu batiinanga e Yerusaalemu hu Mbaga eyʼOhubihisya.
2.42: Yesu ni goosa emyaha ehumi nʼebiri, nga batiina ni naye e Yerusaalemu hu mbaga eyʼOhubihisya ngʼolu esambo yaawe yaali.
2.43: Embaga ni yaŋwa, abasaaye ba Yesu ni baali ni bagamayo, baŋeega baati Yesu ali ni nabo aye gaali asigaye e Yerusaalemu.
2.44: Ni baali ni bahagendaho olugendo olwʼoludaalo lulala nga ko bafaania baati gaali saali mu hiŋindi hyʼabaatu aba baali ni bagenda ni nabo. Ngʼaŋo batandiiha ohumwendula hiisi ŋaatu, mu balebe nomu mihago jaawe.
2.45: Ni bamuhaya, nga bagamayo e Yerusaalemu ohumwendula.
2.46: Ni ŋabitaŋo endaalo edatu nga ko bamugwirihirira mu lunya lwa Yekaalu nʼaŋaya nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi, nʼabaŋuliirisa era nʼababuusa ebibuuso.
2.47: Bosibosi abamuŋuliirisa beŋunja olwʼamagesi nʼengeri eyi gagobolangamo ebibuuso.
2.48: Abasaaye babe ni bamubona, ngʼemyoyo jibeeha aye basigala ni beŋunja. Nga nyina amuloma ati, “Mwana wase, lwahiina otuholire otyo? Ese ni lataawo hubaaye huhwedula ni hweŋendehereeye.”
2.49: Nga niye abagobolamo ati, “Lwahiina mubaaye munyendula? Simumanyire muuti ndi nʼohuba mu nyumba ya Bbaabba?”
2.50: Aye nibo ndibategeere ehi gaali nʼaloma.
2.51: Ngʼaŋo gaagama ni nabo e Nazaleesi era ngʼaba mugondi eyi bali nʼabaŋulira. Nga nyina ata ebyo byosibyosi hu mwoyo era ngʼabiŋeegangaho.
2.52: Ngʼaŋo Yesu geyongera ohuhula mu hirangi nomu magesi, nʼali muhoda eyiri abaatu ni Hatonda.

3.1: Mu mwaha ogwʼehumi nʼetaanu ogwʼomulembe gwa Tibberiyo habaha wʼe Rooma, Pootiyo Pilaato gaali aŋuga etwale lyʼe Buyudaaya ni Herode nʼaŋuga eryʼe Galilaaya, ni mulebe wuwe Filipo nʼaŋuga etwale eryʼe Yituraaya ni Turakoniti, ni Lisaniya nʼaŋuga eryʼAbbileene.
3.2: Era Anaasi ni Kayaafa baali njʼabahulu bʼabasengi, Hatonda gaŋa Yowaane omusaani wa Zakaliya owaali nʼamenya mu lulafu obuhwenda aje alomere abaatu.
3.3: Ngʼaŋo Yowaane agenda mu bitahere byosibyosi ebiririheene olwabi Yoludaani nʼaloma abaatu bebbwage bacuuse emyoyo babatiziwe, Hatonda abasoniŋe ebibi.
3.4: Yowaane gahola hino ni goheresa Ebyaŋandihiwa mu hitabo hya naabbi Yisaaya ebiroma biiti, “Ŋaliŋo ejanjaasi eryʼamaani eriŋwera mu lulafu omuutu nʼalangirira ati, ‘Muhosiirire Musengwa engira, muluŋamye amagira gage.
3.5: Hiisi hiiho muhijuse; era hiisi lusozi muluteremuse. Muluŋamye amagira amagodami, mugwalaase nʼebiŋigi.
3.6: Era hiisi muutu anahabone ohunoŋola hwa Hatonda.’ ”
3.7: Eduuli lyʼabaatu nga litiinanga eyiri Yowaane ababatize, ngʼabalomanga ati, “Enywe abaatu abahabi hyʼetemu, njʼani owabalabula ohuŋunuha ehiruŋi hya Hatonda?
3.8: Ale ŋaahani muhole ebikolwa ebiraga biiti mwebbwagire mulehireŋo ebibi byenywe. ‘Mulehere aŋo ohuloma muuti mbo muli bagwalaafu olwohuba muli bejuhulu ba Yibbulayimu.’ Mbalomera ti Hatonda aŋanga ohucuusa amabaale gano gafuuha bejuhulu ba Yibbulayimu.
3.9: Ŋaahani mumanye muuti muli hyʼemisaala eji muutu ategeheeye aŋo embasa ohujitema. Era hiisi musaala ogutaama bibala ebiraŋi baja hugutema, bagudanye mu muliro.”
3.10: Ngʼaŋo abaatu bamubuusa baati, “Ŋaahani huhole hi?”
3.11: Ngʼabagobolamo ati, “Ali nʼebyambalo bibiri aŋeho oyo aŋuma era ali nʼebiryo yeesi ahole atyo.”
3.12: Abaŋoosa boosi nga batiina ohubabatiza, nga bamubuusa baati, “Omusomesa, huhole hi?”
3.13: Ngʼabagobolamo ati, “Mutasolonganga ohuhira ehi babaloma.”
3.14: Abasirikale boosi nga bamubuusa baati, “Ate efe, huhole hi?” Ngʼabaloma ati, “Mutanyaganga ebyabeene era mutaŋayirisanga muutu yesiyesi. Omuhemba gwenywe gubahenenga.”
3.15: Ngʼaŋo abaatu bosibosi batandiiha ohwebuusa mu myoyo jaawe hanye Yowaane nje Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu oyu bali ni balindiriye.
3.16: Nga Yowaane abaloma ati, “Ese mbabatiza nʼamaaji aye owukira obuŋangi gaaja oyu toola wayire nʼohuboŋolola ekoba jʼengayito jije namwoga amagulu era oyo alibabatiza nʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu nʼomuliro.
3.17: Niye anahaabule mu baatu ngʼolu omuutu aŋamba olugali gahonja ohwawula omuhuuji nʼembehe. Embehe nijo ajihumbaania gajibiiha mu hyagi aye omuhuuji ŋalala nʼebidete alibyohya nʼomuliro ogutasima.”
3.18: Yowaane atyo pogalabulanga abaatu nʼatambisa ebibono hyʼebyo era nabalomeranga Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi.
3.19: Aye goloobya Herode owaali nʼaŋuga etwale lyʼe Galilaaya olwa Herodiya oyu gaali nʼapaahise hu mulebewe nʼolwebibi ebindi ebi gaahola.
3.20: Herode sigahoma aŋo, gongera ehibi hu hibi, galagira bandanye Yowaane mu komera. Ohubatiziwa hwa Yesu
3.21: Olwola abaatu abandi ni baali ni babatiziwa, nga Yesu yeesi atiina bamubatize. Ni bahena ohumubatiza, ni gaali nʼahisaba, ngʼegulu liwihuha,
3.22: ngʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu nʼali mu hifaananyi hyʼeŋuusi amwihaho. Era ejanjaasi nga liŋwa mwigulu ni ŋaliŋo aloma ati, “Ndiiwe Omwana wange omuhoda, owunesiimisa.” Olulyo lwa Yesu (Mat 1:1-17)
3.23: Yesu ni gatandiha emirimo jije gaali aŋesa emyaha amahumi adatu, abaatu ni bamulanga musaani wa Yosefu, omusaani wa Heli.
3.24: Heli gaali musaani wa Matati, Matati musaani wa Leevi, Leevi musaani wa Meleki, Meleki musaani wa Yanaayi, Yanaayi musaani wa Yosefu.
3.25: Yosefu gaali musaani wa Matatiya, Matatiya musaani wa Amozi. Amozi musaani wa Nahumu, Nahumu musaani wʼEsili, Esili musaani wa Nagayi.
3.26: Nagayi musaani wa Maati, Maati musaani wa Matatiya, Matatiya musaani wa Simeeyi, Simeeyi musaani wa Yoseki, Yoseki musaani wa Yoda.
3.27: Yoda niye gaali musaani wa Yowanani, Yowanani musaani wa Reesa, Reesa musaani wa Zerubbabbeeri, Zerubbabbeeri musaani wa Seyalutiyeri. Seyalutiyeri musaani wa Neeri,
3.28: Neeri musaani wa Meleki, Meleki musaani wʼAdi, Adi musaani wa Kosamu, Kosamu musaani wʼElimadamu, Elimadamu musaani wʼEli.
3.29: Eli niye gaali musaani wa Yoswa, Yoswa musaani wʼEliyezeeri, Eliyezeeri musaani wa Yorimu, Yorimu musaani wa Matati, Matati musaani wa Leevi.
3.30: Leevi musaani wa Simyoni, Simyoni musaani wa Yuda, Yuda musaani wa Yosefu, Yosefu musaani wa Yonamu, Yonamu musaani wʼEliyakimu.
3.31: Eliyakimu niye gaali musaani wa Meleya, Meleya musaani wa Meena, Meena musaani wa Mataasa. Mataasa musaani wa Nasani, Nasani musaani wa Dawudi,
3.32: Dawudi musaani wa Yese, Yese musaani wʼObbedi. Obbedi musaani wa Bbowaazi, Bbowaazi musaani wa Salumooni, Salumooni musaani wa Nasoni.
3.33: Nasoni niye gaali musaani wʼAminadabbu, Aminadabbu musaani wʼAdimiini, Adimiini musaani wʼAruni. Aruni musaani wa Kezirooni, Kezirooni musaani wa Pereezi, Pereezi musaani wa Yuda.
3.34: Yuda musaani wa Yakobbo, Yakobbo musaani wa Yisaka, Yisaka musaani wa Yibbulayimu. Yibbulayimu musaani wa Teera, Teera musaani wa Naholi.
3.35: Naholi niye gaali musaani wa Serugi, Serugi musaani wa Reewu. Reewu musaani wa Peleegi, Peleegi musaani wʼEbberi, Ebberi musaani wa Seera.
3.36: Seera musaani wa Kanani, Kanani musaani wʼAlupakusaadi, Alupakusaadi musaani wa Seemu, Seemu musaani wa Nuwa, Nuwa musaani wa Lameeka.
3.37: Lameeka musaani wa Mesuseela, Mesuseela musaani wʼEnoka, Enoka musaani wa Yaledi. Yaledi musaani wa Mahalalyeri, Mahalalyeri musaani wa Kanani,
3.38: Kanani musaani wʼEnosi. Enosi musaani wa Seezi, Seezi musaani wʼAdamu, Adamu mwana wa Hatonda.

4.1: Ngʼaŋo Omwoyo Omutukuvu amaamira Yesu, amutusa hu lwabi Yoludaani amuluŋamya amuŋira mu lulafu,
4.2: ngʼahenayo endaalo amahumi ane, Sitaani nʼamuhema. Ahamanga aho hosihosi sigalyaho hiitu hyosihyosi era enjala yamuluma.
4.3: Nga Sitaani amuloma ati, “Nʼoba nʼoli Mwana wa Hatonda, lagira ebaale lino lifuuhe biryo, olye.”
4.4: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, ‘Omuutu saanabenga mulamu lwa biryo byoŋene.’ ”
4.5: Ngʼaŋo Sitaani aŋira Yesu ŋamugulu hu lusozi, ngʼamangu ago amulaga owahabaha wosiwosi owohu hyalo.
4.6: Ngʼamuloma ati, “Nja huhuŋa obuŋangi ohuŋuga owahabaha obu oweene ko nʼebyobuŋoono ebitiniraho olwohuba babipambya era panga ohubiŋa oyo oyu mbyendesa.
4.7: Olwʼehyo, byosibyosi binaabe bibyo, singa onanjumirye.”
4.8: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, ‘Onajumiryenga nje Musengwa Hatonda wuwo era njʼoyu onaŋeeresenge yeŋene.’ ”
4.9: Ngʼaŋo Sitaani aŋira Yesu e Yerusaalemu amuninia hu hisuli hya Yekaalu amuloma ati, “Nʼoba nʼoli Mwana wa Hatonda, tuuma ogwe ŋaasi,”
4.10: olwohuba hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, “ ‘Hatonda aliragira abamalayika babe bahuyeeda,’
4.11: era hiiti, ‘Balihubbaha ndiwegumula hu mabaale huhulumya magulu.’ ”
4.12: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, ‘Soohemanga Musengwa Hatonda wuwo.’ ”
4.13: Sitaani ni gahena ohuhema Yesu, ngʼamuleha nʼamuhuumire ehiseera ehindi. Yesu atandiha ohuŋeeresa mu Galilaaya
4.14: Ngʼaŋo Yesu gagamayo mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya nʼali nʼamaani agʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu. Ngʼefuma yiye yihwana mu twale eryo lyosiryosi.
4.15: Ngʼasomesa mu mahumbaaniro gaawe era hiisi muutu owamuŋulira nʼasomesa, gamutenda. Abaatu bʼe Nazaleesi begaana Yesu (Mat 13:53-58; Mar 6:1-6)
4.16: Ngʼaŋo Yesu atiina e Nazaleesi eyi gahulira. Ngʼolu yaali esambo yiye, hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato gatiina mu humbaaniro nga bamusunga ohusoma ehyaŋandiihiwa.
4.17: Nga bamuŋambya omufumbo gwʼehitabo hya naabbi Yisaaya, awihula ngʼasoma aŋaloma ŋaati,
4.18: “Omwoyo wa Hatonda Musengwa gamaamiye, olwohuba ganyangala ohulomera abagadi Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi. Gaatumire ohulangirira ti abasibe baja hubaboŋolola, nʼabaŋofu boosi baja huŋona. Era gaatuma ohutaasa ababanyigirisa,
4.19: Nʼohulangirira ti njʼehiseera ehya Hatonda Musengwa ohunoŋola ababe.”
4.20: Ni gahena ohusoma ngʼawiihaŋo agobohesa omuŋeeresa womu humbaaniro ehitabo ngʼahena gehala. Ngʼabaatu bosibosi mu humbaaniro bamutaho emoni.
4.21: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Olwa leero ehyaŋandiihiwa hino hyolereye eyi muli.”
4.22: Ngʼaŋo bosibosi beeŋunja olwʼebibono ebiraŋi ebi galoma, ngʼabaloma baati, “Ono sinje omusaani wa Yosefu oyu hwesihwesi humanyire?”
4.23: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Mu butuufu oweene, muja hungerera olugero oluloma luuti, ‘Omuŋeŋa, weŋeŋe.’ Era muja humedaho muuti, ‘Holeraho ŋano ebi hwaŋulira huuti waholera e Kaperanawumu.’ ”
4.24: Ne ese mbaloma ati, “Mu butuufu, naabbi sibamuŋangaho eŋono ewaawe!
4.25: Muhebulire muuti mu mulembe gwʼEliya olu endobooli yatula efula ndiyitonya ohuhena emyaha edatu nʼemyesi mukaaga enjala enyene eyʼamaani yagwa hu hyalo. Mu hiseera ehyo ŋaaliŋo abanamwandu bangi mu Yisirayiri
4.26: cooka Eliya sibamutuma eyiri mulala hwʼabo aye bamutuma yiwa namwandu owaali e Zarefaasi mu hyalo hyʼe Sidoni.
4.27: Era mu mulembe gwa naabbi Elisa, ŋaaliŋo abagenge bangi mu Yisirayiri aye ŋaŋuma kadi mulala owaŋona ohutusaho Namani Omusiriya.”
4.28: Abaatu bosibosi mu humbaaniro ni baŋulira ebyo, ngʼehiruŋi hibaŋamba,
4.29: nga benyoha bamusindigirisa bamutusa bamuŋira hu mugo gwʼolusozi ohubatongola ehibuga hyawe; olwohuba bendire bamusindihe agwe ŋaasi mwiroŋo.
4.30: Aye gabeŋunula gababitamo, nga getiinira. Yesu abbinga omusambwa hu muutu
4.31: Ngʼaŋo Yesu atiina e Kaperanawumu ehibuga ehyomu Galilaaya, nga hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato atiina mu humbaaniro asomesa abaatu ebiŋamba hu Hatonda.
4.32: Ngʼaŋo abaatu beŋunja bugali ekola eyi gasomesamo olwohuba gasomesa nʼobuŋangi.
4.33: Mu humbaaniro omwo mwalimo omuutu owaaliho omusambwa. Ngʼomuutu oyo alomera ŋamugulu ati,
4.34: “O, otuhaabya hiina ewe Yesu Omunazaleesi? Wujiire ohutusihiirisa? Ese kumanyire! Ndiiwe Omwawufu wa Hatonda.”
4.35: Nga Yesu ahayula omusambwa ogwo ati, “Ŋoleera! Ŋwa nohu muutu oyo.” Omusambwa nga guhubbiraŋo omusinde oyo ehigo nga guhena gumuŋwaho ni ŋaŋuma hisago hyosihyosi ehi gumwohiiseho.
4.36: Ngʼabaatu bosibosi beŋunja era nga bebuusa baati, “Esomesa yino ya ngeri hi? Obona alagira hulagira nʼamaani nʼobuŋangi emisambwa jaŋwa hu muutu!”
4.37: Ngʼefuma yiye yihwana hiisi ŋaatu mu twale eryo. Yesu aŋonia abaatu bangi
4.38: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aŋwa mu humbaaniro eryo, atiina gengira mu nyumba ya Simooni. Mu hiseera ehyo, masaala ya Simooni gaaliŋo nʼali mulwaye wʼomusuuja omwene ogwʼamaani, nga basunga Yesu amuŋonie.
4.39: Nga Yesu atiina gemeerera, ahotama aŋaali omulwaye oyo, alagira omusuuja nga guŋona. Aŋo ni naaŋo ngʼomulwaye oyo genyoha atandiha ohubategeheraŋo ehyohulya.
4.40: Esaawa niija ohugwa mu maaji, abaatu abaali nʼabalwaye baawe abaali nʼobulwaye owa hiisi ngeri, babaleeta eyiri Yesu ngʼaŋamba hu hiisi mulwaye amuŋonia.
4.41: Era bangi abaaliho emisambwa, jabaŋwaho ni jiromera ŋamugulu jiiti, “Ndiiwe Omwana wa Hatonda!” Yesu nʼajihabuhira hujihabuhira, nʼatajiganya huloma olwohuba jaali jimumanyire jiiti nje Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu.
4.42: Oludaalo olwalondaho ko ni wanuuha, nga Yesu atiina mu hifo eŋuma baatu. Ngʼabaatu bamwendula ohwola olu bamubona era sibendire abaŋweho atiine aŋaatu aŋandi.
4.43: Cooka niye ngʼabaloma ati, “Ndi nʼohutiina mu bibuga ebindi yoosi ndomere abaatu baayo Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu buŋugi wa Hatonda, olwohuba njʼehyagira gaatuma.”
4.44: Era geyongera ohulomera abaatu ehibono hya Hatonda mu mahumbaaniro gomu Buyudaaya.

5.1: Lulala Yesu ni gaali ni gemereeye hwigenya lwʼenyanja Genesareeti, ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu hyaja hyʼaŋindigana aŋa gaali baŋulire ehibono hya Hatonda.
5.2: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abona amaato abiri ni gali aŋo hwigenya wʼenyanja, aga benuli bali ni balehire aŋo ni bali hugonjoola obutimba waawe.
5.3: Nga Yesu aniina mwirala hu maato ago, eryali erya Simooni era gamusunga alisendeho ŋadiidiri mu maaji ohuŋwa hu woomu. Nga Yesu gehala atandiha ohusomesa abaatu.
5.4: Ni gahena ohusomesa, ngʼaloma Simooni ati, “Hwesendeho mu maaji amangi otege obutimba, mwinule.”
5.5: Nga Simooni amuloma ati, “Musengwa, hufululuhene hwahyesa huhyerere. Ne onaloma otyo, haatege obutimba.”
5.6: Ni baatega obutimba, nga baŋambya enyeeni enyene enyingi huupi jihapule obutimba.
5.7: Nga basimirya abahyawe abaali mu lyato erindi, baaje babayeede. Ni baaja, nga bejusa amaato ago gombi enyeeni. Era olwʼobusito, huupi geyinihe.
5.8: Simooni oyu balanganga erindi baati Peetero ni gabona hino, ngʼahubba amafuha ohuupi ni Yesu, ngʼamuloma ati, “Ndehe, Musengwa. Olwohuba ese, ndi muutu mubbengi!”
5.9: Peetero galoma atyo olwohuba niye nʼabahye bosibosi aba gaali ni nabo, obuti waali bubaŋambire olwʼobungi wʼenyeeni eji baali ni baŋambisye.
5.10: Yakobbo ni Yowaane abasaani ba Zebbedaayo, abameeri ba Simooni boosi obuti wabaŋamba. Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma Simooni ati, “Otatya, olwohuba ohuŋwa olwa leero muhifo hyʼohwinulanga enyeeni, munenulenge abaatu mwabaleeta bafuuha baloobera bange.”
5.11: Ngʼaŋo bagobosa amaato gaawe hu woomu, ngʼebyo babiŋwaho bagendanga ni Yesu. Yesu aŋonia omugenge
5.12: Lulala Yesu gaali mu hibuga omwali omusinde omugenge. Ngʼomugenge oyo atiina geyala hwiroba mu moni jije amwegalihira ati, “Muhulu, ni huba ni huli husiima huhwo, ponie.”
5.13: Nga Yesu amuŋambaho amuloma ati, “Njʼohusiima hwange era ŋona.” Era nga ŋaweene aŋo ebigenge biŋona.
5.14: Ngʼaŋo Yesu amuhamiirisa atalomeraho omuutu yesiyesi, ohutusaho gamuloma ati, “Tiina weyanjule eyiri omusengi wa Hatonda oŋeyo eŋongo ngʼolu naabbi Musa galagira bube bujulizi obubahahasa ti oŋonire.”
5.15: Aye efuma ya Yesu yeyongera nʼohuhiraho, ehyaŋwamo abaatu bangi ohutiinanga eyi gaali bamuŋulirise era abaŋonie nʼobulwaye waawe.
5.16: Aye efundi nyingi Yesu gatiinanga gesyeneeha ebula abaatu, gasaba. Yesu aŋonia omulwaye owaali nʼasanyalaaye
5.17: Lulala Yesu ni gaali nʼasomesa, Abafalisaayo nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda ohuŋwa mu hiisi haalo hʼe Galilaaya nʼe Buyudaaya nomu Yerusaalemu boosi baaliŋo ni behaaye aŋo. Amaani ga Hatonda Musengwa gaali ni Yesu ohusobola ohuŋonianga abalwaye.
5.18: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaŋo abasinde abaŋira omuutu owaali nʼasanyalaaye ni bamugegire hu musigaasiga, nga bagesyaho ohumwingisa bamute aŋa Yesu gaali.
5.19: Aye olwʼeduuli lyʼabaatu, sibasobola. Nga baniina ŋamugulu hu nyumba, nga baŋomola ehituli bamwihisa hu musigaasiga aŋa Yesu gaali.
5.20: Yesu ni gabona ohufugiirira hwawe, ngʼamuloma ati, “Meeri yange, kusoniŋire ebibi bibyo.”
5.21: NgʼAbafalisaayo abo nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi batandiiha ohuloma abeene nʼabeene baati, “Ono gelanga ani? Ohwo hufodogola. Njʼani asobola ohusoniŋa ebibi ohutusaho Hatonda yeŋene?”
5.22: Yesu gamanya ebiŋeego byawe ngʼabaloma ati, “Lwahiina muli hwebuusa mu myoyo jenywe muutyo?
5.23: Ehihiraho owangu njʼehiri ŋeena, ohuloma ti ‘Kusoniŋire ebibi bibyo,’ oba ti, ‘Yinyoha ogende?’
5.24: Ŋaahani nja hubalaga ti Omwana wʼOmuutu ali nʼobuŋangi hu hyalo ohusoniŋa ebibi.” Ngʼaŋo aloma owaali nʼasanyalaaye oyo ati, “Yinyoha ogege omusigaasiga gugwo wagameyo ewenywe.”
5.25: Aŋo ni naaŋo ngʼomusinde oyo genyoha bosibosi ni bamutaayeho emoni, aŋamba omusigaasiga gugwe gagamayo engo nʼajumirya Hatonda.
5.26: Nga bosibosi abaaliŋo beŋunja, bajumirya Hatonda era ngʼolusisimo lubaŋamba baloma baati, “Olwa leero huweene ebyamaliholiho!” Yesu alanga Leevi
5.27: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Yesu aŋwaŋo atiina. Ni gaali nʼagenda ngʼabona omuŋoosa oyu balanganga baati Leevi ni gehaaye aŋa baŋoosesa nʼaŋoosa. Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Nja ofuuhe omwegi wange.”
5.28: Ngʼebyo byosibyosi Leevi abiŋwaho, genyoha atiina ni Yesu.
5.29: Nga Leevi ahyasa Yesu ewuwe amunyiiyira embaga enyene eyʼamaani. Omutoolo gwʼabaŋoosa nʼabaatu abandi abahola ebibi batiina beehala nga baliira ŋalala ni naye.
5.30: Aye Abafalisaayo nʼabasomesa baawe abʼamagambi abomu hibbubbu hyawe bemulugunya era nga baloma abeegi ba Yesu baati, “Lwahiina mulya nʼabaŋoosa ko nʼabaatu abandi abahola ebibi?”
5.31: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Abaatu abalamu sibetaaga musaŋu ohutusaho abalwaye.
5.32: Sinaaja hwendula aberanga abalaŋi, ohutusaho abahola ebibi.” Ehibuuso ehiŋamba hu husiiba
5.33: NgʼAbafalisaayo nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi abo baloma Yesu baati, “Abeegi ba Yowaane nʼaba Abafalisaayo basiiba era basaba aŋa ni naŋa aye ababo sibasiiba, balya hiisi ludaalo.”
5.34: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Abalange hu mbaga yʼobugole baŋanga ohusiiba ahooye omweŋa nʼahiiri ni nabo?
5.35: Aye ehiseera hiryola babatusaho ahooye omweŋa. Hu olwo njʼolu balitandiha ohusiiba.”
5.36: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagerera olugero ati, “Ebula asala ehiŋero ehyʼolugoye olunyaaha gahitunga mu lugoye oluhayire. Nʼahihola aba gononire olugoye olunyaaha era ehiŋero ehinyaaha sihiŋambagana nʼehiŋero ehihayire.
5.37: Mu ngeri njʼenyene, sibajuha mwenge ogwomu mizabbibbu epiiraŋo mu saŋu eyʼehyanjo ekayire. Singa ohihola, gwadisa esaŋu eyo nga byombi obifiirwa.
5.38: Aye omwenge gwomu mizabbibbu epiiraŋo, bagujuha mu saŋu yʼehyanjo ehinyaaha.
5.39: Omuutu ananywaho omwenge gwomu mizabbibbu endoota, sigenda epiiraŋo olwohuba aloma ati, ‘Endoota ehira epiiraŋo ohuŋooma.’ ”

6.1: Lulala hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato, Yesu nʼabeegi babe baali babita mu ngira eyibita mu muga gwʼengaano. Abeegi babe nga batiinanga ni baŋulula amagala gʼengaano nga bahunyaho omuhuuji bahena bemunga embehe.
6.2: Balala hu Bafalisaayo nga babuusa baati, “Lwahiina muhola ehi magambi geefe gatatufugiirira huhola hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato?”
6.3: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Simusomangaho hu ehi Dawudi gahola olu niye nʼabahye aba gaali ni nabo baali ni baŋuma hyʼohulya?
6.4: Dawudi gengira mu weema ya Hatonda ngʼalya emigaati eji baali ni baŋongire eyiri Hatonda. Amagambi gafugiirira basengi ba Hatonda boŋene ohulya emigaati ejo. Cooka Dawudi gajirya era gaŋaho nʼaba gaali ni nabo.”
6.5: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma Abafalisaayo ati, “Omwana wʼOmuutu nje Musengwa aŋuga oludaalo lwa Sabbaato.” Yesu aŋonia omuutu hulwa Sabbaato (Mat 12:9-14; Mar 3:1-6)
6.6: Hu Sabbaato eyindi, Yesu gatiina mu humbaaniro lyʼAbayudaaya era ni gaali nʼasomesa, hulwo mwalimo omusinde owaali nʼomuhono omulungi ni gwaŋotoha.
6.7: NgʼAbafalisaayo nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda bahaŋaasa Yesu babone oba hanye anaŋonie owʼomuhono omuŋotohi hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato, basune ehi baneemeho ohumuŋaŋabira.
6.8: Aye Yesu gamanya ebiŋeego byawe, ngʼaloma omusinde oyo owaali nʼaŋotohire omuhono ati, “Yinyoha wemereere aŋa hiisi muutu asobola ohuhubona.” Ngʼola genyoha gemeerera.
6.9: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abaloma ati, “Mbabuusa enywe, hiraŋi ohuhola obulaŋi hu Sabbaato? Huŋonia bulamu, oba hubusihiirisa?”
6.10: Nga Yesu abetoloosamo emoni bosibosi ngʼaŋo aloma omusinde oyo ati, “Waama, januula omuhono gugwo.” Ngʼagujanuula, nga guŋonera erala.
6.11: Aye abasigu ba Yesu abo, nga baluŋa era batandiiha ohuteesa ehyʼohumuhola. Yesu atobola abahwenda ehumi nʼababiri (Mat 10:1-4; Mar 3:13-19)
6.12: Lulala mu biseera ebyo, Yesu gatiina hu lusozi ohusaba era gahyesa nʼasaba.
6.13: Ni wahya, ngʼalanga abeegi babe besende aŋa ali, ngʼahena atobola ehumi nʼababiri, abaguliha ti bahwenda.
6.14: Era abahwenda abo nje Simooni, oyu gameedaho erya Peetero, ni mulebewe Andereya ni Yakobbo ni Yowaane ni Filipo ni Bbatulumaayo,
6.15: ni Matayo ni Tomasi ni Yakobbo omusaani wʼAlufaayo ni Simooni Omuzelote,
6.16: ni Yuda mulebe wa Yakobbo ko ni Yuda Yisikaryoti owamulyamo oluhwe. Yesu asomesa abaatu era aŋonia abalwaye (Mat 4:23-25)
6.17: Ngʼaŋo Yesu ateremuha nʼabahwenda babe abo, ngʼatiina gemeerera mu hifo ehiterefu. Mu hifo ehyo mwali muhumbaaniyemo ehibbubbu hyʼabaloobera babe nʼoguŋindi gwʼabaatu abaali ni baŋooye mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya lyosiryosi nomu Yerusaalemu nʼohumyalo ejʼe Tiiro ni Sidoni.
6.18: Abaatu abo bosibosi batiina huŋulira ebi asomesa era nʼohubaŋonia obulwaye waawe. Ni naabo abaaliho emisambwa, bajibabbingaho.
6.19: Hiisi mulala hu bo genyigirisa asobole ohumwolerera amuŋambeho gahaŋona, olwohuba amaani agaŋonia gamuŋwangamo ni gabaŋonia. Esangaalo nʼenima (Mat 5:1-12)
6.20: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aheja hu beegi babe abaloma ati, “Muli nʼekabi abagadi olwohuba muhenire ohwingira mu Buŋugi wa Hatonda.
6.21: Muli nʼekabi abayala hatyane, olwohuba muliguta. Muli nʼekabi abalira hatyane, olwohuba mulijeha.
6.22: Muli nʼekabi abaatu ni babacaawanga, bababoola era babaduha baahena babalanga babi hu lwʼOmwana wʼOmuutu.
6.23: “Musangaalenga era mwenyoonye olwohuba muli nʼomuhemba mubba mwigulu. Abasehulu babwe boosi baholanga baatyo abanaabbi.
6.24: “Jibageene enywe abaŋinda hatyane, olwohuba obuŋinda ni bunahabaŋweho, muligada.
6.25: Jibageene enywe omulya ni mwiguta hatyane olwohuba mwesi enjala enahabalume. Jibageene enywe abagiginala hatyane, olwohuba muligawihaho.
6.26: Jibageene enywe aba hiisi muutu apaaha. Olwohuba abasehulu baawe po bapaahanga baatyo abanaabbi abʼobudulingi. Yenda abasigu babo (Mat 5:38-48; 7:12)
