6.27: “Ne mbaloma enywe abapulirisa, ti mwendenga abalabe benywe era muholerenga abatabenda ebiraŋi.
6.28: Musabirenga ababaŋwaba ekabi. Era musabirenga abo ababagudya.
6.29: Omuutu nahuhubbanga oluŋi hwitama, mucuuhise ahubbe nʼohulindi. Oyo aŋira ekooti yiyo, omuŋanga nʼesaati yoosi.
6.30: Singa omuutu ahusunga ehiitu, muŋenga. Omuutu anaŋira ebibyo, omuleheranga.
6.31: Muholerenga abahyenywe ebi mwahendire mwesi babaholere.
6.32: “Ni munendenga ababenda boŋene, ehyo hibaŋeesa ekabi? Nʼabahola ebibi boosi benda ababenda!
6.33: Era ni munayeedenga ababayeeda boŋene, ehyo hibaŋeesa ekabi? Nʼabahosi bʼebibi po bahola.
6.34: Singa muŋola abo aba musuubira ohubasasula boŋene, ehyo hibaŋeesa ekabi? Nʼabahosi bʼebibi boosi baŋola ababi bahyawe.
6.35: Aye mwendenga abalabe benywe era mubabisyenga bulaŋi. Mutatanga mwoyo eyi muŋolire. Aŋo mulisuna omuhemba mubba era mulifuuha baana bʼOyo ali Ŋamugulu Obugali, olwohuba niye mulaŋi eyiri abatasiima nʼababi.
6.36: Mube nʼehisa ngʼolu Senywe ali mwigulu ali wʼehisa. Mutasaliranga bandi misango (Mat 7:1-5)
6.37: “Mutasaliranga bahyenywe emisango, mwesi Hatonda saalibasalira. Mutasaliranga bahyenywe ehibonereso, mwesi mwahaŋona ohubasalira. Musoniŋenga abo ababahola ebisirisinye, mwesi bali basoniŋa.
6.38: Mugabenga, mwesi bali bagabira. Mutambisanga ehipimo ehituufu, ehi musegehiise mwasinya bulaŋi mwataho nʼomutwe, olwohuba ehipimo ehyene ehyo cʼehi balibapimiramo mwesi.”
6.39: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagerera olugero ati, “Omuŋofu saatangirira omuŋofu wahye. Hiri hiityo olwohuba anahihola, bombi bagwa mwiroŋo.
6.40: Omusomi saahira musomesa wuwe aye hiisi oyu basomesa nʼahena ohwega bulaŋi, aba hyʼowamusomesa.
6.41: “Lwahiina ehiri hu wahyo njʼehiraŋi hyʼohuloma, waleherera ehihuliho ewe wamwene?
6.42: Oŋanga otye ohuloma mulebewo oti, ‘Mulebe yange, leha kutuse ahaatu hu moni,’ aye ewe wamwene nʼotebona oguutu oguli hu moni? Ewe, owegesiŋasa sooka wetuseho oguutu oguhuli hu moni ko oŋange ohutusa ahaatu ahali hu wahyo. Omusaala nʼebibala byagwo (Mat 7:16-20; 12:33-35)
6.43: “Omusaala omulaŋi sigwama bibala ebibi era nʼomusaala omubi sigwama bibala ebiraŋi.
6.44: Hiisi musaala gumanyihira hu bibala ebi gwama. Ebibala byohu mutiini sibabinoga hu buŋwa obusaba, nʼebibala byʼemizabbibbu sibabinoga hu manani.
6.45: Omuutu anaba nʼomwoyo omulaŋi, ahola ebiraŋi ebiri mu mwoyo gugwe, ne anaba nʼomwoyo omubi, ahola ebibi nʼabitusa mu mungo yʼebibi eyiri mu mwoyo gugwe. Olwohuba ebi omuutu aloma, abitusa hu mungo eyʼebyo ebiba mu mwoyo gugwe. Abatongoli ababiri (Mat 7:24-27)
6.46: “Lwahiina munanga muuti, ‘Musengwa, Musengwa’ aye simugondera ebi mbaloma?
6.47: Leha mbalage ngʼolu hiisi omuutu owuuja eyi ndi gaaŋulira ebibono byange gahena gaabihola, afaana.
6.48: Ali hyʼomuutu oyo owatongola enyumba ni gehereeye ohuyaba omusingi gwatinirira ohwola hu mabaale. Efula ni yagwa, amaaji gabanda, ngʼomuhula guhubba enyumba oyo, siyanyenya olwohuba gayitongola bulaŋi.
6.49: Aye oyo aŋulira ebibono byange ne ndabiholeraho, afaana hyʼoyo owatongola enyumba yiye natehereye huyaba musingi. Efula ni yagwa, amaaji gabanda, omuhula gwayitomera, yefumuliyeŋo yosiyosi yaŋwera hwiroba.”

7.1: Yesu ni gahena ohusomesa abaatu ebiitu ebyo byosibyosi, ngʼatiina mu hibuga hyʼe Kaperanawumu.
7.2: Mu hibuga omwo mwalimo Omurooma owaali omuhulu wʼehibinja hyʼabasirikale cikumi nʼali nʼomwidu oyu gendanga obugali. Aye omwidu oyo gaali mulwaye nʼali huupi hufa.
7.3: Omuhulu wʼabasirikale oyo ni gaŋulira ebiŋamba hu Yesu, gatuma balala hu bahulu aba Bayudaaya nʼamusunga gaaje amuŋoniehese omwidu wuwe.
7.4: Ni boola aŋaali Yesu, nga bamwegalihira bugali baati, “Omusinde oyo asaniira omuholere ehi ahusunga,
7.5: olwohuba genda abaatu abegwanga lyʼefe era gatutongolera nʼehumbaaniro.”
7.6: Ngʼaŋo Yesu atiina ni nabo. Ni gaali nʼali huupi ohwola, ngʼomuhulu wʼabasirikale oyo atuma emihago jije baje balomere Yesu baati, “Muhulu, otedambya, olwohuba ese sisaana ewe ohuuja ewange,
7.7: cʼehigirire kiweene ti sinoola ohuuja eyo ese omwene. Aye loma huloma ehibono, omwidu wange anaŋone.
7.8: Olwohuba ese keesi ndi nʼabasengwa bange abaapira era keesi ndi nʼabasirikale abaapira. Naloma ono ti, ‘Tiina,’ ngʼatiina; naloma ola ti, ‘Nja,’ nga gaaja; oba naloma omwidu wange ti, ‘Hola hino,’ ahihola.”
7.9: Yesu ni gaŋulira ebi omuhulu oyo galoma, nga geŋunja. Ngʼacuuhira ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ehyali ni himulonda, aloma ati, “Mbaloma ti mbaaye simbonangaho omuutu ali nʼohufugiirira hyʼohwomusinde oyo wayire mu Bayisirayiri!”
7.10: Abahwenda abʼomuhulu wʼehibinja hyʼabasirikale cikumi abagatuma ni baagamayo engo, baageene omwidu oyo nʼaŋonire. Yesu alamusa omusaani wa namwandu
7.11: Olwolire, ni ŋabitireŋo ehiseera hidiidiri nga Yesu atiina mu hibuga ehi balanganga baati Nayini era abeegi babe ko nʼehiŋindi hyʼabaatu abandi baatiina ni naye.
7.12: Ni gaali ko ni goleresa hu mulyango ogwali ni gwingira mu hibuga ehyo, nga gagaanana nʼabaali ni batusa omulambo. Omufu oyo gaali musaani wa namwandu ate nʼali njʼomwana wuwe omulala wogobbo. Ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu abomu hibuga ehyo baali ni namwandu oyo.
7.13: Yesu Musengwa ni gamubona, ngʼamusaasira amuloma ati, “Otalira.”
7.14: Ngʼaŋo aŋamba hu musigaasiga ogu baali ni bagegeyeho omulambo, ngʼabaali ni bagudundire beema. Nga Yesu aloma ati, “Wange museere, yinyoha!”
7.15: Ngʼomufu oyo alamuha, ahena gehala atandiha nʼohuloma. Yesu ngʼamuŋambya nyina.
7.16: Ngʼobuti owʼamaani buŋamba bosibosi abaaliŋo, bajumirya Hatonda ni baloma baati, “Naabbi owenjabulo atuhyaliiye.” “Hatonda gajire ohuŋonia abaatu babe.”
7.17: Ngʼaŋo efuma ya ehi Yesu gaali nʼaholire ehwana mu Buyudaaya mwosimwosi nʼebitundu ebiririheene. Yowaane Omubatiza atuma abahwenda babe (Mat 11:2-19)
7.18: Abeegi ba Yowaane ni baŋulira efuma yʼebi Yesu gaahola, nga batiina bamulomera ebyo byosibyosi. Nga Yowaane alanga babiri hu bo,
7.19: abatuma eyiri Yesu Musengwa, ohumubuusa baati, “Ndiiwe oyo oyu Hatonda gasuubisa ohuuja ohunoŋola abaatu oba eriyo owundi?”
7.20: Abeegi ba Yowaane abo ni boola, nga baloma Yesu baati, “Yowaane Omubatiza atutumire eyi oli nʼabuusa ati, ‘Ndiiwe oyo oyu Hatonda gasuubisa ohuuja ohunoŋola abaatu oba eriyo owundi?’ ”
7.21: Hu ludaalo olwene olwo, Yesu gaŋonia eduuli lyʼabaatu abaali nʼobulwaye nʼabaaliho emisambwa era gegula nʼemoni jʼabaŋofu bangi.
7.22: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma abahwenda ba Yowaane ati, “Mwagame mulomere Yowaane ebi muweene nʼebi muŋuliiye, abaŋofu ŋaahani babona; abaleme bagenda; abagenge balongooha, abasiŋa baŋulira, abafu balamuha nʼabagadi boosi basunire ekabi ohubalomera Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi.
7.24: Oluvanyuma lwʼabahwenda ba Yowaane abo ni bagamayo, Yesu gaabuusa ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ebiŋamba hu Yowaane ati, “Ni mwatiina mu lulafu, mwatiina hubona hiina? Mwatiina hubona omuutu ali hyʼolugada olu mbeŋo ehubba ni ŋira eyi ni neeyi?
7.25: Ni hitaba cʼehyo, mwatiina hubona hi? Omuutu owambaye engoye ejimeregenya? Si cʼehyo, olwohuba abambala engoye ejʼebbeeyi era ababa mu bulamu ohwejalabya baba mu lubiri.
7.26: Ne hiina ehyene ehi mwatiina ohubona mu lulafu? Peega ti mwatiina hubona naabbi. Era mu butuufu oweene, Yowaane oyo si naabbi hyonyene.
7.27: Aye oyo, njʼoyu ehyaŋandiihiwa hiromaho hiiti, ‘Nja hutuma omuhwenda wange ahweherereyo ohuuja ahutereehese engira.’ ”
7.28: Nga Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Mu baatu abahasaaliwa bosibosi, ŋabula ahira Yowaane eŋono. Cooka oyo asembayo ohuba owa ŋaasi mu buŋugi wa Hatonda amuhira eŋono.”
7.29: Abaŋoosa nʼabaatu abandi bosibosi ni baŋulira ebibono ebyo, bafugiirira baati Hatonda sigehubbira olwohuba Yowaane njʼowababatiza.
7.30: Aye Abafalisaayo nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda bageene etegeha ya Hatonda olwohuba sibafugiirira Yowaane ohubabatiza.
7.31: Yesu geeyongera ohuloma ati, “Abaatu abʼomulembe guno nʼabagerageranie hu hi? Bafaana baatye?
7.32: Bafaana hyʼabaana abaŋere abehaaye mu nabiŋwera ko baloma abahyawe baati, ‘Hubafuuŋiiye emirere aye ndimuhine era nʼolu hwembire olwembo oluŋambya enaku, ndimulire nahulira.’
7.33: “Yowaane Omubatiza sigalyanga biryo ebya bulijo oba hunywaho omwenge gwomu mizabbibbu, olwʼehyo nga muloma muuti, ‘Aliho emisambwa!’
7.34: “Aye Omwana wʼOmuutu gaaja ni geriira ebiryo era nʼanywa nʼevinyo nga muloma muuti, ‘Oyo wa mulyerye, mumeesi era ahola omuhumba nʼabaŋoosa ko nʼabahosi bʼebibi.’
7.35: Aye abo bosibosi abaholera hu magesi ga Hatonda bahahasa ti matuufu ni hibonehera hu bikolwa byawe.” Yesu mu mago ga Simooni Omufalisaayo
7.36: Lulala ŋaaliŋo mulala hu Bafalisaayo owʼasunga Yesu amuhyalireho ewuwe. Nga Yesu atiinayo ohulya.
7.37: Mu hibuga omwo mwalimo omuhasi omuhosi wʼebibi owategera ati Yesu gaali ewʼomufalisaayo oyo, ngʼatiina nʼecupa erimo amafuta amalaŋi agaŋunya ahaloosa,
7.38: ngʼaja gemeerera egongo huupi nʼamagulu ga Yesu. Ngʼomuhasi oyo atandiha ohulira, amasiga ni gatonya hu amagulu ga Yesu, ngʼahoma ekumbo amusaabuusa nʼefiiri jije, ngʼamujuhaho amafuta ago.
7.39: Omufalisaayo owahyasa Yesu ni gabona ebi muhasi oyo gaali nʼahola, ngʼaloma mu mwoyo ati, “Omusinde ono aba nʼali naabbi, gahamanyire omuhasi amuŋambaŋambaho ehi ali. Gahali amanyire ati muhosi wʼebibi.”
7.40: Ngʼaŋo Yesu amuloma ati, “Simooni, ndi nʼehi kuloma.” Nga Simooni amugobolamo ati, “Musomesa, ndomere.”
7.41: Nga Yesu atandiha ati, “Ŋaaliŋo owaali nʼabanja abaatu babiri. Omudaayi nʼamubanja dinaari ebihumi bitaanu, owundi dinaari amahumi ataanu.
7.42: Bombi sibasobola humusasula, kale ngʼabasoniŋa. Ŋaahani njʼani hu bo owahira ohumwenda?”
7.43: Nga Simooni amugobolamo ati, “Peega ti gahali oyo oyu gasoniŋa enyingi.” Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Hituufu.”
7.44: Ngʼaŋo acuuha aheja hu omuhasi ola, ahena aloma Simooni ati, “Obona omuhasi ono? Ese caaye ŋawuwo, nasiwuupa maaji ohusaaba amagulu aye niye ganjogire nʼamasiga, gasiimuula nʼefiiri lirye.
7.45: Ni nolire siwunywegera aye naaholeeye ŋano ono anywegera amagulu gange.
7.46: Nasiwuupa mafuta agomu fiiri aye niye gaapahire ebyahaloosa.
7.47: Olwʼehyo kuloma ti ohwenda huhwe huŋwa hu humusoniŋa ebibi ebingi aye oyu basoniŋa ehitono nʼohwenda huba hutono.”
7.48: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma omuhasi ati, “Kusoniŋire ebibi bibyo.”
7.49: Abaali ni behaaye ni Yesu ni balya nga batandiiha ohwebuusa abeene nʼabeene baati, “Njʼani ono oweeŋa obuŋangi owʼohusoniŋa ebibi!”
7.50: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma omuhasi oyo ati, “Olwʼohufugiirira huhwo onoŋohire, tiina nʼemiyaaya.”

8.1: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Yesu atandiha ohugenda ŋano ni naŋala mu bibuga nomu byalo nʼabuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu buŋugi wa Hatonda. Abahwenda babe ehumi nʼababiri,
8.2: ko nʼabahasi aba gambingaho emisambwa nʼabagaŋonia obulwaye baali ni naye. Omwo pomwali Malyamu Magadaleeni oyu gabbingaho emisambwa musanvu,
8.3: ni Jowaana omuhasi wʼomuŋanika wa Herode oyu balanganga baati Kuuza, ni Susaana ko nʼabahasi abandi abeene abangi. Abahasi abo babugulanga hu byawe baaŋaho Yesu nʼabeegi babe obuyeedi. Olugero lwʼomuŋaanyi wʼowumo (Mat 13:1-9; Mar 4:1-9)
8.4: Ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ni hyali ni hihumbaanira aŋa Yesu gaali, ni baŋwa mu bibuga ngʼabagerera olugero ati,
8.5: “Ŋaaliŋo omulimi owatiina ohumwa owumo. Ni gaali nʼamwa, ngʼowumo obundi bugwa hu tulo wʼengira babutyakirira era ngʼenyuni jitiina jibulya.
8.6: Obundi nga bugwa mwiroba eryohu lwanda ohuli otuloba otugeregere. Olwohuba waali hu mugulu, siwalwa humera aye olwʼemisi ohutesimiha ŋaasi ehihena nga buŋotoha.
8.7: Ngʼobundi bugwa mwiroba eryameramo amaŋwa, ni wamera nga buhulira ŋalala nʼamaŋwa ago nga gabumiina gabuloberesa ohuhula.
8.8: Aye obundi nga bugwa mwiroba eraŋi ni bwamera nga buhula wiitulula, nga hiisi gaala lijuhamo emoni cikumi cikumi.” Yesu ni gahena ohuloma atyo ngʼadundaho ejanjaasi ameedaho ati, “Ali nʼohutwi, aŋulire.” Ehigendererwa hyʼohusomehesa mu ngero (Mat 13:10-17; Mar 4:10-12)
8.9: Ngʼaŋo abeegi babe bamubuusa amahulu gʼolugero olwo.
8.10: Ngʼabagobolamo ati, “Enywe muli nʼekabi ohumanya ebyama ebiŋamba hu buŋugi wa Hatonda aye abaatu abandi babiŋulirira mu ngero, ko bahaŋaase aye ni batafaania ehi bahaŋaasa, baŋulire aye ni batategeera ehi baŋulira.” Amahulu gʼolugero lwʼomuŋanyi wʼowumo (Mat 13:18-23; Mar 4:13-20)
8.11: Nga Yesu aloma ati, “Amahulu gʼolugero olwo ngagano, owumo njʼehibono hya Hatonda.
8.12: Era owumo owagwa hu ngira buli hyʼabaatu abaŋulira ehibono hya Hatonda aye Sitaani gaaja gahibatusamo batafugiirira banoŋohe.
8.13: Abaatu abandi bali hyʼowumo owagwa mwiroba eryohu lwanda. Ni baŋulira ehibono hya Hatonda, bahisangaalira nʼamanyonyo aye nga baba hyʼebirime ebiŋuma emisi ejihire mwiroba ehihena. Bafugiirira ohuhena ahaseera hadiidiri aye ebigosi ni bibaajira nga baŋwamo amaani.
8.14: Abandi bali hyʼowumo owagwa hwiroba eryameramo amaŋwa, baŋulira ehibono hya Hatonda aye ohweŋendeherera olwʼebigosi byʼehyalo nʼohululuhanira ohusuna obuŋinda nʼamasanyu gʼehyalo hino bibaloberesa ohuŋangala mu hufugiirira hwawe.
8.15: Aye abaatu abandi bali hyʼowumo owagwa mwiroba eraŋi, ni baŋulira ehibono hya Hatonda bahifugiirira nʼomwoyo mulala era baaba nʼehyasa. Sibaŋambya taala bayifunihirira mu hisero (Mar 4:21-25)
8.16: “Omuutu saaŋambya taala gayifunihira mu hisero oba gayita mu kuliiti aye ayita hu hihondo aŋa yinaaŋe abo abengira mu nyumba enjase.
8.17: Eŋuma ehiitu ehi bagisa ehi batalibona era hiisi hyama balihiŋebbula.
8.18: Olwʼehyo, mwegenderesenge ebi muŋulira. Oyo ali nʼebingi balimumeedaho ebindi aye oyo aŋuma balimutusaaho nʼahadiidiri aho aha ali ni naho.” Abalebe ba Yesu ko ni nyina (Mat 12:46-50; Mar 3:31-35)
8.19: Lulala, abalebe ba Yesu ni nyina batiina eyi gaali aye ndibasobola humwolaho olwʼeduuli lyʼabaatu.
8.20: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaaŋo owamuloma ati, “Maawo nʼabalebe babo bali ebulafu, benda ohuhubona.”
8.21: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Maama nʼabalebe bange mbabo abaŋulira ehibono hya Hatonda bahena bahola ebi hiroma.” Yesu gehahania hibuyaga hu nyanja (Mat 8:23-27; Mar 4:35-41)
8.22: Lulala Yesu galoma abeegi babe ati, “Hwambuhe hutiine engereha wʼenyanja.” Ngʼaŋo baniina eryato batiina.
8.23: Ni baali ni bahiiri mu lugendo, ngʼero liŋamba Yesu aŋenyuha. Nga hibuyaga owʼamaani ahubba hu nyanja ngʼebimoto byʼamaaji byedanyanga mu lyato. Ehyo hyabata mu bugosi owʼamaani.
8.24: Ngʼaŋo abeegi babe batiina bamusisimusa, bamuloma baati, “Musengwa, Musengwa, enyanja yenda hutwita!” Nga Yesu genyoha ahabuhira hibuyaga ko nʼenyanja eyaali ni yefuhisa. Ngʼaŋo hibuyaga ateeha nʼenyanja yoosi ngʼebunjeera.
8.25: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abuusa abeegi babe ati, “Lwahiina muŋuma hufugiirira?” Aye nibo nga hibahenaho efiiri hu mutwe, bebuusa abeene nʼabeene baati, “Omuutu ono wa ngeri hi oyu wayire hibuyaga nʼebimoto byʼamaaji hu nyanja biŋulira?” Yesu aŋonia omusinde owaaliho emisambwa (Mat 8:28-34; Mar 5:1-20)
8.26: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Yesu nʼabeegi babe bambuha boola engereha hu woomu mu hyalo hyʼAbagaraasa ehyali ni hirengerene nʼetwale lyʼe Galilaaya.
8.27: Yesu ni gaŋwa ati mu lyato, gagaanana nʼomusinde owomu hibuga ehyo owaaliho emisambwa. Omusinde oyo gaali ahenire ehiseera hireeŋi nʼatambala ngoye era nʼataŋenyuha mu nyumba aye namenya mu pungulu ejibasihangamo abafu.
8.28: Ni gabona Yesu, ngʼahubba amafuha mu moni jije nʼahayanira ŋamugulu ati, “Wukaabya hiina ewe Yesu Omwana wa Hatonda ali Ŋamugulu Obugali? Kwegayiriiye otangudya!”
8.29: Galoma atyo olwohuba Yesu gaali alagiiye omusambwa ogwo ohumuŋwaho. Efunda nyingi ni gwahamubandire, wayire bahamuboŋire emihono nʼamagulu ni tambisa enjegere era bamuhuuma atabadulumaho, gajihapulanga ngʼomusambwa ogwo gumuŋira eyo mu lulafu eŋuma muutu.
8.30: Nga Yesu amubuusa ati, “Esiina liryo ndiiwe ani?” Ngʼamugobolamo ati, “Ndiise Maŋe.” Galoma atyo olwohuba emisambwa buhehere jaali jiri hu muutu oyo.
8.31: Ngʼaŋo jegalihira Yesu atajisindiha mwiroŋo ereeŋi eritahoma.
8.32: Ohuupi aŋo mu hiiho gʼolusozi ŋaaliŋo ehidooli hyʼembiiji ni jaaya. Ngʼemisambwa jegalihira Yesu jiiti, “Tufugiirire huje hwingire mu mbiiji ejo.”
8.33: Ngʼajifugiirira jiŋwa hu muutu oyo, jija jingira mu mbiiji. Ngʼembiiji ejo josijosi jifulumuha embiro jiihirira jiŋwera mu nyanja nga jinywa etubbi.
8.34: Abemeri bʼembiiji ejo ni babona ebyali ni byolire hu musinde ola owaaliho emisambwa, nga baduluma batiina balomeraho abaatu abomu hibuga ehyo nʼabohumulirano.
8.35: Ngʼabaatu batiina ohwebonera ehiguuyeŋo. Ni boola aŋa Yesu gaali, nga babona omusinde ola owabangaho emisambwa ni jimuŋooyeho, ni gehaaye huupi ni naye era ni gambaaye ebyambalo, nʼohutegeera nʼategeera bulaŋi weene, nga batya.
8.36: Ngʼaŋo abo abaaliŋo beboneraho, baloohesaho abahyawe abaali ni baajire engeri eyi oyo owaaliho emisambwa jamuŋwaho.
8.37: Ngʼaŋo abaatu abomu twale lyʼAbagaraasa basunga Yesu aŋwe mu hitehere ehyo olwohuba baali batiiye bugali. Nga Yesu aniina eryato, aŋwaŋo.
8.38: Yesu ni gaali nʼabaŋweraŋo, ngʼomuutu ola oyu gabbingaho emisambwa amwegalihira amuganye atiine ni naye. Aye Yesu sigamuganya, ngʼamuloma ati,
8.39: “Yagamayo ewenywe, obalomere byosibyosi ebi Hatonda ahuholeeye.” Ngʼaŋo omuutu oyo abita nʼalomera hiisi muutu mu hibuga hyosihyosi ebi Yesu amuholeeye. Omuhaana wa Yayiro nʼomuhasi wʼoluheeŋo (Mat 9:18-26; Mar 5:21-43)
8.40: Yesu ni gambuha enyanja gagamayo, abaatu bangi bamusangaalira olwohuba bosibosi baali bamuhuumiriiye.
8.41: Ngʼomuhulu wʼehumbaaniro lyʼAbayudaaya oyu balanganga baati Yayiro gaaja ahubba amafuha huupi ni Yesu, amwegalihira gooleho ewuwe,
8.42: olwohuba ahahaana hahe ahaali ni haŋesa emyaha ngʼehumi nʼebiri ejʼobuhulu, ate nga nje hoŋene aha gaali ni naho haali halwaye ni henda hufa. Yesu ni gaali nʼatiina, oguŋindi gwʼabaatu nga guŋindigana gumulondaho ni gumunyigirisa.
8.43: Mu guŋindi omwo, mwalimo omuhasi owaali nʼalwaye oluheeŋo ohuhena emyaha ehumi nʼebiri era nahayire aŋanga ohumuŋonia.
8.44: Ngʼaŋo geyibirira aŋwa egongo wa Yesu aŋamba hu hyambalo hihye, aŋo ni naaŋo ngʼoluheeŋo lwomeera.
8.45: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abuusa ati, “Njʼani owupambireho?” Bosibosi nga begaana. Nga Peetero amuloma ati, “Weesi Musengwa, abaatu bali huŋindigana ni bahwehonyaho!”
8.46: Aye nga Yesu aloma ati, “Ŋaliŋo owupambireho, olwohuba pulira amaani agaŋonia ni gapoyeemo era ni gaholire omulimo.”
8.47: Ngʼaŋo omuhasi oyo owamuŋambaho ahifaania ati bamufanisye, ngʼatiina butibuti nʼateetema, ahoma ekumbo mu moni ja Yesu, amulomera mu lwijuuye ehyagira gamuŋambaho era ngʼolu gaali nʼaŋoneeyeŋo.
8.48: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Muhaana, ohufugiirira huhwo huhuŋonisye. Tiina nʼemiyaaya.”
8.49: Yesu ni gaali nʼahiiroma nʼomuhasi oyo, ngʼomuhwenda gaaja alomera Yayiro omuhulu wʼehumbaaniro ati, “Otadambya musomesa. Omwana wuwo afuuye.”
8.50: Aye Yesu ni gaŋulira, ngʼaloma omuhulu wʼehumbaaniro oyo ati, “Otatya, fugiirira hufugiirira, omuhaana wuwo aja hulamuha.”
8.51: Yesu ni goola mu mago ga Yayiro, sigaganya abaatu abandi ohwingira ni naye mu nyumba, ohutusaho Peetero ni Yowaane ni Yakobbo ko nʼabasaaye bʼomuhaana.
8.52: Abaatu bosibosi abaaliŋo, baali balira ni bahubba nʼenduulu olwʼohufa hwʼomuhaana oyo. Aye Yesu ngʼabaloma ati, “Mulehere aŋo ohulira nʼohuhubba enduulu, olwohuba nandafe aye ali huŋenyuha.”
8.53: Ngʼaŋo bosibosi bamujeherera, olwohuba nibo baali bamanyire baati omuhaana oyo gaali afuuye.
8.54: Aye Yesu ngʼamuŋamba hu muhono, ngʼamulanga ati, “Mwana ewe, yinyoha!”
8.55: Ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo omuhaana oyo alamuha, nga gemeerera. Nga Yesu alagira bamuŋeho ehyohulya.
8.56: Abasaaye bʼomwana oyo beeŋunja aye nga Yesu abahamiirisa batalomeraho muutu wayire mulala ehibaayeŋo.

9.1: Lulala, Yesu galanga abeegi babe ehumi nʼababiri batiine aŋa gaali, ngʼabaŋa amaani nʼobuŋangi ohubbinganga emisambwa josijosi hu baatu nʼohuŋonianga obulwaye.
9.2: Ni gahena ngʼabatuma batiine balomere abaatu ebiŋamba hu buŋugi wa Hatonda era baŋonie nʼabalwaye.
9.3: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Mu lugendo luno, mutagega hiitu hindi hyosihyosi wayire muhoomero oba ehihapu oba ebyohulya oba bbeesa oba ehyohwambala ehyohubiri.
9.4: Ni mwolanga mu hibuga, mumenyanga mu mago omu baba ni babasangaaliiye ohwola olu museebuha.
9.5: Aye ni mwolanga aŋaatu ndibabasangaalira, ni mubanga ni muŋwaŋo mwekukumulangaho efuuhe hu magulu habe habonero ahalaga ohulabula ohuŋwa eyiri Hatonda.”
9.6: Ngʼaŋo abeegi abo batiina, ŋano ni naŋala mu byalo ni balomera abaatu Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi era ni baŋonia abalwaye hiisi ŋaatu.
9.7: Ŋaahani, Herode owaali nʼaŋuga etwale lyʼe Galilaaya, ni gaŋulira byosibyosi ebyali ni bitiina mu moni, nga bimuheehera olwohuba ŋaaliŋo abaatu abalomanga baati, “Anaabe nje Yowaane Omubatiza alamuhire!”
9.8: Aye abandi baati, “Oyo njʼEliya abonehire.” Nʼabandi baati, “Anaabe mulala hu banaabbi abaahale.”
9.9: Aye Herode galoma ati, “Nalagira batema hu Yowaane Omubatiza omutwe, nindi ono oyu pulira anaabe njʼani?” Era gendire ohumubona ahahase. Yesu aliisa abaatu ekumi etaanu (Mat 14:13-21; Mar 6:30-44; Yow 6:1-14)
9.10: Abahwenda aba Yesu gatuma ohutiina ohubuulira ni bagobola, nga bamulomera byosibyosi ebi baahola. Nga Yesu atiina ni nabo mu hifo ehiŋumamo baatu baba booŋene eyo mu hibuga ehi balanganga baati Bbesusayida.
9.11: Aye ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ni hyategeera, nga himulondaho. Ni gahena ohubasangaalira, ngʼabalomera ebiŋamba hu buŋugi wa Hatonda era ngʼaŋonia abalwaye abaaliŋo.
9.12: Abeegi ba Yesu ehumi nʼababiri ni babona owiire ni butiinire, bamuloma baati, “Seebula abaatu batiine mu bitehere ebiririheene ŋano, beegulire ebiryo balye basune nʼaŋa banaŋenyuhe olwohuba ehifo hino hiduleere.”
9.13: Aye nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Enywe mubaŋe ebiryo balye.” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Huliŋo nʼemigaati etaanu nʼenyeeni ebiri joŋene. Kooji ni hutiinire hwabagulira!”
9.14: (Ŋaaliŋo abasinde ngʼekumi etaanu). Nga Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Mubeehase mu bibbubbu ebyʼabaatu ngʼamahumi ataanu ataanu.”
9.16: Nga Yesu abugula emigaati jira etaanu nʼenyeeni jawaho ebiri, ngʼagangamusa emoni aheja mwigulu, nga geyaasa Hatonda. Ngʼaŋo ko ajibbwagabbwagamo, ajiŋa abeegi babe bagabire abaatu.
9.17: Ngʼabaatu abo bosibosi balya beeguta. Ngʼaŋo abeegi babe bahumbaania obukukumuhira owasigalaho nga wiijusa ebisero ehumi nabibiri. Peetero abbutula ati Yesu nje Kurisito (Mat 16:13-28)
9.18: Lulala, Yesu ni gaali ni geyebire nʼasaba, abeegi babe baali ni naye, ngʼababuusa ati, “Abaatu bandanga baatye?”
9.19: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Ŋaliŋo abaloma mbo ndiiwe Yowaane Omubatiza, abandi baati ndiiwe naabbi Eliya, ate abandi baati mbo oli mulala hu banaabbi abaahale alamuhire.”
9.20: Ngʼaŋo ababuusa ati, “Ne enywe, mundanga muutye?” Nga Peetero amugobolamo ati, “Ndiiwe Kurisito oyu Hatonda gafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu.”
9.21: Nga Yesu abahamiirisa bugali weene ehyo batahiromeraho muutu yesiyesi.
9.22: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Baja hugudya Omwana wʼOmuutu bugali weene, abaatu abahulu mu gwanga lwefe nʼabatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda, nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi bamwegaane era bamwite aye ni ŋalibitaŋo endaalo edatu aliramuha.”
9.23: Ngʼaŋo abaloma bosibosi ati, “Hiisi muutu owenda ohuba omuloobera wange, ateehwa ohwefiirisa byosibyosi era abe muheneerefu habuhyabuhya ohubbeeda omusalabba gugwe era agende ni neese.
9.24: Hiri hiityo olwohuba hiisi oweheneerera obulamu wuwe, alibufiirwa aye hiisi afiirwa obulamu wuwe hu lwange, alibunoŋola.
9.25: Ale higasa hiina omuutu ohuba nʼobuŋinda wohu hyalo huno wosiwosi aye gafiirwa obulamu wuwe?
9.26: Hiisi oyu esoni jiŋamba olwʼese nʼolwehibono hyange, nʼOmwana wʼOmuutu yeesi alimwegaana olu aligobolera mu ŋono lya Semwana nʼerya bamalayika abagwalaafu.
9.27: Mbalomera ehituufu ti, ŋaliŋo abandi hu enywe abemereeye ŋano, abatalifa ohutusaho ni bahenire ohubona Obuŋugi wa Hatonda.” Emboneha ya Yesu yicuuha (Mat 17:1-8; Mar 9:2-8)
9.28: Ni ŋabitaŋo endaalo nga munaana, nga Yesu atiina ni Peetero ni Yowaane ni Yakobbo, ngʼaniina ni nabo hu lusozi ohusaba.
9.29: Ni gaali nʼasaba, ngʼefaani yiye yicuuha era ebyambalo bibye bimeregenya era bihosa bugali hyʼohumesya hwʼefula.
9.30: Ngʼaŋo abasinde babiri, Eliya ni Musa
9.31: baboneha mu ŋono eryʼamaani ni baloma ni naye hu hufa huhwe ohu gaali nʼaja hufamo e Yerusaalemu.
9.32: Mu hiseera ehyo, ero lyali liŋambire Peetero nʼabahye aye ni basisimuha, baabona Yesu nʼali mu eŋono nʼabasinde ababiri abo ni bemereeye ni naye.
9.33: Abasinde abo ni baali ni baŋwa aŋali Yesu, nga Peetero aloma ati, “Musengwa, hiraŋi ti huli ŋano. Leha hutongoleŋo ebitiira bidatu, hirala hibe hihyo, ehindi hya Musa nʼehindi hyʼEliya.” Galoma atyo olwohuba gaali saamanyire hyahuloma.
9.34: Peetero gaali ahiroma ebyo, ngʼehireri hiija hibawiiha nga niye nʼabahye ngʼobuti bubaŋamba.
9.35: Ngʼejanjaasi liŋwera mu hireri ehyo, ni ŋaliŋo aloma ati, “Ono njʼOmwana wange, oyu netobooleye, muŋulirise ebi abaloma.”
9.36: Ejanjaasi eryo ni lyaŋoleera, ngʼabeegi abo babona nje Yesu yeŋene nʼali ni nabo. Ehi babona nga bahiŋooleraho, ndibahiromereho muutu owundi mu hiseera ehyo. Yesu aŋonia omuseere aliho omusambwa (Mat 17:14-18; Mar 9:14-27)
9.37: Ni wahya, Yesu nʼabeegi babe abo abadatu ni baniinuha hu lusozi, nga bagaanana nʼehiŋindi hyʼabaatu.
9.38: Ngʼaŋo mulala hu basinde abaali mu hiŋindi ehyo adundaho ejanjaasi aloma ati, “Musomesa, kwegayiriiye, ŋambira musaani yange ehisa, olwohuba mulala wogobbo!
9.39: Olu musambwa gumubanda, nga gaana gumuhubba ehigo ngʼatumbeera efulo nʼohusihimbwa po hwataaye. Sigumuŋaho simire era guli humukosa.
9.40: Negayiriiye abeegi babo ohugumubbingaho aye ndibasobole.”
9.41: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Enywe abaatu bʼomulembe guno ababbeeme era abaŋuma hufugiirira, ndihena ni nenywe ahamanga ahaaga ŋe ko mube nʼohufugiirira?” Ngʼaŋo aloma semwana yʼomuseere oyo ati, “Leeta ŋano musaani wuwo.”
9.42: Era nʼolu baali ni baŋira omuseere oyo, omusambwa gwamubanda, gwamuhubba ehigo gatandiha ohujugumira. Aye Yesu gahayuhira omusambwa nagwo, ngʼahena aŋonia omuseere amuŋambya semwana.
9.43: Nga bosibosi abaaliŋo beeŋunja obuŋangi wa Hatonda. Yesu nindi aloma hu hufa huhwe (Mat 17:22-23; Mar 9:30-32) Aye abaatu ni baali ni bahyeŋunja byosibyosi ebi Yesu gaali ni holire, ngʼaloma abeegi babe ati,
9.44: “Muŋulirise ebibono byange bino nʼohwegenderesa. Omwana wʼOmuutu baja humuŋayo eyiri abaatu bamwite.”
9.45: Aye nibo sibafaania mahulu gʼebibono ebyo era baatya nʼohumubuusa amahulu gabyo. Omuutu ahira ohuba owʼeŋono eyiri Hatonda (Mat 18:1-5; Mar 9:33-37)
9.46: Ŋaaliŋo olu beegi ba Yesu baŋahana ni bebuusa baati njʼani hu bo alihira ohuba owʼeŋono.
9.47: Yesu ni gamanya ehi baŋeega, nga gemeeresa omwana omuŋere owaali aŋaapi aŋo ni naye.
9.48: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Hiisi muutu asangaalira omwana omuŋere hyʼono hu lwange, aba asangaaliiye ndiise. Nindi hiisi owusangaalira, aba asangaaliiye Hatonda owaatuma. Oyo oweeyisa gafuuha muŋeeresa wabahye, njʼahira ohuba owʼeŋono.” Atatusoosa saaba musigu (Mar 9:38-40)
9.49: Ngʼaŋo mulala hu beegi babe oyu balanga baati Yowaane aloma Yesu ati, “Musomesa, hwaweene omuutu nʼabbinga emisambwa hu baatu nʼatambisa esiina liryo, efe nga hugesyaho ohumulobera olwohuba si muloobera wuwo hyefe.”
9.50: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Simuloberanga omuutu hyʼoyo, olwohuba atabaŋiriŋania saaba musigu wenywe.” Abaatu bʼe Samaliya bagaana ohusangaalira Yesu
9.51: Endaalo ja Yesu ejʼohwagamayo mwigulu ni jaali ni jigereeye aŋaapi, gahenerera gaŋamba engira ohutiina e Yerusaalemu.
9.52: Ngʼaŋo atuma balala hu bahwenda babe batangirirengamo batiine mu hitehere hyʼe Samaliya abaatu betegehere ohuuja huhwe.
9.53: Aye abaatu baayo bagaana ohumusangaalira olwohuba gaali atiina yi Yerusaalemu.
9.54: Abeegi babe, Yakobbo ni Yowaane, ni baŋulira nga bamuloma baati, “Musengwa, hulome omuliro guŋwe mwigulu gubasihiiriise?”
9.56: Ngʼaŋo batiina mu hitehere ehindi. Ohweŋoheresa hwʼabaatu (Mat 8:19-22)
9.57: Ni baali mu lugendo ni batiina, nga ŋabaŋo omuutu owaloma Yesu ati, “Nagendenga ni neewe hiisi aŋa onatiinenga.”
9.58: Aye Yesu gamugobolamo ati, “Ebibbwe biri nʼekero omu biŋenyuha, enyuni joosi jiri nʼebiswi aye Omwana wʼOmuutu aŋuma aŋa ata olubafu.”
9.59: Nga ŋabaaŋo owundi oyu galoma ati, “Nja, ogendenga ni neese.” Aye oyo ngʼamugobolamo ati, “Muhulu, nahahene husiiha laata yange ko naaja.”
9.60: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Leha abafu mu mwoyo basiihe abafu bahyawe aye ewe otiine olomere abaatu ebiŋamba hu buŋugi wa Hatonda.”
9.61: Nga ŋabaaŋo owundi owamuloma ati, “Muhulu, nja hufuuha muloobera wuwo aye ganya nje ndomereho abengo konyo.”
9.62: Aye Yesu ngʼamuloma ati, “Ngʼolu oyo alimisa eŋombe nʼahejaheja egongo atahola mulimo mulaŋi, nʼowenda ohuba muloobera wange yeesi, anaheja egongo saaba wʼomugaso mu buŋugi wa Hatonda.”

10.1: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Yesu Musengwa atobola abahwenda esanvu nʼababiri, abatuma babiri babiri ohutiina mu hiisi hibuga nʼebyalo eyi gaali nʼategehire ohutiina.
10.2: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Abaatu abaja ohufugiirira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi bangi era bali hyʼebirime ebyolire ohuhungula aye abatambi sibahena. Olwʼehyo, musunge Hatonda Musengwa omwene ndimiro atume abatambi.
10.3: Mutiine aye mwehuume olwohuba eyi mbatuma muja huba hyʼenyana jʼetaama mu nalaŋa.
10.4: Mutagega hasaŋu omu babiiha ebbeesa oba ehihapu wayire omugogo gwʼengayito ogundi. Era mutalwa hu ngira ni muheeseresa hiisi oyu muba ni mwageene.
10.5: Hiisi mago agamunolengamo, mwehererenga hugasabira ekabi muuti, ‘Hatonda ŋa amago gano emiyaaya era ogasagaaluse.’ ”
10.6: Abaatu bomu mago ago ni babasangaalira, emiyaaya eji muba ni mubasungira, jija husigala ni nabo. Aye ni baba ni batenda, ekabi jenywe jibagoboleranga.
10.7: Mumenye mu mago omu babasangaaliiye ni mulya era ni munywa ebi babeeŋula olwohuba omutambi asaanira bamuŋe omuhemba. Simuŋwanga mu mago ago mwatiina aŋandi.
10.8: Munengira mu hibuga abaatu baamo baabasangaalira, mulyanga ebi babaŋa ni mutemoota.
10.9: Muŋonienga abalwaye ababa ni bali mu hibuga omwo era mulomanga abaatu baamo muuti, “Obuŋugi wa Hatonda bwigereeye eyi muli.”
10.10: Aye ni munengirenga mu hibuga ndibabasangaalira, mwemereranga mu luguudo lwahyo mwaloma muuti,
10.11: “Hwekukumulaho nʼefuuhe eryomu hibuga hyenywe eribaaye ni lyeŋambire hu magulu, habe habonero ahalaga haati Hatonda abalabuuye. Aye mumanye muuti Obuŋugi wa Hatonda bwigereeye.”
10.12: Mbalomera ehituufu ti, hu ludaalo olwʼohusaliraho emisango balireherahomo abaatu bomu Sodoma ohuhira abomu hibuga ehyo. Ebibuga ebyʼabaatu abaŋuma hufugiirira (Mat 11:20-24)
10.13: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma ati, “Jibageene enywe abaatu abomu hibuga Korazini nʼe Bbesusayida! Ebyamaliholiho ebi baahola ewenywe, biba ni byali mu Tiiro nomu Sidoni, hani abaatu baayo beeboŋa ebigwaali era beeŋaha nʼegohe ohulaga baati bebbwagire.
10.14: Aye hu ludaalo olwʼohusala emisango, baliŋa abaatu abomu Tiiro ni Sidoni ehibonerezo ehiriho obudemwademwa hu hyenywe.
10.15: Enywe abaatu bʼe Kaperanawumu, muŋeega muuti mulitiina mwigulu? Bbe, mulitiina mu geyeena.”
10.16: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Aŋulirisa ebi musomesa gaahena gabifugiirira, aba afugiiriye ndiise. Aye oyo atala ebimusomesa, aba atalire ndiise era atala ese aba atalire oyo owatuuma.” Esanvu nʼababiri baagamayo
10.17: Ni ŋabitaŋo ehiseera, ngʼabeegi bala esanvu nʼababiri baagamayo eyiri Yesu ni bali basangaafu nga bamulomera baati, “Musengwa, hubaaye huŋonia abaatu nʼemisambwa joosi ni jituŋulira olwʼobuŋangi obu watuŋa.”
10.18: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Nabona Sitaani nʼaŋanuha ohuŋwa mwigulu hyʼohumesya hwʼefula.
10.19: Era njʼehigema mbaŋaaye obuŋangi ohwema hu temu ejʼobusagwa nʼesiiga nʼohuŋangula amaani gosigosi agʼomusigu. Ŋaŋuma habi wayire halala ahaliboolaho.
10.20: Mutasangaala olwohuba ti emisambwa jibaŋulira aye musangaale olwohuba amasiina genywe baagaŋandiiha mwigulu.” Ohusangaala hwa Yesu (Mat 11:25-27; 13:16-17)
10.21: Mu hiseera ehyo, ngʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu amaamira Yesu ahena amuŋa esangaalo aloma ati, “Kujumirya Bbaabba, Musengwa owatonda egulu nʼehyalo, olwohuba wagisa aberanga abamagesi ohumanya amazima, ngʼohwehulira abaŋuma ehi bamanyire hyʼabaana abaŋere. Hituufu Bbaabba, ehyo hyahusangaasa olwohuba njʼohwali ohusiima huhwo.
10.22: “Bbaabba gaapambya ebiitu byosibyosi ohubiŋuga. Ŋaŋuma amanyire ehi Omwana ali ohutusaho Semwana era ŋaŋuma amanyire ehi Semwana ali ohutusaho Omwana. Era ŋaŋuma amanyire ehi Semwana ali ohutusaho Omwana ni naabo aba Omwana ahwehulira ehyama ehyʼohumutegeera.”
10.23: Yesu ni gasigala nʼabeegi babe boŋene ngʼabaloma ati, “Enywe mwesiimire ohubona bino ebi mubona!
10.24: Mbalomera ti abanaabbi nʼabahabaha bangi beegombanga ohubona ebyamaliholiho ebi mubona nʼohuŋulira bino ebi muŋulira aye sibasobola.” Olugero oluŋamba hu mulugendwa owaali owʼehisa
10.25: Lwali lulala, ngʼomusomesa wʼamagambi ga Hatonda genyoha abuusa Yesu nʼamuhema ati, “Musomesa, kole hi ko nahasuna obulamu obutaŋwaŋo?”
10.26: Nga Yesu amubuusa ati, “Amagambi aga baŋa Musa galoma gaatye? Gahuloma hiina nʼogasoma?”
10.27: Ngʼomusomesa oyo amugobolamo ati hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, “Yendanga Hatonda Musengwawo nʼomwoyo gugwo gwosigwosi nʼobulamu wuwo wosiwosi nʼamaani gago gosigosi nʼamagesi gago gosigosi. Era yendanga muliranwawo ngʼolu weyenda wamwene.”
10.28: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Ogoboyeemo bulaŋi. Holanga otyo, olisuna obulamu obutaŋwaŋo.”
10.29: Aye omusomesa wʼamagambi oyo olwʼohwenda ohwehenaho esoni ngʼabuusa Yesu ati, “Muliranwa yange, njʼani?”
10.30: Ngʼaŋo Yesu amugobolamo nʼamugerera olugero ati, “Ŋaaliŋo omusinde owaali nʼaŋwa e Yerusaalemu ni gehirira e Yeriko, ngʼagwa mu batemu, bamuhubba bamwambulamo engoye nʼebigaali ni nabyo byosibyosi bamuleha nʼajalaaye aŋo nʼafuuyeho olweso.
10.31: Nga ŋabaaŋo omusengi wa Hatonda owaali yeesi nʼabita mu ngira enyene eyo, ni gamubona gamwebaaya, ngʼabitaaŋo getiinira.
10.32: “Omuutu ohuŋwa mu hiha hyʼAbaleevi gaali yeesi abita mu ngira enyene eyo. Ni goola mu hifo ehyo gamubona, gamwebaaya, ngʼabitaaŋo getiinira.
10.33: Aye Omusamaliya yeesi owaali hu lugendo lulwe, ni goola aŋa omuutu oyo gaali, ngʼamubona amuŋambira ehisa,
10.34: ngʼatiina aŋa gaali ngʼahotama ngʼamooga amabbwa amuŋaha envinyo ahena amuboŋa ebbandeji, ngʼamuta hu nasugirya yiye amuŋira mu nyumba omu bagendi baapangisanga baŋenyuhamo, geyongera ohumujanjaba.
10.35: Ni wahya, ngʼasasula omwene nyumba yʼabagendi edinaari ebiri, ahena amuloma ati, ‘Mulabirire, ndihusasula ebbeesa ejigwaho josijosi ni ngobooye.’
10.36: “Kale njʼani hu abo abadatu, oyu oŋeega oti njʼowaali muliranwa wʼoyo owagwa mu batemu?”
10.37: Ngʼomusomesa wʼamagambi amugobolamo ati, “Oyo owʼamuŋambira ehisa.” Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Ale weesi tiina oholenga otyo.” Yesu ahyalira Maliza ni Malyamu
10.38: Yesu nʼabeegi babe ni baali mu lugendo ni batiina e Yerusaalemu, nga boola aŋaatu mu hitehere omu muhasi oyu balanganga baati Maliza gamenyanga. Ngʼomuhasi oyo amuhyaasa mu mago gage.
10.39: Maliza gaali ni mugandaawe oyu balanganga baati Malyamu. Malyamu gatiina gehala huupi ni Yesu Musengwa gaŋuliirisa ebi gaali nʼaloma.
10.40: Aye Maliza gaali afululuhana nʼemirimo yeŋene. Ehyaŋwamo ngʼatiina aŋali Yesu amuloma ati, “Musengwa, sihihuluma muganda yange ohundehera emirimo seeŋene? Mulomeho gaaje ganjeede.”
10.41: Nga Yesu Musengwa amugobolamo ati, “Maliza, Maliza, weŋenderehire era oli nʼebingi ebihudambya ebitagasa.
10.42: Aye ehyetagisa obugali hirala hyonyene. Malyamu niye cʼehigangayeŋo era sibalihimutusaho.”

11.1: Lulala, Yesu gaali aŋaatu nʼasaba. Ni gahena, nga mulala hu beegi babe amuloma ati, “Musengwa, hwesi tusomese ohusaba, ngʼolu Yowaane gasomesa abeegi babe.”
11.2: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abaloma ati, “Ni muba ni musaba, musabenga muuti, “ ‘Seefe, oŋeewe eŋono, obuŋugi buwo buuje.
11.4: Era tusoniŋe ebibi byefe ngʼolu hwesi husoniŋa hiisi abatuhola obubi. Era otatuleha hugwa mu huhemewa.’ ”
11.5: Ngʼaŋo abaloma ati, “Singa mulala hu enywe aba ni meriiwe, ngʼatiina eyi ali mu wiire ŋagati amuloma ati, ‘Wange, poleho obusyanu,
11.6: olwohuba meeri yange aŋwa hungwaho aye mbula hyahumwiŋula.’
11.7: Ne ola ali mu nyumba ngʼamugobolamo ati, ‘Wange ese kenire ohweyigala, nʼabaana bange baŋenyuhire. Mbula agenyoha ohuba nʼehikuholera.’
11.8: Mbalomera ti wayire nga aba abula agenyoha ohumuŋa ehi aba nʼamusungire ate nga ko bamuhago, olwa ola ohumwomeraho nʼamwegayirira, genyoha gaamuŋa hiisi ehi genda.
11.9: “Olwʼehyo, mbaloma ti musabenga, Hatonda alibaŋa ehi mumusunga, mwegumyenga ohwendula, muligundula; mukokonenga, balibeguliraŋo.
11.10: Olwohuba hiisi asunga bamuŋa, owendula agundula, nʼakookona yeesi bamwiguliraŋo.
11.11: “Ale njʼani hu enywe, aŋa omwana wuwe etemu nʼamusungire enyeeni,
11.13: Olwo ŋaahani obanga enywe ababi, mumanyire ohuŋa abaana benywe ebiraŋi, ne Senywe owomwigulu saalihira aŋo bugali weene ohuŋa Omwoyo Omutukuvu abo abamusunga?” Yesu ahira Bbeluzebbuli amaani (Mat 12:22-30; Mar 3:20-27)
11.14: Lulala, Yesu gabbinga omusambwa hu muutu ogwali ni gumusidihire ohutaloma. Ni gwamuŋwaho gatandiha ohuloma ngʼehiŋindi hyʼabaatu abaali aŋo hyeŋunja.
11.15: Aye abandi nga baloma baati, “Abbinga emisambwa nʼatambisa obuŋangi wa Bbeluzebbuli omuhulu wʼemisambwa.”
11.16: Nʼabandi nga bamusunga ni bamuhema, mbo abaŋe ahabonero ahalaga haati obuŋangi obu gaali ni nawo gabutusa yiri Hatonda.
11.17: Yesu gamanya ebiŋeego byawe, ngʼabaloma ati, “Abaatu abowahabaha obulala banesalamo bahubbana abeene nʼabeene, owahabaha owo busihiiriha era nʼolu gaba mago ganeyabulamo gabbwagiha.
11.18: Ni Sitaani yeesi singa geesoosa omwene, owahabaha wuwe buba bunemeerereŋo buutye? Hiri hiityo olwohuba muloma muuti mbo mbinga emisambwa hu baatu hu lwʼobuŋangi wa Bbeluzebbuli.
11.19: Ŋaahani hanye mbinga emisambwa ni tambisa obuŋangi wa Bbeluzebbuli, abaloobera benywe bajibbinga hu lwʼobuŋangi bwʼani? Ehyo cʼehigira abaloobera benywe abeene balibasalira omusango.
11.20: Aye nimba ni mbinga emisambwa hu lwʼobuŋangi wa Hatonda, ŋaahani obuŋugi buwe buujire eyi muli.
11.21: Omuutu owʼamaani ali nʼebyohusoosa, anahuuma enyumba yiye, abeebi sibaŋira ebiitu bibye.
11.22: Aye amuhira amaani anamuwaagala gamuŋangula, aŋira ebyʼohusoosa ebi gesiga era ganyagulula nʼebiitu bibye.
11.23: “Atali hu lubega lwange aba mulabe wange era atahumbaanihisya ŋalala ni nange, asalaania.
11.24: “Omusambwa ni guŋwa hu muutu, gulerenga mu lulafu ni gwendula aŋa guneŋogome. Ni guhaya guloma guuti, ‘Nja hwagama eyi nabanga.’
11.25: Ni gwagama, gwagaana obulamu wʼomuutu oyo ni babulongoosa bulaŋi weene hyʼenyumba eyi basaguuye.
11.26: Ngʼaŋo gutiina guhobaho ejahye ejindi musanvu ejiguhiraho obubi, nga jija jimwingiramo. Era obulamu wʼomuutu oyo buliba bubi ohuhiraho ngʼolu waali oludaayi.”
11.27: Yesu ni gaali nʼahiiroma, ngʼomuhasi owaali aŋo mu hiŋindi hyʼabaatu adunda ejanjaasi amuloma ati, “Ali nʼekabi omuhasi owahusaala gahena gahwokesa!”
11.28: Aye Yesu gamuloma ati, “Abahira ohuba nʼekabi mbabo abaŋulira ehibono hya Hatonda baahena bahigondera.” Abafalisaayo basunga Yesu ahabonero (Mar 8:11-12; Luk 11:29-32)
11.29: Abaatu bangi ni beyongera ohuhumbaana, nga Yesu aloma ati, “Abaatu bʼomulembe guno babi! Benda ahabonero aheŋunjisa ahalaga haati Hatonda njʼowaatuma aye ŋaŋuma ahabonero ahabaja ohubaŋa ohutusaho ahabonero hyaha Yona olu gaali mu guyeeni.
11.30: Olwohuba ngʼolu Yona gaali habonero eyiri abaatu bʼe Nineeve, nʼOmwana wʼOmuutu po aja ohuba eyiri abaatu bʼomulembe guno.
11.31: Habaha omuhasi ohuŋwa mu gwanga lyʼe Syebba ehirirene mu mehiriro ga Yisirayiri alyemeerera gasalira abaatu bʼomulembe guno omusango ohubahira olwohuba gagenda olugendo olwene oluleeŋi gatiina mu Yisirayiri ohuŋuliirisa ebibono bya Habaha Sulemaani ebyʼamagesi. Aye ahira Sulemaani eŋono ali ŋano ne simufugiirira ebi aloma.
11.32: Abaatu bʼe Nineeve hu ludaalo lwʼohusala emisango balyemeerera balumiirisa abʼomulembe guno omusango gubahire olwohuba nibo Yona ni gabalomera ehibono hya Hatonda, bebbwaga. Aye ahira Yona eŋono ali ŋano ne simwenda hwebbwaga. Enjase mu bulamu wʼomuutu
11.33: “Omuutu saaŋambya etaala gayihweha oba gayifunihira mu hisero aye ayita hu hihondo ko abaatu abengira mu nyumba babone enjase.
11.34: Emoni jenywe njʼetaala jʼemibiri jenywe. Era jinaba ni jibona bulaŋi, obulamu wosiwosi wijula enjase. Aye jinaba ni jitabona, omuutu oyo aba ali mu hiirema.
11.35: Ale ni mwegenderese, enjase eyiri mu enywe etaba hiirema.
11.36: Singa obulamu wenywe wosiwosi wijula enjase ni ŋaŋuma himesu wayire hirala ehiri mu hiirema, olwʼehyo obulamu wenywe bunafugiirira enjase eyʼehibono hya Hatonda ni ŋaŋumaho hanyomero ahagaana amazima gehibono hya Hatonda, ehibono ehyo hiija huba hyʼetaala mu bulamu wenywe.” Jageene Abafalisaayo nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi (Mat 23:1-36; Mar 12:38-40)
11.37: Yesu ni gahena ohuloma atyo, nga ŋabaŋo omufalisaayo owʼamwanirisa ohulyaho ewuwe. Nga Yesu atiina gehala ohulya.
11.38: Aye omufalisaayo oyo geeŋunja ohubona Yesu nʼalya nʼatasaabire mu ngalo.
11.39: Ngʼaŋo Yesu Musengwa amuloma ati, “Enywe Abafalisaayo muli hyʼabaatu aboosa hu mugulu wʼebihopo nʼembya aye mugati ni mwijuuye obucaafu. Mwesi mu myoyo jenywe mwijuuye ebibi.
11.40: Basiru enywe! Muŋeega muuti owatonda hu mugulu, sinje owatonda nʼomugati?
11.41: Ehyohuhola, mugabirenga abagadi hu byenywe nʼomwoyo mulala ko mubeere erala bagwalaafu.
11.42: “Jibageene enywe Abafalisaayo! Muŋa ehirala ehyʼehumi ehya hiisi hiitu aye mwebirira muuti ohusala emisango ni mutehubbira nʼohwenda Hatonda, byamugaso. Muhole ebyo byosibyosi ni ŋaŋuma hulehayo ebindi.
11.43: “Jibageene enywe Abafalisaayo, olwohuba mwenda ohwihala mu bifo ebyʼeŋono mu mahumbaaniro nʼohubaheesa mu akisoni mu ngeri eraga yiiti ndinywe abahihenaho.
11.44: “Jibageene, olwohuba muli hyʼamagombe aga baatu beemaho aye ni batamanyire baati aŋa bemire ŋaliŋo omufu!”
11.45: Ngʼaŋo mulala hu basomesa bʼamagambi amuloma ati, “Musomesa, onaloma otyo oba otuduhiramo hwesi.”
11.46: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Jibageene enywe abasomesa bʼamagambi olwohuba mutwiha abaatu amagambi amasito aga mwabeene mwesi mutasobola nʼohuŋamba!
11.47: Jibageene enywe, olwohuba mudabirisa amagombe gʼabanaabbi aba basehulu benywe beeta aye simugondera ebi baalomanga.
11.48: Muli bajulizi bʼebyo ebi basehulu benywe baahola. Nibo beeta abanaabbi, ne nywe muli huhola gwahutandaza magombe gaawe.
11.49: “Olwʼehyo, Hatonda mu bulabuhi buwe galoma ati, ‘Ndibatumira abanaabbi nʼabahwenda era balala hu bo baja hubeeta nʼabandi babahiyaania.’
11.50: Olwʼehyo balisalira abaatu bʼomulembe guno omusango olwʼohwita abanaabbi bosibosi ohuŋwera erala hutandiha yʼehyalo ohwola hatyane.
11.51: Ohuŋwa ngʼolu beeta Abbiri ohwola hu Zakaliya oyu beetira ŋagati wʼehituuti nʼehifo ehyawufu mu Yekaalu.
11.52: “Jibageene enywe abasomesa bʼamagambi olwohuba mutigalira abaatu ohumanya amazima bahanoŋoha. Hiri hiityo olwohuba muhweha ehisumuluzo ehigula olwigi oluja mu hifo omu begirihisa abaatu amazima mwabaloberesa ohwingira, ni nenywe mwabeene ndimwingira!”
11.53: Yesu ni gahena ohuloma ebyo, gaŋwaŋo ngʼatiina. Ngʼaŋo abasomesa bʼamagambi nʼAbafalisaayo batandiiha ohumwendulirisa nʼohumuŋahanianga ebyʼamaani ebyene nʼohumusosekanga ebibuuso hulala hulala,
11.54: ni bendula aŋohumuŋambihisya mu ndoma yiye enyene.

12.1: Mu hiseera ehyene ehyo, abaatu ekumi nʼekumi ni baali ni bahumbeene nʼohwemanaho ni bemanaho, nga Yesu atagihira hu beegi babe abaloma ati, “Mwehuume obunafuusi wʼAbafalisaayo olwohuba baloma hino nga bahola hindi.
12.2: Hiisi hiitu ehi bagisa hiryeta aŋalafu era hiisi ehi bahweha, balihiŋebbula.
12.3: Byosibyosi ebi balomera mu njirema, mubiromanga mu muusi etangaalwe era ni neebyo ebi babaŋweŋweterera mu hutwi mu hisenge biribbutuha. Omuutu owohuŋa eŋono (Mat 10:28-31)
12.4: “Bahyange, mbaloma ti mutatyanga abo abeeta omubiri hyoŋene nga bahoma aŋo.
12.5: “Aye leha mbalomere oyu muli nʼohutyanga, mutyenga nje Hatonda olwohuba ali nʼobuŋangi ohwita omubiri nʼohudanya omuutu mu muliro ogutasima. Oyo njʼoyu muli nʼohutyanga!
12.6: “Singa omuutu atunda obuyuni butaanu, saabufunamo bbeesa nyingi. Aye ŋaŋuma wayire halala aha Hatonda gebirira.
12.7: Kale muteŋendehereranga, olwohuba mu moni ja Hatonda muli bamuŋendo nʼohuhiraho obuyuni owo eduuli, olwohuba amanyire nʼobungi wʼefiiri eriri hu mitwe jenywe. Ohufugiirira nʼohwegaana Kurisito (Mat 10:32-33; 12:32; 10:19-20)
12.8: “Mbalomera hino ti hiisi oyu esoni jitaŋamba ohwatula mu abaatu ati gaafugiirira, nʼOmwana wʼOmuutu yeesi alimwanjula eyiri abamalayika ba Hatonda ati wuwe.
12.9: Aye oyo oyu pambya esoni mu baatu, keesi sindimwanjula eyiri abamalayika ba Hatonda.
12.10: Era hiisi aloma ebibi hu Mwana wʼOmuutu, balimusoniŋa aye oyo afodogola Omwoyo Omutukuvu sibalimusoniŋa.
12.11: Ni banabaŋambenga babaŋira mu mbuga jʼamagambi, mu mahumbaaniro oba mu bʼobuŋangi, simweŋendehereranga ehi munalome.
12.12: Omwoyo Omutukuvu alibaŋa ehyʼohuloma mu hiseera ehyo.” Olugero lwʼomuŋinda omuŋaayi
12.13: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaaŋo omuutu mulala hu baali mu hiŋindi hyʼabaatu owaloma Yesu ati, “Musomesa, lomaho hu mulebe yange hugabane ebyʼobusika weefe.”
12.14: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Wange, njʼani owaatayeŋo ohuba mulamuzi wenywe?”
12.15: Ngʼaŋo aloma abaaliŋo ati, “Mwehuume ohutaluluhaniranga ebiitu ebyʼehyalo hino olwohuba obulamu wʼomuutu sibubaŋo olwʼebiitu ebingi ebi aba nʼali ni nabyo.”
12.16: Ngʼabagerera olugero ati, “Ŋaaliŋo omuutu omuŋinda owaali nʼendimiro yiye nga geeta ebiryo.
12.17: Nga geebuusa mu mwoyo gugwe ati, ‘Kole hi? Mbula ehifo ehihena ohubungamo ebirime byange bino!’
12.18: Ngʼaŋo omwene gegobolamo ati, ‘Hino njʼehi njʼahuhola. Nja hubbwagaŋo ebyagi bino kene nduheŋo ebibbala. Mbiihe omwo ebiryo nʼebiitu byange ebindi.
12.19: Ni kenire ohuhola tyo, ndyesiima mu mwoyo gwange ti ŋaahani kenire ohutegehera obulamu wange owomu moni. Leha pumule, ndye era nywe hu byange, sangaale!’
12.20: Aye Hatonda ngʼamuloma ati, ‘Muŋaayi ewe! Mu hiire hino obulamu buwo buja huŋwaŋo. Ŋaahani njʼani aja hulya ebi obungire ebyo?’ ”
12.21: Nga Yesu ko agohoba ati, “Po aliba atyo omuutu owebiihira ebyʼobuŋinda mu hyalo muno aye nʼatali muŋinda ewa Hatonda.” Ohuta owesige mu Hatonda (Mat 6:25-34)
12.22: Nga Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Cʼehigira mbaloma ti muteŋendehereranga olwʼehyohulya oba ehyohwambala.
12.23: Obulamu wenywe wa muŋendo ohuhira ebiryo nʼomubiri gwosi guhira ebyohwambala.
12.24: Mubonere hu nyuni, sijirima era jiŋuma byagi omu jibunga ebiryo aye Hatonda ajiŋa ebijirya. Enywe simuhirira ŋaleeŋi enyuni ejo bbe?
12.25: Era njʼani hu enywe aŋanga ohweyongesaho wayire oludaalo lulala hu bulamu wuwe olwʼohweŋendehereranga?
12.26: Ŋaahani oba nga simuŋanga huhola wayire ehiitu ehidiidiri hyehyo, lwahiina mweŋendehereranga?
12.27: Mubonere hu bimuli, sibirima wayire ohutungisa engoye aye nʼeŋono eri Habaha Sulemaani gaali ni nalyo lyosiryosi sigambalanga hubihira emboneha.
12.28: Hanye eyo njʼengeri eyi Hatonda alabiirira ebimuli ebiriŋo ahaseera buseera nga babyohya omuliro, saalibambasa enywe abali nʼohufugiirira ohudiidiri?
12.29: Muteŋendehereranga hu ebi munaalye oba munanywe.
12.30: Byosibyosi ebyo njʼebi baatu abatafugiirira Hatonda baŋembaho byabahenera ehiseera aye Senywe amanyire ati mubyenda.
12.31: Aye enywe mwendulenga obuŋugi wa Hatonda, bali bameedaho nʼebisigayeyo byosi.
12.32: “Mutatya wayire muli habbubbu hadiidiri olwohuba Senywe owomwigulu alibaŋa omugabo mu obuŋugi buwe.
12.33: Muŋambe ebyenywe muŋe abagadi, munahola muutyo muba mwebiihira obuŋinda owʼemirembe nʼemirembe mwigulu eyi omwibi nʼebisereŋi bitoola,
12.34: olwohuba eyi obuŋinda bubwo buba nʼomwoyo gugwo njʼeyi gusiiba ni guŋemba. Abeedu abeetegehera ohugobola hwa musengwa yaawe (Mat 24:45-51)
12.35: “Mube betegefu ohuŋeeresanga Hatonda hiisi ludaalo hyʼomwidu ngʼolu aba nahuumiiriye musengwawe nʼetaala yiye ni yaaduha.
12.36: Era mube hyʼabaatu abalindirira musengwa yaawe ohugobola nʼaŋwa hu higole, ni goola gakookona ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo bamwiguliraŋo.
12.37: Bali nʼekabi abaŋeeresa abo aba musengwa yaawe agobola gagaana ni bamoga. Mu butuufu oweene mbalomera ti alyetegeha gabehasa ngʼabeŋula era ngʼasigalaŋo nʼalindiriye ohuŋeeresa hiisi muutu ehi genda.
12.38: Hiriba hiraŋi musengwa yaawe ohubagaana ni bahiimoga wayire agobola mu wiire ŋagati oba engoho ni yiholyoha.
12.39: Aye muhimanye muuti singa omwene mago amanya esaawa eyi mwibi anaajiremo, saamuleha hubbwaga nyumba yiye ohumunyaga ebiitu bibye.
12.40: Mwesi mwetegehe olwohuba Omwana wʼOmuutu aliijira mu hiseera ehi mutamusuubiriramo.”
12.41: Ngʼaŋo Peetero abuusa Yesu ati, “Musengwa, olugero luno olugereeye ndiife hweŋene oba abaatu bosibosi?”
12.42: Nga Musengwa amugobolamo ati, “Ŋaahani njʼani omuŋanika omwesigwa era owʼamagesi? Njʼoyo oyu musengwawe gataŋo ohutangirira abahye era gaabaŋa ebiryo byawe mu hiseera ehituufu.
12.43: Gesiimire omuŋeeresa oyu musengwawe alyagaana nʼahola atyo.
12.44: Mbalomera ehituufu ti musengwawe alimuŋa ohuhulira ebiitu bibye byosibyosi.
12.45: Aye singa omuŋeeresa oyo aloma mu mwoyo gugwe ati, ‘Musengwa yange anahalwe ohugobola,’ atandiha ohuhubba abahye era gaaba hu gʼohulya nʼohunywa nʼohumeera.
12.46: Musengwa wʼomuŋeeresa oyo aligobola hu ludaalo olu atamusuubiriraho nomu saawa eyi atamanyire. Era musengwawe oyo alimugudya ebyembaha ebyene ngʼahena amubalira ŋalala nʼabatafugiirira.
12.47: “Era omuŋeeresa amanyire ehi musengwawe genda era ndamwetegehera cooka ndahihola, balimugudya ebyembaha ebyene.
12.48: Aye omuŋeeresa oyo ohola ehibi nʼatamanyire ati ehi ahola hibi, balimugudya ni bamuleheramoho. Hiisi oyu baŋa obuvunanyiziwa obubbala, balimusubiriramo bingi, ne oyo oyu babiihisa ebingi bali mwendaho bingi ohuhiraho ebi bamubiihisa.” Yesu sigaleeta emiyaaya aye hwabuhania (Mat 10:34-36)
12.49: Ngʼaŋo Yesu geyongera ohuloma ati, “Naaja huŋwana muliro ogwʼohwabuhania abaatu hu hyalo. Ne nga nahendire bugali gube ti gwahena hale ohuŋamba!
12.50: Aye ese samwene ndi nʼohweyiniha mu hubonaabona ngʼolu beeniha omuutu mu maaji mu hubatiziwa era neŋendehereeye bugali ohwola olu hiryolerera.
12.51: Muŋeega muuti naaja huleeta miyaaya hu hyalo? Bbe, naaja hwabuhania.
12.52: Ohuŋwa olwa leero, abaatu bataanu mu hidaala hirala baneyabulengamo, abadatu babuhana hu babiri oba ababiri babuhana hu badatu hu lwange.
12.53: Omusaaye omusinde saaliŋambagana nʼomusaani era omuhaana saaliŋambagana ni nyina, omulya saaliŋambagana ni masaalaawe hu lwange.” Ohumanya ehiseera (Mat 16:2-3)
12.54: Nga Yesu aloma ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ati, “Ni mubona ehireri ni hiŋwa ebugwalyuba, muloma muuti, ‘Efula yinaagwe,’ era nga yigwa.
12.55: Era epunga enahubba ohuŋwa mu mehiriro, muloma muuti, ‘Omumwi guja hwaduha bugali.’ Nga era gwaduha.
12.56: Banafuusi enywe! Mumanyire amahulu gemboneha yʼembeera yʼehyalo nʼeyegulu byonyene. Lwahiina simumanyire huvunula ebiriŋo mu hiseera hino? Tegeregana nʼomusigu wuwo ni guhiiri (Mat 5:25-26)
12.57: “Lwahiina simuŋanga hweyabuliraŋo ehiruŋamu ehi Hatonda genda era mwahihola?
12.58: Singa ŋabaaŋo ahuŋaŋabira, ni muba ni mutiina mu moni jʼomulamuzi, fuba mufugiirisanie ni muhiiri mu ngira. Ne ni mutategeregana, nʼalihwosa mu moni jʼomulamuzi alihusalira omusango gaahena gaahuŋambya omuhulu wʼabasirikale ahudanye mu komera.
12.59: Kulomera ti sooliŋwa mu komera ohwola olulisasula ebbeesa josijosi eji ahubanja.”

13.1: Mu hiseera ehyo, ŋaaliŋo abalomera Yesu ebyafa hu baatu bʼe Galilaaya aba Pilaato galagira babeeta ni baali ni baŋaayo eŋongo eyiri Hatonda.
13.2: Nga Yesu ababuusa ati, “Muŋeega muuti Abagalilaaya abo baali babbengi ohuhira abandi olwohuba baafa mu ngeri eyo?
13.3: Mu butuufu oweene sipohiri. Aye mbaloma ti ni nenywe mwesi ni mutebbwaga, mulisihiiriha mwesimwesi.
13.4: Oba muŋeega muuti abasinde bala ehumi namunaana aba munaala gwagwaho e Silowaamu baafa baali babbengi ohuhira abaatu bosibosi abaali mu Yerusaalemu?
13.5: Mu butuufu oweene sipohiri. Aye ni mutebbwaga, ni nenywe mwesimwesi mulisihiiriha.” Olugero lwʼomusaala omutiini
13.6: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagerera olugero luno ati, “Ŋaaliŋo omuutu owaali nʼomusaala ogu balanga baati omutiini mu muga gugwe. Lulala gatiina ohwendulaho ebibala aye ndigagaanaho wayire hirala.
13.7: Ngʼaloma owalabiriranga endimiro ati, ‘Bona, emyaha edatu ni niija ohwendula ebibala hu mutiini guno aye ni tagaanaho.’ Gutemeeŋo, guŋuma mugaso.”
13.8: Ngʼowalabiriranga endimiro amugobolamo ati, “Muhulu, peeyo omwaha mulala ngutemerere nguteho nʼebigimusa hubone.
13.9: Singa gwama ebibala omwaha oguuja hiraŋi ne ni gutahaame nga ko gutemaaŋo.” Yesu aŋonia omuhasi hu Sabbaato
13.10: Lulala, hu ludaalo olwa Sabbaato, Yesu gaali mwirala hu mahumbaaniro nʼasomesa.
13.11: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaŋo mu humbaaniro omwo omuhasi oyu omusambwa gwali ni gufudungire ohuhena emyaha ehumi namunaana. Omuhasi oyo gaali saasobola nʼohwegolola kadi naŋadiidiri.
13.12: Yesu ni gamubona, ngʼamulanga amuloma ati, “Oŋonire obulwaye bubo.”
13.13: Ngʼamuŋambaho, aŋo ni naaŋo omuhasi oyo ngʼagololoha ajumirya Hatonda.
13.14: Omuhulu wʼehumbaaniro galuŋa olwohuba Yesu gaŋonia omuutu oyo hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato. Ngʼaloma ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu abaaliŋo ati, “Endaalo jiri mukaaga eji baatu baholeraho emirimo. Mujenga hwijo ohubaŋonia aye sihu ludaalo olwa Sabbaato.”
13.15: Nga Yesu Musengwa amugobolamo ati, “Banafuusi enywe, simusitula ŋombe oba nasugirya jenywe hu hihongo hulwa Sabbaato mwajiŋira ohujinywesa?
13.16: Olwo hibi ohuŋonia omuhasi ono, omwijuhulu wa Yibbulayimu oyu Sitaani abaaye nʼabonyabonya ohuhena emyaha ehumi namunaana, olwohuba ludaalo lwa Sabbaato?”
13.17: Ni galoma atyo, nga hisimbya abasigu babe emitwe aye abaatu basigaayeŋo ni bali basangaafu olwʼebiraŋi ebyo byosibyosi ebi gaali nʼabaholera. Olugero olwa Kalidaali nʼolwehisimbulusa (Mat 13:31-33; Mar 4:30-32)
13.18: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma ati, “Obuŋugi wa Hatonda hunabugerageranie hu hi?
13.19: Buli hyʼahamo ha kalidaali aha omuutu gahoma mu muga gugwe. Ni gahoma nga hamera era hahula nga haŋwamo ogusaala ogwene ogubba, ngʼenyuni jitongola ebiswi mu masaga.”
13.20: Nga Yesu nindi abuusa ati, “Obuŋugi wa Hatonda nabugerageranie hu hiina?
13.21: Nabugerageranie hu hasimbulusa aha omuhasi gaŋamba gahatabula mu busyanu oweene obungi owʼengaano abuhande anyiyemo emigaati nga hengira mu tome lyosiryosi eri gahanda mu busyanu owo.” Omulyango omudiiŋi (Mat 7:13-14)
13.22: Ngʼaŋo Yesu agenda nʼasomesa mu bibuga nomu byalo omu gabitanga naali hu lugendo lulwe nʼatiina e Yerusaalemu.
13.23: Nga ŋabaaŋo owamubuusa ati, “Yesu Musengwa, abaatu abalinoŋoha baliba badiidiri?” Ngʼaŋo Yesu amugobaloma ati,
13.24: “Mufubenga ohwingirira mu mulyango omudiiŋi olwohuba mbalomeraho ti bangi baligesyaho ohwingira mu buŋugi wa Hatonda aye sibalisobola.
13.25: Olwigi luhiiri lwigule aye omwene nyumba nʼaligalaŋo, mulyemeerera ebulafu ni mukookona era ni mwegayirira muuti, ‘Muhulu, twigulireeŋo!’ Aye alibagobolamo ati, ‘Simbamanyire era simanyire nʼeyi muŋwera.’
13.26: Ngʼaŋo mutagiha ohuloma muuti, ‘Wasomesanga mu bitahere byʼewefe era hwalyanga ni nʼewe.’
13.27: Niye aligobolamo ati, ‘Ndomire ti simbamanyire era simanyire nʼeyi muŋwera. Muŋwe aŋo, enywe mwesimwesi abahosi bʼebibi.’
13.28: Mu hiseera ehyo, ŋalibaaŋo ohweninala nʼohulira amangi olwʼobulumi ni mubona Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka ni Yakobbo nʼabanaabbi bosibosi ni bali mu buŋugi wa Hatonda aye enywe ni bababbingire.
13.29: Abaatu baliŋwa ebuŋwalyuba nʼebugwalyuba, mu maniino nomu mehiriro, nga beehala hu mbaga mu buŋugi wa Hatonda.
13.30: Era hituufu bangi hu begingihiriri mu hiseera hino abaliba abaŋaasi, nindi bangi hu baŋaasi mu hiseera hino abaliba abegingihiriri.” Yesu alumirwa abaatu bomu Yerusaalemu (Mat 23:37-39)
13.31: Mu hiseera ehyene ehyo, balala hu Bafalisaayo batiina ngʼabaloma Yesu baati, “Ŋwa ŋano olwohuba Herode genda hu hwita.”
13.32: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Mutiine mulome owʼolugesigesi oyo hyʼehibbwe muuti, ‘Olwa leero nʼejo nja hubbinga emisambwa hu baatu ponie nʼabalwaye aye oludaalo olulondereraho nahahenerese ehyandetire.’
13.33: Ndi nohweyongera ohuhola ehyandetire era pambire engira tiina e Yerusaalemu olwohuba eyo peyi banaabbi bali nʼohufiira.”
13.34: Nga Yesu geyongera abaloma ati, “Enywe abaatu bomu Yerusaalemu! Enywe abaatu bomu Yerusaalemu! Mweta abanaabbi era mwahubba aba babatumira amabaale! Efunda nyingi nendire ohubahumbaania hyʼengoho ngʼolu ehumbaania owaana bwayo aye ni mutafugiirira.
13.35: Mu butuufu oweene mbalomera ti Yekaalu yenywe yija hufuuha magunda. Era simulimbona nindi ohwola olu ndigobola nga mundoma muuti, ‘Ali nʼekabi oyo owuujira mu buŋangi wa Hatonda Musengwa.’ ”

14.1: Lulala hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato, Yesu ni gaali ewomulala hu batangirisi bʼAbafalisaayo ni balya, ngʼabasigu babe bamutaho emoni ni benda babone ehi anahole,
14.2: olwohuba ŋaaliŋo aŋo mu moni jije omuutu owaali nʼalwaye obulwaye owohusimbuluha.
14.3: Nga Yesu abuusa Abafalisaayo nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda ati, “Amagambi gafugiirira ohuŋonia omuutu hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato oba bbe?”
14.4: Aye nibo baŋoleera huŋoleera sibamusimule. Ngʼaŋo Yesu aŋamba hu mulwaye oyo amuŋonia ahena amuseebula.
14.5: Ngʼaŋo ko ahena ababuusa ati, “Njʼani hu enywe, oyu omwana wuwe oba eŋombe yiye yinagwa mwiroŋo hu ludaalo olwa Sabbaato, ndaafayo?”
14.7: Yesu ni gaabona abageni bahye ni betobosamo ebifo ebyʼeŋono hu meeza ohwali ebiryo, ngʼaloma nʼabbumbirya ati,
14.8: “Omuutu nʼahulanganga hu mbaga yiye eyʼobugole, siwetobosangamo ehifo ehyʼeŋono ni batahulomire, olwohuba eŋanga ohubaaŋo obundi oyu balangire ahuhiraho eŋono.
14.9: Oba mbo ohiiri aŋo, ngʼomutegehi wʼembaga gaaja ni nola ahuhira eŋono ahuloma ati, ‘Wange, ŋwaŋo ono gehale aŋo,’ nga ko otiina ohwihala mu hifo ehitali hyʼeŋono nʼoswaye.
14.10: Aye ni bahulanganga, wihalanga mu hifo ehitali hyʼeŋono ko mutegehi wʼomukolo nʼahubona ni wihaaye eyo gaaje ahulome ati, ‘Wahyange, yigerera wuuje wihale ŋano aŋalaŋi ohuhiraho aŋo.’ Wangewe aŋo abageni bahyo bosibosi balihwisamo eŋono.
14.11: Ehyo kiroma olwohuba hiisi owegulumisa, balimwisa aye oyo oweyisa balimugulumisa.”
14.12: Ngʼaŋo aloma owamuhyasa ati, “Nʼonyiyanga emere soolanganga mihago jijo oba abalebe babo oba abehiha hihyo oba abaliranwa babo abaŋinda, olwohuba onahihola boosi balihulanga ewaawe.
14.13: Aye nʼoholanga embaga, olanganga bagadi, abaleme nʼabahyafutafuta nʼabaŋofu abaŋuma ehi banahahuŋe.
14.14: Ehyo hirihuŋeesa ekabi, olwohuba baŋuma hya huhusasula. Hatonda omwene alihusasula hu ludaalo olu aliramuhisaho abagwalaafu.” Olugero lwʼembaga hasiigu (Mat 22:1-10)
14.15: Mulala hu baali ni behaaye hu meeza ni balya ni gaŋulira ehi Yesu galoma, ngʼaloma ati, “Bali nʼekabi abo abalirya hu mbaga eyomu buŋugi wa Hatonda!”
14.16: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Ŋaaliŋo omuutu owanyiiya embaga hasiigu, ngʼalanga abaatu abeene abangi.
14.17: Esaawa eyʼohugabula ni yoola, ngʼatuma omwidu wuwe ohuloma abageni abalange ati, ‘Muuje, olwohuba ŋaahani kenire ohutegeha byosibyosi.’
14.18: Aye abageni abo abalange bosibosi batandiiha ohweŋosyaho ngʼolu batasobole ohubaŋo hu mbaga. Oyu behereeye ohuloma galoma ati, ‘Nagulire ehisugu, nenda ohutiina ohuhyetegeresa. Olwʼehyo soniŋe sinasobole hubaŋo.’
14.19: Ngʼowundi amugobolamo ati, ‘Nagulire esaame ehumi, nenda ohutiina ohujigesesya mbone hanye jisobola ohulima bulaŋi. Olwʼehyo soniŋe sinasobole hubaŋo.’
14.20: Nʼowundi ngʼamugobolamo ati, ‘Nahaleetanga omweŋa, olwʼehyo soniŋe sinasobole huuja.’
14.21: “Ngʼaŋo omwidu gagamayo alomera musengwawe ebyo byosibyosi. Omwene mbaga ni gaŋulira, ngʼaluŋa aloma omwidu wuwe ati, ‘Ŋiitaho otiine ŋosiŋosi mu nguudo ejomu hibuga bunangire abagadi nʼabateŋe nʼabaŋofu nʼabaleme aba onagaane baaje.’
14.22: Ngʼomwidu atiina ahola ehi musengwawe amulomire. Ni gahena ngʼaloma musengwawe ati, ‘Kenire ohuhola ehi wundomire aye abaatu bahiiri huŋera.’
14.23: Nga musengwa yʼomwidu oyo amuloma ati, ‘Tiina olome abo bosibosi aba onagaane ŋosiŋosi mu nguudo ebulafu eyo baaje baŋere hu mbaga yange.
14.24: Mu butuufu oweene, kulomera ti eŋuma wayire mulala hu banaali ni ndangire abanahombeho hu mbaga yange.’ ” Ohwefiirisa hwʼabaloobera ba Yesu (Mat 10:37-38)
14.25: Abaatu bangi bugali baali bagenda ni batiina ni Yesu, ngʼacuuha abaloma ati,
14.26: “Omuutu yesiyesi owenda semwana oba nyina oba omuhasi wuwe oba abaana babe oba abalebe babe oba ababoojo oba oweyenda omwene ohuhiraho ngʼolu ganyenda ese, saaŋanga huba muloobera wange.
14.27: Hiisi owenda ohuba omuloobera wange, ali nʼohwefiirisa byosibyosi era gaaba muheneerefu nʼohufiirwa obulamu wuwe hu lwange ko abe muloobera wange.
14.28: Ŋaahani njʼani hu nywe nategeha ohutongola enyumba, ateherera hwihala gaabalirira abone hanye aŋanga ohuyihena?
14.29: Anayaba omusingi aye yamuhaya ohuheneeresa, ababona bamujeherera,
14.30: baati, ‘Omuutu ono gatandiha ohutongola aye byamuhaya ohuheneeresa.’
14.31: “Oba habaha hi atandiha ohusoosa habaha owundi nʼatehereeye hwihala gebuusa hanye asobola ohuŋangula olutalo nʼabasooli omutwalo mulala, ate nga ola oyu aja husoosa ali nʼabasooli emitwalo ebiri?
14.32: Anabona ati saasobola, amutumira abahwenda ola nʼahiiri ŋaleeŋi nʼamusunga batabagane.
14.33: Mu ngeri njʼenyene, hiisi mulala hu enywe atefiirisa byosibyosi saaŋanga huba muloobera wange.
14.34: “Omunyu omuherehe gwa mugaso aye singa gufuuha heresu, oŋanga otye nindi ohugugobosamo obunoli?
14.35: Guba gubula mugaso ohutusaho ohugudanya hu hibbomboyisi. Ale ali nʼohutwi, aŋulire.”

15.1: Lulala, abaŋoosa nʼabahosi bʼebibi bosibosi baali bahumbaanira aŋa Yesu gaali ohumuŋuliirisa nʼasomesa.
15.2: Ne Abafalisaayo nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ga Hatonda bemulugunya ni baloma baati, “Omusinde ono ahola omuhumba nʼabahosi bʼebibi era alya ni nabo.”
15.4: “Singa mulala hu enywe aba nʼetaama jije cikumi aye nga ndala yigotaho, saaleha aŋo ecenda namwenda ni jiri hwaya gatiina ohwendula endala eyo egotire ohwola olu ayibona?
15.5: Era nʼayibona, ayidunda gaayita humabega nʼasangaaye
15.6: ngʼahena ayiŋira engo. Ni goola ngʼalanga emihago jije ko nʼabaliranwa babe ngʼabaloma ati, ‘Bahyange, husaŋalihisye ŋalala olwohuba etaama yange eyibaaye nʼegotire yibonehire.’
15.7: Mu ngeri njʼenyene, ŋabaaŋo ohusaŋalya hubitiirifu mwigulu olwʼomuhosi wʼebibi mulala owebbwaga ohuhira abalaŋi ecenda namwenda abatenda hwebbwaga. Endusu eyaali nʼegotire
15.8: “Oba singa ŋabaŋo omuhasi nʼali nʼendusu jije ehumi, ngʼendala yimugotaho saaŋambya taala gasingula ebiitu era gasaagula enyumba yosiyosi nʼayendula ohwola olu ayibona?
15.9: Nʼayibona, alanga emihago jije nʼabaliranwa babe ngʼabaloma ati, ‘Bahyange, husaŋalihisye ŋalala olwohuba mbwene endusu yange eyibaaye ni yingotireho.’
15.10: Mu ngeri njʼenyene, abamalayika ba Hatonda mwigulu basaŋalya olwʼomuhosi wʼebibi mulala owebbwaga.” Omwana owaali nʼabbeeme
15.11: Nga Yesu geyongera abaloma ati, “Ŋaaliŋo omuutu owaali nʼabasaani babe babiri.
15.12: Ngʼaŋo owehiŋere aloma saawe ati, ‘Bbaabba, pe omugabo gwange hu byʼobuŋinda bubwo. Ngʼaŋo saawe abagabaniamo ebiitu bibye.’
15.13: “Endaalo sijabitaŋo nyingi, ngʼomusaani oyo aboŋa ebibye byosibyosi atiina eyo mu hyalo ehyaŋaleeŋi eyi gʼabidubuudira mu obulamu owohwejalabya.
15.14: Ni gabihenaŋo byosibyosi, ngʼenjala eyʼamaani yigwa hiisi ŋaatu mu hyalo ehyo, ngʼaŋo atandiha ohudamba.
15.15: Olwʼehyo, gaatiina geesenga ewomulala hu baatu bomu hyalo ehyo owamuŋa ogwʼohulabiriranga embiiji.
15.16: Olwʼohuhaya ehyohulya, gegombanga nʼohulya hu moola aga gaŋanga embiiji aye ŋabulaŋo amuhombyaho ahaatu hosihosi.
15.17: “Ni geŋeegamo, ngʼaloma ati, ‘Abapakasi ba Bbaabba banga abalya ebiryo basendera nʼamagulu aye ese ndihufiira ŋano nʼenjala!’
15.18: Leha tiine eyiri Bbaabba, mulome ti ‘Bbaabba, nabbenga eyiri Hatonda nʼeyiri ewe wamwene.
15.19: Sipoomera nʼohunanga ti ndi mwana wuwo. Aye fuule mulala hu bapakasi babo.’
15.20: Ngʼaŋo genyoha atiina engo eyiri semwana. “Aye ni gaali nʼahiiriho ŋale nga semwana amulengera, ni gamufaania ngʼehisa himuŋambira omwana wuwe, ngʼaduluma amugwa mu hifuba.
15.21: Ngʼomusaani amuloma ati, ‘Bbaabba, nabbenga eyiri Hatonda nʼeyiri ewe wamwene. Sipoomera hundanga oti ndi mwana wuwo!’
15.22: Aye semwana galoma abeedu babe ati, ‘Mwanguŋeho muleete ebyambalo ebihira obulaŋi, nʼepeta nʼengayito mumwambase.’
15.23: “Mutiine muleete ebunwa yʼeŋombe etobbwatobbwa muyisale, hulye husangaale
15.24: olwohuba omwana wange ono gaali afuuye aye ŋaahani alamuhire era gaali agotire ne abonehire. Ngʼaŋo batandiiha ohusaŋalya.
15.25: “Baholanga ebyo, omusaani omuhulu nʼali mu ndimiro. Ni gaali nʼagobola, nʼanatere ohwola engo ngʼaŋulira ni bemba.
15.26: Ngʼalanga mulala hu beedu, amubuusa ati hiina ehiri eyo?
15.27: Ngʼomwidu oyo amugobolamo ati, ‘Mulebewo agobooye era lataawo amusaliiye ebunwa yʼeŋombe etobbwatobbwa olwohuba mbo omwana wuwe agobooye nʼali mulamu.’
15.28: “Aye omusaani oyo galuŋa huluŋa nandi geeda nʼohwingira mu nyumba. Nga semwana atula ebulafu amwegalihira gengire.
15.29: Aye ngʼagobola mu semwana ati, ‘Bona, emyaha mingi eji kenire ni kuholera hyʼomwidu era sikuhaniaŋalirangaho. Aye sibupangaho wayire ahabusi sale keesi sangaaleho nʼabahyange.
15.30: Aye omusaani wuwo oyo, owadubuuda ebibyo nʼabamalaaya nʼagobooye, omwitiiye ebunwa yʼeŋombe!’
15.31: “Nga Semwana amugobolamo ati, ‘Mwana wange, ewe obaaye ŋano ni nange ahamanga hosihosi era ebiri ŋano byosibyosi bibyo.
15.32: Aye hibaaye hiraŋi ohusaŋalya olwohuba mulebewo oyo, gaali afuuye aye ŋaahani alamuhire era gaali agotire ne abonehire.’ ”

16.1: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Ŋaaliŋo omuŋinda owaali nʼomuŋanika wuwe oyu baloopa baati gaali adubuuda ebiitu ebi gaali nʼamuŋaaye ohulabirira.
16.2: Ngʼaŋo alanga omuŋanika oyo amubuusa ati, ‘Biina bino ebi kuŋuliraho? Nenda wuupe embalirira yʼebiitu ebi nahuŋambya olwohuba sooja hweyongera nʼohiiri muŋanika wange.’
16.3: Ngʼomuŋanika oyo geebuusa mu mwoyo gugwe ati, ‘Hiina ehi naahole, olwohuba musengwa yange gatuhiseemo owesige? Mbula amaani agalima, ndimudoto, nʼesoni jipamba ohusungirisa.’
16.4: Ngʼomwene gegobolamo ati ‘Ŋaahani manyire ehi nahole, ko abaatu abo aba musengwa yange abanja basangaalire mu mago gaawe ni bambingire hu mulimo.’
16.5: Ngʼaŋo alanga hiisi owaali nʼebbanja lya musengwawe. Ngʼaloma omudaayi ati, ‘Musengwa yange ahubanja jinga?’
16.6: “Ngʼamugobolamo ati, ‘Amafuta gomu mizayiti ebidomolo lunaana.’ Ngʼomuŋanika amuloma ati, ‘Ŋamba endagaano yiyo. Yiihala oyicuuse oŋandiihe ebidomolo ebihumi bine.’
16.7: Ngʼaloma owundi ati, ‘Ate ewe, bahubanja jinga?’ Ngʼamugobolamo ati ‘Esaŋu jʼengaano cikumi.’ Ngʼomuŋanika amuloma ati, ‘Ŋamba endagaano yiyo eyi bahubanjiraho. Yiihala oyicuuse oŋandiihe cinaana joŋene.’
16.8: “Nga musengwawe amupaaha olwʼobugeregetania obu gaali ni nawo ohusala amagesi. Ehihulu hiri hiiti, abaatu abatafugiirira Hatonda bagesigesi ohuhira abafugiirira olwʼengeri eyi betegeheramo obulamu waawe owomu moni.
16.9: Mbalomera ti mutambisenga obuŋinda wenywe ohwesunira emihago, olwohuba ebiitu ebyohu hyalo huno ni biribaŋwaho balibasangaalira mu mago agʼemirembe nʼemirembe mwigulu.
16.10: “Omuutu omwesigwa mu hidiidiri aba mwesigwa nomu hibbala era oyo atali mwesigwa mu hidiidiri saaba mwesigwa nomu hibbala.
16.11: Ŋaahani ni muba ni mutali besigwa mu ngeri eyi muŋambamo obuŋinda owohu hyalo huno, njʼani alibaŋa obuŋinda owomwigulu?
16.12: Era ni muba ni mutali besigwa hu byʼabandi, njʼani alibaŋa ebyenywe hu wenywe?
16.13: “Omwidu saaŋanga huba nʼabasengwa babiri, atalaho mulala nga genda owundi oba agonderaho mulala, ngʼatala owundi. Omuutu saaŋanga huŋira ebbeesa ngʼehiitu ehihulu era gasigala nʼahiŋeeresa Hatonda.”
16.14: Ŋaahani, ŋaaliŋo Abafalisaayo abaali ni benda bugali ebyʼobuŋinda owʼehyalo hino ni baŋulira ebyo byosibyosi, nga bamujeherera.
16.15: Nga niye abaloma ati, “Mwefuula abalaŋi mu moni jʼabaatu aye Hatonda amanyire emyoyo jenywe. Olwohuba ehi abaatu bapaaha, hiba hya mbiho mu moni ja Hatonda. Omugaso gwʼamagambi ga Hatonda (Mat 11:12-13; 5:13-32; Mar 10:11-12)
16.16: “Basomesanga amagambi aga Hatonda gaŋa Musa nʼebi banaabbi baŋandiiha ohwola hu biseera bya Yowaane. Aye ohuŋwa hulwo babuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu buŋugi wa Hatonda era hiisi muutu gesolaho ohuwingira nʼehifuba.
16.17: Era hyangu egulu nʼehyalo ohuŋwaŋo ohuhira ahanjikuta ohuŋwaŋo mu magambi ga Hatonda.
16.18: “Ehyʼohuboneraho, hiisi abbinga omuhasi wuwe ngʼahena aleeta owundi, aba aholire obuhwedi. Era oyo aŋira omuhasi owanoba hu wamwe, aba ahola obuhwedi. Omusinde omuŋinda ni Lazaalo
16.19: “Ŋaaliŋo omusinde omuŋinda owambalanga engoye ejʼebbeeyi, nabanga mu bulamu obulaŋi owʼohwesangaasa hiisi ludaalo.
16.20: Era ŋaaliŋo nʼomugadi oyu balanganga baati Lazaalo owaali nʼahwene mabbwa mereere era oyu batanga ŋa mulyango ogwingira mu mago gʼomuŋinda oyo.
16.21: Era embwa jaatiinanga ni jihomba amabbwa gage. Lazaalo gegombanga ohulya obukukumuhira wohu meeza yʼomuŋinda aye ŋaaŋuma amuŋa.
16.22: “Aye ehiseera hyola, nga Lazaalo afa, ngʼabamalayika bamuŋira mwigulu aŋa Yibbulayimu gaali. Ngʼomuŋinda yeesi afa, bamusiiha.
16.23: Omuŋinda oyo ni gaali mu bulumi oweene owʼamaani emagombe, galengera Yibbulayimu naali ni Lazaalo.
16.24: Ngʼaŋo omuŋinda oyo nʼadundireho ejanjaasi amuloma ati, ‘Bbaabba Yibbulayimu, pambire ehisa otume Lazaalo atiine atimye olwala mu maaji gaaje gatonyese hu lulimi ohuŋosa ŋa mwoyo, olwohuba ndi mu bulumi bubitiirifu mu muliro guno.’
16.25: “Aye nga Yibbulayimu amuloma ati, ‘Mwana wange, hebulira oti ni waali nʼohiiri hu hyalo wasuna omugabo gugwo ogwʼebiraŋi aye Lazaalo niye nʼabonaabona. Ŋaahani ali husangaala, ewe nʼoli mu bulumi obubitiirifu.
16.26: Nindi ebyo byosibyosi nʼobitaaye aŋo, bataayeŋo olukooko olwene olubba ŋagati weefe ni nenywe, eŋume muutu aŋanga ohuŋwa eno ohuuja eyo oba ohuŋwa eyo ohuuja eno.’
16.27: “Ngʼaŋo omuŋinda aloma Yibbulayimu ati, ‘Ale muhulu, kwegayiriiye tuma Lazaalo atiine engo weefe,
16.28: alabule abalebe bange abataanu abaliyo, boosi bataaja mu hifo hino ehyʼobulumi obubitiirifu.’
16.29: “Nga Yibbulayimu amuloma ati, ‘Bali nʼamagambi aga baŋa Musa nʼebi banaabbi baŋandiiha, ebyo bihena ohubalabula.’
16.30: Ngʼomuŋinda oyo amuloma ati, ‘Bbe, Bbaabba Yibbulayimu, singa ŋabaaŋo alamuha gatiina gabalomera, bebbwaga.’
16.31: Nga Yibbulayimu amuloma ati, ‘Ni baba ni bataŋulira ebya Musa nʼabanaabbi, sibaja hufugiirira wayire ŋabaaŋo alamuha gatiina ohubalomera.’ ”

17.1: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Ebiitu ebireetera abaatu ohwonoona sibirihaya hubaŋo aye jimwageene oyo abireeta.
17.2: Omuutu oyo aŋoomera humusidiha ogubaale ogusito mu mamiro bamudanya nomu buliba ohuhira olu aleetera mulala hu baŋere bano ohubbenga.
17.3: Mwehuume hino, mulebewo anahuhola ehibi, omulabulanga era singa geebbwaga, omusoniŋanga.
17.4: Singa ahuhola ehibi emirundi musanvu mu ludaalo lulala era hiisi funda ni gaaja eyi oli gaahuloma ati, ‘Nebbwaga, soniŋe,’ omusoniŋanga.” Ohufugiirira
17.5: Ngʼabahwenda baloma Musengwa baati, “Tuyeede hwahaba nʼohufugiirira ohuhiraho ŋano.”
17.6: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Singa muba nʼohufugiirira ohwaga hyʼahamo ha kalidaali, musobola ohuloma omusaala guno muuti, ‘Huuha nʼemisi oje wehomehe mu nyanja,’ era gwabaŋulira. Omulimo gwʼomwidu
17.7: “Njʼani hu nywe ali nʼomwidu amulimira oba amwemerera aŋanga ohuloma omwidu oyo nʼaŋwa mu huhola emirimo ati, ‘Nja wiihale olye?’
17.8: Geheerera humuloma ati, ‘Tegehereŋo ehyohulya bunyiŋule, obe aŋo ni bupeeresa kene ohulya weesi ko olye.’
17.9: Omwidu oyo, Musengwawe amweyaasa olwʼohuhola ebi aba ni bamulagiiye ohuhola? Bbe, saamweyaasa.
17.10: Cʼehyene ni nenywe, ni munahenenge ohuhola byosibyosi ebi Hatonda galoma, mulomenge muuti, ‘Huli beedu wiidu. Huholire ebi huli nʼohuhola.’ ” Yesu aŋonia abagenge ehumi
17.11: Yesu ni gaali nʼatiina e Yerusaalemu, gabita ŋagati wamatwale gʼe Samaliya ni Galilaaya.
17.12: Ni gaali nʼabita mu hirala hu bitahere byayo, ŋaaliŋo abasinde ehumi abaali abagenge abaatiina bemeerera ŋaleŋaleho ni naye.
17.13: Ngʼaŋo baloma nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani baati, “Yesu Musengwa, tuŋambire ehisa otuŋonie.”
17.14: Yesu ni gababona, ngʼabaloma ati, “Mutiine mweyanjule eyiri abasengi ba Hatonda.” Ni baali ni batiina, nga baŋona.
17.15: Mulala hu bo ni gabona ati aŋonire, ngʼagobola nʼajumirya Hatonda nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani.
17.16: Ngʼahubba amafuha huupi ni Yesu, geyaasa. Oweyaasa oyo gaali Musamaliya.
17.17: Nga Yesu aloma ati, “Abaŋonire babaaye ehumi. Omwenda bali ŋeena?
17.18: Ŋabula owundi yesiyesi agobooye ohweyaasa Hatonda ohutusaho ono Atali Muyudaaya?
17.19: Nga Yesu ahena amuloma ati, ‘Yinyoha otiine, ohufugiirira huhwo huhuŋonisye.’ ” Obuŋugi wa Hatonda (Mat 24:23-28,37-41)
17.20: Lulala, Abafalisaayo babuusa Yesu baati, “Obuŋugi wa Hatonda bulibaŋo ŋaali?” Ngʼabagobolamo ati, “Obuŋugi wa Hatonda sibuuja ni bwebonesa.
17.21: Abaatu sibaŋanga huloma baati, ‘Bona, Hatonda aŋuga ŋano’ oba baati, ‘Aŋuga ŋala,’ olwohuba Obuŋugi wa Hatonda buli mu myoyo jenywe.”
17.22: Ngʼaŋo aloma abeegi babe ati, “Ehiseera hiryoola mwegomba ohuba aŋali Omwana wʼOmuutu aye ni mutamubona.
17.23: Abaatu balibaloma baati, ‘Bona, ali ŋala’ oba baati, ‘Bona, ali ŋano.’ Ebyo simubifugiiriranga.
17.24: Ohuuja hwʼOmwana wʼOmuutu huliba hyʼohumesya hwʼefula ohuhosya egulu ohuŋwa hu lubega lulala ohwola hu lundi.
17.25: Aye ebyo ko bibeŋo, banahasooke humugudya bugali weene era abaatu bʼomulembe guno bamwegaana.
17.26: “Ngʼolu hyali mu mulembe gwa Nuwa, pohiriba hiityo nomu hiseera ehyʼohuuja hwʼOmwana wʼOmuutu.
17.27: Mu mulembe gwa Nuwa, abaatu baali balya ni banywa ni bahwa era ni bafumbirwa ohwola hu ludaalo olu Nuwa gengira mu lyato, ngʼefula yitonya, amaaji gabanda gasihiirisa abaatu bosibosi.
17.28: “Era pohyali nomu mulembe gwa Luuti. Abaatu baali balya ni banywa, ni bagula era ni batunda ebyawe, baali balima era ni bagesa ni batongola nʼamayumba.
17.29: Aye hu ludaalo olu Luuti gaŋwa mu Sodoma, Hatonda gaŋindiha omuliro ohuŋwa mwigulu nga gusihiirisa abaatu bosibosi mu hibuga ehyo.
17.30: “Era pohiriba hiityo mu hiseera ehyʼohuuja hwʼOmwana wʼOmuutu.
17.31: Mu hiseera ehyo, omuutu aliba ŋamugulu hu nyumba nʼali nʼebiitu bibye mugati, sigengiranga hutusamo ehyʼohutiina ni nahyo. Era oyo aliba hu muga sigaagama yingo.
17.32: Muhebulire ehyola hu muha Luuti, mwesi hitaboolaho!
17.33: Hiisi owenda oweheneerera obulamu wuwe, alibufiirwa aye hiisi afiirwa obulamu wuwe hu lwange, alibuŋonia.
17.34: Mbalomera ti mu hiire ehyo, abaatu babiri baliba hu buliri bulala, baliŋiraho mulala baleha obundi.
17.35: Abahasi babiri baliba baseera ŋalala hu mbaale, baliŋira mulala nga baleha obundi.
17.36: Abaatu babiri baliba hu muga, baliŋira mulala baleha obundi.”
17.37: Ngʼabeegi babe bamubuusa baati, “Musengwa, ebiitu ebyo biriba ŋeena?” Ngʼabagobolamo mu lugero ati, “Aŋaba ehifu, paŋa esega jihumbaanira hiisi muutu gajibona, nʼohuuja hwʼOmwana wʼOmuutu huutyo po huliba.”

18.1: Ngʼaŋo Yesu nindi agerera abeegi babe olugero ohubasomesa ati bali nʼohusabanga habuhyabuhya ni batademba.
18.2: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Ŋaaliŋo eyo ehibuga omwali omulamuzi atatyanga Hatonda oba omuutu yesiyesi.
18.3: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaaŋo ni namwandu mu hibuga ehyene ehyo owadebereranga nʼatiina ewʼomulamuzi oyo nʼamwegayirira ati, ‘Ngayeho obuyoga nʼosalira oyu posa ni naye omusango.’
18.4: Omulamuzi gaahena ehiseera nʼatafayo hu namwandu oyo aye goola aŋaatu gesinya ngʼaloma mu mwoyo gugwe ati, ‘Wayire sitya Hatonda oba omuutu yesiyesi,
18.5: olwohuba namwandu ono gasulusuuta, leha sale omusango gugwe alehere aŋo ohuujanga ni gasulusuuta.’ ”
18.6: Nga Musengwa abaloma ati, “Mubone ehi omulamuzi oyo atatya Hatonda galoma.
18.7: Olwo muŋeega muuti Hatonda saaliyeeda baatu babe abasaba omuusi nʼowiire? Saaliŋira hamanga nʼahiiri hubayeeda.
18.8: Mbalomera ti alibayeeda mangu aye Omwana wʼOmuutu nʼaligobola alyagaana abaatu hu hyalo huno ni bahimufugiirira?” Olugero lwʼOmufalisaayo nʼomuŋoosa
18.9: Ngʼaŋo Yesu agerera abo abaali ni beebona baati njʼabagwalaafu mu moni ja Hatonda olugero luno ati,
18.10: “Abaatu babiri batiina mu Yekaalu ohusaba. Mulala gaali mufalisaayo, owundi muŋoosa.
18.11: Ngʼomufalisaayo gemeerera asaba ati, ‘Hatonda, kweyaasa olwohuba sindi hyʼabandi: abakondo, abahosi bʼebibi, abahwedi oba hyʼomuŋoosa oyo.
18.12: Ese siiba emirundi ebiri mu wiiki era paayo ehirala ehyʼehumi hu byosibyosi ebisuna.’
18.13: Aye omuŋoosa niye gaali gebaayireho, nʼatenda nʼohugangamusa emoni ŋamugulu ohuheja ewa Hatonda. Aye nga gehubba mu hifuba aloma ati, ‘Hatonda, saasire ese omuhosi wʼebibi!’
18.14: Mbalomera ti omuŋoosa oyo gaagamayo ewuwe Hatonda nʼamusoniŋire ebibi bibye aye omufalisaayo bbe, olwohuba hiisi owegulumisa, balimwisa aye oyo oweyisa balimugulumisa.” Yesu asabira abaana abaŋere ekabi (Mat 19:13-15; Mar 10:13-16)
18.15: Lulala, ŋaaliŋo abaatu abaŋira abaana abaŋere eyiri Yesu abaŋambeho abasabire ekabi. Aye abeegi babe ni bababona, nga babahayula hubahayula.
18.16: Aye Yesu galanga abaana abo nʼaloma ati, “Mulehe abaana abaŋere baaje eyi ndi, mutabalobera olwohuba abaatu abali hya nibo, mbabengira mu buŋugi wa Hatonda.
18.17: Mbalomera ehituufu ti hiisi muutu ateesiga Hatonda hyʼomwana omuŋere ngʼolu geesiga abasaaye babe, saalingira mu buŋugi wa Hatonda.” Yesu nʼomusinde omuŋinda (Mat 19:16-30; Mar 10:17-31)
18.18: Ngʼaŋo mulala hu batangirisi bʼAbayudaaya abuusa Yesu ati, “Omusomesa omulaŋi, hiina ehisaanira ohuhola ko sune obulamu obutaŋwaŋo?”
18.19: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Wema huhi ohunanga omulaŋi ate nga ŋaŋuma mulaŋi ohutusaho Hatonda yeŋene?
18.20: Omanyire ebiragiro bya Hatonda ebiroma biiti, soholanga buhwedi, siwiitanga muutu wahyo, siwiibanga, soobeŋeranga muutu ehi ataholire, oŋanga lataawo ni maawo eŋono.”
18.21: Ngʼomutangirisi oyo amugobolamo ati, “Ohuŋwera erala mu buŋere wange nʼohwosa haati ebiragiro ebyo byosibyosi mbyoheresa.”
18.22: Yesu ni gaŋulira ebyo, ngʼamuloma ati, “Ohibuliraho ehiitu hirala. Tiina otunde ebibyo byosibyosi, ebbeesa ejinaŋwemo ojigabire abagadi, ko ohene wuuje obe muloobera wange, olisuna obuŋinda mwigulu.”
18.23: Aye omutangirisi oyo ni gaŋulira ebiitu ebyo, ngʼabomboŋala olwohuba gaali nʼobuŋinda oweene obungi.
18.24: Yesu ni gamubona nʼawomboŋaye ngʼaloma ati, “Nga hiriba higosi abaŋinda ohwingira mu Buŋugi wa Hatonda!
18.25: Hituufu, hyangu bugali weene engamiya ohubita mu ŋundu lyʼepiso, ohuhira omuŋinda ohwingira mu buŋugi wa Hatonda.”
18.26: Abaŋulira ebyo nga bamubuusa baati, “Olwo ŋaahani njʼani aŋanga ohunoŋoha?”
18.27: Nga Yesu agobolamo ati, “Eyiri abaatu higosi ohwenoŋola aye eyiri Hatonda hyangu ohunoŋola olwohuba ŋabula ehimuhaya.”
18.28: Ngʼaŋo Peetero aloma Yesu ati, “Efe hwaleha ebyefe byosibyosi ebi hwali ni nabyo nga huuja hube baloobera babo.”
18.29: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu ti ŋabula muutu owaleha amago gage oba abaganda babe oba omuhasi wuwe oba abasaaye babe oba abaana babe olwʼobuŋugi wa Hatonda,
18.30: atalisuna omuhemba omubba mu mulembe guno ko nʼobulamu obutaŋwaŋo mu biseera ebyomu moni.” Yesu aloma hu hufa huhwe efunda eyohudatu (Mat 20:17-19; Mar 10:32-34)
18.31: Nga Yesu agobosa abeegi babe ehumi nʼababiri hu tulo abaloma ati, “Huli hutiina e Yerusaalemu era byosibyosi ebi banaabbi baŋandiiha hu Mwana wʼOmuutu bija hwolerera.
18.33: bamuhubbe efaalu bahene bamwite aye ni ŋabitireŋo endaalo edatu aliramuha.”
18.34: Aye abeegi babe sibategeera mahulu gʼebibono ebyo olwohuba gaali magise. Yesu aŋonia omuŋofu owʼasungirisanga (Mat 20:29-34; Mar 10:46-52)
18.35: Yesu ni gaali nʼali huupi hwola mu hibuga e Yeriko, gaagaana omuŋofu owaali ni geehaye hu tulo wʼengira nʼasungirisa.
18.36: Omuŋofu oyo ni gaŋulira ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ni hibita ngʼabuusa ati, “Hiina ehyo?”
18.37: Nga bamulomera baati Yesu Omunazaleesi njʼabitaŋo.
18.38: Ngʼaŋo alangirira nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani ati, “Yesu, Omwijuhulu wa Dawudi, pambire ehisa!”
18.39: Ngʼabaatu abaali ni batangiyemo bamuhayula ni bamuloma aŋoleere. Aye niye nga geeyongera hweyongera ohuloma nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani ati, “Mwijuhulu wa Dawudi, pambire ehisa!”
18.40: Nga Yesu gemeerera alagira baleete omuŋofu oyo aŋa gaali. Ni bamuŋira, ngʼamubuusa ati,
18.41: “Wenda kuholere hi?” Ngʼomuŋofu amugobolamo ati, “Musengwa, njingule emoni, mbone.”
18.42: Ngʼaŋo Yesu amuloma ati, “Ohufugiirira huhwo, huhuŋonisye. Limbula obone.”
18.43: Aŋo ni naaŋo ngʼemoni jirimbuha atandiha ohubona, nga yeesi geŋimba hu baali ni balonda Yesu nʼajumirya Hatonda. Era abaatu bosibosi ni babona nʼaŋonire, nga boosi bajumirya Hatonda.

19.1: Ngʼaŋo Yesu nʼabagaali ni nabo bengira mu hibuga Yeriko ni babita engira.
19.2: Mu hibuga omwo, mwalimo omusinde omuŋinda owaali omuhulu wʼabaŋoosa ni bamulanga baati Zakayo.
19.3: Omusinde oyo gendire ohubona omuutu oyu balanga baati Yesu aye olwʼeduuli lyʼabaatu sigaŋanga humubona olwohuba gaali muupi.
19.4: Olwʼehyo, gaduluma gatiina mu moni ganiina omusaala omusokomooli ogwali hu ngira eyi Yesu gaali nʼaja hubitamo.
19.5: Yesu ni goola hu musaala ogwo, ngʼaheja ŋamugulu ahena amuloma ati, “Zakayo, niinuha mangu, olwohuba olwa leero ndi mugeni wuwo.”
19.6: Ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo, Zakayo aniinuha nʼali musangaafu ngʼaŋira Yesu ewuwe.
19.7: Abaatu ni babona, nga bemulugunya baati, “Atiina ohuhyala ‘ewʼomuhosi wʼebibi.’ ”
