19.8: Ni baali ni bali eyo, Zakayo genyoha galoma Yesu ati, “Musengwa, nabuuyeemo ŋagati hu biitu byange ngabireho abagadi. Era ni ŋabaŋo oyu nalyakula, nja humuliŋaŋo emirundi ene.”
19.9: Ngʼaŋo Yesu amuloma ati, “Olwa leero abaatu abomu mago gano banoŋohire olwohuba wetuhiseyo oti ewe weesi oli mwijuhulu wa Yibbulayimu.
19.10: Olwohuba Omwana wʼOmuutu gaaja hu hyalo ohwendula nʼohunoŋola abo abaagota.” Olugero olwʼendusu eyagota (Mat 25:14-30)
19.11: Abaatu baali bahyetegeeresa ebyo, nga Yesu abagerera olugero olwohuba baali huupi nʼe Yerusaalemu era nʼabaatu aba gaali ni nabo ni baŋeega baati aja hutagihiraŋo ohuŋuga nga habaha ni golireyo.
19.12: Ngʼaloma ati, “Ŋaaliŋo omuutu owomu lulyo oluhombe owatiina mu hyalo ehyaŋale ohumufuula habaha, ko ahene agobole.
19.13: Ngʼalanga abeedu babe ehumi, ngʼaŋa hiisi mulala hu bo ebbeesa ejibalanga baati mina ndala ngʼabaloma ati, ‘Musuubuulire mu bbeesa ejo ohwola olu ndigobola.’
19.14: “Aye abaatu abomu hyalo hihye baali sibamwenda, nga batuma abahwenda batiine era eyi gaali nʼaja ohumufuula habaha balome baati, ‘Sihwenda musinde oyo ohuba habaha weefe.’
19.15: “Cooka niye nga bamufuula habaha gagamayo engo, ni goola ngʼalanga abeedu aba gaŋa ebbeesa jije ni genda ohumanya amagoba aga baahola.
19.16: Ngʼomwidu omudaayi amuloma ati, ‘Musengwa, ebbeesa jijo eji waapa jasaala amagoba gʼemina ehumi.’
19.17: “Nga musengwawe amuloma ati, ‘Kalwe bugali weene, oli mwidu mulaŋi. Ngʼolu baaye mwesigwa mu hidiidiri, oja huŋuga ebibuga ehumi.’
19.18: “Owohubiri nga gaaja aloma ati, ‘Musengwa, emina eyi waapa nayisaasamo ejindi etaanu.’
19.19: “Nga musengwawe amuloma ati, ‘Kalwe bugali weene, oja huŋuga ebibuga bitaanu.’
19.20: “Aye owohudatu ni gaaja gamuloma ati, ‘Musengwa, emina yiyo eyi waapa njʼeyi. Nayibiiha bulaŋi weene era njʼeyi enyene nʼenyene.
19.21: Nahutya, olwohuba oli mugosi, oŋira nʼehitali hihyo era ogehesa nʼaŋotamwa olwohuba wenda ebyowereere.’
19.22: “Nga musengwawe amugobolamo ati, ‘Musirusiru ewe, ebi oloma ebyene bihusalira omusango. Hanye omanyire oti ndi mugosi era ti nenda ebyowereere,
19.23: lwahiina ebbeesa eji nahuŋa siwajiŋa abasubuuzi ni nahagoboye samwene najitusayo ni jikoleeye amagoba?’
19.24: “Ngʼaŋo aloma abeedu abandi abaali ni bemereeye aŋo ati, ‘Mumutuseho nʼemina eyo, muyiŋe oyo ali nʼehumi.’
19.25: “Ngʼabeedu abo bamugobolamo baati, ‘Musengwa, oyo oyu oloma ohuŋa, ali nʼehumi!’
19.26: “Ngʼabagobolamo ati, ‘Mbalomera hino ti oyo atambisa ehi bamuŋa, balimumeedaho ebindi aye oyo aŋuma balimutusaaho nʼahadiidiri aho aha ali ni naho.
19.27: Ŋaahani muleete ŋano abalabe bange, abatendire baafuule habaha waawe era mubeetire ŋano ni mbona.’ ” Yesu gengira mu Yerusaalemu mu ŋono eryʼamaani (Mat 21:1-11; Mar 11:1-11; Yow 12:12-19)
19.28: Yesu ni gahena ohuloma ebyo ngʼabatangiramo batiina e Yerusaalemu.
19.29: Ni baali ni banaatere ohwola mu bubuga Bbesufage ni Bbesaniya mu hiiho gʼolusozi lwʼemisaala emizayiti, gatuma babiri hu beegi babe,
19.30: abaloma ati, “Mutiine mu haalo aha mulengera aho. Ni munaabe ni mwahengira muuti, munaabone nasugirya eperepere eyi muutu ahiiri hwihalangaho ni bayisidihire aŋo, muyiwoŋolole muyindeetere ŋano.
19.31: Singa ŋabaŋo ababuusa ati, ‘Lwahiina muyiwoŋolola?’ Munamugobolemo muuti, ‘Musengwa njʼayenda.’ ”
19.32: Ngʼaŋo aba baatuma batiina bagaana byosibyosi ni biri ngʼolu baali ni babalomire.
19.33: Ni baali ko ni bawoŋolola nasugirya eyo, ngʼabeneeyo bababuusa baati, “Lwahiina muyiwoŋolola?”
19.35: Nga batangirisa nasugirya eyo bayiŋirira Yesu. Ni boola nga bayaalaho engoye jaawe hu mugongo, Yesu ayiihalaho.
19.36: Ni gaali nʼatiina, ngʼabaatu baalirira engoye jaawe mu ngira Yesu agendereho.
19.37: Ni gaali ni genda hwola e Yerusaalemu ni gehirira hu lusozi olwʼemisaala emizayiti, ehiŋindi hyʼabeegi babe hyosihyosi nga hijumirya Hatonda nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani ni basangaaye olwʼebyamaliholiho byosibyosi ebi baali ni baweene.
19.38: Ni baloma nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani baati, “Ali nʼekabi habaha oyo owuujira mu siina lya Musengwa, abaatu bamuŋe eŋono. Haŋabeeŋo emiyaaya ŋagati wa Hatonda nʼabaatu, era eŋono libe eyiri Hatonda oyo ali Ŋamugulu Obugali.”
19.39: Ngʼaŋo balala hu Bafalisaayo abaali mu hiŋindi baloma Yesu baati, “Musomesa, loma hu beegi babo baŋoleere.”
19.40: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Mbalomera ti singa abo baŋoleera, amabaale ganaahayaane.” Yesu alira amangi olwʼabaatu bomu Yerusaalemu
19.41: Yesu ni goola huupi nʼehibuga Yerusaalemu, ni gahirengera ngʼalira amangi olwʼohulumirwa abaatu bamo,
19.42: ngʼaloma ati, “Singa baatu nywe olwa leero mumanyire ehyahabaleeteye emiyaaya! Aye hatyane bahibahwehire.
19.44: Baabasihiirisa enywe ababalyagaana mu hibuga omwo era sibalireha ebaale eribatongolera ehibuga hyenywe ni liri hu lyahye, olwohuba simwamanya hiseera ehi Hatonda gaali ni gaajire ohubanoŋola.” Yesu atiina hu Yekaalu (Mat 21:12-17; Mar 11:15-19; Yow 2:13-22)
19.45: Nga Yesu goola e Yerusaalemu gengira mu lunya lwa Yekaalu atandiha ohubbingamo abaali ni basuubuliramo.
19.46: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, ‘Enyumba yange yinaabenga nyumba omu baatu bananjumirihisyenga.’ Ne enywe muyifuuhisye pungulu eyi bakondo behwehamo.”
19.47: Nga hiisi ludaalo Yesu asomesanga mu Yekaalu. Aye abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga batandiiha ohugesyaho ohumusihiirisa.
19.48: Aye gabahayisa olwʼabaatu abaŋwerehererangamo ni bahumbaana aŋa gaali ohumuŋuliirisa.

20.1: Lulala, Yesu ni gaali mu lunya lwa Yekaalu nʼasomesa era nʼabuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi, abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi ko nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga, batiina aŋa gaali,
20.2: nga bamuloma baati, “Tulomere, otusa ŋeena obuŋangi obuhuginiha ohuhola ebiitu ebyo ebi ohola? Era njʼani owahuŋa obuŋangi owo?”
20.3: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Keesi leha mbabuuseho. Mundomere,
20.4: Yowaane gatusa ŋeena obuŋangi owʼohubatiza; gabutusa yiri Hatonda oba yiri baatu?”
20.5: Ngʼaŋo bahubbagania ebiŋeego ni baloma baati, “Humugobolemo huutye? Singa huloma huuti ‘Hatonda njʼowamutuma’ anatubuuse ati, ‘Lwahiina simwafugiirira bya Yowaane oyo?’
20.6: Nindi ni baŋeega ohumugobolamo baati, ‘Abaatu njʼabamutuma,’ nga hino hibatiisa baloma baati, ‘Abaatu banatuhubbe amabaale.’ Olwohuba bosibosi baali bafugiirira baati Yowaane gaali naabbi dala.”
20.8: Ngʼaŋo Yesu yeesi abaloma ati, “Kale keesi sinabalomere eyi tusa obuŋangi obuukosa ebi kola.” Olugero lwʼabapangisa bʼendimiro yʼemizabbibbu (Mat 21:33-46; Mar 12:1-12)
20.9: Ngʼaŋo Yesu agerera abaatu abaliŋo olugero ati, “Ŋaaliŋo omuutu owahoma endimiro eyʼemizabbibbu, ngʼahena ayipangisa abaatu, niye ngʼatiina mu lugendo ngʼalwayo.
20.10: Ehiseera ehyʼegesa ni hyola, gatuma mulala hu baŋeeresa babe eyiri abapangisa, bamuŋe owiisa wuwe. Cooka abapangisa abo baamuhubba nga bahena bamubbinga gaagama ni ŋabula ehi bamuŋaaye.
20.11: Nga nindi omwene ndimiro abatumira omuŋeeresa owundi. Ngʼoyo bamuhubba bahena bamuhola nʼebyobuŋemu nga gagama nʼengalo enjerere.
20.12: Ngʼatuma omuŋeeresa owohudatu era yeesi bamubisya bubi, bamuhubba oluguma gaagama ni ŋaŋuma ehi bamuŋaaye.
20.13: “Ngʼaŋo omwene ndimiro gebuusa ati, ‘Kole hi? Hatume omwana wange omuhoda, hamunga banaamuŋe eŋono bamupeera owiisa wange.’
20.14: “Cooka abapangisa ni bamubona nga behobaana baati, ‘Ono njʼomusika. Muhole hu mwite hwegoboseho obusika.’
20.15: Ngʼaŋo bamusindigirisa bamutusa ebulafu wʼendimiro yʼemizabbibbu, nga bamwitira eyo. “Ŋaahani omwene ndimiro alihola hi abapangisa abo?
20.16: Alitiina gabasihiirisa nʼendimiro gayipangisa abaatu abandi.” Abaatu ni baŋulira ebibono ebyo nga baloma baati, “O! Hatonda atuyeede ehyo hitabaŋo!”
20.17: Nga Yesu abahaŋaasa emoni ahena abaloma ati, “Ŋaahani ehyaŋandiihiwa hino hitegeesa hi, “ ‘Ebaale eri abatongoli batala baati siraŋi, njʼeryafuuha ehulu eryʼomugaso mu gosigosi?’
20.18: “Era hiisi agwa hu ebaale eryo, alibbwagijihamo aye oyo oyu lirigwaho, aliminianguha.”
20.19: Ngʼaŋo abasomesa bʼamagambi nʼabatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda bagesyaho ohwenda ohuŋamba Yesu mu haseera aho, olwohuba bategeera baati olugero olwo alugerire ni luŋamba hu nibo aye nga batya abaatu. Ehibuuso ehiŋamba hu huŋa omusolo (Mat 22:15-22; Mar 12:13-17)
20.20: Abasomesa bʼamagambi nʼabatangirisi bʼabasengi ni bendulirisa ehi baneŋambye hu Yesu, batuma abaatu batiina beefuula oti haani basiima ebi ahola bamuŋambihisye mu malomere gage ameene, bamuŋeyo mu buŋugi wa Barooma.
20.21: Ngʼaŋo batiina bamuhema baati, “Musomesa, humanyire huuti ewe ofiira hu mazima era obula hu byʼabaatu huhusiima ebinambulamo wabula abaatu bosibosi obabisya mu ngeri njʼenyene nʼobasomesa ebi Hatonda genda bahole.
20.22: Ŋaahani muhulu tulomere, hiraŋi ohuŋa Kayisaali omusolo oba bbe?”
20.23: Aye Yesu ngʼategeera ehi baaliho, ngʼabaloma ati,
20.25: Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Bya Kayisaali.” Ngʼaŋo Yesu abaloma ati, “Kale ebya Kayisaali mubiŋe Kayisaali, nʼebya Hatonda mubiŋe Hatonda.”
20.26: Abo aba batuma ohumuhema ndibaŋange humuŋambya mu ebi gaaloma mu lwijuuye, beŋunja engeri eyi gabagobolamo era baŋuma hyahuloma. Ehibuuso ehiŋamba hu hulamuha (Mat 22:23-33; Mar 12:18-27)
20.27: Ngʼaŋo Abasadukaayo, bano njʼabaali ni batafugiirira baati eriyo ohulamuha, batuma balala hu bahyawe eyiri Yesu bamubuusa baati,
20.28: “Musomesa, Musa omuŋeeresa wa Hatonda gatuŋandiihira egambi ati singa omuutu afa galeha namwandu nʼatamusaayemo mwana, mugandaawe ateehwa ohumusika amusaalire abaana.
20.29: Ŋaahani ŋaaliŋo aboluganda musanvu. Omudaayi ngʼahwa omuhasi, cooka ngʼafa nʼatamusaayemo mwana.
20.30: Owohubiri ngʼasika namwandu oyo era yeesi ngʼafa nʼatamusaayemo mwana.
20.31: Nʼowohudatu yeesi atyo. Bosibosi omusanvu nga bambalaho omuhasi oyo. Cooka ndibamusaalamo mwana.
20.32: Ŋaahani bosibosi ni baali ni baŋooye ohufa ngʼomuhasi oyo yeesi afa.
20.33: Olwo ŋaahani hu ludaalo olu baatu bosibosi baliramuhiraho, omuhasi oyo aliba muha ani, olwohuba gaaliho muhasi wʼabaatu abo bosibosi omusanvu?”
20.34: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Obufumbo, wʼabaatu hu hyalo huno.
20.35: Aye sipohija huba eyiri abaatu aba Hatonda abona ati basaanira ohulamuha babe balamu mwigulu ni batahwa era ni batafumbirwa.
20.36: Baliba hyʼabamalayika, ni batafa era baliberera balamu olwohuba baliba baana ba Hatonda.
20.37: Mu hitundu ehiroma hu hadeŋo ahaali ni hanya aye ni hataguhuliha, Musa omuŋeeresa wa Hatonda nʼaloma hu hulamuha, yeesi ahihahasa ati abafu balamuha ni gaali nʼaloma ati Musengwa, ‘nje Hatonda wa Yibbulayimu ni Yisaka ni Yakobbo.’
20.38: Hatonda wʼabalamu sosi wʼabafu olwohuba abaatu bosibosi eyiri Hatonda, balamu.”
20.39: Nga balala hu basomesa bʼamagambi baloma baati, “Musomesa, olomire bulaŋi.”
20.40: Ohuŋwa hulwo, ŋaŋuma owesinga ohumubuusa ebibuuso nindi. Kurisito ni Habaha Dawudi (Mat 22:41-46; Mar 12:35-37)
20.41: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abaloma ati, “Lwahiina abaatu baloma baati Kurisito oyu Hatonda gafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu Mwijuhulu wa Dawudi?
20.42: “Dawudi omwene mu Zabbuli aloma ati, “ ‘Hatonda gaaloma Musengwa yange ati, Yiihala ni wundireene, hu lubega olwʼomuhono gwange omulungi,
20.43: ohwola olu ndifuula abasigu babo ekookolo eyʼohutaho amagulu gago.’
20.44: “Obanga Dawudi amulanga ‘Musengwawe,’ nindi olwo aŋanga atye ohuba mwijuhulu wuwe?” Yesu alabula hu hwehuuma abasomesa bʼamagambi (Mat 23:1-36; Mar 12:38-40)
20.45: Abaatu bosibosi ni baali ni bahiŋulirisa, nga Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati,
20.46: “Mwehuume mubone ti simuŋamba sambo yʼabasomesa bʼamagambi abagenda ni bambaaye amaganduula amaleeŋi agehwesa hwiroba ohulaga ngʼolu bahihenaho era abenda babaheese mu ngeri eyʼohubaŋa eŋono ni bali mu akisoni nʼohwihala mu bifo ebyʼeŋono mu mahumbaaniro nohu mbaga.
20.47: Abanyagulula ebiitu baahena mu mayumba ga banamwandu era abajumirya Hatonda nʼebibono ebyene ebingi olwʼohweraga. Balibaŋa ehiguudyo ehihiraho obubbala.”

21.1: Yesu ni gaali nʼahiiri mu Yekaalu, ngʼabona abaŋinda bangi ni baŋaayo ebirabo.
21.2: Ngʼaŋo abona ni namwandu omugadi yeesi owaaja gaatamo obubbeesa bubiri obusembayo ohuba owʼomuŋendo omutono obugali.
21.3: Nga Yesu aloma abeegi babe ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu, namwandu ono aŋaayeyo hibbala bugali ohuhira abandi bosibosi.
21.4: Bala bataayemo ni batusa hu bingi ebi bali ni nabyo. Aye namwandu ono, mu bugadi wuwe aŋaayeyo hyosihyosi ehi abaaye ni nahyo mu bulamu wuwe.” Obubonero owohuuja hwa Kurisito (Mat 24:1-14; Mar 13:1-23)
21.5: Ngʼaŋo balala hu beegi ba Yesu baloma ngʼolu Yekaalu bayitongola nʼamabaale ameene amaŋoono nʼebiitu ebi baŋonga eyiri Hatonda. Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati,
21.6: “Ehiseera hinahoole bino byosibyosi ebi mubona, byabulunguha era nasiŋabaŋo ebaale wayire erala eririsigala ni liri hu lyahye. Gosigosi baligatepulula gaagwa ŋaasi.”
21.7: Ngʼabeegi babe bamubuusa baati, “Musomesa tulomereho. Ebyo biribaaŋo ŋaali? Era habonero hi ahabalimanyiraho?”
21.8: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abaloma ati, “Mwehuume ŋatabaŋo abadulingadulinga. Hiri hiityo olwohuba bangi baliija ni beranga ohutambisa obuŋangi wange era ni baloma baati, ‘Ndiise Kurisito’ era baati, ‘Ekomerero yoolire.’ Aye simufugiiriranga ebi baloma.
21.9: Era ni muŋuliranga etalo nʼohutawuha ŋano ni naŋala, simutyanga. Ebyo biri nʼohubaŋo aye ekomerero yiriba yihiiri hwola.”
21.10: Ngʼaŋo geyongera aloma ati, “Amawanga galihubbana nʼowahabaha buliwaagala owahabaha obundi.
21.11: Ŋalibaŋo musisi mu bitundu bingi era enjala yirigwa ni haŋupuli alibaŋo mu hyalo. Era ŋalibaŋo ebiitu ebitiisa nʼebyamaliholiho ebiriŋwa mwigulu.
21.12: “Aye ebyo byosibyosi ko bibeŋo, balibahiyaania era balibaŋamba babeemeha ohuŋosya mu mbuga jʼamahumbaaniro gʼAbayudaaya neja bahabaha nga bahena babadaanya mu komera olwohuba muli baloobera bange.
21.13: Hino hiribaleetera mubooseho Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agapambaho.
21.14: Aye simweŋendehereranga ehi munaahalome oba ngʼolu muneŋosyeho,
21.15: olwohuba ndibaŋa ebibono nʼamagesi agohubagobolamo era abasigu benywe sibaliŋanga hubaŋahania wayire ohugaana ebi muliroma.
21.16: Abasaaye, nʼabalebe benywe nʼabemihago balibalyamo oluhwe era abandi hu nywe abasigu balibeeta.
21.17: Era abaatu bosibosi balibacaawa olwohuba abaloobera bange.
21.18: Aye ŋabula hu nywe oyu balisihiirisa obulamu wuwe owʼomwoyo.
21.19: Oyo alyehaliriha ebigosi ohwola hu komerero alinoŋoha.”
21.20: Nga Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Ni mulibona abasooli ni beswanigirihise Yerusaalemu, olwo nga mumanya muuti ohusihiiriha hwʼehibuga ehyo huli huupi.
21.21: Abo abaliba mu Buyudaaya, badulumiranga mu bitundu ebyʼesozi, abo abaliba mu hibuga bahiŋwangamo era ni nabo abaliba mu byalo sibadulumanga huja mu hibuga.
21.22: Mu ndaalo ejo Hatonda aliba gesasusa era ehyo hiriba hyoheeresa byosibyosi Ebyaŋandihiwa.
21.23: Mu ndaalo ejo abahasi abaliba ebida nʼabookesa njʼabalisinga ohubonaabona. Ŋalibaŋo ohubonaabona ohwʼamaani hu baatu olwʼehiruŋi hya Hatonda eyi bali.
21.24: Balibeeta nʼepiima era baŋira abandi eyo mu busibe mu mawanga agandi. Abatali Bayudaaya baliihala hu baatu bomu Yerusaalemu era babaŋuga ohwola ebiseera byʼobuŋugi waawe olu biriŋwaho.” Ohugobola hwʼOmwana wʼOmuutu (Mat 24:29-31; Mar 13:24-28)
21.25: Nga Yesu geyongera aloma ati, “Ŋalibaŋo ehyamaliholiho hu lyuba nohu mwesi ko nohu munyeenye. Hu hyalo amawanga galyeŋendeherera olwʼohwoluuma hwʼenyanja nʼebimoto byʼamaaji.
21.26: Ebyo ebiri mu bbanga balibitengesya. Ehyo hirireetera abaatu ohufaho olweso olwʼemama ko nʼohweŋendeherera olwʼebyo ebiriba ni biboolireho era nʼebiri ŋamugulu mu bbanga biriteetema.
21.27: Mu hiseera ehyo balibona Omwana wʼOmuutu ni gaajira mu hireri nʼobuŋangi nʼeŋono eryʼamaani.
21.28: Aye ebiitu ebyo byosibyosi ni biritandiha ohubaŋo, mugobolangamo amaani olwohuba ohununuliwa hwenywe huliba huli huupi.” Omusaala omutiini ngʼehyohuboneraho (Mat 24:32-35; Mar 13:29-31)
21.29: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagerera olugero ati, “Mubonere hu musaala omutiini oba ogundi gwosigwosi muhene mwege.
21.30: Omusaala ogwo ni gusebuhaho amahoose amanyenyeeri, nga mumanya muuti ebiro ebyʼendobooli binaatere ohwola.
21.31: Mu ngeri njʼenyene ni mubonanga ebindomireho ni biriŋo, mumanyanga muuti Obuŋugi wa Hatonda bunaatere ohwola.
21.32: Mbalomera ehituufu ti ebiitu bino byosibyosi binahabeeŋo abaatu abʼomulembe guno ni bataŋwaŋo hufa.
21.33: Ehyalo hino nʼebiri ŋamugulu mu bbanga biriŋwaŋo aye ebibono byange sibirigwa ŋaasi.
21.34: “Mwehuume, mutahenera biseera byenywe mu hwejalabya nʼohumeera, oludaalo olwʼekomerero lutaboolaho ni mutamanyire.
21.35: Olwohuba oludaalo olwo lulyola hu baatu bosibosi hu hyalo.
21.36: Mube butebute hiisi hiseera ni musaba ko muŋange ohubita mu ebyo byosibyosi ebija hubaŋo era muŋange nʼohwemeerera nʼesangaalo mu moni jʼOmwana wʼOmuutu hu ludaalo olu aligobola.”
21.37: Hiisi ludaalo, Yesu gatiinanga hu Yekaalu ngʼasomesa, ne ni wiiranga ngʼatiina hu lusozi olwʼemisaala emizayiti eyi gaŋenyuhanga.
21.38: Era hiisi mugamba abaatu bangi baaŋunanga hu Yekaalu ohumuŋuliirisa nʼasomesa.

22.1: Embaga yʼAbayudaaya eyi baliirangaho Emigaati Eji batatayemo Ehisimbulusa eyi balanga baati Embaga eyʼOhubihisya yaali yiri huupi hwola,
22.2: abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi baali mu husala amagesi ogʼohwita Yesu mu ngiso olwohuba baali batya abaatu.
22.3: Nga Sitaani gengira mu mulala hu beegi ba Yesu ehumi nʼababiri oyu balanganga baati Yuda nʼerindi baati Yisikaryoti.
22.4: Ngʼaŋo Yuda atiina ateesa nʼabatangirisi bʼabasengi nʼabahulu bʼabahuumi ba Yekaalu, ngʼolu anaŋeyo Yesu eyi bali.
22.5: Hino hyasangaasa abatangirisi abo era nga balagaana ohumuŋa ebbeesa.
22.6: Nga Yuda afugiirira atandiha ohwendula ahamanga ahohuŋayo Yesu eyi bali, ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ni hiŋumaŋo. Yesu alya nʼabeegi babe Embaga eyʼOhubihisya (Mat 26:17-25; Mar 14:12-23; Yow 13:21-30)
22.7: Ngʼaŋo oludaalo olwʼEmbaga Eyibaliiraho Emigaati Ejibatataayemo Ehisimbulusa era olu beetiraho etaama eperepere ngʼeŋongo ni bahebulira Ohubihisya, lwola.
22.8: Nga Yesu atuma Peetero ni Yowaane abaloma ati, “Mutiine mututegehere Embaga eyʼOhubihisya.”
22.9: Nibo nga bamubuusa baati, “Wenda huje hutegehere ŋeena?”
22.10: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Ni munaabe ni mwingira mu hibuga, munagaane omusinde ni getwihire esongo yʼamaaji, mumulonde ohwola mu nyumba omu anengire.
22.11: Mulome omwene nyumba muuti, ‘Omusomesa abuusa ati mbo ehisenge hiri ŋeena omu niye nʼabeegi babe banaliire Embaga eyʼOhuhebuliriraho Ohubihisya?’
22.12: Anabalage ehisenge ehibbala ehyaŋamugulu mu kalina ehi bahenire ohulongoosa nʼohutegeha, mutegehere omwo.”
22.13: Ngʼaŋo abeegi basimbuha batiina, baagaana byosibyosi ni biri ngʼolu Yesu gaali nʼabalomire. Ngʼaŋo bategeha Embaga eyʼOhuhebuliriraho Ohubihisya.
22.14: Esaawa eyʼohulya ni yoola, nga Yesu nʼabahwenda babe beehala ohulya.
22.15: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Nendire bugali weene ohulya ni nenywe embaga yino ni kiiri hubonaabona.
22.16: Mbalomera ti sinja hulyaho mbaga yino nindi ohwola olu hiribaŋo mu buŋugi wa Hatonda.”
22.17: Ngʼaŋo abugula ehihopo hyʼenvinyo geyaasa Hatonda, ngʼaloma ati, “Munaaŋe munyweho mwesimwesi,
22.18: olwohuba mbalomera ti sinja hunywa hu nvinyo yʼemizabbibbu nindi ohwola olu ndinywa epyaha mu buŋugi wa Hatonda.”
22.19: Ngʼaŋo abugula omugaati geyaasa Hatonda, ni gahena ngʼagubbongolamo, ngʼabaŋa aloma ati, “Guno njʼomubiri gwange oguupayo hu lwenywe. Hino muhiholenga olwʼohukebulira.”
22.20: Mu ngeri njʼenyene ni baahena ohulya ehyʼegulo, nga Yesu aŋamba ehihopo hyʼenvinyo aloma ati, “Envinyo yino njʼamafugi gange aganooŋohe ohuba ahabonero ahahahasa endagaano epyaha eyi Hatonda aholire nʼabaatu.
22.21: Aye oyo aja hundyamo oluhwe ali ni neese hu hiiŋulo hino.
22.22: Omwana wʼOmuutu aja hufa ngʼolu hyaŋandiihiwa aye jimwageene oyo amulyamo oluhwe!”
22.23: Ngʼabeegi babe bebuusa abeene nʼabeene baati njʼani hu bo owaali nʼaja hu mulyamo oluhwe. Ahira ohuba owʼeŋono mu buŋugi wa Hatonda
22.24: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaluhaŋo embaha mu beegi ba Yesu ni bebuusa baati mbo njʼani hu bo ahira ohuba owʼeŋono.
22.25: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Abahabaha bʼAbatali Bayudaaya baŋuga nʼobuhambwe era abatangirisi baawe benda abaatu aba baŋuga bamanye baati babaliho obuŋangi era nga bahena beeranga mbo bayeedi baawe.
22.26: Aye mu enywe sipohiri hiityo, wabula ahira ohuba owʼeŋono mu nywe, gebisye hyʼomuŋere era omutangirisi abe muŋeeresa wabahye.
22.27: Ŋaahani ahira ohuba owʼeŋono njʼani? Oyo owihaaye ohulya oba oyo owiŋula? Njʼoyo owihaaye ohulya. Aye ese mu enywe ndi hyʼomuŋeeresa.
22.29: Keesi mbateehateehera obuŋugi ngʼolu Bbaabba gaategehera,
22.30: konyo mulye era munywere hu meeza yange mu buŋugi wange. Era mwesi mulihaala hu tebe ehumi nʼebiri ejʼobuŋugi mwasalira ebiha bya Yisirayiri ehumi nabibiri emisango.” Yesu aloma ati Peetero anamwegaane (Mat 26:31-35; Mar 14:27-31; Yow 13:36-38)
22.31: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma ati, “Simooni, Simooni, Sitaani asungire Hatonda amufugiirire abasenyete hyʼengaano.
22.32: Aye kusabiiye ti otaŋwamo maani mu hufugiirira huhwo. Era nʼolihena ohwebbwaga, ogumyanga abahyo.”
22.33: Aye gamuloma ati, “Musengwa, ese netegehire ohwingira ekomera ni neewe. Era netegehire ohufiira ŋalala ni neewe.”
22.34: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Mu butuufu oweene kuloma ti mu hiire ehyene hino, engoho yinaabe yihiiri huholyoha ni wahanegaanira emirundi edatu.”
22.35: Ngʼaŋo Yesu ababuusa ati, “Ni nʼabatuma ohubuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi, ndimugega bbeesa wayire engayito, ŋaaliŋo ehimwahaya?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Ŋaŋuma.”
22.36: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Ale oyo ali nʼebbeesa nʼehihapu abugule, ni nooyo aŋuma piima atunde ehyambalo hihye ayigule.
22.37: Ehyaŋandiihiwa ehiroma hiiti, ‘Bamubalira ŋalala nʼababbwagi bʼamagambi,’ hiri nʼohwolerera. Cʼehyo ehyene, ebyo ebipambaho biri nʼohwolerera.”
22.38: Nga abeegi babe bamuloma baati, “Musengwa, huliŋo nʼepiima ebiri ŋano.” Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Ehyo hihena!” Yesu mu Gesesimane (Mat 26:36-46; Mar 14:32-42)
22.39: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aŋwa mu Yerusaalemu atiina hu lusozi olwʼemisaala Emizayiti ngʼolu gaholanga era abeegi babe nga batiina ni naye.
22.40: Ni goola eyo, ngʼabaloma ati, “Musabe Hatonda ko mutahemewa.”
22.41: Ngʼaŋo niye aŋwaŋo gesambaho ahanaaŋiro, ahena ahubba amafuha gegayirira Hatonda,
22.42: nʼaloma ati, “Bbaabba, hanye njʼohusiima huhwo, esaawa yino eyʼohubonaabona yitanjolaho aye ewe ehi wenda hibe njʼehiholewa sosi ehi ese nenda.”
22.43: Ngʼaŋo malayika aŋwa mwigulu amugobosamo amaani.
22.44: Mu bulumi obubitiirifu geyongera ohwegayirira Hatonda bugali weene era oluuya lulwe nga lutagiha ohutonya ŋaasi hyʼamatondo gʼamafugi.
22.45: Yesu ni gahena ohusaba, nga genyoha gaagamayo aŋa beegi babe baali aye gabagaana ni baŋenyuha olwʼomudembo nʼohweŋendeherera ebi baali ni nabyo.
22.46: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Lwahiina muli huŋenyuha? Mwinyohe, musabe ko mutahemewa.” Baŋamba Yesu (Mat 26:27-56; Mar 14:43-50; Yow 18:3-11)
22.47: Yesu ni gaali nʼahiroma, ngʼehiŋindi hyʼabaatu hyola aŋa baali, Yuda mulala hu beegi babe ehumi nʼababiri nʼahitangiriye. Nga geegerera huupi ni Yesu amuheesa nʼamugwa mu hifuba.
22.48: Aye Yesu ngʼamuloma ati, “Yuda, ewe Omwana wʼOmuutu omulyamo oluhwe nʼomugwa mu hifuba?”
22.49: Abeegi ba Yesu ni babona ehyali ni hija hubaŋo, nga bamubuusa baati, “Musengwa, hubasoose nʼepiima?”
22.50: Nga mulala hu beegi babe atema hu mwidu wʼomuhulu wʼabasengi ba Hatonda ohutwi ohulungi.
22.51: Aye Yesu ngʼabaloma ati, “Mulehe!” Ngʼaŋamba aŋa batemire ohutwi hwʼomwidu oyo, amuŋonia.
22.52: Ngʼaŋo Yesu aloma abatangirisi bʼabasengi nʼabahulu bʼabahuumi ba Yekaalu ko nʼabaatu abahulu mu gwanga abaaja ohumuŋamba ati, “Muujire ohupamba ni muli nʼepiima nʼebibbiro hyʼabajiriiye omuyekera?
22.53: Mbaayenga mba ni nenywe mu Yekaalu, ni mutapamba. Aye hino njʼehiseera hyenywe amaani gʼehiirema ohuhola.” Peetero gegaana Yesu (Mat 26:57-58,69-75; Mar 14:53-54,66-72; Yow 18:12-18,25-27)
22.54: Ngʼaŋo baŋamba Yesu, bamuŋira ewomuhulu wʼabasengi ba Hatonda. Peetero galondaho ni gesambireho ahanaaŋiro.
22.55: Ne ni bahena ohuŋambya ehihoso mu lunya ŋagati nga beehala ohwota omuliro. Nga Peetero yeesi gehala ni nabo ohwota omuliro.
22.56: Mulala hu bahaana abaŋeeresanga owʼomusengi oyo, gabona Peetero ni gehaaye mu njase yʼomuliro, ngʼamuhaŋaasa emoni, ahena aloma abo abaaliŋo ati, “Omusinde ono yeesi agendanga ni Yesu.”
22.57: Aye Peetero nga gegaana ati, “Muhasi ewe, omuutu oyo ese simumanyire.”
22.58: Era ni ŋabitireŋo ahaseera, omuutu owundi ngʼamubona, ngʼaloma ati, “Weesi oli mulala hu abo.” Cooka Peetero ngʼamuloma ati, “Musinde ewe, ese kwegaana!”
22.59: Ni ŋabitireŋo esaawa nga ndala, omuutu owundi ngʼamuhamiirisa ati, “Hituufu, ni noono abaaye agendanga ni Yesu olwohuba yeesi Mugalilaaya hya niye.”
22.60: Aye Peetero galoma ati, “Wange, ehi oli huloma sikimanyire.” Aŋo ni naaŋo, ni gaali nʼahiroma ngʼengoho yiholyoha.
22.61: Nga Musengwa weefe acuuha aheja hu Peetero. Ngʼahebulira ebi Musengwa gaali nʼamulomire ati, “Olwa leero engoho yinaabe yitaholyoha, ni wuneganiiye emirundi edatu.”
22.62: Ngʼaŋo Peetero atula ebulafu, atemuha alira bugali weene. Abaatu bajeeja era bahubba Yesu (Mat 26:67-68; Mar 14:65)
22.63: Mu hiseera ehyo, abasinde abaali ni bahuuma Yesu batandiiha ohumujeeja nʼohumuhubba.
22.64: Nga bamuwiiha mu moni bahena bamuloma baati, “Teeba, njʼani ahuhubbire.”
22.65: Nga bamuloma ebibono ebyene ebingi ni bamufodogola.
22.66: Ni wanuuha, ngʼAhahiiho hʼabatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi bahumbaana nga baŋira Yesu mu Luhiiho lwawe.
22.67: Nga bamubuusa baati, “Tulomere, ndiiwe Kurisito oyu Hatonda gafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu?” Ngʼabagobolamo ati, “Nʼolu nʼabalomere, simunafugiirire,
22.69: Aye ohuŋwa ŋaahani, Omwana wʼOmuutu aja hwihala hu lubega olwʼomuhono omulungi ogwa Hatonda omwene buŋangi.”
22.70: Nga bosibosi bamubuusa baati, “Ewe, oli Mwana wa Hatonda?” Nga niye abagobolamo ati, “Ngʼolu muloma olwo.”
22.71: Ngʼaŋo baloma baati, “Hwendera hi obujulizi obundi olwohuba efe hwabeene hweŋuliriyeho nʼamatwi geefe ebiŋwa mu munwa gugwe.”

23.1: Ngʼaŋo abohu Luhiiho Olubbala mu diini lyʼEhiyudaaya bosibosi benyoha batangirisa Yesu bamuŋira ewa Pilaato.
23.2: Nga batandiiha ohumuŋaŋabira ni baloma baati, “Hwavumbula huuti omusinde ono asasamasa abaatu bʼegwanga lyʼefe, nʼabagaana ohuŋa Kayisaali omusolo era ni geeranga Kurisito oyu Hatonda gafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu era mbo nje habaha.”
23.3: Ngʼaŋo Pilaato amubuusa ati, “Ndiiwe habaha wʼAbayudaaya?” Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Ngʼolu oloma olwo.”
23.4: Nga Pilaato aloma abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼehibbubbu hyʼabaatu ati, “Simbona musango ogu muutu ono asaaye.”
23.5: Aye nibo nga beyongera huhayaana baati, “Ebi omuutu oyo asomesa bisasamahise abaatu mu Buyudaaya mwosimwosi. Gatandihira mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya era goolire ni naŋano mu Yerusaalemu.”
23.6: Pilaato ni gaŋulira ebyo, ngʼabuusa hanye Yesu gaali Mugalilaaya.
23.7: Ni bamulomera baati Mugalilaaya, ngʼamuŋindiha ewa Herode owaali omuŋugi wʼetwale eryo, yeesi owaali nʼali mu Yerusaalemu mu hiseera ehyo.
23.8: Herode gasangaala bugali ni gabona hu Yesu, olwohuba gaali aŋuliiye ebimuŋambaho era nʼahenire ehimanga ni gesunga ohumubona nʼahola ebyamaliholiho.
23.9: Nga Herode abuusa Yesu ebibuuso ebyene ebingi aye Yesu sigagobolamo wayire hirala.
23.10: Abatangirisi bʼabasengi nʼabasomesa bʼamagambi baali bemereeye aŋo, nga bahaalama ni bamuŋaŋabira emisango.
23.11: Ngʼaŋo Herode nʼabasirikale babe bamujeeja era bamuhiina ni bamwambasa olugoye olumeregenya. Ni bahena ngʼamuŋambya abahahiiho bamwagamyeyo ewa Pilaato.
23.12: Herode ni Pilaato baali sibendana aye esonga ya Yesu yabagaata bafuuha ba muhago hu ludaalo olwo. Basalira Yesu ogwʼohufa (Mat 27:15-26; Mar 15:6-15; Yow 18:39; 19:16)
23.13: Ngʼaŋo Pilaato alanga abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda ko nʼabaatu abandi abohu hahiiho hʼAbayudaaya ko nʼehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ehyali aŋo,
23.14: ngʼabaloma ati, “Mundeteeye omusinde ono ni muloma muuti asasamasa abaatu. Aye ngʼolu muweene ni kejire mu songa jije, simbona musango ogu mumuŋaŋabira.
23.15: Era ni Herode yeesi ahayire esonga yosiyosi njʼohumugobosa eno. Ngʼolu mwesi mubona, omuutu ono aŋuma ehi aholire ohumusalira ogwʼohufa.
23.17: Hu hiisi ludaalo lwʼembaga eyʼOhubihisya, Pilaato galehulanga omusibe oyu bamusunganga.
23.18: Ngʼehiŋindi hyʼabaatu hyosihyosi hihayaana hiiti, “Oyo mumusimye humusimya aye lehula Bbarabba!”
23.19: Bbarabba oyo baali bamusidihire mu komera olwʼahegugungo ahaliiŋo mu hibuga nʼolwobutemu.
23.20: Nga nindi Pilaato aloma nʼabaatu nabaŋooyaŋooya olwʼohwenda ohulehula Yesu.
23.21: Aye nibo beyongera huhayaana baati, “Muhomerere hu musalabba, muhomerere hu musalabba!”
23.22: Nga nindi Pilaato ababuusa omulundi ogwohudatu ati, “Lwahiina mwenda bamuhomerere? Hibi hi ehi aholire? Simbona songa hu muutu ono eyigera ni mwenda musalire ogwʼohufa. Olwʼehyo, ni banahene ohumuswaja, namulehule.”
23.23: Cooka nibo nga beyongera huhayaana ni bahahasa baati bahomerere Yesu hu musalabba. Era nga bamuŋinga amaani.
23.24: Nga Pilaato asalaŋo abaholera ehi bendire.
23.25: Ngʼabalehulira Bbarabba oyu beegalira mu komera olwʼohwegugunga nʼobutemu, aŋaayo Yesu bamuhomerere ngʼolu bendire. Bahomerera Yesu hu musalabba (Mat 27:32-44; Mar 15:21-32; Yow 19:17-27)
23.26: Abasirikale ni baali ni batangirihise Yesu ni bamuŋira ohumuhomerera, nga bagaana omusinde omusaale wʼe Kireene oyu balanganga baati Simooni nʼaŋwa mu hyalo ni gaagamayo mu hibuga. Nga bamugegesa omusalabba gwa Yesu agubbeeda nʼamulondaho.
23.27: Ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu hyalonda hu Yesu ni mulimo nʼabahasi abaali ni bahubba enduulu era ni balira olwa Yesu.
23.28: Cooka Yesu ngʼabacuuhira abaloma ati, “Abahaana bʼe Yerusaalemu, mulehe ohundira ese aye mwerire mwabeene nʼabaana benywe.
23.29: Olwohuba ehiseera hiryola olu baatu baliroma baati ‘abahasi abagumba bali bulaŋi.’
23.31: “Aŋabaholera bino hu musaala omubisi, ne hu mwomu hiriba hiitye?”
23.32: Era ŋaaliŋo abasinde babiri ababbwagi bʼamagambi boosi ababatangirisi baaŋira ni Yesu ohuja ohubahomerera.
23.33: Ni boola aŋa balanga baati, “Ehifo Ehyahaŋanga” nga bahomerera Yesu ko nʼababbwagi bʼamagambi bala hu musalabba, mulala hu lubega lwʼomuhono gwa Yesu omulungi, owundi hu mugooda.
23.34: Ebyo ni byaŋwa nga Yesu aloma ati, “Bbaabba, basoniŋe olwohuba sibamanyire ehi bahola.” Abasirikale baahubba ahalulu bagabana ebyambalo bya Yesu.
23.35: Abaatu nga bemeerera aŋo ni bamulengereeye, nʼabatangirisi babwe boosi ni bamujeherera baati, “Ganoŋolanga bandi aye saaŋanga hwenoŋola niye omwene. Hanye hituufu ehyene nje Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu era oyu Hatonda gatobola, genoŋole!”
23.36: Abasirikale boosi nga bamujeeja nga bahena bamuŋa envinyo eyisalire,
23.37: ni baloma baati, “Wenoŋole hanye oli habaha wʼAbayudaaya!”
23.38: Nga bata ŋamugulu wuwe ehipande ehisoma hiiti: ono nje habaha wʼabayudaaya .
23.39: Mulala hu babbwagi bʼamagambi yeesi oyu baahomerera hu musalabba ngʼaduha Yesu ati, “Weranga Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu. Ale wenoŋole oŋwe hu musalabba, hwesi otunoŋole.”
23.40: Aye owahye ngʼamuhayula ati, “Ewe nʼohutya sootyaho Hatonda olwohuba mbo oli hu hibonerezo cʼehyene ni naye?
23.41: Ese ni neewe, ehibonerezo hino hitwola olwohuba huli husasula ebyo ebi hwahola. Aye ono abula hibi ehigahola.”
23.42: Ngʼaŋo aloma Yesu ati, “Bukebuliranga olu onahajire mwiŋono lyʼobuŋugi buwo.”
23.43: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Mazima kuloma ti olwa leero, onaabe ni neese mu hifo ehyʼohwesiima.” Ohufa hwa Yesu (Mat 27:45-56; Mar 15:33-41; Yow 19:28-30)
23.44: Ŋaahani ebyo byaliŋo esaawa nga mukaaga ejomu muusi. Ohuŋwa hu saawa ejo ohwola esaawa mwenda ejʼegulo, ngʼehiirema hiŋamba ehyalo hyosihyosi,
23.45: olwohuba eryuba lyasima. Olutimbe olwomu Yekaalu nga ludweduhamo ŋabiri, ohuŋwa ŋamugulu ohwola ŋaasi.
23.46: Nga Yesu alanga nʼejanjaasi eryʼamaani ati, “Bbaabba, kuŋambya omwoyo gwange!” Ni gahena ohuloma atyo, ngʼafa.
23.47: Omuhulu wʼehibbubbu hyʼabasirikale ecikumi ni gabona ebyaliŋo, ngʼajumirya Hatonda nʼaloma ati, “Mu butuufu omuutu ono aŋumaaho musango!”
23.48: Abaatu bosibosi abaali ni bahumbeene ohwebonera, ni babona ebyaliŋo, nga baagamayo ewaawe ni bawomboŋaaye.
23.49: Aye abo bosibosi abaali ni bamumanyire, omwo ni mulimo nʼabahasi abaamulondaho ohuŋwa e Galilaaya, nga bemeerera ni besambireho ahamanga ni bebonera. Basiiha Yesu (Mat 27:57-61; Mar 15:42-47; Yow 19:38-42)
23.50: Ŋaaliŋo omusinde owʼesambo endaŋi era omugwalaafu owʼahiihanga hu Luhiiho lwʼAbayudaaya ni bamulanga baati Yosefu.
23.51: Omusinde oyo gaali musaale womu habuga ahabalanga baati Alimataaya mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya era gaali ahuumirira ohuuja hwʼobuŋugi wa Hatonda. Yosefu gaali saafugiirisanie nʼeteesa ko nʼebikolwa byʼabahye.
23.52: Kale ngʼatiina eyiri Pilaato amusunga omulambo gwa Yesu aje agusiihe.
23.53: Ni gagutusa hu musalabba, gagwambiha mu lugoye olulaŋi olwa laasi. Ngʼaguŋira aguta mu higombe ehibabaaja mwibaale mu ngeri yʼepungulu era ni batasiihangahomo muutu yesiyesi.
23.54: Bino byosibyosi byaliŋo hu ludaalo lwʼohwetegehera obunahye ni yinaahabe Sabbaato.
23.55: Abahasi abaali ni baŋooye e Galilaaya ni batiinire ni Yesu e Yerusaalemu, balonda hu Yosefu baabona ehigombe omu gaata omulambo.
23.56: Ngʼaŋo abahasi abo bagamayo engo bategeha abyʼahaloosa ohuŋaha omulambo. Aye hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato baaŋuumula ngʼolu egambi liroma.

24.1: Ngʼaŋo mu mugamba hu ludaalo oludaayi mu wiiki, abahasi abo baŋamba ebyahaloosa ebi baali ni bategehire batiina hu higombe hya Yesu.
24.2: Ni boola, nga baagaana ebaale ni balisiringihisye ohuŋwa hu mulyango gwʼehigombe.
24.3: Aye ni bengira, sibagaanamo mulambo gwa Yesu Musengwa.
24.4: Ni baali ni bahitangalaaye, ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo abasinde babiri bemeerera huupi ni nabo, ni bambaaye engoye ekosa ni jimeregenya hyʼohumesya hwʼefula.
24.5: Ngʼabahasi abo bahotama olwʼohubatya nʼohubaŋa eŋono, ngʼabasinde abo babaloma baati, “Lwahiina mwendulira omulamu mu bafu?
24.6: Aŋuma ŋano, alamuhire. Muhebulire ngʼolu gabaloma ni gaali nʼahiiri ni nenywe mu Galilaaya ati,
24.7: ‘Baliŋaayo Omwana wʼOmuutu eyiri ababbengi, bamuhomerere hu musalabba aye aja hulamuha ni ŋabitireŋo endaalo edatu.’ ”
24.9: Era abahasi abo ni batula mu higombe, baagamayo ngʼebyo byosibyosi babiromera abeegi ba Yesu ehumi namulala, nʼabandi bosibosi.
24.10: Abahasi abo baali nje Malyamu Magadaleeni ni Jowaana ni Malyamu nyina ya Yakobbo ko nʼabahasi abandi abaali ni nabo.
24.11: Aye abahwenda sibafugiirira ebi bahasi abo babalomera olwohuba ebibono byawe byali oti biŋuma mahulu.
24.12: Aye Peetero nga genyoha, aduluma atiina hu higombe. Ni goola ngʼahotama ohwetegeresa ngʼabona engoye eji baali ni basiihiremo Yesu ni jiri aŋo, ngʼaŋwayo ni geŋunja ebi aweene. Mu ngira Emawusi (Mar 16:12-13)
24.13: Hu ludaalo olwene olwo olu Yesu gaalamuhiraho, babiri hu beegi babe baali batiina mu haalo ahabalanga baati Emawusi emayiro nga musanvu ohuŋwa e Yerusaalemu.
24.14: Batiinanga ni baŋaya hu ebyo byosibyosi ebyali ni bibayeeŋo hu Yesu.
24.15: Ni baali ni bagenda ni baŋaya nga Yesu omwene aŋwera eyi gaŋwera abeŋimbaho bagendera ŋalala.
24.16: Aye nibo sibafaania baati nje niye.
24.17: Ngʼababuusa ati, “Mulihugenda ni muŋaya hu hi?” Nga bemeerera ni babomboŋaaye.
24.18: Mulala hu bo, oyu balanganga baati Kulewopasi ngʼamugobolamo ati, “Ndiiwe weŋene mu Yerusaalemu atamanyire ebibaayeŋo mu ndaalo jino?”
24.19: Ngʼababuusa ati, “Ebiina?” Nga baloma baati, “Ebiŋamba hu Yesu Omunazaleesi, abaaye naabbi owʼamaani era Hatonda nʼali ni naye nʼabaatu bangi ni babona obuŋangi buwe mu ebi gaholanga nomu bigalomanga.
24.20: Abatangirisi bʼabasengi ba Hatonda nʼabaŋugi bamuŋayo ohumusalira ogwʼohufa era nga bamuhomerera hu musalabba.
24.21: Hwali husuubira huuti njʼaja hununula Yisirayiri. Aye endaalo edatu jahabitaŋo ohuŋwa olu bamwita.
24.22: Ebyo ni bihiiri aŋo, eriyo abahasi abaŋuunire hu magombe,
24.23: aye ndibabona mulambo gugwe. Batulomire baati mbo baweene abamalayika ababalomire baati mbo Yesu alamuhire.
24.24: Abahyefe abandi boosi batiinire hu higombe, baageene ni biri ngʼolu abahasi balomire, sibabona hu mulambo gugwe.”
24.25: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abaloma ati, “Nga muli baŋubeebe era nga mulwaŋo ohufugiirira byosibyosi ebi banaabbi baaloma baati biribaŋo!
24.26: Baali nʼohugudya Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu, ko ahene aŋeewe eŋono lirye.”
24.27: Ngʼaŋo Yesu, abanyonyola Ebyaŋandihiwa ebimulomaho byosibyosi, ohutandihira hu ebi Musa gaŋandiiha nʼebyabanaabbi bosibosi.
24.28: Ni baali ni boola eyi baali ni baja, Yesu niye gaali oti ahyeyongerayo mu moni.
24.29: Nga bamwegalihira bugali weene baati, “Nja hutiine e weefe, olwohuba owiire wiriire.” Ngʼafugiirira atiina ni nabo.
24.30: Ni baali ni balya, nga Yesu abugula omugaati geyaasa Hatonda, ngʼagubbongolamo, ahena abaŋa.
24.31: Ngʼaŋo hibawijuhaho bamufaania baati nje niye aye aŋo ni naaŋo ngʼabagotaho.
24.32: Nga bebuusa abeene nʼabeene baati, “Emyoyo sijitwefubuhirenge nʼaloma ni neefe mu ngira nʼatunyonyola Ebyaŋandihiwa?”
24.33: Nga benyoha mu haseera aheene aho, baagamayo e Yerusaalemu. Ni boola, baagaana abeegi ba Yesu ehumi namulala nʼabandi ni bahumbeene.
24.34: Nga babaloma baati, “Hituufu, Musengwa alamuhire era Simooni amuweene.”
24.35: Nga bano boosi babaŋayira ebibaayeŋo mu ngira ni bagenda ni naye era ngʼolu abbwagire omugaati ni bali hulya nga ko hibawijuhaho bamufaania. Yesu abonehera abeegi babe (Mat 28:16-20; Mar 16:14-18; Yow 20:19-23; Bik 1:6-8)
24.36: Ni baali ni bahiiroma ebyo, ngʼaŋo ni naaŋo Yesu gaaja gemeerera ŋagati waawe abaloma ati, “Emiyaaya jibe ni nenywe!”
24.37: Hino hyabasindusa era hyabaŋa ohutya ni baŋeega baati baweene omwigu gugwe.
24.38: Ngʼaŋo abaloma ati, “Lwahiina mweralihirira era lwahiina mubuusabuusa mu myoyo jenywe?
24.39: Mubone ebyaba nʼamagulu gange. Ndiise ono omwene. Mupambeho mubone, omwigu gubula mubiri nʼamagumba hyʼolu ese ndi ni nabyo.”
24.40: Ni gahena ohubaloma atyo, ngʼabalaga ebyaba nʼamagulu gage.
24.41: Hino hyabaleetera esangaalo bitiirifu aye mula ni batafugiirira baati nje niye. Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Mupeho ehyohulya.”
24.44: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Bino mbebi nabalomeranga ni kiiri ni nenywe ti byosibyosi Ebyaŋandihiwa ni bindomaho mu magambi ga Musa nomu bitabo byʼabanaabbi nomu Zabbuli, biri nʼohwolerera.”
24.46: Ngʼabaloma ati, “Hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, baaja hugudya Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu, bahene bamwite aye aja hulamuha ni ŋabitireŋo endaalo edatu,
24.47: baaja hulomera abaatu bosibosi ohutandihira mu Yerusaalemu obuhwenda owʼohwenenya nʼohusoniŋiwa ebibi olwʼobuŋangi wuwe.
24.49: Nja hubaŋeeresa ehirabo ehi Bbaabba gabasuubisa. Aye musigale mu hibuga muno ohwola olu mulisuna amaani ohuŋwa mwigulu.” Yesu atiina mwigulu (Mar 16:19-20; Bik 1:9-11)
24.50: Nga Yesu abatusa mu hibuga, abaŋira aŋaatu mu hitundu ohuupi nʼahabuga hʼe Bbesaniya. Ni boola, ngʼagolola emihono abasabira ekabi.
24.51: Ni gaali nʼahibasabira ekabi, ngʼabalehaŋo atiina mwigulu.
24.52: Nga bahubba amafuha bamujumirya. Ni bahena nga baagamayo e Yerusaalemu ni bejuuye esangaalo bitiirifu.
24.53: Era baabanga hu Yekaalu habuhyabuhya ni bajumirya Hatonda.

1.1: Mu hutandiha ko batonde ehyalo, oyo oyu balanga baati Hibono gaaliŋo. Hibono ngʼaba ni Hatonda era nʼali nʼowa Hatonda owijuufu.
1.2: Hibono gaali ni Hatonda mu hutandiha ni bahiiri hutonda ehyalo.
1.3: Hatonda gatonda hiisi hiitu nʼatambisa Hibono oyo era aŋa ataali eŋuma ehi gatonda.
1.4: Hibono gaali njʼesimuho yʼobulamu era njʼenjase eyimulihira abaatu.
1.5: Enjase eyo eraga abaatu ehi Hatonda ali nʼehi genda bahole aye sibamutegeera.
1.6: Olwolire nga Hatonda atuma omuutu oyu balanganga baati Yowaane.
1.7: Yowaane gaaja ohulomera abaatu ebiŋamba hu oyo ali hyʼenjase alaga abaatu ehi Hatonda ali nʼehi genda. Era ti abaatu bafugiirire Hatonda ohubita mu niye.
1.8: Yowaane sinje owaali enjase aye gaaja ohulomera abaatu hu oyo ali hyʼenjase.
1.9: Oyo owaali ni gaaja hu hyalo huno, njʼenjase etuufu emulihira hiisi muutu.
1.10: Hibono gaaja hu hyalo huno era wayire Hatonda njʼoyu gahozesa ohutonda hiisi hiitu, abaatu sibamufugiirira.
1.11: Gaaja mu hyalo hihye aye abaatu babe abeene nʼabeene sibamusangaalira.
1.12: Ne abamusangaalira baahena baamutaamo owesige, gaabafuula baana ba Hatonda.
1.13: Sibafuuha baana ba Hatonda ngʼolu baatu basaala abaana baawe oba olwʼohusalaŋo hwʼobuutu oba hu lwʼohwenda hwʼomusinde omufumbo aye gabasaala ngʼolu omwene asiima.
1.14: Hibono gahena gafuuha muutu era gamenya ŋalala ni neefe mu hyalo muno. Efe hwabonaho eŋono lirye eri ali ni nalyo, eŋono eri Hatonda gatwiha Omwana wuwe omulala wogobbo oyo oyu Semwana gatuma ohuŋwa mwigulu gaaja ni gejuuye amazima nʼehisasabirisi ehyʼamaani.
1.15: Lulala, Yowaane galangirira ati, “Ono njʼoyu nʼaloma ti, ‘Oyo anahaaje oluvanyuma lwange gaakira obuŋangi, olwohuba gaaliŋo ni kiiri husaaliwa.’ ”
1.16: Olwʼehisasabirisi hihye ehibitiirifu, hwesihwesi gatuŋa ekabi enyene enyingi.
1.17: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Hatonda gatuŋa amagambi nʼabita mu Musa aye husuna ehisasabirisi nʼamazima agaŋamba hu Hatonda ohubita mu Yesu Kurisito.
1.18: Ŋabula abonangaho Hatonda, ohutusaho Omwana wuwe omulala wogobbo owihaaye ŋalala ni Semwana. Omwana oyo njʼatulaga ehi Semwana ali. Obuhwenda wa Yowaane Omubatiza (Mat 3:1-12; Mar 1:1-8; Luk 3:1-18)
1.19: Ngʼabatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya batuma balala hu Baleevi nʼabasengi ba Hatonda abomu Yerusaalemu eyiri Yowaane Omubatiza ohumubuusa baati, “Ndiiwe ani?”
1.20: Aye gabagobolamo nʼobugumu ati, “Sindiise Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu.”
1.21: Nga bamubuusa baati, “Ŋaahani hanye si ndiiwe Kurisito, ndiiwe ani? Ndiiwe Eliya?” Nga Yowaane abagobolamo ati, “Sindiise.” Nga bamubuusa baati, “Ndiiwe naabbi ola oyu basuubisa?” Ngʼabagobolamo ati, “Bbe.”
1.22: Ngʼaŋo bamuloma baati, “Ale ni tulomere, ndiiwe ani? Hwenda hwagame nʼehyohugobolamo abo abatutumire.”
1.23: Nga Yowaane abagobolamo nʼatambisa ebibono ebi naabbi Yisaaya gaŋandiiha ebiroma biiti, “Ndiise ejanjaasi eryʼamaani eriŋwera mu lulafu ni lirangirira liiti, ‘Muhosiirire Musengwa engira.’ ”
1.24: Nga balala hu Bafalisaayo abo ababatuma
1.25: babuusa Yowaane baati, “Ŋaahani, hanye sindiiwe Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu era sindiiwe Eliya, oba naabbi ola, lwahiina obatiza abaatu?”
1.26: Nga Yowaane abagobolamo ati, “Ese mbatiza nʼamaaji aye mu nywe ŋaliŋo owukira obuŋangi oyu mutamanyire.
1.27: Oyo njʼaliija oluvanyuma lwange era ese sipoomera wayire nʼohuboŋolola ekoba jʼengayito jije.”
1.28: Ebyo byosibyosi byaliŋo mu habuga aha balanga baati Bbesaniya, engereha wʼolwabi olu balanga baati Yoludaani eyi Yowaane gaali nʼabatihiza abaatu. Yesu ali mu hifo hyʼEtaama Etusaŋo Ebibi
1.29: Oludaalo olwalondaho, nga Yowaane abona Yesu nʼatiina eyi gaali, ngʼalomera abaaliŋo ati, “Mubone ali mu hifo hyʼEtaama Etusaŋo Ebibi byʼabaatu.
1.30: Ono njʼoyu nalomaho ti, ‘Omusinde anahaaje oluvanyuma lwange gaakira obuŋangi’ olwohuba gaaliŋo ni kiiri husaaliwa.
1.31: Ese keesi naali simumanyire aye ehyagira naaja ohubatiza abaatu nʼamaaji, hyali ti Abayisirayiri bahamutegeera.”
1.32: Nga Yowaane aloma ati, “Nabona Omwoyo ohuŋwa mwigulu nʼamwihaho nʼali mu hifaananyi hyʼeŋuusi, ngʼamusigalaho.
1.33: Hani sinamanya ti nje niye. Aye Hatonda owaatuma ohubatiza abaatu nʼamaaji, gaali gandomire ati, ‘Omusinde oyu olibona Omwoyo nʼamwihaho, oyo nje aja hubatiza abaatu nʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu.’
1.34: Mbalomera ehi nabonaho nʼemoni jange era mbahahasa ti oyo njʼOmwana wa Hatonda.” Abaloobera ba Yesu abadaayi
1.35: Oludaalo olwalondaho, Yowaane nindi gaali gemereeye ŋaweene ŋala nʼababiri hu beegi babe.
1.36: Ngʼaŋo abona Yesu nʼabita, ngʼabaloma ati, “Mubone oyo ali mu hifo hyʼEtaama Etusaŋo Ebibi byʼabaatu!”
1.37: Abeegi babe abo ababiri ni baŋulira ebibono ebyo, nga balonda hu Yesu.
1.38: Yesu ni gaheja egongo, gababona ni bamulondaho, ngʼababuusa ati, “Mwenda hi?” Nga bamugobolamo baati, “Musomesa, omenya ŋeena?”
1.39: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Muuje hutiine mumanyeyo.” Esaawa jaali ngʼehumi ejʼegulo. Nga baŋamba engira batiina eyi gamenyanga, eyi baali egulo eryo lyosiryosi.
1.40: Andereya mulebe wa Simooni Peetero, gaali mulala hu baŋulira ehi Yowaane galoma era abaali ni balondire hu Yesu.
1.41: Ehi Andereya gasooka ohuhola, hutiina hwendula mulebewe Simooni, ngʼamuloma ati, “Huweene Masiya.”
1.42: Ngʼaŋo amuŋira eyiri Yesu. Yesu ni gamuhejaho ngʼamuloma ati esiina liryo ndiiwe Simooni omwana wa Yona aye banahulangenga baati Keefa. Yesu alanga Filipo ni Nasanayiri
1.43: Oludaalo olwalondaho, nga Yesu asalaŋo ohutiina mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya. Ngʼabona omusinde oyu balanganga baati Filipo amuloma ati, “Nja obe mwegi wange.”
1.44: Filipo yeesi gaali aŋwera mu hibuga Bbesusayida hyʼAndereya ni Peetero.
1.45: Filipo ni gabona Nasanayiri, gaamuloma ati, “Huweene oyo oyu Musa gaŋandiihaho mu magambi era oyu banaabbi boosi baŋandiihaho. Nje Yesu omusaani wa Yosefu e Nazaleesi.”
1.46: Ngʼaŋo Nasanayiri amubuusa ati, “Ŋaliŋo ehiraŋi hyosihyosi ehiŋanga ohuŋwa e Nazaleesi?” Nga Filipo amugobolamo ati, “Ewe nja obone.”
1.47: Yesu ni gabona Nasanayiri ni goleresa aŋa ali, ngʼaloma ati, “Bona Omuyisirayiri endiho era abulamo obunafuusi!”
1.48: Nga Nasanayiri amubuusa ati, “Wumanyire otye?” Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Filipo ko ahulange, kuweene nʼoli mu musaala omutiini.”
1.49: Nga Nasanayiri amuloma ati, “Musomesa, ndiiwe Omwana wa Hatonda era habaha wa Yisirayiri!”
1.50: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Ofugiirira olwohuba kulomeeye ti kuweene nʼoli mu musaala omutiini? Olibona ebiitu ebyene ebyʼamaani ebihira ehyo.”
1.51: Nga Yesu ameedaho ati, “Mu butuufu oweene mbalomera ti munahabone egulu ni liwihuhire, abamalayika ba Hatonda ni baniina era ni beeha hu Mwana wʼOmuutu.”

2.1: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, ŋabitaŋo endaalo edatu nga ŋabaŋo embaga eyʼobugole mu hibuga e Kaana mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya. Nyina ya Yesu gaaliyo,
2.2: era Yesu nʼabeegi babe boosi baali babalangire hu mbaga eyo.
2.3: Abaatu ni banywa omwenge gwʼemizabbibbu ogu baali ni bategehire gwaŋwaŋo, nga nyina amuloma ati, “Mwana wange, abaatu bano ebyohunywa bibaŋoyeho.”
2.4: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Maama ndehe! Ehiseera hyange hihiiri hwola.”
2.5: Nga nyina aloma abaŋeeresa ati, “Muhole hyosihyosi ehi anabalome.”
2.6: Ohuupi aŋo ŋaaliŋo agatamu mukaaga aga baahola mu mabaale. Agatamu ago gaali gajamo ebidomolo amahumi abiri hu adatu buli galala, baali bagatayeŋo olwʼesambo yʼEhiyudaaya eyʼohwegwalaasa.
2.7: Nga Yesu aloma abaŋeeresa ati, “Mwijuse agatamu ago amaaji.” Nga bagejusa nʼohumuniga.
2.8: Ngʼaŋo abaloma ati, “Ŋaahani mudaŋeho muŋirire omuhulu wʼembaga.” Nga boosi badaŋa baŋirira
2.9: omuhulu wʼembaga amaaji ago agaali ni gafuuhire omwenge gwomu mizabbibbu ngʼanywaho. Cooka niye sigamanya eyi gwaŋwa aye abaŋeeresa nibo baali bamanyire. Ngʼaŋo omuhulu wʼembaga alanga omugole omusinde amuloma ati,
2.10: “Abahyo beheerera hugabula omwenge omulaŋi. Abaatu ni bahena ohunywa, nga ko baloosaho ogutali mulaŋi. Ne ewe obihiriiye omulaŋi ohwola esaawa yino!”
2.11: Hano njʼahabonero aheŋunjisa ahadaayi aha Yesu gahola e Kaana mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya, eyo galaga obuŋangi buwe era ngʼabeegi babe bamutamo owesige.
2.12: Oluvanyuma lwʼobugole, Yesu nʼabeegi nʼabalebe babe ko ni nyina, nga batiina e Kaperanawumu bahenayo ahamanga. Yesu abbinga abaali ni batundira hu Yekaalu (Mat 21:12-13; Mar 11:15-17; Luk 19:45-46)
2.13: Embaga eyʼEhiyudaaya eyʼOhuhebuliriraho Ohubihisya ni yaali nʼenaatere ohwola, Yesu nʼabeegi babe baatiina e Yerusaalemu.
2.14: Mu lunya lwa Yekaalu gagaanamo abaali ni batunda eŋombe nʼetaama nʼenjiiwa era nʼabandi ni behaaye ŋa meeza jaawe ni baswanisa ebbeesa.
2.15: Ngʼaŋamba emigoye, ajihambaamo olubbooko, ngʼabbinga eŋombe nʼetaama jitula, ngʼagengula emeeza jʼabaswanisa ebbeesa jigwa era ngʼendusu joŋaaniha.
2.16: Ngʼaloma abo abaali ni batunda enjiiwa ati, “Jino mujituse ŋano. Mulehe hufuula enyumba ya Bbaabba ya husubuulirangamo.”
2.17: Ngʼabeegi babe bahebulira ehyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, “Ohwenda ohunendamo enyumba yiyo hulinjitisa.”
2.18: Ngʼaŋo abatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya bamuloma baati, “Habonero hi aheŋunjisa ahosobola ohuhola ohutulaga oti oli nʼobuŋangi ohuhola ebyo byosibyosi ebi oholire?”
2.19: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Ale mubbwageŋo e Yekaalu yino, nja huyitongolera mu ndaalo edatu yaba nʼeŋooye.”
2.20: Ngʼabatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya abo bamugobolamo baati, “Yekaalu yino yatuŋirira emyaha mahumi ane namukaaga ni huyitongola. Aye ewe oŋanga otye ohuyitongorera mu ndaalo edatu joŋene?”
2.21: Aye Yesu galoma hu Yekaalu nʼategeesa mubiri gugwe.
2.22: Ni galamuha, nga abeegi babe bahebulira ehi galoma. Ngʼaŋo bafugiirira Ebyaŋandihiwa nʼebibono ebi Yesu galomanga. Yesu amanyire ehiri mu myoyo jʼabaatu
2.23: Yesu ni gaali e Yerusaalemu hu Mbaga eyi bahebuliriraho Ohubihisya, abaatu bangi babona obubonero oweŋunjisa obu gaholanga, nga bamutamo owesige.
2.24: Aye eŋuma oyu Yesu gatamo owesige olwohuba gaali abamanyire bosibosi.
2.25: Sihyali ni hyetagisa muutu yesiyesi ohumulomera ebiŋamba hu baatu olwohuba ye omwene gaali amanyire ebyali mu myoyo jaawe bosibosi.

3.1: Ŋaaliŋo omusinde oyu balanganga baati Nekodemu. Omusinde oyo gaali wamu hibbubbu hyʼAbafalisaayo era nʼali mulala hu bʼOluhiiho lwʼAbayudaaya Olubbala.
3.2: Lulala, Nekodemu gatiina eyiri Yesu owiire, ngʼamuloma ati, “Musomesa, humanyire huuti Hatonda gahutuma olwohuba ŋaŋuma aŋanga ohuhola obubonero oweŋunjisa obu ohola, ohutusaho Hatonda nʼali ni naye.”
3.3: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Kulomera ehituufu ti ohutusaho ngʼomuutu bamusaaye omulundi ogwohubiri, saaŋanga hwingira mu buŋugi wa Hatonda.”
3.4: Nga Nekodemu amubuusa ati, “Omuutu aŋanga atye ohusaaliwa omulundi ogwohubiri nʼali muhulu? Mu butuufu saaŋanga hwingira mu hida hya nyina, baamusaala nindi.”
3.5: Ngʼaŋo Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Kulomera ehituufu ti, ohutusaho ngʼomuutu bamubatihiize nʼamaaji era gasuna nʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu, saaŋanga hwingira mu buŋugi wa Hatonda.
3.6: Omuutu asaala muutu wahye aye Omwoyo Omutukuvu njʼaleetera omuutu ohuba nʼobulamu obunyaaha.
3.7: Oteŋunja olwʼohuhuloma ti muli nʼohusaaliwa omulundi ogwohubiri.
3.8: Omwoyo wa Hatonda ali hyʼepunga. Omuutu ayiŋulira aye ŋaŋuma aba nʼamanyire eyi eŋwera oba eyi eruŋama. Mu ngeri njʼenyene, ŋaŋuma aŋanga ohumanya Omwoyo nʼacuusa obulamu wʼomuutu.”
3.9: Nga Nekodemu amubuusa ati, “Ehyo hisoboha hiitye?”
3.10: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Ewe omusomesa wʼAbayisirayiri omulamba, soofaania ebindoma?
3.11: Kulomera ehituufu ti efe huloma ebi humanyire era ebi hwaweeneho aye enywe simufugiirira.
3.12: Obanga kulomeeye hu ebi baatu bahola hu hyalo huno nandofaania aye onafugiirire otye ni nahulomere hu byomwigulu?
3.13: Eŋuma owaali nʼatiinireho mwigulu ohutusaho Omwana wʼOmuutu owaŋwayo.”
3.14: Ngʼolu Musa gaŋaniha etemu hu musaala mu lulafu, mu ngeri njʼenyene nʼOmwana wʼOmuutu baja humuŋaniha baatyo hu musalabba,
3.15: ko hiisi amufugiirira asune obulamu obutaŋwaŋo.
3.16: Hatonda ni gendire bugali abaatu, gaŋayo Omwana wuwe omulala wogobbo, ko hiisi amufugiirira atasihiiriha aye asune obulamu obutaŋwaŋo.
3.17: Olwohuba Hatonda sigatuma Mwana wuwe hu hyalo ohusalira abaatu omusango aye banoŋohe ni babita mu niye.
3.18: Hiisi amufugiirira, gejeerera omusango. Aye atafugiirira, gwahena hale ohumuhira olwohuba saafugiirira Mwana mulala wogobbo owa Hatonda.
3.19: Guno njʼomusango, Hatonda galeeta enjase hu hyalo aye abaatu benda ehiirema ohuhira enjase, olwohuba ebikolwa byawe bibi.
3.20: Hiisi muutu ahola ebibi, acaawa enjase era saatiina eyiri oyo ali hyʼenjase olwohuba ebikolwa bibye bija hweta aŋalafu.
3.21: Aye hiisi ahola amazima, aleha enjase yamumulihira ohulaga ti hiisi ehi ahola, ahihola hu lwa Hatonda. Yesu ni Yowaane Omubatiza
3.22: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Yesu nʼabeegi babe batiina mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya, eyi gaali ni nabo nʼabatiza.
3.23: Yowaane Omubatiza yeesi gaali mu hifo ehi balanga baati Enoni, ohuupi ni Saalimu nʼabatiza olwohuba eyo amaaji gaali mangi. Abaatu batiinangayo ohubatiziwa.
3.24: Ehyo hyaliŋo ni bahiiri hudanya Yowaane mu komera.
3.25: Lulala, abeegi ba Yowaane baŋahana nʼomulala hu Bayudaaya hu biŋamba hu halombolombo haawe ahʼohwegwalaasa.
3.26: Nga batiina eyiri Yowaane, bamuloma baati, “Musomesa, omusinde ola owaali ni neewe engereha wʼolwabi Yoludaani era oyu walomaho ebiraŋi, ali hubatiza abaatu era bangi bali hutiinayo ohubabatiza.”
3.27: Nga Yowaane abagobolamo ati, “Omuutu saaŋanga huba nʼobuŋangi ohutusaho Hatonda nʼabumuŋaaye.
3.28: Enywe mwabeene muŋa obujulizi ngʼolu nʼaloma ti, ‘Sindiise Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu ohutusaho baatuma ohumweyulira engira.’
3.29: Omugole aba bwʼoyo amuhooye. Meeri yʼahooye niye aba huba aŋo nʼamulindiriiye era olu aŋulira ejanjaasi lirye himusangaasa bugali. Mu ngeri njʼenyene keesi ndi nʼesangaalo bitiirifu.
3.30: Yesu geyongere ohufuma, ese ohwange ni huhendeera.” Oyo owaŋwa mwigulu
3.31: “Oyo owaŋwa mwigulu ali ŋamugulu wa bosibosi. Aye omuutu owohu hyalo huno aba wa hyalo hino, aloma era ahola bya hu hyalo huno. Oyo owaŋwa mwigulu ali ŋamugulu wa bosibosi.
3.32: Era aloma hu ebi gaabona nʼehi gaŋulira mwigulu aye batono abaŋulirisa ebibye.
3.33: Hiisi afugiirira ebibono bibye, asuna ahabonero ahalaga haati ebi Hatonda aloma bituufu.
3.34: Olwohuba oyo oyu Hatonda gatuma, aloma ebibono bibye era amuŋeera erala amaani ameene amangi agʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu.
3.35: Hatonda genda Omwana wuwe era gaamuŋa obuŋangi hu hiisi hiitu.
3.36: Hiisi afugiirira Omwana wa Hatonda ali nʼobulamu obutaŋwaŋo. Aye atamufugiirira, aŋuma bulamu obutaŋwaŋo olwohuba Hatonda amuliho ehiruŋi.”

4.1: Mu hiseera ehyo, Abafalisaayo baŋulira baati abaloobera ba Yesu baali beyongera obungi era baati gaali abatiza abaatu bangi ohuhira Yowaane,
4.2: wayire Yesu omwene sinje owabatizanga aye abeegi babe.
4.3: Yesu Musengwa ni gaŋulira ebiitu ebyo, gaŋwa mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya, nga gagamayo mu lyʼe Galilaaya.
4.4: Ni gaali ni gagamayo, gaali nʼohubita e Samaliya.
4.5: Ngʼaŋo atiina goola e Samaliya mu hibuga ehi balanga baati Sikaali, ohulirihana omuŋuluko ogu Yakobbo gaŋa Yosefu omusaani wuwe.
4.6: Mu muŋuluho ogwo mwalimo esobere eyi Yakobbo gaali nʼayabire. Olwʼomudembo gwʼolugendo, Yesu gehala aŋo hu sobere eyo. Esaawa jaali nga mukaaga ejomu muusi.
4.7: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaŋo omuhasi Omusamaliya owatiina hu sobere eyo ohudaŋa amaaji. Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Peeho amaaji nyweho.”
4.8: Mu hiseera ehyo, abeegi babe baali batiinire mu hibuga ohugula ebiryo.
4.9: Ngʼaŋo omuhasi oyo amugobolamo ati, “Ewe oli Muyudaaya, ese ndi Musamaliya. Oŋanga otye ohusunga amaaji ohunywa?” (Abayudaaya baali sibaholagana nʼAbasamaliya).
4.10: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Obanga nʼomanyire ehirabo ehi Hatonda aŋa abaatu, oyo ahuloma ati omuŋeho amaaji, wahamusungire gahuŋa amaaji agaleeta obulamu.”
4.11: Ngʼomuhasi oyo amuloma ati, “Muhulu, esobere yino ndeeŋi ate oŋuma hyahudaŋira. Onatuse ŋeena amaaji ago agaleeta obulamu?
4.12: Ewe ohira sehulu yeefe Yakobbo owayaba era gaatuŋa esobere yino eyi omwene nʼabaana babe era nʼebyayo bibye byanywangamo?”
4.13: Nga Yesu amugobolamo ati, “Hiisi anywa hu maaji gano, enduŋo emuluma nindi.
4.14: Aye hiisi anywa hu maaji aga ese muŋa, enduŋo sirimuluma olwohuba galifuuha esulo ejʼamaaji agamuleetera obulamu obutaŋwaŋo.”
4.15: Ngʼomuhasi oyo amuloma ati, “Muhulu, peeho amaaji ago enduŋo etanumanga nindi era ndehere aŋo ohuujanga ŋano ohudaŋa amaaji.”
4.16: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Tiina olange wamo ohene ogobole ni naye.”
4.17: Ngʼomuhasi oyo amugobolamo ati, “Puma wamwange.” Ngʼaŋo Yesu amuloma ati, “Oli mutuufu ohuloma oti oŋuma wamo,
4.18: olwohuba wahafumbirwa abasinde bataanu era ni nooyo oyu oli ni naye siwamo. Ehi olomire hituufu.”
4.19: Ngʼomuhasi oyo aloma Yesu ati, “Muhulu, wumbonehera oti oli naabbi.
4.20: Abasehulu bʼefe bajumirihisyanga Hatonda hu lusozi luno. Aye enywe Abayudaaya muloma muuti mbo Yerusaalemu njʼehifo omwohujumirihisyanga Hatonda.”
4.21: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Muhasi ewe, fugiirira, ehiseera hiri huuja olu hitahetagise ohujumirihisya Hatonda Seefe hu lusozi olwo oba mu Yerusaalemu.
4.22: Enywe Abasamaliya mujumirya ehi mutamanyire. Aye efe Abayudaaya hujumirya ehi humanyire, olwohuba Hatonda aja hunoŋola abaatu nʼabita mu Bayudaaya.
4.23: Aye ehiseera hiija era hyolire, abajumirya Hatonda Seefe mu ngeri etuufu banamujumirihisyenga mu mwoyo era nomu mazima, olwohuba abamujumirya baatyo, mbaba genda.
4.24: Hatonda Mwoyo era ni naabo abamujumirya bali nʼohumujumirihisyanga mu mwoyo era nomu mazima.”
4.25: Ngʼomuhasi oyo amuloma ati, “Manyire ti Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu aja huuja. Era nʼaliija, alitunyonyola byosibyosi.”
4.26: Ngʼaŋo Yesu amuloma ati, “Ese aloma ni neewe, ndiise oyo.”
4.27: Nga mu hiseera ehyene ehyo abeegi ba Yesu bagobola era nga beŋunja ohumwagana nʼaloma nʼomuhasi olwohuba hyali hibbwaga amagambi. Aye ŋaŋumaŋo owabuusa omuhasi oyo ati, “Wenda hi?” Oba abuusa Yesu ati, “Lwahiina oloma nʼomuhasi oyo?”
4.28: Ngʼomuhasi oyo aleha aŋo esongo yiye, aŋamba engira gagamayo mu hibuga, alomera abaatu ati,
4.29: “Muuje mubone omusinde owundomeeye byosibyosi ebi mbayenga ni kola. Omusinde ono aŋanga ohuba nʼali nje Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu?”
4.31: Mu hiseera ehyene ehyo, abeegi babe baali bamwegalihira baati, “Musomesa, lyaho ebiryo.”
4.32: Aye gabagobolamo ati, “Ndi nʼebiryo ebi mutamanyire.”
4.33: Ngʼaŋo abeegi babe bebuusa abeene nʼabeene baati, “Ŋaliŋo amuleeteyeho ehyohulya?”
4.34: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Nahola ebi owatuuma genda kole, mba hyʼaliiye.
4.35: Enywe simuli nʼendoma eroma yiiti; ‘Esigayeeyo emyesi ene, egesa lyole?’ Ale mubone: ebirime birabire era egesa lyolire.
4.36: Agesa ali hyʼoyo aloma ebipambaho galeetera abaatu ohusuna obulamu obutaŋwaŋo olwʼohufugiirira. Olwʼehyo owamwa ko ni nooyo agesa, basaŋalihisya ŋalala.
4.37: Endoma eyi baatu baloma baati, ‘Oyo amwa wundi nʼagesa yeesi wundi, tuufu.’
4.38: Nabaŋindiha ohugesa aŋa mutafaabinira. Abandi njʼabafaabiina aye enywe muuja hugesa.” Abasamaliya bangi bafugiirira
4.39: Abasamaliya bangi abomu hibuga ehyo bafugiirira Yesu olwʼebibono ebi muhasi oyo gabalomera ati, “Gandomeeye byosibyosi ebi naholanga.”
4.40: Abasamaliya ni batiina eyiri Yesu nga bamusunga ohubaaho ewaawe. Ngʼahenayo endaalo ebiri.
4.42: Nga baloma omuhasi oyo baati, “Sihufugiirira olwʼebi otulomeeye aye olwohuba efe hwabeene huŋuliye nʼamatwi geefe. Humanyire huuti omusinde oyo mu butuufu njʼOmunoŋosi wʼabaatu bosibosi.” Yesu aŋonia omwana wʼomuhungu wa habaha
4.43: Oluvanyuma lwʼendaalo ejo ebiri, Yesu gatiina mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya.
4.44: Ŋaahani Yesu gaali alomire ati, “Naabbi sibamuŋa eŋono mu hitundu hyʼewaawe.”
4.45: Ni goola e Galilaaya, ngʼabaatu baayo bamusangaalira olwohuba baali baweene byosibyosi ebi gahola hu Mbaga eyʼOhubihisya mu Yerusaalemu.
4.46: Ngʼaŋo nindi Yesu ahyala e Kaana mu Galilaaya, eyi gafuula amaaji ohuba envinyo. Mu hibuga hyʼe Kaperanawumu mwalimo omuhungu wa habaha owaali nʼomusaani wuwe nʼali mulwaye.
4.47: Omusinde oyo ni gaŋulira ati ŋaahani Yesu gaali aŋooye e Galilaaya nʼali mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya, ngʼatiinayo amwegayirira atiine ni naye e Kaperanawumu, aŋonie omusaani wuwe owaali nʼali huupi hufa.
4.48: Ngʼaŋo Yesu amuloma ati, “Ohutusaho nga muweene obubonero oweŋunjisa, simuja hufugiirira.”
4.49: Ngʼomuhungu oyo amwegayirira ati, “Muhulu, ganya hutiine omwana wange nʼahiiri hufa.”
4.50: Nga Yesu amuloma ati, “Tiina, omwana wuwo anaŋone.” Omusinde oyo ngʼafugiirira ehi Yesu gamuloma, nga gagamayo engo.
4.51: Ni gaali nʼahiiri mu lugendo, ngʼabeedu babe bamwagaana hu ngira, bamulomera baati omwana wuwe aŋonire.
4.52: Ni gababuusa esaawa eyi gatandiha ohuba obulaŋi, nga bamulomera baati, “Omusuuja gwamulehuuye olwejo hu nyanga musanvu.”
4.53: Ngʼaŋo semwana yʼomwana oyo ahebulira ati eyo njʼesaawa enyene nʼenyene eyi Yesu gamulomeeyemo ati, “Omwana wuwo anaŋone.” Ngʼaŋo niye nʼabomu mago gage bosibosi bafugiirira Yesu.
4.54: Hano njʼahabonero aheŋunjisa ahohubiri aha Yesu gaahola nʼagobooye mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya ohuŋwa mu lyʼe Buyudaaya.

5.1: Ni ŋabitahoŋo ahamanga, nga Yesu atiina e Yerusaalemu hu mbaga yʼAbayudaaya.
5.2: Mu Yerusaalemu, ohuupi nʼomulala hu miryango ejingira mu hibuga omwo, ŋaaliŋo omulyango ni bagulanga baati, “Omulyango gwʼEtaama” ni ŋaliŋo ehidiba mu Lubbebbulaniya ni bahiranga baati Bbesusaaza. Era hu hidiba ehyo ni batongolaho ebigangu bitaanu ohuhyeswanigirisa.
5.3: Mu bigangu omwo, mwabangamo eduuli lyʼabalwaye hyʼabaŋofu, abaleme, nʼabasanyalala abalindiriranga amaaji ohwehuyuga.
5.4: Ŋaahani ŋaalingaŋo ehiseera ehi malayika geehanga mu hidiba, ngʼahuyuga amaaji. Oyo owehereranga ohwiha mu maaji ago, gaŋonanga hiisi bulwaye obu gabanga ni nawo.
5.5: Hu hidiba ehyo, hwaliho omusinde owaali nʼahenire emyaha adatu namunaana nʼali mulwaye.
5.6: Yesu ni gamubona, gamanya ati abaaye mu mbeera eyo ohuhena ebbanga ebbala. Ngʼamubuusa ati, “Wenda ohuŋona?”
5.7: Ngʼomusinde oyo amugobolamo ati, “Muhulu, puma muutu owohunjeeda gandunda gaata mu hidiba mu hiseera aŋa maaji gehuyugira. Ni ngesyaho ohwiha mu maaji ngʼowundi ganeeheerera.”
5.8: Ngʼaŋo Yesu amuloma ati, “Yinyoha, ogege omusigasiga gugo, otiine.”
5.9: Aŋo ni naaŋo ngʼomusinde oyo aŋona ahena genyoha, aŋamba omusigasiga gugo, atiina. Oludaalo olwo lwali lwa Sabbaato.
5.10: Abatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya ni babona omusinde oyo oyu baali ni baŋonisye bamuloma baati, “Olwa leero lwa Sabbaato, amagambi sigahufugiirira hugega omusigasiga gugo.”
5.11: Aye ngʼomusinde oyo abagobolamo ati, “Omusinde owuponisye, njʼowundomire ati, ‘Gega omusigasiga gugo,’ otiine.”
5.12: Ngʼaŋo bamubuusa baati, “Njʼani oyo ahulomire ati, ‘Gega omusigasiga gugo,’ otiine?”
5.13: Aye oyo oyu baali ni baŋonisye gaali samanyire ati Yesu njʼowamuŋonia, olwohuba gaali agoteeye mu guŋindi gwʼabaatu ogwali mu hifo ehyo.
5.14: Oluvanyuma, nga Yesu asaŋaana omusinde oyo hu Yekaalu, ngʼamuloma ati, “Wange, ŋaahani oli bulaŋi. Otahagesyaho hubbenga nindi, ehigosi ehihira aŋo hitahwolaho.”
5.15: Ngʼomusinde oyo atiina aŋayira abatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya ati Yesu njʼowaali nʼamuŋonisye. Hatonda gaŋa Omwana wuwe obuŋangi
5.16: Ngʼaŋo abatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya bahiyaania Yesu olwohuba gaŋonia omusinde oyo hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato.
5.17: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Hiisi ludaalo Bbaabba ahola emirimo era keesi ndi nʼohuhola.”
5.18: Ehyo hyongera hwongera amaani mu batangirisi bʼAbayudaaya ohusala magesi agʼohumwita. Olwohuba sigahoma hu hubbwaga egambi eriŋamba hu Sabbaato hyonyene aye geranga Mwana wa Hatonda, ehiitu ehyali ni himuta hu daala erala ni Hatonda.
5.19: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu ti, Omwana aŋuma ehi aŋanga ohuhola hu lulwe, ohutusaho ahola ehyo ehi abona Semwana nʼahola.
5.20: Olwohuba Hatonda genda Omwana wuwe oyo, amulaga byosibyosi ebyʼohuhola. Era aja hu mulagirira ahole ebyʼamaani ebihiraho ni nehyo mweŋunje.
5.21: Ngʼolu Bbaabba alamusa abafu, nʼOmwana yeesi aŋa abo aba gendesa obulamu obutaŋwaŋo.
5.22: Era Bbaabba aŋuma oyu asalira omusango aye obuŋangi owo wosiwosi gabuŋa Omwana wuwe,
5.23: ko abaatu bosibosi baŋenga Omwana wuwe oyo eŋono ngʼolu baliŋa Semwana. Era oyo ataŋa Mwana eŋono, aba saaŋa ni Semwana.”
5.24: “Mbalomera ehituufu ti, aŋulira ebibono byange, gahena gafugiirira oyo owaatuma, ali nʼobulamu obutaŋwaŋo era sibalimusalira musango. Aba aŋooye mu hufa, nʼasunire obulamu obutaŋwaŋo.
5.25: Mbalomera ehituufu ti, ehiseera hinahoole olu bafu baliŋulira ejanjaasi lyʼOmwana wa Hatonda nga balamuha.”
5.26: Ngʼolu Bbaabba aŋa abaatu obulamu obutaŋwaŋo, mu ngeri njʼenyene nʼOmwana yeesi gamuŋa obuŋangi ohubaŋa obulamu owo.
5.27: Era gaŋa Omwana obuŋangi ohusala emisango, olwohuba ye njʼOmwana wʼOmuutu.
5.28: Hitabeŋunjisa, olwohuba ehiseera hinahoole olu bafu bosibosi baliŋulira ejanjaasi lirye,
5.29: balamuha. Abo abaholanga ebiraŋi, balisuna obulamu obutaŋwaŋo aye abo abaholanga ebibi, baliramuha nga babasalira omusango.
5.30: “Eŋuma ehi kola hu lwange, sala emisango ngʼolu mba ni mbwene ehi Bbaabba aloma. Olwʼehyo sinehubbira, olwohuba ŋabula ehi kola olwʼohwesangaasa samwene ohutusaho ohusangaasa oyo owaatuma.” Amazima agaŋamba hu Yesu
5.31: Nga Yesu geyongera ohuloma ati, “Mbanga ni neromaho samwene, ebibono byange sibyahabaaye byʼamazima.
5.32: Aye ŋaliŋo omuutu aloma ebipambaho. Oyo nje Bbaabba era manyire ti ebi aloma byʼamazima.
5.33: Mwatuma abaatu eyiri Yowaane ohumubuusa ebipambaho era ebi gagobolamo, bituufu.
5.34: Ne sihinetagisa huba ti abaatu baloma ebiraŋi ebipambaho aye bino mbiroma, mwahafugiirira mwanoŋoha.
5.35: Obuhwenda wa Yowaane waali hyʼetaala ni buleetera abaatu enjase. Aye mwali nʼamanwaali haseera buseera olwʼebi gaali nʼaloma.”
5.36: Aye ebikolwa byange ebyene biraga ehyo ehi ndi nʼohuhiraho ni nʼebyo ebi Yowaane galoma. Era ebi kola njʼebi Bbaabba gaapa ohuhola era biraga biiti njʼowaatuma.
5.37: Era Bbaabba owaatuma gandomaho hiina ehi ndi. Aye enywe simumubonangaho era simutayo mwoyo hu bi abaloma.
5.38: Nʼehibono hihye hiŋuma nomu myoyo jenywe, olwohuba simufugiiririra mu oyo oyu gatuma.
5.39: “Musiiba mu husoma Ebyaŋandihiwa, olwohuba muŋeega muuti ehyo hiija hubaŋeesa obulamu obutaŋwaŋo. Ebyaŋandihiwa ebyene ebyo bindomaho,
5.40: aye simwenda huŋulira byange nahabaŋa obulamu obutaŋwaŋo.”
5.42: cooka mbamanyire bulaŋi weene era kimanyire ti simwenda Hatonda.
5.43: Ese naaja mu buŋangi wa Bbaabba aye simufugiirira. Ne abandi ni banahaaje hu lwawe, munahabasangaalire.
5.44: Simuŋanga hufugiirira ebindoma olwohuba mwepaahapaaha mwabeene nʼabeene. Simufayo ohwenda Hatonda abasiime.
5.45: “Aye mutaŋeega muuti ndiise alibaŋaŋabira eyiri Bbaabba. Amagambi ameene aga baŋa Musa era aga mwesiga njʼagalibaboŋa.
5.46: Mubanga ni mufugiirira ebi Musa gaŋandiiha, keesi mwahafugiiriye, olwohuba bindomaho.
5.47: Aye obanga simufugiirira ebi gaŋandiiha, munafugiirire muutye ebindoma?”

6.1: Oluvanyuma, Yesu ganiina eryato gasomoha gatiina engereha wʼenyanja yʼe Galilaaya, (esiina erindi baati Tibberiya.)
6.2: Ngʼeduuli lyʼabaatu limulondaho olwʼobubonero oweŋunjisa obu gaali nʼaholire, nʼaŋonia abalwaye.
6.3: Ngʼaŋo Yesu nʼabeegi babe baniina olusozi, bahena beehala eyo.
6.4: Mu hiseera ehyo, Embaga yʼAbayudaaya eyʼOhuhebuliraho Ohubihisya, yaali huupi hwola.
6.5: Yesu ni gagangamusa omutwe gabona ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu ni batiina eyi ali, ngʼaloma Filipo ati, “Hunagule ŋeena ebiryo ebi abaatu bano bosibosi banaalye?”
6.6: Aye galoma atyo hwenda hubona ehi analome olwohuba niye gaali amanyire ehi gaali nʼaja huhola.
6.7: Ngʼaŋo Filipo amugobolamo ati, “Wayire omuhemba ogwʼemyesi nga munaana, siguŋanga hugula ebiryo ebihena hiisi muutu ohulyaho.”
6.8: Ngʼowundi hu beegi babe oyu balanga baati Andereya mulebe ya Simooni Peetero, amuloma ati,
6.9: “Ŋano ŋaliŋo omuseere ali nʼemigaati etaanu ejomu busyanu wa bbaale nʼenyeeni ebiri. Aye bino binahole hi, hu eduuli lyʼabaatu lino?”
6.10: Nga Yesu aloma ati, “Mwihase abaatu.” Ŋaaliŋo enyaasi eraŋi olyʼohwihalaho mu hifo ehyo. Ngʼabaatu beehala era baali abasinde ngʼekumi taanu.
6.11: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abugula emigaati jira etaanu nga geyaasa Hatonda. Ngʼaŋo ajiŋa abeegi babe bagabire abaatu abaali ni behaaye. Mu ngeri njʼenyene ngʼaŋamba nʼenyeeni jira joosi abaŋa bajigabira abaatu. Nga hiisi muutu alya goosa aŋa gendire.
6.12: Hiisi muutu nʼahenire ohwiguta, ngʼaloma abeegi babe ati, “Muhumbaanie obukukumuhira obusigaayeŋo, mutonoona biryo.”
6.13: Nga bahumbaania obukukumuhira owʼemigaati jira etaanu bejusa ebisero ehumi nabibiri.
6.14: Abaatu ni babona ahabonero aheŋunjisa aha Yesu gaahola, nga batandiiha ohuloma baati, “Hituufu ono nje naabbi oyu hubaaye ni hulindirira ohuuja hu hyalo huno!”
6.15: Yesu ni gategeera ati baja humuŋamba bamufuule habaha nʼehifuba, nga geyongerayo hu lusozi gebeera eyo yeŋene. Yesu agendera hu maaji (Mat 14:22-33; Mar 6:45-52)
6.16: Egulo ni lyola, abeegi babe beehirira batiina hu nyanja yʼe Galilaaya,
6.17: nga baŋamba eryato, basaabaale batiine e Kaperanawumu. Ehiseera ehyo, owiire waali wiirire aye Yesu gaali ahiiri hubeyungaho.
6.18: Epunga eyʼamaani yaali eri huhubba era enyanja nʼetabuhire.
6.19: Ni baali ni bahasabaalaho ngʼekilomita ene oba etaanu, nga babona Yesu nʼagenda hu maaji, ni goleresa ohuupi nʼeryato omu baali. Ni bamubona ngʼobuti owʼamaani bubaŋamba.
6.20: Aye nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Ndiise, mutatya!”
6.21: Ngʼaŋo baba nʼobugumu ohumufugiirira ohwingira mu lyato, aŋo ni naaŋo nga boola hu lugereha eyi baali ni batiina.
6.22: Oludaalo olwalondaho, ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu abaali ni basigaaye engereha wʼenyanja, bendula Yesu ni batamubona nga beŋunja. Hino hyaja olwohuba bahimanya baati hu mwalo hwaliho eryato erala eri beegi babe baali ni bambuhiiyemo boŋeene.
6.23: Ngʼaŋo ŋabaaŋo amaato agandi agaŋwa e Tibberiya, nga gagobera ohuupi nʼehifo aŋa abaatu baliira emigaati jira eji Musengwa gabaŋa nʼahenire ohweyaasa Hatonda.
6.24: Abaatu ni babona baati Yesu nʼabeegi babe baŋumaaŋo, nga baniina amaato ago basaabaala batiina e Kaperanawumu baje bamwendule. Yesu njʼehyohulya ehireeta obulamu obutaŋwaŋo
6.25: Ni boola engereha wʼenyanja bamubona nga bamubuusa baati, “Musomesa, wolire ŋaali ŋano?”
6.26: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu ti, simunyendula olwohuba mwabona obubonero oweŋunjisa obu nʼahola aye olwohuba mwaliiye emigaati mweguta.
6.27: Mutaluluhaniranga ebiryo ebiŋwaŋo aye ehyohulya ehyʼomwoyo ehibaleetera obulamu obutaŋwaŋo obu Mwana wʼOmuutu ali baŋa. Olwohuba Hatonda ate nga nje, Semwana gaamuŋa obuŋangi owo.”
6.28: Nga bamubuusa baati, “Huhole hi ko hube ni hwoheresa ebi Hatonda genda huhole?”
6.29: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Hatonda ehi genda muhole, njʼohufugiirira oyo oyu gaatuma.”
6.30: Ngʼaŋo bamubuusa baati, “Habonero hi aheŋunjisa ewe aha onahole, ko huhufugiirire? Onahole hi?
6.31: Mu lulafu, abasehulu beefe balyanga ebiryo ebi balanga baati emaanu, ngʼolu hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, ‘Gabaŋa emere ohuŋwa mwigulu’ balye.”
6.32: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abaloma ati, “Mu butuufu, mbalomera ti Musa sinje owaŋa abasehulu benywe ebiryo ebyo ebyaŋwa mwigulu aye Bbaabba abaŋa ehyohulya ehyene nʼehyene njʼowabibaŋa.
6.33: Olwohuba ehyohulya ehi Hatonda abaŋa, njʼoyo owaŋwa mwigulu gaaja hu hyalo ohuŋa abaatu obulamu obutaŋwaŋo.”
6.34: Nga bamuloma baati, “Muhulu, ohuŋwa ŋaahani tuŋenga ehyohulya ehyo.”
6.35: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abaloma ati, “Ndiise ehyohulya ehireeta obulamu. Owuuja eyi ndi, enjala serimulumaho kadi era owufugiirira enduŋo serimulumaho kadi.
6.36: Aye ngʼolu mbalomeeye, mumbwene ne simufugiirira ebindoma.
6.37: Hiisi oyu Bbaabba gaapa, gaaja eyi ndi. Era hiisi owuuja eyi ndi simwigalira yinje.
6.38: Hiri hiityo olwohuba sinaŋwa mwigulu ohuhola ebyange aye ohuhola ebi Hatonda omwene hutuma genda kole.
6.39: Era husiima hwa Hatonda omwene huutuma ti tagosyaho wayire mulala hu abo aba gapambya aye mbalamuse hu ludaalo olwʼekomerero.
6.40: Olwohuba Hatonda Seefe asiima ati hiisi afugiirira Omwana wuwe, alisuna obulamu obutaŋwaŋo era ndimulamusa hu ludaalo lwʼekomerero.”
6.41: Ebibono ebyo byaleetera abatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya ohweŋuluŋunya, olwohuba galoma ati, “Ndiise ehyohulya ehyaŋwa mwigulu.”
6.42: Nga baloma baati, “Ono sinje Yesu, omusaani wa Yosefu, oyu humanyire nyina ni semwana abamusaala? Ŋaahani geema huhi ohuloma ati gaŋwa mwigulu?”
6.43: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Mulehere aŋo ohweŋuluŋunya mwabeene nʼabeene.
6.44: Ŋabula aŋanga ohuuja eyi ndi hu lulwe ohutusaho nga Bbaabba omwene amuleetire. Era keesi hiisi owuuja ndimulamusa hu ludaalo lwʼekomerero.
6.45: Hyaŋandiihiwa mu bitabo byʼabanaabbi hiiti, ‘Hatonda gaaja husomesa hiisi muutu. Hiisi aŋulira ebya Bbaabba era gaŋamba ebi amuloma, afugiirira ebyange.’
6.46: Ŋabula owaali nʼaweeneho Bbaabba ohutusaho oyo owaŋwa mwigulu ewa Hatonda.”
6.47: “Mbalomera ehituufu ti, oyo owufugiirira ali nʼobulamu obutaŋwaŋo.
6.49: Abasehulu benywe balya emaanu mu lulafu aye baahena baafa.
6.50: Aye ehyohulya ehiŋwa mwigulu cʼehino ehi muutu alya ndaafe.
6.51: Ndiise ehyohulya ehiŋwa mwigulu ehireeta obulamu. Hiisi alya hu hyʼohulya hino aliba mulamu emirembe nʼemirembe. Ehyohulya ehyo njʼomubiri gwange, ogu ndiŋayo ohuleetera abaatu obulamu obutaŋwaŋo.”
6.52: Ngʼaŋo abatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya bahiŋahania nʼobusambuha ni baloma baati, “Omusinde ono aŋanga atye ohutuŋa omubiri gugwe ohulya?”
6.53: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Mbalomera ehituufu ti, ohutusaho nga muliiye omubiri gwʼOmwana wʼOmuutu era mwanywa amafugi gage simuŋanga huba nʼobulamu obutaŋwaŋo.
6.54: Hiisi alya omubiri gwange era ganywa amafugi gange ali nʼobulamu obutaŋwaŋo era ndimulamusa hu ludaalo olwʼekomerero.
6.55: Olwohuba omubiri gwange hyʼohulya ehyene nʼehyene era amafugi gange cʼehyohunywa ehyene nʼehyene.
6.56: Hiisi alya omubiri gwange, ganywa nʼamafugi gange, asigala nʼali bulala ni neese.
6.57: Ngʼolu Bbaabba omwene huutuma agaba obulamu, keesi ndi mulamu hu lulwe. Era mu ngeri njʼenyene ni nooyo alya omubiri gwange gahena ganywa amafugi gange aba mulamu hu lwange.
6.58: Ndiise ehyohulya ehiŋwa mwigulu. Abasehulu benywe balya emaanu bahena baafa aye oyo alya ehyohulya hino aliba mulamu emirembe nʼemirembe.”
6.59: Yesu galoma ebibono ebyo nʼali husomesa mu humbaaniro lyʼAbayudaaya e Kaperanawumu. Bangi baleheraŋo ohugendanga ni Yesu
6.60: Bangi hu beegi ba Yesu ni baŋulira ebibono ebyo, nga baloma baati, “Esomesa eyo ngumu yahutegeera. Njʼani aŋanga ohuyifugiirira?”
6.61: Yesu ni gafaania ati abeegi babe baali beŋuluŋunya olwʼebi gaali nʼalomire, ngʼababuusa ati, “Olwo ebindomire bibaheniremo amaani?
6.62: Ne hiriba hiitye ni mulibona Omwana wʼOmuutu ni gagamayo mwigulu eyi gaaŋwa!
6.63: Omwoyo wa Hatonda aleetera abaatu ohuba nʼobulamu obutaŋwaŋo; aye omuutu hu buwe ŋaŋuma ehi asobola. Ebibono ebi mbalomera bireeta obulamu obutaŋwaŋo.
6.64: Aye abandi hu nywe simufugiirira.” Yesu galoma atyo olwohuba hu huŋwera erala mu hutandiha, gamanya abo abaali ni batamufugiirira era ni nooyo owaali nʼaja humulyamo oluhwe.
6.65: Nga geyongera abaloma ati, “Cʼehigira nabaloma ti ŋabula aŋanga ohufugiirira ohutusaho Bbaabba nʼamuŋaaye amaani.”
6.66: Ohuŋwa hulwo bangi hu abeegi babe bamwabulira era balehera aŋo ohugendanga ni naye.
6.67: Ngʼaŋo Yesu abuusa abeegi babe ehumi nʼababiri ati, “Enywe mwesi mwenda hunjabulira?”
6.68: Nga Simooni Peetero amugobolamo ati, “Musengwa, hunaaje ŋeena? Ndiiwe ali nʼebibono ebireeta obulamu obutaŋwaŋo.
6.69: Humanyire era hufugiirira huuti ndiiwe Omwawufu owaŋwa ewa Hatonda.”
6.70: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Sindiise owabatobola enywe ehumi nʼababiri? Ne mulala hu nywe Sitaani mulamba.”
6.71: (Ehyo gahiroma nʼategeesa Yuda omusaani wa Simooni Yisikaryoti, olwohuba njʼowaali nʼaja ohumulyamo oluhwe wayire nga gaali mulala hu ehumi nʼababiri.)

7.1: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, nga Yesu agenderanga mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya, nʼatambuha huja mu lyʼe Buyudaaya olwohuba Abayudaaya baali basala amagesi ohumwita.
7.2: Aye Embaga yʼAbayudaaya eyi balanga baati Embaga eyomu busisira ni yaali ni yiri huupi ohwola,
7.3: ngʼabaganda ba Yesu bamuloma baati, “Koni soonatiine mu twale lyʼe Buyudaaya, abeegi babo bahebonera ebyamaliholiho ebi ohola?
7.4: Koni soomanyire oti hiisi owenda abaatu bamumanye, sigehwehahweha nʼebi ahola? Ngʼolu ohola ebyamaliholiho, leha ehyalo hyosihyosi hihwebonere.”
7.5: Abaganda babe baaloma baatyo olwohuba baali sibafugiirira baati Hatonda njʼowamutuma.
7.6: Olwʼehyo, nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Ehiseera hyange ohyʼohutiina hu Mbaga hihiiri hwola aye eyiri enywe, hiisi hiseera hiba hiraŋi omuutu ohuhola ehi aba ni genda.
7.7: Abaatu sibaŋanga hubacaawa aye ese bacaawa olwohuba mbalomera amazima ti ebibahola bibi.
7.8: Enywe mutiine hu Mbaga, ese sindi hutiinayo hatyane olwohuba ese ebiseera byange ebyʼohutiina eyo bihiiri hwola.”
7.9: Ni gahena ohuloma atyo, nga niye asigalaho enyuma mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya.
7.10: Abaganda babe ni bahena ohutiina hu Mbaga, nga Yesu yeesi alondaho aye mu ngiso.
7.11: Mu hiseera ehyo, abatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya baali bamudaha hu Mbaga, ni bebuusa baati, “Omusinde nago ali ŋe?”
7.12: Ngʼaŋo owaama obumuŋambaho butagiha ohubitabitana mu baatu hu Mbaga. Balala hu bo ni baloma baati, “Omusinde oyo mulaŋi.” Abandi baati, “Bbe, abbaamya abaatu.”
7.13: Aye olwʼohutya abatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya abaaliŋo, ŋaŋuma owʼamulomaho ehiitu hyosihyosi mu lwijuuye. Yesu asomehesa hu Mbaga
7.14: Aŋa Embaga eŋambira omwamba, Yesu gatiina mu lunya lwa Yekaalu, gatandiha ohusomesa.
7.15: Engeri eyi gasomesamo yeŋunjisa abatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya, nga bebuusa baati, “Omusinde oyo, gatusa ŋeena amagesi gano ate nga ko saasomanga mu masomero geefe?”
7.16: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Ebisomesa sibyange hu wange aye byʼoyo owaatuma.
7.17: Hiisi owenda ohuhola ebi Hatonda asiima, aja hutegeera oba ebisomesa biŋwa ewa Hatonda, oba byange hu wange.
7.18: Hiisi aloma hu lulwe aba geyendulira bibye hu wuwe aye oyo aloma ebyʼoyo owamutuma aba aholerera eŋono lyʼowamutuma era aloma byʼamazima, saaloma byʼobudulingi.
7.19: Kaho Musa sigabaŋa magambi ga Hatonda, ale hu nywe njʼani agaŋamba? Mubanga ni mugaŋamba hani simunesoomera hunjita.”
7.20: Ngʼaŋo ehiŋindi hyʼabaatu himugobolamo hiiti, “Ewe kooji emisambwa jihubandire! Njʼani ali huhwesoomera ohuhwita?”
7.21: Nga Yesu abagobolamo ati, “Nahola ehyamaliholiho hirala hyonyene aye olwohuba nʼahihola lwa Sabbaato, mwesimwesi mwesisimula.
7.22: Cooka olwohuba Musa gabalagira ohuhomola (wayire sihwatandihira hu niye aye hu basehulu benywe), muhomola abaana nohu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato.
7.23: Obanga muhomola omwana hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato ohwoseresa amagambi aga baŋa Musa, lwahiina munyiigira olwʼohuŋonehesya erala omuutu hu ludaalo olwa Sabbaato?
7.24: Mulehere aŋo ohusala emisango ni mwema hu bimubona hu mugulu. Hiraŋi ohuŋonia omuutu oyo oba bbe? Musale omusango ogwo bulaŋi hubone.” Yesu nje Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate
7.25: Aŋo paŋa balala hu baatu bomu Yerusaalemu batandihira ohwebuusa baati, “Ono sinje omusinde oyu besoomera ohwita?
7.26: Njʼono ali ŋano mu lwijuuye aye ŋaŋuma ehi bamulomaho. Abatangirisi beefe bahifaanisye baati nje Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu?
7.27: Ne omusinde ono efe humanyire eyi aŋwera, ate nga Kurisito nʼaliija, ŋaŋuma alimanya eyi aliŋwera.”
7.28: Yesu ni gaali nʼahisomehesa mu lunya lwa Yekaalu, ngʼaŋulira ni baloma baatyo. Ngʼaŋo adundaho ejanjaasi alangirira ati, “Wayire muŋeega muuti muumanyire era mumanyire nʼeyi pwera aye sindi ŋano hu lwange. Hatonda owʼamazima njʼomwene hutuma. Enywe simumumanyire,
7.29: aye ese mumanyire olwohuba nʼaŋwa eyi ali era njʼowaatuma.”
7.30: Balala hu bo ni baŋulira ebyo, nga benda ohumuŋamba aye ŋaŋuma owahihola olwohuba ehiseera hihye ehyʼohufa hyali hihiiri hwola.
7.31: Cooka era bangi mu hibbubbu hyʼabaatu abaaliŋo bafugiirira ebibye, baloma baati, “Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu nʼaliija, alihola obubonero oweŋunjisa obuhira obu ono ahola?”
7.32: Ngʼaŋo Abafalisaayo baŋulira abaatu ni baŋweŋweta ebibono ebyo hu Yesu. Ngʼabatangirisi bʼabasengi batuma abahuumi ba Yekaalu ohumuŋamba.
7.33: Nga Yesu abaloma ati, “Nja huhena ahamanga hatono ni nenywe, kene nagame eyiri oyo owaatuma.
7.34: Muja hunyendula aye ni mutambona olwohuba simuŋanga huuja eyi ndi hutiina.”
7.35: Ngʼaŋo abatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya bebuusa abeene nʼabeene baati, “Omusinde ono genda hutiina ŋeena eyi hutaligobolayo humubona? Genda hutiina asomese Abatali Bayudaaya, eyi baatu beefe basalanihira?
7.36: Ategeesa hi ohuloma ati, ‘Muja hunyendula aye simuja humbona era simuŋanga huuja eyi ndi hutiina?’ ” Esulo jʼamaaji agaleeta obulamu obutaŋwaŋo
7.37: Aŋa Embaga enyinyitirira, hu ludaalo olusembayo, ko njʼoluhirira erala obubbala, Yesu genyoha galangirira ati, “Hiisi oyu enduŋo eruma gaaje eyi ndi, anywe amaaji agaleeta obulamu obutaŋwaŋo.
7.38: Owufugiirira ngʼolu hyaŋandiihiwa hiroma, ‘Esulo ejʼamaaji agaleeta obulamu obutaŋwaŋo jihulumuta ohuŋwa mu mwoyo gugwe.’ ”
7.39: Yesu galoma atyo nʼategeesa Omwoyo Omutukuvu oyu abamufugiirira baali ni baja husuna. Mu hiseera ehyo, baali bahiiri hubaŋa Mwoyo olwohuba Hatonda gaali ahiiri hulamusa Yesu.
7.40: Abaatu ni baŋulira ebibono ebyo, ngʼabalala hu bo baloma baati, “Hituufu ono nje naabbi oyu baaloma baati aja huuja.”
7.41: Ngʼabandi baloma baati, “Ono nje Kurisito oyu bafuujaho amate ohunoŋola abaatu.” Aye abandi nga baloma baati, “Dala oyo oyu bafuujaho amate aŋanga atye ohuŋwa mu twale lyʼe Galilaaya?
7.42: Ehyaŋandiihiwa sihiroma hiiti Kurisito oyu bafuujaho aja huŋwa mu lulyo lwa Dawudi era aliba musaale wʼe Bbeserekemu ehibuga eyi basala Dawudi?”
7.43: Olwʼohutaŋambagana hu bibaali ni baloma hu Yesu, babuhanamo.
7.44: Era abandi baali benda ohumuŋamba aye ŋaŋuma owahihola. Ohutafugiirira hwʼabatangirisi bʼAbayudaaya
