11.5: Aye sipeega ti abo abeeranga abahwenda abahihenaho bali nʼehibaakira.
11.6: Pangire ohuba ni taali mulomilomi mulaŋi, ne abo sibaakira humanya amazima era mu hiisi ngeri ehyo hwahibahahasa bulaŋi.
11.7: Ni nababuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi ohuŋwa eyiri Hatonda, sinabasasulisa. Olwo ko muŋeega muuti obuhwenda obu nabalomera waali buŋumamo samuuna? Oba nahola hibi ohweyisa tyo?
11.8: Ni naali eyo ni mbaholamo omulimo, nali hyʼonyaga ebibbubbu byʼabafugiirira Kurisito ebindi, olwohuba mbebi nasunangamo obuyeedi mu hifo hyʼohubusuna mu enywe.
11.9: Era ni naali eyo, ni ŋabangaŋo ehi nenda, ŋaŋumanga wayire mulala hu enywe oyu nasitoŋereranga olwohuba abalebe abʼe Makedoniya bandeeteranga obuyeedi. Nehuumanga ohutaba nʼengeri yosiyosi eyʼohusitoŋolera muutu yesiyesi era nja hweyongera ohutabasitoŋerera.
11.10: Mu hino ŋaŋuma muutu yesiyesi mu twale lyʼAkaya aja hundobera ohwepaaha olwohuba ŋaŋuma ehi ndicuusamo ohufugiirira obuyeedi ohuŋwa eyi muli. Era ehi ndoma njʼamazima mu siina lya Kurisito ali mu bulamu wange.
11.11: Mutaŋeega muuti hino kiroma olwohuba simbenda. Mu butuufu ni Hatonda yeesi amanyire ati mbenda.
11.12: Wabula nja hutiina mu moni nʼohutanaaŋa obuyeedi wenywe olwʼohwenda ohusimya abo aberanga abahwenda bataba nʼehi bemaho ohwepaaha nʼohutwegerageraniaho.
11.13: Abaatu abo abeeranga abahwenda bakuyakuyi era mu bukuyakuyi waawe beranga ohuba bahwenda ba Kurisito.
11.14: Era ehyo sihyeŋunjisa, olwohuba ni Sitaani yeesi gefuula ohuba malayika owʼenjase.
11.15: Mu ngeri njʼenyene sihyeŋunjisa abaŋeeresa babe ohwefuula ohuba abaŋeeresa abahola ebiruŋamu. Ne hu komerero baja husuna ehibonereso ehisaana ebikolwa byawe. Ohubonaabona hwa Pawulo ngʼomuhwenda
11.16: Ngʼolu kenire ohuhiroma nindi hambagoboleremo: Mutaŋeega muuti ndi musiru. Aye ni muba ni muŋeega muutyo, kale mupire hyʼomusiru keesi nepaaheho.
11.17: Ohwepaaha hwange huno, sihuŋwa yiwa Musengwa aye kihola ngʼomusiru.
11.18: Ngʼolu bangi bepaaha olwʼebibaholire, keesi hanepaaheho.
11.19: Olwohuba muli bagesi ehihena njʼehigima ni mwehaliriha ebibono byʼabasiru abo?
11.20: Dala ndimufayo omuutu ohubafuula abeedu babe oba ohubanyaga, oba ohubacuuhisa ŋano ni naŋala, oba ohubeeba lubona?
11.21: Kale handome ti swaye olwohuba sihwaŋanga hubahola hyʼabo. Aye ŋanabaŋo owepaaha mu hiitu hyosihyosi, keesi nja hwepaaha era hino kiroma hyʼomusiru.
11.22: Abepaaha abo sibaloma mbo Mubbebbulaniya? Keesi ndi Mwebbulaniya. Baloma baati mbo Bayisirayiri? Keesi ndi Muyisirayiri. Baloma baati mbo bejuhulu ba Yibbulayimu? Keesi ndi mwijuhulu wa Yibbulayimu.
11.23: Kaho baloma baati mbo baŋeeresa ba Kurisito? Oba ndi huloma hyʼomulalu. Ese kolire emirimo ohubahira. Basidihire mu komera emirundi mingi ohubahira. Emirundi mingi batiinire ni bakubba bugali ohubahira era punyire hu hufa emirundi mingi.
11.24: Emirundi etaanu, Abayudaaya bakubba esimbo amahumi adatu namwenda.
11.25: Emirundi edatu ni batambisa oluga, lulala baakubba amabaale era emirundi edatu eryato omu naali ni gendera lyabwagiha nahena omuusi nʼowiire mu nyanja ŋaagati.
11.26: Mu ngendo jange enyingi eji ngendire, ponire enjabi ohundya, abeebi, ebigosi ebi Bayudaaya bahyange ko nʼAbatali Abayudaaya banjohiseho. Ponire ebigosi mu bibuga nomu byalo, mu nyanja ko nʼabaatu aberanga mbo balebe mu Kurisito.
11.27: Fululuhene ni fabina bugali ni kola omuusi nʼowiire ohweyemeresaŋo era ebiseera bingi ni talimba hwiro. Enjala nʼenduŋo birumire hu ese emirundi mingi. Embeŋo efuuŋire hu ese ni puma hyahwedanya hu magumba.
11.28: Ebyo nʼobitaaye hu tulo, hiisi ludaalo pulira ni nyigirisiwa nʼomugugu ogwʼohulabirira ebibbubbu byʼabafugiirira Kurisito byosibyosi.
11.29: Njʼani aŋwamo amaani, ndi ndumwa? Njʼani ahemewa gaagwa mu hibi, nasihinduma?
11.30: Nimba wa hwepaaha, nja hwepaaha olwʼebyo ebiraga obunafu wange.
11.31: Hatonda era Semwana wa Musengwa weefe Yesu Kurisito, oyu baatu bali nʼohuŋa eŋono emirembe nʼemirembe, amanyire ati sindulinga.
11.32: Ni naali mu hibuga Damasiko, gavana oyu habaha Areete gataŋo, galagira abasirikale babe ohuhuuma ehibuga ehyo butiribiri bapambe,
11.33: aye abahyange nga baata mu gunaaba nga banjihisa mu dinisa eryali mu hiteepe ehyali ni hyeswanigirisa ehibuga, nga punuha.

12.1: Ŋaahani leha nindi nepaahe wayire nga ŋaŋuma ehi higasa. Leha mbalomere ebiŋamba hu hwolesewa nohu biitu ebi Musengwa weefe Yesu Kurisito gaakwehulira.
12.2: Emyaha ehumi neene ejibitireŋo, Hatonda gaaŋira mulala hu abafugiirira Kurisito, mwigulu eryohudatu. Era omuutu oyo mumanyire ne simanyire oba hyaliŋo nʼahiiri mulamu oba hwali hwolesewa aye Hatonda omwene njʼamanyire.
12.3: Ese manyire ti omuutu oyo oba gaali ahiiri mulamu oba bbe, ehyo Hatonda omwene njʼamanyire,
12.4: ese ehi manyire hiri ti bamuŋira mu hifo ehyʼohwesiima. Ni goola eyo, gaŋulira ebibono ebi muutu atasobola hunyonyola era aŋuma lukusa ohubiroosa.
12.5: Kale nja hwepaaha olwebyola hu muutu oyo aye sinja hwepaaha olwʼebyo ebipambaho ohutusaho obunafu wange.
12.6: Ate nindi wayire saalaŋo ohwepaaha, sihiba ni hiraga hiiti ndi musiru olwohuba gahali mazima. Aye sinabijemo olwohuba sinenda muutu yesiyesi ohumbona mu hifaananyi ehindi ohuhiraho ehyʼebyo ebi kola oba ebi ndoma.
12.7: Aye Hatonda olwʼohwenda tehudumbasa olwʼebiitu ebyeŋunjisa ebi nabona, gaasyoha oluŋwa mu mubiri lungudye. Oluŋwa olwo, njʼomuhwenda wa Sitaani.
12.8: Era efunda edatu negalihira Musengwa weefe gaponie obulumi owo.
12.9: Aye gangobolamo ati, “Ehisasabirisi hyange hihuhena olwohuba amaani gange gabonehera mu bunafu.” Olwʼehyo nja hwepaaha olwʼobunafu wange ko obuŋangi wa Kurisito bubonehere mu ese.
12.10: Ehyo cʼehigima hulwa Kurisito naaba musangaafu olwʼobunafu wange, nolu abaatu banduha, nolu mba mu bigosi, nolu bakiyaania, nolu mbonaabona olwohuba nimba munafu aŋo ko mba ndi wʼamaani. Obuuti obu Pawulo ali ni nawo olwʼesambo jʼAbakoriiso
12.11: Fuuhire hyʼomusirusiru aye ndinywe omundeteeye ohwebisya tyo. Mwahali musiima olwohuba abahwenda aberanga abʼamaani abo sibaakira wayire nga puma aŋa ndi.
12.12: Ni naali eyo, mu hugumikiriza ohwʼamaani nahola obubenero oweŋunjisa ko nʼebyamaliholiho ohubalaga ti ndi muhwenda omutuufu.
12.13: Ebibbubbu byʼabafugiirira Kurisito ebindi bibahira mu ngeri hi? Ohutusaho ti nibo nabasunganga obuyeedi aye enywe bbe. Musoniŋe olwʼohubaleha ebulafu mwihyo.
12.14: Ŋaahani netegehire ohubahyalira omulundi ogwohudatu, cooka era sinja hubasitoŋerera. Hiri hiityo olwohuba simbendaho byenywe aye nenda myoyo jenywe. Muhimanyire bulaŋi muuti muli baana bange. Ne abaana sinje ababiihiraho abasaaye baawe aye abasaaye njʼabalabirira abaana baawe.
12.15: Nja huba musangaafu ohuŋaayo ebyange byosibyosi era keesi neŋeereyo erala hu lwenywe. Wayire nga mbenda bugali, enywe munyenda hamooyomooyo.
12.16: Muhimanyire muuti sinabasitoŋerera aye abandi hu enywe baŋeega baati mbo ndi mukuyakuyi era nabadulinganga.
12.17: Ne ehyo nahiholanga mu ngeri hi? Mu abo aba nabatumiranga, mulimo oyu nʼatambisa ohubalyakula?
12.18: Nasunga Tito ohuuja eyi muli era gaaja nʼomulebe owundi. Ŋaliŋo ehi Tito gabalyakula? Episa yange nʼeyiye sinje enyene era sihuli nʼehigendererwa hirala?
12.19: Oba muŋeega muuti huli hweŋoomya hweŋoomya mu moni jenywe? Efe, mu moni ja Hatonda huloma ngʼolu Kurisito genda hulome era hiisi ehi huhola huhihola olwʼohubayeeda.
12.20: Tya ohuuja eyo mbagaane ni mutali ngʼolu nenda mube era mwesi mumbone ni tali mu hifaananyi ehi musuubiriramo. Tya ohuuja mbagaanemo obuyoga, egongi, obusungu, ohwesalasalamo obubbubbu, owiimi, ohuŋahana esiro, ohugeyana, ohwehudumbasa nʼohwetabujula.
12.21: Era tya ti ni nahaaje, esoni jiripamba mu moni ja Hatonda wange, ehyo hindetere ohulira amangi olwʼabangi hu enywe, ŋanyuma aŋo abaahola ebibi ndibebbwaga ebibi ebi bahola, omuli ohwejabaata nʼobuhwedi nʼohuba nʼemoni enyangu.

13.1: Guno guja huba mulundi gwohudatu ohuuja eyo ohubahyalira. Ehyaŋandiihiwa hiroma hiiti “Hiisi songa bayihahasenga ni ŋaliŋo obujulizi owʼabaatu babiri oba badatu.”
13.2: Ni nabahyalira efunda eyohubiri nalabula abo abaahola ebibi ko ni naabo bosibosi abali hubbenga. Era wayire sindi ni nenywe, ngobolamo ohubalabula ti ni nahaaje, ŋaŋuma muutu abbenga oyu ndisasira.
13.3: Ehyo kiroma olwohuba mwenda ahabonero ahahahasa haati Kurisito aloma nʼabita mu ese. Muhimanye muuti Kurisito simunafu aye ali nʼamaani agʼohubahangafula.
13.4: Wayire sigalaga ati wʼamaani ni baali ni bamuhomerera hu musalabba aye olwʼamaani ga Hatonda ŋaahani mulamu. Hwesi mu ye Hatonda atuŋa amaani ohubaholamo omulimu gugwe wayire abandi baloma mbo huli banafu mu malomere.
13.5: Hiisi muutu gehebere omwene abone hanye ahiiri mu hufugiirira. Simumanyire muuti Yesu Kurisito ali mu enywe? Ohutusaho nga mwenda hwendulinga!
13.6: Suubira ti muja huhifaania muuti efe ngʼabahwenda abatuufu aba Kurisito, sibituhayanga.
13.7: Husaba Hatonda abayeede muleheŋo ohuhola ebibi, silwa hwenda huboneha oti hwabaholamo omulimo omulaŋi aye enywe muhole ebiraŋi, ngʼolu hiboneha oti efe hwalemererwa.
13.8: Hiri hiityo olwohuba sihuŋanga huhola ehiitu ehihingirira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi, ohutusaho ohubona huuti hugasoolerera.
13.9: Husangaala ni batubona baati huli banafu aye enywe ni muli bagumu mu hufugiirira. Olwʼehyo hubasabira mube badimamu.
13.10: Hino njʼehigima ni mba ni tali ni nenywe mbaŋandiihira ni mbaloma ebiitu bino, ko hibe ti ni nijire eyo taba wʼehabyo ni tambisa obuŋangi obu Musengwa gaapa ohubayeeda, sosi hubasihiirisa. Obuheese
13.11: Aboluganda, ni keneresa mweraba. Mufube ohuba badimamu mu hufugiirira, mute omwoyo hu bimbalomire, muholenga hirala, mumenye mu miyaaya nʼabahyenywe era Hatonda atulaga ohwenda era atuŋa emiyaaya, anaabenga ni nenywe.
13.12: Hiisi muutu aheese owahye mu keesa eyʼabaatu abagwalaafu.
13.14: Ehisasabirisi hya Musengwa Yesu Kurisito nʼohwenda hwa Hatonda, nʼobulala owʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu, bibenga ni nenywe mwesimwesi.

1.1: Ndiise Pawulo omuhwenda wa Kurisito abaŋandiihira enywe abafugiirira Kurisito abali mu twale lyʼe Galatiya. Ese Pawulo sindi muhwenda olwohuba ti abaatu batobola oba omuutu obuutu ohuutuma. Aye ndi muhwenda olwohuba Yesu Kurisito ni Hatonda Seefe owamulamusa, njʼabanyangala era baatuma.
1.2: Ese ko nʼabalebe bosibosi mu Kurisito abali ŋano hubahehiiseho enywe ebibbubbu byʼabafugiirira Kurisito mu Galatiya,
1.3: Hatonda Seefe ni Musengwa Yesu Kurisito babaŋambire ehisasabirisi era babaŋe emiyaaya.
1.4: Yesu Kurisito oyo olwʼohugera hwa Hatonda era Seefe, geŋaayo bamwita hu lwʼebibi byefe atunoŋole mu mulembe guno omubi.
1.5: Ale abaatu baŋenga Hatonda oyo eŋono emirembe nʼemirembe, Amiina. Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi amatuufu
1.6: Bahyange, hikenire efiiri hu mutwe ohuba ti musenguhire ohuŋwa hu Hatonda owabalanga mufuuhe baana babe olwʼehisasabirisi hya Kurisito oyu mwahafugiiriranga, mangumangu mwabbaamira hu somesa eyindi eyi babadulinga baati mbo yoosi maŋuliro malaŋi,
1.7: ate nga ko panaŋo. Ehihulu hiri hiiti ŋaliŋo abaatu abali hubaŋwitania olwʼohwenda ohuhoohera ebyawe mu Maŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu Yesu Kurisito.
1.8: Aye ŋanabaŋo omuutu agesyaho ohubabuulira obuhwenda obundi obutali owo obu hwabaleetera oludaayi, omuutu oyo nʼolwaba mulala hu fe abahwenda oba malayika ohuŋwa mwigulu, Hatonda amusyenanga!
1.9: Ngʼolu hwahena ohubalomera, nindi kigobolamo ti, hanye ŋaliŋo omuutu ali hugesyaho ohubabuulira obuhwenda obundi owenjabulo hu bula obu mwafugiirira, Hatonda amusyenanga!
1.10: Bino simbiroma olwʼohwenda ohweŋomya eyiri abaatu wabula olwʼohwenda Hatonda asiime ebi kola. Olwohuba singa kola ogwʼohweŋomya eyiri abaatu, aŋo mba sipanga huba muŋeeresa wa Kurisito owolereeye. Engeri eyi Pawulo gafuuhamo Omuhwenda wa Yesu
1.11: Aboluganda, nenda mumanye hino ti Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi aga ndomera abaatu sigahuseega buseege.
1.12: Sinagasuna huŋwa hu muutu yesiyesi oba ti omuutu njʼowasomesa, ohutusaho Yesu Kurisito omwene njʼowagambwihulira.
1.13: Manyire ti mwaŋulira ebiŋamba hu bulamu wange ni naali ni kiiri mu diini lyʼEhiyudaaya era ngʼolu nahiyaanianga ehibbubbu hyʼabafugiirira Kurisito aba Hatonda gaali nʼahenire ohutongosa era ngʼolu nagesyaho ohubisihiirisa.
1.14: Ebiŋamba hu bumanyi owʼediini lyʼEhiyudaaya naali netemaho mutwe era ni ŋaŋuma wa muwoolo gwange owaali ni gapunyamo era ni nenda abaatu bosibosi baŋambe obulombolombo wʼabasehulu beefe.
1.15: Cooka Hatonda mu hisasabirisi hihye owanjabula ni kiiri nomu hida hya maama, olwʼohusiima huhwe gananga tambe omulimo gugwe,
1.16: era gaamanyisa ebiŋamba hu Yesu Omwana wuwe olwʼohwenda mbiromere Abatali Bayudaaya. Hino natandiha ohuhihola aŋabula hwendula bumanyi eyiri omuutu yesiyesi.
1.17: Sinatiina wayire nomu hibuga Yerusaalemu eyiri abaneherera ohuba abahwenda mbebuuseho aye nenyoheramo natiina mu twale lyʼe Buŋarabbu eyi naŋwa oluvanyuma nga tiina mu hibuga Damasiko.
1.18: Ni ŋabitaŋo emyaha edatu, nga ko tiina e Yerusaalemu ohumanyana ni Peetero aye yeesi nahena ni naye endaalo ehumi nʼetaanu jooŋene.
1.19: Ni naali eyo ŋabula muhwenda owundi oyu nabonanaho ni naye ohutusaho Yakobbo mulebe ya Yesu Musengwa.
1.20: Mu mazima ameene aga Hatonda ebindoma bino sibyabudulingi.
1.21: Ni naŋwa e Yerusaalemu natiina mu matwale gʼe Siriya nʼe Kilikiya.
1.22: Mu hiseera ehyo abaatu abahira obungi mu bibbubbu byʼabafugiirira Kurisito abomu twale lya Buyudaaya baali bahiiri huumanya.
1.23: Baali baŋulira huŋulira efuma yʼebipambaho ebi baatu babalomeranga baati, “Omusinde ola owatuhiyaanianga leero yeesi abuulira abaatu bafugiirire ebyo ebi gaŋahanianga nʼatenda abaatu babifugiirire.”
1.24: Era nga bajumirya Hatonda olwʼebyali ni binjolireho.

2.1: Oluvanyuma ni ŋabitaŋo emyaha ehumi nʼene, nindi naagamayo e Yerusaalemu. Hu mulundi guno natiina nʼowahyange Bbalunaba, ko ni Tito yeesi.
2.2: Hu luno natiinayo olwohuba Hatonda omwene gambwihulira ati tiineyo era ni noola neheerera hwegeyamo nʼabatangirisi babafugiirira nabanyonyola obuhwenda obu ndomera Abatali Bayudaaya. Ehyo nʼahihola olwʼohweŋendeherera ti hamunga omulimo ogu naali ni kola baŋanga ohugugaana ni baloma baati mbo ebisomesa sibituufu.
2.3: Wayire njʼeyaali ekola yaawe, hu mulundi ogwo abatangirisi sibaŋalirisa hya huhomola Tito wayire nga gaali Muyonaani olwohuba baafugiirira baati yeesi gaafugiirira Yesu,
2.4: ate nga ko ŋaaliŋo abaatu abandi abaali ni bahyendire. Abaatu abo baali batwepaatihiremo ni beranga bahyefe cooka nga ehi baliho hya hutulega hya mu hanwa nʼohwenda ohutwemera mu dembe eri Yesu Kurisito gaatuŋa batwagamyeyo mu wiidu wʼobulombolombo wʼEhiyudaaya.
2.5: Ne efe hwahatala ndihubadembuhiraho kadi naŋadiidiri olwʼohwenda enywe muganyulwe mu hituufu ehi Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi galoma.
2.6: Abo aba nibo balanga baati njʼabahihenaho, ate nga hu lwange ehyo sihihulu olwohuba Hatonda abona ebyʼomugati njʼatusinga ohumanya, baŋuma ehi bameedaho hu buhwenda obu ndomera abaatu.
2.7: Ohutusaho ti bahifaania baati Hatonda gaali gapambisye omulimo ogwʼohulomera Abatali Bayudaaya Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi, ngʼolu gaŋambya Peetero ogwʼohulomera Abayudaaya.
2.8: Olwohuba Hatonda owaali nʼatambisa Peetero ohuhola omulimo gwʼobuhwenda eyiri Abayudaaya abahomole, keesi njʼowaali ni gatambisa mu mulimo ogwʼohuba omuhwenda wuwe eyiri Abatali Bayudaaya.
2.9: Era ehyo hyaleetera Yakobbo ni Peetero ni Yowaane aba bamanyire baati njʼesiiro jʼabafugiirira ohufaania baati hwesi olwʼehisasabirisi hya Hatonda hwali humuŋeeresa njʼehyene era baahena baŋamba ese ni Bbalunaba mu ngalo ohulaga obulala. Bahena bafugiirisania baati efe hutiine mu moni nʼohulomera Abatali Bayudaaya Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi nibo bagalomere Abayudaaya abahomole.
2.10: Ohutusaho ti batusunga ohutebirira hudulumiriranga abafugiirira abomu Yerusaalemu abaali abagadi. Ne ehyo keesi naali muheneerefu ohuhihola. Pawulo anenya Peetero
2.11: Ebyo ni byaŋwa, ni naali mu hibuga Atiyokiya, ŋaaliŋo olu Peetero gaajayo namuhayula mu lwijuuye olwʼehigodami ehi gaahola.
2.12: Ŋaahani ŋaaliŋo abaatu abaaŋwa eyiri Yakobbo mu Yerusaalemu batiina mu Atiyokiya. Ne ni baali ni bahiiri huuja, Peetero galyanga ŋalala nʼAbatali Bayudaaya. Aye abaatu abo ni boola, nga Peetero gefudula mu ndya olwʼohutya ehi abaatu abo abaali ni bawagira ehyʼohuhomola Abatali Bayudaaya banamulomeho olwʼohulya ŋalala nʼabatali bahomole.
2.13: Abayudaaya abandi boosi nga bamweŋimbaho era ohwefudula hwawe hwaŋalula ni Bbalunaba yeesi gabbaama.
2.14: Ni nabona ehibaholire ni hitali ŋalala nʼehituufu ehi Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi galoma, nga kayula Peetero mu moni jaawe ni muloma ti, “Obanga ewe Omuyudaaya, sohironderesa magambi nʼobulombolombo wʼEhiyudaaya aye webisya hyʼAtali Muyudaaya, lwahiina oŋalirisa Abatali Bayudaaya ohuba ti babironderesa?”
2.15: Ohutafaana nʼaba balanga “Abatali Bayudaaya ababbengi” era abatoheresa magambi aga Hatonda gaŋambya Musa, efe hwasaaliwa ngʼAbayudaaya era hwahulira mu magambi ago.
2.16: Cooka ŋaahani huhimanyire huuti omuutu saaba mugwalaafu olwʼohwesiga ohwoheresa amagambi wabula olwʼohufugiirira Yesu Kurisito. Olwʼehyo hwesi Abayudaaya nʼAbatali Bayudaaya owesige hwabuta mu Yesu Kurisito ko batubale bagwalaafu olwʼohumufugiirira, sosi lwʼohwoheresa amagambi aga Hatonda gaŋambya Musa. Olwohuba ŋaŋuma muutu kadi mulala aŋanga ohufuuha omugwalaafu ni geesiga ohwoheresa amagambi ago.
2.17: “Abaatu batulanga baati huli babbengi” olwohuba hwata owesige weefe mu Kurisito hwalehaŋo obuteekateeka wʼEhiyudaaya. Ehyo hiraga hiiti Kurisito awagira omuutu huhola ebibi? Kadi naŋadiidiri!
2.18: Ehihulu hiri hiiti singa naagamayo nafugiirira ti Hatonda abala omuutu ohuba omugwalaafu hu lwʼohwoheresa ebi magambi galoma mba neragire ngʼolu ndi mubbengi aŋooye emirimo.
2.19: Ni nebona ndi hyʼomufu oyu magambi gataŋanga hubaho buŋangi cooka ni ndi mulamu hulwa Hatonda omwene. Ese bakomerera ni Kurisito.
2.20: Cooka ese samwene sindiise aŋuga obulamu wange ngʼolu hyabanga ahale. Ŋaahani Kurisito njʼabuŋuga era hiisi ehi kola, kihola ni nesiga Omwana wa Hatonda owanyenda geeŋaayo ohufa abe ŋongo ohununula obulamu wange.
2.21: Ni ndoma ehyo mba singaana hyere hya Hatonda eyi ndi. Aye ehi ndoma hiri ti singa Hatonda abala abaatu ohuba abagwalaafu hulwohwoheresa ebi magambi aga gaŋambya Musa galagira, ohufa hwa Kurisito huba huŋuma mahulu.

3.1: Enywe abafugiirira Kurisito abali mu twale lyʼe Galatiya lwahiina mwebisya hya baŋubeebe? Njʼani owabaloga ohuba baŋubeebe? Hiina ehi tabalomera hu biŋamba hu bi Yesu Kurisito gabaholera ni bamuhomerera hu musalabba?
3.2: Olwʼehyo ndi nahirala ehi nenda ohwega ohuŋwa eyi muli. Kaho Hatonda gabaŋa Omwoyo Omutukuvu olwʼohwoheresa magambi aga gaŋa Musa oba lwʼohufugiirira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu Yesu?
3.3: Hiina ehibaleetera ohuba hyabaŋubeebe ohwola aŋo? Olwo ŋaahani muŋeega muuti bikolwa byenywe njʼebiŋanga ohubayeeda ohuŋangala mu hufugiirira hwenywe? Mwoyo wa Hatonda njʼowabatangiriranga mu hutandiha aye ŋaahani muli hu byenywe.
3.4: Nga mwabonaabona bugali ni mwafugiirira Kurisito! Olwo ohubonaabona ohwo mwenda hubafe busa?
3.5: Hatonda ni gabaŋa Omwoyo wuwe gahena gaahola ebyamaliholiho, gahihola lwahuba mwali mwoheresa ebi magambi galoma ohuhola oba lwohuba mwafugiirira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi aga mwaŋulira?
3.6: Ale ŋaahani hahubonere hu Yibbulayimu. Hatonda gamubala ohuba mugwalaafu olwʼohufugiirira ebi gamuloma.
3.7: Muli nʼohuhimanya muuti abo abafugiirira ebya Hatonda booŋene mbaba babala ohuba abomu lulyo lwa Yibbulayimu.
3.8: Nʼehindi Hatonda omwene gahimanya ati Abatali Bayudaaya ni balimufugiirra alibabala ohuba abagwalaafu. Ehyo njʼehyagira gaaloma Yibbulayimu ati, “Amawanga gosigosi galisuna ekabi hu lwewe.”
3.9: Olwʼehisuubiso ehyo, Hatonda aŋa abaatu bosibosi ekabi, abafugiirira hya Yibbulayimu.
3.10: Abaatu bosibosi abesiga ohugendera mu magambi aga baŋambya Musa ko basune obuhoda eyiri Hatonda, bahiiri ŋaasi wʼehiruŋi hihye olwohuba hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti oyo ateegumya huhola hiisi hiitu ehi magambi galagira; Hatonda alimusyena.
3.11: Mu butuufu ŋaŋuma oyu Hatonda aŋanga ohubala ohuba omugwalaafu olwʼohwoheresa amagambi olwohuba sihiŋangiha hugoheeresa gosigosi. Hino cʼehigira hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, “Oyo ahola ebiruŋamu alibaŋo mulamu olwʼohufugiirira huhwe.”
3.12: Ohwoheresa amagambi ŋaŋuma aŋa hwediirira hu hwesiga Hatonda olwohuba hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, “Anegumyenga ohwoheresa amagambi nʼebiragiro anabengaŋo olwʼohubyoheresa.”
3.13: Aye ŋaahani Kurisito ni geeŋayo bamuhomerera hu musalabba hu lwefe, gatujoŋooyeho ehijoogi hyʼamagambi niye gahyefiiha. Hino kihahasa olwohuba hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, “Ehijoogi hya Hatonda hiri hu oyo oyu beeta ni bamubambire hu musaala.”
3.14: Kurisito gatununula mu ehijoogi hyʼohutoheeresa ebi magambi galagira, Abatali Bayudaaya boosi baŋange ohusuna ekabi eji Hatonda gaŋa Yibbulayimu. Era gendire ati olwʼohufugiirira Yesu Kurisito hwesihwesi aŋabula hubihisya husune ehisuubiso hyʼOmwoyo wuwe oyu gatusuubisa. Amagambi nʼehisuubiso
3.15: Ale ŋaahani boluganda, hambaŋe ehyʼohuboneraho ohuŋwa mu kolagana yeefe abaatu hu hyalo hino. Singa ŋabaŋo abaatu ababa ni baholire endagaano era baayita mu buŋandiihe, ŋabula muutu bundi aŋanga ohuyicuusa. Ehi ndi hulomaho hyosi hiityo pohiri.
3.16: Ehisuubiso hya Hatonda hyali eyiri Yibbulayimu nʼolusaaye lulwe. Sigaloma hu “saaye jije” ko ohuloma nʼahooheramo abaatu eduuli aye gamuloma ati, “olusaaye lulwo.” Galoma hu muutu mulala era omuutu oyo nʼali nje Kurisito.
3.17: Ehi ndi hugesyaho ohuloma hiri hiiti, amagambi aga Hatonda gaŋa Abayisirayiri ni ŋabitireŋo emyaha ebihumi bine nʼadatu oluvanyuma lwʼohuhola endagaano ni Yibbulayimu, sigabbwagaŋo ndagaano yiye ni Yibbulayimu.
3.18: Singa hiba hiiti Hatonda atuŋa ehi gatusuubisa lwʼohwoheresa magambi, ehyo hiba hiraga hiiti sahituŋa olwohuba gahitusuubisa. Cooka Hatonda niye olwʼehisasabirisi hihye gaŋa Yibbulayimu ehyo ehi gamusuubisa era ni neefe huutyo po atuŋa.
3.19: Ne ni hiba hiityo, hiina ehyene ehyagira Hatonda gataŋo amagambi? Gagataŋo gayeede ohulaga obubbengi wʼabaatu era gaali nʼohutamba ohwola hu huuja hwʼoyo oyu hisuubise hiromaho. Hatonda gaŋambya Musa amagambi nʼabita mu malayika ahole nga wakwenda wuwe agoose eyiri abaatu.
3.20: Wakwenda abaaŋo olwʼohuŋimba enjuyi eji hiŋambaho. Aye Hatonda gaali yeŋene nʼahola ehisuubiso.
3.21: Olwo ŋaahani hulome huuti amagambi aga Hatonda gaŋa Musa gabbwagaŋo ehisuubiso hihye? Kadi naŋadiidiri! Olwohuba hiba ni hiri hiityo hani omuutu asuna obulamu obutaŋwaŋo olwʼohwoheresa amagambi era hani omuutu alongoosa ekolagana yiye ni Hatonda olwʼohwoheresa amagambi ago.
3.22: Aye Ebyaŋandihiwa nibyo biroma biiti amaani gʼehibi gatuhaada hwesihwesi era hwaba hyʼabasibe abaŋuma bwecuuhise. Ehyo hiri hiityo hiŋeese abafugiirira Yesu Kurisito ehi Hatonda gasuubisa ohuŋa abaatu olwʼohufugiirira.
3.23: Ehiseera hyʼabaatu ohufugiirira Yesu ni hyali ni hihiiri hwola, amagambi ga Musa ago gaali gatuhaadire ni gatuhadaahise hyʼabasibe mu komera. Ehyo hiretere abaatu ohusuna esuubi eryohuba nʼedembe ohuŋwa mu busibe owo olwʼohufugiirira Yesu.
3.24: Ehiri ti Hatonda gataŋo amagambi gabe hya nyapala ohutulabirira ohwola hu huuja hwa Kurisito ko Hatonda atubale ohuba abagwalaafu olwʼohumufugiirira.
3.25: Ŋaahani Kurisito nʼahenire ohuuja, amagambi sigahiiri nyapala weefe ohutucuunganga. Huli baana ba Hatonda olwʼohumufugiirira
3.26: Olwʼohufugiirira Yesu Kurisito, mwesimwesi aŋaŋuma hubihisya mwafuuha baana ba Hatonda,
3.27: olwohuba enywe mwesimwesi abahena ohubatiziwa ohulaga muuti mwengira mu muhumba ni Kurisito ebikolwa byenywe bifaana hyʼebya Kurisito.
3.28: Eyiri Hatonda, siŋahiiriŋo njabulo ŋagati wʼOmuyudaaya nʼAtali Muyudaaya, omwidu nʼatali mwidu, omuhasi nʼomusinde. Mwesimwesi muli cʼehyene olwʼekolagana eriŋo ŋagati wa hiisi mulala hu nywe ni Yesu Kurisito.
3.29: Olwohuba muli ba Yesu Kurisito, mwesi bababala ohuba lusaaye lwa Yibbulayimu era mulisuna omugabo hu hirabo ehi Hatonda gamusuubisa.

4.1: Mu ngeri eyindi, ehi ndoma huŋanga ohuhigeragerania hu mwana omuseere mu mago ga semwana. Omwana oyo anaba nʼahiiri muŋere, saabaho njabulo nʼomuŋeeresa womu mago ago olwohuba wayire aba njʼomwene biitu ebiri ŋango aŋo mu hiseera ehyo sabyehenerera.
4.2: Omwana oyo bamutaho omuutu ohumubbiita era gamuhuumira ebiitu ohwola ehiseera ehi semwana galaga ohubimuŋambya hyola.
4.3: Mu ngeri njʼenyene hwesi ni hwali ni huhiiri hufugiirira Kurisito, hwali hyʼomwana oyo era ni huli hyʼabeedu ni hundembuhira emisambwa nʼobulombolombo owomu hyalo hino ngʼolu omwidu agondera musengwawe.
4.4: Aye ehiseera ehiragaane ni hyola, Hatonda gatuma Yesu Omwana wuwe mu hyalo nga yeesi omuhasi amusaala era nga yeesi aba nʼohwoheresa amagambi ga Musa.
4.5: Ebyo byaliŋo olwʼohutununula eyiri obuŋugi wʼamagambi hwesihwesi hwahasuna omugabo gwefe ogutusaanira ngʼabaana ba Hatonda.
4.6: Olwohuba hwesihwesi huli baana ba Hatonda, gatuma Omwoyo Omutukuvu ohuŋwa eri Yesu Omwana wuwe gaaje amenye mu myoyo jeefe. Omwoyo oyo njʼatuŋa obugumu owʼohwehahasa huuti huli baana ba Hatonda era hwamulanga “Bbaabba.”
4.7: Olwʼehyo muhimanye muuti simuhiiri beedu aye ŋaahani hiisi mulala hunywe mwana wa Hatonda. Era olwohuba mwana mu nyumba yiye, Hatonda gabaŋaaye obusika wʼebi gasuubisa. Mutaŋemba hwagama eyi mwaŋooye
4.8: Halehale ni mwali ni muhiiri huba nʼekolagana ni Hatonda, ebinambulamo ebitali Hatonda njʼebyabaŋuganga ni bibahosa hiisi hiitu hyʼomwidu oyu musengwa wuwe ahosa hiisi ehi aba ni gendire.
4.9: Ngʼolu ŋaahani mumanyire Hatonda era ehihiraho ehyo yeesi abamanyire ati muli babe, hiina ehyene ehigira ni muŋemba ohwagama eyi mwaŋwa mugendere mu buteekateeka nʼobulombolombo wʼehyalo ebi mwaŋunuha? Ehi muloma, mwenda mwagameyo mu busibe wabyo?
4.10: Mbo mwesi mutandihire ohulonderesa obulombolombo obutali wenywe obuŋamba hu ndaalo ekulu, emyesi, ebiro ŋalala nʼemyaha ejenjabulo olwʼohwendula obuhoda eyiri Hatonda!
4.11: Ndi mweŋendeherefu olwʼebiitu ebi muhola! Olwo obuŋeeresa wange eyi muli ko wenda hufa busa?
4.12: Olwʼehyo, aboluganda mbegayirira mwefihule ebiitu ebyo mube hyange ngʼolu nabyefihula nafaana hyenywe. Mubaaye mutebisyangaho bubi eyi ndi aye ŋaahani mwenda hwonoona oluŋayo.
4.13: Muhimanyire bulaŋi muuti nʼali nijire ewenywe lwʼobulwaye nga ko mbalomera Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi aga Yesu.
4.14: Wayire nʼali mulwaye, simwambisayamo moni aye mwasangaalira mu ngeri eyi mwahasangaaliiyemo Malayika wa Hatonda, aŋandi oti hani nʼali ndiise Yesu Kurisito omwene!
4.15: Esangaalo eryo lyosiryosi eri mwasangaalira lyaja ŋeena? Mu hiseera ehyo ŋaŋuma ehi mwali ni mutaŋanga hukolera nʼolu nahabalomire ohwomolamo emoni jenywe mujiipe!
4.16: Olwo ŋaahani ko fuuhire musigu eyi muli olwʼohubahayula ni mbalomera ehituufu olwʼohugota ohu muli hugota?
4.17: Abo aberanga ti babalumirwa ehi baliho hya hubabbaamya muŋambe obulombolombo waawe. Ehigendererwa hyawe sihiraŋi olwohuba ehi baliho hyahwenda hutwabuhania, efe ni nenywe abatafugiirira byawe ko bahene babegoboseho.
4.18: Hiraŋi ohulaga muuti muwagira ebi mbegirisa. Aye ehyo simuli nʼohuhihola lwʼohwehenaho ni nijire eyi muli.
4.19: Baana bange! Ohufaana hyʼomuhasi alumwa ebise ni genda husaala keesi nindi pulira obulumi nʼohweŋendeherera hu lwenywe ohwola olu Kurisito anahengire era gaamenya mu bulamu wenywe.
4.20: Hiba ni hiŋangiha nahaajire eyo naaba ni nenywe hu nyanga enyene yino nacuusaho nʼamalomere olwohuba ebi muhola olwʼohutaba ŋalala ni nenywe, bikenire bugali efiiri hu mutwe. Agali ni Saala
4.21: Aleeni mundomereho, enywe omwenda ohugendera ŋaasi wʼamagambi ga Musa, simumanyire ehi Musa gaŋandiiha mu magambi ago?
4.22: Baŋandiiha mu magambi ago baati Yibbulayimu gaali nʼabasaani babiri. Mulala hu bo gaali musaani wʼAgali omuhasi owaali omwidu nʼowundi gaali musaani wa Saala omuhasi omweneŋo.
4.23: Ohusaaliwa hwʼabasaani ba Yibbulayimu abo hwosi hwalimo enjabulo. Omusaani oyu gasaala nʼomuhasi omwidu gamusaaye mu ngeri eyabulijo aye ohusaaliwa hwʼomusaani owʼomuhasi omweneŋo, hwali hwʼehyamaliholiho oluvanyuma lwa Hatonda ohuŋa semwana ehisuubiso hyʼohumusaala.
4.24: Ebiitu ebyo hubiŋira ohuba mu hifaananyi hyʼolugero olwohuba abahasi bano bombi bali mu hifaananyi hyʼendagaano ebiri eji Hatonda gaahola. Ndala hu ndagaano ejo gayiholera hu lusozi Sinaayi era yaalimo ohugondera amagambi aga gaŋa Musa. Eyo njʼeya Agali owaali omwidu nʼabaana babe aba asaala.
4.25: Agali ali hyʼolusozi Sinaayi mu hyalo hyʼe Buŋarabbu era Agali ali mu hifaananyi hyʼehibuga Yerusaalemu mu mbeera eyi hirimo hatyane olwohuba abali mu hibuga ehyo nʼabahiihalamo bali mu wiidu.
4.26: Aye ŋaliŋo ehibuga Yerusaalemu ehinyaaha ehiri mwigulu era abo abalihiihalamo bali mu dembe era sibali ŋaasi wʼobuŋugi wʼamagambi. Efe abasuubira ohuba mu hibuga ehyo huhiŋirira mu hifaananyi hya nyineefe olwohuba huli baana ba Hatonda abʼedembe.
4.27: Ebyaŋandihiwa biroma biiti, “Saŋalya ewe omuhasi omugumba, atasaala; otaŋoleera huŋoleera aye lereesula ehigalagala ewe atabonangaho bise byʼohusaala olwohuba omuhasi nabunobe anahooŋe oluhulende abaana ababe baahira abanawende obungi.”
4.28: Ŋaahani boluganda muhimanye muuti muli baana ba Hatonda olwʼohufugiirira ebi gasuubisa era muli hya Yisaka omusaani wa Yibbulayimu oyu gasaala olwʼohufugiirira ehisuubiso hya Hatonda.
4.29: Era ohufaana ngʼolu omusaani wa Yibbulayimu oyu gasaala nʼomuhasi omwidu gahiyaania owahye owasaaliwa olwʼamaani gʼOmwoyo, hwesi huutyo pohuli. Abo abaŋeega baati huli nʼohugendera ŋaasi wʼamagambi ga Musa batuhiyaania olwʼohufugiirira Kurisito.
4.30: Aye huhebulire ebi Ebyaŋandihiwa biroma hu songa yino. Biroma biiti, “Bbinga omuhasi oyo omwidu era atiine nʼomwana wuwe olwohuba omwana oyo abula mugabo mu byʼobusika wa semwana ohutusaho omwana wʼomuhasi omweneŋo.”
4.31: Olwʼehyo balebe bange, efe abamufugiirira sihuli bomu lusaaye lwʼomuhasi omwidu abali ŋaasi wʼamagambi aye huli bomu lusaaye lwʼomuhasi omweneŋo.

5.1: Yesu gatuboŋolola mu busibe wʼamagambi ga Musa gaatuŋa edembe. Olwʼehyo mube badimamu ŋatabaŋo nindi abaatu ababahalubirisa ni babafiiha ehijoogi hyʼobuteekateeka nʼobulombolombo waawe.
5.2: Ale mwetege bulaŋi mbalomere! Ese Pawulo mbalomeraho ti hiisi olu munaganye babahomola mbo mwendula obuhoda eyiri Hatonda, ohufa hwa Kurisito hunaabe huhiibula mahulu kadi eyi muli.
5.3: Nindi hakigobolemo! Ndoma ti hiisi muutu anafugiirira bamuhomola omwene anaabe geboŋire mu mamiro omugoye ogwʼohuhola byosibyosi ebi amagambi gamulagira.
5.4: Era enywe abali hugesyaho ohwenda Hatonda ababale ohuba abagwalaafu ni mubita mu magambi, mwahena ohweyabula hu Kurisito era mwabeene mulehire engira ya Hatonda eyʼohusoniŋa olwʼehisasabirisi hihye.
5.5: Ne efe abataaye owesige mu hisasabirisi hya Hatonda, Omwoyo Omutukuvu atuhahasa ati Hatonda aja hutubala ohuba abagwalaafu olwʼohufugiirira Kurisito.
5.6: Hiri hiityo olwohuba Hatonda saafayo oba omuutu muhomole oba simuhomole. Ehihulu ehi genda njʼomuutu ohwesiga Yesu Kurisito era ni genda nʼabahye.
5.7: Mwali mugenda bulaŋi ngʼabafugiirira ne ŋaahani hiina ehyaboolireho ko muŋwe hu hufugiirira obuhwenda obutuufu obuŋamba hu Kurisito?
5.8: Ohuhongeresa ohu babahongeresa sihuŋwa yiri Hatonda omwene hubangala ohuba abamufugiirira.
5.9: Muhebulire muuti ngʼolu hasimbukulusa ahadiidiri haleetera etome lyʼengaano efute ohusimbuluha ohuhira olu lyaga, ehibono bubono ehyʼesomesa ecaamu hyosi hiŋanga ohubbaamya abaatu oluhulende.
5.10: Ne ese mbalimo owesige mu Yesu Musengwa ti simunahabbaame mwaŋwa hu hi ndi hubaloma. Oyo abatabulatabula aja husuna omuhemba, haabe ani oba ani.
5.11: Aboluganda, ni ŋera mbanga ni ndoma abaatu ti bali nʼohuhomola ngʼolu abandi basidihaho, hani Abayudaaya abahiwagira bakiyaania? Mbanga ni mbalomera cʼehyo mu hifo hyʼohubalomera ti ohufa hwa Yesu hu musalabba njʼohunoŋola abaatu, hani sibakiyaania.
5.12: Hiba ni hiŋangiha abo ababahongeresa ohuhomola bahehereeye abeene begiduuliraho erala obusinde waawe!
5.13: Ne enywe balebe bange Hatonda gaabatobola mube mu bulamu owʼedembe ni ŋaŋuma buteekateeka oba obulombolombo obubafuga. Simutambisanga dembe lyenywe ohwetolyonga mu byʼobusiru wabula hiisi muutu nʼaŋa owahye obuyeedi olwʼohumwenda.
5.14: Hino muhihole olwohuba amagambi gosigosi mu buupi gaŋwamo egambi erala eriroma liiti, “Yendanga owahyo ngʼolu weyenda ewe wamwene.”
5.15: Aye singa mubeererera ni muŋiriŋana mwaba hyʼagabwa agalumanira egumba, ni mutegenderesa mwabeene mwesihiirisa. Obulamu obuhuba ninabo olwʼOmwoyo
5.16: Olwʼehyo mbahubbirisa muganye Omwoyo Omutukuvu abe njʼabatangirira mubi muhola ko mweŋalame ohwoheresa ebi mibiri jenywe jegomba.
5.17: Hino muli nʼohuhihola olwohuba ohwegomba hwenywe ohwʼomubiri huŋalula omugoye nʼOmwoyo hiisi hirala hubyo ni hyenda muhole ebi hibalagira. Ohuŋalula hwʼomugoye ohwo sihubaganya muhole ehi mwahendire ohuhola.
5.18: Aye singa Omwoyo aba njʼabatangiirira muba simuhiiri ŋaasi wʼamagambi ga Musa.
5.19: Ebikolwa ebiŋwa mu hwegomba hwʼomubiri biri ŋalafu era hiisi muutu abimanyire. Birala hu byo mbebino; obuhwedi, ohwejabaata, ohuba owʼemoni enyangu;
5.20: ohusenga emisambwa nʼohuhola ebyʼobuŋeŋa, obucaayi, ohweduhaniaduhania, ekenyera, etima, ohweŋeegaho, ohweyabujula, ohwesalasalamo obubbubbu,
5.21: egongi, obumeesi, ohutaŋwa mu binyumo ko nʼebindi ebiri hyʼebyo. Nindi mbalabula ngʼolu nabalabula oludaayi ti abahola ebyo babula mugabo mu buŋugi wa Hatonda.
5.22: Ebikolwa ebyʼomuutu oyu Omwoyo wa Hatonda atangirira nibyo byanjabulo era mbebino; ohwenda abahyo, esangaalo, ohwenda emiyaaya, obugumikiriza, ehyere, obuutu bulamu, owesigwa,
5.23: ohuŋamba ebiitu pola nʼohwegenderesa. Nʼohola ebyo, siŋabaŋo gambi eri obbwaga.
5.24: Abo abali mu Yesu Kurisito bahomerera ohwegomba hwʼomubiri ohu baali ni nahwo oludaayi.
5.25: Hanye dala Omwoyo wa Hatonda gatuŋa obulamu obunyaaha, huganye huhole ebi genda huhole.
5.26: Hutaba mu hwepaahapaaha ni huluŋia abahyefe era ni hubaleeteranga ohugongeera.

6.1: Aboluganda, singa ŋabaŋo owahyenywe agwa mu hibi, enywe abadimamu mu hufugiirira mumuŋambenga pola mwamuyeeda ohuŋwa mu hibi ehyo. Cooka oyo aba nʼamuyeeda gegenderesenga yeesi atagwa mu hibi.
6.2: Singa ŋabaŋo owahyenywe ali mu bigosi, mumuŋambirengaho gabihenaŋo. Ni munaholenga muutyo munaabenga mwoherehiise egambi eri Kurisito gaatuŋa.
6.3: Muhimanye muuti singa omuutu geŋeegaho ngʼolu ali wahitalo ate nga ko panaŋo aba gedulinga omwene.
6.4: Ehihiraho obulaŋi muutu hwehebera ebikolwa bibye omwene gebuuse hanye biraŋi. Nʼahena ehyo, nga ko gesiima hu lwʼebiraŋi ebi aba nʼahola, cooka nʼatahihola olwʼohweŋeraŋerania hu bahye.
6.5: Muhebulire muuti hiisi muutu ali nʼohwetwiha obuvunanyiziwa wuwe.
6.6: Musaanira ohuŋangaho ababegirisa ehibono hya Hatonda, omugabo ogusaanira hu biitu byenywe ebi muli ni nabyo. Omuutu agesa ehyo ehi gaamya
6.7: Omuutu atabahooŋanga hubabbaamya. Muhebulire muuti sihuŋanga hwebbalakania hu Hatonda olwohuba ngʼolu muutu ageesa ehyo ehyene nʼehyene ehi aba ni gamwa, ni Hatonda atyo po ahola. Asasula omuutu ni geema hu ehyo ehi aba nʼaholire.
6.8: Olwʼehyo Hatonda aligudya hiisi muutu olwʼehibi ehi omubiri gugwe gumutuma ohuhola era gasasula oyo ahola ehi Omwoyo Omutukuvu amulagira ohuhola, nʼehirabo hyʼobulamu obutaŋwaŋo.
6.9: Aleeni hutademba huholanga biraŋi olwohuba ehiseera ehiragaane ni hiryola, Hatonda alituŋamo omuhemba.
6.10: Ngʼolu huhiiri nʼekabi eyo hwegumye ohuholera abaatu bosibosi ebiraŋi ko weyite abafugiirira bahyefe. Ohugohoba
6.11: Aleeni mwetege bulaŋi mufaanie bino olwohuba samwene ndi hubiŋandiiha nʼomuhono gwange omwene mu ganyikuta agabbala.
6.12: Abo abenda ohweragalaga ebinambulamo bali hugesyaho ohubaŋagia muhomole. Ehyo bahihola olwʼohwenda batabahiyaania olwohuba sibenda hulomera abaatu baati Hatonda asoniŋa ebibi olwʼohufugiirira baati Yesu Kurisito gaabafiirira hu musalabba.
6.13: Mbaloma bino olwohuba Abayudaaya abo ababomeeyeho nʼesomesa yaawe ti muhomole, boosi siboheresa ebi magambi ga Musa galagira ohutusaho benda muhomole basune ehi banepaahe olwʼohuhomola hwenywe.
6.14: Ne ese simbona ehi nepaahisa ohutusaho nepaaha olwa Musengwa weefe Yesu Kurisito owaafiirira hu musalabba. Ehi gaakolera hu musalabba, hindeteera ohutaŋemba hu bi baatu abandi mu hyalo basangalira era boosi ehyo hibaleetera ohutambalamo magesi.
6.15: Ohwepaaha hwange huli mu hufa hwa Kurisito hu musalabba olwohuba Hatonda saafayo oba omuutu muhomole oba simuhomole. Ye ehi abala hu muutu hya huba mu bulamu obunyaaha olwʼohufugiirira Kurisito.
6.16: Sunga Hatonda aŋambire hiisi muutu anagendere mu bindomire ehisasabirisi era amuŋe emiyaaya. Ko weyite Yisirayiri, abaatu ba Hatonda abali mu hifaananyi hya Yisirayiri.
6.17: Ehisembayo, nenda ohwema olwa leero abaatu abo baasoniŋe, ŋatabaŋo nindi owundambya mu songa jino olwohuba emamba eji ndi ni najo olwohuba muhwenda wa Yesu nibo bajiŋuma.
6.18: Boluganda, Musengwa weefe Yesu Kurisito abaŋambire ehisasabirisi. Amiina.

1.1: Ndiise Pawulo omuhwenda wa Yesu Kurisito olwʼohusiima hwa Hatonda. Pandiihira enywe abagwalaafu, abesiga Yesu Kurisito abali mu hibuga Efeeso.
1.2: Hatonda Seefe ni Musengwa Yesu Kurisito babaŋambire ehisasabirisi era babaŋe emiyaaya. Ekabi ohubita mu Kurisito
1.3: Hujumirya Hatonda Semwana wa Musengwa weefe Yesu Kurisito owabitira mu Kurisito ohutuŋa hiisi kabi ejomwigulu.
1.4: Hatonda nʼahiiri hutonda ehyalo gaatutobola, nʼabita mu Kurisito, hube bagwalaafu ni huŋumaho hamogo mu moni jije. Olwʼohutwenda,
1.5: gasalaŋo ohuŋwa ahale nahale ohutufuula baana babe nʼabita mu Yesu Kurisito olwʼohusiima huhwe,
1.6: cʼehigira huli nʼohumujumirya olwʼehisasabirisi hihye ehi gatuŋa nʼabita mu Mwana wuwe oyo omuhoda.
1.7: Kurisito ni gafa, amafugi gage gatununula ngʼatusoniŋa ebibi. Ehisasabirisi hya Hatonda
1.8: ehi gatuyomboolera hyatuŋa amagesi ohufaania etegeha yiye.
1.9: Era gatuhwehulira ehyama ehi gaali nʼategehire ohwoheresa nʼabita mu Kurisito.
1.10: Etegeha yiye yiri yiiti ehiseera ni hyolire, aleete ŋalala ebiitu byosibyosi ebiri mwigulu nohu hyalo, ŋaasi wʼobuŋugi wa Kurisito.
1.11: Olwa Kurisito, Hatonda gatutobola gaahena gatwabula ohuba abaatu babe ngʼolu genda era ahola byosibyosi ni geema hu tegeha yiye yira eya halehale,
1.12: ko efe Abayudaaya abehereeye ohuba nʼesuubi mu Kurisito, humujumirye era humuŋe eŋono.
1.13: Era enywe Abatali Bayudaaya mwesi Hatonda gabafuula abaatu babe ni mwaŋulira amazima, njʼAmaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu hunoŋoha. Ni muhenire ohufugiirira Kurisito, gaabaŋa Omwoyo Omutukuvu oyu gabasuubisa ohuŋwa ahale nahale ohulaga ati muli babe.
1.14: Omwoyo oyo njʼahabonero ahahahasa haati Hatonda alituŋa ebi gasuubisa abaatu babe era ti aja hutununula, leha humujumirye olwʼeŋono lirye. Ohweyaasa nʼohusaba hwa Pawulo
1.15: Olwʼehyo, ohuŋwa olu nʼaŋulira ti mufugiirira Yesu Musengwa era mwenda abagwaalafu bosibosi,
1.16: sindeherangaho ohweyaasa Hatonda hu lwenywe mu husaba hwange.
1.17: Mbasabira ti Hatonda wa Musengwa weefe Yesu Kurisito era Seefe oweŋono, abaŋe Omwoyo Omutukuvu ko mwahaba nʼamagesi mumutegeere bulaŋi.
1.18: Era saba ti emoni jenywe ejomu hida jirimbuhe mufaanie ebiitu ebyʼamaani ebi Hatonda gabalangira era mulindirire ni ŋaŋuma hubuusabuusa ebi gasuubisa abaatu babe.
1.19: Saba ti mutegeere amaani gage amabitiirifu ohuhira gosigosi era agatuyeeda efe abafugiirira.
1.20: Amaani ameene ago, njʼagalamusa Kurisito ngʼahena gehala mu hifo ehyʼeŋono hu lubega lwʼomuhono omulungi ogwa Hatonda mwigulu.
1.21: Kurisito oyo ali ŋamugulu wʼobuŋangi nʼabaŋugi era aŋuga abanamaani nʼabahombe bosibosi, siŋahani hyoŋene aye emirembe nʼemirembe.
1.22: Hatonda gaata ebiitu byosibyosi ŋaasi wʼobuŋangi wa Kurisito, ngʼamufuula Musengwa era aŋuga hiisi hiitu olwʼabo abamufugiirira.
1.23: Abafugiirira abo, njʼomubiri gwa Kurisito era njʼaleetera hiisi hiitu ohuba nʼobulamu.

2.1: Ni mwali ni muhiiri hufugiirira Yesu, mwali bafu mu mwoyo olwʼebibi byenywe.
2.2: Mwalondereranga esambo embi ejʼehyalo hino, ni mudembuhira Sitaani, omwoyo oguŋuga ŋa mugulu mu bbanga. Hatyane, omwoyo jana ogwo njʼoguŋuga abo abajeemera Hatonda.
2.3: Ohwegomba ohwʼomubiri nʼepeega yeefe embi ni bituŋuga ngʼolu byali ni biŋuga abaatu abandi. Era olwʼebibi ebyo, hwesihwesi Hatonda gaali atuliho ehiruŋi.
2.4: Aye Hatonda olwʼohutwenda obugali nʼolwehisa hihye ehibitiirifu,
2.5: gatulamuhisa ŋalala ni Kurisito ohuŋwa mu bujeemu omu hwali ni hufiiriye, gatunoŋola olwʼehisasabirisi hihye.
2.6: Hatonda gatulamuhisa ŋalala ni Yesu Kurisito era ngʼatwihasa ni naye mwigulu olwohuba huli hirala ni naye.
2.7: Gaahola ehyo ohulaga abomu mirembe ejiribaŋo obulaŋi nʼehisasabirisi hihye ehibitiirifu ehi gatuŋambira mu Yesu Kurisito.
2.8: Mwanoŋoha olwʼehisasabirisi hihye olu mwamufugiirira, olwohuba ohunoŋoha simaani genywe aye hirabo hya Hatonda.
2.9: Hatonda sigabanoŋola olwʼebikolwa byenywe ebiraŋi olwʼehyo ŋaŋume owepaahapaaha.
2.10: Hatonda gatutonda nʼabita mu Yesu Kurisito ohuholanga ebiraŋi ebi gatutegehera. Obulala mu Kurisito
2.11: Olwʼehyo, enywe Abatali Bayudaaya era “abatali bahomole” ngʼolu Abayudaaya babalanga olwohuba mbo nibo bahomole, (ohuhomola ohu baatu bahomola nʼengalo) muhebulire ehi mwali mu biseera ebyahale.
2.12: Mwali muŋuma Kurisito era simwali baatu ba Hatonda, ni batababalira hu gwanga eryʼAbayisirayiri, abaatu ba Hatonda era ni muŋuma mugabo mu ndagaano ejirimo ebi Hatonda gasuubisa. Mwali muŋuma suubi lyosiryosi era ni muŋuma Hatonda omwene buŋangi.
2.13: Aye ŋaahani ohubita mu hufa hwa Yesu Kurisito, enywe abaali ni mwedanyiriiye aŋaleeŋi, Hatonda gabeegeresa huupi olwʼamafugi ga Kurisito.
2.14: Kurisito galeeta emiyaaya, gaagira Abayudaaya nʼAbatali Bayudaaya hwaba muutu mulala, gatusaŋo obulabe owaali hyʼehiteepe ni butwabuujula.
2.15: Olu gafa hu musalabba, gadibya ebiragiro nʼamagambi gʼEhiyudaaya ko afaaŋanie Abayudaaya nʼAbatali Bayudaaya ohuba egwanga erala era enyaaha mu moni ja Hatonda, mu kola eyo galeetaŋo emiyaaya.
2.16: Ohufa huhwe hu musalabba hwatufaaŋania ni Hatonda hwatusaŋo obulabe ŋagati wʼAbayudaaya nʼAbatali Bayudaaya, hwesihwesi hwagobola ŋalala.
2.17: Kurisito gaaja gabalomera enywe Abatali Bayudaaya abaali aŋaleeŋi ni Hatonda nʼAbayudaaya abaali ohuupi ni naye, Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi.
2.18: Ŋaahani hwesihwesi hubita mu Kurisito oyo ko hwola eyiri Hatonda Seefe olwʼamaani gʼOmwoyo wuwe.
2.19: Olwʼehyo, enywe Abatali Bayudaaya simuhiiri balugendwa aye muli bʼehiha hirala nʼabaatu ba Hatonda era abomu nyumba yiye.
2.20: Enywe muli nyumba eyi baatongola hu musingi gwʼesomesa yʼabahwenda nʼabanaabbi, Yesu Kurisito omwene nʼali njʼebaale eryomu sonda era eryʼomugaso.
2.21: Kurisito njʼaŋambiriiye enyumba eyo yosiyosi era njʼagira yagalama yaba Yekaalu enjabufu eya Musengwa.
2.22: Mu Kurisito, enywe mwesi Abatali Bayudaaya, babatongolera ŋalala ni neefe Abayudaaya ohuba enyumba omu Mwoyo wa Hatonda amenya.

3.1: Ese Pawulo, bamboŋa hu lwenywe Abatali Bayudaaya olwohuba pereesa Yesu Kurisito.
3.2: Mbalomera ti ngʼolu mwaŋulira, Hatonda gaapambira ehisasabirisi gaapa omulimo ogwʼohulomera Abatali Bayudaaya Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi.
3.3: Ko huloma gakwehulira ehyama hihye ngʼolu pandiihire mu buupi.
3.4: Mu husoma ebbaluŋa yino, muja hufaania ngʼolu Kurisito njʼehyama ehyo.
3.5: Hatonda sigahwehulira abomu mirembe ejʼahale ehyama ehyo, ngʼolu hiri ŋaahani nʼabita mu Omwoyo Omutukuvu eyiri abahwenda nʼabanaabbi babe abagaabula ohumuŋeeresa.
3.6: Ehyama hiri hiiti, Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi gagira Abatali Bayudaaya basuna omugabo ŋalala nʼAbayudaaya hu hisuubizo hya Hatonda ohubanoŋola. Era bosibosi mubiri mulala ohubita mu Yesu Kurisito.
3.7: Olwʼehisasabirisi hya Hatonda, gaapa ekabi ohuba omuŋeeresa ohulomera abaatu Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi gano olwʼamaani gage.
3.8: Wayire ndiise owʼedaala erya ŋaasi mu abaatu ba Hatonda bosibosi aye gaapa ekabi ohulomera Abatali Bayudaaya Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu buŋinda obubitiirifu obuli mu Kurisito.
3.9: Era Hatonda oyo owatonda hiisi hiitu, gaatuma ohulomera abaatu bosibosi ebiŋamba hu hyama ehyo ehi gaali nʼahwehire ohuŋwa ahale nahale.
3.10: Ehigendererwa hihye hiri hiiti ŋaahani nʼabita mu abafugiirira Kurisito, balomere emisambwa nʼabanamaani abali mu bbanga ebiŋamba hu magesi gage amangi agataŋwayo.
3.11: Ohunoŋola abaatu, njʼeyaali etegeha ya Hatonda ko atonde ehyalo era gayoheresa nʼabita mu Musengwa weefe Yesu Kurisito.
3.12: Ŋaahani ni hubita mu Kurisito oyo olwʼohumufugiirira, hwigerera eyiri Hatonda nʼobugumu.
3.13: Olwʼehyo, mbegayirira mutaŋwamo maani olwʼohungudya ohubangudya hu lwenywe, olwohuba hyasuno eyi muli. Ohumanya ohwenda hwa Kurisito
3.14: Cʼehigira kubbira Hatonda seefe amafuha ni mbasabira,
3.15: Hatonda oyo njʼowatonda ebiitu byosibyosi mwigulu nohu hyalo.
3.16: Saba ti Hatonda owʼeŋono eryʼamaani, abaŋe amaani gage nʼabita mu Mwoyo wuwe.
3.17: Era saba ti mufaanie ngʼolu Hatonda abenda bugali weene era Kurisito amenye mu mwoyo jenywe olwʼohumufugiirira ko musigale ni muli bagumu,
3.18: ko enywe ŋalala nʼabagwalaafu abandi bosibosi, muŋange ohufaania ohwenda hwa Kurisito ngʼolu huli hwʼamaani.
3.19: Era mumanye ohwenda hwa Kurisito ohwo eyiri abaatu, ohwenda ohu omuutu ataŋanga hufaania mu magesi gage agʼobuutu ko mube nʼobulamu obu Hatonda genda.
3.20: Ŋaahani Hatonda oyo ali nʼobuŋangi ohuhola nʼohuhiraho ebi humusunga nʼebi huŋeega, olwʼamaani gage agaholera mu efe.
3.21: Abamufugiirira baŋenga Hatonda eŋono ohubita mu Yesu Kurisito emirembe nʼemirembe. Amiina.

4.1: Ngʼomuutu oyu baaboŋa olwʼohuŋeeresa Musengwa, mbegayirira mube nʼesambo ejoolana nʼobulamu obu Hatonda gaabalanga ohuba ni nawo.
4.2: Mube abaatu abatetulirisa, mweŋomehe era hiisi muutu gehalirihenga owahye olwʼohwendana.
4.3: Mufubengaho ohweyongera ohuloma hirala, Omwoyo wa Hatonda nʼali njʼabayeeda ohumenya ŋalala mu miyaaya.
4.4: Huli mubiri mulala, nʼOmwoyo wa Hatonda mulala ngʼolu hihusuubira ohusuna, hiri hirala.
4.5: Ŋaliŋo Musengwa mulala nʼobuhwenda bulala obu hufugiirira ko nʼohubatiziwa hulala ngʼahabonero ahalaga haati huli hirala ni Kurisito,
4.6: Hatonda, Semwana wʼabaatu bosibosi mulala aŋuga ebiitu byosibyosi, aholera era amenya mu hiisi muutu wuwe amufugiirira.
4.7: Kurisito gaŋa hiisi muutu ehirabo ehyʼenjabulo ngʼolu omwene asiima.
4.8: Cʼehigira ehyaŋandiihiwa hiroma hiiti, “Gaŋangula abasigu era ni gatiina mu hifo ehya ŋamugulu obugali gaaŋa abaatu ebirabo.”
4.9: Hitegeesa hi ohuloma oti gatiina mu hifo ehya ŋamugulu obugali? Hitegeesa hiiti geheerera ohwiha ŋaasi hu hyalo.
4.10: Oyo oweeha, njʼomwene oyo owatiina mwigulu ŋa mugulu obugali ohuhiraho ebireri ko amaamire hiisi hiitu.
4.11: Era njʼomwene oyo owaŋa abaatu ebirabo. Abandi gaabaŋa ohuba abahwenda babe, abandi ohuba abanaabbi, abandi ohuba abalomera abaatu Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi, abandi ohuba abaayi ko nʼohusomesa abaatu ba Hatonda.
4.12: Ehyo Kurisito gahihola ni genda batendehe abaatu babe mu mulimo gwʼohumuŋeeresa ko omubiri gugwe guhule,
4.13: ohwola hwesihwesi olu huliba hyʼomuutu mulala mu hwesiga nʼohumanya Omwana wa Hatonda, huŋangale mu byʼomwoyo hube hya niye.
4.14: Aŋo sihunaahabe hyʼabaana abaŋere abacuuhacuusa aŋa naaŋa olwʼesomesa eyʼobudulingi era egodamya abaatu.
4.15: Aye hube bʼamazima era hwendane ko huhule mu hiisi ngeri hya Kurisito omutwe gwefe abamufugiirira.
4.16: Kurisito oyo aleetera omubiri gwosigwosi ohweŋimba ŋalala, hiisi muutu nʼahola omulimo gugwe ko omubiri gwosigwosi gwahula olwʼohwendana. Obulamu obunyaaha mu Kurisito
4.17: Mutege ohutwi mbalomere hino olwʼobuŋangi wa Musengwa era leha mbaŋe hu magesi ti mulehere aŋo ohwebisya hyʼabaatu abali nʼepeega embi abatafugiirira Hatonda.
4.18: Obulamu waawe wijuuye ehiirema era baŋuma mugabo ogwʼobulamu obutaŋwaŋo olwʼobuŋaayi nʼobuhahanyafu wʼemyoyo jaawe.
4.19: Baŋuma nʼesoni era baŋwera mu huhola ebyʼobuŋemu. Bali nʼomulungo ohuhola ebibi ebya hiisi ngeri aŋaŋuma hwemoota.
4.20: Aye enywe sibabasomesa baatyo hu Kurisito.
4.21: Mu butuufu, mwaŋulira obuhwenda owʼamazima obuŋamba hu Yesu.
4.22: Ngʼolu babasomesa, mwefiihule obulamu obuhale owijuuye ohwegomba ohwʼobudulingi obu mwalimo ni muhiiri hufugiirira Yesu.
4.23: Mwambale obulamu obunyaaha ohuŋwa ewa Hatonda, mufuuhe banyaaha nomu biŋeego byenywe,
4.24: era mube baatu abanyaaha aba gatonda mu hifaananyi hihye ohubeera erala abagwalaafu era abamusangaasa.
4.25: Olwʼehyo, mulehe obudulingi, hiisi muutu alomenga amazima olwohuba huli mubiri mulala.
4.26: Ŋanabaŋo ehibaluŋia, mwehuumenga ohutabaleetera huhola hibi. Mutagwisanga eryuba ni muhiiruŋire,
4.27: era mutaŋanga Sitaani ebbanga ohubahema ohuhola ehibi.
4.28: Omwibi alehere aŋo ohwiba aye abeho nʼehyahola aŋange ohuyeedaho abo abagadi.
4.29: Mweŋalame endoma embi aye ebibono byenywe bibe ebiyeeda abo ababiŋulira.
4.30: Era muteŋunamisanga Omwoyo wa Hatonda olwohuba njʼahabonero ahalaga haati balibanunula hu ludaalo olwʼekomerero.
4.31: Mweŋalenga ohuba abaatu abehabyo nʼoluswa. Mutaŋayirisanga oba ohuŋalatana nʼomuutu yesiyesi.
4.32: Aye hiisi muutu alumirwenga era asoniŋenga owahye ngʼolu Hatonda gabasoniŋa nʼabita mu Kurisito.

5.1: Ŋaahani ngʼolu muli abaana ba Hatonda abahoda, leha abe ehyʼohuboneraho mu bulamu wenywe,
5.2: era mwendanenga ngʼolu Kurisito gatwenda geeŋayo gafa hu lwefe ohuba eŋongo erisangaasa Hatonda.
5.3: Mutaholanga obuhwedi oba omuutu yesiyesi ohuba nʼemoni enyangu oba ayayaanira ebibi byʼehyalo hino. Ebiitu hyʼebyo, sihiraŋi ohuba mu abaatu ba Hatonda.
5.4: Mutalomanga ebyʼobuŋemu wayire ohumooca ohwehisirusiru aye mweyaasenga hweyaasa Hatonda.
5.5: Hino muhimanyire erala muuti ŋaŋuma muhwedi wayire oyo ahola ebyʼobuŋemu oba ebyʼobudakaani oba aŋemberesa hu ebibi byʼehyalo hino, ko njʼohujumirya ebitali Hatonda, alisuna omugabo mu buŋugi wa Hatonda ni Kurisito.
5.6: Omuutu yesiyesi saabadulinganga ati Hatonda afugiirira ebiitu hyʼebyo, olwohuba aligudya abajeemu, nʼehiruŋi.
5.7: Olwʼehyo, mutaholanga muhumba nʼabaatu hyʼabo.
5.8: Ni muhiiri hufugiirira Kurisito, mwagenderanga mu hiirema aye ŋaahani ngʼolu muli nʼomuhumba ni Musengwa, mugenderenga mu njase olwohuba muli baatu bʼenjase.
5.9: Hiri hiityo olwohuba enjase njʼegira omuutu gaahola ebiraŋi, ebiruŋamu era ebyʼamazima.
5.10: Era mugesyengaho ohuhola ebisangaasa Musengwa.
5.11: Mutaholanga ebiitu ebyʼehiirema olwohuba biŋuma ehi biyeeda aye mubyanihenga hubyaniha.
5.12: Hiŋambya nʼesoni ohuloma hu ebyo ebi bajeemu bahola mu ngiso.
5.13: Aye enjase enahubba mu hiirema, ebiitu byosibyosi ebyomu hiirema biboneherera,
5.14: olwohuba enjase njʼegira hiisi hiitu hyaboneha. Cʼehigira baloma baati, “Sisimuha ewe oli hyʼofuluuta, era ewe oli hyʼomufu lamuha oŋwe mu bafu, era onahola otyo, Kurisito aja hu huhwaduhisa enjase.”
5.15: Mwegenderesenga, mutebisyanga hyabaŋubeebe aye hyʼabali nʼamagesi.
5.16: Mutambisenga hiisi kabi eyi muba ni nayo bulaŋi ohuhola ebiraŋi olwohuba omulembe guno mubi.
5.17: Olwʼehyo, mutaba hyʼabatategeera aye mufaanie ehi Musengwa genda.
5.18: Era mutameeranga olwohuba ehyo hija hu bonoona aye mulehe Omwoyo Omutukuvu abamaamirenga.
5.19: Nʼomwoyo mulala, mwemberenga Musengwa e Zabbuli nʼenyembo ejʼohumujumirya, nʼeji Mwoyo abaŋa ohuseega.
5.20: Era habuhyabuhya mweyaasenga Hatonda Seefe olwʼebiitu byosibyosi, ebi Musengwa weefe Yesu Kurisito gaatuholera. Abasinde nʼabahasi baawe
5.21: Hiisi muutu aŋulirenga owahye olwʼohuŋa Kurisito eŋono.
5.22: Abahasi, muŋulirenga abawamwenywe ngʼolu muŋulira Musengwa,
5.23: olwohuba omusinde njʼomutwe gwʼomuhasi wuwe ngʼolu Kurisito ali njʼomutwe gwʼabamufugiirira, omwene nʼali njʼOmunoŋosi waawe.
5.24: Ngʼolu abafugiirira bagondera Kurisito, nʼabahasi boosi baŋulirenga abawamwawe mu hiisi hiitu.
5.25: Abasinde, mwendenga abahasi benywe ngʼolu Kurisito gendire abamufugiirira era geeŋayo gafa hu lwawe,
5.27: ko abamufugiirira abo, babe bagwalaafu eyi ali ni baŋumaho hamogo wayire mbalo oba efunyi.
5.28: Mu ngeri njʼenyene, nʼabasinde mwesi mwendenga abahasi benywe ngʼolu mweyenda mwabeene. Owenda omuhasi wuwe aba geyenda.
5.29: Ŋaŋuma kadi mulala owerya olubeŋe aye geeriisa era geerabirira ngʼolu Kurisito alabirira abamufugiirira,
5.31: Hyaŋandiihiwa hiiti, “Olwʼehyo, omusinde analehenga semwana ni nyina, geŋimba nʼomuhasi wuwe nga bombi bafuuha mubiri mulala.”
5.32: Hino hyama hihulu era hiraga ngʼolu Kurisito nʼabamufugiirira bali omuutu mulala.
5.33: Ale, hiisi musinde gendenga omuhasi wuwe ngʼolu geyenda omwene era nʼomuhasi yeesi aŋenga wamwe eŋono.

6.1: Abaana, mudembuhirenga abasaaye benywe hulwa Musengwa, olwohuba ehyo hiraŋi.
6.2: “Oŋanga lataawo ni maawo, eŋono,” lino njʼegambi edaayi eriri nʼehisuubiso ehiroma hiiti,
6.3: “Ko ebiitu bihutiinire bulaŋi era owangaale hu hyalo.”
6.4: Abasaaye mutanyigisanga baana benywe aye mubasomesenga ebi Musengwa genda. Abeedu nʼabasengwa baawe
6.5: Abeedu, mudembuhirenga abasengwa benywe era mubaŋenga eŋono nʼomwoyo mulala ngʼolu mwahadembuhiye Kurisito.
6.6: Ehyo mutahiholanga olwohuba babataayeho emoni aye muhiholenga ni muhenereeye ngʼabeedu ba Kurisito olwohuba ehyo njʼehi Hatonda abendaho.
6.7: Muŋeeresenga abasengwa benywe nʼomwoyo omulala hyʼabaŋeeresa Musengwa omwene sosi abaatu,
6.8: olwohuba muhimanyire muuti Musengwa aja huŋa hiisi muutu omuhemba, haabe mwidu oba bbe, ni geema hu hiisi hiraŋi ehi ahola.
6.9: Ni nenywe abali nʼabeedu, mubabisyenga bulaŋi ni ŋaŋuma hubahayula hiisi aŋa naaŋa. Muhebulire muuti Musengwa yenywe mwesimwesi ali mwigulu era ŋaŋuma oyu aboola. Ebisoosa ebyʼabafugiirira Kurisito
6.10: Ehisembayo, mube badimamu hu lwʼamaani ga Musengwa.
6.11: Mwambale ebisoosa byosibyosi ebi Hatonda abaŋa ko muŋange ohuŋiriŋania ekwe ja Sitaani.
6.12: Sihuŋiriŋana nʼabaatu bahyefe abali nʼomubiri nʼamafugi aye nʼabaŋugi, nʼabanamaani, nʼamaani gʼehiirema agali mu hyalo muno ko nʼobuŋugi wʼemisambwa ejiŋugira mu bbanga.
6.13: Olwʼehyo, mwambale ebisoosa bya Hatonda ko muŋange ohuŋiriŋania ekwe ja Sitaani nʼabawagaaye.
6.14: Ŋaahani mwemeerere ni mwesidihire amazima mu hihunya ngʼolu muutu geeboŋa omusipi, nʼebikolwa ebiraŋi bibe hyʼehyohwambala ehi musirikale gambala mu hifuba ohwehuumisa mu lutalo.
6.15: Mwambale engayito ohulaga ohwetegeha ohulomera abaatu Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi engeri eyi baŋanga ohusunamo emiyaaya ja Hatonda.
6.16: Ohumeeda hu ebyo byosibyosi, mube nʼohufugiirira hyʼengabo ko muŋange ohwehuuma obusaale wa Sitaani obuli hyʼomuliro owalasa.
6.17: Mwambale obunoŋosi hyʼekofiira eyi omusirikale gambala era muŋambe ehibono hya Hatonda ehi Omwoyo abaŋa hibe hyʼepiima ohusoosa omusigu.
6.18: Mu lutalo luno, Omwoyo abatangirirenga mu husaba ohwa buli hiha habuhyabuhya. Era mube butebute, mutaleheranga husabira abaatu ba Hatonda bosibosi.
6.19: Keesi musabirenga, Hatonda gaape ehyʼohuloma era ndomere abaatu nʼobugumu, ehyama ehiri mu Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi.
6.20: Ndi mu komera olwʼohulomera abaatu Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi. Musabireho mbe nʼobugumu mbuulire ngʼolu hyahali. Obuheese
6.21: Mulebe yeefe omuhoda oyu balanga baati Tukikasi era omuŋeeresa omwesigwa owa Musengwa, aja hu balomera hiisi ebiifaho nʼebi kola.
6.22: Cʼehigira ndihumutuma eyo olwʼesonga enyene eyo ko mumanye ngʼolu huli era abagobosemo nʼamaani.
6.23: Hatonda seefe ni Musengwa Yesu Kurisito, babaŋe emiyaaya nʼohwenda era babayeede ohuba nʼohufugiirira.
6.24: Hatonda abaŋambire ehisasabirisi, enywe mwesimwesi abenda Musengwa weefe Yesu Kurisito nʼomwoyo mulala.

1.1: Ndiise Pawulo ni Temuseewo abaŋeeresa ba Yesu Kurisito, mbaŋandiihira enywe abagwalaafu ŋalala nʼabalabirizi ko nʼabadiikoni abamenya mu hibuga hyʼe Filipi.
1.2: Hatonda Seefe ni Musengwa Yesu Kurisito babaŋambire ehisasabirisi era babaŋe nʼemiyaaya. Ohweyaasa nʼohusaba
1.3: Neyaasa Hatonda wange hiisi olu mbaŋeegaho,
1.4: mu husaba hwange hwosihwosi ni mbasabira, saba nʼesangaalo,
1.5: olwohuba ohuŋwa olu mwafugiirira Kurisito ohwola hatyane, mwaneŋimbaho mu mulimo gwʼohubuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi.
1.6: Kahasa ti Hatonda owatandiha omulimo omulaŋi mu nywe, aja hweyongera ohuguhola ohwola olu Yesu Kurisito aligobola.
1.7: Mbaŋeegaho hiisi hiseera olwohuba mundi hu mwoyo era nomu komera muno munjeedire ohubuulira nʼohunyonyola abaatu ngʼolu Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi gali gʼamazima. Olwʼehisasabirisi hya Hatonda ehi gatuŋambira, huli huholera ŋalala ohubuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi.
1.8: Mazima Hatonda amanyire ati mbenda mwesimwesi nʼohwenda ohuŋwa eyiri Yesu Kurisito.
1.9: Era mbasabira ti Hatonda abaŋangase mu hwendana ni mwijuuye amagesi nʼohutegeera,
1.10: ko musobole ohwabulaŋo ehiraŋi nʼehibi ohwola hu ludaalo olu Kurisito aligobola, abagaane ni muli bagwalaafu era abaŋumaho mbalo.
1.11: Muholenga ebikolwa ebiraŋi olwʼamaani aga Yesu Kurisito abaŋa. Era abaatu ni balibona ebikolwa byenywe ebiraŋi baja huŋa Hatonda eŋono.
1.12: Aboluganda, nenda mumanye muuti ebigosi ebinjolireho, bireteeye Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi ohweyongera ohusasaana.
1.13: Era ehyo hiŋwereyemo abasirikale bangi mu lubiri lwa habaha ko nʼabaatu abandi ohutegeera baati ndi mu komera olwohuba muloobera wa Kurisito.
1.14: Era olwohuba mu komera, Musengwa aŋaaye abalebe bangi obugumu ohubuulira Ehibono hya Hatonda ni babula hutya hwosihwosi.
1.15: Hituufu ti abandi babuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu Kurisito olwʼesaalwa nʼohusindania abahyawe aye abandi babuulira mu mwoyo omulaŋi.
1.16: Abo ababuulira mu mwoyo omulaŋi, bahihola olwohuba banyenda era bamanyire baati Hatonda gaataŋo ohubuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi.
1.17: Aye abo babuulira olwʼekirihindi nʼohusindana olwʼohwenda baati neyongere ohusuna ebigosi mu komera muno.
1.18: Aye ohubuulira ni basindana sinje hibbala. Sifayo oba omuutu abuulira lwʼehigendererwa ehibi oba ehiraŋi, ehihulu wiira babuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agaŋamba hu Kurisito. Era olwʼehyo nja hweyongera ohusangaala,
1.19: manyire ti olwʼohusaba hwenywe, ebyo ebinjolireho biripweramo ohundehula olwʼamaani gʼOmwoyo wa Yesu Kurisito.
1.20: Suubira era manyire ti esoni sijija hupamba, ehyo hija huŋeesa Kurisito eŋono olwʼebiitu ebi kola nʼebi ndoma, mu ngeri eyi nebisyamo oba engeri eyi nahafemo.
1.21: Olwohuba mu bulamu wange nenda mbeŋo ni sangaasa Kurisito era ni fa hinahambeere hiraŋi ohuhira ohuba hu hyalo hino.
1.22: Ohusigala ni kiiri mulamu, hyosi hiraŋi ohweyongera ohuŋeeresa Kurisito aye simanyire hyahuhola, oba hweyongera ni kiiriŋo mulamu oba ohwefiira.
1.23: Ndi ŋagati aŋo, negomba ohuŋwa hu hyalo huno tiine nebeere ni Kurisito, olwohuba ehyo hisingira ohuba ehiraŋi.
1.24: Aye hu lwenywe, hya mugaso ohusigala ni kiiri mulamu.
1.25: Ehyo kiriho obuhahafu ti nja hweyongera ni kiiriŋo mulamu ohuyeeda ohunywania ohufugiirira hwenywe mwesimwesi, mwahasuna esangaalo.
1.26: Ni balindehula ndigobola eyo era mulisaŋalya olwa Yesu Kurisito hu lwange.
1.27: Mu hiisi mbeera, mwebisye ngʼolu hisaanira abaatu abafugiirira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi aga Yesu Kurisito. Oba ndigobola ohubabonaho oba pumayo ne ni pulira huŋulira ebibaŋambaho, nenda pulire ti muhiiri bagumu era muhola hirala mu huŋiriŋania abo abaŋiriŋania Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi.
1.28: Mutatya abo ababahiyaania ko habe habonero ahalaga haati Hatonda aja hubasihiirisa aye abaŋe enywe obulamu obutaŋwaŋo.
1.29: Hatonda genda mubonaabone hulwa Kurisito, sosi humufugiirira bufugiirire hyoŋene.
1.30: Mwesi muli mu lutalo njʼolwene hyʼolu nali ni nalwo ni ndi eyo era olu muŋulira muuti kiŋiriŋana mu komera muno.

2.1: Ohuba bulala ni Kurisito hibaŋa amaani? Olwohuba abenda sihibasangaasa? Muli bulala nʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu? Muŋambanira ehisasabirisi era hiisi muutu asaasira owahye?
2.2: Olwʼehyo, mbahubbirisa ohusangaasa ni muŋeega hirala, ni mwendana era ni muli nʼomwoyo mulala.
2.3: Muteyendesanga ebiraŋi mweŋene oba olwʼohwepaahapaaha aye mu hweŋomeha muŋirenga abaatu abandi ohuba nʼeŋono ohubahiraho.
2.4: Simufanga hu byenywe byoŋene aye mufenga nohu byʼabandi boosi.
2.5: Mubenga nʼepeega hyʼeyi Yesu Kurisito gaali ni nayo,
2.6: Wayire Kurisito gaali Hatonda, sigasigala mu hifo ehyo.
2.7: Aye getusaho eŋono lirye, gafugiirira ohufuuha omuŋeeresa gasaaliwa ngʼomuutu.
2.8: Era mu huba omuutu, gaali mugondi nʼohwolera erala olu gafa hu musalabba.
2.9: Olwʼehyo Hatonda gaamuŋa obubbala, nʼobuŋangi nʼesiina erihira amasiina gosigosi obuŋangi,
2.10: ebitonde byosibyosi ebiri mwigulu nohu hyalo, era ni nʼebyo ebiri ŋaasi wehyalo bihubbirenga Yesu oyo amafuha,
2.11: era abaatu bosibosi baŋe Hatonda Bbaabba eŋono ni babbutula baati Yesu Kurisito nje Musengwa. Ohumasamasa hyʼemunyeenye mu hyalo
2.12: Olwʼehyo, balebe bange abahoda, ngʼolu mubaayenga ni mugondera Hatonda sosi ni ndi eyo ni nenywe hyoŋene aye hu nyanga yino ni mbulayo, mweyongere ohuhola ebiitu ebisaanira abaatu aba Hatonda ganoŋola. Muhole hino nʼohuteetema olwʼohumuŋa eŋono
2.13: olwohuba Hatonda njʼabayeeda ohwenda ohuhola ebigenda muhole era gaabaŋa nʼamaani ohubihola.
2.14: Ebiitu byosibyosi ebi muhola, mubiholenga ni mutemulugunya oba ni mutaŋahana nʼabahyenywe.
2.15: Ni muhola muutyo, eriŋuma muutu yesiyesi aliboloobya era mumenye mu bulamu obulaŋi ngʼabaana ba Hatonda mu hyalo hino ehyagodama era ehijuuye abaatu abahola ebibi. Mu hyalo hino, mube hyʼemunyeenye ejihosya egulu.
2.16: Mwegumye ohulomera abaatu ehibono hya Hatonda, ehibaleetera ohusuna obulamu obutaŋwaŋo. Singa muhola muutyo, muja hundeetera ohuba nʼohwenyumiirisa hu ludaalo olwʼekomerero olu Kurisito aligoboleraho, ohufabiina hwange eyo sihwali hufuuŋa muuya mu hisero.
2.17: Singa banjita, amafugi gange galiba hyʼehyohunywa ehibalitufuula ohwongera hu ŋongo nʼobuŋeeresa wenywe olwʼohufugiirira Kurisito era ehyo hindeetera ohusangaalira ŋalala ni nenywe mwesimwesi.
2.18: Era mwesi musangaalire ŋalala ni nange. Temuseewo nʼEpafuladito
2.19: Musengwa Yesu Kurisito nʼalisiima, suubira ohubatumira Temuseewo mangu, ahene agobole gandomere ebibafaho nahagobolamo amaani.
2.20: Puma wundi yesiyesi abalumirwa bugali hya niye.
2.21: Olwohuba abahira obungi beyendulira byawe, sibafayo hu ebi Yesu Kurisito genda.
2.22: Aye mumanyire muuti Temuseewo abaaye mwesigwa olwohuba ngʼomwana ni semwana, huholeeye ŋalala omulimo ogwʼohubuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi.
2.23: Suubira ohumuŋindiha eyo oluvanyuma lwʼohumanya ebiitu ngʼolu bitiina eno.
2.24: Era kahasa ti Musengwa anahaganye bandehula, nga niija eyo mu hiseera ehitali hyaŋale.
2.25: Aye ni kiiri huuja eyo, mbwene ti hiraŋi ohubaŋindihira omuŋeeresa wahyange era owoluganda Epafuladito oyu mwatumira ohunjeedanga.
2.26: Olwohuba genda bugali mumuhubbeho emoni ko weyite olwʼohunyolwa ohu ali ni nahwo olwʼohumanya ati mwaŋulira ngʼolu galwala.
2.27: Hituufu galwala era ŋatono afe aye Hatonda gamuŋambira ehisa, sigasaasira niye yeŋene aye ni nange keesi, gaaponia obutahi.
2.28: Cʼehigira nenda bugali ohumutuma eyo, ko mwahasangaala ni mumuweneho era keesi ndeheraŋo ohweŋendeherera.
2.29: Mumusangaalire mu kola eyʼabaatu ba Musengwa. Era muŋenga abaatu hyʼabo eŋono,
2.30: olwohuba gaŋonera hu haala ohufa ni ganjeeda mu mulimo gwa Kurisito hu lwenywe.

3.1: Aboluganda, musangaalenga olwa Musengwa weefe. Era ŋaŋuma bubi ohubaŋandiihira hu biitu njʼebyene olwohuba hija hubayeeda ohwehuuma abasomesa abʼobudulingi.
3.2: Mwehuumenga abaatu abo abali nʼesambo embi, Abayudaaya abasomesa mbo Hatonda genda muhomole omubiri obubiri.
3.3: Ndiife ohwasuna ohuhomola ohutuufu, olwohuba hujumirya Hatonda ngʼolu Omwoyo wuwe atuluŋamya era hwenyumiirisa olwa Yesu Kurisito, sihwesiga bulombolombo wʼabaatu ohutunoŋola.
3.4: Ni ŋaba ni ŋaliŋo omuutu owenyumirisa mu bikolwa ohunoŋola omuutu, ese ndi nʼebingi ebyʼohwenyumihirisamo.
3.5: Olwohuba ni baasaala, nahena endaalo munaana nga baakomola. Nasaaliwa Muyisirayiri, ohuŋwa mu hiha hya Bbenjamini, ndi Mubbebbulaniya endiho, mu huŋamba amagambi gʼEhiyudaaya, naali Mufalisaayo.
3.6: Naali nʼehinani mu huhiyaania abafugiirira Kurisito, ni netemaho mutwe mu huhuuma amagambi era ni neranga mugwalaafu.
3.7: Aye ebyo byosibyosi ebi naali ni peega ti byamugaso, ŋaahani mbibona nga sibyamugaso olwa Kurisito.
3.8: Ehituufu ehyene, ebiitu byosibyosi mbibona nga biŋuma mugaso olwohuba ohufugiirira Yesu Kurisito Musengwa hiitu hyamagoba amabitiirifu ohuhira byosibyosi.
3.9: Era sifululuhana huba mugwalaafu hu lwange olwʼohuhuuma amagambi gʼEhiyudaaya. Aye obugwalaafu obuŋwa eyiri Hatonda, hubusuna olwʼohufugiirira Kurisito.
3.10: Nenda ohutegeera Kurisito nʼamaani agamulamusa. Nenda mbite mu hubonaabona hyʼolu niye gabonaabona, faane hyaniye mu hufa huhwe.
3.11: Era keesi ni suubira ti ndiramuha.
3.12: Ese sindoma ti ehyo kenire ohuhisuna, ohutusaho ndi nʼohutiina mu moni, ohusuna ehyo ehi Yesu Kurisito gagenderera mu hufuula ohuba owuwe.
3.13: Aboluganda, manyire ti kiiri husuna ehifaabinira aye ehi kola njʼohwibirira ebyʼegongo nʼatiina mu moni.
3.14: Ehi kola njʼohwenda ohwola hu mugoye, ohusuna omuhemba ogu Hatonda gaategehera mwigulu olwʼohwenda ohufuula faane ni Yesu Kurisito.
3.15: Ŋaahani efe abaŋangafu mu hufugiirira, huli nʼohuba nʼepeega njʼenyene. Aye oba mu ngeri eyindi muŋeega lundi, Hatonda abayeede mutegeere.
3.16: Aye hugumire hu ehyo ehi hwasuna.
3.17: Aboluganda, mwesimwesi muŋire obulamu wange ko nʼowabandi abali nʼesambo endaŋi ngʼehyohuboneraho ngʼolu hwabasomesa.
3.18: Ngʼolu mbalomeeye emirundi nyingi era nindi ngobolamo ni ndira nʼamasiga, ti ŋaliŋo bangi abacaawa obuhwenda obuŋamba hu hufa hwa Yesu Kurisito hu musalabba.
3.19: Ekomerero yaawe huliba husihiiriha, ehida hyafuuha hatonda waawe nindi ebyahabaŋambisye esoni njʼebibenyumirihisamo, nʼebiŋeego byawe babiheneeye hu byʼehyalo.
3.20: Aye efe obutaka weefe buli mwigulu era huhuumirira Musengwa weefe Yesu Kurisito Omunoŋosi, ohugobola.
3.21: Alifuula emibiri jeefe eminafu era ejifa ohuba hyʼogugwe ogutalifa olwʼamaani nʼobuŋangi wuwe.

4.1: Aboluganda abahoda era abapembaho mu mwoyo gwange, musangaasa era nenyumiirisa hu lwenywe, mube bagumu mu hufugiirira Musengwa.
4.2: Negayirira Ewudiya ni Sutuke baganye babe hirala olwa Musengwa.
4.3: Kusunga muŋeeresa wahyange omwesigwa, oyeede abahasi abo bahole hirala. Olwohuba, ŋalala ni Kelemeeti ko nʼabaŋeeresa abandi aba masiina gaawe gali mu hitabo ehyʼobulamu, baahola ni nange omulimo ogwʼohubuulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi.
4.4: Hiisi hiseera musangaalenga olwohuba muli bulala ni Musengwa. Nindi ngobolamo ti musangaalenga.
4.5: Muŋambenga abaatu bosibosi nʼohwegenderesa olwohuba Musengwa ali huupi hugobola.
4.6: Muteŋendehereranga olwʼehiitu hyosihyosi aye ebyetaago byenywe byosibyosi mubiŋambyenga Hatonda ni musaba nʼohwegalihira era nʼohweyaasa.
4.7: Era emiyaaya ja Hatonda ejihutaŋanga hutegeerera erala, jihuumenga emyoyo nʼebiŋeego byenywe mu Yesu Kurisito.
4.8: Aboluganda, ebiŋeego byenywe bibenga hu biitu ebyomunina, ebiraŋi, ebyʼamazima, ebireetera abaatu ohubaŋa eŋono, ebiruŋamu era ebisaana.
4.9: Hiisi ebi mwega oba ebi mwasuna ohuŋwa eyi ndi oba ebi mwabona mu ese oba mwaŋulira ni ndoma, ebyo njʼebi muba ni muta mu kola. Era Hatonda atuŋa emiyaaya aja huba ni nenywe. Ohweyaasa olwʼobuyeedi
4.10: Ndi musangaafu bugali olwa Musengwa olwohuba wayire mubaaye muhenire ebbanga ni ŋuma buyeedi obu muupa, mutandihire ohufaaho. Hituufu mubaaye mufaayo aye ni muŋuma ngeri eyʼohulaga.
4.11: Sindoma hino olwohuba ndibubi. Nahena ohwiga ohubaŋo mu mbeera yosiyosi.
4.12: Mbitire mu mbeera eyʼohuŋuma haatu hosihosi, nindi nʼembeera eyʼohuba ni nabyo mu bungi. Ngumira embeera yosiyosi oba huba ni nabyo oba hulumwa enjala, ohuba nʼebingi oba ohubuliriraho erala haatu hosihosi.
4.13: Sobola ohubaŋo mu hiisi mbeera olwʼamaani ga Kurisito.
4.14: Aye mwahola bulaŋi ohunjeeda mu bigosi byange.
4.15: Bahyange Abafilipi, mumanyire muuti ni naŋwa e Makedoniya, mwali mwahafugiirira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi era eŋuma hibbubbu hyʼabafugiirira Kurisito abanyeŋimbaho mu songa yʼohugaba nʼohusuna, ohutusaho enywe mweŋene.
4.16: Era ngʼolu naali e Sesalonika, mwapeeresa obuyeedi emirundi ejiŋera.
4.17: Sindoma hino olwohuba nenda muupe obuyeedi aye nenda mwahasuna omuhemba olwʼehyere hyenywe.
4.18: Obuyeedi obu mwaŋa Epafuladito ohuleeta, buukena. Buli hyʼahasyololo ahaŋunya obulaŋi ahaŋwa mu hyayo ehibaŋongire eri Hatonda gasangaala.
4.19: Era Hatonda wange alibaŋa hiisi ehi mwenda, nʼatusa hu buŋinda wuwe obubitiirifu obuli mu Yesu Kurisito.
4.20: Abaatu baŋenga Hatonda weefe era Seefe eŋono emirembe nʼemirembe. Amiina. Ohuseebula
4.22: Abagwalaafu bosibosi ohuhirira erala abali mu lubiri lwa Kayisaali babahehiseeho.
4.23: Ehisasabirisi hya Musengwa Yesu Kurisito hibe ni nenywe. Amiina.

1.1: Ndiise Pawulo omuhwenda wa Yesu Kurisito olwʼohusiima hwa Hatonda. Ndi nʼomulebe yeefe Temuseewo,
1.2: mbaŋandiihira enywe abaatu ba Hatonda abesigwa era abafugiirira Kurisito abali mu hibuga ehyʼe Kolosaayi. Hatonda Seefe abaŋambire ehisasabirisi era abaŋe nʼemiyaaya. Ohusaba nʼohweyaasa hwa Pawulo
1.3: Habuhyabuhya ni hubasabira, hweyaasa Hatonda Semwana wa Yesu Kurisito Musengwa weefe,
1.4: olwohuba hwaŋulira ngʼolu mufugiirira Yesu Kurisito era ngʼolu mwenda abagwaalafu bosibosi.
1.5: Ohufugiirira Yesu Kurisito nʼohwenda abaatu ba Hatonda ohumuli ni nahwo, bisimuha mu esuubi eri muli ni nalyo eryohusuna ebiraŋi ebi gabategehera mwigulu. Esuubi eryo, mwalisuna olu mwaŋulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi agʼamazima.
1.6: Amaŋuliro ago gatiina ni gahwana ehyalo hyosihyosi ni galeetera abaatu ekabi ngʼolu gaholire mu enywe, ohuŋwera erala hu ludaalo olu mweheerera ohuŋulira amazima agaŋamba hu hisasabirisi hya Hatonda mwahifaania.
1.7: Epafuraasi omutambi wahyefe, omuhoda, omwesigwa era omuŋeeresa wa Kurisito njʼowabasomesa Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi ago hu lwefe.
1.8: Era gatuŋayira nohu ngeri eyi mwendamo abaatu ba Hatonda ngʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu njʼabatangirira.
1.9: Olwʼehyo, ohuŋwa olu hwaŋulira huuti mufugiirira Yesu, habuhyabuhya sihuleherangaho hubasabira, Hatonda abaŋe ohumanya ohuŋwa ewʼOmwoyo Omutukuvu, mufaanie ebi genda.
1.10: Husaba huutyo muŋange ohwebisya mu sambo esaana era esangaasa Musengwa mu hiisi ngeri ni muhola ebiraŋi era mweyongere ohumanya Hatonda,
1.11: abaŋe amaani ko muŋange ohwehaliiriha hiisi higosi ni muli basangaafu,
1.12: ni mweyaasa Hatonda Seefe agira ni muli bagwalaafu, abali mu njase yiye era mulisuna ekabi jije josijosi.
1.13: Olwohuba gaatutusa mu wahabaha wa Sitaani owʼehiirema gatuŋira mu buŋugi wʼOmwana wuwe omuhoda,
1.14: era ohubita mu Mwana oyo, Hatonda gatununula ngʼatusoniŋa ebibi. 1 Owegingihiriri wa Kurisito
1.15: Kurisito oyo pomu Hatonda ataboneha abonehera, njʼOmwana wuwe ahira obuŋangi era aŋuga hiisi hiitu.
1.16: Hatonda gaabita mu Kurisito oyo ohutonda ebiitu byosibyosi mwigulu nohu hyalo, ebyo ebiboneha nʼebitaboneha, abahabaha nʼabanamaani nʼobuŋangi wosiwosi. Ebiitu byosibyosi bibye era njʼagira byabaŋo.
1.17: Kurisito gaaliŋo ni ŋahiiri hubaŋo ehiitu hyosihyosi era njʼaŋambirira byosibyosi.
1.18: Kurisito njʼomutwe gwʼomubiri gugwe, ko mbabamufugiirira era njʼesimuho yʼobulamu waawe. Njʼomudaayi ohuŋwa mu bafu ko aŋuge hiisi hiitu.
1.19: Hatonda gasalaŋo ati ehyo ehi ali mu wiijufu hibe mu Kurisito,
1.20: era nʼabita mu Mwana wuwe oyo, galeetaŋo omuhago ŋagati wuwe nʼebiitu byosibyosi ebiri mwigulu nohu hyalo. Mu ngeri eyo, Kurisito gataŋo emiyaaya olwʼamafugi gage olu gafa hu musalabba.
1.21: Ni mwali ni mu hiri hufugiirira Kurisito, mwali basigu mu ebiŋeego nʼebikolwa byenywe ebibi era ni muŋuma ekolagana endaŋi ni Hatonda.
1.22: Aye ŋaahani Hatonda gafaaŋana ni nenywe nʼabita mu mubiri gwa Kurisito olu gafa hu musalabba ko mube bagwalaafu ni muŋumaho hamogo wayire omusango gwosigwosi mu moni jije.
1.23: Mutiine mu moni ni muli bagumu mu hufugiirira Kurisito era mutadanya esuubi eri mwasuna olu mwaŋulira Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi. Amaŋuliro ago, njʼagababuulira hiisi muutu hu hyalo era keesi Pawulo nafuuha mulala hu bagabuulira. Obuŋeeresa wa Pawulo eyiri abafugiirira Kurisito
1.24: Sifayo wayire ndi hugada kasita ohugada huno ohu ngada, ngada hu lwenywe ni nongerera hu ohwo ohu Yesu Kurisito gagada hu lwʼabo abamufugiirira.
1.25: Hatonda gaafuula omuŋeeresa wʼabafugiirira Kurisito era gaapa omulimo ogwʼohubalomera ehibono hihye mu wiijufu.
1.26: Amaŋuliro Amalaŋi ago, njʼehyama ehi gaali nʼagihise abaatu aye ŋaahani ahihwehuliiye ababe.
1.27: Hatonda gabahwehulira ehyama ehyo olwohuba gendiire enywe Abatali Bayudaaya mwesi muhitegeere ngʼolu hiri ehyʼomugaso bugali weene era ehyʼeŋono. Ehyama ehyo cʼehino ti Kurisito ali mu enywe, njʼesuubi lyenywe eryohusuna eŋono lya Hatonda.
1.28: Olwʼehyo, hulomera hiisi muutu ebiŋamba hu Kurisito oyo ni hubatebusa era ni hubasomesa nʼamagesi aga Hatonda atuŋa, ko hiretere hiisi muutu ohuŋuma ehyaŋumiraho mu hufugiirira Kurisito.
1.29: Ehyo cʼehigira ni fululuhana bugali weene olwʼamaani ga Kurisito amabitirifu agabonehera mu ese ni kola emirimo jije.

2.1: Nenda mumanye ngʼolu kalabana bugali weene hu lwenywe nʼabafugiirira Kurisito abali mu hibuga hyʼe Lawodiikiya era ni naabo bosibosi abahiiri huumanya.
2.2: Ehigendererwa hyange, nenda hu bagobosamo amaani era mube mu bulala mu hwendana ko mufaanihisye erala mu wiijufu ngʼolu Kurisito njʼehyama hya Hatonda.
2.3: Kurisito oyo, nje yeŋene agira mwamanya obuŋinda wʼamagesi nʼohumanya hwosihwosi ohuŋwa ewa Hatonda.
2.4: Mbalomera hino ko ŋatabaŋo omuutu kadi mulala agira mwaŋaba ohuŋwa hu mazima nʼabadulingadulinga nʼebibono, habibe binoli biitye.
2.5: Wayire nga sindi ni nenywe mu mubiri, ndi ŋalala ni nenywe mu mwoyo era sangaala bugali ohuŋulira ti muli mu bulala era bagumu mu hufugiirira Kurisito. Obulamu owʼedembe mu Kurisito
2.6: Ŋaahani ngʼolu mwafugiirira Yesu Kurisito nga Musengwa yenywe, mweyongere ohuba nʼobulamu obumusangaasa.
2.7: Mwegumye ohumufugiirira ko muŋangale mu hufugiirira ohwo ni mwema hu ebyo ebi babasomesa era mutadembanga humweyaasa.
2.8: Mwehuumenga ŋatabaŋo muutu kadi mulala agira mwaŋaba nʼatambisa obulombolombo wʼabaatu obuŋumamo mahulu aye obudulingi owereere. Esomesa hyʼeyo siyiŋwa yiri Kurisito aye yiŋwa eyiri emisambwa ejinyopire ehyalo hino.
2.9: Kurisito nje Hatonda mu mubiri gwʼobuutu,
2.10: era mwesi olwohuba hirala ni Kurisito, eŋuma ehindi ehi mwenda ohubanoŋola. Kurisito oyo nje Musengwa era aŋuga abanamaani nʼabobuŋangi bosibosi.
2.11: Kurisito gabahomola mu bulamu wenywe owʼomwoyo, ngʼabambulaho ohwegomba hwʼomubiri olu bamuhomerera hu musalabba.
2.12: Era ni bababatiza, hyali oti hani mwesi babasiiha ni Kurisito era nga mulamuhira ŋalala ni naye olwʼohufugiirira Hatonda owamulamusa.
2.13: Ni mwali ni muhiiri hufugiirira Kurisito, mwali bafu mu mwoyo olwʼebibi byenywe era ohwegomba hwʼomubiri ni hubaŋuga aye Hatonda gabaŋa obulamu obunyaaha nʼabita mu Kurisito era gatusoniŋa ebibi byefe byosibyosi.
2.14: Hatonda gatutusaho ebbanja eryʼehibi gaahena galisalamo olu bahomerera Yesu hu musalabba.
2.15: Era hu musalabba ohwo, njʼohu gaŋangulira abanamaani nʼabobuŋangi, gabatusaho ebisoosa ngʼabaswasa mu lwijuuye.
2.16: Olwʼehyo, mutaganyanga omuutu yesiyesi ohubasalira omusango hu biŋamba hu byʼohulya oba ebyohunywa oba hu ndaalo ekulu oba hu byʼembaga eja hiisi mwaha oba hu byʼohubaluha hwʼomwesi wayire ebiŋamba hu ludaalo lwa Sabbaato.
2.17: Ebiitu hyʼebyo, bisisigo busisigo aye Kurisito njʼamazima, oyu byali ni biraga biiti gaali aja huuja.
2.18: Mutaganya abaatu abo, abeefuula ohuba nʼohwolesewa ohwenjabulo bagira mwajumirya abamalayika, mwaba nʼohweŋomeha ni mwegudya, mwafiirwa obunoŋosi. Abaatu hyʼabo baali nʼohumanya hwʼabaatu buutu era nʼohwepaahapaaha hwawe, panaŋo.
2.19: Abaatu abo, beyabula hu Kurisito omutwe gwʼabafugiirira era aliisa omubiri gwosigwosi, gaguŋimba ŋalala hyʼolu owongero nʼemisiŋa bihola, nga ko guhula ngʼolu Hatonda genda.
2.20: Kurisito ni gafa, mwesi muli oti hani mwafiira ŋalala ni naye nga muŋangula emisambwa ejinyopire ehyalo hino. Ŋaahani lwahiina muŋamba obulombolombo wʼabo ababaloma baati mbo,
2.21: “Otaŋamba hu hirebe oba otalya hino oba otaholanga oti?”
2.22: Bahyange, obulombolombo hyʼobwo buŋamba hu ebyohunywa nʼebyohulya ebiŋwaŋo, ebyo byʼabaatu buutu era ŋaŋuma ehi bigasa.
2.23: Wayire obulombolombo owo, buboneha hyʼehiitu ehyʼamahulu mu kola eyʼohujumirya nʼohweŋomeha ohwʼobudulingi ko nʼekola eyʼohwegudya eyi abaatu abeene baseegaŋo ohusangaasa Hatonda, biŋuma aŋa biyeedera omuutu ohuŋangula ohwegomba hwʼomubiri.

3.1: Ale ngʼolu mwalamuhira ŋalala ni Kurisito mu byʼomwoyo era mwasuna obulamu obunyaaha, muŋembenga hu biri mwigulu eyi Kurisito gehaaye mu hifo ehyʼeŋono hu lubega lwʼomuhono omulungi ogwa Hatonda.
3.2: Muŋembenga hu biitu ebyomwigulu sosi ebibi ebyohu hyalo huno,
3.3: olwohuba muli oti hani mwafa era obulamu wenywe babuhweha mu Kurisito ewa Hatonda.
3.4: Kurisito esimuho yʼobulamu wenywe obunyaaha olu aligobola, mwesi balibahwehulira ŋalala ni naye mu eŋono lirye. Obulamu obuhale nʼobunyaaha
3.5: Ŋaahani mweyambule ohwegomba ohwʼomubiri hyʼobuhwedi, ohuba nʼemoni enyangu, ohwejabaata ko nʼohuyayaanira ebiitu ebibi ebyʼehyalo hino. Olwohuba ehyo hiri hyʼohujumirya ebiitu ebitali Hatonda.
3.6: Hatonda aja hugudya abaatu abahola ebiitu hyʼebyo, nʼehiruŋi.
3.7: Era mwesi ebyo njʼebimwaholanga ni mwali ni muhiiri hufugiirira Yesu.
3.8: Aye ŋaahani mweyambule ebiitu hyʼetima, ohuŋalaatana, ohuloma ebyakalebule nʼohuŋemula era bitatulanga nomu hanwa henywe.
3.9: Mutaduliŋananga olwohuba mweyambula obulamu obuhale nʼebikolwa ebibi ebi mwaholanga ni mu hiri hufugiirira Yesu,
3.10: nga muhena mwambala obulamu obunyaaha ohuŋwa ewa Hatonda era obu ali hugobosa bunyaaha ko mwahamutegeera bulaŋi.
3.11: Olwʼehyo, sihyamahulu ohuba Omuyudaaya oba Atali Muyudaaya, omuhomole oba atali muhomole, omulugendwa, atali mugunjuhi, omwidu oba atali mwidu aye Kurisito njʼehihulu era ali mu bosibosi, abamufugiirira.
3.12: Olwʼehyo, ngʼolu Hatonda gabatobola ohuba abaatu babe abahoda gaahena gabagwalaasa, mubenga nʼomwoyo ogusaasira, nʼehyere nʼohweŋomeha nʼohweyisa ŋaasi ko nʼohwehaliriha.
3.13: Hiisi muutu gehalirihenga era asoniŋenga owahye hiisi olu ŋanabengaŋo ohweŋuluŋunya. Musoniŋanenga hyʼolu Musengwa gabasoniŋa.
3.14: Era hu ebyo byosibyosi, mumeedeho nʼohwendana olwohuba njʼohubanywanywasa mwesimwesi mu bulala.
3.15: Emiyaaya eji Kurisito atuŋa jibaŋe ohuba abateehi mu myoyo jenywe. Olwohuba hyʼomubiri omulala, Hatonda gabalanga ohumenya mu miyaaya hiisi muutu nʼowahye. Era mumweyaasenga humweyaasa.
3.16: Obuhwenda obuŋamba hu Kurisito bubenga mu bulamu wenywe mu wiijufu, ni musomesania era hiisi muutu nʼalabbira owahye nʼamagesi gosigosi. Era mwemberenga Hatonda e Zabbuli nʼenyembo ejʼohumujumirya nʼeji Mwoyo abaŋa ohuyiiya, nʼohweyaasa mu myoyo jenywe.
3.17: Hiisi hiitu ehi muloma oba ehi muhola, muhiholenga ngʼabahihirira Yesu Musengwa weefe ni mweyaasa Hatonda Seefe ohubita mu Yesu oyo. Ebi husaanira ohuhola mu bulamu obunyaaha
3.18: Abahasi, muŋulirenga abawamwenywe ngʼolu Musengwa genda.
3.19: Abasinde, mwendenga abahasi benywe era mutabahambuŋaliranga.
3.20: Abaana, muŋulirenga abasaaye benywe mu hiisi hiitu olwohuba ehyo hisangaasa Musengwa.
3.21: Abasaaye mutanyigirisanga baana benywe, bahanda baŋwamo amaani.
3.22: Abeedu, muŋulirenga abasengwa benywe mu hiisi hiitu, ehyo mutahiholanga ni babataayeho emoni ohusuna obuhoda aye muhiholenga ni muhenereeye olwʼohuŋa Musengwa eŋono.
3.23: Hiisi ehi muhola, muhiholenga nʼomwoyo mulala hyʼabaholera Musengwa sosi abaatu.
3.24: Muhebulire muuti Musengwa aja hubaŋa omuhemba ngʼolu gasuubisa, olwohuba mu butuufu oweene Kurisito njʼoyu muŋeeresa.
3.25: Oyo ahola ebibi, aja husuna omuhemba ogwolana nʼebibi bibye olwohuba Hatonda aŋuma muutu yesiyesi oyu aboola.

4.1: Abasengwa, mubisyenga abeedu benywe bulaŋi era ni mutehubbira. Muhebulire muuti mwesi muli ni Musengwa mwigulu abaliho obuŋangi.
4.2: Mwegumyenga ohusaba era mutengeyo omwoyo hu ebi musaba ni mutayeho nʼohumweyaasa.
4.3: Era hwesi mutusabirenga, Hatonda atwigulireŋo engira hulomere abaatu obuhwenda obuŋamba hu Kurisito. Era olwʼohulomera Abatali Bayudaaya ehyama ehyo, cʼehigira ni ndi mu komera.
4.4: Muusabire, ndomere abaatu obuhwenda owo ngʼolu hiseene ko bahabutegeera bulaŋi.
4.5: Mwebisyenga mu kola eyʼamagesi eyiri abo abahiiri hufugiirira Kurisito era mutambisenga hiisi kabi eyi muba ni nayo bulaŋi.
4.6: Emboosi yenywe nʼabatafugiirira Yesu yibenga ndaŋi era eyisangaasa ko muŋange ohumanya engeri eyʼohwanuhulamo omuutu nʼaba nʼehyabuusa. Obuheese
4.7: Oboluganda Tukikasi, omuhoda era omuŋeeresa wahyefe omwesigwa oyu hutamba ni naye omulimo gwa Musengwa aja hubalomera byosibyosi ebiifaho.
4.8: Cʼehigira ndihumutuma eyo mwahamanya ngʼolu huli eno era ehindi abagobosemo nʼamaani mu hufugiirira hwenywe.
4.9: Tukikasi alihuuja eyo ni Onesimo mulebe yeefe omuhoda era omwesigwa. Onesimo oyo mulala hunywe eyo era baja hubalomera byosibyosi ebitufaho.
4.10: Arisitaluuko omusibe wahyange ni Mariko omwiŋwa wa Bbalunaba, babahehiise. Mwasuna obuhwenda muuti Mariko ali hutegeha ohuuja eyo, kale nʼanahaaje mumusangaaliranga.
4.11: Ni Yesu oyu balanga erindi baati Yusito, abahehiseeho. Abo njʼAbayudaaya boŋene abaakola ni nabo omulimo gwa Hatonda era bamugaso bugali eyi ndi.
